Name: Diriyah Company l شركة الدرعية
Description:
Diriyah Company is the developer shaping the future of Saudi Arabia’s most iconic destination, honoring its heritage while embracing innovation. 
Rooted in over 300 years of history, we are transforming Diriyah into a world-class cultural and lifestyle destination that celebrates the birthplace of the Kingdom, including its rich heritage and distinctive Najdi architecture, while embracing innovation and sustainable development. 

A subsidiary of the Public Investment Fund (PIF), Diriyah represents national pride and is a key contributor to the Saudi Vision 2030. Through strategic urban development, exceptional hospitality, cultural preservation, and a commitment to sustainable growth, Diriyah Company is building a vibrant, dynamic community where history and modernity come together seamlessly.

Join us on our journey to make Diriyah not only a place but a global meeting destination—where heritage meets the future and culture comes to life.

شركة الدرعية مطور عقاري يشكل مستقبل أكبر وجهة تراثية في العالم ومهد الانطلاقة السعودية؛ من خلال الحفاظ على إرثها 

المتجذر لأكثر من 300 عام من، في تحويل الدرعية إلى وجهة ثقافية بنمط حياة عالمي المستوى يحتفي بتراث المملكة الغني، بما في ذلك طرازها المعماري النجدي الأصيل مع تبني الابتكار والتنمية المستدامة.

وهي شركة تابعة لصندوق الاستثمارات العامة،لتكونا رافدًا محورياً في تعزيز  الفخر الوطني و مساهما رئيسيا في رؤية السعودية 2030. من خلال التنمية الحضرية الاستراتيجية والضيافة الاستثنائية والحفاظ على الثقافة والالتزام بالنمو المستدام، وبناء مجتمع حيوي ينبض بالحياة في بيئة تجتمع فيها الحداثة مع الإرث 

تابع رحلتنا في تعظيم مكانة الدرعية محلياً وعالمياً.

Name: New Murabba
Description:
New Murabba is a wholly owned subsidiary of the Public Investment Fund (PIF), and its Board of Directors is Chaired by His Royal Highness Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.

New Murabba aims to develop the world’s largest modern downtown in Riyadh, New Murabba, contributing to the city’s future development in line with Saudi Vision 2030.

New Murabba will be built around the concept of sustainability and will offer a unique living, working and entertainment experience.

At the heart of New Murabba is a new icon, The Mukaab.
An exceptional iconic landmark featuring the latest innovative technologies. The design of The Mukaab includes first-of-its-kind facilities and will be one of the largest built structures in the world. 

The Mukaab will be the world’s first immersive, experiential destination where hospitality, retail and leisure reach new levels, all in breathtaking, ever-changing environments.

Defining Riyadh’s new skyline, The Mukaab will attract visitors from across the world with its incredible state-of-the-art entertainment, dining and retail.

This is the new face of Riyadh.

Name: Expo City Dubai
Description:
Expo City Dubai, the legacy city of Expo 2020 Dubai, is an innovation-driven, people-centric community rooted in the belief that collaboration can propel sustainable progress. Featuring an array of family-friendly attractions and educational, cultural and entertainment experiences, it offers fitness and leisure facilities, F&B options and event venues. 

Covering a total of 3.5sqkm, Expo City Dubai is a focal point on the 2040 Urban Master Plan and will become a hub for the key sectors driving the delivery of the Dubai Economic Agenda (D33). Expo City Dubai’s master plan, revealed in 2024, reaffirms the city as the lynchpin of Dubai’s future growth, offering investment opportunities for future-focused entities to take advantage of its proximity to Al Maktoum International Airport, Jebel Ali Port and Dubai Exhibition Centre. Its prime location and world-class connectivity offers benefits to businesses, investors, developers and residents.

Name: Dar wa Emaar
Description: #دار_وإعمار نطوّر بإلهام نابع من نظرة عصريّة وثقة راسخة ترتقي بجودة حياتك.

Name: Al Balad Development Company
Description:
Al Balad Development Company (BDC) is the heritage-focused master developer and asset manager of Al Balad’s rehabilitation. Wholly owned by the Public Investment Fund, BDC works closely with the Ministry of Culture and Jeddah Historical District Program to develop, restore and manage assets, invest in sectors that support the regeneration of Al Balad, and provide public services for Al Balad.  

شركة تطوير البلد؛ المطور ومدير الأصول التي ستعنى بإعادة إحياء منطقة جدة التاريخية. ستعمل شركة تطوير البلد- المملوكة بالكامل لصندوق الاستثمارات العامة-، مع كل من وزارة الثقافة وبرنامج جدة التاريخية من أجل تأسيس وإعادة ترميم وإدارة الأصول، إلى جانب الاستثمار في القطاعات التي تدعم تطوير البلد، بالإضافة لتوفير الخدمات العامة للمنطقة.

Name: Masdar City
Description: A ground-breaking sustainable urban community and a world-class free zone and technology hub

Name: Remat Al-Riyadh Development Co.
Description:
REMAT Al-Riyadh is the development arm for Riyadh Region Municipality and the strategic enabler for private sector Participation to enhance municipal services and contribute toward improving the quality of life in Riyadh Region.

 

OUR VISION We aim to be one of the leading municipal services and development companies globally to contribute toward the prosperity and sustainable growth of Riyadh Region.

 

OUR MISSION is to offer value-add municipal services and projects through sustainable business models that contribute to building a vibrant and growing society in Riyadh Region.

OUR STRATEGIC PRIORITIES:
- Provide value-add projects and services that contribute to the region's prosperity and improve the quality of life.
- Enable the strategic role of Riyadh municipality.
- Drive financial sustainability.
- Create attractive and innovative business models in partnership with the private sector.

OUR BUSINESS DOMAINS:
- Urban Development.
- Municipal Asset Management.
- Municipal Services.
 
General Enquires: Info@remat.sa

Media Enquires: Media@remat.sa

Careers: TA@remat.sa

Name: Diamond Developers
Description:
Diamond Developers specializes in master planning and designing live-work-thrive, future-ready, and scalable cities under The Sustainable City brand.

Leveraging knowledge from this working proof-of-concept, Diamond Developers embeds practical and sustainable solutions into every master plan based on the three pillars of sustainability: social, environmental and economic. 

Diamond Developers operates under the SEE Solutions arm of SEE Holding.

Name: Mitrelli Urbanization
Description:
Como empresa do sector de Urbanização da Mitrelli, destacamo-nos no mercado pela nossa ampla especialização em projectos de infraestruturas, urbanização, edifícios públicos e gestão de projectos de construção.

Aplicamos a nossa experiência de décadas, pensamento ousado e conhecimento global para moldar cidades, oferecendo espaços inovadores e sustentáveis para governos e comunidades.

Acreditamos que o nosso maior activo é o capital humano, por isso apostamos em equipas de profissionais rigorosamente selecionados, dinâmicos e com elevada formação profissional. Investimos constantemente na formação dos nossos colaboradores, pois acreditamos que esta é uma aposta fundamental para o crescimento da empresa.

O nosso compromisso com a responsabilidade social abrange todas as partes interessadas, incluindo funcionários, clientes, comunidades, fornecedores e investidores.

Esforçamo-nos para fortalecer economicamente e socialmente as comunidades onde trabalhamos e vivemos.

Name: Atrium Ljungberg
Description:
We are no ordinary property company. Buildings are naturally the basis of our operations, but our heart actually lies with the people who stay in them. 

Our goal is to create living environments that people want to and can stay in, now and in the future. Our main focus is on retail and office properties, but our environments also contain housing as well as cultural, service and educational facilities. 

Atrium Ljungberg operates in growth towns and cities in Sweden, principally in Stockholm, Gothenburg,  Malmoe and Uppsala. Please visit http://www.atriumljungberg.se/en/ for more information.

Name: Scet
Description: La SCET est une société de conseil et d’appui aux territoires, spécialiste de l’économie mixte et du développement territorial. Elle tire sa richesse d’un réseau d’entreprises publiques locales de près de 300 adhérents qu’elle conseille et anime depuis 60 ans. La SCET s’appuie sur l’expertise et les compétences de ses 400 collaborateurs – directeurs, consultants experts métiers et techniques – qui œuvrent pour et avec le réseau, au service des collectivités. La richesse des métiers permet à la SCET de proposer une offre intégrée du conseil stratégique à l’accompagnement opérationnel.

Name: Lab of Thought
Description:
We help cities and organizations work with resistance.

Every ambitious mobility plan encounters pushback from fear, lobbies, or misinformation. We turn that friction into momentum.

Through our provocations, experiments, and applied work with partners, we shift debates, expand political space, and unlock the conditions for real change.

We are the antithesis of an engineering firm.
We don’t design your street.
We help you win the cultural and political battles that make change possible.

Name: PE Teknik & Arkitektur
Description: PE is one of Sweden’s leading engineering and architecture consulting firms. As urban planners, we create innovative and sustainable solutions shaping the development of cities and societies. We are represented throughout Sweden and our annual revenue is in excess of SEK 1 billion. PE was founded in 2006 and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm. Find out more at www.pe.se.

Name: Think Afrika City
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ? 

Le Réseau Scientifique International des Métiers des Villes Africaines (RéSIMVA) représente un regroupement dynamique de jeunes africains professionnels-praticiens, doctorants, docteurs ou tout simplement acteurs de la ville africaine, tous titulaires de diplômes en sciences de l’aménagement urbain ou autres sciences connexes répartis à travers le monde. “Think Afrika City” incarne la quintessence des activités déployées par les membres du réseau en faveur de la promotion de l’intelligentsia, de l’innovation urbaine et de la créativité au sein des villes africaines. Il s’incarne dans les avancées et changements contemporains à l’échelle mondiale tout en indexant les spécificités africaines à travers la loupe du partage et de l’apprentissage.

Name: Administrative Capital For Urban Development - ACUD
Description: ACUD is shaping the future of Egypt! We're planning, developing, and transforming Egypt's New Capital into a global hub for innovation, sustainability, and investment.

Name: Granitor
Description:
Granitor är annorlunda. Det märks.

Vi är det lilla familjeföretaget med stort hjärta – och 3350 medarbetare. Granitor ägs och leds av andra generationen Wikströms, med en utpräglad ledningsfilosofi som sätter samarbete, självledarskap och ansvarstagande i fokus. Som bygger starka, självstyrande verksamheter med förmåga att möta alla våra olika kunders utmaningar, varje dag.

På Granitor skapar vi hållbara livsmiljöer när vi utvecklar lokaler och bostäder och förvaltar fastigheter. Vi hjälper industrin, infrastruktur- och byggsektorn att ställa om och utvecklas för framtiden genom installationer, service och systemleveranser. Och vi investerar i banbrytande teknologier med världsförbättrande potential. Tillsammans utvecklar vi välmående samhällen och industrier.

Våra tre övergripande affärsområden:

- Fastighetsutveckling och -förvaltning
- Entreprenad och service
- Tillväxtinvesteringar i utvecklingsbolag

Name: Games Independent Infrastructure and Coordination Authority
Description:
The Games Independent Infrastructure and Coordination Authority will ensure Queensland, Australia and Oceania are ready to successfully host the Brisbane 2032 Olympic and Paralympic Games. 

We will maximise the opportunity and legacy of hosting the Games, for the benefit of all of Queensland.

The Authority will deliver new and upgraded venues for use before, during and long after the Games, as we work towards a more inclusive, sustainable and connected society.

Name: Planning & Development Board(P&D Board)
Description:
The Planning and Development Board, Government of Punjab, is the principal planning organization at the provincial level. It coordinates and monitors development programs and activities of various departments of the provincial government. The department also prepares an overall Medium Term Development Framework (MTDF) of developmental activities in the province. The Medium Term Development Framework lays down the developmental activities to be carried out in the province in various sectors of the provincial economy. In this manner, the Planning & Development Board is one of the main actors in the growth of the economic potential of the province.

The mandate of the Planning and Development Board includes provision of technical support and coordination to various Government departments in their planning activities. The department is also the main government agency working with foreign donors in the province.

Name: Structor
Description:
Structor är ett av Sveriges ledande kunskapsföretag inom bygg, industri och infrastruktur. Vi finns i hela landet och består av specialistbolag med gemensamma värderingar. 

VI SER MÖJLIGHETER
Det innebär:
- Att tillsammans med våra kunder utveckla projekt och visioner
- Att medarbetare ska utvecklas och erbjudas utmaningar
- Ständig utveckling av vår organisation med nya kompetenser, bolag och kontor

Vår verksamhet präglas av nytänkande, engagerade medarbetare och inte minst av att vi har roligt ihop.

Ledande kunskapsföretag
Structor har på 10 år blivit ett av Sveriges ledande kunskapsföretag inom planering, projektering och genomförande av investeringar i bygg-, industri- och infrastrukturprojekt. Vi arbetar över hela landet med att förverkliga idéer och utveckla projekt tillsammans med våra kunder.

Oavsett var du befinner dig i din arbetsprocess finns Structorbolag som kan hjälpa till. Vi erbjuder kompetens inom detaljplane- och miljöprocesser, fastighetsrätt, projektering, projekt- och byggledning, fastighetsutveckling och förvaltning.

Structors grundfilosofi
Structor består av specialistbolag med gemensamma värderingar. Vi samarbetar i projekt och har gemensam marknadsföring. Vi delar lokaler och andra resurser. Tillsammans vidareutvecklar vi vår gemensamma plattform.

För dig innebär modellen att du får det mindre bolagets fördelar i form av smidighet och korta beslutsvägar samtidigt som hela gruppens samlade kompetens står till ditt förfogande. 

En grupp i ständig utveckling
Sedan starten har vi med god lönsamhet vuxit med ca 30 medarbetare per år. Nya kompetenser knyts hela tiden till gruppen. Vi startar i snitt två nya specialistföretag per år. Bolag som vi bygger från grunden tillsammans med ett antal kunniga personer som vill förverkliga en dröm; att få utveckla ett eget företag. Vår målsättning är att varje specialistbolag, på sin marknad och inom sitt område, ska bli ledande.

Name: Smart Cities Connect
Description:
Smart Cities Connect is where the smart cities community meets. We provide meaningful content and connect a thoughtful community of decision-makers to empower smart cities at all stages of growth.  We accelerate the adoption of smart technology solutions, aid in problem solving, and amplify city resources for the betterment of cities, communities, and their citizens.

Smart Cities Connect presents relevant news covering future ready technologies, impact on resident life, smart buildings, networks, energy, mobility, governance, and more. We host educational webinars and share white papers for public access.

Smart Cities Connect is a TechConnect brand, a division of Advanced Technology International (ATI).

Name: Deutscher Städte- und Gemeindebund
Description: Der Deutsche Städte- und Gemeindebund (DStGB) vertritt die Interessen der deutschen Kommunen auf Landes-, Bundes- und EU-Ebene. Durch 17 Mitgliedsverbände sind 11 000 große, mittlere und kleinere Städte- und Gemeinden über den DStGB organisiert und vernetzt. Der DStGB arbeitet parteiunabhängig und ohne staatliche Zuschüsse.

Name: C40 Cities Finance Facility
Description:
The C40 Cities Finance Facility (CFF) is a joint project of the C40 Cities Climate Leadership Group (C40) and the Deutsche Gesellschaft für Internationale Zusammenarbeit (GIZ) GmbH. It was launched during COP21 in Paris, to support C40 cities in developing and emerging countries in preparing and delivering sustainable, low carbon and climate action projects. 

The CFF is funded by the German Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development (BMZ), USAID, and the UK Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO).

Privacy Policy: https://www.c40.org/privacy-policy/

Name: Hifab
Description:
Hifab is the leading project management company in Sweden. We offer project management services and strategic advice in the construction and infrastructure sectors and actively contribute to our clients’ success. We offer generalists, specialists and entire project management organizations to clients all over Sweden. We are independent from designers and contractors and prefer to be involved in the early project phases in order to safeguard the project implementation from an overall perspective.

Internationally Hifab is offering project management to bi- and multilateral International Financing Institutions, with projects in around 20 countries around the world.  

Listed on the OMX First North stock market

Name: MORPC
Description: The Mid-Ohio Regional Planning Commission (MORPC) is Central Ohio’s regional council with 90 local governments and community partners. We take pride in bringing communities of all sizes and interests together to collaborate on best practices and plan for the future growth and sustainability of our region.

Name: nuanu
Description:
Nuanu is a creative city spanning 44 hectares in Bali, Indonesia, embodying a commitment to harmonious living. This vibrant community of creators, leaders, and changemakers is empowered to foster a culture of positive change.

Designed as an integrated ecosystem, the city features dedicated spaces for education, art & culture, wellness, experience, and nature-inspired living, envisioning a future where these elements seamlessly intertwine.

Name: Mobycon
Description:
Mobycon is an independent consultancy firm based in the Netherlands. Our interdisciplinary team of urban designers, planners, economists, and social scientists are well versed in applying Dutch transport expertise worldwide. What unites this diverse group? A shared goal of making societies less dependent on motorized vehicles: "The car when needed, alternatives where possible." With this goal in mind, we create sustainable transport solutions case-by-case. Each street has its unique history, makeup, and character - one size does not fit all.
 
As a Dutch company, our approach to transport is grounded in a thinking that prioritizes cycling and walking. This logic creates safe, sustainable, and liveable communities equipped for all who wish to use them. We are proud to work with our clients and partners worldwide to inspire, support, and innovate using the Dutch approach.

Name: Metropolitan Area Planning Council (MAPC)
Description:
The Metropolitan Area Planning Council is a regional planning agency serving the people who live and work in the 101 cities and towns of Metropolitan Boston. Our mission is to promote smart growth and regional collaboration.

We work toward sound municipal management, sustainable land use planning, protection of natural resources, efficient and affordable transportation, a diverse housing stock, public safety, economic development, an informed public, and equity and opportunity among people of all backgrounds. Our regional plan, “MetroFuture,” guides our work and engages the public in responsible stewardship of the region’s future.

MAPC is governed by representatives from each city and town in our region, as well as gubernatorial appointees and designees of major public agencies. Each municipality in our region belongs to one of eight MAPC Subregions, led by an MAPC staff member and governed by appointees from each city and town.

Name: Green Line Calgary
Description: The Green Line LRT project is moving ahead! Construction of the SE Segment starts in 2025.

Name: Cambium Inc.
Description:
Cambium is an engineering and consulting firm that guides and supports client decision-making from concept to completion. With five offices across Ontario, Cambium collaborates closely with stakeholders in sectors such as Real Estate, Building Ownership/Management, Public Administration, and Professional Services. Since its inception in 2006, Cambium’s success has been defined by the achievements of its clients.

Cambium offers integrated high-quality expertise for new and existing developments in the built and natural environment  across a wide variety of services including:
Environmental   |   Geotechnical   |   Building Sciences   |   Construction Monitoring

We are one of the largest and fastest-growing independent, employee-owned consulting firms in Ontario with offices in Peterborough, Kingston, Whitby, Ottawa and Barrie.  In addition, Cambium owns and operates a CCIL certified materials testing laboratory for soils, aggregates, concrete, and asphalt analysis.  

Our services are founded on the skills and expertise of our diverse team of over 200 people that includes engineers, hydrogeologists, ecologists, geotechnologists, noise and vibration specialists, laboratory analysts, construction control inspectors, GIS and drafting specialists, surveyors, technologists and technicians.  

Why Choose Us?
Cambium provides personal quality service and works collaboratively with clients from start to finish. We are responsive and provide clients with value, practical solutions and quality work without compromise to budget and project goals. We welcome the opportunity to work with clients that value the importance of mutual understanding, communication, and quality services.  Cambium is large enough to have world-class expertise, but remains responsive and creative; delivering exceptional customer service to guide good decisions.  These are just some of the many things that make Cambium unique.

Name: Ebab
Description:
Vi är ett konsultbolag inom projekt - och fastighetsutveckling. Vi tar fram idéer och skapar verklighet med fokus på en hållbar samhällsutveckling. Vi älskar projekt i alla storlekar och att skapa långsiktiga fastighetsvärden. 

Vi tar ett helhetsgrepp kring ditt projekt vare sig det handlar om stads-och fastighetsutveckling, projekt- och byggledning, Construction Management eller strategiska hållbarhetsfrågor.På Ebab arbetar vitillsammans för en hållbar samhällsutveckling. Vårt team avexperter hjälper dig i rätt riktning.

Kraven är idag större vad gäller social och ekologisk hållbarhet, samtidigt som projekten ska vara genomförbara ur ett ekonomiskt och finansielltperspektiv. Vi hjälper dig i alladelar av förverkligandet från idéer, kalkyler, utredningar och förstudier till hållbarhets- och energirådgivning och byggherrerepresentation samt själva projektgenomförandet oavsett om du väljerCM eller projekt- och byggledning.

Kontakta oss inför ditt nästa projekt!

Name: Regenesis Institute for Regenerative Practice
Description:
The Regenesis Institute for Regenerative Practice offers transformational programs and support systems for practitioners working to create regenerative systems change. Our global community is striving to bring human activities back into alignment with the ecological systems that source us.

Our approach, regenerative development, asks us to fully understand the complexity of living systems and design approaches that honor that complexity. We formed Regenesis Institute to provide capability development and support to those who are called to this path.

Our programs cover living systems thinking, understanding the uniqueness of place, leveraging nodal interventions for regenerative change, and beyond. For nearly 30 years, Regenesis has played an integral role in shaping the global conversation on regeneration. Our community of practitioners continues to evolve and advance this transformative living-systems approach worldwide.

Name: MiZa
Description:
Rooted in Mina Zayed’s legacy as Abu Dhabi’s historic port and shaped by Sheikh Zayed’s enduring vision for progress, MiZa is an innovation-driven neighbourhood where bold ideas are shaped into transformative solutions.  

It is a place designed to address the complex challenges of Abu Dhabi and the UAE, generating both intellectual and material innovations not just for today, but for the future ahead. 

MiZa is a multi-disciplinary ecosystem where the in-betweens of sectors are the starting point for entirely new possibilities, creating industries and products of the future that don’t yet exist. Here, a rich mix of small and medium businesses work alongside major enterprises in one integrated neighbourhood. Innovation happens horizontally and vertically, powered by intentional collaboration across sectors.  

This is a place where ideas are exchanged, experimented with, and made real, enveloped by  new ways of living and working, grounded in place and built with purpose. 

MiZa’s spaces are designed to foster interaction and connection, while year-round programming creates opportunities for participation, shared momentum and business growth.

Name: Cafeína Magazine
Description:
A Cafeína Magazine  trabalha para formar a próxima geração de líderes angolanos, impulsionando novas ideias e inspirando ações que transformem a sociedade. Acreditamos que uma visão inovadora e líderes bem preparados podem trazer mudanças significativas para Angola. 

Através de palestras, eventos, vídeos, cursos e iniciativas filantrópicas, conectamos pessoas motivadas a um público que deseja fazer a diferença. Nossa missão é fomentar um ambiente onde ideias inspiradoras impulsionem o desenvolvimento, provoquem mudanças de mentalidade e gerem impacto em comunidades e em todo o país.

Para a Caffeína, cada ideia é uma oportunidade de progresso e liderança.

Name: Retail Strategies
Description:
Retail Strategies is the most trusted partner for recruiting businesses. We exist to give communities across the United States an advantage in attracting businesses. Our mission is to provide the real estate expertise, tools, and human effort that position deserving towns as alluring locations for national businesses. 

With confidence, we pursue this mission by delivering unparalleled customer service as a unified team with unmatched real estate expertise.

Retail Academy empowers community leaders to take a proactive approach to their retail opportunities by equipping them with tools, marketing collateral, and a list of prospects to properly market their opportunities.

We help communities learn to attract retail, how data provides options, and real estate drives decisions.

Downtown Strategies exists to assist communities in taking the next, or first, step in their Downtown’s journey. 

Revitalizing downtown communities is complex. We are committed to helping you achieve it. 

We identify and create a tailored strategy to enhance, revitalize, and mobilize your community’s efforts. When properly fueled, your Downtown can be a powerful economic, tourism, and quality of life engine. Our team of professionals can help you define your potential and empower you to achieve it.

Name: Australian Development Review
Description: The Australian Development Review reports the latest Urban Development news from around Australia.

Name: Alliance Leisure
Description:
Alliance Leisure is the UK’s leading leisure development specialist. Working in partnership with local authorities, leisure trusts and leisure operators, Alliance Leisure is designing and developing engaging place-based active environments that cater for everyone.

Over the last 25 years, Alliance Leisure has delivered more than 285 projects, ranging from multi-site regeneration projects, involving new build or significant remodelling of leisure sites, through to activating outdoor spaces, 3G pitches and leisure centre modernisations. The company has also been instrumental in working with local authorities to optimise government funding such as the Levelling Up Fund and the Public Sector Decarbonisation Scheme to ensure leisure facilities are efficient, sustainable and remain fit-for-purpose.  These projects represent an investment value of over £470m.  

With a clear focus on community impact and social value, a partnership with Alliance Leisure delivers excellence at every stage of a project from scoping and design through to construction and ongoing sustainability and success. Alliance Leisure boasts a team of leisure experts who are committed to supporting you through the development of your project. From our regional Business Development Teams who will oversee every step of your project, to our Insight and Engagement Teams who provide value at all project stages, from opportunity analysis and consultation through to brand development and marketing activities.

Alliance Leisure is also appointed delivery partner for the UK Leisure Framework, owned and managed by Denbighshire Leisure Ltd (DLL). The UK Leisure Framework is the only Framework in the UK dedicated to leisure development and provides an end-to-end solution for public sector bodies looking to scope, procure, design and build sustainable leisure facilities, taking advantage of efficiencies and expertise at every level of the supply chain.

Name: The Gendered City
Description:
Working at the nexus of community and the built environment, we’re transforming cities into truly inclusive, gender-equitable places. Our multi-layered approach includes:

Diagnostic Indices: Developing tools—like the Gendered Walkability and Public Space Access Indices—to measure and reveal the systemic barriers women face.

FEM.DES Academy: Offering training, research, and participatory methods that dismantle outdated urban planning paradigms and build feminist spatial literacies.

Knowledge Dismantling: Challenging and reframing dominant urban narratives by surfacing silenced histories and lived experiences through storytelling, mapping, and data.

Partnership Building: Collaborating with grassroots groups, local governments, design professionals, and academic institutions to co-create solutions tailored to each city’s unique context.

Our vision is an urban future where women move freely and confidently—where policies, plans, and public spaces reflect and respond to their needs, aspirations, and agency.

Name: Smart City Dialog
Description:
Smart Cities leben die nachhaltige und integrierte Stadtentwicklung. Sie nutzen die Chancen der digitalen Transformation und leiten daraus bedarfsgerechte Lösung ab. Zentrale Herausforderungen sind dabei: 
Wie können wir die Chancen der Informations- und Vernetzungstechnologie in der nachhaltigen und integrierten  Stadtentwicklung nutzen und dabei digital souverän bleiben? Wie können wir lebenswerte Kommunen auch unter neuen Bedingungen gestalten? Wie erhöhen wir Lebensqualität und Möglichkeiten der Teilhabe und Mitgestaltung für jeden Einzelnen?
Nicht nur in Deutschland, sondern weltweit stellt sich die Frage, wie sich unsere Städte und Gemeinden im Zeitalter der Digitalisierung entwickeln werden. Die vom Bundesministerium für Wohnen, Stadtentwicklung und Bauwesen (BMWSB) initiierte Wissens- und Vernetzungsplattform „Smart City Dialog“ trägt dazu bei, Smart Cities gemeinsam im Dialog zwischen Politik, Verwaltung, Wissenschaft und Zivilgesellschaft zu gestalten.

Zum Impressum: https://www.smart-city-dialog.de/impressum

Zur Netiquette für Kommentare auf unserer Unternehmensseite: https://www.smart-city-dialog.de/netiquette-fuer-kommentare-auf-unserer-linkedin-unternehmensseite

Name: PlaceWorks
Description: Based in California, PlaceWorks is one of the premier planning, design, and environmental services firms in the U.S. PlaceWorks' expertise and services span a wide range of planning, design, science and engineering, economics, environmental analysis, and community outreach disciplines. Government agencies, corporations and developers, educational institutions and nonprofit organizations across the country rely on PlaceWorks to consistently provide thoughtful, accurate and thorough solutions to their most complex problems. For more information, visit the firm's website at www.placeworks.com.

Name: Sweden Underground
Description:
Sweden has a long and proud tradition of underground construction and rock engineering. Our progress has been shaped by strong rock conditions and close collaboration between owners, consultants, contractors, and equipment manufacturers — a model that continues to drive innovation and technical excellence.

Early applications of underground space in Sweden included hydroelectric power plants, transport tunnels, and military facilities such as public shelters. The expertise gained from these projects laid the foundation for Sweden’s global reputation in rock engineering, tunnelling, and mining — knowledge that has since been shared and refined around the world.

The Swedish Rock Engineering Association (Svenska Bergteknikforeningen) embodies this collaborative spirit, representing and promoting all aspects of the Swedish tunnelling and mining industry through international networks such as ITA-AITES (International Tunnelling and Underground Space Association) and EFEE (European Federation of Explosives Engineers).

Today, Sweden continues to lead the way in sustainable underground development — from some of the world’s most complex road tunnel projects and new metro systems to tunnelling and mining at great depths. Large underground caverns are also being developed for energy storage and fossil-free steel production.

Sweden Underground serves as a platform to highlight Swedish expertise, innovation, and collaboration in rock engineering and underground construction — connecting professionals, sharing knowledge, and promoting sustainable solutions for the future.

Name: World Tunnel Congress 2025 (WTC 2025)
Description:
Sweden’s experience of underground construction dates back more than a century. This development is sometimes referred to as being a result of good rock conditions and close cooperation between owners, consultants, contractors and machinery manufacturers.

Examples of early use of the underground, other than for mining purposes, include hydroelectric power plants, traffic tunnels and military facilities, including public shelters. The knowledge that was gained has during the last century been shared with the rest of the world and then refined by all of you.
The Swedish Rock Engineering Association is a result of this cooperation. In 1946, the large steel companies began a unique collaboration to develop materials for rock drilling. Today the Swedish Rock Engineering Association represents & highlights all aspects of the Swedish tunnelling and mining industry. (E.g. through ITA-AITES, ISRM & EFEE).

Sweden will shortly be one of the world’s first sustainable and fossil free nations. By the year 2045, Sweden’s net greenhouse gas emissions to the atmosphere will then be less than zero! This is a work in progress and development of technologies and methods is accelerating.

More than a hundred years ago we were the cradle where new technologies were nourished, the dynamite, effective machinery and production methods. Despite our relatively small country we are still leading the way, building one of the most complex underground road tunnel networks, the Bypass Stockholm. 
 
A new metro with one of the deepest underground stations only accessible by elevators. And large rock caverns to store liquid hydrogen with the purpose to produce fossil free steel. As we have done in the past, we want to share our knowledge and experiences with all of you, and gain knowledge and experiences from you. We want to welcome you to Sweden and are excited to meet all of you in the spring of 2025.

Name: Föreningen för samhällsplanering
Description: Ideell förening med fokus på planering för framtidens boende och arbete, infrastruktur, miljö, lokal- och regional utveckling, stadsbyggnad. Föreningen arbetar nationellt och regionalt med kunskapsutveckling och arrangerar mötesplatser, studieresor, kunskapsträffar och andra föreningsaktiviteter. Medlemmar får tidskriften PLAN, nyhetsbrevet ePLAN, inbjudningar till aktiviteter och möjlighet att nätverka andra planeringsintresserade.

Name: Vereinigung für Stadt-, Regional- und Landesplanung (SRL) e.V.
Description:
Die SRL sieht ihre zentrale Aufgabe darin, sich für die Anerkennung der Notwendigkeit von Planung und für eine anspruchsvolle Planungskultur einzusetzen. Planungskultur verlangt Vorgehensweisen, die sich an Merkmalen wie weite fachliche und soziale Mitwirkung, Offenheit für unterschiedliche Lösungen, Verantwortung gegenüber Natur und Mensch sowie Zukunftssicherung orientieren. Dazu bedarf es der Meinungsbildung und des Meinungsaustauschs aller in der räumlichen Planung tätigen Akteure. Die SRL will dabei demokratische Umgangsformen pflegen, stärken und erweitern.

Die SRL versteht sich als demokratisches Netzwerk und lebt von den Aktivitäten ihrer Mitglieder. Ohne das vielfältige ehrenamtliche Engagement wäre das Netzwerk der SRL nicht möglich. Die unterschiedlichen Berufs- und Lebenserfahrungen der Mitglieder führen zu einer Vielfalt von Antworten auf Fragen aus allen Planungsbereichen. Die SRL pflegt eine Planungs- und Gesprächskultur, die mit den entstehenden Konflikten und Unsicherheiten fruchtbar umgeht. Das ist die Voraussetzung für Lebendigkeit, Ideenreichtum und Kreativität der Arbeit der SRL. Die Mitglieder bilden ein fachliches Netzwerk, das der gegenseitigen Information und Unterstützung dient.

Name: CREATE STREETS
Description: Create Streets is a design practice, town-builder and think tank. We lead research, master-planning, design coding and community co-design to help develop and steward beautiful and popular ‘gentle density’ places which residents and neighbours can love for generations. For people, prosperity and planet.

Name: Vinnergi
Description:
Vi är Vinnergi. Den nya generationen teknikkonsulter som utmanar det invanda, inspirerar till nya idéer och med full kraft designar lönsamma resultat för verksamheter inom samhälle, industri, energi och fastigheter.

Vi fungerar som en långsiktig partner med lokal närvaro och kombinerar tre affärsområden som anpassas efter dina behov: ”Communicate”, ”Power” och ”Living”.

Inom affärsområdet ”Communicate” hjälper vi dig att utveckla funktionella och kostnadseffektiva affärslösningar inom fiberinfrastruktur, mobila/fasta nät, IOT och passiv/aktiv infrastruktur. Vi erbjuder även konsulttjänster som teknisk expertis, planering, driftsansvar, dokumentation, upphandling, skräddarsydda projektteam, utveckling, implementering, utbildning och affärsinnovation. 

Inom affärsområdet ”Power” är vi elkonsulter som täcker alla spänningsområden. Från stamnät till region- och lokalnät. Vi utför olika uppdrag som sträcker sig från tidiga förstudier, utredningar, projekteringar, beredningar, koncessioner och miljökonsekvensbeskrivningar till upphandlingar. Vi är dessutom innovativa och rådgivande för utveckling av tekniska lösningar som stödjer förnyelsebar energiproduktion samt energilagring inom tex sol-, vind- och vattenkraft.

Inom affärsområdet Living löser löser våra el- och teleingenjörer utmaningar inom i första hand verksamheter inom fastighet och industri som exempelvis kontor, skolor, sjukhus, forskningsinrättningar, industrianläggningar, bostäder och hotell. Våra team har mångåriga erfarenheter från beställar-, entreprenörs-, och konsultled gör att vi kan bygga smarta enkla system i komplexa miljöer.

Vinnergi arbetar över hela Sverige och har ett dynamiskt, snabbagerande arbetssätt som möjliggör en fullständig anpassningsbarhet för våra kunders behov.

När samhället ständigt förändras vill vi ge dig energin att vinna genom en hållbar affärsutveckling som gör världen lite bättre.

Name: UIV Urban Innovation Vienna
Description:
As the climate and innovation agency of the City of Vienna, we work on the successful development of cities and make metropolises 'fit for the future'. In doing so, we can point to extensive expertise in our core areas of energy, digitalisation, mobility, urban and district development.

We act as an impulse generator and innovation driver and work with our multidisciplinary team in a professional and committed manner on the transformation of cities. Our service portfolio ranges from specific activities with content-related expertise to professional process and innovation management to solve complex urban challenges.

We strengthen the innovative power of cities and support our clients at various levels: Our consulting services range from the development of strategies to the concrete, operational implementation of innovative infrastructure projects. We support a wide range of actors, from administration and politics to business and science, and promote multi-stakeholder dialogue. We also provide services for citizens and thus create awareness for the future issues of cities.

As a company of Wien Holding, we see ourselves as an internal consulting and support unit for all urban development issues and support Vienna on its way to becoming a climate-neutral city in 2040.

Name: cmb – dynamisk prakademi för samhällsbyggare
Description:
Cmb är samhällsbyggnadssektorns främsta partnerskap där näringsliv och akademi tillsammans utvecklar kunnande för ett bättre management och ledarskap som ger; 

•	Ökad produktivitet i din organisation!
•	Bättre kontroll på kostnaderna!
•	Tillgång till ett starkt personligt yrkesnätverk med nya kontakter, relationer och samarbetsmöjligheter!

”Cmb samlar hela byggbranschen. Vårt uppdrag, att verka för ett ökat bostadsbyggande, förutsätter att vi förstår och har kunskap om hela processen. Nätverket inom cmb är väldigt intressant – vi vill gärna lära känna aktörerna bättre och de oss för ett bättre samarbete.”

- Helena Carling, samhällsbyggnadschef på Länsstyrelsen Västra Götaland, ny partner i cmb under 2018.


•	Vi vet att managementfrågan är avgörande för sektorns framtid.
•	Företag och organisationer som vill påverka utvecklingen i sektorn är partner i cmb.
•	Cmb har en unik nisch. Ett partnerskap i cmb ger möjlighet att påverka både managementforskningen och -utbildningen för sektorn.

Cmb består av Chalmers byggrelaterade institutioner samt drygt 70 av marknadens starkaste aktörer inom privat och offentlig verksamhet. Utöver cmb:s partnerföretag och ett stort antal forskargrupper på Chalmers samarbetar vi även med branschorganisationer och fackpress.

Mer om oss på: www.cmb-chalmers.se
Kontakt: info@cmb-chalmers.se

Name: Khalid Saud AlShubaily Group
Description:
Khalid Saud AlShubaily Group was founded by Khalid AlShubaily, 
and have a combined 30+ years of real estate development 
experience. We offer uniquely innovative solutions to the real 
estate industry.

Name: Tactical Urbanism Collective
Description: The Tactical Urbanism Collective is a community which activate and support people to establish change within our public spaces with dynamic and active interventions. We strive to collect best practices worldwide and connect those to people with ambitions make changes within our urban environments.

Name: Corporation de développement communautaire du Haut-Saint-François
Description:
Depuis 2003, notre regroupement local et multisectoriel d’organismes communautaires œuvre pour le développement social et économique de nos communautés sur le territoire du Haut-Saint-François dans la bucolique région de l’Estrie. 

Nous travaillons en partenariat avec les différents acteurs de la région afin de tirer profit des retombées d’une concertation de notre milieu. La promotion de l’action communautaire s’incarne dans chacune de nos actions et interventions. 

Avec une vingtaine d’organisations membres, nous regroupons plus d’une soixantaine de travailleuses et de travailleurs et des centaines de personnes engagées dans leurs communautés. 

La mise en commun des ressources, le partage des services, l’échange d’informations, la formation, l’éducation populaire, l'incorporation de nouveaux organismes reflètent l’essence de nos interventions ayant pour impact de susciter l’intérêt du milieu pour le communautaire et d’impliquer nos membres dans leurs collectivités. Nos actions s’inscrivent dans un esprit d'enrichissement collectif et de développement durable par et pour les citoyennes et les citoyens.

Name: URBAN Magazine - Columbia GSAPP
Description: URBAN Magazine is created, edited, and published by students of Columbia University GSAPP’s Urban Planning graduate program. For more than 20 years, the publication has featured writing, interviews, photo essays and graphic work related to urban planning and city life. While most contributors are from the Urban Planning department, students, faculty and peers from all disciplines are encouraged to submit work and have been featured in past issues.

Name: Colorado Urbanism
Description:
Colorado Urbanism is a built environment design consultancy led by Sam Friesema, an urban designer with over 20 years of professional design experience overlapping the fields of architecture, urban design, and real estate development, as well as academic teaching and research. Sam has previously worked for several top-rated award winning design firms, including Westlake Reed Leskosky (#1 US Firm, Architect Magazine) and RTA Architects (#1 Colorado Firm, Colorado Construction Magazine). His work has been recognized with awards from the American Institute of Architects, Environmental Design Research Association, Urban Land Institute, International Interior Design Association, American Library Association, and Rethinking the Future Sustainability Awards.

Sam's design projects have been exhibited in Cleveland, Youngstown, Havana's Fabrica de Arte Cubano, and the Venice Biennale of Architecture. Sam is also an occasional speaker and guest lecturer on architectural and urban design theories and topics, and has presented in Cleveland, Colorado, the UK, and Canada. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Environmental Design from The University of Colorado and received his Master of Urban Design from Kent State University’s Cleveland Urban Design Collaborative (CUDC).

Name: TrafficX
Description: Traffic Management, Traffic planning and analysis, Traffic management equipment installation and maintenance

Name: Carfree Cities Alliance
Description: While many organizations acknowledge that urban transportation systems are in need of reform, Carfree Cities Alliance takes the position that forging truly livable cities requires immediate shifts away from the pervasive automobile culture. CCA advocates for a comprehensive transition (modal shift) to walking, cycling, and other non-motorized means as well as public transport, and a change from car-dominated spaces to lively civic areas with pedestrian amenities that make people feel welcome and safe, encouraging rich social contacts in our public spaces. At the heart of this is our mission to enable city dwellers everywhere to lead a dignified life.

Name: АРХРИД / ARHRID
Description: Architectural collective exploring the potentials of Ohrid, a cultural and natural heritage region .

Name: COFT SARL-s
Description:
At COFT, we specialize in providing tailored consulting and support services in spatial planning (urban and rural development), project development, and project management. Our services include customized advisory, coordination, and study solutions specifically designed to meet our clients' needs. We also offer a wide range of GIS (Geographic Information Systems) services, acting as a mediator in project implementation and providing strategic and operational support.

COFT collaborates closely with partners like CO3 s.à.r.l and Schroeder & Associés S.A. 
Currently, the company operates as a supplier, handling, finalizing, and managing projects while being involved in new project developments and the creation of innovative planning processes. 

Moreover, COFT is also exploring the integration of digital twins and AI into traditional workflows in the field of spatial planning.

Join us as we innovate and enhance urban, rural and regional planning, making a sustainable impact in an era of global challenges. | contact@coft.lu

Name: ArtifexAI
Description:
At Artifex, we are using AI to transform public records into data tools and services that reveal what local governments across the United States (and the world) are deciding, building, and funding. 

Use us to know what developers are trying to get built, how towns are evolving, and which stakeholders are shaping the future.

Name: Jura bernois.Bienne
Description: Jura bernois.Bienne est l'association des 40 communes du Jura bernois avec Bienne et Évilard. ELle traite de tous les thèmes d’importance supracommunale comme la politique régionale, l’aménagement du territoire ou l'énergie.

Name: Strategic Cities
Description:
Strategic Cities was founded by Mark Ames in 2015 to help organisations who are delivering challenging change in cities. 

We provide practical engagement and communications training and advice.

We’ve worked with clients in Australia, New Zealand and Europe, and trained hundreds of our client's employees worldwide.

Name: SEH Stadtentwicklungsgesellschaft Hansestadt Herford mbH
Description: Unser Bildungscampus ist ein Ort, an dem gelernt, gelehrt, gearbeitet, getüftelt und experimentiert wird: Innovationen für die Zukunft. Wir sanieren die bestehenden Gebäude und passen sie den aktuellen Bedürfnissen unserer Mieter oder Käufer an. Teil des Kasernengeländes ist eine größere Freifläche, die früher als Sportgelände genutzt wurde. Hier sollen weitere Bauten entstehen. Dafür suchen wir erfahrene Projektentwickler. Das wäre eine Möglichkeit für Ihre Investition. Oder Sie benötigen selbst einen neuen Standort und lassen sich mit Ihrem Unternehmen auf dem Bildungscampus nieder. Gerne stellen wir Ihnen unser Projekt persönlich und in allen Einzelheiten vor.

Name: Syrian GeoUrban Observatory
Description: The Syrian Geo-Urban Observatory functions as an independent spatial research laboratory dedicated to supporting decision-makers and academic and non-academic institutions in Syria through reliable data and scientifically grounded urban analysis.The observatory integrates remote sensing, Geographic Information Systems (GIS), spatial analytics, and decision-support systems to generate actionable indicators for urban planning, territorial assessment, and spatial resource management. Its work aims to bridge the gap between academic research and applied planning practices by transforming complex spatial data into usable knowledge. The observatory operates with a strong emphasis on methodological rigor, transparency, and data reliability, ensuring that all outputs are suitable for research, planning, and policy-support contexts.

Name: AKLK Consulting
Description:
Bienvenue chez AKLK Consulting, là où l'expertise prend vie pour sculpter l'avenir urbain avec précision et innovation. 

Fondée par @Annie Louya, urbaniste-aménageur, notre entreprise s'engage à offrir des conseils stratégiques et des enseignements spécialisés en urbanisme, développement urbain et économique.

Nous intervenons en contribuant à la croissance d'étudiants et d'entreprises cherchant à renforcer leurs compétences en développement urbain.
De plus, nous conseillons avec passion les associations, les entreprises et les pouvoirs publics, et les aidons à créer des projets harmonieux et en phase avec leur environnement.

Chez AKLK Consulting, notre engagement va au-delà du simple conseil. Nous sommes les architectes de votre succès urbain, fusionnant expertise, créativité et engagement social.

Rejoignez-nous pour façonner un avenir urbain prospère et durable !

Name: Eastern Africa Regional Digital Integration Project Somaliland (EARDIP)
Description: EA-RDIP - A World Bank-funded initiative led by the Ministry of ICT to enhance digital infrastructure, cross-border services, and public sector digital capabilities in Somaliland.

Name: Blatchford
Description: Blatchford is building a more resilient future with renewables and energy efficiency, low-impact development, and an emphasis on community infrastructure. By building in flexibility and efficiency, Blatchford fits into the City of Edmonton’s plans for a climate resilient city. With its emphasis on renewable energy, Blatchford is also implementing City Council’s vision for a carbon neutral community that empowers sustainable choices.

Name: Out of Scale India Pvt. Ltd.
Description: We are a consultancy firm, working in the domain of Urban Planning, Architecture, Interior Design, Waste Management, Transport Planning & Infrastructure Planning.

Name: DichtbijW
Description: DichtbijW is een adviesorganisatie die uw bedrijf helpt met vraagstukken rondom Wonen, Werken, Water en Weiland. Dit omvat strategische visies op het gebied van wonen, economie, stedelijke ontwikkeling, natuuropgaven en waterveiligheid. Bovendien beschikken we over diverse adviseurs met expertise uit verschillende vakgebieden, die beschikbaar zijn voor interim-opdrachten bij gemeenten, provincies, consultancybedrijven, woningcorporaties en meer.

Name: Conseil de la Région Centrale-Togo
Description: Page officielle du Conseil Régional de la région Centrale du Togo. Organe de gouvernance territoriale

Name: plan b innenentwicklung
Description:
plan b innenentwicklung ag ist ein im Juli 2023 neu gegründetes Unternehmen, welches die Beratung und Entwicklung im Bereich von Immobilien- und Infrastrukturprojekten, Innovationssystemen, Stadtentwicklung und Stadtplanung bezweckt. Es ist sowohl für die öffentliche Hand als auch für private Entwickler bzw. Institutionen tätig.

Die Entwicklung von Arealen, Gemeinden und Städten benötigt eine ganzheitliche, interdisziplinäre Denkweise. Orte voller Diversität und nachhaltig hoher Lebensqualität können nur entstehen, wenn die gesellschaftlichen Bedürfnisse nach Wohnen, Arbeiten, Freizeit und Kultur konsequent mitgedacht werden. Die Infrastruktur ist auf diese Bedürfnisse abzustimmen und in die Entwicklung zu integrieren. Lebendige Orte sind positive Orte – diese zu schaffen ist unser Qualitätsanspruch.

Name: Enmaa Libya
Description: With every district, destination and development, we apply global thinking to local potential, one that reflects the richness of its land and the ambition of what lies ahead. We exist to deliver progress at scale, and to showcase Libya to the world through the quality of what we create.

Name: ONH Planning For Good
Description:
ONH is a social enterprise providing a range of planning and development services to town and parish councils, neighbourhood forums and landowners and developers from Norfolk to Cheshire and Dorset to Kent, and most places in between.
 
Our social mission is to enable community-supported, high quality and sustainable development to be delivered and to engage successfully with local communities along the way. We measure our social impact through the number of community-led projects we support, the financial value of the in-kind support we provide and the number of new homes allocated in plans we support or approved by planning applications and orders we submit for clients.
 
Our small but growing team is a unique blend of highly experienced and expert professional planners, architects and former senior town council officers. We also have a number of associate experts covering every technical requirement a project will need.
 
We combine a friendly but professional approach, with a strong focus on enabling communities to punch above their weight in the system and on ensuring our landowner clients can deliver high quality, sustainable development schemes.

Name: SixCo Nevada, Inc.
Description: SIXCO, a Nevada domestic corporation, is a consortium of innovative companies focused on infrastructure projects that facilitate U.S. bidirectional commerce and trade.

Name: Lutheran Development Service, Liberia
Description:
The Lutheran Development Service in Liberia (LDS-Liberia) is a semiautonomous non-governmental organization that was established in January 2002. It is the development arm of the Lutheran Church in Liberia charged with the responsibility to provide development and humanitarian services to God's people in an impartial way. LDS has a clear vision and a clear mandate which continues to guide its operations. It is a transitional organization that took over the activities of the Lutheran World Federation/Department for World Service Liberia Program - LWF/DWS/Liberia

LDS/Liberia has, over the last fifteen years, collaborated with faith and non-faith based development organizations and the Government of Liberia on the transformation of lives of rural dwellers disadvantaged by lack of opportunities. LDS currently operates in Bong and Lofa Counties. Programmatically, LDS has four (4) thematic areas of focus; agriculture and food, Security, Education, Health and Sanitation; governance through advocacy and disaster response. LDS is focused on quality education for Liberia’s children, good health delivery system in rural communities, and proper sanitation facilities to minimize the spread of diseases and potable drinking water. LDS has responded to the needs of survivors of disasters mainly storms and floods and assisted rural farmers to farm as a business thereby earning incomes from beekeeping, pig raising, and crop production using the farmer field school (FFS) model. The Photos below depict some of the achievements of the LDS. LDS further supports women and youth empowerment including access to finance from VSLVA.

Name: Stadt Weinstadt
Description:
Die Stadt Weinstadt liegt im Remstal östlich der Landeshauptstadt Stuttgart und ist mit ca. 27.000 Einwohnenden Große Kreisstadt im Rems-Murr-Kreis (Baden-Württemberg).

Weinstadt ist umgeben von Weinbergen, im Norden am Rande des Schwäbischen Walds und im Süden am Fuße des Schurwalds. "Kultur trifft Natur" lautet der Slogan der Stadt. Die naturräumliche Lage ist herausragend, der Weinbau prägte die einst selbstständigen Stadtteile Beutelsbach, Endersbach, Großheppach, Schnait und Strümpfelbach und ist auch heute wichtiger Wirtschaftsfaktor, dank einer Vielzahl erstklassiger, kreativer und innovativer Weingüter.

"Lokale Kraft für internationale Stärke" - Damit ist die vielfältige Unternehmensstruktur am besten beschrieben. Namhafte Unternehmen sind hier entstanden, schätzen den Standort und wollen sich in Weinstadt weiterentwickeln. Die große Kompetenz und das umfangreiche Know-how zeichnet die Betriebe isnbesonders in der Verbindungs-, Werkzeug-, Medizin-, Gebäude- und Automobiltechnik aus. 

Impressum: https://www.weinstadt.de/de/Impressum
Informationen zum Datenschutz: ´https://www.weinstadt.de/Datenschutz

Name: URVANO Planners and Builders
Description:
URVANO Planners & Builders is an innovative firm specializing in comprehensive planning, design, and construction consultancy services for public and private stakeholders. Committed to excellence, URVANO is adept in crafting land use plans, development plans, and transport-related plans, as well as conducting environment and traffic impact assessments and management plans for various infrastructure projects.

The firm’s conceptual and detailed infrastructure designs prioritize sustainability and area suitability, ensuring lasting benefits for all. With a team of bright, skilled, and experienced professionals, URVANO is steadfast in empowering individuals, organizations, and communities.

Building on our unwavering commitment to excellence, URVANO Planners & Builders distinguishes itself through several key advantages:

Track Record: Drawing on a wealth of experience, our team has a proven track record of achieving successful outcomes and making impactful contributions to public service. This breadth of experience provides us with the insight and understanding required to adeptly navigate regulatory frameworks, ensuring smooth project execution every step of the way.

Extensive Network: Our strong connections with both the public and private sectors give us unparalleled access to resources and expertise. This allows URVANO to tap into different perspectives and collaborate effectively on projects of any scale.

Multidisciplinary Team: With professionals from various backgrounds converging in our team, we bring together a wealth of knowledge and innovative ideas. This diversity enables us to adopt a versatile approach to addressing intricate challenges with both creativity and efficiency, thereby delivering bespoke solutions that consistently exceed expectations.

Name: PHENO HORIZON
Description:
PHENO HORIZON powstał w odpowiedzi na potrzebę połączenia wiedzy urbanistów, ekonomistów i socjologów w celu budowania lepszych przestrzeni życiowych w miastach, gminach, powiatach, województwach i całych regionach.
Nasz multidyscyplinarny zespół tworzą eksperci posiadający wiedzę i doświadczenie w zakresie urbanistyki, analiz ekonomicznych i budowania strategii, opierający się w swoich działaniach na doskonałej znajomości zarówno lokalnych uwarunkowań, jak i aktualnie realizowanych projektów i inicjatyw, które już teraz sprzyjają rozwojowi obszarów funkcjonalnych. Współpraca ekspertów z różnych dziedzin gwarantuje bezcenny efekt synergii. W trakcie prowadzonych prac kluczowe znaczenie ma dla nas zasada partnerstwa. W proces tworzenia dokumentów rozwojowych angażujemy interesariuszy projektu, których zapraszamy do aktywnego wypracowywania wyników prac. Działamy w oparciu o autorski program, bazując na warsztatach i konsultacjach społecznych. Głos społeczny jest wartością, której nie możemy ignorować. Wierzymy, że każdy z partnerów zaproszonych do współpracy na różnych etapach realizacji wnosi do prac nieocenioną wartość.

Name: SAFFY
Description: We work at the intersections of strategy, city-building, culture, design and research. Name: Daba.Cities
Description: Daba.Cities is an environmental and social initiative, led by a multi-disciplinary team of experts, with an ambition to promote and implement antifragile and sustainable urban practices in city centres by optimising existing urban areas to halt urban expansion, reverse environmental degradation, and fight climate change. We are transforming underutilised urban properties into Durable, Affordable Residences (DAR) through AI-powered design and participatory investment, building compact, climate-resilient African cities.

Name: Success Map Initiative
Description:
The Success Map Initiative is dedicated to empowering underserved & underemployed individuals and those who manage them by providing the skills, resources, and guidance necessary for meaningful employment, entrepreneurial development and personal growth. Our mission is to transform lives by supporting returning citizens, new citizens, underserved populations, and opportunity youth in navigating their journeys to success.

Our comprehensive program offers a unique blend of life skills education, vocational training, and ongoing career support. Participants gain access to immediate employment opportunities, skills development workshops, continued education, and mentorship from industry leaders, ensuring they are well-equipped to transition from entry-level roles to management and C-suite positions.

The Roadmap to Success program stands out for its proven track record in reducing recidivism and fostering long-term socioeconomic mobility. We collaborate with key stakeholders, including government agencies, community organizations, and businesses, to create a robust support network for our participants.

Through our entrepreneurship initiatives, we also inspire the next generation of business leaders, targeting youth in public schools as well as those currently and formerly incarcerated. By instilling entrepreneurial mindsets and providing practical business skills, we help people envision and achieve their own paths to success.

Connect with us to learn more about our programs, partnerships, and how you can get involved in making a positive impact.

Name: TrophicaLab
Description:
Trophica has its roots in sustenance, nourishment, and energetic flow. It comes from the Greek word trophe (τροφή), meaning nutrition, which also gives its name to "trophic networks": the massive and interconnected relationships among organisms that sustain life on Earth.

Within the complexity of the networks that exchange energy and matter to support ecosystems lie the answers to contemporary global challenges.

Why did we create Trophica Lab?

We dream of sustainable and just urban futures for humans and non-humans alike. We believe that solutions for this changing world will flourish from the bottom up, through networks and collective action.
We understand contemporary socio-environmental challenges as interconnected issues, and therefore, we are convinced that systemic design is necessary to address a changing world.

What is Trophica Lab?

We are an interdisciplinary network of research and action working toward socio-ecological justice in cities.

How do we work?

Trophica Lab brings together biology, architecture, anthropology, geography, and engineering to design systemic solutions to complex problems.

- Symbiotic Design: Our method blends systemic design and participatory design to produce strategies that incorporate Nature-based Solutions (NbS) that resonate with the communities that inhabit them. We co-create the symbiotic city (Stuiver, 2020) with its inhabitants and caretakers.

- Transdisciplinary and Intersectoral Networks: We strengthen local networks of initiatives for civic and public action in caring for urban biodiversity.

- Research and Communication: We map, monitor, and communicate socio-ecological justice with a focus on democratizing science and knowledge.

Die Spannweite unserer planerischen Kompetenz reicht von städtebaulichen Detailfragen bis hin zu strategischen Entwicklungskonzepten. Das gebündelte Know-how unseres Teams garantiert eine fundierte und reibungslose Projektarbeit.

Name: Nunnovation Africa Foundation
Description:
Established in 2014 by African Professionals, with a vision to create a platform that empowers home-grown solutions for local challenges and develop skills pipeline to ensure effective implementation of innovative development programmes
At Nunnovation Africa Foundation, we're committed to fostering innovation and critical thinking in developing smart cities in Africa. Through our Smart City Programme, we empower collaboration among multiple stakeholders to harness Africa's top skills, expertise, intellectual capacity, and resources in advancing the development of smart economies by Africans.

We're proud to be a leading organization in the SADC region that is successfully working with numerous municipal councils in developing sustainable and resilient cities that use innovative technologies to improve the quality of life for their citizens. 
Our approach is grounded in a deep understanding of the local context and the needs of the communities we serve.

We believe that diversity, equity, inclusion, and belonging (DEIB) are critical components of smart city development. That's why we infuse DEIB into all our solutions, ensuring that they are accessible and equitable to everyone in the community.

We're dedicated to creating a more connected, efficient, and sustainable continent. We accomplish this by working closely with decision makers in the smart cities and local government spheres to provide expert guidance, innovative solutions, and ongoing support.

If you're looking for a trusted partner in smart city development in Africa, we invite you to collaborate with us. Together, we can build smart and resilient cities that will drive economic growth, create opportunities, and improve the lives of millions of people.

"Empowering Collaboration for Smart and Inclusive City Development in Africa"

Name: NEB-STAR
Description:
The New European Bauhaus (NEB) is a creative and interdisciplinary EU initiative that connects the European Green Deal to our living spaces and experiences. NEB aims to build a bridge between art, culture and education with science and technology. The project will be a driving force for new ideas, prototypes and products, as research and innovation are main components of NEB's design, delivery and communication.

Bauhaus refers to the German school of architecture, design and crafts, created by Walter Gropius (1883–1969). The Bauhaus gained great importance for industrial design and for the development of functionalism in architecture.

Three values are set as core principles: Sustainability; from climate goals, to circularity, zero emissions and biological diversity. Beautiful: quality and style over functionality. Inclusive: from valuing diversity, to ensuring accessibility and affordability

NEB-Stavanger = NEB-STAR
As one of six cities, Stavanger has been selected as a lighthouse demonstrator for the New European Bauhaus. The NEB-STAR project is funded by the EU over three years, for the period 2022-2025, and consists of 16 partners.

Consortium:  NTNU, City of Stavanger, Stavanger Sentrum, Nordic Edge AS, The University of Stavanger, Veni AS, DOGA, Norway Unlimited, Ungt Entreprenørskap, Pedergata utvikling AS, Helen & Hard, Smedvig, Operator ICT Prague, Czech Technical University in Prague, City of Utrecht and Technische Universiteit Delft.

Name: Midtown Raleigh Alliance
Description:
Midtown offers more than ever in 2025 - more trendy places to eat, more green spaces, more art and inspiration, and more entertainment.
Make sure your 2025 has more Midtown in it. You'll be glad you did!

Midtown Raleigh, a premier destination for commerce, culture, lifestyle, education and leisure activities.

--Mission--

The Midtown Raleigh Alliance brings together community leaders with those who live, work and play in Midtown to:
   - Advocate for our area's needs
   - Promote Midtown
   - Enhance our quality of life

--Description--

Midtown Raleigh is unique with long established neighborhoods, a deep sense of community, a thriving mix of businesses, schools, churches, parks and open space and a vibrant 24/7 urban center with over 100 acres of walkable amenities.

The area within a 2-mile radius surrounding North Hills has become a hub of commercial and residential activity in Raleigh, distinctive in character and location, with its own sense of place. 

Having a midtown center of density is a marker for a successful city, and Midtown Raleigh is becoming a national model for sustainable living.

Name: Association Actions pour le Développement Communautaire
Description:
L'Association Actions pour le Développement Communautaire (AADC) est une initiative fondée par des étudiants, animés par la volonté d'améliorer les conditions de vie des populations locales. Son objectif principal est de promouvoir le développement durable et le bien-être des communautés à travers des projets concrets et durables.

Axes d’intervention de l’AADC : 
Aménagement du territoire : Planification et gestion pour un développement harmonieux des zones urbaines et rurales. 

Agroforesterie : Promotion de l’agriculture durable en intégrant les arbres dans les systèmes de culture.

 Agropastorale : Soutien à l’agriculture et à l’élevage par la formation et le développement des filières agricoles.

 Agroalimentaire : Encouragement de la transformation locale des produits agricoles pour dynamiser l’économie.

 Environnement : Sensibilisation et actions pour la protection des ressources naturelles (reboisement, gestion des déchets, etc.). 

Jeunesse : Implication des jeunes dans des initiatives citoyennes et programmes de développement personnel.

 Éducation : Accès à l’éducation, formation professionnelle et renforcement des compétences.

Infrastructures : Amélioration des infrastructures de base (routes, eau potable, électricité) pour favoriser le développement. 

Social : Aide aux populations vulnérables (santé, lutte contre la pauvreté, accompagnement social), surtout les peuples autochtones. 

En collaborant avec les autorités, acteurs locaux et partenaires, l'AADC met en œuvre des projets économiques, sociaux et environnementaux pour bâtir une communauté plus résiliente et prospère.

Name: Södra Munksjön Utvecklings AB
Description:

Södra Munksjön blir en ny knutpunkt i Jönköping, fyllt av liv, människor, bra kommunikationer och närhet till natur och vatten. Området ska vara attraktivt för både boende och besökare. Det ska locka till nyfikenhet och göra invånarna stolta över sin stad!

Södra Munksjön Utvecklings AB är ett helägt kommunalt bolag med två huvuduppdrag. Det första är att leda och driva stadsutvecklingen av Södra Munksjön i Jönköping. Bolaget har ett samlat ansvar för frågorna inom området och ska förverkliga det fastslagna ramprogrammet.

Vårt andra huvuduppgiften handlar om logistik- och industriutveckling av det expansiva logistikområdet LogPoint South Sweden.

Name: JM Goldson

Planning that Reflects Community Strengths and Expands Opportunity
At JM Goldson, we help communities navigate change with intention and care. Our planning and engagement work doesn’t impose—it listens, guides, and helps shape policies that build on local strengths while inviting new possibilities.

Whether planning for diverse housing options or crafting a long-range plan that honors community stories, we root every project in the lived experience of residents—longtime and new.

We believe inclusive planning isn’t just about place—it’s about people. When local voices lead, plans don’t just reflect the past. They build a future where more people can belong, contribute, and thrive.

Inom stadsutvecklingen skapar vi stadsdelar och bostadsområden från idé till byggrätt. Vi tar oss an utmaningar som kräver både stor erfarenhet och kompetens. För oss handlar det om att skapa rätt värden till våra intressenter.

Name: The Commons
Description:
The Commons is a bold initiative transforming Hamilton’s entertainment scene through the revitalization of three iconic venues: FirstOntario Centre, FirstOntario Concert Hall, and the Hamilton Convention Centre. Led by the Hamilton Urban Precinct Entertainment Group Consortium (HUPEG) and powered by strategic partnerships, we’re creating a dynamic entertainment district that transcends traditional boundaries.

In 2021, the City of Hamilton entrusted HUPEG with operational responsibility for these key downtown venues for a 49-year period. Our mission is to collaboratively redevelop these facilities into a world-class entertainment district, acting as a catalyst for the city’s regeneration.

At the heart of The Commons is community. While this transformation will bring exciting new events and experiences to Hamilton, its true impact will be measured by the positive outcomes and opportunities created for the entire city—not just the revitalization of its downtown core.

Adotando uma abordagem interseccional, conduzimos estudos, elaboramos planos e desenvolvemos projetos com o intuito de promover soluções para os desafios contemporâneos enfrentados pelas comunidades e cidades. Buscamos, assim, contribuir para a implementação de políticas urbanas mais inclusivas e a construção de territórios mais habitáveis e resilientes.

Name: Desire Lines
Description:
Desire Lines are a cross-disciplinary practice guiding the transformation of places, communities, and organizations towards thriving futures. Led by Founding Director Sarah Ichioka, we work in constellation with a curated network of experts whose values match – and expertise complements – our own. This deliberate assembly allows us to craft solutions that singular organizations often cannot achieve.

We work alongside leaders from the public, private and nonprofit sectors, serving as discerning guides in “building the road by walking” between current and desired conditions. Our work takes different forms depending on the context. This currently ranges from designing new programs to shift systems, developing strategies that activate places’ cultural and social potentials, and drawing out expressions of collective imagination. 

Desire Lines guide future-focused clients around the world, working from our base in Southeast Asia. Follow us to learn more about our work and opportunities to meet us at international events.
		
Each Desire Lines project is bespoke. From advising governments on national design strategies, to scaffolding transitions for leading nonprofits, to weaving the cultural plans for regenerative communities, we combine our depth and diversity of experience with the power of collaborative discovery. We love to meet new people. Drop us a line at hello@desire-lines.com to start a conversation
