The Pact translates international agreements into local action by supporting cities drive transformational change to set urban nature on the path to recovery for the health and well-being of their communities.

Name: Belong Costa Rica
Description:
Belong Costa Rica creates spaces that inspire connection — to nature, to people, and to a deeper sense of belonging. We discover extraordinary land and transform it into beautifully designed villas that blend seamlessly with their surroundings. Every detail, from the architecture to the guest experience, reflects our passion for design, sustainability, and the art of living well. More than developing properties, we craft places where people truly feel at home in paradise.

We oversee every stage of the development process—from land acquisition to on-site property management. We’re the developer, designer, builder, and operator all in one.

Some might call us control freaks, but our clients/investors appreciate that this level of involvement ensures exceptional quality at every step.

Name: Escritório de Planejamento PCRJ
Description: O Escritório de Planejamento (EPL) é um organismo que integra a Subsecretaria de Planejamento e Acompanhamento de Resultados (SubPar) da Secretaria Municipal de Fazenda e Planejamento. Sua função fundamental é o planejamento de políticas públicas, principalmente no que se refere à elaboração de diagnósticos e à integração entre os diferentes instrumentos de planejamento que existem na Prefeitura, bem como na Região Metropolitana do Rio de Janeiro.

Name: Sc.wén̓wen Economic Development Corporation
Description:
Welcome to Sc.wén̓wen Economic Development Corporation, the dynamic force driving economic growth and sustainability within the Tk̓emlúps te Secwépemc (TteS) community. We are dedicated to fostering economic diversity and building a lasting financial legacy for Tk̓emlúps te Secwépemc members.

At Sc.wén̓wen Economic Development, we explore and engage in a wide range of opportunities, including leasing, joint ventures, partnerships, new business initiatives, and business acquisitions. Our strategic focus extends to strengthening our local economy through land development, corporate operations, tourism and the growth and support of TteS member-owned businesses.

Join us in our mission to create a prosperous and resilient future for the Tk̓emlúps te Secwépemc community. Explore the vibrant opportunities we are cultivating and become a part of the journey towards sustainable economic development.

Name: SUDA • Spatial and Urban Development Agency
Description:
LEPL Spatial and Urban Development Agency (SUDA) is operating under the Ministry of Economy and Sustainable Development (MOESD) of Georgia. It was created on June 11, 2022 with the main function to coordinate spatial and urban development policy of the country.
 
The main pillars of SUDA’s work are the following:
 
• Produce and implement the National Spatial Development Plan of Georgia.
• Assist local municipalities to coordinate their land use master plans.
• Harmonise current relevant legislation with the OECD best practices.
• Increase awareness about the benefits and necessity of Spatial/Urban planning and its everlasting effect on climate change and sustainable development of the country.
• Strengthen cooperation between state, academic and private agencies around spatial and urban planning.

Name: BRD Land & Investment
Description: BRD Land & Investment is entitlement and permitting company focused on partnering with national and regional homebuilders in the Southeast to deliver new construction residential communities.

Name: ProjektStadt
Description:
Die Projektstadt ist die Stadtentwicklungsmarke der Unternehmensgruppe Nassauische Heimstätte | Wohnstadt. Sie betreut derzeit rund 220 Stadtentwicklungsprojekte in fünf Bundesländern. Die Palette reicht vom Consulting über Fördermittel-Management, Klima- und Energie-Projekte, Konversionen sowie die Schaffung und Revitalisierungen von Gewerbeflächen bis hin zu Soziale Stadt, Stadtumbau, Interkommunale Kooperationen sowie Wettbewerbliche Dialoge. 
Mit der ProjektStadt sind Sie bestens aufgestellt für die Herausforderungen einer wirtschaftlichen und nachhaltigen Stadtentwicklung. 

Wir sind ein Team von Problemlösern, Ideengebern und Netzwerkern mit jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung und exzellenten Kontakten zu Kommunen und Privatwirtschaft. Unsere Referenz: rund 220 aktuelle Projekte an rund 130 Standorten in Hessen, Thüringen, Baden-Württemberg und Rheinland-Pfalz.

Für Ihre Stadtentwicklungen brauchen Sie ein eingespieltes Team, das alle Aufgaben beherrscht – von der Analyse und Planung eines Projekts bis hin zur Steuerung, Management, Finanzierung und Umsetzung. Bei uns bekommen sie all das aus einer Hand.

Name: Coral Golf Resort RD
Description:
Coral Golf Resort, es una destacada iniciativa inmobiliaria 
ubicada en la hermosa zona costera Este de la República Dominicana, concretamente en Cabeza de Toro, Punta Cana.

El proyecto surge de la unión de dos parcelas con el fin de crear un complejo residencial  plurifamiliar de alta categoría donde predominan la funcionalidad y el confort.

Coral Golf Resort es un máster plan inmobiliario en un dentro de un magnífico campo de golf rediseñado por P.B. Dye.

Ofrecemos lotes para el desarrollo de apartamentos y residencias. Contáctanos para más información!

Name: Market One
Description: As a subsidiary of Kinexus Group, Market One has principal responsibilities for economic and community development throughout Cass and Van Buren County.

Name: WOW! Urbane Utopien
Description: Wir planen und setzen neuartige Stadtkonzepte um und machen dabei die Stadt mit jedem Schritt ein kleines bisschen lebenswerter.

Name: MAS URBANISME UNIGE EPFL
Description: Le MAS Urbanisme dans les grandes lignes : les préceptes contemporains de l’urbanisme et l’usage d'outils numériques au service de la planification et de la pratique du projet sont abordés, de même que la mise en œuvre de stratégies foncières, les montages financiers, les outils juridiques ou le déploiement d'une action publique locale.

Name: Perimeter Pro
Description:
Home and workplace security and safety are crucial for overall productivity. We aim to alleviate your security concerns through the installation of gates, perimeter fencing, and security systems.

Established in 2021, JJS&S Enterprise has successfully designed and executed fencing projects nationwide.

Name: Weeber+Partner, Institut für Stadtplanung und Sozialforschung
Description: Wir planen, forschen, beraten, beteiligen und moderieren in den Bereichen Stadtentwicklung, gesellschaftliche Entwicklung, Bauen, Wohnen und Infrastruktur. Meist arbeiten wir für öffentliche und gemeinnützige Auftraggeber – für Bundes- und Landesministerien, Regionen, Kommunen, Verbände, Wohnungsunternehmen und soziale Organisationen.

Name: Masters of Urban & Rural Planning IIT Roorkee
Description: Official page of Masters of Urban and Rural Planning, IIT Roorkee

Name: Placemaking Switzerland
Description: Placemaking Switzerland bringt Leute aus der Zivilgesellschaft, aus der Planung und aus der Immobilienbranche zusammen welche sich für die co-kreative Entwicklung von attraktiven, identitätsstarken und integrativen Siedlungsräumen und Nachbarschaften einsetzen.

Name: Community Development Alliance (CDA)
Description:
Community Development Alliance (CDA) is an affiliation of stakeholders that has collaborated for more than a decade on neighborhood improvement efforts in Milwaukee. Recognizing that housing inequities are deep and broad, and prohibit families from building generational wealth, CDA narrowed its focus in 2020 to providing a quality, affordable home for every Milwaukeean. What resulted from this work is Milwaukee’s Collective Affordable Housing Plan, the first of its kind. Composed of over 80 housing
advocates, funders, and practitioners, CDA is responsible for collective action around the plan, which includes strategy development, shared measurement, and continuous communication.

Our alliance has engaged contractors for communications, government relations, resident engagement, and research related to Plan Implementation. We continue to work towards growing resources within our alliance to meet additional legal and evaluation support as well. As part of our community
commitment CDA hosts quarterly meetings of all stakeholders, typically drawing nearly 100 participants. The alliance is governed by a 14-member executive committee that includes resident liaisons, together with leadership in the public, private, and philanthropic sectors.

Name: National Town Builders Association
Description: The National Town Builders’ Association was organized to serve builders and developers throughout the nation in an effort to build the very best traditional neighborhoods and town centers.

Name: SHIFT Strategic Development
Description: Our interdisciplinary team of experts develops urban and regional transformation strategies on the level of areas, urban fabric, and portfolios.

Name: Fundación Kaleidos.red
Description:
Red abierta de entidades locales que desarrolla I+D+i en las políticas, equipamientos y servicios de proximidad a la ciudadanía en relación con el desarrollo y posicionamiento de ciudad.

 𝗝𝗼𝗿𝗻𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗞𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗶𝗱𝗼𝘀 '¿Cuáles son los principales retos en nuestras ciudades y territorios? Construcción colectiva de soluciones a partir de la Gobernanza Local y la Agenda 2030'. 30 y 31 de enero en Málaga. Más información en https://kaleidosred.org/malana2024-jornadas-kaleidosred/

 ¿𝗗ó𝗻𝗱𝗲 𝗽𝗼𝗻𝗲𝗺𝗼𝘀 𝗲𝗹 𝗳𝗼𝗰𝗼?
En el cambio de paradigma en la interacción entre Administración Local y Ciudadanía: pensamos que la piedra angular es participar/afectar a la ciudadanía incorporándola e implicándola en la toma de decisiones sobre cómo sueña la ciudad en que vive.

 ¿𝗖ó𝗺𝗼 𝗵𝗮𝗰𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗼?
Desde Kaleidos estamos construyendo una metodología/herramientas base que sirva para construir/tomar decisiones en base a un proceso de construcción compartida, escucha y diálogo con la ciudadanía. Cada ciudadano es entendido como un planner, cada ciudadano una antena, cada ciudadano un sensor, cada ciudadano un motor de cambio.

 𝗟𝗼 𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲: ¿𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗮 𝗾𝘂é 𝗵𝗮𝗰𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗼?
Para definir prioridades y/o estrategias en nuestras ciudades; identificar oportunidades de mejora y orientarlas a proyectos; explorar y anticipar nuevas necesidades; analizar y mejorar servicios en base a la experiencia de uso… para, en definitiva, aumentar la calidad de vida de manera sostenible y cohesionada.

 Encuéntranos también en Twitter: @𝗸𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗶𝗱𝗼𝘀𝗿𝗲𝗱.

Name: Proximity of Care Design Guide
Description: The Proximity of Care Design Guide is an online tool to help city authorities and urban practitioners to design solutions that support and enhance the living conditions of children, caregivers and pregnant women in vulnerable urban contexts. This year we’re working with our partners to renew our guide with design insight for broader contexts and communities across the globe.

Name: BLAX
Description:
BLAX, expert en solutions de recharge sur mesure pour les professionnels et particuliers en Nouvelle Aquitaine.

La société propose un accompagnement complet, clé en main pour l’installation et l’exploitation pour vos projets d’aménagements d’infrastructures de recharge pour véhicules électriques (IRVE).

Diagnostic. Étude. Conseil. Conception. Installation. Maintenance. Supervision.
Un service complet pour des projets IRVE maitrisés.

Notre engagement : Favoriser l’accès aux bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques sur le territoire.

Pour être accompagné vers l’électromobilité, notre équipe bordelaise est à votre écoute.
blax@blax.green
07 62 48 54 32
Bordeaux

Name: Ministère de la Planification et de la Prospective
Description: Le Ministère de la Planification et de la Prospective est l'institution gouvernementale chargée de la programmation du développement et de l'investissement public au Gabon. Sa mission essentielle est de concevoir et de mettre en œuvre des stratégies et des politiques visant à garantir un développement économique, social et environnemental durable. Le ministère joue un rôle clé dans l'anticipation des besoins futurs du pays, la mobilisation des ressources, et la coordination des initiatives de développement pour améliorer la qualité de vie des citoyens et promouvoir une croissance inclusive et équitable.

Name: ECRN.city
Description:
ECRN is a consortium of NGOs, municipalities, associations and private organisations, spread across nine European cities. These organisations organise cultural events, talks, tours and much more on rooftops.

The European Creative Rooftop Network (ECRN) is a network of organisations, working ‘together apart’ to use European rooftops as creatively as possible. Why? Because the future lies in this partially undiscovered layer of urban space. From the generation of new places to meet and the creation of cultural breeding grounds, to innovative living labs exploring sustainability – anything is possible. Individually, all these European rooftop pioneers are already making every effort to scale the heights, but partnerships make you stronger and smarter. ECRN creates international connections to maximise local impact.

The European Creative Rooftop Network (ECRN) is a network of organisations, working ‘together apart’ to use European rooftops as creatively as possible. Why? Because the future lies in this partially undiscovered layer of urban space. From the generation of new places to meet and the creation of cultural breeding grounds, to innovative living labs exploring sustainability – anything is possible. Individually, all these European rooftop pioneers are already making every effort to scale the heights, but partnerships make you stronger and smarter. ECRN creates international connections to maximise local impact.

Because the future lies in this partially undiscovered layer of urban space. From the generation of new places to meet and the creation of cultural breeding grounds, to innovative living labs exploring sustainability – anything is possible. Individually, all these European rooftop pioneers are already making every effort to scale the heights, but partnerships make you stronger and smarter.

Name: H3 Geospatial Technologies Pte Ltd
Description:
H3 Geospatial Technologies aims to represent the latest geospatial technology from the world and become your preferred partner in the field here in Singapore and South East Asia.

With a combined experience worth more than 3 decades, helmed and led by our founder, Mr. Neo John Ji, a purveyor and experienced technology advocate, H3 aims to give a refreshing and different customer experience while providing superior technology and quality solutions.

Name: DUST - Democratising jUst Sustainability Transitions
Description:
We are an EU-funded project investigating new participatory methods in sustainability transitions that enhance citizen participation and trust in democratic governance.

Through out novel methodology, we aim to recognise the voices of the least-engaged communities in our case study regions, that are dependent on energy-intensive industries and that will be most affected by sustainability transitions.

Follow our progress to see how we support the delivery of place-based policies for just sustainability transitions at scale, elevating the voices of the less heard and enhancing democratic citizen participation.

Name: Tomorrow's Cities
Description:
Tomorrow’s Cities is the UK Research and Innovation (UKRI) Global Challenges Research Fund (GCRF) Urban Disaster Risk Hub.
Tomorrow's Cities provides a comprehensive, flexible, disaster risk reduction framework and toolkit for inclusive urban planning in areas exposed to natural hazards.

Name: Nordic Smart City Network
Description:
The Nordic Smart City Network is a collaboration initiative joining five Nordic countries, and currently 19 Nordic cities. The Network received funding from Nordic Innovation for a new collaboration project, Nordic Healthy Cities, that runs until September 2022. 
The Network explores the Nordic way to create healthy, livable and sustainable cities and we share experiences, data and best practices, aiming to make the cities better for the citizens.

Name: Œcumene Spaces For Dignity
Description: Œcumene Spaces For Dignity (Œcumene Studio) is a committed Co-design, Co-build and Research Cooperative Redefining belonging, art, architecture and complexity in a changing world. Both organization and company are founded by enthusiasts from the MENA region. Known as well as Œcumene Studio, our cooperative has spent the past decade constructing an innovative infrastructure for transformative change in Africa and the Middle East. We believe in the power of collective intelligence (co-design and co-construction) in rewriting narratives, creating spaces for dialogue, empowering local communities, and creating spaces for coexistence.

Name: Zelmerlöw Consulting AB
Description:
Välkommen till Zelmerlöw Consulting AB

Vi är ett svenskt konsultföretag som grundades 2020 med en tydlig vision: att främja en hållbar stadsutveckling. Hos oss är hållbarhet inte bara en trend, det är vår grundläggande övertygelse och drivkraft.

Name: AIM - Assessoria d'Infraestructures i Mobilitat
Description:
Oferim serveis integrals d'assistència tècnica a entitats públiques i privades. Estem especialitzats en la gestió ambiental del territori, els estudis de mobilitat generada, el planejament urbanístic, la gestió de la mobilitat, l'optimització del transport públic, els pàrquings i els estacionaments, els camins escolars i la mobilitat amb bicicleta així com en estudis per a la millora de la seguretat viària, entre d'altres.

Ofrecemos servicios integrales de asistencia técnica a entidades públicas y privadas. Estamos especializados en la gestión ambiental del territorio, los estudios de movilidad generada, el planeamiento urbanístico, la gestión de la movilidad, la optimización del transporte público, los párkings y los estacionamientos, los caminos escolares y la movilidad en bicicleta así como en estudios para la mejora de la seguridad viaria, entre otros.

Name: Wopio
Description: Safer cities. Protected roads.

Name: Planning Saga
Description:
We are a startup specializing in GIS based digital mapping. 

We draw our fundamentals from Urban Planning to create high quality maps for our clients.

Our current capabilities include: -

GIS Mapping: -
- Digitization of existing infrastructure from maps/satellite images.
- Creation of Map layers and Resource Inventory
- Creating GIS basemaps

Master Plan and Urban Development Policy: -
- Land Pooling Policy
- AMRUT Master Plan 
- SMART CITY strategy development and implementation

Geo Data Analysis: -
- Satellite Data, Cadastral Data, Environmental Data, Urban Data Analysis

Impact Assessment: -
- Mapping and Spatial analysis for EIA and SIA

In the future we want to build capabilities in AI enabled Point Cloud Data analysis, 3D modelling and Urban Management Platforms.

Name: Mykolaiv Water Hub (MWH)
Description:
Mykolaiv Water Hub was created and is being developed pursuing the SDGs: 6 (clean water and sanitation), 9 (industry, innovation and infrastructure), 11 (sustainable cities and communities). It consists of four components:
1. soft-landing platform for German and European Investors 
2. Accelerator for water-related industries 
3. Think-tank for water-related research 
4. Citizens participation platform. 

Created in Berlin, head-quarter in Mykolaiv.

Name: Public Map | Map Cyhoeddus
Description:
We’re empowering communities to shape decisions by creating and using evidence rooted in local needs, now and for the future.

* Supporting the implementation of the Well-being of Future Generations Act
* Ensuring children and young people’s voices are heard
* Developing children and young people’s digital skills
* Improving environmental and community-focused data
* There is community agency and involvement in the planning system
* Support local authorities in their digital transformation, driving efficiencies, speeding up planning, and supporting good growth

Public Map Platform is being led by Cambridge, Cardiff, Wrexham, and Bangor Universities and is part of the Future Observatory - the Design Museum's national research programme for the green transition and is being funded by the Arts and Humanities Research Council.

Name: ZEa Consultoría Social
Description:
ZEa Consultoría Social es un equipo interdisciplinario formado por técnicos, académicos y científicos altamente especializados en el desarrollo de evaluaciones de impacto social y humano. Nuestra experiencia en el Retorno Social de la Inversión (SROI) permite a las organizaciones con las que trabajamos medir, comprender y maximizar el valor real de sus iniciativas y proyectos.

Aplicando metodologías propias, así como rigurosos análisis de datos, ayudamos a empresas de diversas industrias a mejorar su impacto social, fortalecer el compromiso con sus grupos de interés y fomentar un crecimiento sostenible.

Nuestro profundo conocimiento en el sector del impacto social garantiza estrategias precisas y accionables que se traducen en un cambio significativo, positivo y tangible para las comunidades donde operamos

Name: Urban Acupuncture
Description: Within the framework of the DAAD Ta’ziz Partnership – Scientific Cooperations, the Department of Urban Renewal and Planning Theory – University of Kassel – Germany in cooperation with the Department of Fine Arts – Department of Architecture – Egypt, Department of Architecture – Babylon University – Iraq and Faculty of Architecture - Design and Built Environment – Beirut Arab University – Lebanon have initiated the project “UA – Urban Acupuncture: A Strategy of Catalytic Interventions”. The project runs from March 2023 till the end of 2025 and is concerned with deepening cooperation with partner universities through the organization and implementation of various forms of academic and student exchanges.

Name: Gimisis + Associates
Description: We challenge the accepted

Name: Life After Life
Description:
One Last Good Deed. 

Life After Life uses sustainable end-of-life practices to bring new life to distressed properties, environments, and communities.

Name: Wijkvernieuwing op z'n Gronings
Description:
Onder de vlag ‘Wijkvernieuwing op z’n Gronings’ zetten bewoners, bedrijven, overheden en maatschappelijke organisaties zich samen in voor een betere toekomst voor bewoners van de noordelijke wijken Vinkhuizen, Paddepoel, Selwerd, De Hoogte, Indische Buurt, Oosterparkwijk, Beijum en Lewenborg en De Wijert in het zuiden van de stad. Een samenhangende aanpak, waarbij wonen, leren, werken, veilig zijn en meedoen hand in hand gaan. Dat gebeurt de komende twintig jaar in het kader van het Nationaal Programma Leefbaarheid en Veiligheid Groningen-Noord.

We varen bij deze wijkaanpak een eigen, ‘Groningse‘ koers. Want alles wat we doen moet passen bij de identiteit van de wijk of buurt waar we aan de slag gaan. Omdat dé wijk niet bestaat. We weten ook dat de beste vernieuwingen altijd beginnen bij de mensen in de wijken zelf. Onze bewoners zijn de basis van alles wat we doen. De opgaven waar we aan werken zijn ingewikkeld en niet van vandaag op morgen opgelost. Daarom vraagt dit een langdurige inzet van ons allemaal.

Op onze website lees je verhalen van bewoners van deze wijken over de projecten die we doen.

Name: REGENSBURG_NEXT
Description:
Regensburg macht sich auf den Weg zur Smart City – einer nachhaltigen, zukunftsfähigen, intelligenten Stadt.
Das Förderprojekt REGENSBURG_NEXT bietet dabei Raum für smarte Lösungen und Projekte sowie offenen Dialog als Basis für ein weiterhin attraktives und lebenswertes Regensburg – ganz im Sinne der Leitmotive der Neuen Leipzig-Charta: gerecht, grün und produktiv.

Name: Stavanger Sentrum AS
Description:
Stavanger Sentrum AS (STAS) har gjennom de siste årene utviklet seg fra å være en mer tradisjonell sentrumsforening til å dekke et større spekter av sentrumsutviklingen. I tett samarbeid med Stavanger kommune, våre medlemmer og samarbeidspartnere jobber vi kontinuerlig med å videreutvikle Stavanger sentrum som attraktivt for innbyggere, næringsliv, utviklere og besøkende - både på kort og lang sikt. Samarbeidet med Stavanger kommune er formalisert gjennom CID-samarbeidet, der kommunen og STAS sammen skal jobbe for realiseringen av KDP Stavanger sentrum (Sentrumsplanen). Blant flere utvalgte satsningsområder i dette arbeidet er utvikling av distrikter og komplett årshjul for arrangementer. STAS samarbeider også tett med andre aktører og deltar bl.a. aktivt i prosjekter som Stavanger 2025, NEB-star og Tall Ships Races 2026 - samt med Gladmat og andre større arrangører. STAS har også administrativ ledelse av Norsk Sentrumsutvikling (NSU) og tar gjennom det også en nasjonal rolle i utviklingen av norske bysentrum.

STAS sine medlemmer er butikker, restauranter, tjenesteytere, kulturaktører, gårdeiere og eiendomsutviklere - og oppslutningen er økende.

Selskapet er non-profit, med Stavanger kommune og Næringsforening i Stavanger-regionen som aksjonærer.

Name: Women of Environmental Planning+
Description:
Based in the Greater Toronto Area, the Women of Environmental Planning Plus (WEP+) network was formed in 2018 with the intention of fostering an inclusive environment where individuals can connect with like-minded people, learn from one another, and build professional relationships. Throughout the four years of organizing events, the group has been able to connect a wide variety of professionals, ranging from prospective students to those who have been in the planning field for over 25 years.

The WEP+ network aims to create opportunities for individuals to grow professionally, foster connections, and uplift one another in the field of environmental planning. 

The goal of the network is to continue planning and hosting collaborative social events and create opportunities for individuals to connect in-person. While the group was originally established with the intent of bringing together women in the field of environmental planning, the network has since expanded to welcome individuals of all gender expressions and related professional industries.

Name: Business Centre Treeport
Description:
Het Business Centre Treeport (BCT) is het hart van de ‘boomteelt business’ van Zundert en de wijde omgeving. Handel, logistiek, promotie, onderzoek en onderwijs vormen de kernactiviteiten. Het BCT biedt ook ruimte voor boomteelt gelieerde bedrijven zoals toeleveranciers, mechanisatiebedrijven, bedrijven die organische stof en grondstoffen verwerken en bedrijven in de groenvoorziening.

Het BCT is een thematisch bedrijventerrein waar bedrijven zitten die win-win situaties kunnen creëren door samenwerking. Deze synergie (samenwerken) en symbiose (samenleven) kunnen wij omzetten naar groei voor de ondernemingen, voor de sector en voor de lokale en regionale economie.

Name: Agence Acqua Alta
Description:
acqua alta accompagne territoires, entreprises, et leurs dirigeants, dans la conception de stratégies territoriales et urbaines résilientes, et dans le montage de projets complexes. 

sa spécificité : allier vision stratégique & faisabilité opérationnelle. De la feuille de route jusqu’aux montages, l’expertise technique et réglementaire, l’évaluation.

l'agence intervient particulièrement sur les nouveaux enjeux de transition foncière, de prise en compte des sols, de revitalisation des territoires et de regénération urbaine, avec une exigence d’opérationnel, de formation et une perspective comparative et européenne.

Name: ELABORATOR Project
Description:
ELABORATOR stands for ‘The European Living Lab on designing sustainable urban mobility towards climate neutral cities’. The project uses a holistic approach for planning, designing, implementing and deploying specific innovations and interventions towards safe, inclusive and sustainable urban mobility. These interventions consist of smart enforcement tools, space redesign and dynamic allocation, shared services, and integration of active and green modes of transportation.

They will be specifically co-designed and co-created with identified “vulnerable to exclusion” user groups, local authorities and relevant stakeholders. The interventions will be demonstrated in a number of cities across Europe, starting with 6 Lighthouse cities consisting of:

•	Milano, Italy 
•	Copenhagen, Denmark 
•	Helsinki, Finland
•	Issy-les-Moulineaux, France 
•	Zaragoza, Spain 
•	Trikala, Greece 

And 6 Follower cities, consisting of:
•	Lund, Sweden 
•	Liberec, Czech Republic
•	Velenje, Slovenia 
•	Split, Croatia 
•	Krusevac, Serbia 
•	Ioannina, Greece

Plus, we are a multidisciplinary group composed of 38 partners who bring to the table their varied and exceptional expertise on the topic, working together towards implementing sustainable urban mobility and climate-neutral cities.

Name: Zion Engagement and Planning
Description:
Empowering First Nations people to care for Country, restore community and revive culture.

Zion Engagement and Planning aims to come alongside the built environment industry to help build cultural capacity in working with Country, community and culture. We specialise in First Nations engagement and cultural capacity training with a focus on supporting clients to expand their impact with First Nations communities.

Name: Urban Platform in Cameroon
Description: The urban Platform in Cameroon project is helping to improve public policies on spatial planning for sustainable and inclusive cities.

Name: Loqiva
Description:
Your Digital Town Hub Platform 

We’ve built Loqiva as a platform where local residents can find out what’s going on in their area, businesses can experience a competitive advantage and placemakers to get a complete picture of what’s going on in their town. 


Or as we like to say… Everything together all in one place

Name: Tierra Consulting Firm
Description:
Christopher Courtney founded Tierra Consulting firm in March of 2022. Tierra Consulting is a premier land development consulting team who delivers thorough results within any allotted timeframe and budget. With 22 years of experience and more than 60 jurisdictions being covered under our belts, we offer an array of umbrella solutions and services that overcomes challenges of rising costs and interest, retaining talent, and maneuvering the complex world of minutia and project approvals. We process all calibers of a project–from small single family detached home projects, multi-family attached projects, to mix used master plans.

We're a consulting company specializing in feasibility, entitlements, design coordination, permitting, budgeting, scheduling and bond exoneration work. We have relationships and experience throughout Southern California and some parts of the country. Whether you have a home to remodel, a single parcel to entitle or build out, or you have a major project; we do it all. We have entitled and permitted projects up to 4,500 lots, mixed use, commercial only and more. Let us know your needs or problems and we will be your solution. 

Our mission is to provide land development guidance to give you a unique sense of confidence in spearheading large-scale homebuilding projects. Tierra Consulting involves itself every step of the way, from conceptualization to final processing. These days, costs are increasing, and finding or retaining talented support staff is more complex than ever. With us by your side, we help navigate you and maneuver the world of housing and land development through the minutia of this complex industry. 

Gone are the days when you needed to worry about getting the right people, materials, and information in the face of a market that can crash at any moment. Instead, we expedite our services so your projects can get off the ground immediately, all of which will be led by our exceptional team of experts.

Name: South West Mayo Development Company
Description:
Founded in 1991, South West Mayo Development Company (SWMDC) is a community-owned and volunteer-led Local Development Company (LDC), which was established to implement the pilot LEADER European Rural Development Programme in south west Mayo. 

SWMDC has been a cornerstone of the local, rural, community development and social inclusion sectors in Mayo for three decades. We now employ 52 people, with an additional 450 people employed through social employment schemes. 

Our geographical remit for some programmes now covers all of County Mayo and stretches into Roscommon and Galway. While our initial focus was on rural and community development, social inclusion and employment/activation are now significant areas of work in the company. 

Through the work of SWMDC, communities, enterprises and people across Mayo and the wider western region have benefitted from training, capacity building, animation, investment and the development of projects. All our work is based on the fundamental principle that our interactions with people and communities should be empowering, enriching and energising.

Name: Zone d'Innovation Minière (ZIM)
Description:
La ZIM est un écosystème d’innovation de classe mondiale qui regroupe des entreprises, des équipementiers et des fournisseurs, des institutions d’enseignement et de recherche appliquée, des organismes de soutien à l’innovation, à la commercialisation et à l’exportation. Cet écosystème
s’attache aussi à un vaste réseau de partenaires des milieux municipal, communautaire et culturel pour coconstruire, implanter et commercialiser les solutions améliorées ou nouvelles d’une exploitation minière compétitive et créatrice de richesses pour tous dans un contexte de développement durable.

Name: Cowork Valley
Description: The best work space at the most affordable prices

Name: CommunalAudit GmbH
Description:
CommunalAudit – das Werkzeug für zielgerichtete Kommunalentwicklung
Das CommunalAudit ist ein österreichweit etabliertes Benchmark – Tool, das es Gemeinden ermöglicht, sich auch über Bezirks- und Landesgrenzen hinweg zu vergleichen.  Den Kommunen und den politischen Entscheidungsträger:innen wird damit ein Werkzeug in die Hand gegeben, um Rückschlüsse in unterschiedlichen Bereichen zu ziehen und Impulse zur zielgerichteten Weiterentwicklung zu setzen.
In den vergangenen Jahren haben über 300 Gemeinden aus allen Bundesländern Österreichs ihre strategische Entwicklung aktiv in die Hand genommen und auf Grundlage fundierter Auswertungen in Bereichen wie Strategieentwicklung, Managementreifegrad, Finanzen und Strukturdaten, welche aus zwölf für die Gemeinde relevanten Lebensbereichen erhoben werden, ihre zukünftige Entwicklung gestaltet. 

Mithilfe des CommunalAudit werden konkrete Maßnahmen in den verschiedenen Handlungsfeldern identifiziert, die zahlreiche Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten eröffnen. Durch die Zusammenarbeit und Vernetzung von Verwaltung, Politik, Wirtschaft und Bürgergesellschaft vergrößert sich der Handlungsspielraum der Gemeinden und Projekte können gemeinsam umgesetzt werden. 

Die Möglichkeiten sind vielfältig und umfassen ua. folgende Themenbereiche: 
»	Interkommunale Zusammenarbeit im Bereich der Verwaltung
»	Belebung der Ortskerne 
»	Kinderbetreuung
»	Personalfindung und -entwicklung
»	Nachhaltigkeitsprojekte im Bereich Erneuerbare Energien 
»	Infrastruktur- und Mobilitätsprojekte
»	Leerstandsmanagement / Nachnutzungskonzepte
»	Nahversorgung und Gastronomie
»	Immobilienentwicklung
»	Tourismus 
»	Erneuerbare Energiegemeinschaften
»	Primärversorgungszentren
»	Fokus-Projekte für Jugendliche, die Generation 65+ und ehrenamtlich Engagierte

Name: SmartCity-Summit.Niederrhein
Description:
Der 5. SmartCity-Summit.Niederrhein findet am 26. Februar 2026 in der NEW Box in Mönchengladbach statt.

Kommunen, Unternehmen und Expert*innen treffen sich im Herzen des Niederrheins, in Mönchengladbach, um konkrete Lösungen für die digitale Stadt von morgen zu diskutieren und weiterzuentwickeln. Der Summit verbindet Impulsvorträge, interaktive Workshops und praxisnahe Demonstrationen mit ausreichend Raum für Austausch und Networking – ideal für alle, die Smart-City-Strategien in ihrer Kommune umsetzen wollen.

Mit dabei: Städte wie Hamm, Krefeld, Nettetal, Aachen, Dormagen und der Rhein-Kreis Neuss.

Außerdem dürfen wir das Partnerland Niederlande herzlich begrüßen.

Die Veranstaltung ist kostenlos, die Tickets sind nur begrenzt verfügbar. Sichern Sie sich jetzt Ihr Ticket unter smart-city-summit.com.

Name: Instytut Rozwoju Terytorialnego
Description:
Instytut Rozwoju Terytorialnego jest samorządową jednostką organizacyjną Województwa Dolnośląskiego, powstałą z przekształcenia Wojewódzkiego Biura Urbanistycznego we Wrocławiu, zajmującą się realizacją zadań województwa z zakresu polityki rozwoju oraz planowania przestrzennego.

Naszą misją jest:
WIEDZA - WSPÓŁPRACA - ROZWÓJ!

Name: The Sandton Gate Precinct
Description: Sandton Gate is located in the heart of Johannesburg. The world-class precinct is a sustainable and smarter choice for businesses, residents, and the general public. The precinct is only five minutes from the Sandton CBD, Africa’s business capital and is in close proximity to Rosebank, Randburg, Bryanston and Hyde Park. Situated on both the Gautrain and BRT bus routes, commuters are easily connected to Sandton Gate from across the city.

Name: Teenzopedia
Description:
Welcome to Teenzopedia, where teenagers thrive and grow! 
At Teenzopedia, we believe that every teenager has the potential to achieve greatness and make a positive impact on the world. We're on a mission to empower teenagers to discover their passions, build meaningful connections, and unlock their full potential.
 What We Offer:
A vibrant and supportive community where teenagers can connect, learn, and inspire each other.
Mentorship programs led by experienced professionals and peer mentors who provide guidance, support, and encouragement.
Access to a wealth of educational resources, including articles, videos, courses, and workshops, covering topics such as mental health, academic success, career planning, and life skills.
Engaging events, discussions, and challenges designed to foster personal growth, creativity, and leadership.
Opportunities for teenagers to showcase their talents, share their stories, and make a difference in their communities.
 Our Values:
Inclusivity: We welcome teenagers from all backgrounds, identities, and perspectives. Diversity is celebrated and embraced.
Safety: We prioritize the safety and well-being of our members, providing a secure and respectful environment for everyone.
Empowerment: We believe in the power of teenagers to shape their own futures and create positive change in the world.
Collaboration: We encourage collaboration, teamwork, and mutual support among our members, fostering a culture of kindness and generosity.
Join us at Teenzopedia and be part of a community that empowers you to dream big, take risks, and reach for the stars. Together, we can make a difference and create a brighter future for teenagers everywhere!

Click on the link below to join–
https://t.me/teenzopedia/1

Description: East Baltimore Development, Inc. (EBDI) is a 501 [c] [3] established by community, government, institutional and philanthropic partners to revitalize, re-energize and rebuild the East Baltimore neighborhood.

Name: BJH Advisors
Description:
BJH Advisors, LLC (BJH) is a real estate advisory and planning firm, with expertise in infrastructure and urban planning, project management, financial and market analytics, private public partnerships, incentives, and public funding strategies. BJH works with both public sector and private clients to analyze and structure real estate development opportunities; undertake financial feasibility, market and zoning analysis; and help determine if policy goals require programmatic action. 

BJH is a minority and woman-owned business enterprise, certified in New York State and by the Port Authority of NY and NJ.

Name: Sinaan Programme
Description:
The Strengthening Infrastructure through Advancing the Adaptation Nexus (SINAAN) Programme (previously Green Urban Growth, GUG) is a £25 million, 6-year transformative initiative, supported by the U.K. Government, dedicated to building a more resilient and equitable future for Somalia. We empower urban communities to adapt to climate change, foster sustainable development, and unlock inclusive economic growth, with a steadfast focus on the poor and vulnerable.

Implemented by DT Global in strategic partnership with the UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO), Somali authorities, and local communities, SINAAN envisions a Somalia where cities are climate-resilient, economically vibrant, and truly inclusive – ensuring every individual thrives in urban development. 

Join us in shaping this vital journey! For more information on partnerships and collaboration, email us at info.sinaan@dt-global.com.

Name: Maryland Latinos Unidos
Description:
Maryland Latinos Unidos (MLU) is a statewide network of organizations, businesses, and individuals who support Latino and immigrant communities. We work within and with the Latino/Hispanic community in Maryland by supporting Latino-serving nonprofits, convening around public policy priorities, and working together in common cause.

Maryland Latinos Unidos exists to call attention to the disparities and inequities faced by Latino and immigrant communities, to find solutions, and to address these problems with coordinated action. MLU is not providing direct services – we are prioritizing the capacity-building of our grassroots Hispanic-serving organizations to ensure that all Latinos access necessary services.

Collectively, we can accomplish more. Become a member and see how much we can do together!

Avec plus de 270 opérations d’aménagementréaliséessur plus de 170 communeset 7 000 lots vendus, Acanthe réalise en 2021 un Chiffre d’Affaires de 30 M€et se présente aujourd’hui comme un acteur de tout premier plan dans lesecteur de l’aménagement. 
 
Acanthe estune filiale du groupe Blot, acteur incontournable de l’Immobilier dans l’Ouest et dugroupe Bwood, acteur responsable au service du territoire au travers ses différentes filiales :BwoodConstruction,BwoodFactoryetBwoodSeniors. 
 
Structure à taille humaine,notre capacité d’anticipationetnotre réactiviténous permettent denous adapter auxbesoins des collectivités,aux attentes de nos clientset de répondre aux grands défis environnementaux actuels.

חברת אסטרטגיה וניהול פרויקטים, שמתמחה בהפיכתם של ערים, אזורים ומרכזי חיים לטובים יותר עבור האנשים שחיים, עובדים ומבקרים בהם.

תפיסה ייחודית, יצירתית וחדשנית, השואבת השראה מהנעשה בערים המצליחות בעולם.

בעולם וממהלכים אורבניים פורצי דרך.

We are a strategy and project management company specializing in making cities, regions and life centers better for residents, workers and visitors.

We bring a unique, creative and innovative concept, inspired by what is happening in the world's most successful cities and groundbreaking urban initiatives.

The Result: Places for People.

Name: Astylab
Description:
We cultivate the ideas that create the cities we deserve and accelerate urban progress through collaborative innovation and entrepreneurship.

Astylab is a non-profit organization building Greece's "idea machine" for urban transformation—a dynamic network of autonomous initiatives that exchange knowledge, resources, and experiences to create better cities.

How We Work:
We bridge silos between citizens, researchers, businesses, and public officials through meetups, digital deliberation tools, data initiatives, and strategic investments. Our approach combines community building, practical solutions, and entrepreneurial support to turn urban challenges into opportunities.
From civic tech startups to sustainable mobility solutions, we support innovators who are reimagining Greek cities as vibrant, inclusive, and resilient places for everyone.

Name: Lee Kuan Yew World City Prize
Description: The Lee Kuan Yew World City Prize is a biennial international award that honours outstanding achievements and contributions to the creation of liveable, vibrant and sustainable urban communities around the world. The Prize is awarded to cities and recognises their key leaders and organisations for displaying foresight, good governance and innovation in tackling the many urban challenges faced, to bring about social, economic and environmental benefits in a holistic way to their communities.

Name: EV-Electric (EVe) Charging Pte Ltd
Description:
Empowering Journeys. 
 
Two words that encapsulate the entire purpose of our being. It’s why we come to work every day, and how we lead a movement to create charging experiences people love.
 
Since our very first day in 2022, we’ve been orchestrating the roll-out of Singapore’s public EV charging infrastructure. We work with Charging Point Operators (CPOs) and the authorities to ensure that anyone who needs it, is able to power their green vehicle when and where they need it.
 
Some may call it supporting Singapore’s drive to Zero Emissions. To us, it’s simply the way we roll. 

For more info on our openings, visit https://www.mycareersfuture.gov.sg/companies/ev-electric-charging-202243031G

Name: SUSWA
Description: SUSWA is a Water, Sanitation and Hygiene project funded by the Nepal Government, Ministry of Foreign Affairs Finland and the European Union, implemented with technical assistance from Niras Finland and municipalities in the province of Karnali in Nepal, working to ensure Sustainable WASH for All.

Name: URBACT y EUI en España
Description:
Punto de contacto nacional de los programas europeos URBACT y de la Iniciativa Urbana Europea (EUI) de España. 

 Suscríbete a nuestra página de LinkedIn y descubre las 16 Buenas Prácticas españolas: https://lnkd.in/dYiwGdZN

Nuestra misión: impulsar el desarrollo urbano sostenible a través de dos programas europeos abiertos a todas las entidades locales. 

 URBACT tiene como objetivo promover el desarrollo urbano integrado en Europa, facilitando la creación de redes entre ciudades españolas y europeas para el intercambio de buenas prácticas e ideas, y fortaleciendo las competencias de los actores locales en el diseño y la implementación de políticas urbanas integradas y participativas. 

 La Iniciativa Urbana Europea (European Urban Initiative) apoya a áreas urbanas de todos los tamaños, financiando acciones innovadoras, mejorando las capacidades y conocimientos, y contribuyendo al desarrollo de políticas y la comunicación sobre el desarrollo urbano sostenible.

Name: CommunityScale
Description: CommunityScale is a pioneering urban planning and spatial data analysis company serving clients across the United States. We are committed to driving innovation in urban development and real estate by providing swift, accurate, and data-driven insights. Leveraging big data and state-of-the-art analytics, we help municipal and local governments, housing developers, and advocates understand and respond to complex housing needs more effectively and efficiently with a transparent and intuitive process.

Name: UN-Habitat Saudi Arabia
Description: UN‑Habitat in Saudi Arabia is a strategic partner in the Kingdom’s urban transformation journey—blending technical expertise, data‑driven planning, and inclusive design to help cities become more livable, resilient, and future‑ready in support of Vision2030. Through close collaboration with national and local authorities, UN‑Habitat supports the development of integrated urban policies, spatial strategies, and capacity-building initiatives that advance sustainable urbanization across the Kingdom.

Name: CHARTRES AMENAGEMENT
Description: Depuis sa création en 2009, la Société Publique Locale Chartres aménagement conseille et accompagne la mise en œuvre des politiques d'aménagement de l'ensemble des collectivités de l'agglomération de Chartres, à travers la réalisation d’études préalables, le pilotage d’opérations d’aménagement ou de construction. Il s’agit de contribuer au développement et à la qualité de vie du territoire, en créant une relation partenariale avec les collectivités actionnaires actuelles et futures. Selon le projet et les besoins de nos actionnaires, nos missions peuvent prendre la forme de concession d'aménagement, de mission d'assistance à maitrise d'ouvrage, de contrat de mandat et de mandat d'études préalables

Name: PDEC – Projet de Développement Économique de la Casamance (Officiel)
Description:
Le Projet de Développement Économique de la Casamance (PDEC) est un projet de l’État du Sénégal, soutenu par la Banque mondiale, visant à promouvoir une croissance inclusive, durable et apaisée dans les régions sud du pays (Ziguinchor, Kolda, Sédhiou).
Il appuie la gouvernance territoriale, les infrastructures locales, le développement des chaînes de valeur agricoles, l’inclusion sociale, et la résilience communautaire.

 Résultats attendus : amélioration de l’accès aux services sociaux de base, création d’emplois, renforcement des capacités locales.
 Mis en œuvre par l’Unité de Gestion du Projet (UGP) sous l’égide du Ministère des Finances.

Name: Berkane Events
Description:
Hey LinkedIn community!  Get ready to dive into the dynamic energy of Berkane—a city on the rise, fueled by economic, social, and scientific progress, and driven by digital and technological innovation. Berkane has earned its place on the national and international stage of the digital world, and we're thrilled to invite you to be a part of this exhilarating journey.

Introducing "Berkane Events"—your gateway to all the exciting happenings that make Berkane and its partners shine! From stimulating forums to captivating symposiums and engaging citizen workshops, our page is your one-stop destination for all the essential details: dates, programs, speakers, partners, and more. We're here to keep you informed and connected to the pulse of Berkane's vibrant community.

Join us as we celebrate these exceptional events that bridge Berkane with the rest of the world. Immerse yourself in the contagious energy and unique experiences that define Berkane's spirit. Take advantage of this enriching opportunity to unite with Berkane and the global community. Let's make unforgettable memories together! 


 Connect with global visionaries.

 Explore groundbreaking innovations.

 Engage with leading experts.

 Network with like-minded professionals.

Let's create a ripple effect together! 


Follow us more at https://linktr.ee/berkanewecan

Name: Balgequartier
Description:
Willkommen im Balgequartier, mitten im pulsierenden Herzen der Hansestadt Bremen! Hier legten vor mehr als 1.000 Jahren Bremerinnen und Bremer den Grundstein für das Zentrum ihrer Stadt. Hier florierte jahrhundertelang der Handel – an der Balge, einem 1838 zugeschütteten Nebenarm der Weser. Heute trifft an diesem Ort die Vergangenheit auf die Zukunft: Das neue Balgequartier schafft den lebendigen Brückenschlag zwischen Weser, Marktplatz und der zentralen Einkaufslage. 
Das Balgequartier setzt sich aus vier geschichtsträchtigen und identitätsstiftenden Häusern zusammen. Diese waren teilweise viele Jahre nicht öffentlich zugänglich und werden nun ebenerdig erschlossen, architektonisch offen gestaltet und durchquerbar sein. Auf insgesamt 19.000m² bietet das neue Quartier in der Innenstadt ab 2024/2025 Raum für vielfältigen Genuss, Kultur, Shopping, innovative Ideen und inspirierende Arbeitswelten. 
Mit dem neuen Balgequartier entsteht auf Initiative von Joh. Jacobs & Co. ein Ort für alle, die Bremen mit frischem Blick (wieder-)entdecken wollen. Wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Name: Red Internacional de Ciudades Inteligentes
Description: Como asociación dedicada a la transformación urbana sostenible, nuestra misión es impulsar el desarrollo de ciudades inteligentes en México. Nos enfocamos en fomentar la innovación, inclusión y resiliencia ambiental como pilares fundamentales para construir comunidades más eficientes y habitables. Creemos firmemente en la colaboración a múltiples niveles, incluyendo intermunicipal, estatal, federal e internacional, para compartir conocimientos, recursos y estrategias que nos permitan enfrentar los desafíos urbanos actuales. Nos esforzamos por ser un catalizador en la creación de espacios urbanos que no solo atienden a las necesidades actuales, sino que también se preparan para un futuro sostenible.

Name: Templar Development Group
Description:
Springing from a platform of 48 years of residential land development and high volume homebuilding experience in Georgia and Alabama; our team provides site analysis, land planning solutions, positioning strategies, investment opportunities, land banking, and finished residential lots in the Southeast.  

Based in Atlanta, GA, Templar Development creates market leading residential communities in the Southeast.  Our founders have over 150 years combined experience developing communities for leading new home builders.  We pride ourselves on valuing our team members and delivering a superior product for our builder partners.

Name: Sun Bear Industries
Description:
Sun Bear Industries (SBI) is an infrastructure strategy and development firm operating at the intersection of energy, planning, and sustainability.

As a minority-owned company, SBI partners with Tribal Nations, communities, institutions, and public and private-sector stakeholders to plan and deliver resilient infrastructure that supports long-term economic vitality, energy independence, and environmental stewardship. Our work is grounded in holistic sustainability integrating technical excellence with social equity and community-centered outcomes.

Our services span the full project lifecycle, including infrastructure strategy, energy planning, feasibility studies, project management, consulting, pre-development, development, and sustainable investment support. We help clients navigate complexity, reduce risk, and execute projects with precision ensuring infrastructure investments deliver lasting value.

A core pillar of SBI’s work is our commitment to Tribal Nations. We recognize the critical role tribal leadership plays in preserving culture, strengthening communities, and advancing true economic sovereignty. Our approach is built on respect, partnership, and shared vision, supporting projects that align with tribal priorities and long-term self-determination.

SBI collaborates across sectors working with government entities, industry leaders, nonprofits, and community organizations to shape infrastructure solutions that are resilient, inclusive, and future-ready. We are focused not only on meeting today’s energy and infrastructure needs, but on anticipating tomorrow’s challenges through innovation, thoughtful planning, and strategic partnerships.

At Sun Bear Industries, we are building more than projects we are helping shape sustainable, resilient communities for generations to come.

Name: Vienna Geospace Hub
Description:
Das Innovationslabor Vienna Geospace Hub nutzt Geo- und Satellitendaten, um den Übergang zu klimaneutralen, zukunftsfähigen Städten zu beschleunigen. Als zentrale Schnittstelle fördert unser Labor die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Verwaltung, Wissenschaft und Wirtschaft, um innovative & nachhaltige urbane Lösungen zu entwickeln. Der Vienna Geospace Hub ist ein Innovationslabor der UIV Urban Innovation Vienna GmbH. 

The innovation lab Vienna Geospace Hub accelerates the transition to carbon neutrality by leveraging geospatial and satellite data for sustainable urban planning. As a central interface, our lab facilitates collaboration among government, academia, and industry to develop innovative & sustainable urban solutions. Operated by UIV Urban Innovation Vienna GmbH.

Name: MARCHICA MED SA
Description:
Basée à Nador, Marchica Med est une société de développement stratégique dédiée à la valorisation de la lagune de Marchica et à la transformation durable du littoral méditerranéen marocain. Créée en 2008, elle pilote un projet d’envergure nationale et internationale, alliant écologie, tourisme, urbanisme et innovation.

 Mission : Réhabiliter l’écosystème lagunaire tout en impulsant une dynamique économique inclusive et durable.

 Vision : Faire de Marchica un modèle de développement territorial intégré, respectueux de la biodiversité et moteur de croissance pour la région de l’Oriental.

 Projets phares :
Dépollution et réhabilitation de la lagune
Développement de 7 pôles touristiques et urbains
Partenariats internationaux (Côte d’Ivoire, Madagascar)

Name: Versaurb
Description: Aerolevantanento, Cadastro Técnico Multifinalitario, Regularização Fundiária, Planos e Projetos Urbanos

Name: Stockholms Byggnadsförening
Description: Stockholms byggnadsvärlds väletablerade neutrala forum för information, fri debatt och umgänge över fackgränserna.

Name: Orchestra Partners
Description: Orchestra Partners is a real estate developer and consultant with a revolutionary, three-step process that involves planning, Seed Funding, and implementation. Visit our website to learn more.

Name: Parque Ibirapuera Conservação
Description: We are a community-driven initiative transforming the way public and green open spaces are governed. Our work is grounded in the belief that people genuinely care about their shared environment and want to play an active role in improving it—often in partnership with private capital projects. By leveraging technology and engaging directly in transformative actions in parks and open spaces, we foster collaboration, sustainability, and inclusion. We see community engagement not just as participation, but as a catalyst for stronger, more cohesive societies.

Name: Cuyahoga County Planning Commission
Description:
Our vision: Inspiring all of our communities to thrive

Our mission: To advance Cuyahoga County’s social, economic, and environmental health through equitable community planning

Name: Pennsylvania Latino Convention
Description:
We promote Latino/Hispanic achievements and prepare our communities for local, state, national, and global competitiveness by fostering excellence and ensuring equal access to Pennsylvania’s shared prosperity and responsibility.

The Pennsylvania Latino Convention is the premier event covering all aspects of Latino life, community, policy, and agenda for leaders, professionals, advocates, and allies. Open to everyone, the convention offers professional and leadership development opportunities, discussions on issues impacting communities across the state, and engagement in data-driven policy work to advance the social, educational, political, and economic status of the Latino population.

Dedicated to drafting transformative policy recommendations and fostering critical partnerships, the convention aims to advance intentional community development and inclusion. It brings together individuals from government, corporate, community, public, and private sectors for networking and learning through a well-curated professional development program.

Name: Crown Square
Description:
Crown Square | Middlesbrough

Crown Square is the single largest investment in a generation, bringing new homes, student living and a Fairfield by Marriott hotel to Middlesbrough, all designed to shape a thriving future at the heart of the town.

This is a place built for ambition, providing a new housing offer to attract talent, support growth, and create lasting change for Middlesbrough.

£200m investment | 244 new choices of homes | 471 student beds | 200 bed Fairfield by Marriott hotel

A bold invitation to Be Here Now.

Name: Denkstatt sàrl
Description:
Denkstatt versteht sich als eine Projektentwicklerin auf verschiedenen (Massstabs-) Ebenen gegenwärtiger städtebaulicher Transformationsprozesse im urbanen und ruralen Kontext in der Schweiz und im Ausland.
Denkstatt organisiert städtebauliche Lernprozesse für die dauerhafte Verlängerung von Lebens- und Gebrauchszyklen von Gebäudestrukturen und Quartieren. Eine Kernkompetenz liegt in der Nutzungsentwicklung von Bestand. Auf Basis lokaler Potenziale, Akteure und Qualitäten wird die Transformationen von Gebäudestrukturen, Freiräumen und Quartierten mit den minimal nötigen finanziellen und baulichen Eingriffen nachhaltig und ökonomisch tragfähig geplant und realisiert.
In einem interdisziplinären Team aus ca. 20 Mitarbeiter:innen arbeitet die Denkstatt pragmatisch, dialogisch, partizipativ und analytisch am und mit dem Ort in 1:1 Modellen aus Gebäuden, Kontext und involvierten Akteueren und bringt gemeinwohlorientierte Trägerstrukturen für nachhaltige Areal-, Quartier- und Freiraumentwicklungen ins Funktionieren.
Denkstatt moderiert Projekte im Dialog mit dem Ort und arbeitet in partizipativ angelegten Planungsprozessen. Die Perspektive wechselt kontinuierlich zwischen Entwickler:innen, Anwohner:innen, Eigentümer:innen und zukünftigen Nutzer:innen. Dadurch kann auf die sich verändernden Rahmenbedingungen und Bedürfnisse im laufenden Prozess eingegangen werden. Eine soziale, ökologische und ökonomische Entwicklung steht dabei im Fokus.
Denkstatt versteht Raum im erweiterten Sinn als einen dynamischen Prozess, welcher durch die unterschiedlichen Handlungen der beteiligten Akteure stets neu verhandelt und gestaltet wird. Die Rolle von Denkstatt liegt in der Vermittlung zwischen dem Ort mit seinen Gebäuden und Materialien, den Nutzer:innen und Nutzungen sowie den Ideen der Entwickler:innen.

Name: Commute Options Memphis
Description:
Commute Options Memphis is a community program created to promote transportation choices that improve economic and community health. This project is powered by Innovate Memphis and funded under a TN state grant contract.

The Commute Options initiative aims to reduce the number of single-occupancy vehicle commute trips in Memphis while increasing the usage of transit, carpooling, bicycling, and walking to work.

The drive-alone commute culture pervasive in Memphis negatively impacts our local economy, communities, and environment while contributing to sprawl. Through a historic emphasis on developing more convenient automotive transportation, Memphis positioned itself as less walkable and transit-friendly than our peer cities.

Despite ongoing multi-modal transportation improvements, around 80% of Memphians drive alone to and from work each day.

The Tennessee Department of Transportation awarded Innovate Memphis a Congestion Mitigation and Air Quality grant to create partnerships with local employers and learning institutions to promote transportation choices that improve economic and community health.

While our strategies currently aim to improve transportation choices and culture at our partner worksites, more sustainable change, city-wide, is the ultimate goal for future implementations.

Name: Trema - Travaux publics
Description:
LE SPÉCIALISTE DES TRAVAUX DE TERRASSEMENT, D’ASSAINISSEMENT ET DE VRD

TREMA se situe à Saint-Didier-en-Velay dans le département de la Haute-Loire.
Nous intervenons sur la Loire et la Haute-Loire pour prendre en charge et mener à bien une vaste gamme de chantiers tant pour les professionnels du secteur privé ou agricole, les collectivités locales ou territoriales, les industriels que pour les particuliers… 

Par nos prestations de terrassement, nos travaux de VRD (Voirie et réseaux divers) ou d’assainissement, Trema Travaux Publics participe à l’aménagement du territoire et à la réalisation d’infrastructures privées ou publics…

Grâce à sa stratégie de croissance mise en place depuis 2009, le groupe a su développer ses capacités, ses compétences et ses performances pour être opérationnel sur un marché complexe.


POURQUOI NOUS CONFIER VOS TRAVAUX DE TERRASSEMENT, D’ASSAINISSEMENT OU DE VOIRIE ?

 pour l’excellence de nos équipes et la qualité du travail fourni, attestés par la confiance renouvelée de nos clients privés et publics.
 pour notre proximité géographique qui implique une capacité à réagir et à intervenir rapidement en Loire et Haute-Loire.
 pour notre attention à la préservation de l’environnement et la sensibilisation de nos salariés.
 Pour notre sens de l’innovation.

Parce que le groupe Trema compte parmi ses entités la société Malia TP Démolition, nous assurons aussi le curetage ou la démolition complète de tous bâtiments et la déconstruction d’ouvrages. Nos équipes se chargent également du tri et du recyclage des déchets de chantier, certains pouvant être valorisés par concassage ou criblage. De même, une équipe dédiée prend en charge le désamiantage de tous les types de bâtiments.

 Nos savoir-faire ont été reconnus par des partenaires emblématiques tels que la SUEZ, le Département de la Haute-Loire et la Ville de Saint-Etienne.

 Vous avez un projet ?
Ne tardez plus, contactez-nous !

Name: Minneapolis Parks Foundation
Description:
The Minneapolis Parks Foundation is an independent, donor-supported nonprofit organization that believes parks have the power to connect us, heal us, and make us whole. We help envision and execute transformative parks and public spaces by working closely with our public partners and in collaboration with the community.

Through implementation expertise and philanthropic investment, we accelerate visionary parks projects, including RiverFirst, Water Works and the Great Northern Greenway River Link. We also support innovative Minneapolis parks projects through grants and champion world-class design through our Next Generation of Parks Event Series.

Name: VOLTEAM
Description:
We are an EV Charging Stations Installation company based in France, Spain and Italy.

With Volteam everything is predictable. From response times to quality and pricing, no room for surprises.

With more than 50 EV charger brands, we partner with the best all over Europe.

Our engineers’ team is certified by the biggest brands of charging stations.
“Full service”:  from scheduling appointments, travels, consumables, to job reports, we take care of everything.

Name: Nyhavna Utvikling AS
Description: Nyhavna skal transformeres fra industri og havn til en attraktiv og bærekraftig sentrumsbydel ved vannet. Utviklingen av Nyhavna er et bærekraftig byutviklingsgrep, og skal romme boliger, næring, kultur og opplevelser.

Name: TOPONYMY
Description:
La toponymie étudie les noms propres qui désignent un lieu. Elle recherche leur ancienneté, leur signification, leur évolution.

Toponymy, est une agence hybride, qui réinvente notre territoire à travers l’urbanisme et le paysage. Ces deux approches n’en font plus qu’une, à l’instar de l’Atelier-Atu et de Woodstock Paysage, qui fusionnent pour adopter un point de vue unique et global sur l’homme et son environnement, le bâti et la nature, l’intuition et la méthode. 
Nous sommes spécialisée dans l’expression des territoires. Qu’ils soient vastes, atypiques, anciens, réhabilités, à inventer, Toponymy leur prête son langage aussi technique que poétique. 

Voulue par Adrien et Maxime, portée par eux et une équipe de 27 personnes, cette agence vient perturber positivement l’approche du territoire en France… avec, pourquoi pas, des ambitions internationales.

Les Toponymystes
Cette aventure est portée par des femmes et des hommes de talent, aussi engagés que les fondateurs de Toponymy et qui constituent une joyeuse tribu. Les Toponymystes partagent un état d’esprit, créatif, réactif, en toute transversalité. Urbanistes, paysagistes, concepteurs, cartographes, ingénieurs, architectes, directeurs de travaux, spécialistes et assistants de direction, tous et toutes ont en commun cette quête de sens qui les anime.

Name: Palmetto
Description: Palmetto nace con la misión de ofrecer calidad de vida a sus clientes, al importar sensaciones, plasmadas en sus diferentes proyectos, con los que se establece como una marca sólida, que ofrece seguridad, respaldo y calidad internacional a sus inversionistas extranjeros y locales.

Name: Active Towns
Description:
Hi Everyone, my name is John Simmerman and Active Towns is my video and podcast platform for profiling the people, places, and programs that promote a Culture of Activity for All Ages & Abilities

Since that time I've been exploring, documenting, and profiling established, emerging, and aspiring Active Towns wherever they might be, in order to produce high-quality multi-media content to help inspire the creation of more safe and inviting, environments that promote a "Culture of Activity" for "All Ages & Abilities".

My YouTube Channel, Active Towns - Profiles by John Simmerman features my original video content and reflections, including a selection of podcast episodes and short films profiling the positive and inspiring efforts happening around the world as I am able to experience and document them.

I invite you to tune in, I hope you find this content helpful.

To make a donation to Advocates for Healthy Communities, Inc. (EIN 5-3802508) go here: https://www.activetowns.org/donate/

Name: ZF Devco
Description:
ZF Devco BV is a development company based in the Netherlands focused on growing the Blue Economy of Zanzibar through the Passenger and RoRo Ferry Terminal near Stone Town, Zanzibar. 

At ZF Devco, our mission is to create sustainable and innovative transportation solutions that connect communities and foster economic growth, all while safeguarding the natural beauty and cultural heritage of Zanzibar. We are committed to delivering a world-class ferry terminal that sets the highest standards for safety, efficiency, and environmental responsibility. 

Our goal is to be a catalyst for positive change, empowering local communities, promoting responsible tourism, and contributing to the long-term prosperity and resilience of Zanzibar.

Name: AI CANADA
Description:
AI CANADA is a leading pan-Canadian AI community bringing together innovators, researchers, founders, and ecosystem leaders to advance AI adoption and responsible innovation across Canada.

This Community is a space to connect, learn, and collaborate with others passionate about AI across Canada. Members are encouraged to share news, ideas, and local projects that highlight how AI is transforming industries, communities, and everyday life.

Join us to exchange insights, celebrate innovation, and explore the human side of technology. Together, we’ll showcase Canada’s growing role in the global AI landscape — one conversation at a time.

Name: ON Management AB
Description:
Vi erbjuder kvalificerade konsulttjänster med en helhetssyn i byggprocessens alla skeden inom fastighetsrätt/lantmäteri, projekt- och byggledning, kalkylering, produktionsplanering, samverkansledning och KA.

Med vår kompetens och lösningsorienterade sätt, kan våra kunder och samarbetspartners tryggt nå sina mål och därmed bidra till ett mer hållbart samhälle

Name: Brasilidade Urbanismo
Description:
A Brasilidade Urbanismo tem o propósito de criar lugares diferentes, amplos e espaçosos. Lugares onde a qualidade de vida esteja em perfeita harmonia com o convívio com a natureza e o acesso às infinitas possibilidades que a tecnologia oferece. 

Nascemos para desenvolver empreendimentos inovadores, concebidos sob a ótica do bem-viver. Nossa missão é urbanizar com design e oferecer opções sob medida, projetando lugares voltados para 
as pessoas. Lugares mais bucólicos, mais próximos, mais humanos. Lugares de sonho, na verdade.

Name: Malia - Désamiantage et Démolition
Description:
Malia TP Démolition garantit la gestion de tous les chantiers de démolition de A à Z. Grâce au professionnalisme et à la formation pointue de nos équipes, à l’utilisation de techniques de pointe ainsi qu’à une flotte d’engins et de véhicules en propre, nous assurons toutes les étapes du projet: son étude approfondie en amont, la démolition complète ou la déconstruction partielle par curage, le tri et l’évacuation des déchets, le terrassement en fin de chantier, voire les travaux d’assainissement ou de VRD en cas de nouveau projet de reconstruction. Si le chantier nécessite un désamiantage, nous disposons également de deux équipes hautement spécialisées pour mener à bien ces chantiers de décontamination. Malia TP Démolition bénéfice d’ailleurs du label Qualibat 1552 et 1112, garant de son sérieux et du respect des règles en matière de désamiantage.

POURQUOI NOUS CONFIER VOS TRAVAUX DE DEMOLITION ET DESAMIANTAGE ?

 Le démantèlement de bâtiments industriels ou d’entrepôts commerciaux.
 Pour l’excellence de nos équipes et la qualité du travail fourni, attestés par la confiance renouvelée de nos clients privés et publics.
 Pour notre proximité géographique qui implique une capacité à réagir et à intervenir rapidement en Loire et Haute-Loire.
 Pour notre sens de l’innovation.
 Une entreprise de désamiantage agréée par le certificat Qualibat 1552

Pour toute prestation en Loire ou en Haute-Loire et plus largement en Auvergne Rhône-Alpes, n’hésitez pas à contacter votre entreprise de démolition et de désamiantage Malia TP Démolition.

Name: Move to Piteå
Description: In the middle of Sweden's hottest labor market region, the city of Piteå is ready to receive you! We make your skills visible and ensure that you get the right support to thrive in your new hometown. Move-in service is run by Piteå municipality, business, civil society, property operators, education providers and residents. Are you interested in a study visit or are you perhaps already on your way here? Get in touch with us and we will shine together. You deserve the best possible start in Piteå!

Name: Community Planning Collaborative
Description:
Helping Communities + Culture Flourish

Our purpose is to elevate the voices and culture of those traditionally excluded from urban planning, land use and zoning. We inspire community-led, history-based planning solutions so that equitable outcomes are possible. We know telling the inclusive history of our communities is a critical component of all planning efforts.

How can we help your community? We work with you to highlight and promote community history and heritage, elevate community members’ knowledge in land use and urban planning projects, and strategize and plan for your community’s future. We blend practical planning, historic preservation, and land use strategies with a commitment to working with people.

Name: Tipolis
Description: Tipolis creates new models of urban living through innovation in governance, leading to greater opportunity, choice, and freedom.

Name: Design Plan Services Inc.
Description: We are a full featured Land Development and Planning Consulting Firm.  Typically we assist private landowners in securing any planning related approvals within the purview of the Planning Act of Ontario.  We are Registered Professional Planners under the Ontario Professional Planners Institute and Members of the Canadian Institute of Planners.

Name: ecoprosus
Description:
We are an innovative urban tech startup revolutionizing the way communities and cities manage their infrastructure through our smart pole technology. 
At Ecoprosus, we specialize in transforming traditional, "dumb" poles into intelligent, multi-functional smart poles through our unique retrofit box technology called ‘roobix’. Roobix is a proprietary product with 15+ patentable features, converging hardware with software to convert any pole into a smart pole.
It can make it simpler to deploy multiple devices at scale, easier to use data for better decisions have a minimal impact on the environment and enable a wide range of functionalities like:
1.	Smart Lighting: Adaptive lighting that reduces energy consumption and operational costs.
2.	Surveillance and Security: Integrated cameras and sensors for enhanced public safety.
3.	Emergency response systems: Fast and reliable response for incidents
4.	Environmental Monitoring: Real-time data on air quality, noise levels, and weather conditions.
5.	Connectivity: Wi-Fi hotspots and 5G small cells to improve urban connectivity.
6.	Digital Signage: Dynamic information displays for advertising and public announcements.
7.	Electric Vehicle Charging: Charging stations to support the growing demand for electric vehicles.
Our technology not only modernizes urban infrastructure but also delivers significant benefits to both communities and their residents. They can reduce Operational and maintenance costs, improve public safety, and enhance the quality of life, while citizens enjoy better connectivity, cleaner environments, increased real estate valuation and improved urban services.

Name: Docurba
Description: Docurba, la plateforme mise en place par les services de l’Etat pour les collectivités et leurs bureaux d’étude afin de faciliter l'élaboration des documents d'urbanisme et la prise en compte des informations et enjeux environnementaux

Name: Batı Akdeniz Kalkınma Ajansı  | BAKA | West Mediterranean Development Agency
Description:
West Mediterranean Development Agency (BAKA) is a regional public authority in the TR61 region of Turkey. It is responsible for building and facilitating regional plans, strategies, and operational programs, with a focus on entrepreneurship, alternative tourism, and medicinal and aromatic plants in the Antalya, Burdur, and Isparta provinces. Additionally, BAKA conducts investment support, employment, and SME development facilities and projects in the region.

Through a one-stop-shop approach, the agency offers, all free of charge, an extensive range of services including identifying market opportunities, providing pertinent economic information, reviewing business sectors, locating sites, assisting in legal and licensing procedures, explaining incentives available to investors and finding companies for potential partnership. The agency works with the backing of all governmental bodies and follows a private sector approach. The board of directors of the agency includes the governors of the three provinces that make up the region, the mayors of the provinces and the chairmen of the chambers of commerce and industry of the three provinces.

 Services Offered;
-Developing projects with stakeholders
-Identifying market opportunities
-Providing pertinent economic information
-Reviewing business sectors
-Locating sites
-Assisting in legal and licensing procedures
-Explaining incentives available to investors
-Finding companies for potential partnership

Name: Move to Piteå
Description: In the middle of Sweden's hottest labor market region, the city of Piteå is ready to receive you! We make your skills visible and ensure that you get the right support to thrive in your new hometown. Move-in service is run by Piteå municipality, business, civil society, property operators, education providers and residents. Are you interested in a study visit or are you perhaps already on your way here? Get in touch with us and we will shine together. You deserve the best possible start in Piteå!

Name: Dordthuis
Description:
In 2026 opent het Dordthuis haar deuren. Een unieke plek waar gemeente, stadsbibliotheek, sociale dienst en VVV straks samenkomen onder één dak. 

Het Dordthuis wordt dé plek om jezelf te ontwikkelen, werken, steun te vinden, dingen te regelen, ontdekken en beleven. En natuurlijk ontmoet je er andere Dordtenaren!

Name: Kulturdistriktet
Description:
Kulturdistriktet er en vision, et byområde og en organisation, der skaber kunst og kulturoplevelser på Østerbro og Nordhavn. Vi tænker lokalt og langsigtet med drømmen om at gøre området til et kreativt epicenter.

Vi står for Åben Festival, oplevelseskonferencen På Byens Vegne samt netværksarrangementer og byvandringer, men sætter også stor stolthed i at understøtte kunstnere, butikker og byudviklere med at skabe liv i bydelen.
