Bag Kulturdistriktet står en forening af kunstnere, kulturinstitutioner og virksomheder, der blev etableret i 2020. Foreningen drives af et sekretariat med en bredt repræsenteret bestyrelse i ryggen. Foreningen har desuden et aktivt og voksende netværk af kulturskabere og frivillige.

Foreningen er tværsektorelt forankret gennem partnerskaber med Københavns Kommune, By & Havn, Wonderful Copenhagen og byudviklingsbureauet Vida Local. Derudover er Kulturdistriktet stolt medlem af Global Cultural Districts Network (GCDN). 

--- ENGLISH ---

Kulturdistriktet is a vision, an urban area and an organization that creates art and cultural experiences in Copenhagen. We work locally and long-term with the dream of making our area a creative epicenter.

We are responsible for Åben Festival, the experience conference På Byens Vegne as well as network events and city walks, but we take just as much pride in supporting artists, shops and city developers in their work to create life in the district.

Behind Kulturdistriktet is an association of artists, cultural institutions and companies, which was established in 2020. The association is run by a secretariat with a broadly represented board  and an active and growing network of cultural creators and volunteers.

The association has cross-sectoral partnerships with the City of Copenhagen, By & Havn, Wonderful Copenhagen and the urban development agency Vida Local. In addition, Kulturdistriktet is a proud member of the Global Cultural Districts Network (GCDN)

Name: Mon Diagnostic Artificialisation
Description:
Mon Diagnostic Artificialisation aide les collectivités à atteindre leurs objectifs de sobriété foncière en leur permettant de :

- Mesurer la consommation d’espaces NAF (Naturels, Agricoles, et Forestiers) du territoire pendant la décennie précédente 2011-2021 (en se basant sur les données allant du 01/01/2011 au 31/12/2020)
Simuler divers scenarii de trajectoires de consommation d’espaces NAF (Naturels, Agricoles et Forestiers) pour les dix prochaines années 2021-2031 (en se basant sur les données allant du 01/01/2021 au 31/12/2030) et préparer le rapport triennal local exigé depuis août 2024,

- Se projeter sur l’objectif d’atteindre le « zéro artificialisation nette des sols » en 2050, avec l’analyse de l’artificialisation des sols à l’échelle de la parcelle (pour les départements couverts par l’OCS GE).

Service aval de l’Observatoire de l’Artificialisation des Sols, le service numérique s’appuie sur les données et calculs de référence. En libre accès, le service numérique fournit en instantané et toute transparence des diagnostics aux collectivités, services de l’Etat, acteurs de l’aménagement ou citoyens.

Name: NVILA
Description: NVILA GROUP is a consulting company that provides services in various IT solutions and digital project management such as CAD / BIM / GIS and data coordination, project management, design management and design.

Name: Sex & the City APS
Description:
Sex & the City è un’associazione di promozione sociale che osserva le città da un punto di vista di genere, e lo fa attraverso progetti specifici, teorici e pratici, una serie di incontri pubblici e un progetto di ricerca. In questo modo, cerca di costruire un quadro capace di integrare la dimensione di genere nella riflessione sulla città, così da fornire uno strumento utile a formulare politiche che possano organizzare gli spazi puntando al benessere di tuttə, cittadine e cittadini.

Sex & the City is a non-profit association that observes cities from a gender perspective, and does so through specific theoretical and practical projects, a series of public meetings and a research project. In this way, it seeks to construct a framework capable of integrating the gender dimension into the debate of the city, so as to provide a useful tool for formulating policies that can organise spaces with a view to the well-being of all.

Name: Downtown Lansing Inc.
Description:
Community |  Commerce |  Arts |  Entertainment. 

Welcome to Downtown Lansing! 

Downtown Lansing Inc. (DLI) is the downtown management agency dedicated to revitalizing and promoting economic development and community engagement in Michigan’s Downtown. A certified Main Street organization, DLI’s mission is to strengthen and nurture the culture, health, and sustainability of Downtown Lansing. Downtown Lansing is home to nearly 200 unique businesses, offering global dining experiences, wide-ranging retail offerings and unique events and attractions for all ages at all times of the day. In 2024, DLI received recognition as an industry-leading Main Street organization after being named a top 10 semifinalist in the 2024 Great American Main Street Award. Learn more about DLI at DowntownLansing.org.

Name: Petra Imperiale
Description:
Un nuevo concepto se viene de la mano de Petra Urbana 
Quedate atento

Name: Pulama Lanai
Description:
Pūlama Lānaʻi is a land and resource management company, a cultural steward, a community builder. We’re helping to shape the future of Lāna‘i by creating new opportunities driven by agriculture, resource management, conservation and more. 

Pūlama Lānaʻi brings an integrated and comprehensive approach to protect and manage Lānaʻi’s natural resources. Bound by a strong sense of community, we are committed to building infrastructure and expanding essential services to improve the lives of Lānaʻi residents.

Name: Silk Cities
Description:
Silk Cities is an independent hub, aiming to bridge the gap between local and global efforts, academia and practice, and local and diaspora experts, and bridges fragmented urban domains. Being inherently interdisciplinary, Silk Cities performs under the overarching and overlapping spheres of resilience and disaster management, urban development, communities’ cultural assets and social well-being.

We introduce real-world, yet under-explored contextual and global issues, then take intellectual leadership to initiate frontier projects such as international conferences, bringing together dispersed knowledge and ideas, and setting new directions for research, policy, and practice.  Silk Cities focus on knowledge exchange, research, raising awareness, and publication. Through intellectual capacity building and creating international visibility of those under-presented local researchers and working professionals, Silk Cities strives to inspire, empower, and make a positive impact.

Through its organic growth, over 1,000 individual researchers and practitioners directly participated in our international conferences, workshops, and other projects. The impact of Silk Cities projects spread globally through its reference books and open-access eBooks, free online lectures and Then and Now resources. 

By using the narrative of the urban Silk Roads, we tap into the notions of connectivity and exchange, and historical presence that is reflected in city characteristics and urban life, and complex global challenges. With an initial geographic focus on challenges countries in the Middle East and Central Asia face, the geographic coverage of Silk Cities reaches out further to other cities, regions and countries that are prone to similar issues and fosters international exchange. 

Visit www.silk-cities.org for details of our projects and activities.

Name: READ Global
Description:
Our Mission
READ facilitates the creation of self-sustaining and community-led library and resource centers that serve as a foundational platform for unlocking a community’s social and economic potential.  

Our Vision
We build cohesive, inclusive, and resilient communities where everyone—especially those most marginalized—access and benefit from knowledge, resources, and opportunities necessary to shape their own dignified and fulfilling futures.

Our Values
*We believe in human potential
*We have faith in community action
*Compassion and respect are at our core
*Inclusivity is at the essence of our approach
*Equity-driven thinking is key

READ's Impact
*Self-sustaining impact- Following an initial investment, most READ Centers are financially self-perpetuating & remain a highly valued, enduring community institution.
*Transformative change- READ Centers contribute to community level transformation by giving communities a sense of agency over their future
*True community-led approach-READ Center construction, establishment and operations are a community-based process that capitalizes on a local community’s assets, inspiration, and potential
*Trusted local institutions -READ is a trusted, neutral, safe space that works on behalf of all community members, allowing it to advance and address local needs
*Human-centered approach-Deliberate outreach to understand the needs and challenges of even the most marginalized community members to ensure services and opportunities are accessible, inclusive and relevant to all.

Name: Greater Bemidji
Description: Greater Bemidji, Inc. is a non-profit, charitable organization serving the greater Bemidji region of north-central Minnesota. Its mission is simple: drive development and promote prosperity in the region.

Name: UN-Habitat Urban Basic Services
Description: The Urban Basic Services Section at UN-Habitat provides essential normative and technical support to cities and governments worldwide. Our mission is to ensure equitable access to vital services, with a particular focus on empowering urban communities in need. Through our work, we strengthen policy frameworks, enhance infrastructure, optimize service delivery, and promote gender inclusivity in decision-making processes. Our dedicated team specializes in water and sanitation, energy, urban mobility, and solid waste management. Through these areas, we drive sustainable development and foster resilient urban environments.

Name: Urbanistica
Description:
Manifest für eine nachhaltige, qualitätssichernde Raumplanung und die Schaffung von genügend bezahlbarem Wohnraum

Mit Aufkommen der individuellen Mobilität Mitte des letzten Jahrhunderts ist Stadtplanung in der Schweiz in Vergessenheit geraten. Das Primat lag bei der Verkehrsplanung und Nutzungsentmischung, welche zu einer Zersiedlung der Schweiz geführt hat. Mit Annahme der Revision des Raumplanungsgesetzes 2013 hat das Schweizer Volk entschieden, dass kein weiteres Bauland eingezont und zukünftiges Bevölkerungswachstum mittels innerer Siedlungsentwicklung aufgenommen werden soll.

Wollen wir den im Raumplanungsgesetz postulierten Auftrag der Verdichtung in nachhaltiger Weise gerecht werden und genügend bezahlbaren Wohnraum schaffen, müssen wir die Disziplin der Stadtplanung wieder entdecken und praktizieren.

Das nachfolgende Manifest soll den dafür notwendigen Diskurs über Stadtplanung und Städtebau in Gang setzen. Urbanistica ist Webseite, Plattform und Bewegung zugleich, die Impulse setzt und den öffentlichen Dialog fördert mit dem Ziel, dass in vielen Kantonen, Gemeinden und Städten der Schweiz wieder qualitativ hochwertige, nachhaltige und bedürfnisgerechte Stadtplanung und guter Städtebau betrieben wird.

Über 1400 Personen haben das Manifest bereits unterschrieben.

Name: ladeplan
Description:
In the field of location planning, we rely on the latest technologies and artificial intelligence. We are convinced by e-mobility and would like to work with you to drive forward the expansion of the charging infrastructure - in a needs- based and area-wide manner. 

Using data on the occupancy rates of charging stations across Europe and a wide range of environmental data, we identify locations for new charging infrastructure with up to 300% higher daily occupancy rates.

We analyze both areas and locations for their potential for public charging infrastructure.

Are you a charging station operator, local authority or consulting company? Then get in touch with us without obligation.

We look forward to hearing from you!

Name: Norsk Bolig- og byplanforening
Description:
Norsk BOBY er en frivillig forening for fagfolk innen bolig- og byplanlegging. Vi skaper møteplasser for kunnskapsdeling, faglig debatt og inspirasjon på tvers av fagfelt og sektorer. Foreningen arrangerer fagmøter, seminarer og Norsk Planmøte – et av Norges viktigste treffpunkt for fagmiljøer som former framtidens steder og samfunn. 

På Norsk Planmøte deles ‘Bolig- og byplanprisen’ ut, med formål å heve samfunnets interesse og respekt for god bolig- og byplanlegging, styrke fagmiljøenes fokus på kvalitet i planprosesser, planprodukter og utbyggingsprosjekter og styrke kjennskapen til Norsk Bolig- og Byplanforening og dens aktiviteter.
Location: Lokallag i Oslo, Bergen, Stavanger, Trondheim, Bodø, Agder med flere.

Name: CYSU - Commonwealth Youth for Sustainable Urbanisation
Description: Led by young professionals from across the Commonwealth countries, CYSU aims to Empower Youth and Young Professionals to support, collaborate and contribute to, and advocate for sustainable urbanisation. We want to look at ways in which cities and human settlements can better reflect the needs of young people and of diverse communities. CYSU believes in communities empowered to design their homes and cities.

Name: Journey
Description: Journey works with you to develop best-in-class mobility strategies, bringing together deep experience in travel demand management, transit planning, and curbside management.

Name: Montana Festival
Description: Montana's annual gathering of entrepreneurs, creators, & community builders connecting, sharing big ideas, & shaping our shared future.

Name: Visión Territorial
Description:
Somos Visión Territorial, una empresa que se enfoca en planificar y desarrollar estratégicamente proyectos con triple impacto. 

Nuestro propósito es generar un impacto positivo en la sociedad, respetando el ambiente y la identidad de las comunidades. A través de una mirada holística, buscamos impulsar la producción y el desarrollo local de pequeñas, medianas y grandes localidades.

Somos un equipo conformado por profesionales, unidos por valores y trayectoria compartida, que trabajamos con eficacia y vocación. Nuestra misión consiste en realizar proyectos que a través de la economía circular mejoren la calidad de vida de los ciudadanos.

Nos basamos en un enfoque multidisciplinario, porque creemos que el trabajo en equipo y la articulación de distintos actores es un gran motor para lograr mejores resultados. Estamos comprometidos con nuestros clientes a brindarles soluciones innovadoras y de calidad bajo los principios de respeto, honestidad y confidencialidad.

Name: SOCREAM - GROUPE BARDEC
Description: Crée en 2020, SOCREAM est une société nouvelle, avec un directeur et des collaborateurs possédant plus de 15 ans d’expériences dans l’aménagement Urbain. Aujourd’hui, SOCREAM est spécialisée dans l’aménagement Urbain pour particulier ou/et professionnel, elle compte plus de 20 collaborateurs et rayonne dans la région Centre Val de Loire et ses régions limitrophes.

Name: USF Urban and Regional Planning
Description: https://www.usf.edu/arts-sciences/departments/public-affairs/murp/

Name: Northern Roots Urban Farm & Eco-Park
Description: Northern Roots is creating the UK's largest urban farm and eco-park on 160-acres of greenspace in Oldham, Greater Manchester: a unique community hub and visitor destination.

Name: Cyklokoalícia
Description: Cyklokoalícia is an NGO which promotes cycling as equal form of transportation in the city. It suggest and design cycling infrastructure in cooperation with municipalities, real estate developers and private companies.

Name: LineaMenta
Description:
LineaMenta, BE en urbanisme, est spécialisé dans le développement économique et commercial des territoires.

En travaillant sur la question du développement économique et commercial des territoires,  nous cherchons à  concilier croissance économique, qualité de vie et durabilité pour créer les villes de demain, qui répondent aux attentes des habitants, actuels comme futurs.

Notre ADN repose notre volonté de formaliser une réponse qui engage l’avenir d’un territoire ou d’une entreprise tout en s’adaptant à la problématique rencontrée et en proposant des solutions viables, durables et acceptées de tous.

Nos domaines d’expertise

Accompagner les acteurs publics : 
Nous conseillons les collectivités territoriales, l’Etat, les SEM, les EPF et tout autres organismes publics dans leur stratégie  d’accueil et de pérennisation des entreprises sur leurs territoires. 

Nos missions incluent, notamment :
- La redynamisation des centres-bourgs et centres-villes,
- L’élaboration de stratégies économiques et commerciales,
- La création et la requalification de zones d’activités économiques (ZAE),
- L’analyse de l’impact des projets urbains sur le tissu économique,
- L’urbanisme réglementaire et commercial.

Conseiller les acteurs privés : 
Nous accompagnons également les promoteurs, entreprises, commerces et enseignes de grande distribution dans leur implantation et leur développement territorial. Nos expertises couvrent :
- L’urbanisme commercial (AEC, études d’impact, certificats de conformité),
- Les études de marché et d’implantation,
- L’état général du marché et sa déclinaison locale dans le cadre des franchises (DIP),
- L’évaluation du potentiel commercial,
- La programmation économique et commercial d’actifs commerciaux.

Notre mission ?
Créer du lien entre acteurs publics et privés pour dynamiser l’économie locale et favoriser un développement durable de l’emploi.

Name: Cairo Urban Studio
Description: "We strive to revive the significance of tangible and intangible heritage by promoting public identity and its core values, with a focus on raising awareness about urbanization issues that impact humanity. Through the design and implementation of integrated initiatives, we aim to rehabilitate urban and historical areas and reinforce the role of individuals as central to heritage preservation. We believe in the importance of strengthening the memory of place to enhance collective awareness, bridging the past and present, while laying a sustainable foundation for a future that honors the authenticity and humanistic values of heritage."

Name: MRC de Beauharnois-Salaberry
Description:
D’une population totalisant 72 000 personnes et formé de sept municipalités, le territoire de la MRC est situé à quelques dizaines de kilomètres au sud-ouest de Montréal et compte deux pôles urbains majeurs d'activités commerciales et industrielles que sont les villes de Beauharnois et de Salaberry-de-Valleyfield.

L’agriculture représente également une importante activité économique, alors que 79 % du territoire sont situés dans la zone agricole permanente couvrant principalement les cinq municipalités rurales que sont Saint-Stanislas-de-Kostka, Saint-Louis-de-Gonzague, Saint-Étienne-de-Beauharnois, Saint-Urbain-Premier et Sainte-Martine.

La MRC de Beauharnois-Salaberry a pour mission d’assurer l’administration de services régionaux à caractère supra-local. En plus des compétences qui lui ont été attribuées à l’origine, ses responsabilités se sont étendues au fil des ans à de multiples champs d’intervention.

Ainsi, la MRC intervient aujourd’hui dans des sphères aussi variées que l’aménagement et le développement du territoire, la gestion des matières résiduelles, la sécurité publique, civile et incendie, le développement rural, social et culturel, le développement du réseau cyclable régional et l’exploitation d’un parc régional, la gestion des cours d’eau et l’évaluation foncière, pour ne nommer que ces champs d’activité.

Name: Yindjibarndi Nation
Description:
The Yindjibarndi community is pursuing self-determination through a strategy that is centred on our unique ‘3C’ approach—community, culture and commerce. 
Our group structure is aimed at delivering benefits to all Yindjibarndi people. Some of this has been in place for some time, like our contracting business Yurra, the Yindjibarndi trust both formed in 2013, but other parts are in the early stage, such as our renewable energy business and our plans for eco-tourism in Millstream.
We’re now in talks with other commercial and government partners to deliver on ambitious projects that address the housing, employment and health needs of our community.
So check out our website if you have an interest in anything Yindjibarndi, or if you might want to partner with us.

Name: Eddington - North West Cambridge Development
Description:
Eddington is the University of Cambridge’s flagship development; a vibrant, sustainable neighbourhood created in partnership with leading architects, consultants and developers. 

As the centrepiece of the North West Cambridge Development, Eddington is expanding as a mixed-use urban extension, delivering homes, facilities, and infrastructure that meet Cambridge’s long-term needs while supporting the local community and the University’s world-leading institution in academia and research. Since first breaking ground in 2013, it has grown into a dynamic and award-winning community, home to University staff, working professionals, young families, and the wider city.

Name: NRW.URBAN Service GmbH
Description: NRW.URBAN ist ein erfahrener und zuverlässiger Partner in der Stadtentwicklung. Als hundertprozentiges Beteiligungsunternehmen des Landes Nordrhein-Westfalen setzt NRW.URBAN Arbeitsschwerpunkte in der Flächenentwicklung für Wohnen, Industrie und Gewerbe sowie für komplexe städtebauliche Vorhaben.

Name: Invest STL
Description:
Invest STL facilitates investment in the power of people and their neighborhoods to develop communities of justice and opportunity in places that continue to endure the legacy of systemic anti-Black racism.

We envision a St. Louis where every neighborhood is a chosen place to live, raise children and grow old.

We are committed to helping people recognize and step into their power, to build and co-create strong visions, sounds investments, worthy places, and durable infrastructure within the St. Louis region. 

Powerful people - People have the confidence, capacity, authority and resources to envision and create a place that is physically, economically and emotionally worthy of being called home.

Sound investments - Property investment is possible and advisable in predominantly Black neighborhoods.

Worthy places - Individuals, children, and their parents feel their neighborhoods can be forever homes, worthy of their lifetime, where a well-valued life is possible and where they are offered the freedom to be great or to simply be.

Durable infrastructure - Systems organizations, and individuals can sustainably act in alignment with the belief that every person deserves this kind of neighborhood and that anything less is unacceptable.

Name: Ipplan Fortaleza | Instituto de Pesquisa e Planejamento de Fortaleza
Description: O Instituto de Pesquisa e Planejamento de Fortaleza (Ipplan Fortaleza) é uma autarquia vinculada ao Gabinete do Prefeito. Realizamos e difundimos pesquisas e estudos orientados por dados sobre a capital cearense e a Região Metropolitana, gerando conhecimento; integramos, monitoramos e avaliamos políticas públicas; e desenvolvemos planos e projetos inovadores para o desenvolvimento urbano sustentável e para a redução de desigualdades.

Name: Highland Planning LLC
Description: Founded in 2007, Highland Planning is a planning + design studio known for our commitment to community, innovation, and quality. A certified women-owned business with offices and staff in Buffalo, Rochester, and Albany, NY, we are driven by a passion for social good to implement creative public engagement, planning, and design strategies through collaborative partnerships across the northeastern United States. We strive to listen to, design with, and transform local communities through our work, helping governments and public sector agencies make better, more informed decisions that improve the quality of life for all. Our tagline, "Listen. Design. Transform." encapsulates our approach to our work and the impact we aim to create.

Name: Pientere Tuinen
Description:
De weersextremen nemen toe. Hevige lokale regenbuien veroorzaken grote wateroverlast en er zijn ook vaker lange hete en droge periodes. De gevolgen daarvan zijn goed merkbaar in steden: verdroging, hittestress, overstromingen en aantasting van de biodiversiteit. De klimaatverandering stelt ons voor grote opgaven. De Pientere Tuinen levert een positieve en concrete bijdrage aan een groene en gezonde leefomgeving.

De Pientere Tuinen verbindt verschillende doelstellingen. Door de inzet van slimme technologie verzamelen we data die het mogelijk maakt om gerichte tuintips en voorlichting op maat te geven voor een groene tuin. Data die ook gebruikt wordt voor 2 langdurige onderzoeksprogramma's naar milieu- en gedragseffecten om het bewustzijn om te vergroenen bij inwoners te vergroten. Met een persoonlijke “Jouw Pientere Tuin” monitor krijgt elke deelnemer inzicht in de data, adviezen en onderzoeksresultaten. Met de Pientere Tuinen gaan we in participatie meten, onderzoeken én adviseren, zodat we samen een positieve bijdrage leveren aan onze toekomstige, gezonde leefomgeving.

Name: Perspectives on Sustainable Development Podcast
Description: It is vital to create spaces to hear from the community, and when possible, facilitate discussions between community leaders and industry. Climate change and environmental justice are pushing regulatory reforms as impacts across the country continue to disproportionately affect those in overburdened areas. But logistical constraints such as supply chain and permitting threaten to delay environmental and economic potential benefits from project development. This podcast will pull together thought leaders from the legal, industrial, academic, government, and community perspectives to dig into these issues and challenge each other on best paths forward.

Name: Women in Urbanism Aotearoa (WiUA)
Description: Kia ora! We're Women in Urbanism Aotearoa. Our mission is to transform our towns and cities into more beautiful, inspiring and inclusive places for everyone. We do this by amplifying the voices and actions of all self-identifying wāhine, girls and non-binary people.

Name: UrbanDesignTalks
Description:
UrbanDesignTalks is an annual global summit that discusses issues and topics related to Urban Design like: building livable cities, creating healthy built environments and complete communities as well as working on bridging the gap between Urban designer, planners, policy makers and residents.

The main aim is to connect and work with like-minded people who are willing to take serious steps towards building a better future for our cities.

Name: Restart
Description: Restart is an urban agency that analyses city challenges and provides sustainable solutions for the recovery and development of Ukrainian cities. We are a dedicated team of experts with diverse backgrounds — from urban planning and spatial research to economics, participatory practices, and community engagement.

Name: APA Inland Empire Section
Description: The American Planning Association (APA) is a non-profit professional research organization committed to urban, suburban, regional, and rural planning. APA is the result of a merger between the American Institute of Planners (AIP), founded in 1917 and the American Society of Planning Officials (APSO), established in 1934. The organization has 46 chapters  which generally correspond to state boundaries and is further subdivided into regional sections. This section is one of eight in California and covers Riverside and San Bernardino Counties. San Bernardino is the largest county in California and Riverside is one of the fastest growing counties in the state. The Inland Empire Section (IES) of the American Planning Association has over 500 members, representing the public, private, and academic sectors.

Name: Yerevan Urban Development PIU
Description:
Yerevan Urban Development PIU (CNCO) is the special project management agency of the Yerevan Municipality for its large-scale and impactful infrastructure and urban development projects since its establishment in 2009.
The PIU project portfolio includes roads, highways, bridges, public transport infrastructure and mobility solutions. It also encompasses energy efficiency, seismic safety and residential renovation projects, as well as social public infrastructure, such as kindergartens, healthcare facilities, sports complexes, solid waste infrastructure, rehabilitation of public spaces and parks.
The development and implementation of land acquisition and resettlement plans is one of the company’s major professional services available to public partners and the private sector to support the implementation of urban development projects.
Currently the PIU is expanding its scope of operations to include initiatives aimed at institutional and digital transformation of Yerevan Municipality and the establishment of accountable, transparent and participatory local governance practices.
One of the critical adjunct missions of the PIU is to provide professional management and advisory services to the Yerevan Municipality for the preparation, appraisal and negotiation of transformative investment projects. Here the agency serves as the Mayor’s envoy for the dialogue with the Government, state agencies, international financial institutions, development partners and the private sector.

Name: ECTP-CEU – European Council of Spatial Planners
Description:
The European Council of Spatial Planners – Conseil Européen des Urbanistes (ECTP-CEU) was established in 1985 to define the role of a ‘professional planner’ and provide its members with a common framework to increase the visibility of planners and recognise their important societal role.  Built into the international declaration of 1985 was the acknowledgement that different states have different approaches to planning – all equally significant. 

It is an umbrella organisation, open to all the associations of planning in the 46 countries of the Council of Europe, as well as to other stakeholders who have a role in promoting best practice in spatial planning. It rewards examples of good planning all over Europe, and regularly publishes information and manifestos around current issues. The ECTP-CEU encourages the participation of young planners, and annually holds a workshop to which all young planners from across Europe are invited to present their work (see related LinkedIn page: ECTP-CEU Young Planners Network).

Through the promotion of high-quality education, continuing professional development and a commitment to ethics and professional responsibilities, the ECTP-CEU aims to achieve mutual recognition for planners across Europe. It engages in dialogue with local, national, and European governments, as well as with research institutes, universities, and partners with related interests in the many facets of planning in the built and natural environment. 

ECTP-CEU welcomes new members with whom it can work to increase the profile of spatial planning. 

We also have a page for Young Planners. If you are interested please check out https://www.linkedin.com/groups/12670831/
For contact please email: secretariat@ectp-ceu.eu

Name: Videntes
Description: Vi erbjuder professionell projektledning för samhällsbygget. Hos oss får du hjälp med helheten inom projektledning — från uppstart till avslut. Vi skapar värde i varje steg av projektets livscykel, anpassade efter din verklighet.

Name: Regio Deal Zuid-Limburg
Description: Tien Zuid-Limburgse gemeenten sloten met het Rijk een Regio Deal (4e tranche). Daarmee is 40 miljoen euro vrijgekomen om onze Zuid-Limburgse regio te versterken. Om de kansen die er liggen in te koppen en gelijke kansen voor elke Zuid-Limburger te creëren. Zuid-Limburg wordt mede dankzij de Regio Deal een krachtige regio in het hart van Europa. Een regio om mee rekening te houden en waar lokaal, regionaal en internationaal wordt samengewerkt. Voor ons zijn er geen grenzen. Met nee nemen we geen genoegen. En achterblijven is geen optie. We zetten Zuid-Limburg op de kaart. Samen en succesvol. We doen dat door te werken aan gezonde gemeenschappen en een circulaire economie, waarbij de nadruk ligt op groene energie en werken met gerecyclede grondstoffen. We geven bovendien ons unieke landschap een impuls door meer en betere verbindingen tussen natuurgebieden te maken. En door voor problemen als hittestress, wateroverlast en -vervuiling oplossingen te bedenken. En we investeren in een goed werkende euregionale en internationale arbeidsmarkt, waarbij we talent in de regio behouden en aantrekken. Er is kortom werk aan de winkel. Met de Regio Deal als vliegwiel voor de ontwikkeling van de regio en een vergaande samenwerking. En dus met een waardevolle toekomst in het vizier.

Name: Taufiqurrahman for Urban Resiliency and Sustainability Research Centre
Description:
Taufiqurrahman for Urban Resiliency and Sustainability Research Centre.
Sharing and broadening knowledge on urban planning and development.

Name: FabricPlus
Description:
Fabric+ is the economic development and design unit within AT Arkitektur. Our developers work with our clients and partners to improve communities, cities and regions through analysis, design and collaboration - on the back of evidence of what works. 

We know that the best developments happen based on a place's inherent (and often unidentified) strengths and resources. We believe developments should seek to improve the quality of life and wellbeing of locals, and be economically and environmentally sustainable over time. We want to help you identify and manage the actions that make your place "tick."

We regularly team up with AT Arkitektur's excellent planners and architects to provide a holistic and practically-oriented service for the customer, from the early stages of planning until completion and evaluation.

Name: bringcommunitypositivity
Description: a community of people for the community

Name: Favelar Social Urban Lab
Description: Favelar Social Urban Lab é um laboratório dedicado à transformação dos espaços urbanos por meio da inovação social, pesquisa e construção coletiva, com foco na reimaginação radical dos territórios favelados e periféricos. Nosso interesse consiste em investigar e propor reformulações profundas na forma tradicional de pensar e agir sobre o espaço urbano, baseadas em evidência, buscando romper com estruturas preexistentes e imaginando novos futuros que fortalecem a equidade, a cidadania ativa e a agência, respeitando a cultura e a memória das favelas e periferias.

Name: EDC Engineering Design Center AB
Description:
Welcome to EDC!

EDC is a partner for companies with need for engineering capacity. 
We are a committed partner with focus on delivering a real value to our customers. 
As a customer of EDC, you can expect us to deliver the expertise that the situation requires and that the result will also be cost-effective.

We believe communication is a key success factor in all aspects, why every employee is carefully selected with this in mind.

Contact us at:  www.engineeringdc.com

Name: Scandinavian Infra AB
Description: We offer customers a wide range of consulting services in infrastructure and contributes with high competence, as well as maximizing our customers’ business goals. Consulting services are offered in the areas of project planning, project management, design management, calculation, environment, sustainability management, geology, tender management, construction management, quality and utility coordination. We work in both long and shorter contracts with customers and partners. The company has 55 employees and offices in Stockholm, Gothenburg and Norway.

Name: Sustainable Cities
Description: Sustainable Cities aims to bring together a wide range of actors around a collective reflection on the creation and sustainable development of the world's cities and Africa in particular.

Name: Aken Ecosystèmes
Description:
Nous sommes créateurs et animateurs d'écosystèmes : des lieux d'effervescence pensés pour offrir une expérience étudiante augmentée et animer les quartiers de nouvelles vibrations. Des espaces agiles où se réunissent et s’enrichissent mutuellement étudiants, professionnels, associations et citoyens. Des pépinières de compétences conjuguées avec les spécificités et les atouts de leur territoire.

Société à mission depuis janvier 2024, Aken Ecosystèmes s'engage dans la promotion de l'hybridation des savoirs, des espaces et des territoires.

Name: Detaljplan AB
Description:
Detaljplan AB
Vi på Detaljplan AB tar dig från planbesked till lagakraftvunnen detaljplan snabbare och med större värde. 

Vår expertis minimerar risker och kortar processen, oavsett om det gäller tidiga bedömningar eller överklaganden. 

Hör av dig för ett förutsättningslöst möte – vi skyddar dina intressen och maximerar din investering.

Kontakta oss:

073 - 444 81 65 | info@detaljplan.se

Name: Indiana Office of Community and Rural Affairs
Description: The Indiana Office of Community and Rural Affairs works with local, state and national partners to provide resources and technical assistance to aid communities in shaping and achieving their vision for community and economic development.

Name: HDC | Hayy Development Company
Description:
مطوّر عقاري رائد في تطوير وتفعيل الأحياء التاريخية وصناعة وجهات وتجارب سياحية أصيلة
A leading real estate developer in creating authentic experiences

Name: Digitalkatiyarharpal.in
Description:
In today's digitally connected world, businesses face the challenge of reaching and engaging with their target audience in an increasingly competitive landscape. Digital marketing has emerged as the cornerstone of modern marketing strategies, enabling organizations to leverage the power of digital channels to promote their products, services, and brand. This profile delves into the dynamic and ever-evolving field of digital marketing, highlighting its key aspects, strategies, and the immense value it brings to businesses in the digital era.
Digital marketing encompasses various interconnected components that work synergistically to achieve marketing goals. This section explores the key components of digital marketing, including search engine optimization (SEO), content marketing, social media marketing, email marketing, and pay-per-click (PPC) advertising. It delves into the strategies, techniques, and tools employed in each component and highlights their role in driving brand awareness, customer acquisition, and lead generation.
Social media platforms have revolutionized the way businesses connect with their audience. This section focuses on the significance of social media marketing and its role in digital marketing campaigns. It explores popular social media platforms such as Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube, highlighting their unique features and target demographics. The section delves into strategies for community building, influencer marketing, social media advertising, and social listening, emphasizing the importance of consistent engagement and active interaction with followers.
In the digital age, mastering the art of digital marketing is crucial for businesses striving to succeed in the online arena.

Name: Merwede LAB
Description:
Merwede wordt een echte Utrechtse stadswijk, met gezonde ambities. Een unieke plek voor iedereen, met ruimte voor duurzaamheid, innovatie en creativiteit. In het autovrije Merwede komt ook verrassend veel groen. Een plek waar we fijn kunnen samenleven en met alle stadse voorzieningen binnen handbereik.

Om de ambitieuze en duurzame doelstellingen waar mogelijk te verbeteren zijn de projectontwikkelaars en de gemeente Utrecht een gezamenlijk initiatief gestart: Merwede LAB. Het LAB vindt toepasbare innovaties voor de ontwikkeling van Merwede, gericht op vier belangrijke thema’s: duurzame energie, circulair bouwen, social design en gezond stedelijk leven.

Name: Borås Näringsliv
Description:
Borås Näringsliv är en förening för alla företag i Borås som vill vara med att påverka. Vår huvuduppgift är att initiera, stödja, vara delaktiga och driva utvecklande projekt som gynnar Borås näringsliv och en positiv tillväxt i staden.

Föreningen är också delägare i Borås & Co. , ett tillsammans med Borås Stad gemensamt ägt bolag som verkar för stadens utveckling av turism, möten och event, med mera.

Borås Näringsliv, Borås Stad och Högskolan i Borås arbetar i ett dedikerat partnerskap för att tillsammans utveckla Borås.

Name: Hanau Marketing GmbH
Description:
Hanau hat kein klassisches Stadtmarketing. Hanau hat die Hanau Marketing GmbH und ihre Verbündeten: Faire Vermieter, leidenschaftliche Unternehmerinnen und Einzelhändler, engagierte Branchenverbände und kreative Freelancer. Gemeinsam sind wir erfinderische Regelbrecher, Neudenkerinnen und Pioniere. Wir fühlen uns als Komplizen, die uns, unsere Stadt und die Welt verbessern wollen. Themen wie Stadtplanung, Stadtentwicklung und Citymanagement liegen uns am Herzen.

Wir arbeiten mit Leidenschaft daran, Hanau als attraktive Einkaufs- und Erlebnisstadt zu positionieren und unter der Dachmarke Hanau aufLADEN neue Konzepte für die Innenstadt von morgen zu entwickeln. Zusammen mit dem Veranstaltungsbüro der Stadt Hanau organisieren wir Events und Märkte. Darüber hinaus verstehen wir uns, gemeinsam mit dem Einzelhandelsverband und der Stadt Hanau, als Motor der Innenstadtentwicklung. Wir kümmern uns um Anliegen aus Handel und Gastronomie und veranstalten Kampagnen sowie Aktionen zur Belebung der City. Die HMG unterstützt zudem die Brüder Grimm Festspiele und das Mitmachmuseum „GrimmsMärchenReich“.

Wir sind offen für neue Ideen und suchen Komplizen, die mit Leidenschaft und guten Konzepten Hanau mitentwickeln wollen. Mehr dazu auf www.hanauaufladen.jetzt 

Einige unserer Projekte werden aus dem Förderprogramm Zukunft Innenstadt des Hessischen Ministeriums für Wirtschaft, Energie, Verkehr und Wohnen gefördert.


Impressum: https://www.hanau.de/impressum/index.html/
Datenschutz: https://www.hanau.de/datenschutz/index.html

Name: Internationale Bauausstellung (IBA) Metropolregion München
Description: Internationale Bauausstellung in der Metropolregion München zum Thema "Räume der Mobilität"

Name: American Planning Association - Texas Chapter
Description: American Planning Association - Texas Chapter

Name: Interreg Euro-MED Green Living Areas
Description:
The Green Living Areas Mission aims to improve the lives of Mediterranean citizens by promoting the development of green living areas.

As part of the Interreg Euro-Med Programme, the Mission undertakes projects that bring local communities to life with green development at their epicentre, reducing negative climate impacts on the region’s ecosystems, and enhancing climate resilience

The Mission is jointly managed by two key projects working on two different aspects:  

•	The Thematic Community project (C4LA) aims to build a community among thematic projects and facilitate resource transfers to stakeholders, focusing on technical and strategic content. 
•	The Institutional Dialogue project (D4LA) aims to amplify the transfer of policies by fostering dialogue among policymakers and their stakeholders, focusing on continuous policy improvement and transformation.

The partnership consists of:

C4LA partners:
Scientific Research Centre Bistra Ptuj - ZRS BISTRA PTUJ (SL)- LEAD PARTNER
Euro-Mediterranean Economists Association - EMEA (ES)
MedCities Association - MedCities (ES)
ENVIRONMENT PARK – Science and Technology Park for
environment - Envipark (IT)
North-West Croatia Regional Energy Agency - REGEA (HR)
National Association of the Municipalities in the Republic of Bulgaria - NAMRB (BG)
Regional Center for Development and Cooperation - RCDC (AL)
Region of Western Greece (GR)

D4LA partners:
LEAD PARTNER: Metropolis Nice Côte d’Azur (FR)
Institut de Recerca en Energia de Catalunya (IREC) (ES)
University of Patras (GR)
Polis Network (BE)
West Croatia Regional Energy Agency (REGEA)  (HR)
Infrastrutture Recupero Edilizio Energia (IRE) (IT)
Larnaca District Development Agency (ANETEL)  (CY)
Lisboa E - nova Agency (LEN) (PT)
Energy Efficiency Agency of Albania (EEA) (AL).

Name: Urban Planning is Not Boring
Description:
Welcome to "Urban Planning is Not Boring," a podcast co-hosted by two USC Price Master of Urban Planning alums, Samantha Ellman and Natalie Ikhrata. In this podcast, Samantha and Natalie explore the exciting and dynamic world of urban planning and its impact on our cities, communities, and daily lives.

Samantha and Natalie bring a unique perspective to the podcast, drawing on their academic and practical experiences in the field of urban planning. Through engaging conversations with experts in the field, they explore topics such as transportation, housing, sustainability, community engagement, and more.

The podcast aims to break down complex urban planning concepts and present them in an accessible and engaging way for listeners of all backgrounds. Whether you are a seasoned urban planner or simply interested in learning more about how cities are designed and built, "Urban Planning is Not Boring" is the perfect podcast for you.

Join Samantha and Natalie as they explore the fascinating world of urban planning and discover how it is shaping our cities and communities for the better.

Name: Tampa Bay Regional Planning Council
Description: The tougher challenges of the 21st century require regional thinkers, conveners and problem solvers. Since 1962, the Tampa Bay Regional Planning Council has brought together local governments and gubernatorial appointees to coordinate planning for the Region’s future. TBRPC provides a venue for analyzing issues, resolving problems, and sharing solutions among the jurisdictions in Citrus, Hernando, Hillsborough, Manatee, Pasco and Pinellas Counties.

Name: Empowering Women, Public Space & Climate Change
Description: Empowering Women, Public Space and Climate Change aims to create further awareness, research and projects on female led initiatives by sharing resources. Gathering experts and those working on the fields in a variety of sectors with a focus on empowering women from around the world, by sharing, exchanging and collaborating.

Name: European Green Cities
Description:
EGC is a non-profit organisation focused on promoting sustainable urban development and the transition towards environmentally friendly cities. Founded with the vision of creating liveable, green, and resource-efficient urban spaces, the organisation offers innovative solutions to enhance the quality of life while minimising the ecological footprint. 

EGC specializes in providing comprehensive consultancy services to municipalities, urban planners, and decision-makers. EGC actively engages in research and development projects, primarily through EU-funded projects.

EGC also manages a network of cities to ensure collaboration and share knowledge across borders.

Name: Projet Praille Acacias Vernets
Description:
Nous sommes l'un des plus grands projets de renouvellement urbain en Europe, régénérant une vaste partie de la ville-centre de Genève à l’histoire industrielle. Neuf quartiers mixtes et vivants verront le jour, répondant aux enjeux de la transition écologique.

Nous plaçons l’humain au centre de cette régénération.

12 000 logements • 6 000 emplois • 9 quartiers • 1 grand parc • 2 rivières

Name: WAADE
Description:
För framgångsrika projekt. Tillsammans. 

Vi leder byggprojekt där samarbete uppstår i möten mellan människor. Genom dialog kan vi utvecklas tillsammans och involvering engagerar alla i projektet.

Vi på WAADE tror att det bästa teamet skapas genom att jobba med en involverande process i alla led. 

WAADE vill bidra till att utveckla och effektivisera beslutsleden i byggbranschen genom att samla alla deltagarna i ett projekt samtidigt, en mötesmetodik som kallas ICE (Integrated Concurrent Engineering eller på svenska samtida ingenjörsarbete).

Grunderna för WAADE:s processer är hämtade från Stanford University. Alla på företaget är idag utbildade inom området VDC.

Name: Reggiane Parco Innovazione
Al Buhaira Invest
Description:
Al Buhaira Invest : aménageur et concepteur de la nouvelle vitrine de Tunis ville.
Albuhaira Invest s'affirme en tant que développeur d'une importante extension de l'hypercentre de Tunis ville.

Difficile de le croire mais avant de devenir une belle cité lacustre, « Les Berges du Lac », étaient un site marécageux qui séparait le centre de Tunis de son Lac Nord. Aujourd’hui, « Les Berges du Lac », sont la continuité administrative, résidentielle, commerciale, d’animation et de loisirs, du centre-ville.

Les berges du lac présentent une grande diversité urbaine, abritant différents types de vocations : quartiers résidentiels, sièges de grandes entreprises et multinationales, banques et institutions financières, organisations nationales, chancelleries et représentations diplomatiques.

C’est une cité lovée contre les plans d’eau, une parfaite illustration des prouesses architecturales et technologiques des urbanistes tunisiens et des choix d’Albuhaira Invest en tant que maître d’ouvrage.

Name: Advancing PNG: Women Leaders Network Inc.
Description:
An active network of self-motivated women promoting women's leadership, economic opportunities, access to legal support and improved security in local communities across the country.
Established in 2014, APNGWLNInc. provides access to resources and connect women leaders and their organizations to collectively and progressively influence positive change in their local communities.

Name: Canopy Team
Description:
At Canopy Team, we create transformational places that build community.

We are a women-led, multi-disciplinary practice that serves as an expansion of your team for all aspects of the built environment, from large scale capital projects and developments to creative sponsorship and seating concepts, graphics, colors, and artwork. Utilizing great urban design and visionary planning, we partner with a variety of clients (including sports teams, education and training programs, and cultural and civic institutions) to build places that transcend their primary purpose into community gathering points and civic treasures.

Our team of planning, design, and development experts is led by renowned visionary and urban planner, Janet Marie Smith, who pioneered the renaissance of urban sports across the US, and her partner Fran Weld, whose work at the intersection of real estate, public policy, and sports has earned national recognition. Rooted in their unique approaches to individual teams and cities, and legendary commitment to details, we deliver iconic spaces of passion and pride.

We are visionary executive leaders, cross functional project managers, detail-oriented design directors, and super organized construction captains. We are Canopy Team.

Name: Rede Brasileira de Urbanismo Social
Description:
A Rede de Urbanismo Social surge da articulação de um grupo de especialistas em Urbanismo Social de diversas regiões do país, composta por lideranças populares, gestores públicos e trabalhadores de órgãos do terceiro setor, consultorias, negócios sociais, dentre outros, que subscrevem esse projeto.
Este grupo tem em comum o reconhecimento da necessidade de, a partir da atuação comprometida com agendas urbanas, atingir a redução das desigualdades a partir dos princípios do Urbanismo Social.

Name: PACT Participation Active des Citoyennes et citoyens Tunisiens
Description:
Le projet PACT, qui s’étale sur une période de 9 ans à partir de 2020, s’inscrit dans la stratégie globale de la Direction du Développement et de la Coopération Suisse (DDC) pour la Tunisie 2017-2020 (domaine
d'intervention 1) et 2021-2024 (effet 1.2 et 2.1), qui vise à contribuer à la transition démocratique tunisienne par une responsabilisation accrue, la participation citoyenne et le renforcement des droits humains au niveau des communautés locales. La phase II (2023-2027), est mise en œuvre par un consortium, composé de NIRAS International Consulting comme chef de file et la Fondation Hirondelle, associés avec CILG-VNG, sous la tutelle de l’Instance Générale de la Prospective et d’Appui au Processus de Décentralisation (Ministère de l’Intérieur) en étroite collaboration avec les structures de l’états, médias locaux, organisations de la société civile, citoyens, jeunes et femmes dans six gouvernorats (Kef, Siliana, Sidi Bouzid, Kasserine, Gafsa et Kairouan).

Name: SAU-MSI.brussels
Description:
The Urban Development Corporation of the Brussels-Capital Region (sau-msi.brussels) is a key public tool for urban development in Brussels.

It is responsible for carrying out major urban development projects and constructing public facilities of regional significance to meet the needs and aspirations of Brussels’ population.

The SAU steers each project according to its specific characteristics, in order to bring it to completion for the benefit of the region’s inhabitants, businesses and visitors.

It carries out its role as project coordinator by orchestrating the actions of different public or private partners and by carrying out complex projects of its own.

Acting as a reliable and solid partner to all the public- and/or private-sector stakeholders involved, the SAU supports them effectively throughout the various processes until their completion.

Unlike the individual sectoral partners, the SAU assumes ultimate responsibility for implementing an overall vision in these multi-stakeholder projects.

Its work involves a huge array of districts, sites, buildings, functions, stakeholders, target groups and methods. In response, it has developed a multi-stakeholder partnership approach based on values such as expertise, listening, understanding, flexibility, transparency, integrity and the search for excellence for optimal achievement of ambitious collective goals.

Name: Mantashyants Entrepreneurs Union
Description:
«Մանթաշյանց»  գործարարների միությունը միավորում է Հայաստանում և դրա սահմաններից դուրս գործունեություն ծավալող հայ գործարարներին ՝

    Գործարար միջավայրի զարգացման և առաջխաղացման, 
    Գործարար էթիկայի ամրապնդման, 
    Տեղական, միջազգային և պետական ներդրումների ներգրավման, 
    Օրենսդրական դաշտի բարելավման նպատակով:

Name: Challenger Cities
Description:
At Challenger Cities, we believe cities have the power to break free from the status quo and rewrite their own stories. 

Inspired by the boldness of challenger brands, we explore how urban areas can defy convention, embrace their unique strengths, and take on audacious goals to solve local problems and gain global recognition.

Our platform champions cities that refuse to settle for mediocrity, instead imagining the biggest possible future for themselves. From rethinking transit and housing to fostering creativity and bold leadership, we aim to highlight actionable steps and transformative ideas that inspire progress.

Join us as we share insights, spark conversations, and spotlight the innovators, urbanists, and leaders shaping the future of our cities. Together, let’s move beyond the sensible and push boundaries to create cities that thrive in a rapidly changing world.

Name: Stein Ontwikkeling
Description:
Stein, het spiegelwoord van niets en Duits voor steen, brengt ontwikkelaars, overheden en creatieve geesten samen om invulling te geven aan een groter doel: waarde creëren op plekken waar deze eerst nog niet was. Dit doen we door duurzame, waardevolle kansen te zien die anderen niet zien. En deze kansen maximaal te benutten. Wij geloven in het realiseren van echt betekenisvolle projecten. Projecten die van meerwaarde zijn voor mens én omgeving. Als ervaren en flexibel bedrijf met vaste medewerkers en een netwerk van freelancers, zetten we ons daar elke dag 100% voor in. Hoe groot of klein een project ook is. Van ‘niets’ naar Stein!

Wanneer ogenschijnlijk alle vragen gesteld zijn, alle informatie op tafel ligt en alle behoeften geïnventariseerd zijn, vraagt, zoekt en inventariseert Stein vérder. We stellen de vraag achter de vraag. Vergaren nog meer essentiële informatie. En ontdekken de onuitgesproken behoeften. Dit doen we door alle mogelijke invalshoeken en facetten van ieder project grondig te bekijken en verkennen. Want juist op de plekken waar je ze niet verwacht, vind je nieuwe, relevante inzichten, waardevolle ideeën en onderliggende behoeften. We noemen dat de zoektocht naar de maximale potentie van een project.

Betrokkenheid en vindingrijkheid zijn zinloos zonder een flinke dosis energie en daadkracht. We houden daarom van aanpakken én weten hoe dit moet. Neem bijvoorbeeld onze grondige kennis van de financiële wereld, onze ervaring in de vastgoedbranche en ons grote netwerk van doendenkers die net als wij niets liever doen dan de handen uit de mouwen steken. Het zijn onze mensen, methoden en middelen die ons in staat stellen om ideeën, ambities en concepten slagvaardig verder te brengen. Zodat we samen met álle stakeholders mooie successen kunnen vieren.

Name: Fondazione ROMA REgeneration
Description:
Fondazione no-profit nata con ha la mission di supportare Roma nella crescita e nella sostenibilità ambientale, sociale ed economica, con focus sullo sviluppo di un modello urbano che porti la città verso una visione organica di crescita strategica per la città.
La Fondazione è un “think tank lab” aperto a tutti i soggetti che vorranno sostenere la Capitale nelle importanti sfide che la attendono, mettendo a sistema know how, risorse e idee, favorendo il dialogo e la collaborazione con le Amministrazioni territoriali e nazionali e contribuendo a costruire una visione attuale per “la città del futuro”.
Nata per iniziativa di Dea Capital RE SGR, Investire SGR e Fabrica Immobiliare SGR che, da sempre presenti sul territorio della città ne condividono valori, cultura e storia, sentono l’esigenza di andare oltre l’ordinario, avviando un progetto che coinvolga tutti i soggetti legati alla città, convogliando e mettendo a disposizione della stessa, competenze, risorse e idee.
Lo Scopo della Fondazione è contribuire a creare una prospettiva nuova per città che abbia al centro un modello organico di sviluppo e crescita ed un’idea progettuale complessiva della Capitale, mettendo a sistema il contributo di tutti.
Sostenere e diffondere i valori dell’inclusione sociale e del contrasto ai cambiamenti climatici, della cultura, dell’arte, dello sport, in linea con gli obiettivi dell’Agenda ONU 2030 per lo sviluppo sostenibile, saranno i driver dell’attività della Fondazione.
Ambire ad una Capitale moderna con una vivibilità sempre crescente, promuovendo la riconnessione tra i territori oggi separati da importanti vuoti urbani, restituendo verde e spazi pubblici alla comunità e riutilizzando il suolo, creando impianti urbani innovativi, digitalizzati e sostenibili, che puntino al contrasto delle divisioni e del divario sociale tra zone limitrofe della città ed al contempo generino un contesto favorevole  agli investimenti e le opportunità di lavoro quale volano di sviluppo.

Name: Cooplink kennisnetwerk wooncoöperaties
Description:
Van, voor en over wooncoöperaties. Dat is Cooplink. We weten het uit eigen ervaring: het is niet eenvoudig om een wooncoöperatie op te richten. Dan is het fijn om op één plek alle kennis bijeen te vinden. Om vragen te kunnen stellen en van andermans ervaringen te kunnen leren. Daar zorgen wij voor, samen met jou. Welkom bij Cooplink.

We zijn er voor jou!
- Cooplink stelt jou voor aan andere initiatieven. Ze kunnen een voorbeeld voor je zijn, en jij voor hen.
- Cooplink biedt je een plek waar je ervaringen uit kunt wisselen. Op het forum en ook tijdens bijeenkomsten.
- Cooplink brengt – hopelijk met jouw hulp – alle kennis bij elkaar in een kennisbank.
- Cooplink houdt jou op de hoogte van trends, ontwikkelingen en het laatste nieuws.
- Cooplink organiseert kennisbijeenkomsten.
- Cooplink biedt scholingspakketten.
- Cooplink behartigt de belangen van wooncoöperaties en is de stem naar de politiek.

Name: MUSA scarl
Description:
MUSA – Multilayered Urban Sustainability Action è un Ecosistema dell’Innovazione Sostenibile, finanziato dal Ministero dell’Università e della Ricerca nell’ambito del Piano Nazionale di Ripresa e Resilienza.

Il progetto vede la collaborazione tra l’Università di Milano-Bicocca, ente proponente, il Politecnico di Milano, l’Università Bocconi, l’Università Statale di Milano e numerosi partner pubblici e privati.

MUSA nasce a Milano come risposta alle sfide che la realtà metropolitana affronta nella transizione verso le tre dimensioni della sostenibilità: ambientale, economica e sociale. E con un’ambizione: quella di inaugurare un nuovo modello di collaborazione pubblico-privata replicabile a livello nazionale e internazionale.

Name: Uncommon Bridges
Description: Uncommon Bridges builds more vibrant, just, and thriving communities by braiding inclusive process, consensus leadership, impactful organizations, and meaningful places into everything we do. Established in 2009 as BDS Planning & Urban Design, the firm specializes in strategic planning, cultural placemaking, assessment districts, public decisions, and equitable engagement toward collective action.

Name: Pratec Urbanismo
Description: A Pratec é uma empresa especializada na comercialização de imóveis, na elaboração de projetos de arquitetura, engenharia e urbanismo, e no gerenciamento de obras. Com atividade de trabalho diferenciada, a Pratec vem atuando no desenvolvimento de projetos comerciais e industriais, e no planejamento urbano de grandes áreas, em diversos Estados do País.

Name: Northshore Hamilton
Description: Welcome to Northshore Hamilton — the largest riverfront urban renewal project in Queensland. Just six kilometres from Brisbane's CBD, this precinct is home to riverside living; commercial space; an open, active environment, and easy connectivity via land, air and sea.

Name: SAPCO-Sénégal SA
Northshore Brisbane
Description: Welcome to Northshore Brisbane — the largest waterfront urban renewal project in Queensland. Just six kilometres from Brisbane's CBD, this precinct is home to riverside living; commercial space; an open, active environment, and easy connectivity via land, air and sea.

Name: National Institute of Urban Management-NIUM
Description: National Institute of Urban Management (NIUM) is committed towards professionalising urban management, rendering support to Urban Local Bodies and Government Departments in partnership with institutes of eminence.

Name: CaDev_Catalyst Development
Description:
A social enterprise founded on the belief that strong local capacities offer the best solutions for sustainable and inclusive growth and development
Vision: the leading expert for empowering local people and organisations in Africa
Mission: developing local capacities
Company values: Equality, Inclusion, Participation, Innovation

Name: Makanuna مَكَـــــــــــــــــــانُنَا
Description:
Makanuna is all about empowering children and youth to make a positive impact in their communities. 

Makanuna is a dynamic youth-led placemaking initiative. It cultivates child and youth placemakers, empowering them to collectively reimagine public spaces and shape the built environment that authentically reflects their identity and contributes to vibrant futures for their cities. Engaging in hands-on creative activities deeply rooted in cultural context, it addresses spatial challenges while celebrating the living heritage that makes each community unique. Its approach is place-based, allowing its initiatives to vary from short-term activities to long-term projects or programs.
Our focus is on children and youth, but we're also passionate about engaging with local communities, especially women and elders. Together, we're building vibrant, inclusive places!

Makanuna builds upon the success of Makanuna al-Khalifa, a community placemaking project in Al-khalifa Cairo, Egypt. Originally part of a regional collaboration during Tandem 360 program. During 2021-2022, over 20 adolescents and youth in reshaping their local park and neighborhood. Through hands-on workshops, participants designed and built park furniture and games from recycled materials, created art installations, and contributed to the beautification of public spaces. With its core team comprised of individuals who played key roles in the original al-Khalifa project, the current initiative continues the legacy, expanding its mission to engage and activate young placemakers across Egypt. The goal is to build vibrant and inclusive cities shaped by the voices of children and youth.

Name: The Sounds Project
Description: founded by Gerhana Banyubiru in 2015 in his campus in Depok, The Sounds Project has grown into a massive festival, attracting mega scale of music enthusiasts and big sponsors, Starting small, it now features top artists and draws a large crowd every year, becoming a highlight in the Indonesian festival scene.

Name: Jongerius Invest BV
Description:
Wij ontwikkelen en realiseren duurzame nieuwbouwprojecten op maat. Dit doen we met passie en gedrevenheid. Onze werkwijze kenmerkt zich door een persoonlijke en pragmatische aanpak. Wij vinden het belangrijk om samen met onze partners een optimaal resultaat te bereiken. Onze ambitie? Het realiseren van bijzondere projecten die volledig zijn afgestemd op de bewoners en leefbaarheid van de omgeving.

Wij zijn een modern familiebedrijf met een missie en drijfveer om te bouwen aan een betere levenskwaliteit. Ons doel is om een bijdrage te leveren aan de gezondheid en het geluk van toekomstige bewoners. Dit doen wij natuurlijk niet alleen. Een intensieve samenwerking met onze partners is daarom geen wens maar een vanzelfsprekendheid. Alleen zo creëren we het gewenste eindresultaat: duurzaam, innovatief en toekomstgericht.

Name: Pedaly AB
Description:
Pedaly is redefining what bike parking looks like in forward-thinking cities. Our smart, app-connected infrastructure empowers urban mobility by making cycling secure, effortless, and integrated into the daily rhythm of modern life.

Powered by cutting-edge IoT technology and intuitive software, Pedaly enables instant, app-based access and real-time monitoring—reducing theft, increasing convenience, and transforming the way cities support sustainable transport.

Born in Sweden, built for the world — Pedaly operates through a growing network of partners, delivering intelligent parking systems that fit seamlessly into urban landscapes. With deep expertise in both mobility and infrastructure, we help cities and companies create smarter spaces where people choose to ride.

We don’t just provide parking. We enable a movement.
Ready to join the future of urban mobility? Get in touch — we’d love to hear from you.

Name: Bangladesh Institute of Planners (BIP)
Description:
Bangladesh Institute of Planners (BIP) is the national professional organization of the Planners of the country established in 1974 for the advancement of Urban and Regional Planning which includes Rural Planning as well. Since the inception, the institute has been working to ensure planned and orderly development of the towns/cities and regions of the country through its various activities. BIP organizes seminars, workshops on various aspects of urban and regional/rural planning including transportation and environment; publishes journals and newsletters; arranges discussion meetings with stakeholders; and advises policy makers on various aspects related to physical planning and development control. BIP also sponsors planning exhibitions, workshops, round table discussions and studies carried out by planning students. BIP is a member of Commonwealth Association of Planners (CAP). BIP works in close cooperation with the Institution of Engineers Bangladesh (IEB) and Institute of Architects Bangladesh (IAB) in the greater interest of ensuring a safe, secure, and sustainable built environment in the country. BIP is committed towards development of cooperation with similar organizations in other countries for mutual benefit and advancement of the profession and professionals. BIP welcomes any enquires in this regard.

The objectives of BIP include the promotion of fellowship, co-operation and coordination among its members, the promotion of the art, science, practice and business of physical planning in all its branches, laying down and upholding professional code of ethics, promotion of research on planning, advising governmental and other organizations on planning and development control issues, advising planning schools, sharing professional ideas with other related agencies etc.

Name: Insikt
Description:
Vi erbjuder ett helhetsgrepp kring digitala processer och arbetssätt för både projekt och företag i samhällsbyggnadsbranschen genom att bistå med resurser, rådgivning, utbildningar och paketlösningar.

Insikt är ett av tre affärsområden på MOD.

Name: Nechabest Sustainable Initiative
Description:
Green Roice Network is an Organization founded by Roice K. Bwambale ,Engineer Roice( the green Environment researcher) has built up a huge globally interconnected community of friends and change makers through conference engagements, media education and inspirations on climate education and innovation.

Roice being a young but exceptionally  endowed civil engineer,environmental researcher and an inspirational student educator who brought diverse academic talents together for exchange of experience and knowledge in his community,Karambi,Kasese district-uganda via an initiative known as Moving Library,he realized he has spread hugely useful wings that could as well collaboratively transform ecosystems and human safety amidst the strangest planet climate crisis which is his current field of expertise. 

Back than before 2012 from his high school history,barely making 16yrs, the young careers man unbelievably spurred innovative and holistic leadership among many like minded young persons to create and champion successful youth projects and startups.

Coupled with his unwavering ambitions, He thought of creating this organization as a key propagation channel that could transmit  sustainability ambitions in all facets of social, technical (Environmentally) and economic development  through nature based  mentorship and seeding programs,fundraising and partnership within his circle of visibility .

The Organization's great kingpin encompasses strategic empowerment of the  community Youthful change makers who are financially and educationally disadvantaged but having will power to transform Africa's sustainability weak points. Through transformative and innovative projects while fostering partnership  and connection with other global continents,Roice believes that Africa will revive its former good economic and nature glory.

Name: Pontarius AB
Description:
INFRASTRUCTURE, REAL ESTATE & SOCIETY DEVELOPMENT CONSULTANT – BRINGING PEOPLE TOGETHER

Pontarius is a leading infrastructure, real estate and society development consultancy, based in Scandinavia but with operations worldwide. You’re as likely to come across our offices in Stockholm, Gothenburg, Lund, Norrköping, Jönköping, Linköping, Falun and Örebro as in one of our project offices abroad. Pontarius is able to call on many years of experience from infrastructure projects in fields such as roads, aviation and ports; always looking for new perspectives from which to identify the smartest solutions.

FOR INFRASTRUCTURE & REAL ESTATE THERE ARE NO ROOM FOR COMPROMISE

24 hours a day, seven days a week. They are expected to perform and ease the way for thousands of people. This demands that someone adopts a new perspective. Simplifies and beautifies for those who travel, transport, live and inspire. For them, it’s the destination that counts. They assume that someone has thought things through along the way – That someone is Pontarius.

Our team of engineers, landscape architects, economists, lawyers, scientists, humanists and researchers ensure that no point of view is left unexamined.

Name: Team Plymouth
Description: Team Plymouth is an ambitious partnership with defence, industry, academia, and local and national government working together across the city and wider region.

Name: Downtown Investment Authority
Description:
The DIA is the Community Redevelopment Agency and the Downtown economic development arm of the City of Jacksonville. Guided by a nine-member Board of Directors, the DIA leads the way in efforts to reinvigorate Downtown as a place to live, work and visit. 

https://dia.jacksonville.gov/
https://investdtjax.com/

DIA Mission
To drive growth in business and investment, create a dynamic urban living environment and enhance the quality of life in Downtown Jacksonville through the transparent and responsible leveraging of public investments, assets, infrastructure and policy. 

DIA Vision
Downtown Jacksonville is a dynamic, resilient, people friendly urban center that capitalizes on the importance of the river and is the premier center for business, sports and entertainment, culture and urban living in the heart of the Southeastern U.S.

Name: Tysons Community Alliance
Description:
Tysons is the most-densely populated urban district and economic engine of Fairfax County, Virginia, ten miles from Washington, D.C.  We’re the heart of private sector business in the region, with five Fortune 500 companies, over 120,000 employees,  and a top-20 commercial office space market. Here, residents, businesses, and Fairfax County are working together to grow into a city of 100,000 residents by 2050.  
 
Tysons connects easily to the region and the world by Metro, major road arteries, and two international airports within 20 minutes. Our economy is measured in the billions, and three-quarters of our future growth is within ½ mile of transit.

Name: UrbanizeHub
Description: UrbanizeHub is a collaborative platform of ideas, opinions, projects and news about smart cities, urban planning and urban development. We are a mix of think thank and start-up with interdisciplinary approach: urbanists, designers, architects, researchers and experts interested and involved in the discussion around future cities. We are connected by our shared knowledge, our dedication to sustainability, and our passion for building a better future. We believe in engaging local communities and stakeholders to ensure that our projects are inclusive and responsive to the needs of residents. Innovation, Participation, Urban Governance and Sustainability are the foundation of our organisations. From strategic planning to urban regeneration projects we develop smart solutions for urban communities. Find out more about our work following UrbanizeHub website.

Name: Black Women Thriving East of the River
Description:
Black Women Thriving East of the River underscores the commitment to helping Black women not only live and survive in some of the District’s most challenging neighborhoods, but also thrive.

Launched in 2019, a group of community residents and leaders spent more than two years working with the Foundation to design and begin implementing innovative solutions to address workforce development and cancer survival among Black women East of the River.

We envision a future in which Black women living in Wards 7 & 8 thrive with more access to opportunities, resources, and effective treatment, leading to optimal health and economic success.

Name: Millwork Commons
Description: Millwork Commons is a collaborative community designed to inspire and support the work of innovators and creators. Millwork will focus on providing next-generation office space, common community areas, and diversified housing over the next few years.

Name: MidTown Cleveland, Inc.
Description: MidTown is a connected community in the center of it all, an inclusive place for people to innovate, create, prosper, and live.

Name: UP2030 HE
Description:
UP2030 aims to support cities in driving the socio-technical transitions required to meet their climate neutrality targets by leveraging urban planning and design. An innovative methodology (5UP-approach) will be developed and applied  through the co-development and implementation of science-based - yet practical - tools, and methods. To this end, UP2030 will guide cities (stakeholders and local authorities) to deliver across the values of equity, resilience, neutrality, and sustainability.

Funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the European Climate, Infrastructure and Environment Executive Agency (CINEA). Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them. This project has received funding from the Horizon Innovation Actions under the grant agreement n° 101096405

Name: Agence d'urbanisme et de développement de la région Flandre-Dunkerque
Description:
L’AGUR est une agence d’urbanisme dont les principales missions sont reconnues par la Loi (code de l’urbanisme), les multiples évolutions réglementaires n’ayant cessé de renforcer le rôle de cet outil d’ingénierie partenarial.

Depuis 2021, l’AGUR s’est dotée d’un nouveau projet d’agence innovant et ambitieux afin de répondre au mieux aux attentes de ses membres. Un nouveau projet structuré autour de 8 grands axes stratégiques au travers desquels se déploie une expertise à 360°. Une diversité d’enjeux territoriaux traités par des équipes-projets pluridisciplinaires grâce à une organisation d’agence transversale et agile.

Name: impostergable
Description: Somos una oficina consultora de planificación y diseño urbano basado en datos, evidencia y participación. Diseñamos estrategias, espacios e intervenciones para transformar las ciudades del Sur Global en lugares más sostenibles, saludables y resilientes. Nuestro trabajo articula análisis territorial, innovación urbana y visión de futuros urbanos, combinando ciencia, diseño y colaboración.

Name: AGORA_SmartCity
Description: Un lugar de conocimiento, reflexión y formación para compartir y desarrollar soluciones e innovaciones en torno a una SmartCity inclusiva y sostenible, y apoyar proyectos de desarrollo urbano e infraestructura sustentables al servicio del bienestar de las poblaciones

Name: SKUP Türkiye
Description:
Şehirlerde Sürdürülebilir Kentsel Hareketlilik için Avrupa Birliği Desteği Projesi
Bu proje Avrupa Birliği ve Türkiye Cumhuriyeti tarafından finanse edilmektedir.



EU Support for Promoting Sustainable Urban Mobility in Turkish Cities Project
This project is financed by the European Union and the Republic of Turkey.

19 Ağustos, 2022'de başlayan SKUP TÜRKİYE ile ulusal ve kentsel düzeyde bireysel ulaşımdan, sürdürülebilir, erişilebilir ve kapsayıcı hareketlilik modlarına geçiş teşvik edilecek, ulusal ve uluslararası paydaşlar arasındaki politika diyaloğu geliştirecek, ilgili konularda belediyelerimizin AB’deki iyi örnekler ve deneyimler çerçevesinde kapasitelerini güçlendirecektir. Bunun için pek çok konuda 8’i yüz yüze, 36’sı çevrim işi kapasite geliştirme çalıştayları; belediyelerimizin gerekli göreceği konularda yeni rehberler hazırlanacaktır. Özellikle de Türkiye’deki Avrupa Hareketlilik Haftası  (AHH) tanıtım etkinliklerine belediyelerin geniş ve aktif katılım sağlayarak, vatandaşların farkındalıklarının artırılması, iletişim, tanıtım ve görünürlük çalışmalarının yapılması planlanmıştır. 

The SUMP TÜRKİYE project started on 19th August 2022 and will last for 36 months. Through this project, the transition from individual means of transportation to sustainable, accessible and inclusive mobility modes will be encouraged at both national and urban levels.
