The SUMP TÜRKİYE project will also help build the policy dialogue between national and international stakeholders on sustainable urban mobility and strengthen the capacities of our municipalities on this and related issues within the framework of good practices and experiences in the EU. In particular, it is planned that our municipalities will actively participate in the European Mobility Week (EMW) promotional events in Turkey, thus raising public awareness and carrying out communication, promotion and visibility activities.

Name: Centre for Disaster Resilience
Description:
The Centre for Disaster Resilience works across discipline and international boundaries to reduce disaster risk and promote global sustainable growth. We do this through fundamental, interdisciplinary and applied research, dissemination, education and training, international cooperation, and providing advisory services.

We live in a rapidly changing world. The world population increased from 2 billion one hundred years ago to 8 billion now and expecting to reach 10 billion by 2050. Our society also has grown in complexity and it is extremely dependent on fragile utility systems. Energy consumption led to large emissions of greenhouse gasses, leading to global warming, sea level rise and an increase in extreme events. All these factors increasingly expose us and our communities to disasters.

Disaster events in the last two decades took more than 1 million lives, affected more than 4 billion people, and caused nearly 3 trillion dollars in losses worldwide. The impact of natural disasters is unevenly distributed over the world, with the majority of the impact occurring in low and mid-income countries with a dramatic reduction in economic and social development.  

However, there is significant progress in technology, such as the deployment of multiple and highly sophisticated satellite systems, and the development of machine learning and big data analysis techniques, enabling us to find new solutions to global challenges. These include climate change, increasing disaster impacts and claim for sufficient and secure food, water, energy, health, land and housing.

The CDR is hosted by the Faculty for Geo-Information Science and Earth Observation (ITC) which was founded in 1950 with the core mission and ambition to teach and facilitate the effective use of geo-information and earth observation knowledge, particularly in the field of hazard, risk, and resilience.

Name: New Park City
Description:
We are American families building the American Dream: beautiful homes, walkable neighborhoods, and thoughtful communities. Our mission is to build the healthiest city in the world. New Park City is projected to save the State of California one million families, one billion trees, and one trillion dollars.

 2025 New Park City PBC (Public Benefit Corporation)

Name: SEBL Grand Est
Description:
SEBL Grand Est  / CRÉATEUR DE CADRE DE VIE

Entreprise publique locale, SEBL Grand Est  met à disposition des collectivités toutes ses compétences et ses moyens d’action pour développer les projets structurants sur l’ensemble du Grand Est.
Forte d’une expérience de près de 70 ans dans la réalisation d’opérations d’aménagement et de construction et avec l’appui des acteurs économiques régionaux, publics et privés, SEBL Grand Est a vocation à servir l’intérêt général et à mettre en œuvre des réponses sur mesure aux enjeux des territoires dans lesquels elle est ancrée.
Guidée par la recherche des équilibres environnementaux et la qualité du cadre de vie, SEBL Grand Est  accompagne dans une approche globale, les décideurs dans les choix stratégiques, financiers, techniques et organisationnels les plus pertinents.
SEBL Grand Est est membre de la Fédération des Entreprises Publiques Locales (EPL), un réseau de partage de compétences et de savoir-faire professionnels.



SEBL Grand Est, c'est : 
   - 142 M€ d’investissement en 5 ans
   - 625 ha en propriété foncière



En aménagement du territoire :
   - Nous accompagnons à la définition des projets, leur montage juridique et financier
   - Nous procédons aux acquisitions foncières et immobilières
   - Nous réalisons le suivi des travaux
   - Nous procédons à la promotion et commercialisation des zones aménagées

En construction et maitrise de l'énergie dans les bâtiments  : 
   - Nous assurons la programmation, le montage juridique et financier des projets
   - Nous Organisons les procédures de consultation, la gestion des marchés
   - Nous contrôlons le respect du calendrier de réalisation
   - Nous accompagnons la recherche de financements

En études et conseils : 
   - Nous coordonnons les études générales et la synthèse des travaux des tiers
   - Choix de la procédure et des prestataires
   - Nous assistons au montage des dossiers de subvention

Name: Biglieri Group
Description:
Here at The Biglieri Group, we Dream Big and plan Bigger. 

Since 1994, our firm has been working to create healthy, complete communities across the Greater Toronto Area, Ontario and beyond. We take pride in turning your ideas into BIG plans.

Every region, municipality, neighbourhood and site is unique. That is why we work closely with our clients from the beginning to define problems, conduct innovative research from technical and community-based perspectives, coordinate expert teams, and collaborate with all stakeholders. The results are high-quality plans, policies and solutions that are context specific and cost effective.  We look holistically at planning issues, providing value and expertise to our clients. 

We are problem solvers who will exceed your expectations.

Name: Yadra Lab
Description:
We co-design durable infrastructures with frontline collectives, stabilizing, protecting, and extending the community-built systems of care, work, and governance that already exist.

Our approach is radically decolonial: knowledge is never extracted or gatekept. Instead, we work as supporters, ensuring that field-driven practices endure and expand.

Through systems design, participatory research, and embedded strategy partnerships, we align institutions with field logic over donor logic. This means working alongside cooperatives, mutual aid economies, grassroots governance structures, and knowledge commons that thrive in the absence, or failure, of state systems.

Name: Nyanyi Bali
Description:
Nyanyi Bali, an Indonesia-based, multi-generational group that began its journey in 1990 dedicated to building and sustaining values-driven businesses. With a vision to blend regenerative, purposeful living, and cultural integrity, the group is anchored in the serene coastal region of Nyanyi, Tabanan, Bali.

The group is committed  to creating an authentic, community-rooted neighborhood that champions environmental guardianship, cultural preservation, and exceptional hospitality. The group envisions a living ecosystem, where local and global partnerships, sustainable design, and educational collaboration, generate long-term, shared value for the people of Indonesia. This vision is exemplified through the group’s focus on education, property development and hospitality.

Our Pillars: Education, Property Development, and Hospitality.

Together, these efforts reflect Nyanyi Bali’s role not just as a developer—but its long-term purpose as a custodian of culture, community, and sustainable progress that has elevated Nyanyi, Bali to becoming a globally-recognised destination.

Succeeded by two sisters Made Ariani Siswanto and Nyoman Astari Siswanto, Nyanyi Bali, today is the culmination vision of their late father Frans Bambang Siswanto, who believed Nyanyi Bali as not just a development- it was, and always will be, their family’s home. The privately-held group employs over 150 employees across multiple-businesses and is headquartered in Nyanyi, Bali, Indonesia.

Name: Kensington Market Community Land Trust
Description: The Kensington Market Community Land Trust is incorporated to acquire and provide for the management of land, in perpetuity, in or near Toronto's Kensington Market neighbourhood

Name: KOPL
Description:
Hos KOPL brænder vi for fysisk planlægning. Med høj faglighed, erfaring og forståelse tager vi ansvar og hjælper private bygherrer, pensionskasser og kommuner sikkert gennem komplekse plan- og udviklingsprocesser. Vi tager ansvar fra start til slut – fra indledende analyser til den sidste myndighedstilladelse.

Vi tror på, at god planlægning skaber værdi. Derfor arbejder vi for at realisere projekter, der ikke bare fungerer på papiret, men som også bidrager til samfundet. Vores mål er at sikre, at udnytte hvert enkelt projekts fulde potentiale – til gavn for både bygherre, kommune og samfund.

Vores kerneydelser:
 Rådgivning inden for fysisk planlægning 
 Projektledelse på komplekse plansager 
 Udarbejdelse af lokalplaner og kommuneplaner
 Udarbejdelse af miljørapporter og miljøkonsekvensrapporter
 Bygherrerådgivning, Due diligence og byggemodning
 Inhouse-konsulenter til kommuner
 Projektudvikling og bebyggelsesplaner
 Regnvandshåndtering

Kontakt os gerne på info@kopl.dk / +45 6644 3434 for en uforpligtende samtale om, hvordan vi kan hjælpe dig og dit projekt videre

Name: The Center for Arts & Innovation, Inc.
Description:
The Problem: We're losing generations of creative potential—and the next is at even greater risk. Decades of research have shown that between the ages of 8 and 14, creativity often fades. This isn’t due to a lack of imagination, but rather a lack of support. Without spaces to explore, tools to create, or encouragement to keep going, kids - and the adults they become - miss out on the opportunity and confidence to shape what comes next.

What's at Stake: When we let creativity fade, we lose more than ideas. We lose momentum. In a world fueled by innovation but growing evermore complex, we’re raising generations unprepared for what comes next. Every unexplored or dismissed imagination is a missed invention, a silenced voice, an unrealized solution. Without urgent, systemic change, we risk falling behind as humans—just when bold thinking is needed most.

Our Solution: The Center — A scalable new home to nurture and celebrate creativity in all its forms. A place where kids build creative confidence for life, and adults rediscover the joy of imagination, learning, and making.

Our Purpose: To champion creativity as a lifelong, life-shaping force—essential to human potential and collective progress.

Our Vision: A world where creativity is nurtured everywhere, by everyone, for life.

Our Mission: We shape spaces, programs, and experiences that help people grow, protect, and share their creativity.

Name: Barrow Rising
Description:
Our vision is to enable Barrow to deliver its role in protecting our nation, expanding our national defence capability, supporting energy security and revitalising Barrow and Furness as a place where people choose to live, work and thrive.  A place that can provide prosperity for all.

We need to deliver two core outcomes: 
1. Enable and sustain the Defence Nuclear Enterprise in Barrow efficiently and securely.
2. Diversify and strengthen Barrow's economy and increase productivity.

Name: CaDev_Catalyst Development
Description:
A social enterprise founded on the belief that strong local capacities offer the best solutions for sustainable and inclusive growth and development
Vision: the leading expert for empowering local people and organisations in Africa
Mission: developing local capacities
Company values: Equality, Inclusion, Participation, Innovation

Name: Quartier des spectacles international
Description:
QDSinternational se donne pour mission d’animer les espaces publics avec des installations sonores, lumineuses et participatives qui marquent l’imaginaire. QDSinternational est une organisation sans but lucratif qui produit et distribue des installations participatives destinées aux espaces publics, en collaboration avec des partenaires créatifs, des coproducteurs et des diffuseurs dans le monde entier.

QDSinternational is a not-for-profit organization that produces and distributes participatory installations for public spaces in collaboration with creative partners, co-producers and exhibitors around the world.

Name: TerraCity
Description:
At TerraCity, we help transportation planners make data-driven decisions that reshape mobility in their communities. Our platform enables you to predict and optimize travel demand across multiple modes, ensuring that projects align with sustainability, connectivity, and economic goals.

Whether you're evaluating the impact of a new bikeshare system on transit ridership, assessing how pedestrianizing a busy street will affect local businesses, or reducing emissions with sustainable mobility solutions, our tools provide the insights you need to design effective transportation systems.

Explore data, design custom analyses, and continuously refine your projects—all in one platform. Every community has unique needs, and your transportation planning should reflect that.

Name: AceRail
Description:
AceRail är ett konsultbolag som är specialiserade inom infrastruktur och samhällsbyggnad. Med en stark drivkraft att hela tiden vilja lära oss mer ser vi till att alltid ha rätt kompetens i varje uppdrag. Som kund till oss kan du känna dig trygg med att vi levererar med kvalitet i alla våra uppdrag. 

Några roller vi gillar
- Projektledning
- Uppdragsledning
- Byggledning & Entreprenadledning
- Projekteringsledning
- Platschef
- Projektingenjör
- Datasamordnare
- Projektering
- CAD-samordnare

- Tekniska specialister inom järnväg 
- Byggarbetsmiljösamordnare - Planering & Projektering
- Byggarbetsmiljösamordnare - Utförande

Har du frågor eller funderingar om vår verksamhet? Vi pratar gärna med dig så tveka inte att höra av dig!

Name: FUSS e.V. Fachverband Fußverkehr Deutschland
Description:
Seit 1985 vertritt FUSS e. V. die Interessen der Fußgängerinnen und Fußgänger in Deutschland. Bei allen Fragen zum Fußverkehr sind wir Ansprechpartner für Verwaltung, Politik und Öffentlichkeit. Wir erarbeiten Stellungnahmen und schlagen Änderungen für Gesetze und Richtlinien vor. Weil Gehen als wichtigster Baustein nachhaltiger Mobilität nicht isoliert betrachtet werden kann, arbeiten wir dabei mit Verbänden zusammen, die sich mit Rad-, Bus- und Bahnverkehr befassen.

Als Fachverband beraten und vernetzen wir Bürgerinnen und Bürger, Verwaltung und Politik.

Als Lobby setzen wir uns für Zufußgehenden-Belange ein, etwa in der Straßenverkehrsordnung, in Planungsrichtlinien und im Bußgeldkatalog.

Als Bürgerinitiative arbeiten wir dezentral in unseren Ortsgruppen an besseren Bedingungen für das Gehen.

Als Teil der Zivilgesellschaft informieren wir Medien, veranstalten Vor-Ort-Aktionen und publizieren selbst.

Name: Geocon Mätteknik
Description: 1994 etablerade Börje Andersson och den kunnige mätteknikern Eddie Blom Geocon AB. Bolaget fick tack vare bra entreprenörskap och gedigen erfarenhet en osannolikt fin start. Västkustbanan, Öresundsbron, Gruvmätning Boliden. Ölandsbron och Citybanan i Malmö är några av de prestigeprojekt som bolaget och – vid den tidens ca 40 mättekniker – har varit med och skapat.

Name: Co-Creative Connection
Description: Co-Creative Connection creates joyful spaces by working with local people to design and paint murals. Our free inclusive workshops encourage collaboration, promote well-being, and enhance local engagement, while providing life-long skills and friendships. By transforming public spaces into vibrant works of art, we instill a sense of pride and connection within local communities.

Name: MAY
Description: MAY we help you? Vi brinner för lyckade projekt från start till mål. Projektledning, projektekonomi och projektstöd är våra specialiteter. Oavsett om det är anläggnings- eller fastighetsprojekt kan vi hjälpa dig längs hela vägen. MAY är ett konsultföretag med projekt som specialitet. Vi består av ett gäng nyfikna och proaktiva ingenjörer och ekonomer med hög ambition. Vi brinner för projekt, stora som små. Vår drivkraft är att hjälpa våra kunder nå framgångsrika projekt avseende tid, kostnad och slutprodukt.

Name: Polígono de Carballo
Description:
Situados na contorna metropolitana da Coruña e cunha superficie de 1.218.000 metros cadrados, somos un dos polígonos industriais con maior tamaño da Comunidade Autónoma galega, caracterizándonos por unha funcionalidade complexa, propia dos parques empresariais de grandes dimensións, o que nos permite aloxar no noso interior actividades económicas que demandan un consumo intensivo de chan industrial e altos niveis de especialización.

A través da mellora continua de servizos e infraestruturas, aspiramos a mellorar a competitividade da nosa área empresarial e das empresas nela asentadas e, así, transformar ao polígono de Carballo nun importante polo de desenvolvemento económico a nivel provincial e autonómico.

A aposta pola competitividade non está rifada coa xestión cívica dos nosos distintos grupos de interese, traballando cada día por ser un axente crave no desenvolvemento sustentable da nosa contorna.

Name: UAE Cargo Airlines & GSA Professionals Community
Description:
The  UAE Cargo Airlines & GSA Professionals Community (UAE CAGP) is now officially registered as a Community Legal Register under UAE law. Operating under the legal entity Network Community FZ-LLC, this milestone highlights our unwavering commitment to uniting industry professionals, promoting excellence, and setting higher standards across the cargo airline and GSSA sectors.

About UAE CAGP
The UAE CAGP is a dynamic network of over 105 members, comprising professionals from the cargo airline and General Sales and Service Agent (GSSA) industries. Our mission is to foster collaboration, enhance industry expertise, and advocate for the shared interests of our members.

Key Initiatives and Offerings:
Networking and Collaboration

We provide a robust platform for professionals to connect, share insights, and address industry challenges collectively.
Professional Development

Through specialized training programs, workshops, and seminars, members stay updated on the latest trends and advancements in the cargo airline industry.
Advocacy and Representation

Acting as a unified voice, UAE CAGP advocates for the interests of the cargo airline and GSSA community with regulatory authorities and key stakeholders.
Information Sharing

We facilitate the seamless exchange of information on cargo operations, market trends, and regulatory updates, ensuring members stay ahead in a competitive landscape.
Regular Meetings and Events

Our community organizes impactful conferences, roundtable discussions, and networking events, fostering meaningful interactions and knowledge-sharing.
Educational Initiatives

Members gain access to industry-relevant courses, certifications, and training materials designed to enhance their skills and expertise.

Name: Biltmore Farms
Description:
A diverse company devoted to thoughtful growth and the economic well-being of our mountain home, Biltmore Farms, LLC has been a community leader in Western North Carolina for over a century. Founded by George W. Vanderbilt in 1897, today, Biltmore Farms, LLC continues his legacy of quality across all the company’s divisions: Biltmore Farms Commercial, Biltmore Farms Communities, Biltmore Farms Homes, and Biltmore Farms Hotels.  

Biltmore Farms has evolved from the region’s largest independent dairy operation to a preeminent community development firm. Today, Biltmore Farms continues its reputation of regional leadership through forward-thinking accomplishments such as the creation of Biltmore Park Town Square, the largest and most diverse mixed-use urban village in Asheville. Our company has designed some of the region’s most beautiful and viable master-planned communities.

We are committed to preserving the natural beauty of the Blue Ridge Mountains through our community involvement and business practices, including the construction of the Hilton Asheville Biltmore Park, the first new construction LEED-certified Hilton hotel in the country, featuring a large-scale rooftop solar water heating system. In addition, Biltmore Farms’ portfolio of nationally award-winning hotels carries on the Vanderbilt tradition of gracious hospitality.

Name: BRAND - The Urban Agency
Description:
Making an impact on the lives of millions of urbanites: it’s not an empty promise, it’s why we’re here. We are passionate about cities. Cities are our future, but at the same time, a huge challenge. We want to make cities more liveable, sustainable, smarter, more inclusive, and healthier. So that they’ll be brighter, happier places in the future and for generations to come. It’s what drives our grand ambition! It’s what all our projects are about, and the vision our clients embrace. 

As an urban agency, we help to shape the city of the future and respond to the countless urban challenges. We do this by developing visions and strategies for the future. And, at the same time, ensure these ambitious plans become reality. 

We set people in motion, and make cities better places. Always with urbanites in mind, always in close collaboration with all stakeholders, and often by taking new paths. 

Want to take steps to create a better city? We’d love to talk to you.

Name: ONU-Habitat España
Description:

Colaboramos con gobiernos, empresas, instituciones, academia y sociedad civil para abordar los grandes desafíos de ciudades, comunidades y territorios: acceso a la vivienda, resiliencia climática, despoblación, turismo urbano sostenible, enlaces urbano-rurales e innovación en la planificación urbana.

 Nuestra misión y mandato se articula alrededor del ODS 11 de la Agenda 2030 de Naciones Unidas: ciudades y comunidades inclusivas, resilientes, seguras y sostenibles. con la Nueva Agenda Urbana como instrumento.  

 A través de proyectos, asesorías técnicas, campañas y alianzas estratégicas, ayudamos a que las ciudades y comunidades españolas sean espacios donde todas las personas puedan prosperar sin dejar a nadie ni ningún lugar atrás. Construyamos juntos un mejor futuro urbano!

Name: TWIN2EXPAND
Description:
TWIN2EXPAND will enhance research capacities in evidence-based urban design and planning (EBDP) as a field of critical importance in the R&I of integrated approaches and technologies for effective spatial planning and sustainable urban governance. The project facilitates a partnership among University of Cyprus, three leading institutions in the field (University College London; Chalmers University of Technology; Polytechnic University of Turin) and one pioneering SME practicing EBDP (Space Syntax Limited). 

By addressing urban sustainability, TWIN2EXPAND will contribute to achieving targets of the Cyprus Smart Specialisation Strategy, the EU Green Deal and the Sustainable Urban Development Goals. 

TWIN2EXPAND embraces the international networking ethos of the SDGs to achieve scientific excellence in the R&I of the built environment, fully embedding it within the quadruple helix by fostering collaboration with local authorities and other stakeholders. It aims to achieve a scientific and integrative approach to urban planning and governance as the entry point into effective transitioning to sustainable development. Focusing on emerging concepts and challenges in the field, the project proposes a generalised conceptual and working model of evidence-based urban design and planning.

Description:

The purpose of the Montgomery County Black Collective (the Collective) is to bring together Black community leaders in the nonprofit and for-profit sectors to address the long-standing inequity and dearth of financial and capital support in the building of Montgomery County-based organizations in their communities.

The Collective’s mission is to raise awareness, create active engagement, and advocate for resources that address racial equity and social justice related to business and capital development in the Black community.

Name: Place Making Pakistan
Description:
What happens to our public spaces when the sun goes down?
This was the central question explored during the AfterDark Placemaking Weekend in Bengaluru, where city thinkers, planners, designers, and community leaders came together to reimagine urban life after sunset.

It was a pleasure to represent Placemaking Pakistan and share our experiences from Lahore — a city that transforms after dark with its rich culture, street life, public gatherings, and vibrant food corridors. Through our presentation on “Life After Dark in Lahore,” we highlighted how cultural expression, community resilience, and public space activation continue well into the night, even in the face of infrastructural and safety challenges.

From biodiversity and lighting to gender safety and inclusive design, this event was a dynamic blend of walks, workshops, and dialogue that left us inspired and better connected across borders.

A huge thank you to Placemaking India for hosting this much-needed conversation at the BLR Design Centre. Looking forward to future collaborations for building safer, more inclusive, and people-powered cities after dark! 

#PlacemakingPakistan #LifeAfterDark #LahoreAfterDark #UrbanVibrancy #InclusiveCities #PublicSpaces #SaferCities #CommunityLedDesign #PlacemakingIndia #GlobalPlacemaking #SheherSaaz #UrbanDesign #CityAfterDark #Bengaluru #ChurchStreet #AfterDarkPlacemaking #DesignForAll #LahoreNights #CulturalVibrancy #PlacemakingX

Name: Microforest Collective
Description:
Microforest Collective is a not-for-profit platform that finds and equips capable local leaders to create fast-growing native microforests that cool cities, capture carbon and bring neighbours together.

We don’t plant forests for people. We build the pathway that lets ordinary residents deliver them — approvals, insurance, templates, tools, fundraising systems, and a simple structure that takes the friction out of community-led projects.

Our model is lean by design. We’re volunteer-run, transitioning to charity and DGR status, and building a permanent backbone that can support dozens of projects with minimal staff. The goal is a scalable civic infrastructure: one platform, many leaders, lasting public spaces.

What we do:
• Find and equip local leaders with the systems, guidance and confidence to run high-quality microforest projects
• Support schools, councils and community groups with site assessment, approvals maps and delivery tools
• Provide centralised governance, insurance, fundraising infrastructure and lightweight digital systems
• Help communities design, fund and build microforests that become part of everyday civic life

Why it matters:
Cities are getting hotter, harder and more fragmented. Microforests give people a way to reclaim and repair small public spaces — fast, cheap and locally led. When you build the system once, every new project becomes easier, faster and more resilient.

Tiny forests. Big impact. Powered by local leaders.

Name: Aurel Parq
Description:
Aurel Parq es un parque industrial ubicado estratégicamente sobre la Ruta 88, en Mar del Plata. Pensado para potenciar el desarrollo productivo y logístico de la región, ofrece infraestructura moderna, servicios esenciales y espacios adaptables para la instalación de pequeñas, medianas y grandes empresas.

Nuestro objetivo es impulsar el crecimiento industrial con una propuesta innovadora, segura y sostenible. Aurel Parq no es solo un espacio físico: es una comunidad empresarial en expansión, conectada con el presente y proyectada hacia el futuro.

Name: The Social Aspect
Description:
Social Aspect is a business that balances people and projects. We apply social impact assessment and community engagement expertise to minimise social impacts, create positive stakeholder relationships, and create a social license for complex projects from project inception, to approvals, construction, operation, and closure. Led by Dr Jamie Seaton, our three core services are:
1) social impact assessments / planning approvals 
2) community and stakeholder engagement
3) social research tailored to organisational goals.
Find out more at https://www.socialaspect.com.au/about.

Name: Take Consulting Ltd.
Description:
Take Consulting is a women owned and operated company, launched in 2024 by Kate Whitfield and Claire Basinski. Together, we strive to provide our partners and clients with innovative, creative, technically sound and scalable solutions to help create complete communities by thoughtfully and intelligently responding to needs, aspirations and circumstances. We use our planning, engineering and engagement/facilitation expertise to proactively address issues of capacity, conflict and collaboration. 

We leverage over 35 years of combined experience across sectors, throughout the country and in various areas of practice to provide planning and design solutions for land use, mobility and infrastructure. We offer unique and niche skills that enhance the overall project experience and outcomes including change management and capacity building, expert opinion and project management, evaluation and monitoring and facilitation and conflict resolution.

Name: Taranto Desarrollo Inmobiliario
Description:
SOMOS TDI. 

Estamos a la vanguardia del negocio inmobiliario en el Uruguay, inspirados por los proyectos que generan impacto en la comunidad.

Creamos ideas y nuevos proyectos respaldados por nuestro equipo humano, altamente capacitado y motivado, integrado por Arquitectos, Urbanistas, Ingenieros, Economistas, Contadores, Escribanos, Abogados y expertos en comunicación y marketing, quienes trabajan con pasión y profesionalismo para crear los mas singulares y exitosos proyectos del mercado. Desarrollamos nuestro accionar guiados por los valores fundamentales de nuestra empresa: Humildad en las relaciones humanas, credibilidad y liderazgo, profesionalismo y compromiso con clientes e inversores.

Name: Project Bharat
Description: Traditional marketing mechanisms have been overused, and the impact has been diminishing. We're changing this dynamic with a digitally connected network of village Sahayaks that will help us in creating a digitally connected Bharat. Through our digitally connected network of village Sahayaks, we can bring Bharat closer to India through digitally connecting people, businesses, and communities.

Name: YVEO
Description:
Yacoli Village Ecole Ouverte en abrégé « YVEO « est une association à but non lucratif. Association de droit ivoirien régie par la loi n°60- 315 du 21 septembre 1960 relative aux associations, détentrice du récépissé n°655/PA/SG/D1 du 17 avril 2013.
Siège social : Yacolidabouo (Soubré) avec une représentation à Abidjan Cocody Dokui.
La vision de l’organisation est de bâtir des communautés prospères et autonomes qui allient développement de proximité et la gestion durable des ressources naturelles, par leurs capacités, à prendre ou modifier des décisions qui les concernent ; leur capacité à apprendre et à s’adapter ainsi que leur aptitude à planifier. Elle se résume en trois (objectifs) objectifs essentiels : (i) la réduction de l’extrême pauvreté ; et (ii) le développement de la résilience communautaire et (iii) la conservation de la nature et la reconstitution de la biodiversité. Ces objectifs sont exprimés dans le cadre des enjeux majeurs de la satisfaction des exigences de nos partenaires et l’adaptation de nos services aux besoins des communautés rurales et urbains.

Name: ACCES UNIVERSEL
Description:
ACCES UNIVERSEL (AU Sarl,  Labeled Startup), basée au quartier Mènontin, entre la station ORYX et la pharmacie Mènontin à Cotonou, Bénin, est une agence spécialisé dans l'impact durable, l'inclusion numérique et les partenariats public-privé. L'entreprise collabore avec les gouvernements, les organisations internationales et les partenaires du secteur privé pour développer des solutions évolutives et efficaces qui favorisent l'accès universel aux ressources essentielles en Afrique.

Principaux domaines d'intervention :
● Développement durable et impact – Conception et mise en œuvre de projets de développement et humanitaires conformes aux Objectifs de développement durable (ODD) des Nations Unies afin de favoriser le progrès environnemental, social et économique.
● Conseil en partenariats public-privé – Établissement de partenariats stratégiques entre les gouvernements, les entreprises et les communautés locales pour impulser un changement systémique et durable.
● Inclusion numérique et innovation – Élargissement de l'accès et de l'adoption des technologies afin de réduire la fracture numérique et d'autonomiser les communautés mal desservies.
● Solutions énergétiques durables – Soutien aux projets d'énergies renouvelables qui contribuent à l'accès à l'énergie propre en Afrique.

Une approche unique : le « modèle triple impact »
ACCES UNIVERSEL se distingue par son modèle triple impact, axé sur la durabilité économique, sociale et environnementale :
● En combinant conseil traditionnel et mise en œuvre concrète des projets, garantissant ainsi l'impact concret des recommandations stratégiques.
● En exploitant la croissance par le partenariat, en collaborant étroitement avec les agences gouvernementales, les investisseurs institutionnels et les organisations communautaires afin d'optimiser les résultats à long terme.
● En privilégiant des solutions évolutives et adaptables, garantissant l'adéquation des projets aux conditions du marché local et leur pérennité ...

Name: Planning School at Birmingham City University
Description:
The MA Planning Built Environments is an interdisciplinary masters course at the Department of Architecture and Built Environment at BCU. Its main emphasis is on urban and spatial planning, with a focus on supporting and creating healthy environments and communities.

Our modules facilitate practice-relevant, project-based, and experiential learning to ready and upskill students for planning work in the private and public sectors across England and beyond. This course helps students navigate the complexity in planning policy and decision-making in an era of climate and ecological emergency, striving for socially just environments and outcomes.

For more information: https://www.bcu.ac.uk/courses/planning-built-environments-ma-2025-26

Name: Lokasolution
Description: Founded in 2022, Lokasolution is the first student-led community advisory firm focused on urban issues. To date, Lokasolution has successfully collaborated with 5 client partners from a variety of industries, including state-owned enterprises (SOEs), private companies (e.g., industrial and commercial real estate), public agencies (i.e., ministry), and NGOs.

Name: fem.spaces
Description:
We believe that the stories we tell shape the way we live and interact with each other and our environments. Through fem.spaces, we want to bring to light enjoyable day-to-day urban moments that women experience in public spaces. We hope to thereby change urban narratives towards a positive story that empowers women to actively participate in and shape their cities according to their own needs & desires beyond safety-debates and male-dominated city planning

Follow and participate to our storytelling on our instagram page @femspaces 

Contact via fem.spacescollective@gmail.com

Name: Korimako
Description:
Korimako is a social enterprise. Our mission is to deliver radical mission-led change towards more sustainable, equitable and resilient societies. 

We help clients and communities to develop and deliver such transformative sustainability initiatives.

Find our more at www.korimako.org

Name: Plattform GSR
Description: Die Plattform GSR fördert integrale Gemeinde-, Stadt-, und Regionalentwicklung und bringt dazu Fachpersonen verschiedener sozialraum- und raumorientierter Professionen zusammen.

Name: Planning Advisory Service (PAS)
Description: We are part of the Local Government Association and run fourteen projects funded by the Department of Levelling Up and Housing, Defra and Natural England.

Name: Mob 4.0
Description:
Rede de planejamento inteligente da mobilidade urbana. Compartilhamos informações e vivências para conectar pessoas, dados e cidades. Buscamos acessibilidade e inclusão. 

 Dados
 Workshops
 Podcast MOBlizando
 Inclusão

Projeto apoiado e financiado pela Faperj e Coppe/UFRJ.

Name: Long Beach Community Design Center
Description:
The Long Beach Community Design Center is committed to providing pro-bono urban planning and design services to nonprofit 501(c) 3 organizations in greater Long Beach that serve low-income and underserved communities in order to create equitable and socially just physical environments. 

The Design Center also develops youth and young adult engagement programs to promote education and career pathways in the urban planning and design professions.

Name: DMG Infra and Consulting Pvt. Ltd.
MapMind Laboratory
Description:
MapMind Lab is an innovative organization at the forefront of applying geospatial technologies to solve today’s most pressing societal challenges. Rooted in the art and science of mapping, MapMind Lab focuses on creating accurate, actionable spatial data that empowers diverse stakeholders - students, researchers, organizations, businesses, and governments - to make well-informed, impactful decisions.

At its heart, MapMind Lab is about cartography - leveraging cutting edge geospatial tools to visualize, analyze and solve complex spatial issues. The Lab’s capabilities span geospatial analytics, ICT integration and design innovation to address challenges in urbanization, environmental management and sustainable development. Driven by this core, MapMind Lab aims to transform cities, particularly in the developing world, into smart and resilient urban ecosystems. Through strategic urban planning, innovative urban design, sustainable construction and urban resilience projects, the Lab works to build smart communities that are better equipped to face future challenges.

MapMind Lab is more than just a geospatial organization; it is a laboratory of ideas and innovation where the latest advancements in geospatial intelligence, ICT, and design are combined to foster societal progress. The Lab also emphasizes capacity building, offering training programs that equip urban practitioners and fresh graduates with essential skills, empowering them to contribute meaningfully to sustainable development.

Name: COMMUNITAS project
Description:
Motivated by the recent regulatory developments and the opportunity to exploit new concepts such as RECs and 
CECs, COMMUNITAS will promote energy citizenship, enabling citizens to take control of their own path towards sustainability by becoming an active element of the energy markets.

Name: Alpharetta Connect
Description:
Alpharetta Connect is revolutionizing the way we connect with each other and build community. Our private online platform is designed to bring people together in a transformative way, creating a sense of belonging and support within the Alpharetta community.

Our platform provides a space for members to create profiles, connect with friends and neighbors, join interest-based groups, and participate in online events and activities. We understand the importance of building strong connections within our community and strive to create a welcoming, supportive space for all members.

What sets us apart is our commitment to privacy and security. All communication on our platform is encrypted, ensuring that members can connect with each other without the fear of their personal information being compromised.

We believe that the Alpharetta Connect has the power to transform the way we connect and build community, and we are excited to bring this revolutionary platform to the Alpharetta community.

Name: The Urban Alchemy Collective, LLC
Description:
We transform imagination into legacy.

At Urban Alchemy Collective, we believe planning is more than a process — it’s an act of cultural authorship. Our work lives at the intersection of urban planning, landscape architecture, and community engagement, crafting enduring places that reflect the spirit, needs, and future of the communities we serve.

The term “alchemy” originates from the Arabic word al-kīmiyā, meaning to transform. Historically, it referred to turning base materials into gold — but for us, it symbolizes something even more powerful: the transformation of neglected land, overlooked voices, and fragmented plans into vibrant, inclusive, and legacy-driven urban spaces.

And the word “urban” speaks directly to our purpose — cities, neighborhoods, corridors, parks, and public spaces where people gather, grow, and shape their stories.

We serve municipalities, counties, agencies, cultural institutions, and forward-thinking developers, blending bold ideas with grounded strategy. Our work spans:

-Parks, Trails & Open Space Master Planning
-Comprehensive & Regional Planning
-Landscape Architecture
-Downtown & Corridor Revitalization
-Public Realm & Streetscape Design
-Land Use Policy & Implementation Strategy
-Placemaking & Civic Identity

Our approach is co-creative, human-centered, and unapologetically purposeful. We prioritize equity, cultural resonance, and ecological sustainability in every decision — ensuring every space we touch reflects both beauty and belonging.

Based in Texas and New Mexico, we partner nationally to imagine futures, heal places, and leave a mark that lasts. Let’s shape something enduring!

#UrbanAlchemyCollective | #PlanningWithTheAlchemist | #DesigningLegacy

Name: Your Town Alabama
Description: Formed in 1998, Your Town Alabama provides community leaders with critical tools for organizing, recruiting, and strategically developing community and economic development projects while retaining the things that make a small or rural town special. Design decisions can often make the difference between survival and decay, between healthy prosperity and decline. Your Town hosts an annual workshop each spring led by Planners, Graphic Designers, Architects, Engineers, Historians, Preservationists, and other professionals to expose community decision makers to asset-based planning techniques focusing on identifying ‘what is right’ within a community and building on those unique community assets. This 2-1/2 day experience encourages thinking creatively, trying new things, listening to good ideas, being heard, laughing, and meeting interesting people from all of Alabama. Your Town also partners with other grassroots-based Alabama nonprofits throughout the year to offer additional training, programming and networking opportunities for community leaders and change-makers.

Name: Centro de Urbanismo CDU
Description:
En el Centro de Urbanismo creemos que el conocimiento transforma ciudades. Por eso ofrecemos cursos y programas de formación en urbanismo y planificación que combinan teoría con práctica.

Nuestro enfoque es simple: brindar herramientas claras y aplicables para que profesionales, estudiantes e instituciones puedan diseñar, gestionar y mejorar los espacios en los que vivimos.

Name: SMDI Consultants, Inc.
Description:
Organized in August 1984 in Metro Manila, Philippines, SMDI has built a solid foundation in the traffic engineering and transport planning profession, as well as in comprehensive development and urban planning. Today, SMDI is an established and dynamic consultancy firm with a string of major accomplishments, backed by its pool of experienced urban transport and environmental planners, traffic engineers and simulation specialists.

SMDI has been an active member of the Council of Engineering Consultants of the Philippines (CECOPHIL) since 1989. Through its affiliation with its local and global network of consultancy firms from the Philippines, Japan, Singapore, U.S.A, U.K. and Germany, SMDI has been involved in major infrastructure projects for the Philippine government and the private sector. These public infrastructure projects have been funded by the Philippine government, in cooperation with leading international financial institutions, particularly Japan International Cooperation Agency (JICA), Japan Bank for International Cooperation (JBIC), International Engineering Consulting Firms Association (IECA), International Association of Traffic & Safety Sciences (IATSS), Asian Development Bank (ADB) and the World Bank. Its private sector projects consist of major developments by leading real estate property developers, toll road operators, healthcare/educational institutions and commercial/industrial corporations, i.e., Ayala Land, Belle Corporation, Ortigas & Company Ltd Partnership (OCLP), Robinsons Land Corporation, Rockwell Land Corporation, Shangri-la Properties, SM Development Corporation, SM Investments Corporation; Cavite Infrastructure Corporation (CIC), Metro Pacific Tollways Corporation (MPTC); St. Luke’s Medical Center, UST Hospital; Ateneo de Manila University, De La Salle University, and UP National Center for Transportation Studies.

To know more about SMDI Consultants Inc., please visit www.smdiconsultants.com.

Name: מרכז השלטון המקומי בישראל
Description:
מרכז השלטון המקומי בישראל (מש"מ) הוא עמותה רשומה ובה מאוגדות כל העיריות והמועצות המקומיות בישראל (למעט המועצות האזוריות, המאוגדות במרכז השלטון האזורי), מתוכן 76 ערים ו-127 מועצות מקומיות מכל המגזרים ומכל רחבי המדינה: יהודיות, ערביות, דרוזיות וצ'רקסיות, חילוניות וחרדיות, במרכז הארץ ובפריפריה.

מטרתו העיקרית של המרכז היא לייצג את הרשויות המקומיות ולקדם את ענייניהן בפני הכנסת ומול גורמי הממשלה השונים, וכן בפני מוסדות וארגונים ממלכתיים וארציים. בנוסף, מהווה המרכז גוף מנחה ומייעץ מקצועי לרשויות המקומיות בתחומי פעילותן השונים ומרכז את איגודי בעלי התפקידים ברשויות המקומיות.

Name: Via Rio Grande
Description:
Via Rio Grande is a nonprofit collective of volunteers based in Salt Lake City that advocates for the Rio Grande Plan, a visionary concept that would move all heavy rail traffic in SLC, including Amtrak, UTA, and Union Pacific, into a "train box" underground along the publicly-owned 500 West street right of way. 

By doing this and removing the underused downtown railyards, almost 75 acres of land would be opened to redevelopment and 8 deadly rail crossings would be grade separated. Even better, this would remove the single largest transportation barrier in SLC and reconnect east and west with new city streets and active uses. It would also reactivate the historic Rio Grande Depot as a new, world-class central station for the entire western United States.

The beginnings of Via Rio Grande came in 2019 when Christian Lenhart, civil engineer, and Cameron Blakely, urban designer, met online and crafted what would later become the Rio Grande Plan. Since then, the RGP has become well-known in Utah and is now under active official consideration as a significant step toward removing SLC's east-west divide as part of a federally-funded "Reconnecting Communities" study.

Via Rio Grande actively advocates for this vision to be seriously considered by decisionmakers in the state of Utah. We are committed to open dialogue with all citizens and community organizations and are actively seeking partners and allies in the effort to make the RGP happen. Via Rio Grande also plans to expand the scope of its advocacy to transit-oriented development (TOD) and transit expansion more broadly within the state of Utah.

Name: Plan Maynas
Description:
Es una estrategia integral e intergubernamental —de la Municipalidad Provincial de Maynas, a través de su Gerencia de Acondicionamiento Territorial— que promueve la planificación como herramienta para la gestión del territorio, bajo un enfoque sostenible y participativo.

 Tiene por objetivo transformar la forma en la que pensamos y proyectamos nuestra provincia, con una planificación territorial efectiva y sostenible para los próximos 20 años.

Para ello, se elaborarán, de manera colaborativa y consensuada, tres grandes instrumentos de gestión:
Plan de Acondicionamiento Territorial de Maynas (PAT MAYNAS) 
Plan de Desarrollo Urbano de Iquitos (PDM Iquitos) 
Plan Maestro de la Zona Urbano Monumental de Iquitos (PMZUM Iquitos)

Name: Local
Description: Local is an established creative practice based in Greater Manchester and the Peak District, connecting businesses, communities and places through creative, action-led research and engagement activities. Local Creative Project design, deliver and evaluate place-based cultural strategies and projects, both in the post-industrial North and also internationally.

Name: SMCNetZero
Description:
SMCNetZero is a consortium of 7 participants consisting of BABLE Smart Cities, ODRAZ, the Smart City Cluster, the Southern Regional Assembly, BLOXHUB, We Build Denmark and Urban DNA, that brings together successful urban innovation initiatives in Europe, with the goal of facilitating decarbonisation in small and medium-sized cities (SMCs) by supporting public sector representatives, SMEs, academia, NGOs, and investors.

SMCNetZero also aims to strengthen local innovation ecosystems' interrelations by increasing capacity for planning, deploying, and scaling-up of decarbonisation solutions, while minimizing existing innovation divides.

Name: Urban Development Technical Facility
Description:
Urban Development Technical Facility, as part of the Directorate General of International Partnerships (DG INTPA)'s F.4 of the European Commission.

The UDTF focuses on supporting partner countries in their urban development challenges. It delivers technical assistance and policy advice to improve the quality and impact of the EU’s interventions in urban development at all levels —local, regional and global — with a focus on Africa, Asia, the Caribbean, and Latin America. 

Integrated urban planning coupled with greener infrastructure and coordinated urban expansion can increase a city’s urban resilience while minimizing the negative environmental impacts of human settlement.

Name: LUZ d.d.
Description: Smo podjetje prostorskih planerjev, oblikovalcev, svetovalnih inženirjev in tehničnih strokovnjakov, ki se z zavzetostjo za trajnostni razvoj ter celostnim in multidisciplinarnim pristopom zavezujemo k uresničitvi vaših idej.

Name: ADG ENERGY
Description:
L'entreprise ADG ENERGY est une société d'électricité créée en juin 2018. Ainsi nous pouvons vous accompagner dans tous vos travaux de maintenance et d'installation électrique. 
Nous travaillons essentiellement dans 3 domaines d'activités : 
- le balisage et les systèmes de navigation aéroportuaire 
- l'éclairage public 
- les réseaux Basse Tension (BT) et Haute Tension (HT)

Name: A. BORNES ECO
Description:
A. BORNES ECO est une société en électricité générale. Nous gérons tous types de travaux d'installation et ou de rénovation en basse et/ou haute tension. 
Nous sommes également spécialisés dans l'installation des bornes de recharge pour véhicule électrique. A. BORNES ECO est le service qui facilite le quotidien des utilisateurs de véhicules électriques en proposant la meilleure expérience de recharge. Notre société s'appuie sur son expertise pour vous proposer de l'énergie avec une stratégie ouverte axée sur  la numération, la durabilité et l'innovation  en utilisant des technologies intelligentes, simples et rapides.

Name: Super Weston
Description:
Super Weston is the public-facing manifestation of Weston-super-Mare’s Placemaking Strategy,  an ambitious ten-year programme to reimagine Weston and help the town to become a healthier, greener and more prosperous place to live, work and play.   

Collaborative working is at the heart of this innovative strategy, which is being animated and delivered by a range of partners within the town.  The Super Weston vision looks well into the future, though it’s not just about what Weston can become when grand plans have been realised, but how Weston can change along the way.   

We are here to share the stories of that change and invite you to add your own energy to the story.

Name: LupLab
Description:
[PT]

O Local and Urban Proximity Lab (LupLab) é uma associação sem fins lucrativos que contribui para transformar indicadores territoriais em conhecimento com vista a criar cidades mais humanas e sustentáveis.

O LupLab disponibiliza uma solução digital inovadora que captura dados relevantes sobre a proximidade urbana, de forma a compreender como os territórios funcionam e a apoiar políticas baseadas em evidência.

O LupLab contribui para a resposta aos grandes desafios das cidades, promovendo a justiça social, a neutralidade carbónica e a qualidade de vida das populações.

---

[EN]

The Local and Urban Proximity Lab (LupLab) is a non-profit association that turns territorial indicators into knowledge to help create more sustainable, people-centred cities.

LupLab offers an innovative digital solution that captures unique data on urban proximity in order to understand how territories function and support evidence-based policies.

LupLab contributes to addressing the major challenges faced by cities, promoting social justice, carbon neutrality and quality of life for populations.

---

Name: Asset-Based Community Development Institute
Description: The Asset-Based Community Development Institute (ABCDI) is a 501(c)3 nonprofit membership organization that supports a global network of community-based practitioners. Our members consider local assets as the primary building blocks of sustainable community development. Building on the skills of local residents, the power of local groups, and the supportive functions of local organizations, asset-based community development draws upon existing community strengths to build stronger, more resilient communities for the future.

Name: qoob
Description:
qoob - is an innovative smart solution designed to modernize urban infrastructures.

qoob - is a multifunctional pod offering a private space in public places for in-person or online meetings, individual workspace, or simply a retreat to unwind.

Ideal for high-traffic locations like city centers, business parks, universities, airports, railway stations, and shopping malls, qoob plays a prior role in advancing urban development.

Committed to the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDG), our Berlin-based startup, founded in 2022, contributes to a sustainable ecosystem through the culture of place sharing.

Name: WIR STADTPLANER IN NRW
Description:
Die Kollegengruppe WIR STADTPLANER IN NRW ist seit 1995 ein Zusammenschluss von Stadtplanerinnen und Stadtplanern der Berufsverbände SRL, IfR und BDA.

WIR STADTPLANER IN NRW vertreten die Belange unseres Berufsstandes in der Architektenkammer NRW und verschaffen den Stadtplanerinnen und Stadtplanern in der größeren Gruppe der Architekten nachhaltig Gehör. Wir haben als größte Kollegengruppe der Stadtplaner Vertreter in alle relevanten Fachausschüsse der Architektenkammer entsandt, um dort die Interessen der Stadtplanerinnen und Stadtplaner einzubringen.

Name: Münchner Gesellschaft für Stadterneuerung mbH (MGS)
Description: Sanierungstreuhänderin und Energieagentur für die Landeshauptstadt München

Name: Transforming Agriculture Through Diversification and Entrepreneurship (TRADE) Programme
Description: TRADE Programme Overall goal is to contribute to sustainable improved livelihood of rural people in Malawi

Name: KC APA - Kansas City Section American Planning Association
Description: The Kansas City Section is a regional organization of planning professionals. Its members belong to the Missouri and Kansas Chapters of APA and the National APA. Our local section benefits an eleven county area surrounding Kansas City in two states. Our members come from a wide variety of planning and land development backgrounds, including private, public and non-for-profit spheres. The Kansas City Section is led by a nine member elected board.

Name: Carnegie Management & Development Corporation
Description:
Carnegie Management and Development Corporation is a Woman owned, diversified real estate development and management company, that has developed, owns and manages several million square feet of improved real estate consisting of residential, retail, office, governmental and environmental, as well as waterfront and special use properties. 

Carnegie began in 1984 as a Design-Build company, since Carnegie’s inception, we have expanded into a full-service real estate development and management company, with its focus on long term asset-based growth. The Company functions with a highly efficient team to locate, research, acquire, develop and manage real estate assets with the goal of creating a diverse, financially solid portfolio of properties that outperforms its peers over the life of each asset.

Name: Studio OfM - Orte für Menschen
Description: Studio OfM vereint soziale und planerische Kompetenzen, um eine umfassende Begleitung von menschenorientierten Raumentwicklungsprojekten zu ermöglichen.

Name: NZ LIMASSOL 2030
Description:
The Limassol Municipality participates in the European Mission: 100 Climate Neutral and Smart Cities by 2030. 

The Municipality will develop a Climate City Contract, which will include an overall plan for climate neutrality across all sectors such as energy, buildings, waste management and transport, together with related investment plans. 

This preparation of the Climate City Contract process will involve citizens, research organisations and the private sector. The clear and visible commitments made by the cities in the Climate City Contracts will enable them to engage with the EU, national and regional authorities – and most importantly with their own citizens to deliver on this ambitious objective.

Name: Beta - Timișoara Architecture Biennial
Description:
Beta (Timișoara Architecture Biennial) is a cultural project of the Romanian Order of Architects – Timiș Territorial Branch, organized by a dedicated team. Beta is currently on its 6th edition. Beta is the main architecture event in Western Romania, with an international influence, being in collaboration with neighbouring countries Serbia and Hungary, and a part of the  European architecture platform LINA. 
Beta reflects our determination, as a team and as a professional organization, to change the way people understand and appreciate the built environment.

In general terms, Beta consists of two structuring levels: an identity level – linked with the general theme of each edition of the biennial, and a second one – in relation to the biennial main objectives, grouped by the categories Education, Profession, City.

Name: Canter Town Planning
Description:
Canter Town Planning is a trusted Melbourne-based town planning consultancy specializing in a wide range of town planning services for residential, commercial, and mixed-use developments. With years of experience in the industry, our expert Melbourne town planners provide comprehensive advice and strategic solutions to guide you through every stage of the permit process.

Service Areas:
Canter Town Planning proudly serves clients across Melbourne and the greater Victoria region. We provide expert town planning services in key suburbs and areas such as: Brimbank, Casey, Dandenong, Frankston, Geelong, Hobsons Bay, Hume, Kingston, Knox, Maroondah, Melton, Monash, Mornington, and more.

Comprehensive Architectural Solutions
Canter Town Planning offers expert architectural design tailored to your needs. Our team of architects and draftspeople work closely with you to create innovative, functional designs that meet your vision and regulatory requirements. Whether residential, commercial, or mixed-use, we bring your project to life with precision and creativity.

Collaborative Approach with Specialist Consultants
We take a holistic, multidisciplinary approach to development, collaborating with expert consultants to ensure the best outcomes. Our partners include:
Environmental Consultants: For sustainable, eco-conscious solutions.
Traffic Engineers: To optimize traffic flow and ensure smooth transportation.
Heritage Advisors: To preserve and integrate historical elements into new projects.
Civil Engineers: Addressing infrastructure and public works challenges.
Landscape Architects: Designing functional and aesthetically pleasing outdoor spaces.

Your Project, Our Commitment
Canter Town Planning delivers high-quality, professional services from start to finish. With our expertise and support, we guide your project through every stage, ensuring it meets and exceeds your expectations.

Name: Community Development Institute Texas (CDI Texas)
Description:
CDI Texas provides practical, interactive, and comprehensive training designed to meet the needs of economic and community development professionals working in a fast-paced environment. Community development is a group effort and CDI Texas training builds the capacity of individuals and communities to impact economic and social development effectively and positively. Attendees also expand their ability to identify community assets, set goals, encourage collaboration, and respond to a broad range of economic and quality-of-life issues.

CDI Texas 2023 is set for March 6-9 and Advanced CDI is on March 8-9, 2023. 
For the 2023 curriculum and registration, visit https://www.lonestar.edu/CDI

Name: Propreco
Description:
Hos Proprecco har vi mange års erfaring, og har specialiseret os i projektudvikling og asset management af fast ejendom med fokus på grunde, ejendomme og bydele. Vi dækker alle segmenter inden for ejendomsforvaltning og -udvikling og prioriterer tværfaglige samarbejder og bred interessenthåndtering for at sikre høj kvalitet fra idé til færdigt projekt.
Vi betragter by- og ejendomsudvikling som en fælles indsats og sætter skræddersyede teams baseret på projektets karakter. Dette sikrer specialiseret viden, tværfaglighed og fleksibilitet. Vores mål er at skabe bæredygtige løsninger, der forbedrer livskvaliteten og det byggede miljø, i samarbejde med partnere, der deler vores værdier og engagement.

Name: INNOV'DEV
Description:
Cabinet INNOV’DEV est un Groupement d’Intérêt Économique immatriculé au RCCM de Kaolack sous le numéro SN.KLK.2025. C.6033 du 21/11/ 2025, avec le NINEA 012628436. Il est  spécialisé dans le développement local, accompagne les acteurs publics, privés et associatifs dans la transformation de leurs défis territoriaux en opportunités de développement durable. Grâce à une équipe de jeunes professionnels diplômés et expérimentés, nous proposons un appui stratégique intégré couvrant les études de terrain, le coaching territorial, le montage et le pilotage de projets, ainsi que des diagnostics institutionnels et organisationnels, des enquêtes de terrains, de la cartographique.

Notre approche s’appuie sur des outils numériques avancés, une méthodologie rigoureuse et des valeurs d’innovation, de transparence et d’efficacité. Nous visons à devenir un partenaire de référence pour les organisations engagées dans le développement territorial, en leur offrant des solutions sur mesure, fondées sur une analyse fine des contextes locaux et une collaboration durable.

Name: Habitat Norge
Description:
Habitat Norway is a Norwegian non-governmental organization, established in 1988, with the overall aim to promote the interest and awareness of global urban challenges and settlement issues.

Important topics for Habitat Norway are sustainable development, local participation and improving the living conditions of poor slum dwellers, with special emphasis on gender equality and youth issues. Habitat Norway conducts information exchanges and increase competence on global and urban poverty issues in Norwegian urban development arenas, and in foreign and development policy, through an interdisciplinary and international network.

Habitat Norway is a thematic department of the Norwegian Housing and Urban Planning Association (NBOBY), voluntarily affiliated with the Habitat International Coalition (HIC) and the UN Habitats World Urban Campaign (WUC). Habitat Norway also has an ongoing collaboration with urban grassroots organizations such as Slum Dwellers International (SDI), Asian Coalition for Housing Rights (ACHR), Huairou Commission (Huairo), Orangi Pilot Project (OPP) etc. The Cities Alliance and the World Bank’s urban anchor are close partners. Habitat Norway is also a member of the Forum for Development and the Environment (FORUM) and participates in the network «Organizations with a framework agreement on information support with NORAD» (RORG).

Name: NextGen Urban Link Hub

NGU-Link Hub stands for Next Generation Urban Hub. It is a hub based in Rwanda that brings together Urban planners, technology providers, governments, Communities and other stakeholders to share knowledge, resources, and strategies to address next-generation urban challenges. The hub was started in 2024 by the certified junior urban planners from Rwanda Urban Planners Institute (RUPI).
2.	Vision
Our vision is to create a global ecosystem where urban planners, technology innovators, governments, communities, and stakeholders work hand-in-hand to design cities that are smarter, more sustainable, and inclusive.
3.	Mission
Our mission is to serve as an international hub that connects young city planners, technology providers, governments, communities, and other key stakeholders to collaboratively share knowledge, resources, and strategies in order to build resilient, inclusive, and smart cities for future generations.
4.	Value

Prioritizing teamwork and cooperation among diverse stakeholders to create holistic solutions for urban development.
•	Innovation: 
Embracing cutting-edge technology and forward-thinking strategies to address the evolving challenges of urbanization.
•	Sustainability: 
Committing to sustainable practices that ensure the well-being of communities and the environment in urban planning. 
•	Excellent: 
We strive to exceed expectations by consistently pursuing superior performance, continuous improvement, and impactful urban solutions that shape the future. 
5.	Objectives
•	To establish a collaborative platform for urban planners, technology providers, governments, communities, and other stakeholders to share expertise, best practices, and innovative strategies for tackling next-generation urban challenges.
•	To enable the pooling and optimization of resources from various sectors to create efficient and sustainable solutions for urban development, enhancing the synergy between technological advancements a

Name: Podcast Miastologicznie
Description:
Pierwszy w Polsce podcast o tematyce Smart City, prowadzony przez praktyków - Piotra Hołubowicza, Aleksandra Orłowskiego i Szymona Ciupę.
Rozmawiamy o wyzwaniach, realizacji, technologiach, społecznościach, finansowaniu i wszystkich zagadnieniach inteligentnych miast. Zapraszamy gości, którzy pokazują żywe wdrożenia i wpływ na miasta, w których były realizowane.

Name: Ekistics Planning Consultancy
Description:
Ekistics Planning Consultancy is a leading Urban Planning firm based in Jaipur, dedicated to creating sustainable, efficient, and vibrant urban spaces. Our experienced team of urban planners, architects, and engineers works collaboratively to deliver comprehensive planning solutions tailored to the unique needs of each community.

With a strong emphasis on sustainable development, our services range from infrastructure and land use planning to transportation and urban design. We pride ourselves on our innovative approach and client-centered methodology, ensuring that every project we undertake not only meets but exceeds expectations.

Our vision is to shape cities into functional, beautiful, and harmonious environments where communities can thrive. Join us on our mission to build better urban futures and stay connected with our latest projects and insights.

Name: The Urban Solutions
Description:

We are a leading urban planning and urban design company specializing in zoning, master planning, urban design, smart city initiatives, project management, and construction services for prestigious clients. Urban Solutions is at the forefront of shaping the future lifestyles of Pakistanis by designing vibrant communities today. As the foremost urban planning consultancy firm in Pakistan, we possess the expertise to meet any requirement, whether it's designing a small walkable neighborhood or master planning an entire region. Our focus extends from envisioning smart growth to implementing transit-oriented developments. Urban Solutions is committed to ensuring a secure urban future for Pakistan through top-notch physical planning services

Vision:

Name: CirculateBLACK
Description:
CirculateBLACK is a new platform built to encourage circulating wealth in the Black Community.  We exist to promote greater levels of commerce in our culture and in our communities in order to participate more in the American dream by supporting our own just as others have done for their own.  The power to build infrastructure from within is greater when we have revenue in circulation to facilitate exponential growth.

We encourage membership, participation, engagement and contributions on all levels, and our platform is open to all who see and support the vision.  Although anyone is welcome to join, we stand to promote resources first and foremost to the underserved Black Community, thus helping to keep dollars circulating in the Black Community longer in an effort to help solidify a strong financial foundation for building infrastructure and wealth from within.

Name: Landesgartenschau 2027 Neustadt an der Weinstraße gGmbH
Description:
In Neustadt ist die eigens gegründete Landesgartenschau 2027 Neustadt an der Weinstraße gGmbH verantwortlich für die Planung und Umsetzung der grünen Vision. Anteilseigner sind die Projektgesellschaft Landesgartenschau Rheinland-Pfalz mbH und die Stadt Neustadt an der Weinstraße.

Die LGS Neustadt plant und realisiert zum einen den Landschaftspark, der die Stadt nach 2027 langfristig bereichern wird. Der Baubeginn dieser Maßnahmen wird in der zweiten Jahreshälfte 2024 sein. Des weiteren will sie mit floristischen Highlights und Gartenkultur, großen Konzerten und kleinen Events, Kultur, Kunst und Naturerlebnis Einheimische und Gäste begeistern und die Landesgartenschau 2027 zu einem einzigartigen Sommerfest machen.

Name: Something Collective
Description:
Something Collective is passionate about helping to realise places that are full of local influences, culture, and life. 

We are experts in identifying where collaborative discussions between built environment professionals and stakeholders can inspire real value.
As a company, we have a deep understanding of the connection between people and places and our aim is to build creative collaborations which can inform both plans for the physical environment and the experience of public life, inspiring change that is deliverable, sustainable, socially minded and, most importantly, shared.

Our approach is one that involves communities in meaningful dialogue and the process of driving positive change to create better places and lasting legacies.
We believe that the future of our cities should be Something Collective.

Name: UF Student Planning Association
Description:
The Student Planning Association (SPA) is a student-run, faculty-supported organization within UF’s Department of Urban and Regional Planning (URP). SPA’s goal is to cultivate relationships and professional development for students by connecting them to university faculty and professionals, creating networks for burgeoning urban planners. All students in the URP program, and any student interested in planning, are eligible members and are welcome to become involved throughout their studies. 

SPA is devoted to engaging students in a variety of ways, including hosting guest speakers from the planning profession, AICP prep workshops, field trips to explore walkable towns and effective public transit, group bicycle rides along Gainesville’s Hawthorne Trail, volunteering at Grace Marketplace, and more.

Name: Tuscarawas County Economic Development Corp.
Description: The Tuscarawas Economic Development Corporation is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization dedicated to strengthening the economy in Tuscarawas County. The EDC provides a wide range of financial tools, economic development resources, and information to commercial businesses and builders in the county.  The EDC manages the Economic Development & Finance Alliance (EDFA) and Community Improvement Corporation (CIC) of Tuscarawas County, serving as your one point of contact for economic development!

Nossa missão é unir pessoas e instituições generosas que acreditam no poder da transformação de vidas por meio do impulsionamento de projetos sociais voltados para acolher pessoas em vulnerabilidade social e no investimento em projetos voltados para o esporte, a saúde, a cultura e educação, formando crianças, adolescentes e jovens, independentemente de sua origem ou condição socioeconômica, a fim de se tornarem líderes inspiradores. Atualmente, estamos realizando diversos projetos e ações em várias regiões do Brasil e na África.

Dat zijn de gemeente Amsterdam, projectontwikkelaars, woningcorporaties , ondernemers en bewoners (van omliggende wijken). De transformatie van dit industriële gebied start in 2022 en duurt waarschijnlijk 20 jaar.
