Name: Oak and Stone Development
Description:
Oak and Stone is a Native American Owned Owner's Representative Company. We provide a "one source" portal of communication for project and construction management from general contractor, operator, funding source, and governmental agencies to the Owners.
Our main objective is, to get results in best interest of the Owner's budgetary and operational goals. We will guide Owner's through the process of developing and building their project, by reviewing and recommending strategies of budget, location schematics, access, surrounding infrastructure, estimated project schedule, and estimated project scheduling.

Name: Mushroom World Academy(MWA)
Description:
Our core mission is to empower individuals with special needs and those facing economic challenges by providing them with the essential skills and tools for an improved quality of life. Our approach is both therapeutic and holistic, centering on mindfulness and life skills development.

Through our programs, participants gain not just skills but also the prospect of Opportunity, Livelihood, and Ownership in the realm of mushroom cultivation. The acquired skills open doors to enhanced income and increased employment prospects through our initiatives.

Courses & Workshops:
Explore our comprehensive mushroom cultivation courses designed for the general public, industry professionals, schools, and polytechnics. We also specialize in tailoring workshops and events to meet the specific needs of corporate clients.

Urban Farming and Innovation Center:
Nestled within Punggol Container Park, our urban mushroom farm and innovation center serve as a dynamic hub where urban living seamlessly merges with the art and science of mushroom cultivation. Here, we foster innovation and offer transformative experiences, contributing to a sustainable and empowered community.

Name: LeAn GmbH
Description:
LeAn ist DER Werkzeugkasten für die Vitalisierung der Innenstädte.

Wir unterstützen Kommunen bei:
-	Verwaltung von Bestandsflächen
-	Leerstandsmanagement
-	Ansiedlungsmanagement
-	Zentrenmanagement

Das Herststück unseres Werkzeugkastens ist die Softwarelösung LeAn. 

Die datenschutzkonforme Webanwendung
-	erleichtert die Bestandsflächenverwaltung,
-	liefert einen aktuellen Überblick über Immobilienbesatz und (drohende Leerstände),
-	enthält ein Dashboard mit umfangreichen relevanten Daten zu Umfeld und Nutzbarkeit der Immobilie und
-	erfasst Ansiedlungsgesuche für eine stadtindividuelle Ansiedlungssteuerung. 

Über die Kernfunktionen unserer Softwarelösung hinaus stehen euch noch weitere Werkzeuge zur Vitalisierung eurer Städte zur Verfügung. Ihr entscheidet, ob ihr diese in der Kombination mit der Softwarelösung oder unabhängig davon nutzen wollt.

LeAn passt sich an die örtlichen Bedürfnisse eurer Kommune an und hilft euch dabei, negative Entwicklungen nicht nur zu stoppen, sondern vorherzusehen – damit eure Innenstädte lebendig und attraktiv werden und bleiben.

Lasst uns gemeinsam loslegen und zukunftsfähige Zentren gestalten!


Hervorgegangen ist LeAn im Jahr 2023 aus dem Projekt "Stadtlabore für Deutschland: Leerstand und Ansiedlung". Das Projekt wurde vom Bundesministerium für Wirtschaft und Klimaschutz gefördert (08/2021 bis 12/2022).

Name: Pacific Land Group
Description:
Pacific Land Group (PLG) is an experienced multidisciplinary land-use consulting firm focused on delivering creative and effective solutions for complex land planning, development and environmental issues. Our expertise also includes, but is not limited to, land development and approvals, feasibility studies, Sensitive Ecosystem Development Plans and Permits (SEDP/DP3), engineering design and construction, topographic surveys, and Erosion and Sediment Control (ESC). We represent both public- and private-sector clients on a variety of planning, zoning and environmental matters.

PLG takes pride in making connections and excels at creating lasting relationships with our clients. We utilize our team’s diversity and capitalize on our individual strengths to provide our clients deeper insights and better solutions to complex land use and environmental challenges. Our flexible structure and interconnected departments enables us to have the right individuals directly involved in every project to provide tailored solutions to each client.

Name: DASUDA
Description:
About DASUDA Foundation
Transforming African Cities Through Collaboration

At DASUDA Foundation, we believe that well-designed, sustainable cities are the cornerstone of Africa’s future. Since 2013, we have supported urban development by bringing together professionals from various disciplines to help communities grow in a practical and resilient way.

Collaborative approach
Our work is rooted in cooperation. Five core strategic partners form the foundation of our network. Beyond this, we collaborate with local community organisations, whose practical knowledge is invaluable, as well as international experts, research institutes and organisations that contribute specialist insight and experience.

Integrated Urban Solutions
We address a wide range of urban challenges—from long-term planning to project delivery. Our expertise includes architecture and spatial design, environmental planning, mobility, flood resilience, affordable housing, and finance. 

Ready to Shape Tomorrow’s Cities?
Improving cities requires joint effort. Whether you are a partner, stakeholder or simply interested in urban development in Africa, we welcome cooperation. Together, we can work towards more liveable and future-ready cities.

Company Details:
	•	Website: www.dasuda.nl
	•	Industry: Architecture and Planning
	•	Size: 51-200 employees | 2 associated members
	•	Headquarters: Amsterdam, North Holland
	•	Type: Partnership
	•	Founded: 2013
Core Specialties: Visioning & Strategy | Master Planning | Urban Development | Architecture | Landscape Design | Spatial Economic & Investment Strategies | GIS | Environment | Sustainability | Energy | Water and engineering | Mobility | Finance advisory | Affordable Housing

Name: Stardust Development
Description:
Our vision is rooted in the belief that real estate is not just about constructing buildings; it's about crafting innovative environments that inspire, connect, and endure. Stardust Development strives to be the trailblazing force in real estate development, transcending mere plots of land into thriving businesses and flourishing communities.  Through thoughtful planning, cutting-edge design, and strategic partnerships, our commitment is to redefine the landscape. Not just in terms of architecture but in shaping environments that foster connection, well-being, and enduring value. Join us as we unveil tomorrow's skyline. Let’s craft dreams into realities. Your dream is our adventure. 

Adventures Aligned.

Name: Venice Urban Lab
Description:
ABOUT US
We are an independent civic organisation that deals with sustainable city transformation processes with a holistic and multidisciplinary approach.

OUR OBJECTIVES
To contribute to the creation of a community of thinkers and designers that generates qualified and qualifying job opportunities for young people to stay or come and live in Venice;

Nurture with the practice of interdisciplinary design, confrontation and exchange of knowledge to promote a culture of public and private clients aligned with the best practices of the Urban Agenda 2030, the European Green Deal, and with the New European Bauhaus

CHI SIAMO
Siamo un'organizzazione civica indipendente che si occupa dei processi di trasformazione sostenibile della città con un approccio olistico e multidisciplinare.

I NOSTRI OBIETTIVI
Contribuire a creare una comunità di pensatori e progettisti che generi occasioni lavorative qualificate e qualificanti ai giovani per rimanere o venire ad abitare a Venezia;

Alimentare con la pratica della progettazione interdisciplinare, il confronto e lo scambio di conoscenza per promuovere una cultura della committenza pubblica e private allineata alle migliori pratiche della Agenda Urbana 2030, del European Green Deal, e al New European Bauhaus

Name: Living-Inn
Description:
Een zorgeloze toekomst start bij Living-Inn
Living-Inn is een woonzorgconcept waar senioren en starters veilig een zorgeloze toekomst tegemoet gaan. Een fijne woonomgeving waar ontmoeten centraal staat. Zorgeloos samen genieten, omringd door vele voorzieningen. Met aandacht voor elkaar bouwen jong en oud hier aan het goede leven.

De 4 pijlers van Living-Inn
1. Zekerheid en aandacht
Een veilige plek voor bewoners en omwonenden waar een ieder naar elkaar omkijkt. Zorg krijgt vorm, met zekerheid en aandacht, op basis van het huiskamerconcept. Alles is gericht op het voorkomen van het fysiek scheiden van echtparen wanneer zich een zorgbehoefte voordoet. Jong en oud hebben aandacht voor elkaar en bieden elkaar een veilige sociale woonomgeving. 

2. Leefgenot
Het leefgenot wordt vergroot door de goede ligging, groene omgeving en goede bereikbaarheid. Naast de inpandige voorzieningen liggen de winkels op loopafstand en is er een openbaar vervoer-verbinding nabij. Met een gastvrije uitstraling is Living-Inn de ideale plek om te wonen. De appartementen zijn licht, modern en van alle gemakken voorzien. 

3. Community
Jong en oud wonen en leven samen om het elkaar zo aangenaam mogelijk te maken. Een plek waar je aandacht hebt voor elkaar, iets voor elkaar wilt doen en naar elkaar omkijkt. Samen een ommetje maken, een voetbalwedstrijd bijwonen, boodschappen doen of een uurtje voorleesoma zijn. Anonimiteit kent Living-Inn niet. 

4. Faciliteiten en voorzieningen
We hebben mooie partners die zich gaan vestigen binnen Living-Inn, Hierdoor hebben bewoners vele faciliteiten en services in huis. Uiteraard staan de deuren van onze partners ook open voor omwonenden.

Name: BORDEAUX plus
Description:
BORDEAUX plus is an independent research and design studio dedicated to advancing knowledge and innovation in urban design and planning. The studio operates as a platform for ongoing PhD design-based research, exploring how perception, spatial form, aesthetics, and sensory experience shape mobility, well-being, and the everyday life of cities.

Through collaborations with universities, public institutions, and professional networks, BORDEAUX plus engages in theoretical and applied research that informs contemporary urban practice. Its work emphasizes critical inquiry, interdisciplinary exchange, and the translation of academic insights into actionable urban strategies.

Name: Utah Alliance for Economic Development
Description: The Utah Alliance for Economic Development is committed to growing Utah's economy by providing our membership in both the public and private sectors with effective professional development and networking opportunities.

Name: ISP - Institut für Stadtforschung, Planung und Kommunikation
Description: Ziel des ISP ist es, nachhaltige Transformationsprozesse in Städten und Quartieren zu begleiten – gemeinsam mit den Akteur:innen, mit einem integrierten Ansatz und transdisziplinär. Im Fokus stehen Akteursperspektiven, Governancefragen und (crossmediale) Partizipation sowie Zukunftsfragen und Innovationen zu Themenfeldern wie Wohnen und Quartier, Klimaschutz und Klimaanpassung, Stadtgesundheit, Flächengerechtigkeit und Integration benachteiligter Bevölkerungsgruppen

Name: Club Urbanisme Architecture et Aménagement du Territoire-CUAA
The Economic Club of Tampa
Description: The Economic Club of Tampa provides a dynamic forum for business, professional, elected and community leaders to identify and discuss economic, social and political issues. The Club works to identify and assist upcoming young leaders as the torch passes from one generation to the next.

Name: Amaken Placemaking
Description:
The Network

“AMAKEN Placemaking” is a non-profit network acting as a platform to share knowledge, and opportunities and empower its members with an interest in upgrading and managing public spaces in the Arab-World to turn them into vibrant places according to the national and international norms and standards, and preserving the local identity. AMAKEN incorporates a group of architects, urban planners, landscape architects, designers, activists, public artists, and government experts. They are facilitators and initiators of activities and programs that help the people transform spaces into places. Their experiences vary in depth and cover a wide range of specialities related to urban development. “Amaken Placemaking” is part of the global network “PlacemakingX” and works closely with Placemaking Europe Netowrk.

Mission
Our mission is to understand, promote and celebrate what makes great places and to apply these lessons to the improvement of towns and cities across the Arab world and beyond.

Vision
Places for life

Name: BYLERO AB
Description: Bylero är konsulter för hållbara samhällsbyggnadsprojekt. Företaget har varit verksamt i snart 50 år med bygg-och projektledning. Bylero arbetar mycket långsiktigt med både kunder och personal. Flera av våra kunder har vi haft sedan starten 1970. Vi har idag ca 50 anställda konsulter med gedigen kompetens. Våra medarbetare ska kännetecknas av att alltid ge en personlig och snabb service.

Name: BJØRK Innovation
Description:
At BJØRK, we put partnerships first. We believe in collaboration between people, organizations and sectors as the key to creating concrete and sustainable results.

We are innovation managers and our methodology for cross-sector collaboration provides a safe arena to tackle complex challenges in local communities.

We work with small and medium sized Nordic municipalities, publicly owned ports and energy companies along with their local ecosystems. No matter how far you have reached or how many solar panels you have installed, we are driven by making a difference together with you.

The programs are based on close collaboration between the municipality, academia, businesses and inhabitants – all the way from problem formulation and idea generation to project implementation and full scale realization.

Name: Community Planning Collaborative
Description: Community Planning Collaborative (Baird + Driskell Community Planning) exists to do good in the world. People and policies matter and we care deeply about both. We partner with community groups, organizations and governments to build sustainable and equitable communities.

Name: Zephyr Foundation for Advancing Travel Analysis
Description: The Foundation’s mission is to advance rigorous transportation and land use decision-making for the public good by advocating for, facilitating, and supporting improved travel analysis and forecasting methods.

Name: MarCon Teknik AB
Description: Marcon Teknik AB är ett företag verksamma inom det marina. Vi har över 40 år i sjömätning och dykinspektions branschen. Vi är specialister inom vårt område. Det som kännetecknar oss är kompetens, kunden i fokus, korta beslutsvägar och kvalitet.

Name: Sheltech Consultants (Pvt.) Ltd.
Description: Sheltech Consultants is a well-established consulting firm with diverse experience of consultancy services since 1990. We are maintaining our reputation by providing satisfactory services to varied clients and donors. Our main area of expertise is Urban Planning, Engineering, Architectural and Urban Design, GIS and Remote Sensing, Social and Environmental Studies, Marketing and Management etc. We are closely linked with urban development in various towns and cities of Bangladesh.

Name: SUTHAR INDUSTRY
Description:
Web development is the process of creating websites or web applications. At its core, it involves three main parts:

1. Frontend – What users see and interact with, built using HTML (structure), CSS (design), and JavaScript (behavior).


2. Backend – Handles data and logic behind the scenes, using languages like Python, PHP, or Node.js, and databases like MySQL or MongoDB.


3. Hosting & Deployment – Making the site live on servers so users can access it.



The logic is simple: Frontend displays → Backend processes → Database stores → Server delivers. Understanding this flow is the key to web development.

Name: Empower Tomorrow Innscor Africa Limited
Description:
Empower Tomorrow, powered by the publicly listed Innscor Africa Limited, stands at the forefront of driving transformative change within communities across Zimbabwe. Innscor, renowned for its significant footprint in the Light Manufacturing sector of Fast Moving Consumer Goods, extends its commitment to societal progress through this initiative. With a keen focus on environmental sustainability, community development, and entrepreneurship, Empower Tomorrow embodies the ethos of creating a sustainable future for all.

Our mission is to harness the power of innovation, collaboration, and empowerment to uplift and transform communities, particularly in areas where Innscor operates. By integrating our efforts in environmental sustainability, we aim to foster a harmonious relationship between businesses and people.

In the realm of community development, our initiatives are designed to bolster the social fabric, enhance quality of life, and promote inclusivity. Furthermore, our entrepreneurship programs are tailored to ignite the spirit of innovation, providing the tools, resources, and support necessary for aspiring entrepreneurs to thrive and contribute to economic growth. Together, we can create a legacy of positive change, one community at a time.

Name: City Layers
Description:
City Layers makes it effortless to involve communities in urban design, planning, and strategy.

Our digital mapping tools measure how places work for people — and turn that input into actionable place intelligence. Putting people's knowledge on the map, City Layers transforms how cities and built environment professionals understand places and design with communities. 

Built on years of participatory research and over 10 urban mapping projects across Europe, City Layers bridges the gap between community knowledge and urban decision-making. With us, lived experience becomes measurable evidence, helping cities, planners, and architects shape more climate-resilient and socially responsible places – together with people.

Name: I Foro Emprendimiento Rural
Description:
I Foro de Emprendimiento Rural | Galicia 12-13 Diciembre 2024 | Hotel OCA Vila Allariz

info@foroemprendimientorural.eu

Organiza: Fundación Roberto Rivas

Name: echo architects
Description:
At echo Architects, we help designers and developers create urban spaces that are inclusive, human-centered, and welcoming for everyone.

We provide practical workshops, ready-to-use toolkits, and expert design reviews to empower teams to integrate inclusivity into their projects from the start — helping improve planning outcomes, community trust, and long-term success.

Our mission is simple: to make inclusive design accessible, achievable, and a natural part of every urban development.

Better cities are built when every voice is heard.
At Echo, we help make that possible.

Name: SAREMM
Description:
SAREMM pilote l’aménagement des quartiers d’habitat et des parcs d’activités économiques structurant la métropole messine, exclusivement pour le compte et sur le territoire des collectivités territoriales qui composent son actionnariat. Elle gère également la construction de bâtiments et d’équipements publics pour ces mêmes collectivités.

Les missions principales de SAREMM sont l’aménagement et la construction.

Name: Pragovka
Description:
A lively art centered district, seeking to create a collaborative environment and enabling a fruitful exchange of ideas among creative communities and to ultimately provide an exciting destination for Prague's creative scene and the general public.

We are home to many diverse kinds of creators: from painters, sculptors and furniture makers, to fashion designers and set builders, offering amazing industrial space rental possibilities for events, studios, exhibitions, film productions, video and photo shootings as well as commercial leases.

Pragovka grows into a unique create‑live‑work‑play destination. Along with the cultural events that have awakened this industrial area in recent years, Pragovka is now opening up to new possibilities and changing the shape of Prague as we know it. Preservation of historically valuable factory halls as well as an innovative approach by renowned architects and urban planners will together create an unparalleled neighbourhood, alive with creativity and art, offering something for everyone from flexible office space, leisure activities to educational and commercial premises as well as new housing concepts.

Name: Ledfram AB
Description: Vi leder vägen genom strukturerad planering, starkt teamarbete och kvalitet i varje steg. Våra projekt formar framtidens stadsmiljöer – smart, hållbart och tillsammans.

Name: Porta Diagonal
Description:
Un nuevo entorno urbano natural en Esplugues de Llobregat orientado a fomentar el cuidado y bienestar de las personas, potenciar la innovación y creación de conocimiento así como impulsar la regeneración y el desarrollo de la zona.

Oficinas corporativas, retail, alojamiento y centro de investigación, formación y asistencia biomédica.

Name: Youth and Urbanism
Description: Youth and Urbanism is a network of young people working to support youth-led urban community development initiatives and give marginalized groups the opportunity to participate in integrated activities geared toward proper urban planning that ensures quality living conditions and self-sufficiency in an effort to shape urbanism for children and young people.

Name: TAGUS - Ribatejo Interior
Description:
A TAGUS –  Associação para o Desenvolvimento Integrado do Ribatejo Interior - é uma entidade de direito privado sem fins lucrativos. 
Foi constituída em 26 de Novembro de 1993, fruto de uma parceria público-privada. 
Surgiu para dar resposta às necessidades de criação e aplicação de uma estratégia para o Desenvolvimento Local dos concelhos de Abrantes, Constância e Sardoal. É composta por entidades públicas e privadas da Região.

Missão
A TAGUS tem como objectivo primordial a promoção, apoio e realização de um aproveitamento mais racional das potencialidades dos concelhos de Abrantes, Constância, Sardoal e concelhos limítrofes, tendo em vista o desenvolvimento rural em todas as suas componentes e a melhoria das condições de vida das populações residentes.

Name: Audis - Associazione Aree Urbane Dismesse
Description: Audis - Associazione Aree Urbane Dismesse is a management consulting company based in Bologna

Name: Waymaker Consulting AB
Description:
Waymaker Consulting AB (Marcus Nordlund) erbjuder relationsfokuserad fastighetsutveckling och projektledning med fokus på tidiga skeden inom det kommunala gränssnittet.

Waymaker Consulting AB bildades 2022 och har sedan dess involverats i projekt i Huddinge, Malmö, Lomma och Trelleborg. 

Exempel på uppdrag kan vara att för en fastighetsägare driva en plan- eller tillståndsprocess, förhandla markanvisningsavtal, följa upp åtaganden eller på annat sätt vara  fastighetsägarens ansikte mot kommunen. 

Ett annat exempel på uppdrag är att för en kommunal beställare hålla ihop, skapa driv och balansera ett komplext utvecklingsprojekt med många fastighetsägare/byggaktörer - sköta förhandlingar, exploateringskalkyl och avtal.

Waymaker Consulting AB utgår får från Lomma i Skåne men arbetar inom Stockholm och Skåne. Underkonsultupplägg förekommer.

Name: Urban & Regional Insights Think Tank
Description:
Analytical content & insights on
Urban Studies | Regional Planning | Urban Economics | Public Policy

Promoting knowledge-based decision-making for sustainable and inclusive development

 Book & article reviews |  Short explainers |  Global policy case studies

Name: Association of Pedestrian and Bicycle Professionals (APBP) Ontario Chapter
Description: APBP is a community of practitioners working to create more walkable, bikeable places. We foster peer knowledge sharing, advance technical expertise, and support the professional development of our members who work in government, consulting firms, and in non-profit organizations in the fields of transportation planning and engineering, urban design and planning, public health and active living.

Name: Winkler Stanley Economic Development Corporation
Description:
The Winkler Stanley Economic Development Corporation was founded in 1959 as the “Winkler Industrial Development Co Ltd.” and in 2009 the RM of Stanley joined this corp. and it was changed to the current Winkler Stanley Economic Development Corporation, as both municipalities recognized that working together was imperative to help facilitate growth in the region as a whole.

We collaborate to advance opportunities in achieving economic success, embracing shared prosperity and building a strong community for Winkler/Stanley.

WSEDC works with business, government and community partners to position Winkler/Stanley as the location of choice for the purpose of attracting business investment, fostering trade and growing Winkler/Stanley’s workforce.

Name: WR Community Energy
Description:
WR Community Energy is a collaborative initiative between the Region of Waterloo, its urban municipalities and local utilities created to lead the implementation of Waterloo Region’s Community Energy Investment Strategy and to steward energy transition in our community.  

Our path to a new energy future is directed by the strategic oversight of high-level representatives from the Region of Waterloo, its 3 urban municipalities and 5 local electric and gas utilities. The innovative Governance Committee for WR Community Energy is a collaboration that takes us beyond the limits of the services that individual partners can provide.

Name: Ndogo farms limited
Description: At ndogo farms, we basically convert small spaces into gardens, to ensure that our clients have access to fresh and organically grown vegetables at the comfort of their own homes.  we do this by using vertical gardens, raised beds and grow bag gardening system. The gardens are made out of environmental friendly materials.  The gardens are easy to maintain and install.

Name: Tunnelfabrikken
Description:
The Tunnel Factory is a Copenhagen-based cultural hot spot with an international outlook. It originated as the birthplace of the tunnel elements connecting Copenhagen and Malmø. After er the thorough renovation, it will be giving room to art and food lovers, sustainable ideas, architects, startups, concerts, kids, students, grownups, innovative companies, urban farming, cultural events, and ordinary people like you and me…

Owned by NREP, By & Havn and Unionkul

Name: City Design Lab
Description:
At the City Design Lab, we operate at the intersection of design, planning and data to make informed decisions about the built environment in our City. As a multi-disciplinary team of architects, designers, and planners, our vision is:
     -to improve the quality of life for all residents and visitors;
     -revitalize and strengthen our community through inclusive community 
       engagement; and, 
     -strategic implementation of recent and ongoing citywide planning 
      initiatives.

Name: Shared City Foundation
Description:
Shared City Foundation är en oberoende insamlingsstiftelse som bygger långsiktig kapacitet för inkluderande och resilienta städer. Vi tillhandahåller praktiska verktyg och skapar plattformar för samverkan och kunskapsutbyte. 

Shared City verkar för att stärka marginaliserade gruppers ställning, förutsättningar och deltagande för urban utveckling över hela världen. Stiftelsen samarbetar med och stöttar organisationer från civilsamhället, offentlig- och privat sektor genom utbildning, processledning och nätverk för kunskapsbyggande och kunskapsutbyte. Vi hjälper beslutsfattare att tillsammans med medborgare finna innovativa urbana lösningar och göra rätt prioriteringar för hållbara städer för alla. 

Insamlingsstiftelsen Shared City är baserad i Sverige och bedriver insamlingsverksamhet via 90-konto registrerat hos Svensk Insamlingskontroll. Ett 90-konto är en kvalitetsstämpel för insamlingsorganisationer där all verksamhet bevakas för att säkerställa att den används för avsett ändamål utan orimliga omkostnader.

Name: Corver&Co.
Description:
Culturele of creatieve maatschappelijk projecten bedenken en ontwikkelen.
Op deze manier een bijdrage te kunnen leveren aan een stad of regio.

Name: Fundación Ciedes
Description: Somos una organización que trabajamos en la planificación estratégica y desarrollo urbano para hacer de Málaga la ciudad que soñamos: sostenibilidad, economía, cultura y tecnología.

Name: L'Atelier de l'Urbanisme
Description:
L’Atelier de l’Urbanisme vous accompagne tout au long de vos projets, depuis l’idée jusqu’à la livraison de votre dossier ou la réception de vos travaux.

Nous travaillons avec les acteurs publics, ainsi qu’avec les opérateurs privés, nous sommes en capacité de nous adapter aux règles, procédures et contraintes de chacun de nos clients.

La concertation de l’ensemble des partenaires sur projet, la mise en réseau des intervenants, et la synthèse de l’ensemble des avis reçus sont au cœur de nos préoccupations : nous pensons que la mise en musique de tous les acteurs et de tous les métiers de la « ville » sont les clés de la réussite d’un projet !

Name: District Works
Description:
Working closely with the leadership of your organization, District Works can help transform a blank space – often a street or a sidewalk – into an experience. We will help you expand the capacity of your organization to pull off any event. It might take a day, or a month, but we will get it done for and with you. Whatever your vision, District Works is here to help you execute it!

The project can take a day, and sometimes it can take a month, but the impact will last forever!

Name: E²ARTH
Description:
Les objectifs de développement durable sont un appel à l’action de tous les pays – pauvres, riches et à revenu intermédiaire – afin de promouvoir la prospérité tout en protégeant la planète. Ils reconnaissent que mettre fin à la pauvreté doit aller de pair avec des stratégies qui développent la croissance économique et répondent à une série de besoins sociaux, notamment l’éducation, la santé, la protection sociale et les possibilités d’emploi, tout en luttant contre le changement climatique et la protection de l’environnement (O.N.U)

 

E²ARTH ambitionne d’apporter en Région Bretagne, en France et à l'International sa pierre à l’édifice en l’inscrivant dans la globalité pour viser de manière très opérationnelle les objectifs du développement durable.

Name: UDENE
Description:
UDENE -U(rban) D(evelopment) E(xplorations) using N(atural) E(xperiments)- aims to build sustainable urban environments and address the challenges posed by the effects of climate change and increasing urbanisation in Europe and North Africa. 

Funded by the European Union and managed by the European Union Agency for the Space Programme (EUSPA), UDENE gathers 9 partners from 6 countries, including Tunisia, Turkey, Serbia, Italy, France, and Slovenia.

Name: IMPACCT BROOKLYN
Description: IMPACCT Brooklyn is one of Brooklyn's premier nonprofit community development corporations providing services borough-wide. Our organization works hand-in-hand with low- and moderate-income community members and stakeholders to preserve and develop affordable housing, promote commercial revitalization to strengthen local businesses, create homeownership opportunities, protect tenant rights, combat predatory lending practices and prevent home-loss. Founded as Pratt Area Community Council, Inc. nearly 60 years ago, IMPACCT Brooklyn now serves as a catalyst for neighborhood stabilization and revitalization with a focus on Central Brooklyn and has brought people together to build an equitable, diverse, engaged, and flourishing community.

Name: Think Place Agency
Description: Think Place Agency is a minority- and woman-owned place strategy group based in New York. Our Agency is committed to working closely with communities to tackle place-based challenges and develop innovative solutions. Our goal is to create transformative strategies that empower communities and drive positive change. With our expertise and collaborative approach, we help untangle complex issues, foster sustainable development, and build resilient communities.

Name: Friends of Gothenburg Innovation AB
Description:
Kraft att lyckas med omställningen. Städer och verksamheter behöver ställa om. Samtidigt är det svårt att förändra invanda mönster och tankesätt. Vi kan hållbarhet, har bred erfarenhet av förändringsarbete och bidrar med kunskap och kreativ energi.
FOG finns för att påskynda utvecklingen mot ett samhälle där alla människor kan leva gott inom planetens gränser. Vi är ett kreativt team med rötter i Göteborg. Vårt mål är utveckla organisationer, platser och nya modeller, strukturer och policy som driver på en hållbar samhällsomställning. Med kunskap, kreativitet och omtanke som värdegrund ihop med vår erfarenhet och förmåga att leda förändring hjälper vi våra kunder att ställa om.

Name: URBACT & EUI - France Luxembourg
Description:
Point de contact national des programmes européens URBACT et de l'Initiative urbaine européenne (EUI) de la France et du Luxembourg.  

Notre mission : favoriser le développement urbain durable grâce à deux programmes européens ouverts à toutes les collectivités locales. 

 URBACT vise à encourager le développement urbain intégré en Europe, via la mise en réseau des villes européennes autour d’échanges de bonnes pratiques et d’idées, le renforcement des compétences des acteurs locaux dans la conception et la mise en œuvre de politiques intégrées et participatives.
 L'Initiative urbaine européenne (European Urban Initiative) soutient des zones urbaines de toutes tailles grâce au financement d'actions innovantes, le renforcement des capacités, des connaissances, l'élaboration de politiques et la communication sur le développement urbain durable.

 Retrouvez sur cette page toutes les actualités des réseaux URBACT et EUI en français ainsi que toutes les informations utiles des deux programmes.

Le point de contact se trouve au sein de l'Agence nationale de la cohésion des territoires, à Paris. 

https://urbact.eu/france-et-luxembourg
https://www.urban-initiative.eu/urban-contact-points/france

Name: Lisbon Design Week
Description:
Lisbon Design Week (LDW) is a five-day celebration of creativity, innovation, and craftsmanship. As Portugal’s most anticipated design event, LDW connects Portuguese designers and artisans with a global audience of industry leaders, brands, and enthusiasts. Our mission is to elevate the contemporary craft and design sectors through immersive experiences, exhibitions, and networking opportunities. The festival serves as a platform for new talent and established professionals alike, showcasing Portugal’s rich creative heritage while fostering international collaboration.

Following two successful editions and major growth in 2024, LDW returns for its 3rd edition in May 2025, promising an even more dynamic and influential event. This is an opportunity for designers, businesses and sponsors to align with one of the fastest-growing cultural movements in Europe and engage with a forward-thinking, design-centric audience.

Name: Wild Streets
Description:
A 4D design tool for regenerative landscapes with co-design front and centre. We’re here to help create community led cityscapes.

The transformation towards sustainable and smart cities with minimum carbon footprints is, without a doubt, one of the greatest challenges of our time. There is an urgent need for more inclusion of civil society in this process. The idea of city dwellers co-creating their cities together with the private and public sector is on the rise with more and more cities across the world successfully involving people in planning decisions. Enhancement of nature in the urban image is often picked as a top priority.          

Wild Streets sets out to make the task of designing our cities’ green urban infrastructure a participatory project. The project comes at a time when political and public support for greening initiatives at all scales is increasing. Wild Streets aims to serve as a transformative facilitating tool for these projects and for the rapid transition towards a greener urban future. 

Wild Streets pushes the notion of what is possible in the world of city planning and citizens involvement in shaping the green cities of tomorrow—it offers an inclusive, fun, and innovative approach to trigger a green makeover of the cityscape by infusing the public with a new sense of ownership of their city, whilst making it more sustainable and liveable.

Name: Ebbepark
Description: Ebbepark is a central city district in Linköping, Sweden, with unique environments for smart living and sustainable growth. Characterized by its daring and caring atmosphere, Ebbepark enables the sharing of resources between residents and businesses, with everything that makes living and working a little bit easier always close at hand.

Name: BNN Consulting and Engineering Ltd
Description:
BNN Danışmanlık ve Mühendislik, 2017 yılında Kamu Sektörünün ulaşım alanında ihtiyaçlarına özel tasarım, proje yönetimi, kontrollük, kalite, güvence ve kontrol hizmetleri vermek üzere kurulmuştur. Ayrıca BNN, projelenin hazırlanmasında ve uygulanmasında sürdürülebilirlik ilkelerini temel alan ve tüm insanların refahını önemseyen bir tutum izlemektedir.

BNN, ihale dokümanlarının hazırlanması, proje yönetimi, kontrollük, kalite kontrol, bilirkişi değerlendirmesi, teklif değerlendirmesi ve denetim ile ilgilenmektedir.  Firma, projelendirme, fizibilite ve çevresel etki değerlendirme çalışmaları, teknik tasarım ve çevre kontrol çalışmalarında geniş deneyime sahiptir.

Name: KÉK-Kortárs Építészeti Központ / Contemporary Architecture Centre
Description:
KÉK – Hungarian Contemporary Architecture Centre is an independent professional institution focusing on architecture, cities, and urban culture. Through its unique knowledge, broad experience, and extended partnership network, KÉK plays a key role in today’s Central European architectural scene.

KÉK projects include exhibitions, conferences, workshops, architecture tours, and festivals as well as research and consulting. In recent years, KÉK has been involved in various urban regeneration programs from running community gardens to creating development strategies and managing their implementation. The organization provides Hungarian materials for international architecture databases and contributes to professional education as well.

Name: SCOOPMAN
Description:
SCOOPMAN was created as the results of an association known as ODEFCOM, whose primary goal was to foster rural development and SCOOPMAN has firm grounds and stands in the community of Mbalmayo and over the years, we have rooted ourselves to serve the community and to promote equity and beyong women empowerment, that which has given us  an upper hand when it comes to the development of the agricultural sector and local sector at large. Some of our core objectives are
	Empowerment of youths and most particularly the girl child, which is the fifth goal out of the 17 Sustainable Development goals.
	Attain agricultural sustainability through the promotion of good agricultural practices
	Promote local transformation.
	Promotion of agroecological practices

Name: Winter
Description: Winter is a growing leader in Bay Area community outreach and stakeholder engagement striving for sustainable and equitable transportation for all. Our team brings 45 years of combined experience engaging diverse stakeholders—from city and transit agency staff and elected officials to community leaders, business representatives, and folks from the general public. We specialize in reaching voices historically left out of the planning process through our network of CBO partnerships and community relationships forged over two decades.

Name: Urban Green Deals
Description:
Citizens worldwide are increasingly taking the lead in tackling urgent challenges in their neighborhoods. This paradigm shift follows the government’s monopoly on service provision and, in more recent years, the domination of market forces. 

To achieve sustainable results citizens need methods, data and structural financing. The challenge is to make every voice count while taking on entrenched urban governance systems & processes designed for a different time. That starts and ends with community building and local ownership of spaces. Underlying this is data and digital tools.

Name: Shannon Community Partnership
Description: Shannon Community Partnership is a community development and advocacy body which advocates for the sustainable, inclusive and holistic development of Shannon Town, promotes collaboration and innovation, and empowers individuals and organisations to actively contribute to the growth and well‐being of our shared community.

Name: DriveDrop
Description:
DriveDrop represents a cutting-edge solution in urban mobility, offering an exclusive service through an app that efficiently connects those in search of parking with parkings ready to increase their earnings.

A digital platform that allows for real-time bookings, ensuring constant updates on availability and prices, as well as offering the option to reserve a space in advance.

Intuitive, easy, and fast to use, designed with the needs of both parties in mind, DriveDrop simplifies the booking management, transforming an ordinary parking search into a smooth, convenient, and reliable experience.

Name: Gal Prealpi e Dolomiti
Description:
Il Gal Prealpi e Dolomiti è un partenariato composto da soggetti pubblici, privati e della società civile. 

Esistono circa 2800 Gruppi di Azione Locale (Gal) in Europa. Essi riuniscono i principali portatori di interesse presenti nel territorio con l'obiettivo di promuove progetti di sviluppo locale e rurale.

I Gal, attraverso un approccio partecipativo e collaborativo denominato LEADER, programmano e gestiscono alcuni specifici Fondi UE.

Name: Southern Tier Central Regional Planning & Development Board
Description: STC serves as the local development agency for both Appalachian Regional Commission and the Economic Development Administration. As such, STC brings millions of dollars to Chemung, Schuyler and Steuben counties and is able to provide much needed technical assistance throughout the region. STC serves as a bridge between local, state and federal governments working to find solutions to the challenges of today and identify and meet the needs of tomorrow.

Name: Speck Dempsey
Description: "Jeff Speck has made it his lifelong mission to make America great for walking again — and he’s turning to a local transportation expert for help with pulling it off. The nationally renowned urban planner has teamed up with transportation consultant Chris Dempsey to launch a design firm, Speck Dempsey LLC. The pair of Brookline residents are bringing their own clients to the new venture, and last month they signed their first project together, to help with a safe streets initiative for the city of Worcester." - The Boston Globe, January 4, 2024

Name: Nak'azdli Development Corporation (NDC)
Description:
Nak’azdli Development Corporation (NDC) is an Indigenous-owned business committed to sustainable growth, economic reconciliation, and community prosperity. We operate across key sectors, including forestry, construction, energy, and retail, creating opportunities that benefit Nak’azdli Whut’en and our partners.

Our collaborative approach strengthens businesses, fosters workforce development, and supports long-term sustainability. Whether through innovative projects like BioNorth Energy or strategic forestry partnerships, we are committed to responsible economic leadership.

 Fort St. James, BC

 Connect with us: nakdc.ca

Name: Stadtmarketing Fulda
Description:
Wir machen Stadt- und Citymarketing in Fulda.

#innenstadtmacher
#kuemmerer
#quasselstrippen
#veranstalter
#netzwerker
#impulsgeber
#kaffeetanten
#zukunftsgestalter
#motivator 
#feierbiester

Name: ADEFARMO MZ
Description:
Bem-vindos à página da ADEFARMO! 

A ADEFARMO é uma associação comunitária sem fins lucrativos que nasceu do compromisso de profissionais dedicados à melhoria da qualidade de vida e à proteção ambiental em Moçambique, especialmente em Pemba e na região de Cabo Delgado. Nosso trabalho vai além da preservação do meio ambiente — acreditamos que um futuro sustentável também passa pela promoção de direitos iguais e inclusão social para todos, sem exceção.

Em um momento crucial para a nossa sociedade, estamos aqui para fortalecer as comunidades e promover valores de equidade, respeito e proteção. Lutamos contra a violência baseada em gênero e trabalhamos para garantir que todos, especialmente as crianças, sejam protegidos e tenham acesso aos seus direitos fundamentais.

Nosso objetivo é unir esforços para criar comunidades mais justas, seguras e sustentáveis, onde todos possam viver com dignidade e respeito, independentemente do seu gênero, idade ou origem. Estamos comprometidos em atuar de forma a garantir que os direitos de todos sejam respeitados, promovendo um ambiente mais saudável e seguro para as futuras gerações.

Acompanhe nossas iniciativas, projetos de inclusão social, campanhas de combate à violência e programas de conscientização. Junte-se a nós para construir um futuro em que a dignidade humana e o meio ambiente andem lado a lado.

 Por um Moçambique mais justo, mais seguro e mais sustentável para todos!

#ADEFARMO #DesenvolvimentoComunitário #InclusãoSocial #DireitosIguais #ProteçãoDaCriança #ViolênciaDeGênero #Equidade #Sustentabilidade #Pemba #CaboDelgado #Moçambique

Name: BW2030
Description: BW 2030, c’est une initiative qui mobilise 4 des principaux acteurs du territoire: le Brabant wallon, l’UCLouvain, in BW et Invest.BW. L’objectif est de travailler ensemble pour faciliter la vie de tous les acteurs du territoire s'assurer que le BW reste, dans un monde en profonde mutation, un endroit privilégié pour investir ou lancer des nouveaux projets.

Name: JFLV consultants
Description: Services-conseils divers en gestion du territoire, immobilier, environnement et urbanisme. Notre firme accompagne des clients publics ou privés dans la planification et la réalisation de leur vision territoriale. Nos mandats principaux touchent les questions d’habitation, de protection des milieux naturels et d’adaptation des municipalités aux défis de demain. Plus de 20 ans d'expériences variées sur l'ensemble du territoire québécois, ainsi qu'au Canada et à l'international.

Name: Triode
Description:
Triode maakt complexe opgaven beheersbaar. Onze adviseurs verbeteren processen, brengen inzicht in risico’s en maken realistische planningen die bruikbaar zijn op alle niveaus, van ideevorming tot oplevering.

Voor ons blijft iedere opgave uniek. Hierdoor ontwikkelen en verbeteren wij onze producten en diensten constant. Onze opdrachtgevers beschikken zodoende altijd over de nieuwste inzichten en methodes om grip te krijgen op ruimtelijke projecten en organisatieprocessen.

Name: Street Experiments for Transitions - SET
Description:
What is SET? 
SET supports cities, organisations, and society to experiment the change they want to see in their streets.

SET Vision
We strongly believe that our streets should be multifunctional and flexible, promoting active lifestyles in order to create more liveable, sustainable and resilient cities.

SET Mission 
SET sees Street Experiments as a planning tool to offer cities quick, creative and cost-effective solutions to current mobility and public realm challenges to develop long-term visions.

Name: Vista DI
Description:
Somos especialistas no Desenvolvimento Urbano Completo.

Viabilizamos o parcelamento do solo de forma rápida e aliada aos menores custos de planejamento e implantação, sempre priorizando a excelência na qualidade do produto final.

Nosso time é formado por profissionais com vasta experiência, com mais de 20 anos no mercado no segmento de parcelamento do solo e de atividades relacionadas tendo atendido grandes corporações focadas em urbanização.

Além disso, o acúmulo de experiências se deve à atuação em mais de 23 estados brasileiros; exemplo disso são os mais de cem loteamentos aprovados e lançados em todo o território nacional.

O nosso escopo de trabalho é completo e compreende todo o ciclo de desenvolvimento de um projeto imobiliário.

Vista DI - Desenvolvimento Imobiliário

Name: Agadir Souss Massa Aménagement SDL
Description:
Société Anonyme à Conseil d’Administration, Agadir Souss Massa Aménagement (SASMA) est une Société de Développement Local créée le 10 janvier 2020 conformément à la loi organique n°113-14 relative aux communes. Sa création traduit la Volonté Royale d’accompagner la mise en œuvre du Programme de Développement Urbain d’Agadir 2020-2024 (PDU), lancé sous la présidence effective de Sa Majesté le Roi Mohammed VI, que Dieu L’assiste, le 4 février 2020 à Agadir.

Dotée d’un capital social de 6 180 100 Dhs, la société assure la maîtrise d’ouvrage déléguée de plus de 80 % des projets inscrits dans le PDU, représentant une enveloppe globale de plus de 7 milliards de dirhams. Ces réalisations, qui transforment durablement le visage urbain d’Agadir, placent l’humain au centre du développement territorial à travers la création d’équipements culturels, sportifs, sociaux et environnementaux au service du bien-être des citoyens.

Sous la présidence de M. Saaïd Amzazi, Wali de la Région Souss-Massa, et la direction générale de M. Mounir Jbilou, la SASMA incarne une gouvernance moderne et participative, fondée sur la rigueur, la transparence et la performance. Au-delà du PDU d'Agadir 2020-2024, la société conduit aujourd’hui plusieurs programmes structurants à l’échelle régionale, notamment la mise à niveau des établissements de jeunesse, les infrastructures judiciaires, ainsi que la préparation des grands chantiers liés à la Coupe d’Afrique des Nations 2025 et à la Coupe du Monde de Football 2030, dont Agadir sera l’une des villes hôtes.

Par son action, la SDL Agadir Souss Massa Aménagement confirme sa vocation : être un acteur clé du développement durable, de l’attractivité et du rayonnement d’Agadir et de la Région Souss-Massa, tout en contribuant à la réussite des grands événements internationaux qui marqueront l’avenir du Royaume.

Name: Cobalt Engagement
Description:
We’re here to collaborate with you to co-design strategies for resilience, adaption and recovery. Cobalt Engagement is dedicated to increasing resilience in our cities and regions using a place and people centred approach. We’re here to listen to you so we can develop the most effective strategies—together. 

We support a Caring for Country approach in all our work and we acknowledge the Traditional Owners of the lands on which we work and live; we are grateful for their continuing care and connection to culture, community, land, sea and sky.

We support adaption through strategy and co-design. We are engagement, resilience, urban and regional planning specialists. We are working to support an increase in resilience as our communities adapt and recover to our changing world. 

Here is how we can help you:

Urban + Regional Planning
Co-design to support: 
- Master Planning
- Placemaking
- Strategic Planning 

Community + Stakeholder Engagement
Co-design
Facilitation
Children’s and Youth engagement 
Surveys and Workshops

Resilience + Adaption
Co-design to support:  
- Resilience and Adaption Planning
- Place Resilience Design Briefs
- Preparedness and Recovery Plans

Name: Rhoades Planning Group
Description:
Rhoades Planning Group offers urban planning, design, and entitlements expertise for infill and affordable mixed-use development projects.

We provide a complete range of planning and development services for private, non‐profit and public sector clients based on an in-depth knowledge of the policy, zoning, and economic realities of designing and building complex projects.

Rhoades Planning Group clients benefit from an integrated and forward‐thinking approach to planning and development.

Name: Future Village
Description: Placemaking services from concept design, construction and maintenance. Manufacturer of free standing green infrastructure.  Global leaders in water reservoirs and wicking systems. The new home of Plantabox and People Parkers.

Name: West Walk
Description: West Walk is Doha's newest integrated community, providing an innovative and exciting new district tailored to the needs of modern living. Here, you’ll find all the essentials for a contemporary live-work-play lifestyle, within a development that creates entirely new experiences in the Al Waab neighbourhood – for residents, businesspeople and leisure visitors alike.

Name: Maryland Aerospace Alliance
Description:
The Maryland Aerospace Alliance strives to advocate Maryland as the premier location for aerospace talent, resources and opportunity.  As an advocacy alliance we commit to the four following goals:
1. Industry Needs and Business Facilitation: MAA is committed to addressing the needs of the aerospace industry by making it easier for both large and small businesses to operate in Maryland. This includes advocating for policies that support business growth and creating an environment conducive to innovation and collaboration. MAA promotes Maryland State assets - facilities, capabilities, workforce - across all interested public and private sector entities.
2. Advocacy and Legislative Engagement: MAA takes an active role in the legislative environment at both the state and federal levels. The organization highlights the aerospace industry’s needs to policymakers, driving investment and support for the sector across Maryland. This proactive advocacy ensures that the industry’s interests are well-represented and that necessary resources and support are secured.
3. Bridging Industry Segments: MAA is unique in its focus on bridging gaps between different segments of the aerospace industry. By fostering communication and collaboration among sectors that do not always actively engage with each other, MAA creates a more cohesive and united industry front. This holistic approach enhances the overall strength and competitiveness of Maryland’s aerospace sector.
4. Education and Workforce Development: MAA recognizes the critical need for a robust workforce pipeline. MAA ensures that colleges and universities have the platforms and support needed to advance aerospace education and research that aligns with the needs of the public and private sector aerospace and aviation employers.

Name: CALCO
Description: Somos especialistas en la elaboración de estrategias para la mejora de la resiliencia urbana y rural desde una perspectiva multidisciplinar. Comprendemos el territorio como un paisaje cultural, en el que los ecosistemas naturales y antrópicos están estrechamente vinculados.

Name: Yalla Project  - مشروع يلا
Description: Urban regeneration in conflict zones and marginalised contexts, aimed at the achievement of all-around sustainable living environments and the spatialisation of circular principles.

Name: EarthML
Description:
EarthML is an advanced Python library engineered to streamline the analysis of geospatial and remote sensing data. Developed with a vision to cover a wide array of functionalities, EarthML currently supports geospatial data conversion into geohashes, and pre-processing of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) datasets from Sentinel-1, ALOS PALSAR, and TerraSAR-X.

Features:
1. Geohash Calculation: Automatically computes the smallest geohash that represents the geographical bounds of the dataset.
2. SAR Data Pre-Processing: Offers functionalities for pre-processing steps on SAR datasets from Sentinel-1, ALOS PALSAR, and TerraSAR-X. This includes thermal noise removal, radiometric calibration, speckle filtering, and geometric correction.
3. Future-Ready: EarthML is actively improving with a roadmap for integration of other remote sensing sensors such as LiDAR , Hyperspectral , and Multispectral Optical .

Collaborate with EarthML:
 For Remote Sensing Specialists : If you have an M.Sc. or higher qualification in Remote Sensing and recognize gaps in the geospatial market that no other python library address, I'd love to hear your insights. Please feel free to connect and drop me a direct message.

 For Contributors: Passionate about shaping the future of geospatial analysis with us? To maintain the quality and expertise of EarthML, we welcome contributors with an M.Sc. or higher qualification in Remote Sensing. Looking forward to innovative collaborations!

Name: Biodiverse Cities
Description: The Biodiverse Cities project brings together 8 cities and 8 expert organisations to tackle the most urgent urban issues, the biodiversity and climate crisis. Biodiverse Cities accelerates action for biodiversity in cities in the North Sea area to support ecosystem services, balance the coexistence of people and nature, and build nature-inclusive societies.

Name: TUNISTORIC
Description: TUNISTORIC was founded in 2022 by a group of Tunisian impact investors, with a strong commitment to inclusive urban regeneration of the Medina of Tunis. TUNISTORIC converts historical abandoned built heritage, into economically viable opportunities, through architectural heritage restoration and repurposing, with focus on community inclusion.

Name: CEUCI Centro de Estudos sobre Urbanização para o Conhecimento e a Inovação
Description:
CEUCI is the Center for Studies on Knowledge- and Innovation-Based Urban Development, established in 2022 at the school of Civil Engineering, Architecture and Planning of the University of Campinas. The project continues studying the implementation of the International Hub for Sustainable Development (HIDS), in which Unicamp's campus is located through the following transversal thematic axes: technologies, governance, public policies, urban legislation, circular/donut economy, gentrification mitigation and ecological paradigm.
The proposal fits into the current context of a knowledge society in which several university campuses in the cities of São Paulo are expected to undergo a process of transformation in the coming decades, with the installation, in their surroundings, of research and development institutes, innovation hubs and technology-based companies. These new areas of knowledge will demand a series of equipment and urban infrastructure, such as housing, services, sanitation, free spaces for public use, among others. Given their location, typically in urban fringe areas, at the interface with agricultural areas, fragments of natural forests and other preexistences generally disconnected from consolidated urban areas, and due to the current scenario of climate change, destruction of ecosystems, economic crisis and social transformation, these areas will face several challenges, requiring new urban planning methods and tools.
For more information, please visit our website: o http://ceuci.unicamp.br

Name: Tehran Urban Research and Planning Center
Description: The Tehran Urban Research and Planning Center (UPRC) is a strategic research center of the Tehran Municipality. It plays an essential role in knowledge generation, scientific support, policymaking, and facilitating urban management planning for the city of Tehran. The center is dedicated to enhancing the quality of urban governance and improving decision-making efficiency within the municipality. Operating as a think tank and advisory body, the UPRC contributes valuable expertise to Tehran’s urban management. Additionally, it serves as a scientific and specialized resource for municipalities across Iran and other cities worldwide.

Name: Traffic Planning Consultants Ltd
Description:
Since 1988 Traffic Planning Consultants have provided specialist advice and innovative traffic solutions to allow our public and private sector clients to deliver successful project outcomes.

We have engineered client project success into everything we do.  By anticipating the unexpected, developing practical and pragmatic solutions, and working with you, we continually deliver project success.

Our team has an extremely broad range of expertise meaning that we always find a solution, irrespective of the type of project. 

We understand the local regulatory environment and work within this to deliver your project successfully.

Traffic management plays an important role in any development and is related to risk management.  We work with other professionals such as civil engineers, architects, planners and urban designers to ensure that every new development or redevelopment provides a safe environment for all users while adhering to regulatory requirements.

Traffic risk may lead to adverse outcomes.  We synthesise national and international research and experience and apply it to local environments to minimise risk so that everyone can go about their daily lives in a safe environment.

By Choosing Traffic Planning Consultants as your traffic engineers, you get:
1. Comprehensive Expertise
2. Proven Track Record
3. Specialist Advice for Successful Project Outcomes
4. Collaborative Approach
5. Early-Stage Involvement

Invite Us on Your Journey:
Connect with Traffic Planning Consultants on LinkedIn to discover how our specialist advice and comprehensive traffic solutions can drive the success of your next project.  Whether you're planning a residential or a commercial development, or an infrastructure project, our team is here to provide the expertise and support you need to deliver your project successfully.

Traffic Planning Consultants - Your trusted partner in providing expert advice and innovative traffic solutions to deliver a better-connected safer New Zealand.

Description: The Avenues of Ingersoll & Grand is a nonprofit that provides economic development, marketing & promotion, enhanced maintenance and beautification of this commercial, cultural and residential district located in the historical heart of Des Moines, Iowa.

Name: Urban Strategy
Description:
Urban Strategy is a leading urban planning consultancy dedicated to designing innovative urban studies and implementation strategies in collaboration with local governments, private institutions, and international organizations. Our mission is to create inclusive, sustainable, and resilient urban environments.

Our recent achievements include:

The project for the revitalization of the Leticia neighborhood, transforming it into a vibrant and integrated community hub.
Developing an urban integration strategy in partnership with the Peruvian Institute of Architects to connect two historically segregated communities in Lima.
Conducting a comprehensive assessment of Peru's urban development framework for the German Agency for International Cooperation (GIZ).
Currently, we are providing technical assistance to the Ministry of Housing, supported by the French Development Agency (AFD), to establish a Public Land Operator aimed at improving housing programs for marginalized communities.

At Urban Strategy, we strive to design cities that empower their inhabitants and promote sustainable growth.

Description: Inguquko Development Planning and Projects is a planning and development company that undertakes all forms of development planning and project implementation and provides solutions to all property development needs.

Description: The New York Upstate APA's mission is to serve and support the professional, student, and citizen planning community in New York State and to improve the quality of life through the use of planning

Name: Placemaking Barcelona
Description:
Placemaking BCN was founded by transnational and local experts united by a common passion: to use their professional skills to co-design integrated solutions to place-based community, social and user-centered problems.

Barcelona became the cradle to launch our initiative: we saw that the coming together of talents and skills could lead to a strong and unique placemaking practice in the area.

Placemaking Barcelona acts as a mediator between government entities, stakeholders and communities. We propose community-driven solutions with an ethical conscience. We focus on making places more sustainable and livable, and co-create with communities in order to empower them.

Our work encompasses different skill sets for the creation of public spaces. We study the sustainability and financial aspects of placemaking, conduct social and community research, propose hyperlocal branding and identity development for places and communities, lead participatory and co-creation processes with communities, and are the driver and manager of place transformation.

Name: Urban Lab Nürnberg
Description:
Wir wollen eine menschengerechte Stadt, glauben an das Gemeinwohl und möchten den Lebensraum Stadt auch selbst ermächtigt gestalten. Um unsere Stadt für die spannenden Herausforderungen der Zukunft zu wappnen, möchten wir uns experimentell an Lösungen versuchen, die Stadt ein gutes Stück grüner und lebendiger machen.

Dazu bieten wir Kompetenzen aus den Bereichen Design, Architektur, Coaching und Wissenschaft, das Wissen und die nötigen Werkzeuge, um relevante Gruppen dazu zu befähigen, sich die Gestaltung ihres Lebensraums anzueignen. Wir arbeiten partizipativ, kokreativ und auf Augenhöhe. Konventionelle hierarchische Strukturen, gibt es bei uns nicht. Wir arbeiten soziokratisch mit ein paar festangestellten Halbtagskräften, freien Mitarbeiter*innen und zahlreichen Ehrenamtlichen zusammen.
Gemeinsam mit euch, wollen wir ausprobieren, wie wir die Stadt lebenswerter machen können. Denn wir alle sind die Menschen, die Zukunft gestalten.

Name: Gestur Canarias | Gobierno de Canarias
Description: Gestur Canarias is a public company of the Canary Islands Government dedicated to urban planning and management of all types of projects.

Name: Woodlawn Central
Description:
We are Woodlawn Central.
A $895 million, Black-led development reclaiming 8.5 acres in the heart of Chicago’s historic Woodlawn neighborhood.

This isn’t revitalization. It’s reclamation.
Built for legacy. Powered by culture. Rooted in community.

We are transforming real estate into a tool for self-determination without displacement and without compromise.

This is where housing, retail, faith, and technology come together as cultural infrastructure. Where South Side imagination becomes a permanent presence. Where the people who built this neighborhood shape what comes next.

We do not explain ourselves. We build.
And we are not going anywhere.

Name: Oxfordshire Community Rail Partnership
Description:
Oxfordshire Community Rail Partnership helps connect local communities and visitors to rail, bus and active travel through community led programmes and initiatives. We are proud to work in partnership with our rail, community and industry partners in Oxfordshire. 

Oxfordshire Community Rail Partnership (OxCRP) was launched in the summer 2023. We are working with our partners to identify local transport and travel needs and to design programmes that support local communities and visitors to benefit from sustainable transport and travel. 
 
With a key focus on supporting diverse and less advantaged groups, OxCRP will work with local communities and stakeholders, including station adoption groups, council members, researchers, and community organisations, to develop rail-based solutions that address short-term needs and enable longer-term change.

Name: MARKED
Description:
MARKED by Orchy.co is a bike navigation system that helps riders find the city safe cycle network. 

 Find our more ! https://markedwayfinding.com/

Name: Komm:Transform
Description:
Municipalities play a key role in the energy transition – but to assume this responsibility, they need strong partners.

Komm:Transform brings together clean tech startups and SMEs with public utilities, welfare associations, and local businesses to jointly develop and scale tailored and versatile solutions for a sustainable energy supply.

Clean tech startups and SMEs bring innovation, flexibility, and technical expertise. Local partners provide infrastructure, market access, and networks – and seek technical solutions for clean and affordable heat, electricity, and mobility.

Komm:Transform strengthens these collaborations.

Name: Destination Lab
Description:
Der Verein Destination Lab vernetzt Destination Management Organisationen (DMO) in der ganzen Schweiz und bezweckt den Wissensaustausch, die Vernetzung und die gemeinsame Umsetzung von Projekten.
Seine Kernbereiche sind die Gästeberatung sowie die Angebots- und Produktentwicklung. Im Destination Lab, welches das erprobte Konzept des Tourist Office Lab aufnimmt, gelingt der Schritt von der Theorie in die Umsetzung.
