Description: Urban Cure CIC was established in March 2022 by founder Dee Curtis to support the Council Covid-19 regeneration of the City of Southend-on-Sea. Our activities will be conducted to benefit inhabitants of Essex, and the UK to provide opportunities to those who would normally be denied the chance to improve their participation within their community.

Name: plan zwei Stadtentwicklung | Stadtforschung | Kommunikation
Description:
Die Stadt ist unsere Aufgabe...

Wir planen, entwickeln und erforschen Städte und Gemeinden. Dabei bringen wir je nach Anlass städtebaulich-räumliche, freiraumplanerische, strategisch-moderierende und forschungsanalytische Perspektiven zusammen. In kooperativen Prozessen verknüpfen wir Fachexpertise und Offenheit für Kreativität.

Wir organisieren Kommunikation auf allen Planungsebenen – analog und digital in unterschiedlichen Medien und Methoden | Wir forschen mit aktiven Formaten und vielseitigen empirischen Methoden | Wir erstellen Planwerke vom integrierten Rahmenplan bis zum formellen Bauleitplan.

In jedem Projekt verbinden sich unsere Forschungserkenntnisse, Praxis- und Erfahrungswissen mit unserer Entwurfskompetenz, um im kooperativen Dialog die beste Lösung zu finden. Unsere Motivation ist das große inhaltliche Interesse an unseren Projekten und die Chance, damit Städte, Quartiere, Dörfer und Orte lebenswert und zukunftsfähig zu machen.

Name: Ciudad Parque
Description: Proyecto Urbano Habitacional, liderado por SERVIU Metropolitano, en los terrenos del ex aeropuerto de Cerrillos.

Name: Boone County Chamber
Description: The mission of the Boone County Chamber is to enhance the economic vitality and quality of life in the communities of Boone County, IA.

Name: Strong Towns - Boise
Description:
Welcome to Strong Towns Boise! 
We are a community-driven organization dedicated to building a resilient, inclusive, and vibrant Boise. Our mission is to promote sustainable urban development, economic resilience, and a strong sense of community through thoughtful planning and proactive engagement.


WHAT WE DO 
Community Engagement: We host monthly meetings, workshops, and events to foster dialogue and collaboration among residents, local businesses, and policymakers.

Education and Advocacy: We provide resources, training, and advocacy to help residents understand and influence local development and zoning policies.

Project Initiatives: We initiate and support community improvement projects that enhance the quality of life in Boise, from creating green spaces to promoting walkable neighborhoods.


BENEFITS OF JOINING US
Shape Your City: Participating in meaningful discussions and initiatives can have a direct impact on Boise's future development.

Network and Collaborate: Connect with like-minded individuals, local leaders, and experts who are passionate about making Boise a better place to live.

Learn and Grow: Through our programs and workshops, you can gain knowledge and skills in urban planning, community organizing, and sustainable development.

Make a Difference: Contribute to projects and policies that promote a stronger, more resilient community.


GET INVOLVED
Join us in making Boise a stronger town! Attend our next meeting, volunteer for a project, or simply stay informed through our newsletters and social media. Together, we can create a thriving, sustainable Boise for everyone.

#StrongerBoise

Name: TACHJIR | Regreen the Urban | Morocco
Description:
What's Tachjir ?
A movement initiated by moroccan young architects to revaluate the urban landscape and fight for green spaces and the Necessity to protect and replant trees!

Not palm trees! Trees adapted to the our climate, that are resistant to drought and able to create shade in our sidewalks. And make walking in the city bearable.

 What for?
The heatwave is getting stronger year by year, and walking outside becomes a struggle when the sun hits you and it's 45 degrees out. Trees reduce heat and improve the quality of life tremendously. We don't need grass! We need trees. Grass consumes tons of water and doesn't serve any citizen. It's time to look at our urban spaces from another angle and fight for a good cause.

To be continued

Name: UrbanerdsNZ
Description:
Urbanerds is a community of people who build epic cities.

We're into: Kids on bikes, street parties, affordable homes, belonging, universal accessibility, knowing your neighbour, indigenous urbanism, green infrastructure, effortless public transport, beautiful buildings, thriving streets, urban civics, spaces that kids find exciting!

What started as a regular drinks catchup with like-minded nerdy friends has become a movement for growing epic towns and cities, from the citizens up.

We have chapters around New Zealand (and soon the world!) that meet regularly to jam, discuss, envision, feel into and nerd out what better urban living could look like.

We do both virtual and in-person gatherings, so come join us!

Name: STADT BERATUNG Dr. Sven Fries GmbH
Description:
Seit mehr als 20 Jahren sind wir vor allem in der integrierten Stadtentwicklung aktiv. Wir unterstützen Städte und Gemeinden, aber auch Wohnungsunternehmen, Ministerien und Vereine.

Mit unserem interdisziplinären Team bieten wir Ihnen individuell zugeschnittene Komplettlösungen aus einer Hand. Wir beraten Sie nicht nur, sondern packen vor Ort auch an: von der Durchführung einer Veranstaltung bis hin zum langjährigen Quartiers- oder Zentrenmanagement. Dazu gehören auch die abschließende Evaluation die öffentliche Kommunikation, von digitalen Formaten über Video, Foto bis hin zu Printprodukten. Kurz: Wir entlasten Sie!

Name: Be C'Cool
Description:
Be C'Cool, conçoit, fabrique et installe des mobiliers de sécurisation vélos. La gamme se compose de 3 familles de produits : des arceaux, des consignes individuelles et des consignes semi-collectives de 6 places installables sur l'emplacement d'une place de parking classique (5mx2.5m) et des consignes collectives modulables en simple ou double étage.

Les mobiliers Be C'Cool sont fabriqués majoritairement avec des matériaux de réemploi. La constitution d'une base de données des gisements de matériaux de réemploi associée aux compétences de conception permettent à Be C'Cool d'affirmer aujourd'hui sa position d'acteur moteur dans l'éco-conception. Ces matériaux sont issus de déchets industriels ou de produits arrivés en fin de leur cycle de vie.

Name: FungALL CIC
Description:
FungALL is a community interest company committed to addressing the needs of underserved communities and empowering young individuals to contribute to meaningful climate solutions through action and education.

We build innovative circular urban farming systems at a neighbourhood level, repurposing local waste streams to produce nutritious foods for communities. We aim to establish an interconnected network of localised mushroom farms in every major city ward. 

Our scalable blueprints integrate fungi, education, and technology, providing a unique solution that enhances social cohesion and advances principles of fairness, inclusivity, and equality - essential components for achieving corporate social and environmental impact goals.

We used advanced urban farming technologies to grow the perfect mushrooms every time!

Name: FWC26 Marketing Group
Description: FWC26 Marketing Group is a next-generation, BIA-style organization focused on social-impact, program infrastructure and delivery. We translate government and community priorities into structured, measurable, legacy-focused initiatives that support community engagement, inclusion, business growth and long-term economic prosperity”

Name: SYNCHRO SPACE
Description:
SYNCHRO SPACE is an innovative and dynamic hub of urban development and spatial transformation, dedicated to shaping future cities with a strong emphasis on sustainability, creativity, and community engagement. Founded by Alissa Bankovska, a visionary architect, urbanist, and innovation catalyst, SYNCHRO SPACE has become a driving force in the realm of urban development, bringing together diverse expertise and fostering collaborations to create impactful environments.

The hub's activities are aimed at helping cities solve current problems and challenges with the help of innovative startup projects and teams of various specialists. Our goal is to provide city governments, developers, and businesses with new technologies to improve the quality of the urban environment and city services. Through a people-centric approach to spatial development, SYNCHRO SPACE advocates for spaces that not only serve functional needs but also resonate with the emotions and aspirations of the community.

SYNCHRO SPACE conducts urban hackathons, unique programs, and events that implement the best foreign urban development practices, showcasing the transformative potential of innovative design and technology in shaping cities of the future. These events foster collaboration and creativity, allowing residents, developers, policymakers, and other stakeholders to actively contribute to the development and transformation of their urban spaces.

Since 2019, SYNCHRO SPACE has successfully collaborated with 12 cities and Urban Territorial Communities (UTCs) of Ukraine, 2 regional administrations, and 4 Ukrainian Ministries. Additionally, the hub enjoys support from esteemed international partners, including the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP), the Embassies of the Netherlands, Austria, Great Britain, and other international organizations.

Name: PROJET YAOUNDE COEUR DE VILLE
Description:
page officielle du projet "YAOUNDÉ CŒUR DE VILLE"
Le projet « Yaoundé Cœur de ville » vise l’amélioration des conditions de mobilité dans le cœur de la Ville.

Name: The Mobility Agenda Foundation
Description: At The Mobility Agenda Foundation, we understand the complex challenges of mobility, accessibility, and safety and are committed to providing solutions to organizations to build safe, accessible, and inclusive roads. Our expertise lies in road safety audits, transport planning, geometric design, traffic engineering, pavement design, infrastructure project management, sustainable transport solutions, policy research and analysis, education programs, and awareness campaigns to promote sustainable transport

Name: georegio ag
Description: Atelier für Raumentwicklung

Name: Housing Institute
Description: The Housing Institute is the first of its kind in Ukraine. Drawing from successful initiatives worldwide, we are dedicated to addressing housing challenges, promoting sustainable urban development, and advocating for adequate and affordable housing solutions. Our goal is to create the conditions for positive impact on communities and improve the quality of life of the most vulnerable sectors of society affected by the war. Our mission rests on four pillars: evidence based legislative reform; analysis of the public and private housing market, and the financial instruments required to guarantee equitable and secure access to adequate and affordable housing solutions; research on best practices in the European Union and across the world; and advocacy to ensure Ukraine's housing stock meets the demand, with a focus on the displaced population and other people affected by the war.

Name: We All Rise
Description: We provide maps to investments and pilot programming for diversified portfolios and scalable change. We bring together key stakeholders on critical development projects, defining best practices by bridging sectoral and cultural divides.

Name: Town Square Group UK
Description:
Town Square Group is a residential property developer and urban regeneration specialist dedicated to creating thriving communities and buildings with enduring value. Known for our creativity and proactive, hands-on approach, we’ve delivered projects ranging from individual luxury homes to major city-centre regeneration schemes.

Our mission is to improve living conditions and enhance the character of entire communities. We believe sustainable communities need well-designed spaces and exceptional buildings to truly prosper. Through originality, innovation, and collaboration, we unlock the potential of overlooked sites, leading ambitious projects that create high-quality homes residents and communities can be proud of.

Current Developments:

        •      Audley House, Liverpool – 199 apartments in the heart of the city.
	•	Waterside, Cleveleys – 29 contemporary waterfront apartments.
	•	Carwood, Hale Barns – Exclusive private development.

Name: The Euclid Group
Description: Helping clients develop smart development strategies, optimal land use and sustainable regulatory solutions. Working with a strong team of industry professionals, we have a proven track record of unlocking site value and translating client visions into reality.

Name: Design Advocacy Group (DAG)
Description:
The Design Advocacy Group (DAG) is a public forum and advocate for design quality and equity in the planning, architecture, preservation and physical development of Philadelphia.

We are a volunteer organization made up of members from a broad spectrum of disciplines who share an interest in Philadelphia’s design, development and planning.

DAG hosts free monthly meetings that are open to the public, featuring presentations, information sharing and robust discussion on topics related to the urban environment. 

DAG also takes positions on select matters, reaching out to government, decision makers and media and using its own communications channels. The Steering Committee deliberates and approves DAG’s advocacy positions. 

DAG's ultimate and overarching goal is to create a culture – shared by all Philadelphia residents, neighborhood groups, city agencies, business interests and the development community – that accepts nothing less than excellence in design and planning throughout every neighborhood.

DAG is a project of CultureTrust Greater Philadelphia, a charitable 501(c)(3) trust supporting diverse cultural practices in the Philadelphia region.

Name: Spatial Impact
Description:
Spatial Impact hjälper företag, myndigheter och organisationer att fatta bättre beslut genom samhällsanalyser baserade på geodata. Vi omvandlar satellitdata, GIS och avancerade analyser till insikter som skapar värde och stödjer hållbara lösningar.

Spatial Impact empowers companies, public authorities, and organizations to make informed decisions through geodata-driven societal analysis. By transforming satellite imagery, GIS, and advanced analytics into actionable insights, we create tangible value and enable sustainable solutions.

Name: ClimaGen
Description: ClimaGen focuses on urban greening and renaturing to promote climate-resilient regeneration in European cities, particularly in vulnerable neighbourhoods. The project integrates nature-based solutions (NbS) to address climate change adaptation and mitigation, urban regeneration, and biodiversity while promoting social and economic benefits. The project spans nine European cities, each of which will implement or plan urban green space interventions. These interventions include creating community gardens, green roofs, rain gardens, urban forests, and more to increase green public spaces by 25% in demonstration cities. The project uses social innovation, cultural engagement, and stakeholder involvement to transform these areas into resilient, climate-neutral spaces.

Name: Chicago Defender Charities Inc
Description:
We are a 501c3 Non-Profit organization that focuses on Arts, Education, Health.

We connect the community to opportunities dedicated to performing arts, education, health, wellness, business training and entrepreneurial development. We strive to unite, empower and improve the quality of life in order to enrich families and individuals in our communities.

Name: Azure Urban Developments
Description: Azure Urban Developments was formed in 2010 by John Thomas, a native of Ottawa who returned to the Nation’s Capital after spending 15 years living and working in cities around the world including, Toronto, San Francisco, Abu Dhabi, Paris, Singapore and Kuala Lumpur. Azure’s vision is defined by these experiences and, simply stated, is to bring world-class architecture and design to Ottawa and to improve the physical and life aesthetic of the communities in which it develops. We aspire to be a boutique builder of quality multi-family residential product.

Name: Placemaking Norway
Description:
We share the vision of Placemaking X; "To make the spaces we live into places we love. Create a thriving, equitable, and sustainable world through the convergence of values, passion, and action around our public spaces", as well as the umbrella definition that Placemaking Europe has defined:  "Placemaking is an approach to urban planning and design that focuses on the people who use a space, rather than just the physical structures or buildings. The idea is to create places that are not just functional, but also beautiful and meaningful to the people who live, work, and play there".

Additionally, we want to broaden the public's understanding of placemaking within Norway, build networks between Norwegian placemakers, and showcase Norwegian placemaking to an international audience.

Name: makāna
Description:
‘makāna’ is a research action collective working towards spatial and social justice in Jordanian cities. The seeds of makāna were sown by three architects, engaged in diverse paths in the field, who felt a profound responsibility towards their local community, and were driven by a shared vision for more socially just and inclusive spaces in our cities. makāna sits at the intersection of activism and research for just urban places and engages with issues of social and spatial justice, self-organization, dialogue, experimentation, and imagination.

Beyond the pursuit of capitalist gain, makāna’s purpose lies in working towards co-creating spaces in the city, and championing the right to city-making in Jordan. makāna aims to open space for and to nurture dialogue about current issues regarding the politics of urban spaces, in addition to working with communities, activists, researchers, and artists alike, to nurture dialogue, and foster the co-creation of urban spaces that reflect the needs and aspirations of the people.

Name: Towarzystwo Urbanistów Polskich
Description:
Towarzystwo Urbanistów Polskich jest rzecznikiem interesu społecznego w zagospodarowaniu i użytkowaniu polskiej przestrzeni. Jest organizacją społeczną i obywatelską, otwartą dla wszystkich, którzy przez swą działalność gospodarczą i polityczną oraz tworzoną wiedzę i dzięki posiadanym umiejętnościom, podnoszą jakość polskiej przestrzeni i chcą by była ona coraz bardziej atrakcyjną i konkurencyjną we współczesnym świecie.
Towarzystwo Urbanistów Polskich założyła w 1923 r. grupa wybitnych twórców i naukowców, a jednocześnie społeczników, skupionych wokół Wydziału Architektury Politechniki Warszawskiej. Dziś Towarzystwo liczy około 1000 członków w kilkunastu oddziałach regionalnych i sekcjach problemowych. Jest członkiem Międzynarodowego Stowarzyszenia Urbanistów i Planistów Regionalnych, skupiającego osoby fizyczne oraz podobne organizacje 
z całego świata.

Name: Wellness Communities Italia - Società Benefit
Description: Placemaking & Community Development

Name: Living Cities Earth
Description:
We are action-researchers, pioneering integral urban development, acting as a vital mycelium network within the urban ecosystem. Much like the intricate underground mycelium that connects the roots of plants, enabling exchange of nutrients and information, LCE weaves together grassroots organisations, communities, and top-down city, bio-regional, business, finance, and governance structures. We ensure that the voices, needs, and innovations of citizens are not only heard but seamlessly integrated into larger systemic strategies.

LCE’s role as this living network facilitates a bidirectional flow of knowledge and resources, mirroring the mycelium’s ability to transport vital resources to where they are most needed. In this way, we create thriving ecosystems where all parts—from small community groups to large governance bodies—contribute to and benefit of the collective well-being of the whole.

Through this process, we catalyse the co-creation of solutions that are both innovative and regenerative. Grassroots organisations contribute creativity, resilience, and a deep understanding of local challenges, while city governance, businesses, and financial institutions provide the scale, resources, and strategic oversight necessary for transformative change. Together, they can cultivate environments where life flourishes, nurturing cities that are resilient, inclusive, and adaptable.

As the world’s largest integral city development community, LCE unites leading practitioners from diverse fields to tackle global challenges through innovative, multidisciplinary approaches. Our team offer guidance, support and ultimately training that makes these skills available locally, because global challenges must be met with local action, where the decisions of those deeply invested in their communities create positive, impactful change. Our mission is audacious: inspire, empower, & interconnect 1 million local and global leaders of positive change, co-creating 10,000 thriving cities.

Name: Planta Assessoria e Consultoria Ltda
Description:
Uma empresa que há 20 anos presta serviços de coleta, sistematização de informações e análises socioeconômicas, culturais e ambientais. Focos no planejamento territorial (local, urbano e regional), patrimônio cultural e participação social em projetos de licenciamento ambiental, desenvolvimento socioeconômico, responsabilidade social corporativa e valorização da cultura local. Experiência profissional no setor privado aliada à pesquisa acadêmica e docência universitária: conhecimento com rigor e aplicabilidade. Abordagem multidisciplinar e focada na resolução de problemas
Nossa Missão: Fazer do conhecimento do território, sua cultura e identidade, uma ferramenta de transformação social, empoderando comunidades e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento inclusivo, democrático e sustentável.
VISÃO: Levar à população e aos agentes econômicos a compreensão de que o desenvolvimento pode e deve ser alcançado com inteligência e com base na inclusão, na democratização e no respeito ao meio ambiente e à memória.
Contribuir com o fornecimento de informações e conhecimento para a tomada de decisões rentáveis e responsáveis

Name: AdP-Villes en Développement
Description: L’AdP Villes en Développement est un réseau francophone de professionnels de l’urbanisme et du développement, qui favorise l’échange d’expériences et la capitalisation des savoir-faire en matière de développement urbain durable. En plus de sensibiliser et représenter ses membres à l’international, l’AdP publie régulièrement un bulletin intitulé Villes en Développement, qui diffuse des analyses, des retours d’expériences et des informations sur les projets innovants dans les villes francophones. REJOIGNEZ-NOUS: https://www.villes-developpement.org/

Name: Guidance to Zero
Description:
Guidance to Zero är ett tjänsteföretag som hjälper företag och organisationer
med sitt trafiksäkerhetsarbete och guidar dem att nå sina mål. Vi ser till hela
värdekedjan och stöttar från strategi via taktik till handling.

Vi erbjuder dessutom rådgivning och konsulttjänster inom trafik- och
samhällsplanering utifrån ett hållbarhetsperspektiv.

Name: RJ Enterprises inc
Description: The mission of the RJ owned Group of Companies is to provide structural resources and innovation through the strength of the individual entities, that might not otherwise be available to emerging businesses. Each entity has discovered a gap or niche in the market and is constantly and effectively pursuing new and exciting segments.

Name: Royal Holding
Description: Group of companies in USA, Europe, Asia, and Africa

Name: Metropolitan Planning Graduate Student Association (MPGSA)
Description: The Metropolitan Planning Graduate Student Association (MPGSA) is an organization that represents Urban Development (MPl) students at Toronto Metropolitan University. We deal with student concerns and provide a link between students and the administration, faculty, and the Ontario Professional Planners Institute. The MPGSA is run by an elected executive team, along with volunteers from the student body.

Name: Interfaz Urbana
Description:
We offer a comprehensive urban consulting service covering the entire cycle of territorial planning and urban project development. Our focus is on the people who live in the city, ensuring innovative and sustainable solutions.
We carry out the diagnosis, planning, design, and implementation of your proposal, working together in an interdisciplinary manner and providing continuous monitoring.

Name: Oltenia de sub Munte - Aspiring UNESCO Geopark
Description:
Welcome to 𝘖𝘭𝘵𝘦𝘯𝘪𝘢 𝘥𝘦 𝘴𝘶𝘣 𝘔𝘶𝘯𝘵𝘦 – 𝘈𝘴𝘱𝘪𝘳𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘜𝘕𝘌𝘚𝘊𝘖 𝘎𝘦𝘰𝘱𝘢𝘳𝘬, a visionary project founded by the 𝙆𝙤𝙜𝙖𝙮𝙤𝙣 𝘼𝙨𝙨𝙤𝙘𝙞𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣. 

Our mission is to provide a platform for local partnerships, fostering community engagement, and creating growth opportunities. This initiative goes beyond mere land; it's about the people, the communities, and their future. Moreover, 𝘖𝘭𝘵𝘦𝘯𝘪𝘢 𝘥𝘦 𝘴𝘶𝘣 𝘔𝘶𝘯𝘵𝘦 is a commitment to the intertwined destinies of our communities and the extraordinary landscapes they call home.

We are shaping a future of international recognition for a region rich in cultural and natural heritage. As an aspiring UNESCO geopark, there are no imposed restrictions, but rather, we inspire sustainable development and regenerative tourism.

Name: KAUST Graduate Student Council
Description: The Graduate Student Council represents the interests and acts on behalf of KAUST's graduate students to the University administration, faculty, staff, community and industry.

Name: Stadt-Umland-Management Wien/Niederösterreich
Description: Das Stadt Umland Management / SUM ist Schnittstelle für unterschiedlichste stadtregionale Fragestellungen, in den letzten Jahren von Mountainbike Strecken im Wienerwald bis zu Flugrouten im Zusammenhang mit dem Flughafen Wien-Schwechat. Wien und sein Umland sind gemeinsamer Lebensraum für gut 2,5 Millionen Menschen - dafür braucht es entsprechende Strategien und vor allem die Umsetzung der gemeinsamen Projekte.

Name: Pro Bono Planners Australia
Description:
Pro Bono Planners Australia (PbPA) is committed to facilitating fairer and more equitable access to planning and design expertise by connecting under-resourced and disadvantaged communities with planning and allied professionals to assist public benefit projects or navigating the planning system.

PbPA’s ‘Talent Bank’ are committed to public good outcomes by providing free expert advice, their skills and services on projects for the public benefit.Partnering with not-for-profit organisations and under-resourced groups facing systemic barriers, PbPA works to support sustainable communities and community capacity, support improved public health and wellbeing outcomes and benefit the natural and built environments. For more information about PbPA can be found at www.probonoplanners.org.au 

We are committed to connecting urban planning and allied professionals with the not-for-profit sector,  who are seeking assistance with projects of public benefit in Australia and overseas.

We also support International counterparts who wish to collaborate, share knowledge or are seeking assistance with projects outside Australia.

Join our Talent Bank or to register a project go to www.probonoplanners.org.au

Name: Travis County Parks Foundation
Description: Our mission is to create a powerful community resource that increases awareness, engagement and community support for Travis County parks.

Name: Alam Property Development
Description: Vi leder hela projektet åt er från tidig projektidé till lagakraftvunnen detaljplan, med betoning på helheten och genomförbarheten. Med fokus på exploatering och lantmäteri engagerar vi oss i samhällsfrågor och stadsplanering för att skapa mer hållbara och inkluderande samhällen. Vi ser till att alla aspekter av projektet, inklusive markanvändning och fastighetsutveckling, beaktas för att nå bästa möjliga resultat.

Name: American Planning Association - Oklahoma Chapter
Description: The Oklahoma Chapter of the American Planning Association (APA-OK) is the leading network for planners and community advocates across our state. We empower our members through education, connections, and advocacy—helping them grow while strengthening the voice of planning in Oklahoma. Whether you're a seasoned planner or just starting out, APA-OK is here to support you, foster collaboration, and champion great planning for the communities we serve.

Name: ONE SMALL TOWN International
Description:
By now it should be clear to most sober thinking people that the current socio-economic model worldwide has failed us dramatically. It does not work and it cannot be fixed. We have to find a new way of co-existing into the future, to have any kind of future at all. We owe it to our children and future generations. 

The “ONE SMALL TOWN” strategy takes an entirely new approach towards reviving our towns, our lives, and economies. It is a community-driven structure presenting a viable economic model that benefits all participants. A model that unifies entire communities towards a common goal, and fosters exponential economic growth potential. When implemented, it will result in community-focused, financially-abundant towns with maximum employment and new levels of security for all its inhabitants. 
PRIMARY OBJECTIVE:
To turn our towns into investment-friendly destinations. 
The ONE SMALL TOWN initiative is a community driven; economic PR exercise to make our town as attractive as we can to investors from around the world. 

The OST strategy includes many of the major areas of industry and commerce. 
1.	Electricity Supply
2.	Tourism
3.	Nature Conservation
4.	Agriculture
5.	Specialised Growing of Food 
6.	Seed Banks – Future food security
7.	Engineering
8.	Technology & Communication
9.	Healthcare
10.	Pharmaceutics & Cosmetics
11.	Forestry
12.	Building industry & Housing
13.	Education & Training

CREATING A POWERFUL LABOUR FORCE
The OST plan is all about community participation, in which members of the community each contribute THREE hours per week towards the projects and businesses. 
The projects are managed by a blockchain, that allocates the people to the projects where they are needed. 
A town of 10,000 people generate 30k hours of free labour per week. 
Community owns 60% of all businesses collectively
Investors retain 30%
10% retained for IP and royalties.

Name: CampusFM
Description:
CampusFM is Folkways Community activated partnership between higher education institutions, businesses and community leaders committed to making Fargo-Moorhead the best place for young people to launch their career.

By bringing the region’s business leaders, career professionals and students together under shared vision, Campus FM is creating a community that students and recent graduates want to engage with and invest in long-term.

Name: ÜniKent
Description:
"Küçük Kentlerin Yeniden Şekillenmesinde Üniversitenin Rolü (ÜniKent)" Projesi; Mimarlık, Şehir ve Bölge Planlama, Kentsel Tasarım veya benzeri mekân tasarımı ve araştırmaları bölümlerindeki lisans öğrencileri, ilgili üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinin akademik kadrosundan gönüllü koordinasyon ekibi, kentsel ölçekte çalışan ve farklı arka planlara sahip uzmanları, ve araştırmacıları eşitlikçi bir platformda buluşturan, yenilikçi kent politikası, strateji, tasarım ve uygulamaların, sosyal kaynakların ortaklaşması yoluyla üretildiği bir çalışma ağı olarak, Gebze Teknik Üniversitesi Şehir ve Bölge Planlama Bölümü araştırma ekibinin organizasyonu ile yürütülmektedir. Bu proje, TÜBİTAK (Türkiye Bilimsel ve Teknolojik Araştırma Kurumu) 1001 - Bilimsel ve Teknolojik Araştırma Projelerini Destekleme Programı kapsamında desteklenmektedir (Proje No: 324K238).

________________

"The Role of University in the Reshaping of Small Cities (UniKent)" Project is conducted by the research team of the Gebze Technical University, Department of City and Regional Planning. It brings together undergraduate students from Architecture, City and Regional Planning, Urban Design, or similar spatial design and research departments, a voluntary coordination team from the academic staff of the relevant departments of participating universities, as well as experts and researchers working at the urban scale with diverse backgrounds on an equitable platform. The project serves as a collaborative network where innovative urban policies, strategies, designs, and implementations are produced through the pooling of social resources. The project is supported by TÜBİTAK (The Scientific and Technological Research Council of Turkey) 1001 – Scientific and Technological Research Projects Support Program (Project Number: 324K238).

Name: Moses Eco Urban Magazine Organization (MEUMO)
Description:
Dedicated to fostering a sustainable and ecological future through insightful journalism and community engagement. Our mission is to inspire our readers about the importance of urban ecology and sustainable living.

WHAT WE DO:

1. Informative content: We publish articles, interviews,  and features that highlight innovative solutions and practices in urban sustainability.

2. Community workshops: We organize workshops and events to educate and engage communities on environmental issues and sustainable practices.

3. Collaborative Projects: We partner with local organizations and experts to promote ecological initiatives.

4. Research Services

OUR VISION:

"To create a world where urban living and ecological sustainability coexist harmoniously, ensuring a healthier planet for future generations."

JOIN US: 

Follow us for the latest updates on urban ecology, sustainability tips, and opportunities to get involves in our initiatives.

Name: Cartofriches
Description:
Cartofriches est un outil d’aide au recensement à l’échelle nationale des friches (industrielles, commerciales, d’habitat, tertiaires, etc.), ouvert au grand public via un portail de visualisation sur Internet.

En proposant une base nationale de sites potentiellement en friches, mais surtout en s’appuyant sur les connaissances locales (observatoires locaux, expertises terrain…), l’objectif est de promouvoir et faciliter la réutilisation des friches par les collectivités locales et les porteurs de projets.

Name: UrbanComm Baltics
Description: Development & urban planning / urban communication & public affairs. Based in Riga.

Name: Fondazione Aleramo – Agenzia per lo sviluppo del Monferrato
Description:
Fondazione Aleramo nasce per volontà dei suoi soci fondatori di rendere fruibile un territorio con ottime potenzialità sia dal punto di vista turistico che come sede stabile di qualità della propria attività e dei propri investimenti.
La nostra agenzia garantisce assistenza completa a tutte le aziende disposte ad investire su Casale e il Monferrato; rappresenta un’innovazione nei rapporti tra le imprese e la pubblica amministrazione per garantire elevata qualità, tempi celeri e costi contenuti.
Disponiamo di un ampio catalogo di aree e strutture industriali pronti all’uso e supportiamo il potenziale investitore nella ricerca della migliore scelta. Riteniamo che Casale e il Monferrato siano il luogo ideale per investire per una serie di motivi. Citandone alcuni: qualità della vita e sicurezza; importanti riduzioni fiscali per chi deciderà di investire su questo territorio; cultura industriale, competenze e ricerca per crescere; territorio attivo, affidabile e veloce con un pubblico giovane ed efficiente.

Name: Springfield Business Development Corporation
Description: Since 1985, the Chamber’s economic and workforce development efforts have been carried out through the Springfield Business Development Corporation (SBDC), governed by a separate board of directors, and financially supported by more than 100 investors. As the economic development arm of the Chamber, the SBDC works with local and regional partners to market the Springfield region nationally to attract new business and talent, and to help local and growing companies succeed.

Name: Approved
Description:
Obtaining approval for your development project could not be simpler. No matter the size, type or complexity.

Approved delivers a unique service that provides a seamless experience, from start to finish, of the entire approval process.

We set the benchmark in the planning and approval process and have built a team that accelerates the timeframe to construction.

Trusted by Australia's largest and most recognised builders, we create efficiency and consistency throughout your project's planning and construction phases. With extensive experience in land and property development, Approved offers so much more than a traditional planning company.

If you are undertaking a development project in New South Wales, the Approved Team can navigate the process on your behalf, ensuring a successful outcome.

Name: La Escalón
Description:
La Escalón, es una marca con un PROPÓSITO 
claro: SUBIR LA CALIDAD DE VIDA UN ESCALÓN 
MÁS ARRIBA. Nos impulsa seguir buscando el 
desarrollo, el bienestar y el crecimiento de todos los que habitamos, invertimos y trabajamos en la colonia Escalón.

Name: Land Insights - Planning, Design, Environment
Description:
Land Insights delivers planning and environmental solutions to clients across Western Australia

We guide projects of every size through the development and environmental approval process. Our team also assists State and Local Government with preparing effective land use, environmental and coastal strategies for the future.

Specialties
Strategic Planning
Environmental Planning
Environmental Management
Subdivision and Development
Coastal Management
Conservation Planning

Name: St. Louis Anchor Action Network
Description:
The St. Louis Anchor Action Network is a groundbreaking initiative that combines the resources of healthcare, education and the public and private sectors to create a new model for efforts to overcome the systemic impact of racism and disinvestment. Our members include anchor institutions – large companies and organizations that serve as pillars of our regional economy – working to leverage our economic and organizational resources to collectively advance Intentional Hiring and Career Development, Intentional Purchasing and Community Investment. The Network is focused on 22 zip codes in St. Louis City and County that have been impacted by more than a century of systemic racial and spatial inequities.

Co-led by University of Missouri-St. Louis and Edward Jones, the Network members include Ameren, BJC HealthCare/Christian Hospital, Equifax, Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis, Great Rivers Greenway, Harris-Stowe State University, Mercy, Missouri Botanical Garden, Saint Louis University, Saint Louis Zoo, SSM Health, St. Louis Community College, Washington University in St. Louis, and Webster University. The Network works in coordination with Greater St. Louis, Inc.’s STL 2030 Jobs Plan and aligns with the Regional Business Council’s Black and Brown Executive Leadership program and STL.works.

Name: Justice + Joy
Description:
Justice + Joy is a purpose-driven arts and culture strategy consultancy. We can help you build strategic, integrated and creative practices into governance, urban design, urban planning, policy and organizational management. We specialize in strategy, project & program development and facilitation. When we help you bring out your team's creativity and imagination, your solutions become more sustainable, your work is more integrated, you gain more clarity in long-term visioning and your team is lit up anew with a deepened sense of purpose and a deepening of relationships. We integrate public art and culturally-rooted practices into urban planning and development projects. Road blocks, things that have never been done? That's our forte! At the end of the day, we are invested in helping to build more just and joyful cities, organizations and communities.

Team offices located in St. Louis, Atlanta and Los Angeles.

Name: Women Shaping Cities
Description: Women Shaping Cities (WSC) is an urban planning think tank working at the intersection of research, policy, and practice. We exist to make cities more inclusive, safe, just, and livable by shaping planning, design, and governance around the everyday realities of people

Name: Laboratorio de Ideas Sostenibles
Description: Somos una iniciativa respaldada por el Harvard Innovation Lab dedicada a la planificación, diseño y fortalecimiento de capacidades de ciudades pequeñas e intermedias de América Latina y el Caribe. Impulsamos la innovación cívica y urbana, catalizando la colaboración entre gobiernos, organizaciones y el sector privado para promover un desarrollo urbano y económico sostenible. Como miembros del Harvard Climate Entrepreneurs Circle, nos especializamos en la planificación y el diseño de proyectos de adaptación y mitigación ante la emergencia climática.

Name: Cool Cities
Description:
We’re a diverse group of public authorities, sectoral agencies, and knowledge institutions, all coming together to tackle one of the biggest challenges of our time: climate change. 

Cool Cities brings together experienced leaders and fresh voices in the field of heat resilience in urban areas. Each partner brings unique experiences and innovative ideas to the table, creating a dynamic team dedicated to making our cities more resilient to heat. 

We want to develop and implement a city-wide Cool Network to ensure our cities are prepared for rising temperatures. This project builds on our ongoing efforts in climate adaptation. We’re excited to share our journey with you.

Partners: 
Gemeente Middelburg, Gemeente Rotterdam, Stadt Göttingen, Stadsbyggnadsförvaltningen Göteborgs stad, Communauté d’Agglomération du Pays de Saint-Omer (CAPSO), Ville de Saint-Omer, Stad Sint-Niklaas, Zentrum für Energie, Bauen, Architektur und Umwelt GmbH (ZEBAU), Hogeschool van Amsterdam (AUAS), and HafenCity Universität (HCU). Leading the charge is Gemeente Arnhem.

We turn adversity into opportunity, fostering resilience, collaboration, and sustainable growth for a brighter future. 

Our Approach

What We’ve Achieved So Far

- Strategic Partnerships: Collaborations with leading tech companies to drive growth and innovation.

- Pioneering Members: Welcoming our first pioneers to join the high-tech core community.
 Contact Us: pioneers@kht.co.il 
 Learn More: kibbutzhightech.com 

Let’s partner to build the future of the Negev and Galilee - together.

Name: Pike District Partnership
Description:
The Pike District Partnership (PDP) oversees the branding and marketing of the Pike District – North Bethesda’s urban core and continues the mission of both former community advocacy organizations- the Friends of White Flint and the White Flint Downtown Advisory Committee.
The PDP received funding from Montgomery County’s Emerging Business District grant program to focus on important issues that impact the community such as pedestrian safety and smart development - ensuring that the 2010 White Flint Sector plan stays true to its vision.  Funds will also be used to plan and execute a vigorous marketing plan that includes business promotions, community events and placemaking.  
Driven by the core values of celebrating diversity, encouraging innovation, fostering entertainment, building community, and providing accessible transportation options, the PDP will focus on highlighting the vibrancy and economic development potential of the North Bethesda area.

Name: Roosevelt Boulevard Subway
Description:
The Roosevelt Boulevard Subway would improve the quality of life of hundreds of thousands of Philadelphians by:

• Providing affordable and direct connections to jobs in Center City and Northeast Philly.
• Improving equity by closing the gap in transit access across race and income.
• Relieving traffic congestion and shorten commute times.
• Enhancing pedestrian safety through a safer roadway design with buried lanes of traffic.
• Fighting climate change and improving local air quality.
• Growing the economic impact of the region through transit-oriented commercial .and residential development.
• Creating local construction jobs.

Sie fördert Wirtschaft und Innovation durch gezielte Unterstützung von Unternehmen und attraktiven Gewerbeflächen. Hessentag in Fulda | 12.-21. Juni 2026 - Foll hessisch!

Name: Urban2063
Description:
The Urban2063 Coalition is a dynamic advocacy platform dedicated to creating an enabling political context for sustainable urbanism, aligning with the African Union's vision for Agenda 2063.

Led by the African Centre for Cities at the University of Cape Town, we work to popularise a shared narrative about the potential of sustainable urbanisation to unlock Africa’s development and cultural potential. During 2025, our work is focused on influencing the deliberations of the G20, with a specific focus on the Urban 20 (U20) outcomes.

Our work is grounded in rigorous analysis and focuses on four critical priorities:

- Building Green Value Chains in African Cities
- Creating New Financial Pathways for Cities
- Including Cities in Debt Restructuring Conversations
- Fixing the Urban Data Problem

Name: Iedereenaanboord
Description:
Iedereenaanboord is een stichting van buren. Ontstaan vanuit de wens om samen te werken aan een duurzame zelfvoorzienende toekomst op een eiland. We werken met elkaar aan een gezonde en groene leef- en werkomgeving (biodiversiteit), het leven met water (watermanagement) en de energietransitie en circulaire economie. Dit doen we vanuit een gezamenlijke betrokkenheid (rood hart). 
Spelend met de metafoor om het eiland te zien als een motorschip 'varen' we samen door, met iedereen aan boord. We zijn een plek waar wordt geëxperimenteerd, geinnoveerd en geleerd. 

De kennis die we opdoen delen we met de mensen 'aan wal'. Om die reden werken we samen met bezoekers en ondernemers, (internationaal) onderwijs (van basisonderwijs, v-mbo, HBO tot aan WO), overheid en een duurzaam netwerk. 

Gebaseerd op de wensen van buren , het boek Weer verandert alles van het Rotterdams Weerwoord, de klimaatgids van Tim van Hattum en een aantal van de wereldwijde Sustainable Development Goals. 

Brandstof om te varen is het actief meedenken en doen aan deze ambitie. Naast passie, handjes, kennis en ervaringen zijn ook financiële middelen nodig. 

Deze ontvangen we in de vorm van donaties, sponsoring, opdrachten, samenwerkingsverbanden en subsidies. Bijdragen zijn meer dan welkom en we hebben meer dan voldoende terug te bieden. 

Belangrijke financiers zijn voor ons op dit moment: Kansen voor West, Provincie Zuid Holland, diverse afdelingen binnen de gemeente Rotterdam. Ook de samenwerking met onderwijs is van cruciaal belang. 

Stichting Iedereen aan boord wordt medegefinancieerd vanuit de Europese Unie.

Name: AMA OZO AMA CENI - Initiative

This organization has a humble and dedicated identity for fostering peaceful coexistence among refugees and host communities in West Nile. AMA OZO AMA CENI - Initiative is headed by the entrusted educated and professional board that forms the (thinkers), the implementing staff that forms the (doers) and the communities that forms the (enablers) for its operationalization in the community. We keep the community at the forefront of implementation leaving no one behind. With seven years of struggle in the community of West Nile, we are registered not-for profit organization to operate in West Nile region of Uganda. AMA OZO AMA CENI - Initiative aims at providing a holistic and profound progress with unwavering support in a multi-disciplinary approach.
 
VISION: An ideal Partner for integrated Community Transformation.
MISSION: To mobilize, educate, and empower communities for a healthier living, peaceful co-existence and Transformation.

1.	To educate communities for adoption of good norms of good citizenship and national unity.
2.	To work for uplifting the status of women and Youths in societies through training programs for self-reliance.
3.	To educate community people against drug and substance abuse.
4.	To promote Tree growing at house hold levels among the local communities.
5.	To promote sustainable agriculture land management and agroforestry in agro systems.  
6.	To promote use of indigenous local materials for pest and diseases management within communities.
7.	To promote fuel and energy efficient technologies among households for cooking and other energy requirements
8.	To enhance Pollution control and Environmental protection awareness among communities.

Name: UC-URBAN LAB
Description:
The University Community Urban Lab for Interactive Learning and Innovative Societal Solutions (UC-URBANLAB) is a collaborative research platform for Urban Planning and Design researchers and students of Alexandria University, Grant funded by Science and Technology Development Fund STDF.

The urban lab project aim to strengthen role of university in society through creating mechanisms for academia/society co-production of knowledge, to develop innovative solutions for urban challenges. 
This entails a transformed and more open knowledge system, which means the introduction of processes that bring in the societal agenda to the academic community. This aim will be achieved through the role of the urban lab as a catalyst for engagement and interaction among stakeholders and partners. The lab includes a physical space and a cyber space where both facilitate the co-design and co-production of knowledge (enforcing links between education, research and business). 
The urban lab acts as the central platform that facilitates the interaction between teaching, research and local community. As presented by the following diagram, the three main streams: (1) curricula development/capacity building, (2) research hub, and (3) project-based initiatives, are supported by the urban lab facilities that include data production/management and a collaborative platform (physical and web-based).

Name: Agence d'urbanisme de la région grenobloise
Description:
Selon la loi (Art. L 132-6 du code de l'urbanisme, Alur 2014), L’Agence d’urbanisme de la région grenobloise, membre de la Fédération française des agences d’urbanisme (Fnau), a pour mission de suivre les évolutions urbaines, de participer à la définition des politiques publiques d'aménagement et de développement, à l'élaboration des documents d'urbanisme et de planification... dans le souci d'harmoniser les politiques publiques aux différentes échelles de territoire. 

Association loi 1901 créée en 1967, elle compte aujourd'hui une soixantaine de collaborateurs pluridisciplinaires (urbanistes, architectes, ingénieurs, juristes, cartographes, paysagistes, démographes, économistes, etc.). Ils croisent leur expertise dans les domaines de l'habitat, du foncier, de l'économie territoriale, de la cohésion sociale, de l'environnement, de l'énergie et des mobilités.

L’Agence mutualise projets, réflexions, observations et analyses au service de ses membres, majoritairement des collectivités territoriales de la grande aire alpine grenobloise. Grâce à quoi, elle contribue à la connaissance, à la compréhension et au développement des territoires, dans une vision globale. Toutes ses missions et études se traduisent dans un programme d’activité partenarial construit collectivement en regard des priorités des territoires, et voté annuellement par les élus de son Conseil d’administration.

Name: Downtown Columbus, Inc.
Description:
Downtown Columbus, Inc. (DCI), formerly Columbus Downtown Development Corporation & Capitol South, is a private nonprofit organization whose mission is to lead city-changing projects and collaborations that improve the connectivity, livability and inclusivity of the Downtown Columbus experience.

Downtown Columbus, Inc. drives development and progress of the Downtown Columbus Strategic Plan, working collaboratively across sectors toward the vision for Downtown Columbus to become a neighborhood of connected, people-first urban districts that can be enjoyed by all. 

For more than two decades, Downtown Columbus, Inc., has been leading transformational change in the heart of Columbus bringing an influx of residents and investment, all guided by the community through Downtown Strategic Plans.  

The 2010 Downtown Strategic plan emphasized projects, creating greenspaces like Columbus Commons, the Scioto Mile and Dorrian Green, along with cultural amenities such as the National Veterans Memorial and Museum and American Museum of Natural History at COSI, to catalyze new neighborhoods like RiverSouth and The Peninsula.  

In the 2022 Downtown Strategic Plan, the community made the priority clear: people. In 2023, Downtown Columbus, Inc., began immediately delivering what residents requested. Current projects include workforce housing Topiary Park Crossing, free programming at the Scioto Mile and Dorrian Green, shopping destination Common Thread, Dinner Dollars, phase II development of The Peninsula, public art initiatives, and development of the future Capital Line.

Description:
Bairros planejados para o hoje e o futuro.

A Ábaco Urbanizadora desenvolve empreendimentos com foco em qualidade de vida, urbanismo consciente, sustentabilidade, biofilia e valorização patrimonial. Mais do que projetos urbanos, entregamos comunidades vivas, que integram pessoas e natureza, com alma e propósito.

Name: City Parking Integrated Solutions
Description: City Parking is a leading provider of integrated parking solutions, offering a comprehensive range of services and technologies to optimize parking operations and enhance the mobility experience. We specialize in off-street parking, on-street parking, parking guidance systems, robotic parking, traffic intelligence, toll gates, speed radars, and weight in motion solutions. Our team of experienced professionals leverages cutting-edge technology to deliver innovative parking solutions that are tailored to the unique needs of our clients.

Name: Planning Practice & Research Journal
Les Portes du Tarn, un parc d'activités pensé pour l'économie, construit avec l'environnement
Description:
>>> UN EMPLACEMENT STRATÉGIQUE AUX PORTES DE TOULOUSE
Situé au Nord-Est de Toulouse, ce parc d'activité qui s'étend sur 198ha est conçu comme un espace mixte totalement intégré à son environnement.
- A 10 mn de la rocade toulousaine
- A 25 mn de la gare Matabiau ( entre 72 à 110 TER/jour)
- A 30 mn de l'aéroport Toulouse-Blagnac.

Si la priorité  est donnée à l’activité industrielle, l’aménagement du site permet également de faire le lien entre les activités industrielles et commerciales, les espaces naturels, les résidences et les lieux de détente.

>>> UNE OFFRE ATTRACTIVE
Avec ses 112 ha commercialisables, le parc d’activités « Les Portes du Tarn » est un espace adapté à la vocation et aux exigences des filières industrielles métropolitaines.

>>> PERFORMANCE ECONOMIQUE & RESPECT DE L'ENVIRONNEMENT 
Afin de maîtriser les impacts sur l’environnement, le parc d’activités « Les Portes du Tarn », intègre les principes de « l’Economie Circulaire » dès sa conception.

Name: Urban Creators
Description:
Urban Creators arbejder for at udvikle levende byer med høj livskvalitet for og med mennesker i bevægelse.

Urban Creators er et rådgivningsfirma som arbejder med en helhedsorienteret tilgang til mobilitet og byudvikling. Med vores løsninger og procestilgang ønsker vi at sætte mennesker i bevægelse både i bogstavelig forstand ved at forbedre deres mobilitet og livskvalitet men også i overført betydning ved at vise en retning, give indsigt og ny inspiration.

Firmaet ejes og drives af de to partnere Maria Wass-Danielsen og Filip Zibrandtsen. To kreative og nytænkende trafikplanlæggere og byudviklere med tilsammen mere end 40 års erfaring.
Begge er uddannede civilingeniører med en bred erhvervserfaring fra ind- og udland, fra politisk styrede organisationer, kommuner, Realdania By samt erfaring som rådgivere i mange år.

Name: Ayala Land Estates
Description: Our estates serve as a platform for our diverse residential and commercial offerings on which thriving, sustainable communities emerge, spurring new centers of growth across the country.

Name: Geopartner Landinspektører A/S
Description:
Geopartner Landinspektører A/S er en professionel rådgivende landinspektørvirksomhed og blandt landets største inden for sit felt. Med godt 230 kompetente medarbejdere fordelt på mere end 20 lokationer i hele Danmark yder vi landsdækkende rådgivning og løser opgaver for vores kunder.

Vi løser store som små opgaver inden for de traditionelle matrikulære landinspektørdiscipliner, arealerhvervelse og lodsejerforhandling, planlægnings- og screeningsopgaver indenfor byudvikling og vedvarende energi, 3D-scanning af bygninger, og alt indenfor opmåling, digitalisering og afsætning indenfor byggeri og forsyning.

Name: Novaform Vastgoedontwikkelaars b.v.
Description:
Novaform is een pur sang vastgoedontwikkelaar. Groot genoeg voor grootschalige integrale gebiedsontwikkeling (100 - 350 woningen), maar niet te groot voor bijvoorbeeld een klein binnenstedelijk inbreidingsplan (10 -20 woningen). Ontwikkelen op menselijke schaal met respect voor de directe omgeving, met name in de sector woningbouw, doch vaak in combinatie met commercieel vastgoed zoals winkels en kantoren.

Ontstaan in 1980 heeft Novaform zich in eerste instantie gericht op binnenstedelijke herontwikkeling. Deze tak van sport mag dan ook tot een specifieke discipline van Novaform gerekend worden. Vanaf 2000 heeft Novaform zich daarnaast ook gericht op uitleggebieden en integrale gebiedsontwikkeling. 

Novaform is sinds 2003 onderdeel van B.V. Verenigde Bedrijven Van de Klok (VBK), een middelgroot bouw- en ontwikkelingsconcern wat inmiddels tot de top 25 grootste vastgoedondernemingen in Nederland behoort. 

De heldere en platte organisatiestructuur van VBK is een garantie voor korte lijnen. VBK fungeert hierbij als holdingmaatschappij welke de werkmaatschappijen, daar waar nodig, met financiële middelen ondersteunt. De gezonde financiële basis en de schaalgrootte van VBK maakt het mogelijk dat ook grote bouwprojecten ontwikkeld en / of gerealiseerd kunnen worden. 

Novaform is actief in heel Zuid- en Midden Nederland: Brabant, Zeeland, Limburg, Zuid-Holland en Noord-Holland.

Name: Novaform Vastgoedontwikkelaars b.v.
Description:
Novaform is een pur sang vastgoedontwikkelaar.
