Name: Terres en villes
Description:
Créé en 2000, Terres en villes est le réseau des acteurs locaux des politiques agricoles et alimentaires urbaines. En s’appuyant sur l’intelligence collective, le réseau accompagne ses membres pour faire face aux défis de la transition agricole et alimentaire. 

Les nombreuses rencontres organisées entre les membres permettent un échange d’expériences et de pratiques et un apprentissage mutuel, tandis que les projets et recherches-actions dans lesquels est impliqué le réseau permettent d’expérimenter dans les territoires et d’explorer de nouveaux domaines d’action. En s’appuyant sur ses acquis, Terres en villes contribue au débat national et international sur la ville, son agriculture et son alimentation.

Terres en villes est un acteur pivot du plaidoyer en faveur d'une agriculture et d'une alimentation de territoire. Co-fondatrice des Assises de la transition alimentaire et de l'agroécologie, elle prend part à l'organisation des Assises (Montpellier 2024, Dijon 2026) et au travail de plaidoyer national et européen associés. La Charte de Terres en villes prône les valeurs du développement durable et l’hybridation des approches entre agronomie, urbanisme et écologie.

Ce sont aujourd’hui vingt-sept agglomérations ou métropoles qui constituent le réseau, chacune étant représentée conjointement par l’intercommunalité et la Chambre départementale d’agriculture. 

Depuis 2015, Terres en villes est le chef de file du Réseau national des Projets alimentaires territoriaux et de sa plateforme de service www.france-pat.fr

Name: Houseal Lavigne
Description:
Houseal Lavigne is a professional consulting firm specializing in all areas of Community Planning, Urban Design, and Economic Development. Our professional staff provides a collaboration of disciplines and is committed to developing creative solutions that ensure compatibility between the existing, new, built, and natural environments.

Houseal Lavigne Associates strengthens communities through creative, dynamic, and viable approaches to planning, design, and development. From revitalizing downtowns to creating context sensitive zoning regulations, Houseal Lavigne Associates provides the expertise necessary to improve the relationship between people and their environment.

We can help identify the opportunities, establish the vision, and implement the recommendations necessary to exceed the expectations for all your planning and development related concerns. Our engaging community outreach and creative approach to urban planning and design have helped to establish our award winning track record of successful projects.

Name: Parc naturel régional du Massif des Bauges
Description: Créé en 1995 et labellisé UNESCO Géoparc mondial, le Parc naturel régional du Massif des Bauges s’appuie sur la concertation pour mener à bien ses missions : protéger les patrimoines naturels, culturels et paysagers ; aménager le territoire de manière équilibrée et durable ; développer l’économie et le lien social ; accueillir, éduquer et informer les publics ; expérimenter des solutions innovantes pour relever les défis environnementaux et sociétaux. Le Parc s'étend sur un périmètre de plus de 900 km² et regroupe 76 communes adhérentes, dont 5 villes portes.

Name: T&B Planning, Inc.
Description:
T&B Planning provides due diligence, land use planning, entitlement, CEQA/NEPA compliance, development services, project management, and GIS services from our offices in Irvine, California; San Diego, California; and Murrysville (Pittsburgh), Pennsylvania.  We secure the approvals our clients need to take a project from concept to construction. 

T&B Planning is a nationally-certified Women's Business Enterprise (WBE) that has been in business since 1974. We have a "client first" philosophy and provide responsive, professional, and personalized service that is difficult for larger firms to deliver.

Name: CIMA Beratung + Management
Description:
We have been advising since 1988.
We are 90 employees at 10 locations.
We work across disciplines.
We are consultants at your side - and stand up for you.

Name: Fab City
Description:
Fab City started as a challenge for a city to produce (almost) everything it consumes. The provocation has grown into a global movement, which is facilitated by the Fab City Foundation, a Network of 54 cities and a Collective of experts.

The Fab City Foundation supports the Fab City global initiative through the development of projects and educational programs that are focused on building the capacity of cities and their communities. Based in e-Estonia, the Foundation is location independent and supports distributed programs and projects the world over.

Name: Braining the Future
Description:
Braining the Future werkt aan leefbare steden en dorpen. 

We brengen lokale partijen in beweging om de leefbaarheid van hun buurt, wijk, dorp of stad een impuls te geven. Onze aanpak is gebaseerd op social design: het perspectief van de gebruiker staat centraal. We brengen een positieve mindset om bruggen te bouwen en thema's met elkaar te verbinden. Om zo te komen tot oplossingen die écht werken.  

Thema's waaraan we werken: wijkontwikkeling, omgevingsvisies, mobiliteit & bereikbaarheid, energietransitie, klimaatadaptatie, lokale en circulaire economie

 
Opdrachtgevers zijn o.a. Apeldoorn, Breda, Stadsregio Parkstad Limburg, Heerlen, Kerkrade en Woerden/Oudewater. 

Benieuwd naar onze activiteiten? Volg ons dan hier op LinkedIn! Heb je zelf vragen waarmee we je misschien kunnen helpen? Stuur een mailtje naar: lili@brainingthefuture.nl

Name: Prameya Consulting
Description:
Prameya People, an urban planning strategy and consulting firm dedicated to building inclusive cities for all. Prameya refers to the act of making a hypothesis. Working at the intersection of economics, policy and design, we work with public, private, non-profit and civic institutions to diagnose urban problems and implement evidence-based solutions. 

Prameya People is here to be the facilitator and promote sustainable urban development.

Name: OBSERVATORIO DE CIUDADES UC
Description:
En el Observatorio de Ciudades UC (OCUC), tenemos como objetivo la consolidación como Centro de Investigación Aplicada de estudios urbanos y territoriales, que establece a nivel de la Facultad de Arquitectura, Diseño y Estudios urbanos, una plataforma de colaboración institucional para el desarrollo de proyectos e investigaciones que permitan la generación e implementación de políticas públicas urbanas en el país. Como plataforma de integración de las distintas unidades académicas, uno de nuestros objetivos del OCUC se basa en enfocar y capitalizar la producción académica tanto del cuerpo académico y de estudiantes, estableciendo una integración de las distintas actividades y propuestas de cada unidad.

Por otra parte, el OCUC se posiciona como un centro de estudios urbanos y territoriales que permite contar con diagnósticos y propuestas concretas de innovación en políticas públicas, acorde con la realidad institucional y política del país, capitalizando en la medida de lo posible, el rol de las diversas personalidades en el ámbito público. De esta manera, se plantea como objetivo el abordaje en profundidad de algunas temáticas de la Política Nacional de Desarrollo Urbano, y el desarrollo de propuestas específicas que dialoguen con la implementación de ésta en el territorio.

Con todo, somos una plataforma de diagnóstico, monitoreo y proyección de las tendencias de desarrollo de las ciudades chilenas, a través de la investigación con indicadores espaciales urbanos que generan insumos y sirven de apoyo a la Academia, el sector público y la sociedad civil.

Trabajamos en un equipo interdisciplinario compuesto por personas provenientes del mundo de la geografía, la arquitectura, el diseño y la computación.
Location: Providencia (Santiago de Chile), Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: St+art India
Description:
St+art creates public art projects through art districts, experiential exhibitions and installations contributing to the urban regeneration and to community living across India. Its aim is to make art accessible to a wider audience by taking it out of the conventional gallery space and embedding it within the cities we live in.

Since 2014, with the constant support of Asian Paints, St+art has spearheaded Urban Art projects across 20 cities by bringing together multiple voices such as regional government bodies, foreign cultural institutions and street artists. These projects activate otherwise neglected spaces through art and cultural activities, thus enabling the citizens to reimagine how public spaces can be utilised. 

St+art has so far established art districts in the cities of Mumbai, Delhi, Chennai, Hyderabad, Goa and Coimbatore. Each representing the contemporary face of India, these districts have been realised under the vision of India's Smart Cities Mission.

Within its framework, the foundation also provides a platform for education and social awareness through a range of curated workshops, tours and community engagement activities.

Name: Center of Urban Systems - CUS - UM6P
Description: La forte poussée démographique africaine et la nouvelle révolution numérique urbaine transforment profondément nos manières de gérer et de concevoir les villes pour répondre à ses défis. C'est la mission que se donnée le CUS de l'UM6P.

Name: Renaissance Planning Group
Description:
Renaissance Planning is an urban planning firm dedicated to creating cities that work. We specialize in the integration of transportation, land use, urban design, economic, and environmental considerations to create thoughtful, lasting plans. We believe in the power of integrated planning to help enhance connections between people, place, and opportunity. 

We do this by applying the technical rigor required to plan for multimodal transportation networks, conduct market analyses, and design elements of city form to create more livable communities.  We also apply strategic communications and outreach techniques aimed at building consensus and empowering communities to act on their plans. We are a team of collaborative professionals with skills and expertise in a diverse range of disciplines including engineering, planning, urban design, environmental science, economics and communications. From regions to streetscapes, from rural towns to big cities – we understand the challenges communities face. We seek partnerships with communities to address these challenges by developing thoughtful options, viable solutions and lasting plans to achieve the most desirable place-based outcomes.

Name: Serviland
Description:
Serviland nace como la primera compañía para dar servicio de gestión urbanística a terceros con visión multicliente.

Con una cartera de más de 200 millones de m2 en todo el ámbito nacional, que nos sitúa como el mayor gestor de suelo de España, nuestro objetivo se centra en ofrecer los mejores planes de actuación con el fin de generar valor a través de la gestión urbanística, ofreciendo la mayor rentabilidad y una optimización de los tiempos de gestión del activo. Lo logramos con un servicio diferencial en el análisis, en el desarrollo y en la comercialización de suelo, conscientes de nuestra contribución en el crecimiento de las ciudades y de su población.

Nuestra especialización, un equipo multidisciplinar altamente cualificado de más de 100 profesionales, la cobertura territorial nacional y el compromiso con nuestros clientes son parte de nuestros valores diferenciales.

Desde Serviland, con el soporte de Servihabitat, tenemos la capacidad de liderar todo el ciclo de gestión urbanística, ofreciendo un servicio end-to-end para cualquier tipo de suelo, desde terrenos rústicos hasta solares edificables. Nuestro marco de acción va más allá de la gestión en trámites urbanísticos y de desarrollo, pues actuamos con la responsabilidad de aportar una visión de negocio en la gestión del suelo. Prueba de ello es que trabajamos con un enfoque de riesgo compartido marcado por el desempeño general del rendimiento de la cartera. 

Si tienes cualquier consulta, puedes contactar con nosotros enviándonos un correo a: contactocorporativo@servilandgu.es 

Para temas de negocio o comerciales, estamos a tu disposición en el 942 049 000 de lunes a domingo (excepto festivos nacionales) de 08:00 a 24:00h o, si lo prefieres, puedes enviarnos un mensaje a: contactonegocio@servilandgu.es

Buscamos profesionales que quieran unirse a un equipo especialista en pleno desarrollo y con demostrada experiencia en la gestión urbanística. Envíanos tu candidatura a: unetealequipo@servilandgu.es

Name: Bristol Temple Quarter
Description:
Bristol Temple Quarter is one of the UK's largest, most ambitious city-centre regeneration programmes. Our shared ambition is to deliver 10,000 homes and thousands of new jobs, alongside new opportunities, public space and sustainable infrastructure. 

The programme is managed in partnership between Bristol City Council, Homes England, Network Rail and the West of England Combined Authority. In March 2024, the partners formed the Bristol Temple Quarter Limited Liability Partnership to drive forward the comprehensive transformation of the area. 

Welcoming and inclusive, Bristol Temple Quarter is a place built on partnerships. Emphasising Bristol’s diversity, it fosters job creation, cultural celebration, and environmental revitalisation. Combining robust heritage with sustainable design, it sets a new standard for community-led development in the city's unique spirit.

Name: Agence Régionale de Développement (ARD) de DAKAR
NEBourhoods - New European Bauhaus Lighthouse
Description:
"Creating NEBourhoods Together" is one of the six lighthouse demonstrators of the New European Bauhaus funded by the EU to address the grand challenges of climate, environment and health. The aim is to collaborate on the European Green deal to create more sustainable, inclusive and beautiful living environments across the EU. In Munich-Neuperlach, one of Europe's largest post-war urban expansion areas, NEBourhoods, together with citizens and stakeholders from culture, science and business, is implementing ten actions from all fields of urban development: From circular construction and redesign of residential and commercial buildings, innovative forms of mobility and energy communities, biodiversity and green space concepts to nutrition and youth culture. The encouragement of entrepreneurial thinking and action and the practical implementation in co-creative processes supports the formation of sustainable neighbourhoods in  liveable, inclusive and beautiful cities of the future.  

"If the European Green Deal has a soul, then it is the New European Bauhaus which has led to an explosion of creativity across our Union."
Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Commission

 "NEBourhoods" is funded by the European Union.
Duration of the "NEBourhoods" action: October 2022 until March 2025

CONSORTIUM: LH München • Architekturgalerie München • BayFOR • Green City • Hauck Weisser Studio Animal Aided Design • Hochschule München • M:UniverCity • Makerspace • Münchner Gesellschaft für Stadterneuerung • Strascheg Center For Entrepreneurship • Str.ucture GmbH • Studio | Stadt | Region Architektur & Stadtentwicklung • TU Munich • UnternehmerTUM 
 
ASSOCIATED PARTNERS: BYAK • Bayern Design • BDA Bayern • BDA

 ADEPT (typography), Klaus Leidorf (aerial view)

Name: Swimmable Cities
Description:
Swimmable Cities: Transforming Urban Waterways

Launched in the lead up to the Paris Olympics in July 2024, the Swimmable Cities alliance is supporting a global, grassroots movement for swimmable urban waterways. With 126 diverse signatory organisations from 72 cities and communities and 27 countries, our Swimmable Cities Charter champions the Right to Swim, celebrates urban swimming culture, and honours the sacredness of water.

Together we aim to rewrite rules, promote participation and create resilient, connected communities.

Goals of the Swimmable Cities alliance:

3 by '30: Swimmable Cities Summits (in Paris, Copenhagen, New York)
30 by '30: Flagship Swimmable Cities
300 by '30: Next Gen Swimmable Cities
3000 by '30: Swimmable Cities Charter Signatories

Let’s make waves together and ensure our waterways are swimmable for generations to come!

Name: ELISIUM
Description:
ELISIUM is a pioneering cognitive microcity in the USA, fusing ultramodern architectural design with sustainable, luxury hospitality and living. This transformative megaproject covers 6.2 square miles (nearly 4,000 acres) and is master-planned for 10,800 residents. Designed as an AI-managed, net-zero emissions, and sponge microcity, ELISIUM offers a curated collection of 14 distinct districts, each with a unique theme and purpose, creating a tapestry of experiences unlike any other. Projected to attract 500,000 visitors annually, ELISIUM is poised to become a major economic hub, generating an estimated 15,000 direct, 5,000 indirect construction jobs, followed by 3,500 permanent positions post-launch. At ELISIUM, we redefine excellence through unparalleled experiences, groundbreaking innovations, and an unwavering commitment to sustainability. Our project sets a new global standard for responsible development, reshaping how we live, work, and interact within a community. Join us on this journey – for investment opportunities, Message us above.

Managed by COGNITIVE, ELISIUM's AI tech company: 
https://www.linkedin.com/company/cog-city/ 

https://Cog.city

Name: Friends of the Urban Forest
Description: Friends of the Urban Forest bring neighbors together to plant and care for street trees and sidewalk gardens in San Francisco. We are committed to growing San Francisco’s urban forest, building community, and taking a local leadership role in climate solutions through the simple act of planting trees and gardens. Since 1981, we have planted about 60,000 trees, totaling about half of San Francisco's street trees.

Name: METROPOLI
Description:
Fundacion Metropoli is an international institution born in 1997 at the University of Pennsylvania. Its focus and objective is working in cities and territories to globally contribute to the acceleration of their economic development, competitiveness, life quality, and sustainability.   Its projects integrate two essential components "urban intelligence" and "digital technology".

The activities of Fundacion Metropoli function through 3 primary synergistic instruments in relation to developing cities and territories:

01 RESEARCH: Knowledge Creation and Sharing
02 DESIGN LAB: New Ideas, New Projects
03 INCUBATION: From Ideas to Reality

Fundacion Metropoli is part of Metropoli Ecosystems, which includes also the following companies: Metropoli Cities Lab and Metropoli Urban Solutions. Metropoli Ecosystems has collaborated with many different cities in the world applying its philosophy of “Intelligent Territories”. The application of its philosophy enables cities and territories to generate a special magnetism and develop initiatives and projects of big impact. 

Metropoli Ecosystems has received numerous international recognitions, from the United Nations, the European Union, the European Council of Spatial Planners, Institutes of Architects and Business Associations; from which is worth highlighting, the European Urban & Regional Planning Awards in three occasions and the Global Smart Cities Award in 2015.

Name: Arabella for Tourist & Urban Development
Description:
The establishment of Arabella for Touristic & Urban Development Company has culminated our 35 years of
experience in the development sector, which includes real estate, agricultural, and industrial development
Vision
Our vision is to achieve our implementation for
high standard real estate projects by utilizing
our unparalleled expertise and ultimately
gaining our clients’ trust by fulfilling three needs
and setting a new benchmark in the urban
development field.
Mission
Our mission is to implement the summary of our
experiences in the field of Project Development
in adherence with the best practice in all
aspects of the process, including research,
planning and execution, thereby providing
tangible benefit to society and an example to
follow.

Name: ShiftSweden
Description:
Framtidens mobilitet och samhällsbyggande.  ShiftSweden är ett strategiskt innovationsprogram inom Impact Innovation, Sveriges innovationssatsning för 2030-talet.  Vi ställer om Sverige till attraktiva och tillgängliga livsmiljöer för alla.

ShiftSweden mobiliserar organisationer och individer för att skapa nya värden och visa hur omställningen kan ske över hela Sverige på ett fossilfritt och resursmedvetet sätt. Vi arbetar med tre nödvändiga skiften: 

→ att skapa nya värden genom cirkulära affärsmodeller i byggande och förvaltning 

→ att skapa konkurrenskraftiga alternativ till enskilt bilresande. 

→ att integrera byggd miljö och mobilitet till ett system.

Programmet leds av IQ Samhällsbyggnad och VTI (Statens väg- och transportforskningsinstitut) i samverkan med Boverket, Trafikverket, RISE, IVL (Svenska miljöinstitutet), Volvos Forskningsstiftelse VREF, Region Skåne, Region Stockholm, Västra Götalandsregionen och Västtrafik. 
Redan från start är aktörer från branschorganisationer, akademi och forskningsinstitut, privat näringsliv, offentlig och ideell sektor engagerade i programmet. Vår ambition är att bli ännu fler.

Name: Sustainability Solutions Pacific Inc
Description: Our goal is to promote sustainable development in the country by aligning its core policies with the policies and development plans of the Government of Papua New Guinea and international policies including sustainable development goals. The organisation core function is to promote environment, economic, and social sustainability and to ensure that the people have a better livelihood. It is to carry out projects that can not only sustain the livelihoods of people but also to promote green economic growth with protection of our biodiversity, ecosystems and environment so the benefits can sustain both present and the future generations.

Name: Hovinbyen Sirkulære Oslo
Description: Hovinbyen, som kobler sammen indre by og Groruddalen, skal transformeres fullstendig. Det offentlig-private samarbeidet, Hovinbyen Sirkulære Oslo, skal drive frem ny kunnskap, nye løsninger og nye arbeidsplasser innen sirkulærøkonomi – særlig innen bygg, anlegg og produksjonsnæring.

Name: California Forever
Description: The East Solano Plan brings 15,000 local jobs paying over $88,000/year, a $200 million commitment to invest in revitalizing downtowns in existing Solano cities, and $500 million in community benefits for downpayment assistance, scholarships, and small business grants for Solano residents.

Name: The Real Estate Council of Greater Fort Worth
Description:
The Real Estate Council of Greater Fort Worth (REC of GFW) is an association of members who make up the commercial real estate industry in Fort Worth and Tarrant County. The association provides a unified voice for the industry and promotes long-term job growth and an enhanced quality of life.

Learn more about what is going on with REC of GFW, check out our Link-in-bio – https://bit.ly/m/REC-of-GFW

Name: NEVER SAY NO FORUM
Description: Never say No Forum‟ is a value driven NGO registered under the Ministry of Corporate Affairs. The main aim of NGO is improve urban lives and provide smart sustainable urban solutions. We also develop cutting-edge research in the field of climate change, urban planning, social issues, disaster management, and gender issues. The NGO is committed to a happier world. There are numerous programs drafted by the Intelligence team to ensure we make a difference on the ground for the people who live on the edges.

Name: Telim.az

Name: UCRISP Urban Climate Resilient Infrastructure & Strategic Planning
Description:
Urban Climate Resilient Infrastructure & Strategic Planning (UCRISP) is an international urban design, planning, research and sustainable development agency registered in California as a non-profit organization under IRC Section 501 (c)(3). 

We originated as the research and sustainable development unit of estudioOCA as a way to explore new approaches to the challenges of climate change. Our work with a diverse range of partners helps us develop and shape our own methodologies to climate change mitigation and adaptation in urban and rural areas, giving equal attention to science-based solutions and community-driven interventions.

Our projects provide pragmatic support, in the form of reports and capacity-building workshops, during the decision making process of local leaders and stakeholders. They encourage cooperation between disparate groups in navigating an effective solution to achieve flood and drought resilience.

The multidisciplinary nature of our team has characterized the work at UCRISP. Landscape architects, urban designers, planners, water resource engineers, ecologists, social scientists and researchers strategize together to develop detailed solutions that improve urban and rural environments and facilitate connections with local communities. Together we have decades of experience working internationally on projects in Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas.

Name: Preopening
Description: We work on 150 projects annually across the Nordic region. We are specialists in hotels, restaurants and meeting venues, offering a wide range of services for all stakeholders in a project.

We are Luton Rising, the trading name for London Luton Airport Ltd. We are a community-owned business, supporting & improving lives across our communities. Our largest asset is London Luton Airport, the UK's most socially impactful airport.

Our public consultation on the long-term expansion of London Luton Airport is running until 4th April 2022. Find out more and have your say.

Name: Regional Development Australia Barossa Gawler Light Adelaide Plains
Description:
Local people creating local opportunities.

We work with businesses and communities to sustainably grow our regional economy and create more liveable communities. We’re a non-government and non-profit organisation part of a national network.

Name: Envoy - Electric Car Share
Description:
Envoy provides shared e-Mobility as an Amenity for communities, where people live, work and stay,

Envoy is the leading provider of on-demand shared electric vehicles. Envoy vehicles are located in dedicated parking spaces at apartment complexes, hotels, workplaces and more. We provide a turnkey solution that includes EV infrastructure, an all-electric fleet, fleet maintenance, insurance, full service mobile app, customer support and robust analytics.

Name: Lexème de la perspective
Description: L'association Lexéme de la Perspective, fondée en 2022, est un organisme dynamique et engagé dans la promotion de la culture, de l'éducation et de la créativité. Notre mission principale est de favoriser une perspective inclusive et ouverte sur le monde à travers l'exploration des arts, des sciences humaines et des échanges interculturels. En encourageant le dialogue et la collaboration, nous visons à créer des espaces où chacun peut s'exprimer librement, échanger des idées et enrichir sa compréhension du monde qui nous entoure. Que ce soit à travers des ateliers, des conférences, des événements culturels ou des projets communautaires, Lexéme de la Perspective s'efforce de promouvoir l'épanouissement personnel et le vivre-ensemble dans une société diverse et plurielle.

Name: Komunitas B2B
Description:
Komunitas dan media digital yang berfokus pada dunia Business-to-Business (B2B) dan UMKM di Indonesia. Business update made simple. Peluang usaha lebih dekat. Komunitas yang saling support.

Let’s build something impactful, together!

Name: Community Foundations Australia
Description:
Community Foundations Australia (CFAustralia) is the peak body for Australia’s network of community foundations. Established in 2007, we are a member-based, not-for-profit organisation and registered charity.

Our members are community-owned, place-based charities that use first-hand knowledge of local issues to make their communities healthier and fairer, more inclusive and sustainable.

Our sector is small but growing. We work with community foundations across the country with a majority operating in regional areas. CFAustralia unites and represents these foundations to amplify their collective voice and impact.

Name: inCitu
Description: inCitu is on the mission to map the world's future built environment into augmented reality to empower residents, developers, and city governments to collaborate on the process of urban change.

Name: Mod Foundation
Description:
The work we do is design-driven, with an emphasis on exploring the underlying dimensions in the urban fabric, focusing on everyday spaces and objects. We are fascinated with cities, and interpreting them by visualising their information and analyses, hands-on design and mapping techniques.

Started in 2010, Mod Foundation is the urban design team of Venkataramanan Associates (VA), an architecture and urbanism practice headquartered in Bangalore. The Foundation is an interdisciplinary urban action and research team which consists of architects, designers, researchers, curators and practitioners with interests in, and interests for engagement with the urbanisation processes in India.

Description:
Structure publique locale en charge de l'aménagement du territoire.
Faites avec nous la ville qui vous ressemble.

Name: Beyond Urban
Description:
Indian cities are growing into what is known as city-regions, having significantly wider geographical and administrative extents. What used to be problems faced by cities only a few decades ago, is now commonly spilling over to their adjoining regions. It is of paramount importance to set urban areas in India on the right track at the right time. As a consultancy, we seek to work not only in areas which are evidently identified as urban, but also rural, regional and peri-urban. Hence the name- ‘Beyond Urban’

We envisage that through this consultancy, we will pursue a pragmatic and evidence-based approach towards solving problems that are currently bothering India’s cities. In our approach, we are mindful of the wider global attention to sustainable development.  Therefore, all work that happens at Beyond Urban shall be centered on the three dimensions of sustainability – economy, environment, and the society.

Following are our areas of work:
Transport and Mobility, Urban Policy Analysis, Action-oriented Research, Case studies for urban planning and policy

Name: SB Friedman Development Advisors
Description: SB Friedman Development Advisors (SB Friedman) provides analytical, strategic and financial consulting services in support of complex, high-impact development projects. Founded in 1990, we serve a full range of clients in the public, private and nonprofit/institutional sectors. Our mission is to help our clients create equitable, resilient and well-designed communities through the practice of real estate economics, development finance and urban planning.

Name: Green Rock Management Group
Description:
The mission of the company is to transform the territory into centers of opportunity, preserve the local culture and environment, introduce new business processes, and ensure the economic growth of Armenia.
We are united by common goals and aspirations and are convinced that our activities are of great importance for the region.
Join our team and discover the space of new opportunities!

Name: İzmir Planlama Ajansı
Description: İzmir Planlama Ajansı (İZPA), İzmir’in geleceğini bilimsel, veri odaklı ve katılımcı yaklaşımlarla şekillendiriyor. Kentimizin sosyal, ekonomik ve çevresel dinamiklerini gözeterek, sürdürülebilir kalkınmayı ve sağlıklı bir kent yaşamını teşvik edecek çözümler üretiyor. Yeni Nesil Belediyecilik, Tek Sağlık ve İyi Olma Hâli ile çoklu krizlere karşı yenilikçi ve etkili yaklaşımlar geliştiriyor. Geçmişten ilham alarak, İzmir’i daha dirençli ve yaşanabilir bir şehir haline getirmek için çalışıyoruz.

Name: Bahía Papagayo
Description: Where lush hillside meets the shore. Where delight comes naturally. Welcome to the world of Bahía Papagayo. Condos, Villas and Single-Family Lots #bahiapapagayocr #magichappenshere

Name: Urbane
Description:
Urbane Development (Urbane) is a community development venture and certified MBE based in New York City. Founded in 2008, Urbane cultivates innovative solutions to build dynamic neighborhoods and positively impact underserved communities. We envision neighborhoods that are defined by their strengths and experienced as places of opportunity and innovation. Urbane leverages the advantages of for-profit enterprise for community benefit by focusing on strategies that generate wealth and resource capacity for communities. 

The Urbane team utilizes decades of community development expertise to plan, design, implement and evaluate strategies to elevate the communities in which we work. Our core competencies include community engagement, business development, market intelligence and insights, program design and development, organizational capacity building, and place-based investment and development. All our work is framed by a participatory action research (PAR) approach, allowing us to foment the bedrock of transformative communities. Since 2008, Urbane has worked with over100 urban and rural communities to develop solutions to entrenched challenges. The team has worked with over 1,500 small businesses, representing over 1.5 million square feet of commercial and community facility space. Urbane has helped raise over $75 million to help small business, commercial projects, and community development initiatives in low-income areas with the goal of promoting internal wealth generation. Urbane consults on projects throughout North America and co-develops mixed-use real estate in the New York City and Philadelphia Metro areas.

Name: Cabarrus Economic Development
Description:
The Cabarrus EDC makes a measurable impact on individuals and families through strategic partnerships that support local startups, existing businesses, and  recruitment of new industry.

We serve as the lead economic development agency for Cabarrus County and its municipalities. We support business relocation and expansion in Cabarrus County by offering competitive incentives, a talented workforce, a wealth of available resources, and more to help new and existing businesses thrive.

Name: The Planning Studio
Description:
We acknowledge the Traditional Owners of the lands in which we work, the Gadigal people, and pay respect to Elders, past, present + emerging. We deeply respect the Connection to Country, culture and traditions of Australia’s First Nation Peoples and are committed to learn from and walk alongside community as we plan for places and communities. 

The Planning Studio is a town planning, social strategy and engagement consultancy supporting governments, the private sector and communities in 'joining the dots' between policy, projects and people to build equitable, connected, sustainable and generous places. 

Our team are industry leaders offering significant experience across a broad portfolio including development assessment, social value and impact assessment, statutory planning, strategic landuse and infrastructure planning, social, cultural and community strategy development, urban research and engagement. We are also experienced and trusted advisors to local and state government, NGOs and private sector clients. We work with them to coach and build capacity resulting in meaningful outcomes for the projects, organisations and communities.

We work in partnership with clients and design teams to secure development approvals for large and small, high quality residential, commercial, industrial, and government projects and work with the private sector and community housing providers to secure much needed affordable and lower cost housing.

To support urban and regional projects into delivery, we have established strong partnerships with like-minded consultancies to develop bespoke, meaningful and measurable strategic frameworks and implementation pathways and broaden the skills and services we offer.

Name: UN-Habitat Pakistan
Description: The United Nations Human Settlements Programme (UN-Habitat) is mandated by the UN General Assembly to promote socially and environmentally sustainable towns and cities with the goal of providing adequate shelter for all. It is the focal point for all urbanization and human settlement matters within the UN system. UN-Habitat’s vision of “urbanization” encompasses all levels of human settlements, including small rural communities, villages, market towns, immediate cities and large cities and metropolises.

Name: Rechtvaardige Straat
Description:
Op straat kunnen mensen van jong tot oud allerlei verschillende dingen doen. Er kan worden gespeeld, ontmoet en gewinkeld. Er kan worden geklust, gekust en geklooid. Je kunt er rondkijken, met of zonder andere mensen zijn en je kunt er doorheen reizen.

Een Rechtvaardige Straat is een plek waar we dit ten volle  Wij vinden het niet normaal dat veel straten nu zo gevaarlijk zijn, dat er IEDERE DAG twee mensen dood gaan en dertig mensen zwaargewond raken. Wij willen de straat terug!kunnen ervaren. En waar niet één activiteit het andere onmogelijk maakt.

Name: VPRC
Description:
Besluitvorming wordt steeds complexer. Oplossingen voor het vraagstuk van de één liggen altijd in het domein van de ander. Door complexe opgaven te herleiden tot helder beslisinformatie structureert VPRC het besluitvormingsproces. 

Wat VPRC uniek maakt, is dat wij niet geloven in één oplossing. Te snel wordt gedacht in technische oplossingen, zonder goede verkenning van de opgave. Wij helpen opdrachtgevers besluiten, door met beslisinformatie de effecten en consequenties van keuzes inzichtelijk te maken.

VPRC biedt oplossingen voor de meest uiteenlopende opgaven in relatie tot gebiedsontwikkeling, circulariteit, energiemanagement, huisvestingsvraagstukken en vraagstukken gericht op grootschalige vastgoedportefeuilles. 'Proven experience' van ervaren adviseurs aangevuld met de frisse blik van high potentials is ons visitekaartje.

Name: KirKus
Description:
Kirkus creates and manufactures urban furniture. It is deeply committed to creating versatile urban equipment. Innovation and creativity are the two main characteristics of its designs. It aims to grace our cities with uniquely valuable and original pieces, which are functional and exist in harmony with their surroundings.

We strive to create simple, versatile, practical designs for use in compositions in all kinds of public and outdoor spaces.

These unobtrusive pieces are easy to combine and do not detract from their surroundings. They are simple and functional, with formal clarity.

Name: Black Excellence Society
Description:
[formerly known as "For(bes) The Culture”, is the world’s premiere Black talent incubator community.

The mission of The Black Excellence Society, the LVMH of communities, is to create equitable professional pathways for communities of color through collectivism. This includes everyone from traditional business professionals to self-made entrepreneurs.

While The Black Excellence Society was constructed out of a social necessity for equity, the message is driven by our members’ individual missions to catapult change in their respective industries. The mission remains the same…

Push. The. Culture. Forward.

Name: Development Workshop Angola
Description: Desde 1981, a Development Workshop Angola trabalha em Angola com comunidades e o governo nos sectores de posse de terra, habitação, abastecimento de água e redução da pobreza

Name: FIS - Friends Involved in Solidarity
Description:
FIS – Friends Involved in Solidarity

Trabalhamos com e para as comunidades

A FIS é uma organização moçambicana sem fins lucrativos (ONG) que se dedica a promover a cidadania ativa, os direitos humanos, a inclusão social e a construção da paz. Acreditamos que a transformação social acontece quando as próprias comunidades são protagonistas da mudança.

Fundada sobre os princípios de solidariedade, justiça social e participação, a FIS trabalha diretamente com jovens, mulheres, líderes comunitários, organizações locais e instituições públicas, com uma abordagem centrada no fortalecimento de capacidades, escuta ativa e diálogo comunitário.

Name: Järngänget | The Real Estate Network
Description:
Business network of 1000+ founded by Alexander Yü at the time he was working for Unibail-Rodamco because it created a bridge from a missing link between departements, business lines and organisations.

Members of the invite consists from commercial real estate such as trade, health care, hotel, shopping centers, office etc but also construction, housing, infrastructure, goverment, municipality and institutions. 

We do not select but only follows one rule; you have to work with real estate.

If your organisation or company wants to host a visit, trend release or showcase for our members, please do not hesitate to contact me for further information.

Name: Young Urbanists of Southeast Asia
Description: A pan-Southeast Asian network of people interested in Southeast Asian urbanism.

Name: Ratio.City, a division of Esri Canada
Description:
Urban development and city building are complex. They require seamless collaboration, reliable data, and a clear understanding of planning policies and general context.

Ratio.City unites real estate developers, urban planners, municipalities, and land-use professionals in a shared ecosystem. One that simplifies site evaluation, zoning analysis, and long-term planning.

Our platform centralizes geospatial data layers and delivers real-time insights, helping teams work together more efficiently. Whether identifying opportunities, analyzing policy constraints, tracking projects and precedents, seeing a project in context, doing your due diligence, or building 3d models, Ratio.City ensures every party involved aligns around a common framework.

Key capabilities include:

- Collaborative project management: share insights, track potential sites, and build unified strategies

- Comprehensive zoning & policy analysis: powered by the largest database of its kind in Canada

- Advanced site evaluation: identify underutilized land and assess feasibility with 3D massing

- Custom data integration: overlay proprietary datasets for deeper, more tailored analysis

By reducing the time spent gathering and interpreting data, Ratio.City enables professionals to focus on making informed decisions that shape sustainable, resilient cities.

 Explore what’s possible. Visit www.ratio.city

Name: Department of Planning, Jamia Millia Islamia
Description:
The Department of Planning at Jamia Millia Islamia is committed to shaping the future of urban and regional planning through a comprehensive and multidisciplinary approach. Our Master of Planning (M.Plan) Urban and Regional Planning program is designed to equip students with the skills necessary to address the complexities of planning in rapidly urbanizing and interconnected regions.

With a strong focus on sustainable development, our program integrates theoretical knowledge with practical studio exercises, enabling students to engage in real-world planning challenges across cities and regions in India. Our graduates are trained to excel in diverse professional opportunities, contributing to public sector initiatives, private sector projects, and international development organizations.

At the Department of Planning, we foster a collaborative learning environment where students, faculty, and industry experts work together to create innovative solutions for the pressing challenges of urbanization, infrastructure development, and environmental sustainability. Join us in our mission to build resilient and inclusive communities for a better tomorrow.

Name: Leeuwarden Oost
Description:
In de komende twintig jaar gaan we Leeuwarden Oost leefbaarder maken: iedereen moet er fijn kunnen wonen, met een goede opleiding en inkomen, en in een goede gezondheid. In de wijken van Leeuwarden Oost wordt het straks dus net zo prettig leven als waar dan ook in Leeuwarden. Dat betekent: een eerlijke kans op een goede baan die bij je past, een betaalbare woning, een schone en veilige buurt, een geschikte opleiding en een goede gezondheid.

Dat bereiken we graag samen met de bewoners van Leeuwarden Oost. En daarom willen we graag dat zoveel mogelijk mensen meepraten over hoe we dat gaan doen.

Name: ReDUS
Description:
O que é a ReDUS?
A Rede de Desenvolvimento Urbano Sustentável (ReDUS) é um espaço colaborativo que conecta pessoas, organizações e iniciativas comprometidas com o futuro das cidades brasileiras.
Acreditamos que os desafios urbanos, por serem complexos, exigem soluções colaborativas construídas em rede.

 O que você encontra aqui?
- Oportunidades de capacitação gratuita
- Editais abertos para financiamento e apoio a projetos
- Destaque para iniciativas que atuam com desenvolvimento urbano sustentável
- Espaço para conexão e troca de experiências entre gestores públicos, sociedade civil e academia.

 Se junte a nós e faça parte dessa rede que transforma cidades a partir da colaboração.

Name: Fire to Flourish
Description:
Fire to Flourish is a long-term community impact program providing direct support to communities as the first and last responders to disasters. 

Led by Monash University, we are partnering with four communities recently affected by disasters to co-create innovative approaches in community-led disaster recovery and long-term resilience.

Name: CIDCO
Description: Established in 1970, CIDCO is a city planning agency, which has planned & built entire townships in cities which led to their holistic development. We have been around for decades & will continually strive to make Navi Mumbai, the city where a million dreams will come true. Matching with the progressing times, a future full of promising avenues lies ahead.

Name: San Antonio Startup Week
Description: San Antonio Startup Week is a seven-day mix of educational panels, actionable workshops, city-building events, and hyper-local activations for entrepreneurs and startups.

Name: a.urbe
Description:
a.urbe nasce como um grupo interdisciplinar de mulheres focadas na discussão sobre a legislação urbanística e suas implicações na transformação das cidades.
Temos como objetivo enriquecer o debate com a troca de visões entre profissionais atuantes em diferentes áreas, como arquitetas e advogadas, assim como dar voz às mulheres e trazer seu olhar sobre o tema.
Além disso, a.urbe faz um convite para a reflexão sobre o protagonismo das mulheres na elaboração, debate e aplicação da legislação urbanística, não apenas como executoras de tarefas, mas como gestoras, líderes, especialistas e capazes de contribuir com o debate em qualquer fórum discussão. 
Por isso, a intenção do projeto é reconhecer e estimular o trabalho de mulheres nesta temática, em um ambiente de estudos, networking, sororidade e acolhimento.
É preciso abrir as janelas para novas visões, novas perspectivas, novas abordagens e, sobretudo, para que novas vozes ecoem na cidade.

Name: Ro3kvit: Urban Coalition for Ukraine
Description:
Ro3kvit will develop a methodology for rebuilding Ukraine’s (physical) infrastructure and cities. We are a coalition of experts in urban planning, regional planning, housing, heritage and related topics as economy, law, energy, circularity, sociology and policy making. We are fast but careful, flexible but solid, creative and professional.

We work as an open-source network in close collaboration with students and citizens who can join with ideas, expertise and organisation. We are a mixed team of specialists both Ukrainians and internationals with work experience in the Ukraine.

Name: AMORE Project
Description:
Traffic congestion shouldn’t decide who gets care, food, or safety.

The AMORE Project  is transforming — with inputs from knowledge users and other interest-holders — how cities measure and reduce travel times to essential services:
 Health &  Health professionals
 Education
 Emergency response & safety
 Food security
 Family protection and support

 Our interactive, open-data tool shows real travel times under congestion with heat maps & visuals that help:
 Communities
 Policy-makers
 Scientists
…co-design solutions and enable new metrics for urban & critical services planning.

 From Cali  to the world , our approach is scalable, participatory, and equity-focused.

 Join us in making cities healthier, fairer, and more resilient.

Name: URBTEC
Description: URBTEC TM develops Master Plans and Transportation Projects in Brazil and other countries.

Name: Silveiratech - Re_generation Village
Description: Regenerating 2 abandoned villages and 230 hectares of mountain forest in Serra da Lousã, Portugal, to create a global community where people connect around technology, regeneration and togetherness.

Name: Vatten & Miljö i Väst AB (Vivab)
Description: Vi på Vivab jobbar helhjärtat för en hållbar framtid med rent och gott dricksvatten, friska vattendrag och minskat avfall. Vivab är ett kommunalt bolag och en viktig aktör inom grön samhällsutveckling på västkustens mittpunkt. Vi vill förändra hur vi bygger våra samhällen och tar hand om våra resurser. Vi gör det genom att erbjuda hållbara vatten- och avfallstjänster och inspirera dig till en hållbar konsumtion. Tillsammans kan vi göra det möjligt!

Name: AFRICA CITY SCAN

Name: El Futuro de las Ciudades
Description: El Futuro de las Ciudades es una alianza de innovación y colaboración público-privada para mejorar la sostenibilidad de los sistemas urbanos y metropolitanos. Reúne a los principales agentes del ecosistema, tanto de carácter público como privado, para avanzar hacia ciudades más habitables, saludables y sostenibles. La alianza pone a disposición de las ciudades y sus habitantes el acceso a datos colaborativos, conocimiento multidisciplinar, innovación disruptiva y colaboración a todos los niveles.

Name: Connected Urban Twins
Description:
Das Kooperationsprojekt „Connected Urban Twins – Urbane Datenplattformen und Digitale Zwillinge für Integrierte Stadtentwicklung“ (CUT) der Städte Hamburg, Leipzig und München ist 2021 gestartet. Die drei Partnerstädte treiben gemeinsam die Entwicklung Urbaner Digitaler Zwillinge voran.

Impressum: https://connectedurbantwins.de/impressum/

Name: Real Play Coalition
Description: A partnership between National Geographic, The LEGO Foundation, IKEA, Unicef and ARUP, supporting people & organisations around the world in creating more playful spaces. Join our play movement helping to shape playful cities this year.

Name: Healthy Cities.
Description:
At Healthy Cities, it’s essential that our work and tool are based on evidence: drawn from both science and healthy planning practice. We are driven to continuously improve our approach as new evidence becomes available.

Head to our website to discover how our work has evolved over the years – from our planning practice and initial research to a healthy urban planning movement.

Many organisations and individuals have contributed to this movement. From expert reviews to consultancy assignments, case studies, financial and in-kind investments, promotion and simply the use of the Health Cities Generator.

We thank everyone who has contributed to the tool and are eager to collaborate with anyone who wishes to be part of our movement. Get in touch to explore the healthiest options for your city!

Name: Nationaal Programma Arnhem-Oost
Description: Een veilige en stimulerende omgeving waarin kinderen kansrijk kunnen opgroeien. Waar je perspectief hebt op structureel werk en inkomen. En waar je kunt wonen in kwalitatief goede en duurzame woningen in een gezonde en veilige buurt. Dat is de inzet van het Nationaal Programma Arnhem-Oost voor de wijken Presikhaaf, Malburgen, Geitenkamp, het Arnhemse Broek en Klarendal.

Name: LinkUS Columbus
Description: By bringing rapid transit solutions and world-class mobility options to Central Ohio, LinkUS will propel our region forward so that getting to and from your destination is easy, accessible, and affordable. LinkUS will help address our community's growth, affordability, and opportunity gaps. It will help advance numerous initiatives to improve housing, poverty, safety, and climate action.

Name: Macquarie Point Development Corporation
Description:
Macquarie Point Development Corporation is a statutory authority and state agency, charged with planning, facilitating and managing the remediation, and development of Mac Point in Hobart.

The site is 9.3 hectare site situated between the Derwent River and the Hobart CBD. The Corporation was established and is governed by the Macquarie Point Development Corporation Act 2012. Our work is overseen by a Board, comprising the Chairperson, CEO, and between three and six directors appointed by the Governor on the recommendation of the Minister.

Name: Regional utveckling - Region Östergötland
Description: Med utvecklingskraft bygger vi ett starkare Östergötland. För att lyckas krävs ett brett samarbete och samverkan inom flera områden. Vi samverkar med aktörer inom länet, med angränsande län, nationellt och internationellt.

Name: Chanzi Group
Description:
The Zero Waste Company.
Email us at : info@chanzi.co

Name: De Stadmaker
Description:
De Stadmaker haalt het beste uit een stad naar boven. Dit doen we op basis van co-creatie met lokaal initiatief, nieuwe ontwikkelingen en een creatieve mindset. Zo revitaliseren we niet-functionerende gebieden en gebouwen en zorgen we voor de juiste invulling. Het resultaat? Een verbeterd imago, sterke identiteit en meer (financiële) waarde.
Kortom: een stad die vitaal, flexibel en toekomstbestendig is.

Name: Landesgartenschau 2027 Neustadt an der Weinstraße gGmbH
Description:
In Neustadt ist die eigens gegründete Landesgartenschau 2027 Neustadt an der Weinstraße gGmbH verantwortlich für die Planung und Umsetzung der grünen Vision. Anteilseigner sind die Projektgesellschaft Landesgartenschau Rheinland-Pfalz mbH und die Stadt Neustadt an der Weinstraße.

Die LGS Neustadt plant und realisiert zum einen den Landschaftspark, der die Stadt nach 2027 langfristig bereichern wird. Der Baubeginn dieser Maßnahmen wird in der zweiten Jahreshälfte 2024 sein. Des weiteren will sie mit floristischen Highlights und Gartenkultur, großen Konzerten und kleinen Events, Kultur, Kunst und Naturerlebnis Einheimische und Gäste begeistern und die Landesgartenschau 2027 zu einem einzigartigen Sommerfest machen.

Name: Urban Equations Lab
Description:
URB^N EQU^TIONS L^B accelerates the fusion of mathematical theory and scientific discovery to unravel the complexities of the built environment. 

UEL harness data from every facet of life, leveraging differential equations and statistics to drive actionable insights with precision, urgency, and economic viability.

Urban Equations Lab is the Advanced Research arm of Perceptive Companies, LLC (www.perceptivecompanies.com)

Name: Enquête & territoire
Description:
Enquêtes & Territoires est un cabinet spécialisé en enquêtes et analyse de données, SIG et cartographie, ainsi que des formations.

Nous accompagnons les chercheurs, les institutions publiques et privées, les ONG et associations, les projets de développement, les entreprises, ainsi que les bureaux d'études dans la collecte, le traitement et la valorisation de données fiables pour appuyer la décision, la planification et le développement des territoires.

Name: ITE National Capital Section (NCS)
Description: The ITE Canada National Capital Section is comprised of local transportation professionals from varying levels of government, consulting engineers and planners and students from within the National Capital Region and Eastern Ontario. Our chapters regularly hosts events and activities to support and provide our members with the opportunity to network and support professional development.

Name: IRAZ Developments
Description:
Iraz Developments | Lead the Way in construction and real Estate 
Crafting Vibrant Communities | Focus on Innovation and Sustainability |

Name: Waco Metropolitan Planning Organization
Description: MPOs were established by the federal government to ensure that transportation decisions within the MPO area are performed in a continuing, comprehensive, and cooperative process, and guided by local and public input. MPOs develop long-range transportation plans and program funds for projects and operations. The plans serve as the roadmap for future projects and programs. MPOs also conduct short-range planning and identify projects and funding sources.

Name: Resilient Cities and Climate Change
Description: This webpage aims to provide knowledge and updates on Resilient Cities in view of climate change and Disaster Risk Reduction. Thus, we are committed to fostering a dynamic community of professionals, planners, disaster managers, academics, and students dedicated to addressing the urgent challenges of resilient cities and climate change. Our mission is to serve as a knowledge network and think tank that not only educates and inspires but also drives concrete action towards a more sustainable and resilient future.

Name: Terra Elysium
Description:
At Terra Elysium Foundation, we harness the power of community and collaboration to shape Toronto’s future—like waves coming together to create a powerful current of change.

Through education, cultural empowerment, and creative expression, we unite people to take meaningful action for our city. We educate, explore, and express together. 

Rooted in equity and access, our work prioritizes youth in Toronto’s Neighbourhood Improvement Areas (NIAs), building connection across communities often divided by geography, policy, or systemic barriers.

From beach cleanups to urban planning workshops, we bring together diverse voices to spark real solutions. Terra Elysium is more than sustainability—it’s about creative programming that integrates arts, environment, and culture to create lasting experiences.

Immersive, unique, and memorable, our efforts ensure that education is passed down in a meaningful way.

Name: Citadwellplanners
Description:
A premier student-centric educational platform for all things urban planning! 

"Citadwell" as a blend of "citadel," denoting strength and stability, combined with "dwell," indicating residence or habitat. The amalgamation is a platform where urban planning expertise merges with the concept of creating sustainable, enduring environments for communities.

Join us to explore dynamic cityscapes & create smarter, greener cities.

Name: Digital City Bahrain
Description:
Digital City Bahrain is the flagship smart urban district that brings together digital infrastructure, sustainable design, and a a digitally enabled, mixed-use district accelerating Bahrain’s transformation under Vision 2030.

Set in a prime location near the King Fahad Causeway, this innovation precinct is designed to host a dynamic ecosystem of enterprises, government institutions, startups, and universities, all interconnected through world-class connectivity, a human-centered masterplan, and Beyon’s leadership in digital infrastructure.

Description:

Name: Seda Aisne
Description:
Seda vient en appui  des collectivités locales axonaises  afin de mener à bien leurs projets d'aménagement, construction et développement, dans des domaines aussi variés que:
- le restructuration de quartiers existants ou reconquêtes de quartiers dégradés, centre-ville / centre-bourgs en attente de requalification,
- l'aménagement de nouveaux quartiers ou de zone d'activités,
- la requalification des espaces publics,
- le reconversion de friches industrielles,
- la réalisation d'équipements sanitaires et sociaux (maisons de santé, maisons de retraite, centre hospitaliers...),
- la construction d'équipements publics (établissements scolaires, culturels, sportifs, touristiques, ludiques, administratifs, centre de secours, gendarmeries....)

Entreprise 100% local et riche de profils complémentaires, l’équipe @seda peut accompagner ses clients dans de multiples domaines. Soucieuse d’anticiper les enjeux de demain tout en consolidant ses bases réglementaires et juridiques, les collaborateurs @seda complètent en permanence leurs expertises par le biais de formations ou la participation à des Think Tank nationaux. Professionnalisme, écoute, intérêt général, agilité animent l’ensemble des forces vives de seda.

Name: Zeestad CV/BV
Description:
Zeestad is een zelfstandige organisatie, ingesteld door de Stuurgroep Stedelijke Vernieuwing – een samenwerkingsverband van de gemeente Den Helder, de provincie Noord-Holland en de ministeries van Vrom en Defensie. Van de aandeelhouders gemeente Den Helder en provincie Noord-Holland krijgt Zeestad opdracht de stedelijke vernieuwing in Den Helder te ontwikkelen én uit te voeren.

Zeestad voert in Den Helder het omvangrijke stedelijke vernieuwingsproces uit. Daarbij gaat het over het maken van keuzes tussen bestaande structuren en fantastische innovatieve oplossingen of de ontwikkeling van een gebied, met beide voeten op de grond en de hand op de knip. Het is laveren tussen verschillende partijen, onderhandelen over verschillende belangen en stimuleren om tot ontwikkeling te komen.

Name: Urbanística México
Description:
Transformamos ciudades,
transformamos vidas.
Trabajamos para mejorar la calidad de vida y los derechos individuales y colectivos desde una perspectiva territorial, ambiental y humana para un futuro equitativo.

Name: Smart Famers of Burma - SFB
Description:
We promote integrative, sustainable farming practices which are rooted in traditional knowledge, are environmentally friendly, and provide an alternative to conventional agriculture.

In spite of Myanmar's rich natural resources for sustainable farming, a large number of people are living under the poverty line especially in rural areas. In Myanmar, the most important one of the communities' agricultural communication and using basic telecommunication services in the rural sector has not been developed so far. To be sustainable for social, economic equity, and the environment, agriculture must meet the needs of present and future generations at the community level. The goals and targets will focus action in areas of the critical needs for grassroots level:

1. To educate basic use of telecommunication for integrative sustainable farming practices at the grassroots level improving food security, nutrition, food safety, and increasing on-farm income.
2. To gain solid fundamental knowledge and practical skills in demonstrating creative local farming inputs such as local seeds production, natural fertilizers production with neighboring local farmers.
3. To create a strong young farmers network, including women throughout Myanmar's rural sector that can build participation of resilience of grassroots communities.
We aim to educate, train and empower the young farmers and start-up community network to carry out basic use of telecommunication on agricultural information services in the rural development areas with local innovative agricultural mobile application providers and the young farmers. As a consequence, we will be able to continue our training to provide appropriate telecommunication skills for each young group to develop their creative problem-solving skills in the long term. In this way, we will educate the young farmers in rural areas to develop sustainable agriculture and environmental sector, inclusive and effective learning for all.

Name: Fabrix
Description: Fostering local, beautiful, and sustainably designed regenerative textile and clothing ecosystems in Rotterdam and Athens and across Europe.
