Name: Sago Network
Description:
Sago Network is a not-for-profit community development organisation that has been working in Papua New Guinea (PNG) since 2008. Our aim is to strengthen lives in PNG by improving water, sanitation and hygiene standards at a community level. Sago Network partners with local communities in PNG to address basic access to safe drinking water and safe sanitation.

The complex and inter-related development challenges of water and sanitation have been tackled by Sago Network by forming a diverse and multi-disciplinary team which is flexibly configured around the needs of each community based upon their needs. The team includes architects, community development professionals, health professionals, project managers, engineers, carpenters, plumbers, builders and education professionals.

Sago Network’s programmes are focused on partnerships with rural and coastal communities who are committed to effecting positive change in their villages. Each project undertaken by Sago Network aims to place local people at the centre of their own development process. Communities are empowered with the decision-making ability to shape the project’s core objectives and are encouraged to make a meaningful contribution toward their achievement.

Name: The Historic Towns and Villages Forum
Description: The Historic Towns and Villages Forum (HTVF) has over 30 years’ experience in promoting the prosperity and heritage of historic cities, towns and villages. Its work is rooted in the recognised value of heritage assets to social, economic and environmental well-being, and how to successfully manage change.

Name: Bærekraftkooperativet Comfort Gruppen SA
Description:
Bærekraftkooperativet Comfort Gruppen SA har i lag med gode samarbeidspartnere utviklet MedEie. 
En forretningsmodell så ressursutløsende at komplekse utfordringer kommuner står ovenfor blir mulige å håndtere- også i distriktene.
 
MedEie gjør det mulig å realisere gode boliger- og bomiljø som knyttes sammen av attraktive fellesskapsfunksjoner i en skalerbar ComfortPark. 

Fordi en ComfortPark, i følge FN, har den mest bærekraftige organisasjonsmodellen, nemlig den kooperative- så vil de tiltrekkende boligene være tilgjengelige for mange flere av oss enn hva tradisjonelle boligkjøpsmodellene er i stand til. 
Det skyldes at beboerne i en ComfortPark er medeiere- ikke selveiere, og at modellen er styrt av lokalsamfunnets behov- ikke markedets!
 
Slik tiltrekker en ComfortPark seg beboere på tvers av alder, yrke- og inntekt, men også funksjonsevne. En ComfortPark har nemlig et antall trygghetsboliger med integrert omsorgsstandard, såkalte ComfortBoliger.

En ComfortBolig er helt uten institusjonspreg- og inneholder skjulte løsninger for velferds- og helseteknologi i vegger og himling, i beredskap for den dagen behovet melder seg, men ikke før...

Slikt gjør at flere av oss kan bo trygt hjemme lengre - være mer selvhjulpne og ressurssterke, til enorm nytte for kommuner som opplever økt press på både økonomi og kapasiteter.  

Som medeier/beboer i en ComfortPark forholder du deg til en forutsigbar og profittfri bokostnad- tilsvarerende selvkostnaden for de finansielle forpliktelsene kooperativet har overfor Husbanken- og de felleskostnadene som knytter seg til en profesjonell drift og forvaltning av deres ComfortPark.

Name: Economy Park Heidelberg - Leimen
Description:
Im Herzen der Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar entwickeln die Städte Heidelberg und Leimen gemeinsam ein rund 100 Hektar großes Gewerbe- und Industriegebiet: den Economy Park Heidelberg-Leimen.

Unser Ziel: Ein bundesweit wegweisendes Modellgebiet, das Nachhaltigkeit, Innovation und Wachstum verbindet und Unternehmen attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten bietet.

Geplant sind unter anderem folgende zentrale Maßnahmen:
• Zukunftsorientierte Branchen: Flächen für nachhaltiges Bauen, Handwerk und Medizintechnik – mit Raum für Produktion, Forschung & Entwicklung.
• Nachhaltige Mobilität: Neue Durchgangsstraße mit Radinfrastruktur, Straßenbahn und künftigem S-Bahn-Halt.
• Arbeitswelt von morgen: Klimaresilient, attraktiv, mit hoher Arbeitsplatzdichte (ca. 50 Arbeitsplätze pro Hektar).
• Klimaneutrale Transportwege: Nutzung des bestehenden Gütergleisanschlusses.
• Besonderes Highlight: Die denkmalgeschützte Neufert-Halle (2,7 ha) soll als Kristallisationspunkt des Areals entwickelt werden.

Starker Verbund:
Der Zweckverband wurde zum 1. Januar 2021 gegründet und trägt die Planungshoheit für das Verbandsgebiet.
Verbandsvorsitzender ist Oberbürgermeister John Ehret (Leimen). Die stellvertretenden Verbandsvorsitzenden sind Oberbürgermeister Prof. Dr. Eckart Würzner (Heidelberg), Erster Bürgermeister Jürgen Odszuck (Heidelberg) und Bürgermeisterin Claudia Felden (Leimen).

Ansprechpartner in der Geschäftsstelle sind Markus Foltin (Geschäftsführer), Alena Kaltenmaier (Wirtschaftsförderung und Gremienarbeit), Rebecca Radde (Finanz- und Vertragswesen).

Starke Förderung: 
Mit Bescheid vom 5. Mai 2023 erhält der Zweckverband 3,2 Mio. Euro Städtebauförderung vom Ministerium für Landesentwicklung und Wohnen – der höchste Betrag, den Baden-Württemberg 2023 vergeben hat. Der Förderzeitraum erstreckt sich über zehn Jahre bis 2032 und unterstützt städtebauliche Sanierungsmaßnahmen in Teilen des Verbandsgebiets.

Name: ComplexSouth
Description:
We critically engage with North-South research and researcher dynamics in the context of decolonial scholarship in urban transformations across the Global South.

We explore how to integrate research on Southern urbanism with Complexity Theories of Cities. Our consciously interdisciplinary network will research sustainable, context-sensitive societal transitions that acknowledge urban plurality and socio-political conflict in parallel with technology driven change.
By bridging digital, decolonial, and sustainability perspectives, and engaging with emerging research methodologies, we aim to foster collaborative research and advance a deeper understanding of the unique complexities in contemporary urban transformations through North-South research partnerships.

Name: Parish Development Model
Description: A multi-sectoral strategy for socio-economic transformation, aimed at moving the 39% of Ugandan households in the subsistence economy to the money economy.

Name: Earthland Global
Description: Earthland Global is a leading sustainable property development company that specialises in building environmentally responsible developments in premium locations throughout its 5 Latin American and 11 Caribbean portfolio countries. Working closely with local communities and Development Partners, the company creates green, mixed-use residential developments that prioritize wellness and sustainability. With a focus on controlling every aspect of the development process, Earthland Global delivers exceptional quality projects that offer lasting value to its customers.

Name: Lakuna Kota
Description: Lakuna Kota is a youth organization that works on activating urban spaces with a placemaking approach and community participation. We collaborate with Safe & Sound Cities (S2Cities) and WRI Indonesia in initiating the 'Tactical Kopo Project' using design charrette methods in Kopo Area, Bandung City.

Name: Virtual Climate
Description:
Design climate-resilient public spaces, model adaptation measures, future-proof the public realm against climate change.

Email us at info@virtual-climate.com if you'd like to know more.

Name: Pikesville Armory Foundation
Description: Our historic 17-acre reimagined campus will offer indoor and outdoor athletic fields, ADA-friendly playgrounds, a makerspace, multidisciplinary art venues and programming, public art displays, walking paths, co-working spaces, workforce development programs, engaging activities for seniors/aging in place, and so much more.

Name: Greater Miramichi Service Commission
Description: The Greater Miramichi Service Commission (GMSC) provides services to its member municipalities and communities under the following divisions: Development Services, Ecodiversion,  Community Development, Growing Greater Miramichi and Housing Authority.

Name: MRG Münchner Raumentwicklungsgesellschaft mbH
Description: Die MRG baut an einer lebenswerten und zukunftsfähigen Stadt für alle. Dafür kombinieren wir das Know-how einer privatwirtschaftlichen Projektentwicklerin mit unserem Status als 100%ige Tochter der Landeshauptstadt München. So verwirklichen wir selbst komplexe Bauprojekte ganzheitlich, nachhaltig und kostenbewusst – in Zusammenarbeit mit den städtischen Referaten und Gesellschaften und zum besten Nutzen für die Bürgerinnen und Bürger.

Name: Crank
Description:
Crank delivers innovative transport projects focused on people and the planet. To us, this means enabling and encouraging more people to choose to take more trips by walking and cycling.

Our experience delivering projects on-the-ground has shown us that each community faces a unique set of barriers to walking and cycling. We tailor what we bring to projects to meet these barriers, drawing on our skills in project management, communication, stakeholder engagement, and activation and priming event delivery.

Crank was formed off the back of successful grassroots community work. In addition to our work for Council and government teams, we continue to support biking-focused community groups and events with pro bono work and charitable donations.

Name: Belediye Hizmetleri Geliştirme Projesi / BELGEP
Description: Bu proje; Adana, Kahramanmaraş, Kayseri, Konya ve Osmaniye’ye bağlı idarelerin alt yapı hizmetlerini güçlendirmek ve belediyelerin yükünü hafifletmek için doğdu. BELGEP beş şehirde sekiz içme suyu, altı atık su, iki içme suyu, bir katık atık olmak üzere toplamda 17 proje yürütüyor. Belediyelerin yatırımları gelişirken, şehirlerde yaşayan hem ev sahibi hem de geçici koruma altındaki toplulukların yani 7 milyon kent sakininin suya ulaşma hakkı güçleniyor.

Name: Centre d'Etudes et de Recherche pour le Développement (CERD)
Urbane Praxis e.V.
Description:
Der Urbane Praxis e.V. ist ein Verein, der sich für die Belange der Urbanen Praktiker*innen einsetzt. Er baut Netzwerke auf und verbindet zivilgesellschaftliche Akteur*innen, Verwaltung und Politik, um lebendige und nachhaltige Städte zu gestalten. Der Verein repräsentiert die Urbanen Praktiker*innen und vermittelt Wissen, um ressortübergreifende Themen der Stadt sichtbar zu machen.

Auf Initiative des Rats für die Künste haben sich 2020 Künstler*innen, Stadtaktivist*innen, Akteur*innen aus Kultur, Architektur und Soziokultur zu einem Verbund zusammengeschlossen – in der Initiative Urbane Praxis. Diese wurde 2020-2021 von SenKE im Rahmen der Initiative DRAUSSENSTADT gefördert – 12 Standorte, sowie das Projektbüro Urbane Praxis, wurden in dem Zeitraum unterstützt. Dazu wurde der Berliner Projektfonds Urbane Praxis, getragen von der Stiftung für kulturelle Weiterbildung und Kulturberatung, ins Leben gerufen, der seitdem künstlerische Projekte im Bereich Urbane Praxis fördert.

Aus der Initiative Urbane Praxis und dem wachsenden Netzwerk wurde im Jahr 2022 der gemeinnützige Urbane Praxis e.V. gegründet.

Name: Groundswell Urban Planners
Description: Located in Richmond Hill, Ontario, Groundswell is a boutique planning firm of multi-disciplined partners providing services to private sector clients. With a diverse range of experience, we provide real estate planning consulting and design services to clients throughout the GTA and Ontario. Our company has been involved in over 500 land use planning projects since its inception in 2009.

Name: Thomas Wolsey 550
Description:
Anything is possible for anyone.  

Long before we had Linked In and motivational speakers, Thomas Wolsey proved that you don’t have to be born into a wealthy or influential family to achieve success.
  
The son of an Ipswich tradesman, Thomas Wolsey rose to become one of the most influential people in Tudor England. On the 550th anniversary of his birth, led by @Ipswich Central, @Ipswich Borough Council, @Suffolk Archives, and supported by the @HeritageFundUK, local organisations and businesses have collaborated to launch an 18 month project to celebrate the legacy Wolsey left for Ipswich.  

Do follow us for updates as this exciting project unfolds.  

Our project has been made possible with The National Lottery Heritage Fund, with thanks to National Lottery players.

Name: Nérida
Description: Trabajamos para habilitar y amplificar cómo los gobiernos, personas, ONG y empresas de todos los sectores pueden contribuir al desarrollo sostenible de la costa de Latinoamérica.

Name: Spatial Plans
Description:
Spatial Plans LLC is a female-owned (DBE) consulting firm focused on transportation planning, Geographic Information Systems (GIS), data analytics/visualization tools, community engagement, and technical writing within the planning, design, and engineering sectors. 

Lauren Leary, AICP, founder of Spatial Plans, brings excellent project management and client communication while tailoring each product specifically to a client's needs.

Name: GISforAfrica
Description: Building the Africa that we want through our Community Members, Courses, Events, Investment Plans, Resource Centers, Geospecial Consultancy, Goods and Services.

Name: MKBT: Make Better
Description:
MKBT initiates and facilitates local development and regeneration processes. We use a long-term, interdisciplinary approach, working at the grassroots level, through participatory action, connected to local needs, aspirations, and opportunities. Our goal is to build the best home for the residents of the cities we are active in.

We always start from a deep understanding of the place and communities we work with. We act with patience and perseverance to build trust, which is essential in systemic urban regeneration processes committed to long-term goals. We love being on the ground, immersing ourselves in problems, and have the curiosity to meet people and understand distinct realities.

At the same time, we explore the interdependence of local and global challenges; we pay attention to international best practices and leverage local knowledge and resources to address the multiple crises and challenges of our generation, such as demographic changes, climate change, social inequality, sustainable economic development, and access to natural resources.

Name: La Riviere urbanisme
Description: ‘La Rivière’ est un bureau d’études en urbanisme réglementaire qui accompagne les collectivités de Bretagne et du Grand Ouest dans les procédures d’élaboration et d’évolutions des PLU, cartes communales et autres documents d’urbanisme.

Name: SEMAVO société d'économie mixte d'aménagement du Val d'Oise
Description: Entreprise Publique Locale (chaque mot compte !) la SEMAVO met en oeuvre les politiques publiques locales et nationales dans le Val d'Oise. Native du département qu'elle accompagne depuis 50 ans, elle appuie le développement et la réalisation de projets de développements des territoires : aménagement, urbanisme, énergie, construction, rénovation, ...

Name: Marcon
Description:
Marcon is an independent Project Management consultant specialising in construction and development. Our team consists of highly skilled professionals who bring purpose and dedication to every project we undertake. 

The team shares significant experience and a particular focus in the Northern Rivers Region of New South Wales. We understand the unique challenges and opportunities presented by this region - and we leverage our expertise to deliver exceptional results for our clients. 

Marcon offers a comprehensive range of services including design, construction, cost control, and project and program management. Our goal is to maximise value in all areas, ensuring successful and sustainable outcomes for our clients.

Name: Namaa Al-Khaleej
Description:
Namaa Al-Khaleej Urban Development Company is an Egyptian joint-stock company with Egyptian and Saudi investment specialized in the urban development sector, development, and real estate investment.

We pride ourselves in giving and leading the urban development and real estate development sector all over the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia for over than 10 years

It was necessary  as our next step to go to the greater homeland, “Umm al-Dunya”, Egypt, to work a mixture between the Egyptian and Saudi experiences in the urban development and real estate development sector.

As a result “Namaa Al-Khaleej Urban Development Company LLC” was established with Egyptian and Saudi co-operation to contribute to the great growth and prosperity process, Witnessed by the Arab Republic of Egypt

Name: Street Design Team
Description: A start up that is focused on promoting cycling & walking mobility  & urbanism; as a quick, affordable and reliable way to significantly reduce transport emissions, traffic congestion and road casualties and at the same time deliver better public health, stronger economies and fairer societies.

Name: Living Infrastructure Field Kit
Description: The Living Infrastructure Field Kit is a free co-design tool and set of learning resources that help communities envision, plan, and apply for funding for multi-benefit projects. Created with care and community by Accelerate Resilience L. A. (ARLA) and Spherical.

Name: National Spatial Development Framework (NSDF)
Description:
The NSDF is a key national spatial planning instrument that will guide and inform Namibia's overall spatial development, land use, infrastructure planning, and sustainable growth across the country.

This framework is being developed by Stubenrauch Planning Consultants, in Joint Venture with Kamau Town Planning & Development Specialists and Lithon Project Consultants.

For more information, contact: nsdf@spc.com.na

Name: Habitar Plural
Description:
Informe-se e reflita sobre moradia social nas grandes cidades.
Iniciativa da Teen, que atua na implantação de habitação acessível em São Paulo.

Name: Eindhoven CityLab
Description:
Eindhoven demonstrated the concept of a LivingLab in December 2012, during the Light Art Festival Glow. LivingLab Stratumseind 2.0 was established in 2012, in collaboration with ATOS, Axis, ViNotion, Sorama, Philips Lighting (now Signify) and others. LivingLab Stratumseind became one of the original development centers of the Dutch Institute for Technology Safety and Security (DITSS). Since then many national and international visits have been welcomed, among others from Taiwan, Hong Kong, Porto, Microsoft, Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens,

Based on an international benchmark and quantitative research of LivingLabs on Eindhoven (Mol, Khan et. al., 2015), a groundbreaking implementation on the context broker of the Fiware reference architecture was realized. The software was made available, in cooperation with ATOS, as the Smart City StarterK!t. Since then, we have shared it knowledge through the Dutch standardization organization NEN, the SynchroniCity project, the Light Art Festival organization LUCI, the Dutch association of municipalities VNG, the Swedish association of municipalities and regions (SKR,)  and the OASC minimal interoperability mechanisms (MIMs).

We are now looking at how citizens and business can benefit from a city becoming smart. We explore Smart Urbanization, Smart Leisure, Smart Sports and Smart Health. 

We are open to partnerships and eager to collaborate!

Name: Territorios Futuros
Description:
Territorios Futuros esta conectando la infraestructura —humana y digital— que hace posible la colaboración entre gobiernos locales, sociedad civil y financiadores para abordar retos complejos (agua, residuos, seguridad, energía) en resultados sistémicos y medibles.

 Entendemos retos sistémicos, actores involucrados y puntos de apalancamiento.
 Diseñamos estructuras de gobernanza conjunta multi-nivel y multi-sector.  
 Co-creamos visiones de largo plazo y portafolios de cambio.
 Movilizamos capital público-privado para llevar las soluciones al territorio.

¿Trabajas en desarrollo territorial o impacto sistémico? 

Síguenos para casos piloto, herramientas y oportunidades de colaboración.

Escríbenos para conocer tu reto sistémico y contarte como podemos ayudarte.

Name: Asociación Latinoamericana de Planificación Urbana y Territorial
myESG100
Description:
MyESG100 is an initiative aimed at empowering the community through S.M.A.R.T (Sustainability, Mobility, Accessibility, Renewability, Technology). 

By establishing the S.M.A.R.T Learning Hub within the community, the National Community Development Program (NCDP) encourages and empowers individuals globally to provide Education, Energy, Connectivity, and Information.

We are steadily progressing towards our goal of achieving smart world status, benefiting every member of the community.

Name: EUI & URBACT Suomi
Description:
Tältä sivulta löydät ajankohtaista tietoa Eurooppalaisesta kaupunkialoitteesta (EUI) ja URBACT -ohjelmasta Suomessa. Molemmat EU:n kaupunkikehittämisvälineet tukevat kaupunkeja rahoituksella, verkostoitumisella, kyvykkyyksien ja osaamisen kehittämiseen tähtäävillä toimilla. Tätä sivustoa hallinnoi työ- ja elinkeinoministeriö ja Itä-Suomen yliopiston tutkimuskeskus Spatia, jotka toimivat kehittämisvälineiden kansallisina yhteyspisteinä.

Lisätietoja EUI:sta: https://www.urban-initiative.eu/
Lisätietoja URBACT-ohjelmasta: https://urbact.eu/

Name: Motorsport Investment Group
Description: The new home of Motorsport for New South Wales is planned for the Hunter Region. A vertically integrated motorsport precinct that will engage with local surrounding developments from Residential through to Light Industry supporting business, tourism, education, motorsport, and local communities in the region. A new way to enjoy motorsport, cycle sports, athletic events and more.

Name: Pitch In AZ
Description:
Where ideas are shared, not judged.

Pitch In is our open, community-driven event where founders tell their story, share their idea, and get real-time support. Whether you’re an entrepreneur with a new venture, a student testing out a side hustle, or just someone curious about what’s being built in Arizona—you belong here.

What to expect
At each Pitch In, two community members share their ideas and stories. Then the conversation opens up: the audience leans in with questions, feedback, and resources. It’s casual, interactive, and fueled by coffee. No perfection required—just honest ideas and genuine support.

How it works
Interactive & hybrid: Join us in Chandler, SkySong, Mesa, or Downtown Phoenix’s Fusion on First—or log in virtually from anywhere. Every location is connected, so you’ll see the speaker and engage with both local and online community members.

For founders: If you have an idea, you have a place at Pitch In. All industries, all stages, all backgrounds.

For community members: Your role is simple but powerful—listen, ask thoughtful questions, share connections, and cheer people on.

Why join
Pitch In is not about polished presentations or winning points. It’s about practicing your story, finding collaborators, and discovering resources you didn’t know existed. Most of all, it’s about belonging to a community that believes in the power of ideas.

Join us
Pitch In happens regularly across the Valley, always with a hot cup of coffee and a warm welcome.

Name: Residents of the Future | URBACT APN
Description: Finding solutions to influence the urban shrinkage.

Name: Roma Tattica
Description:
Crediamo che ogni strada, piazza e spazio di prossimità possa diventare un luogo di vita, incontro e identità.
Siamo un laboratorio sperimentale che promuove 
l’urbanismo tattico come strumento per rendere Roma più accessibile, inclusiva e vicina alle persone.
Facilitiamo il dialogo tra cittadinanza attiva e pubblica amministrazione, connettendo energie dal basso e iniziative istituzionali, per una visione urbana condivisa.
Costruiamo ponti tra chi vive il territorio ogni giorno e chi ha il compito di trasformarlo, perché la riappropriazione dello spazio pubblico è un processo collettivo.

Roma Tattica è:
Una visione per una città più equa e abitabile.
Un’interfaccia tra attori locali e istituzioni.
Un motore di cultura urbana, prossimità e partecipazione.

Facciamo spazio alla città pubblica.

***

We believe that every street, square, and everyday space can become a place of life, connection, and identity.
We are an experimental lab that promotes tactical urbanism as a tool to make Rome more accessible, inclusive, and people - centered.
We facilitate dialogue between active citizens and public institutions, connecting grassroots energy with institutional initiatives to build a shared urban vision.
We build bridges between those who live the city every day and those tasked with shaping it, because reclaiming public space is a collective process.

Roma Tattica is:
A vision for a fairer, more livable city.
An interface between local actors and institutions.
A driver of urban culture, proximity, and participation.

Let’s make space for the public city.

Name: Metvibee
Description: Metvibee is an AR platform that helps urban designers test their projects with citizens together. Create sustainable cities through co-designing that work for everyone. Download our beta or get in touch with Raphael Mak or Stefany Cevallos for a demo. Launching Fall 2024

Name: 3TP Ventures, Inc.
Description:
3TP Ventures, Inc. is a community planning consultancy that is designed to bring community planning expertise to towns, cities, and counties of all sizes. Our team of experienced community development professionals bring a diverse set of talents across several topics. We work as partners with our clients, building plans that meet their needs and set them up for implementation success. In everything we do, our focus is on helping communities realize their own unique vision for a stronger economy and improved quality of life for all. 

The firm has been in business since 2017, with offices in Chapel Hill, NC and Charlottesville, VA.

Name: Zwitsal Buitenstad
Description: Het Zwitsalterrein in Apeldoorn transformeert in een levendige stadswijk: Zwitsal Buitenstad. Door het huidige bedrijventerrein te verrijken met woningen en faciliteiten, brengen we wonen, werken en recreëren samen op één plek.

Name: ECAA Ingénierie
Description:
Ingénierie-Maitrise d'Oeuvre VRD, AEP, EU, gestion du pluvial par infiltration et technique douce,
Maîtrise de l’érosion et du ruissellement, travaux de renaturation de cours d’eau, restitution de continuité écologique, arasement d’ouvrage, démolition avec et sans présence d’amiante, inspection subaquatique d’ouvrage par notre scaphandrier Classe 2 B, travaux en domaine viticole, ouvrage de génie-civil, déchèterie, aire d’avitaillement, aménagement hydraulique urbain…et gestion des moutons à 5 pattes…

Name: Sustainable Inclusive Growth in Mountainous Armenia (SIGMA)
Description:
The Sustainable Inclusive Growth in Mountainous Armenia (SIGMA) project is designed to reduce poverty and inequality in mountainous areas of Armenia in an inclusive, innovative and environmentally friendly manner. With a budget of CHF 12 mln (if the financial situation of the SDC allows it over time), this ten-year project primarily targets rural settlements in the regions of Shirak, Lori, Tavush and Gegharkunik.  It s funded by the Swiss Agency for Development and Cooperation (SDC) and implemented by DAI Global UK (DAI) and its branch in Armenia, in cooperation with AMPERA Consulting  Agency as a local partner. 

SIGMA is committed to creating higher incomes and employment opportunities for farmers, small agribusinesses and tourism businesses in mountainous rural areas of targeted regions. This will be achieved by advancing agriculture and rural tourism which are essential sources of income in those settlements. 

To drive sustainable and inclusive growth, the project partners with different stakeholders both from the public and private sectors. It also fosters linkages between farmers, small rural businesses and established private companies, referred to as “catalysts of rural growth”, by utilising the Market System Development (MSD) approach.

Name: Crossroads Community Planning
Description: Crossroads Community Planning works at the nexus of planning, zoning, community development, and economic development.

Name: KÜN aktiv e.V.
Description: KÜN aktiv e.V. ist ein Zusammenschluss von Industrie, Einzelhandel, Banken, Handwerk, Gastronomie, Dienstleistern und freien Berufen. Wir bündeln unsere Kräfte, um gemeinsam die zukünftige Entwicklung der Stadt Künzelsau als einzigartige, vielseitige Einkaufs- und Erlebnisstadt aktiv mitzugestalten. Zu unseren Aufgaben zählt die Wahrung, Förderung und Interessenvertretung unserer Mitgliedsunternehmen, der Kontakte zu Stadt, Landkreis, IHK, Verbänden, Politik und Presse, die Beratung und Unterstützung bei städtischen Aufgaben der Infrastruktur, das Stadtmarketing, Förderung von Berufsausbildung und Weiterbildung und die Planung von Events, Werbe- und PR-Maßnahmen, wie zum Beispiel als Initiator und Mitveranstalter der Hohenloher Wirtschaftsmessen.

Name: INTERNATIONAL URBAN DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATION - INTA AIVN
Description:
INTA is an independant association that brings together highly qualified public and private players in urban development. With members in an international network of 60 countries, INTA supports local and national leaders and institutions in improving the living conditions for all inhabitants.
Founded in 1974, INTA is dedicated to strengthening urban development worldwide by leveraging the unique experiences and resources of its over 2000 members. Recognized by the United Nations and the Council of Europe, INTA provides peer-to-peer counsel, strategic support, and technical advice to leaders and institutions working towards balanced urban development.

Name: Arizona Partnership for Healthy Communities
Description: The Arizona Partnership for Healthy Communities is a statewide, multi-sector collaborative with a vision that all of Arizona’s communities should be healthy places to live.

Name: Parque Jardim de Alah
Description:
Nosso projeto foi escolhido o melhor projeto para a revitalização do Jardim de Alah. Um passo monumental para o Rio de Janeiro e todos os cariocas. Essa transformação urbanística promete reacender o espírito vibrante de nossa cidade, ao mesmo tempo em que preserva a sua rica herança cultural e memória afetiva. Com o sonho de equacionar uma área abandonada há quarenta anos no coração da Zona Sul, mas principalmente o objetivo de derrubar os muros e construir as pontes que integrarão a Cruzada São Sebastião ao tecido urbano e social do qual legitimamente fazem parte. Um testamento de dedicação, resiliência e, acima de tudo, de amor pela Cidade Maravilhosa.

A concepção deste projeto surge como resposta a uma solução para um espaço negligenciado, que se encontra em estado de degradação e falta de segurança.

O nosso projeto tem como pilares a integração social e a conversão deste local em um parque ao ar livre, abrigando um acervo de arte contemporânea, muita cultura e esportes, representando, assim, um autêntico manifesto de transformação para a cidade do Rio de Janeiro.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: DoingIt - Rea Etsa
Description: DoingIt - Rea Esta is  passionate about empowering individuals and communities through education, training, and support services. We are in the business of creating impactful programs that promote economic growth, social inclusion, and sustainable development.  Our organization focuses on providing corporate  training , mentorship and support in key areas such as job readiness, client relationship management, and entrepreneurship. Our work is focused on breaking down barriers and providing access to information that enable individuals and communities to progress.

Name: Aurora Innovative Solutions
Description: Aurora Innovative Solutions is a consulting firm that specializes in sustainable infrastructure. With over a decade of experience advancing multi-modal transportation projects via our innovative approach to urban planning and traffic engineering, we are trusted advisors who create customized strategic solutions to our clients' most complex community challenges.

Name: Lerman Ben-Shushan Planning Office - משרד מתכננים לרמן בן-שושן
Description:
משרד לרמן בן-שושן, פועל משנת 2012 ובראשו עומדים המתכנן גדעון לרמן ואדר’ הנוף, המתכננת והמעצבת העירונית מיכל בן-שושן. משרדנו מתבסס על תפיסת עולם רב תחומית וחוצת דיסיפלינות תכנוניות, הבאה לידי ביטוי באמצעות תחומי העיסוק של העומדים בראשו ושל עובדיו, הבאים מתחומי התכנון העירוני והאזורי, העיצוב העירוני, אדריכלות הנוף והאדריכלות, התכנון הסביבתי, תכנון התשתיות, מערכות התחבורה העירוניות ועוד. תפיסת עולם זו מקודמת על ידי ראשי המשרד, הן בפרקטיקה המקצועית והן באקדמיה.המשרד עוסק בגיבוש מדיניות וביטוייה באופן מרחבי - בתכניות אב ובתכנון סטטוטורי, ברמות התכנון השונות. משרדנו מתמחה בהכנת תכניות בקנה מידה ארצי, מחוזי ומקומי, בעל נסיון עשיר והכרות מעמיקה של תחום הפיתוח במגזר העירוני והכפרי, ברמות התכנון השונות, הכולל עריכת תכניות מתאר ותכניות כוללניות למועצות אזוריות וליישובים, לצד תכנון מפורט במרחב העירוני והכפרי, התחדשות עירונית, פיתוח תשתיות ומערכות תחבורה עירוניות, ותכנון שטחים פתוחים ונוף, החל מהרמה העירונית והישובית ועד תכנון אזורי ונופי לחבלי ארץ נרחבים ולאגני ניקוז.

gideon@lermanbs.co.il - גדעון לרמן

Description: Oregon Smart Growth serves as a vital voice for responsible developers, investors and allied industries to guide state and local policy towards market-driven development trends that are more economically, socially and environmentally sustainable for Oregon’s future.

Description: A planning, design, and technology firm that focuses on how land use policies, strategies, and regulations can positively impact the social, economic, and environmental health of communities of all scales.

Name: UrbanSphere Solutions
Description: UrbanSphere Solutions is a strategic consultancy specializing in sustainability and urbanism. Our team brings practical solutions to the challenges facing cities in Thailand and Southeast Asia, with a focus on community and stakeholder engagement. From advising governments on high-level sustainability strategies to moderating workshops and keynote speeches, we offer a range of services tailored to creating resilient, equitable, and prosperous urban environments. Whether it's shaping smart cities, advancing placemaking initiatives, creating integrated energy transition solutions or driving urban innovation, we're dedicated to building a sustainable future for our cities. Join us in reimagining urban landscapes for generations to come.

Name: Orion Planning + Design
Description:
Orion Planning + Design is a multi-disciplinary firm specializing in the creation of dynamic, inclusive, resilient communities that can adapt and thrive in a changing world.  

Our team of professionals has experience in nearly every aspect of local, regional, and state planning. We work coast-to-coast and internationally offering a variety of professional community planning and design services to government, private developers, landowners, and non-profits.

Name: GRADOSCOPE
Description:
We’re GRADOSCOPE – a collaborative practice focused on the reinvention of urban spaces. 


We are a multidisciplinary team with expertise in architecture, urbanism, communication, design, and multimedia but we believe that cities are created not only by the experts but also by the people. Therefore, we aim for an open, inclusive, and sustainable approach to urban processes. We are based in Sofia but are also curious about other regions, rural spaces, and unexpected, challenging environments.
 
We enforce a modern, inclusive, and sustainable approach towards urban planning. Our projects approach this topic in two ways, by facilitating meaningful and productive discussions about the future of living spaces, and by promoting good practices with specific urban interventions. 

We develop pilot projects and long-term sustainable development strategies for the reinvention of urban spaces. Our expertise lies in building stakeholder coalitions and supporting the process with communication campaigns and strong community engagement. We believe in the power of collaboration to create positive change for the cities, and we work with various organizations to achieve such change.

Name: PlanTreff
Description: Im PlanTreff dreht sich alles um die Münchner Stadtentwicklung. Wir stoßen den Dialog an und bringen Transparenz in Planungen und Projekte.

Name: Mattagami AKI L.P.
Description:
Mattagami Aki L.P. is the economic development corporation of Mattagami First Nation, focused on building sustainable, long-term prosperity for the community through responsible business development.

We create and support partnerships across mining, construction, energy, and related sectors to generate opportunities in employment, training, and Indigenous-led business growth, while reinvesting in community priorities and respecting the land.

Name: MAPS
Description:
Welcome to MAPS!!!  
MAPS' Mission is to empower underserved communities through economic development strategies, and innovative technology solutions.

MAPS aims to drive economic prosperity by addressing the drivers of Social Determinant of Health such as inequalities and generational poverty allowing communities to prosper and individuals to thrive.
Our Vision is to catalyze transformative economic independence in underserved communities through co-designed, innovative technology solutions, driven by stakeholders' collaboration and AI predictive algorithms.

We are looking for community partners to create a pilot. If you are interested in being a change maker and utilizing the latest technology to drive funding where is needed the most, please contact me at rosemary@mapsbenefit.co.

Name: ITE Central-Northeast Florida Section | CNFLITE
Description: Formed in 2020 under the OneITE initiative, Central Northeast Florida Section of ITE (CNFLITE) serves as a networking and knowledge transfer platform for a brilliant group of Transportation intellectuals in Central and Northeast Florida. With 330+ memberships to date, CNFLITE is home to four student chapters (University of Florida, University of North Florida, University of Central Florida, and Embry Riddle Aeronautical University) and one local chapter serving northeast Florida (First Coast ITE).

Name: IMPETUS - Improving local policies on temporary uses
Description:

Description: The St. Louis Metro Section (SLMS) of the American Planning Association is a professional group of city planners, transportation planners, community developers, housing advocates, and more, who are working to improve the communities in the St. Louis region through sound urban planning practices, guided by principles of equity, resilience, and collaboration.

Description: The Green Dots is an social enterprise that aims to address environmental issues and improve urban living conditon by fostering urban agriculture and circular economy. The Green Dots supports institutions, companies, residential neighborhood to design and set up community garden and develop community.

Rakennusalan tieto- ja taitokeskittymä -hanke yhdistää pääkaupunkiseudun kolme merkittävää rakennetun ympäristön alan oppilaitosta ja kokoaa yhteen rakennusalan ekosysteemin.

Description: Agenzia di Sviluppo a sostegno di Enti Pubblici ed imprese dell'area Leader della provincia di Fermo.

Name: Rutgers Center for Urban Policy Research
Description:
The Center for Urban Policy Research (CUPR) works to make human settlements more equitable, sustainable, resilient, and healthy through research, public engagement, education and other forms of capacity-building. 
CUPR’s work includes applied research, innovative technology development and utilization, tailored education and training programs, and active participation in public policy decision-making processes. Research and stakeholder activities engage interconnected challenges that employ multidisciplinary knowledge and skills.

Name: EURE AMENAGEMENT DEVELOPPEMENT
Description: Depuis 1962, à l’initiative des élus locaux et avec le soutien de partenaires bancaires, Eure Aménagement Développement  accompagne les acteurs privés et publics pour fabriquer, redynamiser et développer notre territoire.

Name: Greener Cities Development Network
Description: Greener Cities Development Network is a youth-led not for profit organization advancing SDG 11 (Sustainable Cities and Communities) through research, policy discuss, urban design and technology to facilitate advocacy, development and integration of green infrastructure with partners across African cities.

Name: Peace Vision For Sustainable Development NGO
Description:
Peace Vision is an Iraqi local non-governmental organization based in Baghdad, dedicated to fostering and supporting the SDGs. We believe in awareness-raising and culture as a key factor to support moving forward the SDs, moreover, it's supporting our meaning of achieving the communities to the “sustainable development.
After overcoming conflicts, Iraq now faces the challenge of keeping its economy stable and moving towards development. This shift from years of humanitarian challenges is a critical moment, requiring focused, coordinated efforts to guide Iraq toward a future of growth and prosperity.
In 2024, A group of experienced, motivated and dynamic team established Peace Vision. Fueled by ambition and a profound understanding of Iraq's culture, challenges, and needs, they envisioned a future where everyone has equal opportunities for growth and development. Their goal is to address these needs, overcome challenges, and pave the way for a better future.

Name: CLD Managers Scotland
Description:
Community Learning and Development Managers Scotland (CLD Managers Scotland) is a professional network for leaders and managers of local authority CLD in Scotland.

The aims of the organisation are to:
•	Provide strong national leadership and a voice for the CLD local authority sector 
•	Raise the profile of CLD through sharing practice and information 
•	Influence the development and implementation of local and national policy 
•	Ensure CLDMS is an effective, transparent and inclusive organisation
•	Improve the quality and extent of local authority Community Learning and Development provision.

The objectives of the organisation are to provide a forum for the discussion and debate of issues of national importance related to the delivery and review of local authority Community Learning and Development provision.

Name: YOUTH VOICE FOR ACTION
Description:
Youth Voice for Action Initiative (YVA) is a youth-led, community-rooted movement that equips young people with the skills, confidence, and platforms to influence policies, drive social transformation, and champion climate resilience. We focus especially on amplifying the voices of vulnerable, rural, and marginalized youth who are often feel excluded from national development conversations.

Through leadership development, climate action, social impact programming, and community mobilization, YVAI nurtures a new generation of changemakers committed to equity, sustainability, and grassroots innovation.

Name: comaps
Description:
comaps ist eine B2B-Software zur digitalen Stadtplanung für Entscheider:innen und Expert:innen aus öffentlicher Verwaltung, öffentlichen und privaten Versorgungs- und Mobilitätsanbietern sowie allen weiteren Unternehmen und Dienstleistern, die komplexe stadtplanerische Aufgaben lösen müssen.

Comaps verknüpft Daten aus diversen Quellen, wie z.B. den städtischen Urbanen Datenplattformen, und ermöglicht standardisierte Visualisierungen, Analysen und Simulationen stadtplanerischer Szenarien.

Comaps bietet ein zugängliches Frontend für die gesammelten Datenbestände unserer Kunden - von Kommunen bis städtischen Ver- und Entsorgern - und ermöglicht die kollaborative Nutzung von Daten.

Bei comaps steht der Workflow der Planer:innen im Fokus, die schnell und ohne tiefes technisches Wissen Informationen beschaffen, Zusammenhänge verstehen und kommunizieren müssen.

Wir bieten Software As A Service sowie individuelle Beratung und Entwicklung zu Urbanen Datenplattformen.

Für eine zukunftsfähige nachhaltige und gemeinwohlorientierte Stadtplanung!

Name: East Tennessee Development District
Description: We are a Federal and State statute created agency to serve municipal and county governments that are located in the mid-east region of Tennessee. ETDD provides sixteen counties and fifty-six municipalities with planning and development services while also serving as a forum for local governments to solve common problems associated with economic development and growth. Organized in 1966, the East Tennessee Development District continues to be a vital force in helping local governments plan for the future by coordinating the establishment of regional and local priorities within the fields of economic and community development.

Name: Propad International
Description: Founded with a vision for fostering community-based connections, Propad began as a small grassroots initiative aimed at bringing people around shared interests and values. As this vision gained momentum, the initiative evolved into a dynamic enterprise focused on real estate development, corporate consultancy, and asset management. Today, we are committed to creating vibrant and inclusive communities while delivering strategic solutions that help individuals and organizations thrive. Our growth from a personal project to a multi-faceted company reflects our dedication to empowering people, optimizing assets, and making meaningful connections a cornerstone of modern living and business success.

Name: Destination Rennes et les Portes de Bretagne
Description:
La Destination Touristique Rennes et les Portes de Bretagne est un territoire de coordination et de déploiement de la politique touristique régionale. 

Elle est composée de 10 collectivités partageant les thématiques touristiques suivantes  :
- Le Patrimoine Médiévale, à travers l'Aventure Médiévale,
- L'itinérance nautique et le tourisme fluvial, 
- L'itinérance cyclable.

Les projets touristiques menés se singularisent à travers l'intégration des transitions et des identités de la Destination : Avant-Garde, Accessibilité et Ville-Campagne.

Name: BAM Consulting, Inc.
Description:
BAM Consulting works with community groups, government agencies, and foundations at the intersection of community planning, public health, economic mobility, and environmental justice. 

Areas of Specialization and Expertise 
●	Content Expertise in Urban Planning, Public Health, Economic Development, Climate Equity, and Environmental Justice with a focus on community-driven planning and policy creation  
●	Committee Facilitation and Process Design (technical stakeholder and/or community committees)
●	Broader Resident/Community/Stakeholder Engagement and Outreach (Community workshops)
●	Data analysis and GIS mapping (demographic, environmental, physical, land use, health, etc.)
●	Survey design and analysis
●	Focus group design and analysis
●	Stakeholder Interviews and qualitative analysis of data  
●	Project management and logistics including managing vendors and subconsultants
●	Professional development trainings and CBO / resident skill-building trainings
●	Skilled at serving as an intermediary between different disciplines (e.g., planning and public health) and sectors (e.g., between CBOs/residents and public agencies)
●	Process and initiative evaluation  
●	Grant Writing

BAM Consulting is VSLEB certified with Alameda County and the City of Oakland and holds a business license in the City of Oakland.

Name: Cross4Mobility
Description:
Cross4Mobility vise par un partenariat transfrontalier le développement d'une meilleure mobilité transfrontalière, durable et résiliente au changement climatique et ce entre le territoire de Charleroi Métropole, le Nord des Ardennes françaises, le Pays de Thiérache et l'Arrondissement Avesnes-sur-Helpe. Une multitude d’actions seront menées sur ce territoire transfrontalier. 

Voici quelques exemples concrets d’actions prévues: la mise en place de stations d’autopartage, d' une ligne de covoiturage et des hubs de mobilité, la mise en place d’une mobilité plus écologique dans des entreprises et communes du territoire, création d’une communauté transfrontalière collaborant pour améliorer la mobilité transfrontalière... 

Ce projet transfrontalier entre la France et la Wallonie cherche à développer des réponses à des défis de mobilité transfrontalière rencontrés.

Name: Bariloche del Este
Description: Bariloche del Este es el nuevo distrito urbano de Bariloche, en el corazón de la Patagonia argentina. Emplazado en el sector de mayor potencial de desarrollo y crecimiento de la ciudad, este proyecto de 132 hectáreas incorpora sectores residenciales, comerciales, educativos, de salud, recreativos, culturales, deportivos y de servicios, bajo un enfoque de coexistencia armónica con el medioambiente y la naturaleza. Bariloche del Este ya cuenta con un marco normativo aprobado por unanimidad por el Concejo Deliberante de Bariloche: la Ordenanza 2674-CM-15, que lo define como “Área de Desarrollo Prioritario”. El proyecto consolida un trabajo conjunto continuo entre el sector privado y el público. Conocé el mayor proyecto planificado de la Patagonia y uno de los más importantes de Argentina.
Location: San Carlos de Bariloche, Rio Negro

Name: SmartSylvan
Description: Welcome to SmartSylvan, where innovation meets sustainability. We specialize in providing advanced solutions for urban climate resilience and sustainability. Our mission is to enhance the quality of life in urban environments by addressing critical challenges such as the Urban Heat Island (UHI) effect, poor air quality, and the lack of green spaces in multifunctional public spaces where planting trees is impractical. Through cutting-edge technology and data-driven insights, we aim to create healthier, greener, and more resilient cities.

Name: BETA – Building Emerging Territories for Advancement

BETA – Building Emerging Territories for Advancement
بِيتا – بناء المجتمعات الناشئة نحو التقدّم

Name: Local Economic and Employment Development Council
Description:
For 29 years, the Local Economic and Employment Development (LEED) Council has implemented a successful model of community development that integrates economic and employment development. We design and implement innovative business development and workforce programs that foster business growth, create jobs, and assist individuals to obtain jobs.

Founded in 1982 as an affiliate of a local YMCA, LEED Council became an independent not-for-profit corporation in 2001. As a delegate agency of the Chicago Department of Housing and Economic Development, we serve businesses in the North River and Addison Industrial Corridors, roughly following Clybourn Avenue, the Chicago River and the Kennedy Expressway from Kinzie Street to Berteau Avenue. We identify solutions to problems that impact business operations and offer improved access to city services and programs. LEED Council was instrumental in creating Planned Manufacturing Districts (PMDs) to maintain affordable industrial land to retain Chicago’s employment base.

We provide skills training for Microsoft Office certifications and for emerging “green collar” jobs.  We offer job placement services through a dedicated website:  worklocal.org. 

Our Green LEEDers crew of qualified workers provides a range of general home and/or building repairs and improvements as well as weatherization services.  We are exploring this as a social enterprise to offer energy-wise contracting services to homeowners in targeted areas.

Name: Stromness Community Development Trust
Description: Stromness Community Development Trust was established in 2006 and is a voluntary run organisation. . We work with statutory authorities, voluntary organisations and our residents to facilitate developments for the benefit of the community.

Name: FayetteForward
Description: Join two Fayetteville, Arkansas residents for interviews with city planners, developers, architects, artists, change makers, and everyday citizens. On the FayetteForward podcast, we discuss active transportation, trails, transit, city planning, affordable housing, and more—with the goal of sharing actionable ways to move Fayetteville forward.

Name: Urban Lab KC
Description:
At Urban Lab, we believe that cities should be vibrant and livable places for all. Our mission is to empower communities to shape their built environment through urban design, advocacy and action. We inspire people to reimagine their neighborhoods, streets, and public spaces as opportunities for social interaction, environmental sustainability, and economic development. All this is done by working hand in hand with local residents, businesses, and institutions to co-create urban design solutions that address their unique needs and aspirations.

Together, we empower, inspire, and advance all corners of our city to create a more beautiful and thriving urban environment. Take a look at our work, give us feedback and join us in helping create a better Kansas City for all.

Name: Demobia
Description:
We’re here because we believe cities should be built with the people who live in them, not just for them. When communities have a real say in shaping their surroundings, cities become more than just places - they become spaces of connection, pride, and inspiration.

We bring this to life by partnering directly with communities and local organisations. Instead of a top-down approach, we invite people to co-create the future of their neighbourhoods. By combining community input with innovative design, we make sure each project is a true reflection of those who call it home.

Our work focuses on enhancing urban spaces across Australia, integrating green, affordable, and high-tech solutions that are built to last. From revitalising city centres to transforming empty spaces, we’re committed to creating places where people feel connected, safe, and inspired. 

Together we can transform this country - one tree, one street, one city at a time.

Name: Modal
Description:
Modal Planning derives its name from the concept of "modal shift" in transport—a fundamental change that focuses on moving people towards more sustainable and efficient modes of transport. This idea reflects our commitment to driving positive changes in how we navigate the world, whether it's encouraging a shift from private vehicles to public transport, walking, or cycling.

At Modal Planning, we believe that every decision, big or small, holds the power to create meaningful impact. Just as we advocate for modal shifts in transport to improve urban mobility and reduce environmental impacts, we apply the same principle to our approach to planning and decision-making. Our name embodies the daily choices we make to foster better, more sustainable outcomes, not just in transport but in every facet of community development.

We are guided by the belief that thoughtful, intentional shifts—whether in transport modes or everyday actions—can lead to better futures. Modal Planning is more than a name; it’s a philosophy that drives our work, encouraging progress, innovation, and positive change at every step.

Name: Nachhaltiges Gewerbegebiet Fechenheim-Nord/Seckbach
Description: Einen Industrie- und Gewerbestandort im Sinne der Nachhaltigkeit ökologisch, ökonomisch und sozial weiterentwickeln. Die Attraktivität eines ganzen Standorts ganzheitlich und nachhaltig steigern. Die Interessen aller Akteure vor Ort bündeln. Wichtige Megatrends der Zukunft frühzeitig nutzen. Kurz: ein Musterbeispiel schaffen und zeigen wie sich ein Gewerbebestandsgebiet erfolgreich in die Zukunft führen lässt. Das war von Anfang an die Leitidee des Pilotprojekts „Nachhaltiges Gewerbegebiet Fechenheim-Nord/Seckbach", durchgeführt und begleitet vom gemeinsamen Standortbüro der Wirtschaftsförderung Frankfurt GmbH und des Klimareferats der Stadt Frankfurt am Main.

Name: ACBC Consulting
Description:
ACBC makes the "invisible architecture" of equity visible and helps organizations translate justice into durable systems. We partner with nonprofits, foundations, and public agencies to turn commitments into operating systems—frameworks, processes, and networks of trust that make change stick. 

Our approach blends participatory design with practical implementation, so equity isn’t just a goal on paper—it’s built into daily work, measurable, sustainable, and ready to deliver real impact.

Name: Fachstelle für integrierte Gemeindeentwicklung in Sachsen (FS INGE)
Description:
Was gehört zu guter Integrierter Gemeindeentwicklung? Welche Fachthemen und welche Akteure sollten eingebunden werden? Und wie kann man durch gemeinsames Handeln Synergien nutzen?
Die FS INGE (Fachstelle für integrierte Gemeindeentwicklung) ist ein Beratungsangebot des Freistaates Sachsen. Sie soll alle sächsischen Kommunen bei der Weiterentwicklung integrierter und strategischer Stadt- und Gemeindeentwicklung unterstützen. Dazu gehört ein vielfältiges Angebot an Telefon- und Vor-Ort-Beratungen, Coachings, Fortbildungswebinaren und Erfahrungsaustauschen durch regelmäßige Vernetzungstreffen.

Name: All Indus Roots
Description:
Our design and content creation process blends data-driven insights with creativity, ensuring visually stunning, engaging, and high-performing assets. We craft compelling stories, maintain brand consistency, and optimize for maximum audience impact.
Our marketing approach combines data, creativity, and strategy to deliver high-impact campaigns. We craft compelling brand narratives, optimize audience targeting, and continuously refine strategies to maximize growth and ROI.
We specialize in creating buzz-worthy launches that not only stand out but also build long-lasting brand loyalty. Let's make your next big brand moment unforgettable!

Name: Philippine Institute of Environmental Planners - National Capital Region (PIEP NCR)
Description: Philippine Institute of Environmental Planners (PIEP) is a non-governmental and non-profit professional organization that promotes, advances, and raises the study, practice, and development of environmental planning in the Philippines. PIEP National Capital Region (NCR) is a local chapter of PIEP.

Name: Dama Observatory
Description:
Dama Observatory overlooks the city of Damascus. Through its lense we observe the urban life of the people living within its built environment, how it shapes them and they shape it in a never-ending loop of change.

In addition to the observations, we provide a breakdown of the designs provided on the products at our shop. Insights on the business model, challenges we face and vision we aspire to are also shared...

In our work as city observers and a small business we embrace the following aspects of our identity: Local, Genuine.

Description: Supporting local communities, strengthening the economic vitality of the County, protecting natural resources, and enhancing the quality of life for all.

Name: Craft Companies, LLC
Description:
Craft Companies is a development firm specializing in complicated and pioneering infrastructure design and construction for the purpose of place-making and ESG goals. The team has constructed some of the West's most innovative water treatment, delivery and re-use systems, award-winning planned communities, and sustainably focused commercial and industrial projects.  The company takes pride in its integrity and the relationships it’s cultivated with stakeholders including municipalities, contractors, neighbors and clients. To learn more about Craft Companies, please visit our website linked below.

Select Awards:
Winner of the HBA's National Community of the Year Award
Winner of the Colorado Contractors Association H20 Project Award

Name: Manufakturenstadt Horb a. N.
Description:
Die Stadt Horb am Neckar hat ein Programm für Manufakturen aufgelegt, welches Gründerinnen und Gründer unterstützen soll.

Unsere Vision ist es, eine Manufakturenstadt zu werden, unsere Innenstadt zu transformieren, attraktiver zu gestalten und der perfekte Standort mit Lebensqualität und Charme für Manufakturen zu sein. 

Was verstehen wir unter einer Manufaktur?

 Ein kleiner, inhabergeführter Betrieb, der Produkte herstellt
 individuell, authentisch, kreativ und regional 
 Produkte, die die Sinne ansprechen; die man fühlen, schmecken und riechen kann
 Produkte, die das Internet so nicht bietet
 Zum Beispiel: Uhrmacherei, Kaffeerösterei, Seifenmanufaktur, etc.

Der Besuch in einer Manufaktur soll zu einem Erlebnis und zu etwas Besonderem werden.

Wie wirst Du als Manufaktur in diesem Konzept gefördert?

 Mietzuschüsse von bis zu zwei Jahren und Zuschüsse für notwendige, kleinere bauliche Maßnahmen
 Das einzigartige Event „Tage der Manufakturen“, an welchen die Stadt voller interessierter Menschen ist, wird landesweite Aufmerksamkeit bekommen
 Vor allem aber wird es ein zielgerichtetes und umfangreiches Marketing durch die Stadt geben und eine Infrastruktur, die explizit für unsere Manufakturen geschaffen wird
 Wir als Stadt sind da, um Dich auf Deinem Erfolgsweg zu unterstützen, denn Regionalität und Nachhaltigkeit sind heute wichtiger denn je 

Was macht Horb am Neckar zum idealen Standort für Deine Manufaktur?

Wir sind eine hervorragend angebundene Stadt mitten in Baden-Württemberg, mit insgesamt 25.500 Einwohnern
 Wir sind geprägt durch ein starkes Vereinsleben und ein vielfältiges kulturelles und künstlerisches Engagement
 Unsere historische Altstadt bietet die perfekte Kulisse, um neu inszeniert zu werden
 Die Weiterentwicklung hin zur Manufakturenstadt passt zur Struktur und zur Historie der Stadt

Eine ganze Stadt stärkt Dir den Rücken!
Gründen war noch nie so einfach! 

 Werde ein Teil der Bewegung: www.manufakturenstadt.de

Name: Mykolaiv Development Agency
Description: Mykolaiv Development Agency is dedicated to driving the city’s economic growth, attracting investments, and implementing strategic projects. We focus on sustainable urban development, improving infrastructure, and fostering innovation to enhance Mykolaiv’s competitiveness. Our mission is to create opportunities for businesses, strengthen international partnerships, and support community-driven initiatives.

Name: BRYUM GmbH
Description:
Bryum operates across the spectrum of urban landscape architecture and beyond. We develop alternative planning methods and broaden the boundaries of our discipline. We engage in everything from planning large-scale urban development, to designing objects down to the last details, and to temporarily filling the next street corner. We champion landscape-led approach to developing our cities and relish in leading the planning of our multi-layered everyday space.

Bryum operates primarily within urban environments, between conceptual development and execution within the public domain. The office from Basel has been constantly evolving since its founding in 2008 by Daniel Baur and Michael Oser. It is named after the pioneer plant Silver moss (Bryum argentum), which occurs primarily on heavily utilized areas in urban landscapes.

We address both the built and the unbuilt landscapes as testing grounds for advancing our ideas. The implementation of findings from our conceptual approaches in realized projects represents an important part of our work, which then feeds back into our further iterations and evolution as an office. We understand our work not only as the development of structural solutions, but also as careful mediation of interdisciplinary stakeholders with their unique needs, and ultimately as the creation of new visions. We engage in the active research of interdisciplinary approaches of development in the public sphere as a functional, every day and participatory space. Engaging with the evolving needs of the city from today and tomorrow, such as climate mitigation and equity in public space, we orient our operations towards the livability and vitality of our cities.

Name: Appropriate Technology Projects Inc.
Description:
AT projects, established in 1998 under Papua New Guinea's Association Incorporation Act, is a pivotal organization based in Goroka, Eastern Highlands Province, dedicated to empowering rural communities through appropriate technologies. Our mission focuses on enhancing the quality of life for poorer community members, fostering sustainable development, and promoting self-reliance.

We believe in the importance of local participation in technological choices, ensuring that communities have a say in their development. Our approach emphasizes using locally available skills and materials, which enhances the effectiveness of solutions and aligns with cultural traditions. By doing so, we aim to address local needs while minimizing potential mistakes and ensuring that technological advancements resonate with the community.

ATprojects stands out by providing practical technical support at the district level, offering program development services, training, and conference facilities. We strive to create beneficial impacts on income distribution, human development, and environmental quality through our initiatives.

Our vision is to cultivate a family-centered organization that nurtures young PNG professionals committed to uplifting their communities. We value transparency, integrity, and partnership, working collaboratively with donors and stakeholders to maximize our impact.

In essence, ATprojects is dedicated to using appropriate technologies to drive positive change, ensuring that our projects are participative, suitable, and beneficial across Papua New Guinea and the broader South Pacific region.

Name: Fundacja Biznes Kobiecym Okiem
Description:
Kobiecy Biznes to przestrzeń dla niezależnych, przedsiębiorczych kobiet , która daje wsparcie i rozwój oraz networking.
Prowadzisz własną firmę, masz wolny zawód lub marzysz o rozpoczęciu swojej działalności?
Kobiecy biznes to okazja do nawiązania nowych, wartościowych relacji, zdobycia wiedzy i umiejętności.

Jesteś zainteresowana wzięciem udziału, napisz do Nas i obserwuj nasze profile!

Name: Werk-Quartier Stuttgart e.V.
Description:
Ein Entwurf für die Zukunft des Gewerbegebietes Vaihingen/Möhringen in Stuttgart

Links und rechts des Wallgrabens spannt sich mit dem Gewerbegebiet Vaihingen/Möhringen das größte Gewerbegebiet Stuttgarts auf – und es boomt.
Neben der weiterhin großen Bedeutung klassischer Gewerbebetriebe ist die aktuelle Entwicklung durch großflächigen Neuansiedlungen aus dem Office-Bereich geprägt.
Dieser Wandel bringt neben einer deutlichen Zunahme an Arbeitsplätzen viele weitere Begleiterscheinungen mit sich. Und er führt zu neuen Ansprüchen der zahlreichen Nutzer an den Ort – insbesondere was die Qualität des Arbeitsumfeldes und die Möglichkeiten der Fortbewegung betrifft.
Der Ort steht also vor großen Herausforderungen. Gefragt sind neue Ideen für die zukünftige Mobilität, mehr Leben, mehr Aufenthaltsqualitätent!
Tatsächlich bietet der Ort jede Menge Potenzial, um diese Herausforderungen erfolgreich anzugehen!
Ideen hierzu gibt es bereits, und konkrete Pläne und Konzepte liegen auch schon vor.
Sieht man sich die Herausforderungen und Potenziale einmal in der Gesamtschau an, dann ergibt sich eine große, umfassende Idee:
Das Gewerbegebiet Vaihingen/Möhringen kann sich vom verkehrsgünstig gelegenen klassischen Gewerbegebiet zu einem Schaffensort am Wallgraben entwickeln! Zu einem integrierten, vielfältigen Teil Stuttgarts, an dem Leben und Arbeiten eins werden. Der Verein Werk-Quartier Stuttgart e.V“, eine Initiative von Ortsansässigen, denen das Gewerbegebiet Vaihingen/
Möhringen am Herzen liegt – und die das Quartier gemeinsam
verbessern wollen für alle, die hier leben und arbeiten, laden Sie ein: Gestalten wir gemeinsam aus dem Gewerbegebiet Vaihingen/Möhringen ein Gebiet der Zukunft – das Werk-Quartier Stuttgart!

Name: Goal Park Foundation
Description: Goal Park is a 7-block overlay to the Columbia Tap Trail (East Downtown, Houston) that will transform an underutilized half-mile stretch from Emancipation Avenue to McKinney Street into a vibrant urban linear park that celebrates the unique identity and culture of EaDo while providing much-needed park space and promoting active transportation and healthier lifestyles.

Name: Ladywood Neighbourhood Network Scheme
Description: We support community groups and organisations in developing services and activities for adults with disabilities and those aged 50+

Name: Beleza Realty
Description: Beleza Realty is a boutique real estate developer dedicated to creating homes of beauty, character, and lasting value. Guided by the meaning of its name, beleza, Portuguese for “beautiful,” we embody a philosophy of thoughtful design and uncompromising quality. Every project has been shaped with intention: open, light-filled spaces, prime locations, and enduring materials that make each home both timeless and future-ready.

Name: Streetlight
Description:
Streetlight is a platform that gives you access to emerging city trends, best practices, case studies, industry deep dives and a place to connect with other cities.

Connecting. Cities. Developers. Bankers

We carefully curate information that will assist you with ongoing projects and getting new initiatives off the ground. Our panel of experts can help you improve communities for a better quality of life and drive economic development in your city.

Name: Together Space | ورشة مكان
Description:
Together Space is an independent platform specializing in the built environment and public sphere, led by Syrian professionals, academics, researchers, and activists with extensive expertise in urban planning, architecture, engineering, and development.
Since 2018, our team has engaged in dialogues, conducted experiments, and produced knowledge through our work across conflict-affected countries such as Lebanon, Germany, and Bosnia and Herzegovina, learning from their experiences to inform community-led urban recovery in Syria.
We leverage our academic and professional backgrounds to contribute to spatial justice and the sustainable recovery and reconstruction of Syria.

VISION
At Together Space, we envision a just Syria where all people have agency over their built environment, ensuring spatial justice, dignity, and inclusion.
• Housing, infrastructure, resources, and mobility are equitably accessible, prioritizing the public good over private profit while balancing market mechanisms.
• Syrians actively shape their spaces and local economies through transparent, participatory, and bottom-up decision-making.
• Strategic partnerships foster spatial justice and social cohesion in urban governance, particularly in post-conflict and displacement settings
• Spatial knowledge is transdisciplinary and widely shared, transforming education and practice across urbanism, architecture, engineering, sociology, and beyond.
• Through public engagement, independent research, and policy recommendations, we empower civil society, grassroots movements, and policymakers to drive just and inclusive governance.
Our success is measured not only by policy influence but by tangible improvements in daily life, where all people in Syria can live, work, and thrive in spaces governed by justice, inclusion, and sustainability.

MISSION
Together Space is an independent platform reclaiming spatial agency for Syrians through critical dialogue, participatory planning, and action-oriented researc

Name: Urząd Miasta i Gminy w Niepołomicach
Description:
Jesteśmy dumni z Niepołomic i zobowiązani do wykorzystania najnowocześniejszych rozwiązań w celu jak najlepszego zaspokojenia potrzeb naszej społeczności. 

Miasto i Gmina Niepołomice to dynamicznie rozwijająca się miejscowość położona w Małopolsce. Niepołomice zdobyły wiele prestiżowych nagród przyznawanych przez niezależnych ekspertów. 

Niepołomice to idealne miejsce do prowadzenia biznesu i do życia.

Name: Drevet
Description:
Drevet är ett kollektiv som arbetar med inkluderande, omtänksam och bärkraftig stadsutveckling. Vi stärker den sociala infrastrukturen, förbättrar livskvaliteten och skapar mervärden såväl lokalt som strukturellt.

Genom en fenomenbaserad stadsutveckling, skapar vi momentum, samlar behov och fördelar resurser.

Name: EXPBIO
Description: EXPBIO addresses the critical challenge of biodiversity degradation in the North Sea Region. The project unites eight partners, each contributing to three core areas: the development of effective restoration practices, the creation of diverse seed mixes suitable for different ecological contexts and stakeholders, and the launch of transnational educational and communication initiatives. These activities aim to enhance our common capacity for restoring degraded ecosystems, thereby promoting biodiversity and ecological health in the North Sea Region.

Name: Whakaora - Our Thriving City
Description:
Workshops & events to create a thriving city
Whakaora Our Thriving City is a growing community of people who are waking up to the possibilities of regenerative design as a way to tackle the climate crisis.

Regenerative design is based on the principles of living systems thinking that puts nature and people in the driving seat.
It’s motivating, it’s challenging, it’s fresh. It will inspire you to create change.

Join us and be part of the transformation.

Name: CONT―S
Description:
CONT-S ist ein zukunftsorientiertes Stadtplanungsbüro, das sich dafür einsetzt, die Zukunft von Städten, Quartieren und Arealen durch ganzheitliche Visionen und strategische Planung neu zu definieren. Mit unserer Methodik UrbanVision erarbeiten wir parametrische und qualitative Strategien, die die unterschiedlichen Interessen von Grundstückseigentümern, Bauherren und der öffentlichen Hand in Einklang bringen, insbesondere in der kritischen Entscheidungsphase 0.
Mit unserem Engagement für nachhaltige Entwicklung und proaktive Problemlösungen sind wir führend in der Gestaltung lebendiger, anpassungsfähiger Stadtlandschaften für die Zukunft. 

Daten
Durch den Einsatz von GIS-basierten Daten und interaktiven Modellen können wir unsere Konzepte effektiv vermitteln und dringende Herausforderungen wie Wachstum, Klimawandel, Mobilität und Infrastruktur angehen. Unser Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Entwicklung innovativer, nachhaltiger Lösungen, die die Lebensqualität und Widerstandsfähigkeit der Orte verbessern.

YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/@UrbanVision_by_CONT-S

Name: Johnson Planning & Preservation
Description: Johnson Planning & Preservation, JPP, is an Austin-based firm that specializes in historic preservation and urban planning policy with specific expertise in Form-Based Code. We provide expert services in the fields of preservation planning, urban design, and cultural resource management. Our team is experienced in working with local and state governments, nonprofit organizations, and private sector clients to develop policies, programs, and design solutions that support the preservation of historic resources and promote sustainable communities. JPP aims to balance the preservation of historic and cultural assets with the practical needs of communities and their residents.

Name: Fitness Trails Australia
Description:
Fitness Trails has been a leading provider of outdoor fitness equipment in Australia for over 35 years. Our extensive experience in developing and delivering fitness solutions for hundreds of councils, schools, community groups, and housing associations sets us apart in the industry.

Our equipment is unparalleled in terms of quality and durability, having undergone rigorous testing and boasting over 600 installations across the country. We pride ourselves on our ability to work with any location and budget to deliver fitness solutions that meet your unique needs.

At Fitness Trails, we go beyond simply providing static equipment. We work closely with your team to develop a comprehensive community wellbeing strategy that promotes the use of your outdoor gym and makes a real difference to the health and wellbeing of the local community.

Our innovative use of localised QR coded videos provides users with not only educational exercise guides but also a circuit library that keeps them coming back for more. We also offer training for local fitness centre instructors, school teachers, and community groups on how to effectively deliver fitness classes using your Fitness Trails equipment and immediate outdoor spaces.

Choose Fitness Trails for market-leading outdoor fitness solutions that are tried, tested, and proven to deliver exceptional results.

Name: Urban Lab Cambodia
Description: Recognizing the complexity of access urban data in Cambodia, as well as the rather unsupportive environment to test innovative solutions needed to address the many challenges faced by Cambodian cities today, we are setting out to drive and facilitate the conversation about data access and integration across the diversity of urban stakeholders and systems; advocate for trans-disciplinary and/or multiple scale approaches to urban challenges and the re-localization of the production of urban knowledge on Cambodian cities in Cambodia, and experiment at local scale innovative solutions to existing urban challenges. Join us on this adventure.

Name: EuraBioeconomy
Description:
Portée par l'agglomération du Beauvaisis, ancrée sur un territoire à 1h de Paris, la démarche EuraBioeconomy ambitionne de :
- développer une Zone d'Activité à énergie positive (NovaParc) spécialisée dans les activités de la bioéconomie afin d'accueil des entreprises dans un écosystème dynamique et collaboratif
