Name: Injaz Saudi Arabia Alumni Academy | أكاديمية خريجي إنجاز السعودية
Description:
نبذة عن الأكاديمية
أكاديمية خريجي إنجاز السعودية هي اكاديمية وطنية مكرسة لتمكين الخريجين برامج انجاز السعودية من خلال بناء روابط ذات معنى، وتعزيز التواصل، ودعم نموهم المهني والشخصي عبر برامج مبتكرة ومبادرات مؤثرة. تفخر الأكاديمية بتجسيد القيم السعودية والمساهمة في بناء جيل من القادة المستقبليين المتماشيين مع رؤية المملكة العربية السعودية 2030.

الرؤية
إلهام وتمكين خريجي المملكة العربية السعودية لقيادة الابتكار، وتعزيز الفخر الوطني، وبناء مجتمع خريجين متصل ومطلع على المستقبل.

الرسالة
ربط وتفعيل خريجي السعودية من خلال مبادرات ديناميكية، وتعزيز العلاقات والتواصل الفعّال، وبناء شبكة معرفية قوية تدعم نموهم وتأثيرهم.

               من أرض الطموح بدأنا، وبأيادي السعوديين ننجز ونبني مستقبلاً مبهرًا.

Name: URBANLUST
Description:
URBANLUST
::::coming up soon::::::
Urbanlust ist das Verlangen am Stadtleben. Es handelt sich um jenes einzigartige Gefühl, das Menschen in urbanen Umgebungen erleben, wenn sie von der Energie, Vielfalt und den Möglichkeiten einer Stadt angezogen werden. 
Urbanlust kann viele Formen annehmen, sei es die Begeisterung für das Erkunden von pulsierenden Stadtvierteln, das Genießen von internationaler Küche, das Eintauchen in die Kultur oder das Erleben aufregender Festivals. 
Sie verkörpert den Wunsch, in einer urbanen Umgebung zu leben oder zumindest die Vorzüge und den Charme des Stadtlebens zu genießen. 
Urbanlust ist das Gefühl, das Menschen dazu treibt, das Beste aus dem urbanen Abenteuer herauszuholen und die Einzigartigkeit jeder Stadt zu schätzen. Es ist die Faszination für die Metropolen dieser Welt, die nie schläft und immer etwas Neues zu bieten hat.

Name: In Her Place
Description:
We work alongside designers, developers and councils to turn gender-sensitive theory and research around gender-sensitive design into practical and achievable solutions for the built environment. This can happen at all stages of a project, from using precedents and engagement to create a gender-inclusive design code at the outset of a masterplan, to being a critical friend and advisory support on detailed designs or supporting you with specific engagement projects to inform a particular design or space. Always with the goal of creating better places to live for everyone.

Our experience includes transport and active travel, housing and the public realm, but I have a particular focus on women’s and girls’ safety, engagement and more inclusive parks and public spaces.  We also have access to a wide range of specialists in gender sensitive design, covering everything from lighting and long-form engagement to culture change and planning documentation.

Name: Inteligentarium
Description:
Inteligentarium investiga, estudia, desarrolla y ejecuta proyectos y programas innovadores y creativos, en el campo urbano arquitectónico, desarrollo comercial, del edu - entretenimiento, y la educación no formal.

Inteligentarium realiza para sus clientes ejecución integral de Proyectos.  Lo multidisciplinar de   su equipo le permite realizar procesos de gerencia de proyectos, con resultados de alta calidad y éxito en dos grandes ramas: 1.- Urbanismo y ciudad 2.- Desarrollo social y educación.

Inteligentarium, se especializa en el diseño de programas urbano arquitectónicos; desde el diagnóstico de variables y la definición de componentes, hasta la integralidad y relación urbana y arquitectónica de los mismos.

Inteligentarium  ejecuta consultorías especializadas: en diseño urbanístico y arquitectónico, diseño de espacio público, economía urbana, y diseño y desarrollo de sistemas de información geo referenciada.

En el campo de la educación y la comunicación; el equipo de Inteligentarium es un equipo con reconocida experiencia en el diseño experiencias educativas, programas , manuales, capacitación, diseño de exposiciones y el edu - entretenimiento, interpretación, museología y museografía.

Name: O'Hara Development Partners CDC
Description: O'Hara Development Partners CDC is a community development company focused on revitalizing cities, one block at a time, through initiatives in education, real estate, and financial wellness.

Description: Városfejlesztéssel foglalkozunk. Egy olyan Józsefvárost szeretnénk, ahol mindenki otthon, biztonságban érzi magát és kényelmesen eljut egyik helyről a másikra.

Description: Políticas públicas envolventes, a partir e com as populações. Espaço público, jovens, planos de acção sectoriais, governação integrada, supervisão técnica.

Name: III Congreso de Urbanismo Productivo
Description:
¿Te gustaría conocer cuáles son las oportunidades que ofrece el nuevo modelo de urbanismo? Participa en el III Congreso de Urbanismo Productivo y descubre de la mano de profesionales de prestigio cuál es el futuro del urbanismo del siglo XXI. 
Te esperamos el 15 y 16 de octubre en el Auditorio Cubo Azul de la Universitat Politècnica de València o síguelo en streaming para no perderte ninguna ponencia!
Más info en  https://congresourbanismoproductivo.com/

Name: Giving Joy Foundation  - مؤسسة وهب الفرح
Description: The Giving Joy Foundation is a non-profit, organization keen to making positive impact on the lives of people in Jordan through the projects and programmes implemented by the foundation.  Giving Joy focuses on women and youth to achieve a better quality of life to promote sustainable development.

Name: Play32
Description: Advocating for children's play and voice as a legacy of the Brisbane Olympics and Paralympics.

Name: Region Oberthurgau
Description: Wirtschaftsförderung und Standortmarketing für Amriswil, Arbon, Dozwil, Egnach, Hefenhofen, Horn, Kesswil, Roggwil, Romanshorn, Salmsach, Sommeri, Steinach SG, Uttwil

Name: DIE STADTENTWICKLER.BUNDESVERBAND
Description: DIE STADTENTWICKLER sind Netzwerk und Interessenvertretung von in der Stadtentwicklung tätigen Unternehmen. Der Bundesverband und seine Mitgliedsunternehmen setzen sich für eine gemeinwohlorientierte Stadtentwicklung, für lebenswerte und resiliente Städte ein, in denen sich Menschen langfristig entfalten und wohlfühlen können.

Name: MUTUO
Description:
MUTUO is an interdisciplinary consultancy based in Peru. We facilitate the development of meaningful socio-cultural programmes and urban policy research through community engagement, multi-stakeholder collaboration and social innovation. We address social, cultural, and environmental issues faced by underrepresented communities from Latin America and the Global Majority of the world. 

We believe in promoting people-centred initiatives for social transformation. We have developed participatory frameworks, managed citizen Open Calls, led public innovation Labs and delivered public policy research, evaluation and recommendations. 

We have worked across cultural institutions, local governments, civil society and international development organisations, such as UNESCO Peru, Bernard van Leer Foundation, Gerardo Chavez Foundation, World Bank Group, the Inter-American Development Bank, the Peruvian Ministries of Housing and Education, Swiss Contact, Affordable Housing Institute, the Metropolitan Municipality of Lima and creative collectives.

Name: PMUD Projet de Mobilité Urbaine de Douala
Description:
Le PMUD transforme la mobilité à Douala. Avec le futur réseau Bus Rapid Transit (18,9 Km tranche ferme et 8,2 Km tranche conditionnelle), la réhabilitation de plusieurs voies urbaines (12,594 Km phase 1 et 66,796 Km phase 2) et le développement urbain orientées sur le transit (modification du paysage de certains quartiers). Le projet prépare une mobilité plus fluide, moderne et inclusive. Il rapproche les habitants, réduit les temps de trajet et soutient le dynamisme économique de la ville.
Porté par la Communauté Urbaine de Douala, accompagné par le Gouvernement camerounais via le MINHDU et financé par la Banque mondiale (IDA et BIRD) à hauteur de 335 milliards de FCFA, le PMUD est piloté au quotidien par la Cellule de Coordination du Projet (CCP). Cette dernière s’appuie sur des partenaires techniques spécialisés pour faire du projet un modèle de mobilité urbaine durable en Afrique centrale.

Name: Neos·life
Description: A village for a 1,000 people for a new way of being - living in harmony with nature, fully self-sufficient and with its own well-being center, school, resort, residences and even an airstrip. Located in stunning Alentejo, Portugal, just 75 mins outside of Lisbon. Follow our development journey at news.neos.life

Name: ReMED InterregEuro-Med
Description: The ReMED project addresses sustainability and resilience assessment, design of optimal measures for climate adaptation, implementation and monitoring.

Name: Beneterra Consolidated Corporation
Description:
Beneterra Consolidated Corporation is a development and real estate company established in 2009. It aims to play a vital role in the development of what are known as “next wave” cities.  

VISION

Transforming land and the people living on them from traditional mono-crop-based communities into renewed, sustainably developed, self-sustaining communities.

PHILOSOPHY

We believe in the inevitability of change and its importance in human development and growth. Not only have we embraced change in our society, but we have taken on a leading role in fast-tracking the process of changing communities where we work to aim a development in a sustainable and environmentally friendly way.

Name: UrbaNature Design Studio
Description:
We help to design cities that work with nature. cities that work make people's lives better and sustain our environment for future generations.
We are Urban Planning professionals with skills in Physical planning, Master Planning, multimodal transportation planning, land use, urban design, community engagement, communications, and public policy-making. 
We are a diverse team of collaborators who share a common passion creating and planning for cities that work.

Name: RRB Partners
Description: Strategic corporate leader with a record of shaping governance, planning, and full-cycle capital project strategies that deliver measurable private corporate and public-sector value with local and global network of contacts. Demonstrated strategy consulting and public sector advisory in designing evidence-based decision frameworks, economic impact models, and multi-level governance systems that increase transparency, mitigate risk, and accelerate transformation outcomes. Built and led cross-functional teams that increased governance accountability by 40%, achieved 95% policy compliance across 100+ departments, and improved cost efficiency by $1.2M annually. Applies systems thinking, sustainable planning, and predictive policy analytics to strengthen institutional performance, align operating model design with long-term business outcomes, achieving operational excellence in complex, high-stakes environments.

Name: Open Buenavista
Description: Cerca de todo

Name: CULTIGEN
Description:
CULTIGEN is an Innovative Actions project under the European Urban Initiative, running from December 2024 to May 2028. The CULTIGEN project aims to develop sustainable strategies to manage tourism flows, prevent overtourism, and align residents’ needs with visitors’ expectations. 
CULTIGEN is led by the City of Copenhagen (Tourism, Internationalization, and Cultural Industries) and is realized in collaboration with Aalborg University, the National Museum, Storyhunt, Wonderful Copenhagen, and We Do Democracy.

Name: City Visionnaire Initiative for Urban Development
Description:
A non-governmental and non-for-profit organization comprised of young professionals, poised 
to help planning students and young professional planners develop through regularly organized career building, 
social events, networking, and mentoring programmes.

Name: Revive Strategies
Description:
Revive Strategies is a creative, planning consulting firm, specializing in managing community and organizational change through collaborative, inclusive, and customized processes. We utilize a variety of methodologies that include Appreciative Inquiry, LEAN, and process improvement.



We focus on people and seek to do the highest good, do no harm, tell and embrace truths, and empower people, organizations, and communities to reach their goals.  We are a small firm that offers highly customized approaches for each client. We seek to put the public interest first, making us a mission-driven private firm.  



We seek solutions that strengthen community resilience, connectivity, prosperity, health, inclusion, equity, and well-being.  Our approaches and strategies for communities are grounded in their values and visions. We plan with a long vision lens but always focus on immediate and tangible next steps, that follow a logic model that rests on metrics, roles, responsibilities, and resources needed.  We design and facilitate processes that nurture trust, and respect, and build lasting partnerships that together are better enabled to impact positive change.

Name: Barefoot Urban Lab
Description:
Transforming Spaces, Preserving Stories – Your Partner in Urban Planning, Design and Heritage

At Barefoot Urban Lab, we specialize in documenting and analyzing public spaces, heritage structures, and neighborhood homes, offering comprehensive insights that bridge urban environments' past, present, and future.  

With a keen eye for detail and expertise in urban planning, our services include:  
 Heritage Documentation: Capturing the architectural and cultural essence of historic structures to preserve and celebrate their legacy.  
 Public Space Analysis: Studying urban vibrancy, social interactions, and spatial design to enhance usability and engagement.  
 Neighborhood Studies: Delving into residential patterns, housing typologies, and community dynamics to craft meaningful reports.  

Our approach combines in-depth research, urban design principles, and actionable recommendations to provide solutions tailored to clients across sectors, including:  
 Municipalities and civic bodies  
 Private developers  
 NGOs and heritage organizations  
 Academic and research institutions  

Why Choose Us?

 Expertise in urban studies with global and local insights  
 High-quality visual documentation and precise reporting  
 Solutions that balance tradition with modernity  

Partner with Barefoot Urban Lab to uncover the stories your spaces tell and shape a sustainable urban future.  

Let’s build cities that honour their past while embracing innovation.  

 Contact us today!
  
#UrbanPlanning #HeritageDocumentation #PublicSpaces #SustainableDesign #BarefootUrbanLab #UrbanHeritage #CommunityDesign #CulturalPreservation #ArchitectureAndPlanning

Name: CityUX
Description:
Welcome to CityUX, your go-to destination where the dynamic intersections of urban planning, user experience, and transportation converge to shape the cities of tomorrow. Join us on a journey through the bustling streets, vibrant neighborhoods, and innovative infrastructure that define the urban landscape.

 Explore Urban Planning: Delve into the intricate tapestry of city design and development. From skyscrapers that pierce the sky to green spaces that breathe life into the concrete jungle, we dissect the planning strategies that transform urban spaces into thriving, sustainable communities. Whether you're an aspiring urban planner or simply fascinated by the cities you inhabit, our content offers insights into the strategic decisions that shape our urban environments.

 Navigate Transportation Trends: Hop aboard as we navigate the ever-evolving world of transportation. From the latest in smart city initiatives to the revolution of electric and autonomous vehicles, we uncover the innovations propelling us forward. Discover how mobility solutions are reshaping the way we commute, and get a glimpse into the future of transportation that promises efficiency, accessibility, and reduced environmental impact.

 Focus on User Experience: At the heart of every city is its people, and we shine a spotlight on their experiences. Understand the importance of user-centric design in shaping public spaces, transportation systems, and city services. We explore how thoughtful planning and design contribute to creating inclusive, accessible, and enjoyable urban environments for residents and visitors alike.

 Global Perspectives: CityUX isn't bound by borders. Take a global perspective on urbanization trends, learning from successful models and innovative solutions implemented around the world.

Name: GreenWoods Associates
Description:
GreenWoods Associates' planning practice helps shape communities’ futures in public inclusive ways.  Our work is influenced by the individual project’s setting and stakeholders. We develop creative and sustainable solutions for current challenges while protecting and enhancing our social, built, and natural environments.

	Town of Brookhaven’s Comprehensive Plan Update (Long Island, NY)
	Community Benefits Policy Study, Town of Brookhaven (Long Island, NY)
	Transit-Oriented Development Plan, City of New Rochelle, NY
	Plan of Conservation and Development, Town of Farmington, CT
	Citizen Outreach Element for the Riverside-Flanders-Northampton Neighborhood Study, Town of Southampton, NY
	Phase 1: Crown Hill/Ballard Downtown Neighborhood Plan, Seattle, WA

Name: Dubuque Forward
Description:
Dubuque Forward exists to be an intentional community spark—bringing people together around shared purpose and helping turn community ideas into visible, lasting impact.

We don’t do everything. We listen first, create space for collaboration, and help activate community-led action that strengthens connection, belonging, and quality of life in Dubuque. From placemaking and downtown vitality to cross-sector partnerships and volunteer-led initiatives, our role is to convene, align, and move ideas forward.

We believe real change starts with community voice and moves faster when people, organizations, and sectors work together. By focusing on momentum over perfection, we help turn conversation into action—and action into outcomes you can see and feel.

Together, small sparks create lasting change.

Name: Envirofix Planning and Survey
Description: EnviroFix Planning & Survey Ltd (EPS) is a renown firm registered in the Republic of Kenya. We provide consultancy services in the built environment and development research at multidisciplinary fields i.e. Urban and Regional Planning (Physical Planning), Environmental Impact Assessment/Environmental Audit and Urban Design and Mapping.

Name: Symbiosis Planning Consulting LLC
Description: Your guide to land planning and entitlement solutions. Let's shape the future together! #UrbanPlanning #LandEntitlement

Name: Fokkens Grondgoed bv
Description: Fokkens Grondgoed b.v. is actief in drie disciplines, namelijk: gebiedsontwikkeling, vastgoedsturing en rentmeesterij. Mijn opdrachtgevers zijn stichtingen, woningcorporaties, gemeenten, ontwikkelaars, aannemers en particuliere beleggers. De kernactiviteiten zijn: planvorming, vastgoedrekenen, ruimtelijke ordening, procesmanagement en vastgoedbeheer.

Name: Pacific Community Fund
Description:
Pacific Community Fund, formerly known as the National Asian American Coalition, was founded in 2004 to ensure the Filipino community, and Asian Pacific Islander communities as a whole, throughout California and the United States were not shut out from public or private resources due to language or cultural barriers. 

In the years since, Pacific Community Fund has been certified by the U.S. Department of the Treasury's Community Development Financial Institution (CDFI) Fund and the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) to help ensure all of California's diverse communities have access to capital and the resources they need to grow and thrive. We fulfill this charge by offering an array of consumer and small business loan products, as well as community development resources, with cultural competence in languages that help us create a connection with our customers, such as English, Spanish, and Tagalog.

Name: Romanian Real Estate Investment Forum
Description: The Romanian Real Estate Investment Forum (RREIF) stands as Romania’s premier platform for exploring the intersection of investment, urban innovation, and the identity of our cities.

Name: Zona Ovest di Torino
Description:
Zona Ovest di Torino S.r.l è la società pubblica costituita nel giugno del 2001 dai Comuni di Alpignano, Buttigliera Alta, Collegno, Druento, Grugliasco, Pianezza, Rivoli, Rosta, San Gillio, Venaria Reale, Villarbasse.
La società ha per oggetto lo svolgimento di attività volte allo sviluppo sociale ed economico dell’area Ovest di Torino, attraverso la realizzazione di servizi, progetti e iniziative di finanziamento pubblico, realizzate in partenariato con gli attori del territorio. In questi anni la Società è stata in grado di progredire oltre lo stadio iniziale di supporto tecnico ai patti territoriali, trasformandosi progressivamente in Agenzia di servizi per i Comuni e concentrando gradualmente la propria azione su un certo numero di temi unificanti quali lo sviluppo economico, le politiche del lavoro e di coesione sociale, l’ambiente e la mobilità sostenibile. L’attenzione a queste tematiche ha prodotto l’avvio di numerosi progetti di area vasta che hanno portato sul territorio, in 20 anni di attività, oltre 60 milioni di euro per progetti e servizi. Un esempio positivo ed efficiente di politica pubblica.
---------------------------------------
Zona Ovest di Torino S.r.l is the public company established in June 2001 by the Municipalities of Alpignano, Buttigliera Alta, Collegno, Druento, Grugliasco, Pianezza, Rivoli, Rosta, San Gillio, Venaria Reale, Villarbasse. The purpose of the company is to carry out activities aimed at the social and economic development of the western area of Turin, through the implementation of public funding services, projects and initiatives, carried out in partnership with local players.

Name: APA Asian & Pacific Islander Interest Group
Description:
Our goals include:

•Increase the numbers of Asians and Pacific Islanders participating in planning in their communities

•Provide a forum for planners to better understand the needs and desires of Asian and Pacific Islander communities

•Facilitate planning processes to provide and improve results for Asian and Pacific Islander community residents and stakeholders

•Support Asian and Pacific Islander planners and planning students in their career development

•Build a diverse network for all planners to share their experiences and ideas relating to Asian and Pacific Islander communities

•Collaborate with other APA Interest Groups and APA Divisions to address issues of significance to Asian and Pacific Islander communities

Name: Be Well Community Development Corporation
Description: No one should be disadvantaged from achieving their potential because of their social position or socially determined circumstance. We want to see north Tulsa thrive. Our mission is to advance the health and quality of life for residents in Tulsa’s District 1 by convening people, ideas, and resources. We will work to improve the sustainability of efforts that address health improvements in a context-specific, empowering, and culturally sensitive way.

Name: MQ Geography & Planning Society
Description:
MQ Geography and Planning Society is for everyone who wants to explore how space shapes our lives. From our establishment in 2022 to this day, we are committed to championing geo-planning students in their pursuit of understanding the built environment.

We aim to connect students from all disciplines, with a passion for sustainability, community and positive change through a range of social and professional events to make the most of your time at university.

Name: Opportunity DeKalb
Description: Opportunity DeKalb is a nonprofit community development corporation formed to work collaboratively with others to achieve the community revitalization goals established in DeKalbs Annie Glidden North (AGN) Revitalization Plan. Creation of such an organization was identified by the community as one of the top 10 goals of the plan. We strive to further the reputation of AGN and northwest DeKalb as a place where all are welcome to come to get from where they are in life to where they want to be.

Name: IIB Land
Description:
Iskandar Development Management Services Sdn Bhd (788230-D)
IIB Land Sdn Bhd (809930-U)

IIB Land Sdn. Bhd. is a subsidiary of the holding company Iskandar Investment Berhad, established with the mission of harnessing diverse perspectives and advanced sustainability principles to drive innovation, foster inclusive growth, and create lasting value for our stakeholders. 

We are committed to achieving growth by placing sustainability at the forefront, resonating with stakeholders across various spheres. Our vision and mission reflect our dedication to integrating sustainable practices into our growth strategies as we drive economic prosperity while safeguarding the environment and promoting social well-being.

Name: Reverso
Description:
PT: A Reverso nasceu da urgência em transformar realidades urbanas por meio do diálogo, da ciência e da cooperação entre os setores público e privado. Atuamos na interseção entre sociedade, cidades e Natureza, apoiando organizações na implementação de projetos estratégicos que promovam uma vida digna, equitativa e sustentável nas cidades. Nossa atuação se divide em Consultoria Pública, Consultoria Empresarial e Promoção de Financiamento Verde.
Nossa metodologia transversal e multidisciplinar permite o desenvolvimento de soluções integradas, que respeitam a identidade de cada território e organização e potencializam a efetividade das ações, contribuindo para a construção de uma economia regenerativa.

ENG: Reverso was born out of the urgency to transform urban realities through dialogue, science, and cooperation between the public and private sectors. We operate at the intersection of society, cities, and Nature, supporting organizations in the implementation of strategic projects that foster dignified, equitable, and sustainable urban life.
Our work is structured around Public Consulting, Corporate Consulting, and Green Finance Promotion. Our cross-cutting and multidisciplinary methodology enables the development of integrated solutions that respect the identity of each territory and organization while enhancing the effectiveness of actions, thus contributing to the building of a regenerative economy.

Name: Our Arbroath
Description:
The past few months have been been rather remarkable for our community as we’ve now officially secured up to £20M of UK Government funding to propel the aspirations for Arbroath forward, and we simply couldn’t have achieved this without you and your contributions during the initial consultation phase.

You’ll hear more from us in 2025 as we continue our work towards making Arbroath one of the finest seaside towns in Scotland. This is just the beginning and we firmly believe that Together We Can!

#OurArbroath #TogetherWeCan

Name: Dilijan Development Foundation - DDF
Description:
Our goal is to support Dilijan and nearby villages.
Urban development
Environmental projects
Cultural and sports events
Join us!

Name: Castle: Stakeholder and Community Engagement
Description:
With our headquarters in Hebburn, South Tyneside and bases in Edinburgh and Glasgow, we employ 200 staff. Castle is one of the UK’s leading providers of all disciplines of construction, offering a wide range of high-quality engineering and contracting services covering all aspects of design, construction, mechanical, public health, renewable and electrical engineering. 

This LinkedIn page is dedicated to our stakeholder and community engagement activity, including the relocation of South Tyneside College and the world renowned South Shields Marine School from their existing site in Westoe Village to the centre of South Shields. It is a project that will enhance the career choices of many people in the borough while also bringing huge economic benefits to businesses  in the town centre due to the increased footfall.

The £95m college relocation project is a partnership between Tyne Coast College and South Tyneside Council.
 
It is being funded by Tyne Coast College, the North East Combined Authority, DfE and UK Government.

Name: LIBERTY TOWN PLANNERS
Description:
LIBERTY TOWN PLANNERS was founded in 2016 with the objective of rendering
professional, world-class urban (town) and regional planning consulting services to both the public and private sector.
Necessitated by the need to offer a one-stop shop, we have grown
to also render land surveying, environmental consultancy, social
facilitation services, and conveyancing.

Name: Asia Pacific Cycling Conference
Description:
The Asia Pacific Cycling Conference aims to build upon the rich legacy of the event last delivered in 2017, bringing together the diverse cycling industry to share, inform, and collaborate. 

The conference will delve into crucial topics such as Economic Benefits, Health and Safety, and New Opportunities and Markets.

Name: Madison's Central Business Improvement District
Description: Unique shopping and culinary experiences, nightly live entertainment, seasonal events, festivals, renown art studios, museums, and cultural attractions – it all converges here in the Central Business Improvement District. From King Street, around Capitol Square, down State Street to Library Mall and the front steps of University of Wisconsin, the beating heart of downtown Madison is here to welcome everyone!

Name: HFF Projektpartner AB
Description:
HFF Projektpartner verkar för samhällsnytta, effektivitet och ekonomiskt fördelaktighet i utveckling av nyproduktion- och ombyggnadsprojekt.  

Oberoende partner med mål att skapa långsiktiga relationer med byggherrar och aktörer inom Stockholmsområdet. Vi stödjer våra beställare med fastighetsutveckling, projektutveckling och genomförande av projekt, från idé till färdigställande. 

Varje projekt och uppdrag anpassas utifrån beställarens ambitionsmål och projektens förutsättningar så att både korta- och långsiktiga mål uppnås med maximalt värdeoptimering för beställarens totala affär.  

Vi vill skapa samarbete i tidigt skede då vi vet att långsiktiga, kvalitativa och värdeoptimerade åtgärder och struktur fastställs redan från start. 

Vi stödjer våra beställare främst med fastighetsutveckling, projektutveckling, projektering, projektledning och byggledning. Utöver det stödjer vi även våra kunder med tekniska och ekonomiska rapporter och rådgivning. 

Boka villkorslöst möte med oss så kan vi berätta mer hur vi på ett effektivt och ekonomiskt fördelaktigt sätt kan arbeta med ert kommande projekt. Vi är gärna er samarbetspartner från tidigt skede till färdigställande, men tar även på oss ansvar för delprocesser.  

Vi erbjuder stor bolagskunskap i ett personligt bolagsskal.

Name: Tiggo Inc
Description:
Tiggo brings together public space innovators and impactful projects.

Our platform connects architects, urban designers, planners, and urban development professionals with real opportunities to collaborate, build capacity, and create meaningful impact. By streamlining the RFP pipeline, Tiggo helps professionals, municipalities, and communities work together to build thriving public spaces—faster and smarter.

Name: Plan C
Description: We are planners, designers, community development specialists and strategic thinkers dedicated to community outcomes. Plan C provides specialist services to communities, governments, the development industry, mining, energy and tourism sectors, and Traditional Owner estates. We are uniquely placed to deliver community-led, innovative and sustainable planning, developments, infrastructure, enterprises and programs.

Name: EKSIO
Description:
“Nous réalisons tout ce qui est à l’extérieur du bâtiment ; conjuguer l’expertise du visible et de l’invisible, voilà notre différence. “

L’histoire commence sous l’impulsion de Sébastien Boulogne, passionné par la technique complexe des VRD. 

Il fonde l’entreprise Max TP en 2011. Chemin faisant, l’entreprise développe une expertise dans tous types d’aménagements extérieurs, VRD et paysage, tout en nourrissant des relations d’estime réciproque avec ses clients et de fiabilité avec ses partenaires.

Avec Matthieu Merlin, et tous les collaborateurs, MaxTP bâtit son succès sur des valeurs inchangées : le haut niveau de technicité et la forte orientation client. 

Le changement de nom en EKSIO marque un tournant pour l’entreprise : une ambition encore plus forte, relier tous les lieux de vie avec cohérence, et une garantie d’excellence et de cohérence dans tous les espaces extérieurs.

Name: Heartland Valley
Description:
Heartland Valley offers live maps of startups, incubators, and venture capital firms to help people navigate the Midwest’s entrepreneurial landscape.

It also features one Midwest startup every Thursday through a weekly newsletter.

Explore the maps or subscribe to the newsletter to get started.

Name: Delaware County Planning Department
Description:
The Mission of the Delaware County Planning Department is to elevate quality of life, prosperity, and pride of place in Delaware County through innovative, sustainable, and equitable planning, and meaningful collaboration with communities, governments, and organizations. 

The future of Delaware County and our municipalities is critically important, and we hope to provide information to support a bright future.

Name: Fundación CEPA
Description: En CEPA, nuestra misión se centra en impulsar el desarrollo integral y sostenible como la fórmula para construir un futuro resiliente y equitativo. Nos dedicamos apasionadamente a integrar las dimensiones esenciales de la vida: Comida, Energía, Personas y Agua, reconociendo que la interconexión entre ellas es crucial para el progreso sostenible.

Name: Structorstiftelsen
Description:
Structorstiftelsens syften är att stödja forskning och projekt inom hållbar samhällsutveckling samt vara en stabil och långsiktig ägare i aktiebolaget Structor.

"Vi blir fler och fler som ska samsas ihop. Vi behöver få ut mer av mindre resurser. Vår klimatpåverkan behöver bli noll. Som samhällsbyggare har vi ett ansvar. Utmaningarna är många. Potentialen enorm. Det är där vi ser att Structorstiftelsen kan göra skillnad"

Structorstiftelsen kan som kapitalstark huvudägare i aktiebolaget Structor garantera Structorgruppen fortsatt långsiktigt stabila förutsättningar för att utvecklas som en oberoende stark aktör inom samhällsbyggnadsområdet.

Name: Insight Planning & Development
Description:
Insight Planning & Development, LLC (Insight) is a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business based in Wilmington, North Carolina offering quality comprehensive planning and grant management consultant services. Insight was founded in 2020 by C. Ryan Cox and acquired Holland Consulting Planners, Inc (HCP) later the same year. HCP was initially founded in 1987 offering both planning and community development services to eastern North Carolina. Insight continues to offer the same services while expanding into other markets and is committed to providing exceptional level of services and expertise to our clients.

Our staff consists of qualified professionals with an average of 25 years' experience in community development, planning, and hazard mitigation. The firm and staff members maintain memberships/certifications from the following organizations: American Planning Association, American Institute of Certified Planners, Association of State Floodplain Managers, Community Development Academy, and North Carolina Home Inspector Licensure Board.

The firm has extensive experience in the preparation of CAMA land use and comprehensive plans, as well as zoning/unified development and subdivision ordinances. Other planning experience includes Geographic Information System (GIS) development and management, preparation of hazard mitigation plans, emergency operations plans, recreation plans, and comprehensive housing strategies. Insight also provides general planning services for several municipalities, including re-zoning requests, site plan review, and other technical planning reviews.

Het Maritiem District is het meest water- en hoogbouwrijke gebied van Rotterdam centrum gekenmerkt door bekendste stadhavens als de Wijn- en Oude Haven. Het unieke karakter van de wijk met zowel historie als veel moderniteit, levert mooie gezichten en samenwerkingen op. Wij dragen er aan bij de wijk ondernemend, duurzaam, sociaal, cultureel en kunstzinnig te houden. 

Wil jij je als ondernemer bij ons aansluiten of heb je een idee of suggestie? Schroom dan niet om contact met ons op te nemen. De stichting wordt bestuurd door zowel ondernemers als bewoners en telt een actief ondernemerscollectief.

Name: Urban Foundry Podcast
Description: Each city has a life of their own, with their distinct pulse and rhythm. Most of us spend our lives traveling in and out of cities every day, watching buildings go up and old ones torn down. But do we really know the stories behind them? On this podcast we will talk with the leaders, the visionaries, the entrepreneurs, and the movers and shakers that are having a positive impact in their cities and driving the innovation in Urban Real Estate.  We'll explore the future of cities as they re-invent, and re-establish their purpose. If you're interested in commercial real estate, politics, finance, community organizations, non-profits, and businesses in Rust Belt cities this podcast is for you. Hosted by Andrew Urban and Paige O'Neil and recorded in our studio in the heart of downtown Indianapolis, Indiana.

Name: Crossroads Community Development
Description:
At Crossroads Community Development (CCD), we empower communities through strategic action and collaborative processes. Based in California’s Central Valley, we leverage over 20 years of expertise in strategic planning, stakeholder engagement, organizational development, and environmental justice, rooted in our commitment to Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Justice (DEIJ).

We understand that community challenges are complex, requiring inclusive approaches that unite diverse stakeholders. Our tailored consulting services include:

Collective Impact Consulting: We initiate and sustain collective impact processes by conducting thorough community assessments, facilitating workshops to educate stakeholders on the collective impact framework, and fostering collaboration. We guide discussions to define pressing social issues and establish a common agenda, ensuring all voices are included in goal-setting. Additionally, we support the creation of a backbone organization for effective coordination and develop systems for measuring progress, summarizing key deliverables and recommendations for sustainability.

Strategic Planning & Visioning: Our structured approach focuses on defining shared visions and measurable goals that guide organizations through growth. We conduct organizational analyses, engage stakeholders through Key Informant Interviews (KIIs), and facilitate the refinement of Theory of Change and mission statements.

Organizational Development & Leadership Transition: We support organizations through leadership transitions and rapid growth by strengthening structures and building capacity.

Our collaborative approach ensures that every voice is heard and every solution is co-created. Whether through collective impact initiatives, strategic planning, or community engagement, we provide the expertise to drive real, lasting change.

Join us on this journey to create meaningful community impact. Together, we can foster collaboration and achieve collective goals.

Name: Σύλλογος Ελλήνων Μηχανικών Πολεοδομίας, Χωροταξίας και Περιφερειακής Ανάπτυξης (ΣΕΜΠΧΠΑ)
Description:
Ο Σύλλογος Ελλήνων Μηχανικών Πολεοδομίας, Χωροταξίας και Περιφερειακής Ανάπτυξης (ΣΕΜΠΧΠΑ) δημιουργήθηκε το 1998 και αποτελεί το συλλογικό όργανο έκφρασης των Μηχανικών της Ειδικότητας.

Στόχος του ΣΕΜΠΧΠΑ είναι η καλύτερη δυνατή ανταπόκριση στις διαμορφούμενες ανάγκες των μελών του κατά την άσκηση του επαγγέλματός τους.

Ειδικότερα, βασική επιδίωξη του Συλλόγου είναι:

η συμβολή στη συνεχή βελτίωση του χωρικού σχεδιασμού στη χώρα,
η συστηματική ενημέρωση των μελών για θέματα επιστημονικού ενδιαφέροντος σχετικά με θέματα χωροταξίας, πολεοδομίας και ανάπτυξης, τοπικού, εθνικού, ευρωπαϊκού ενδιαφέροντος, μέσω ανακοινώσεων και ηλεκτρονικών ενημερωτικών δελτίων, καθώς και η καθιέρωση μιας περιοδικής ενημερωτικής έκδοσης με θέματα Χωροταξίας- Πολεοδομίας- Ανάπτυξης,
η ενημέρωση σχετικά με την προσφορά εργασίας στον ιδιωτικό και δημόσιο τομέα και η βελτίωση της διείσδυσης της Ειδικότητας στην αγορά εργασίας και η διευκόλυνση του επαγγελματικού προσανατολισμού των νέων Μηχανικών της Ειδικότητας κατά την είσοδό τους στην αγορά εργασίας,
η προώθηση της ενσωμάτωσης των Μηχανικών της Ειδικότητας στο σώμα των Ελλήνων Μηχανικών, η ενεργοποίησή τους και η ανάληψη πρωτοβουλιών,
η παρέμβαση για την προάσπιση των συμφερόντων του κλάδου, όταν και όπου αυτό απαιτείται.

Description:
Remote-IT is an URBACT Action Planning Network, financed through the URBACT IV (2021-2027) programme of the European Commission. Remote-IT network tackles the new challenges cities are experiencing connected to the future of work. The COVID-19 pandemic has accelerated the transformation around how work is organised, with hybrid and remote work models significantly impacting the lives of citizens, as well as the organisational culture of major employers (public/private). Remote-IT partnerships of cities is collaboratively exploring this emerging topic in order to implement proactive policy making.

The Network is led by the Dubrovnik’s Development Agency (DURA), Croatia. Partner cities include: Brindisi (Italy), Bucharest District 6 (Romania), Camara de Lobos (Portugal), Heraklion (Greece), Murcia (Spain), Tartu (Estonia), Tirana Albania).

Name: GAL Baldo-Lessinia
Description:
ll GAL Baldo Lessinia è un’Associazione composta da 52 soci di cui 36 Comuni, 1 Unione Montana, 1 consorzio e 15 soggetti privati fra cui associazioni di categoria, bamche , strade e consorzi. Il GAL pubblica bandi di finanziamento a valere sulla Misura 19 del PSR della Regione Veneto, destinati sia a soggetti pubblici che a privati. Le richieste vengono finanziate a seguito di valutazioni effettuate da AVEPA (l’organismo della Regione Veneto dedicato a questa attività per tutti i finanziamenti e contributi) in collaborazione con il GAL. Tutti i bandi vengono pubblicati sul sito www.baldolessinia.it e pubblicizzati attraverso i social.

Il Presidente del GAL Baldo Lessinia è Ermanno Anselmi che guida un Consiglio di Amministrazione composto da rappresentanti del settore pubblico e di quello privato. L’attuale governance è in carica fino al 2024 (l’assemblea dei soci elegge Presidente e CdA ogni 3 anni). Uno dei punti chiave del GAL è la rappresentanza, composta da pubblico e privato e denominata Partenariato.

Dal confronto fra i rappresentanti locali nascono le progettualità cosiddette di “tipo partecipativo”. Il GAL, acronimo di Gruppo di Azione Locale, gestisce lo sviluppo locale di tipo partecipativo nelle zone rurali come voluto dall’Unione Europea che lo definisce “Sviluppo Locale Leader”. Leader è la sintesi di “Liaison entre Actions de Développement de l’Economie Rurale” – Collegamento tra azioni di sviluppo dell’economia rurale). Nell’attuale periodo di programmazione dei fondi UE (2014-2020), Leader rappresenta proprio la sopracitata Misura 19 “Sostegno allo sviluppo locale – Leader” contenuta all’interno del PSR e del FEASR regionale. 
La progettazione partecipativa del GAL è realizzata attraverso una strategia di sviluppo locale con obiettivi e risultati definiti all’inizio di ogni programmazione europea che ha una durata di 7 anni. L’attuale Programma di Sviluppo Locale del GAL Baldo Lessinia 2014-2020 è denominato IN.S.I.E.M.&.

Name: Cycle4Climate
Description:
The Cycle4Climate (C4C) project aims to implement and assess the effectiveness and feasibility of interventions to encourage people to switch from using cars to using bikes for transportation. The project is carried out in four cities: Espoo, Finland; Gävle, Sweden; Pärnu, Estonia; and Riga, Latvia. It will involve continuous traffic volume measurements and pre- and post-intervention travel surveys to estimate the impact of these interventions on reducing CO2 emissions. 

The project will produce three main outcomes: 
1) implementation of interventions in the transportation areas, 
2) estimates of travel-related CO2 emissions over time and the impact of the interventions on these emissions
3) an intervention toolbox based on cross-border knowledge exchange 

City officials, policymakers, and decision-makers in the Central Baltic region seek ways to reduce CO2 emissions by increasing the use of bicycles. Cycle4Climate addresses this by focusing on a combination of physical and social behavioural interventions in a structured and systematic manner. The resulting data from the four transportation areas will serve as evidence for the effectiveness of these interventions. This information is compiled into a toolbox, which can be adapted to different cities' needs, promoting the adoption of effective planning practices.

Cycle4Climate, coordinated by the University of Gävle, is co-funded by the EU Interreg Central Baltic Programme during 6/2024-11/2027. Project partners include Metropolia University of Applied Sciences, University of Tartu, Riga Technical University, City of Espoo, Gävle Municipality, City of Pärnu, and Riga City Council.

Name: TTL PLANNING
Description:
With an experience of over 1 years in the urban mobility and transport planning / modelling field, Ionut Sorin Mitroi showed specialized practical and theoretical knowledge in area of planning of the public transport using modern management systems including implementation of specialized software for transport demand forecasting and traffic management. His area of knowledge and professional skills covers the area of  transportation and traffic engineering, especially in the field of technical, economic and financial assessment of transport systems development projects, city logistics (integrated logistics systems), IT solutions assisting transport and traffic processes and decisions, market studies transport-oriented, transport and traffic management for goods and people and transport marketing. He graduated a master of science in Transportation Logistics and Management, his dissertation having as subject modelling the urban congestion and in 2015 he has acquired his Doctorate in Science with "Traffic Flow assignment in congested urban network" Thesis.
He was involved in major projects for the elaboration of feasibility studies for new metro lines, including transport planning/modelling, option analysis, cost-benefit analysis and also, in research projects regarding road traffic safety. He was also involved in traffic studies for public transport infrastructure development projects, road and railway projects as well as in the development of urban mobility strategies and Transport Public Services Contract. Throughout his career, he worked as a transport planner / modeller, project manager,  Chef of Transport planning department and since 2016 he is transport consultant and leads TTL Planning Company as Chief Executive Officer, having provided transport planning consultancy services to a range of public and private sector clients, including central government, local government, transport agencies, transport operators and developers.

Both initiatives actively support creative and technical talent, enrich the cultural landscape of their respective areas, and contribute to the growth of the immersive technology sector in the Netherlands.

Name: CNMI Office of Planning and Development
Description:
Established in 2017 through Public Law 20-20, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands (CNMI) Office of Planning and Development (OPD) is the CNMI’s main government office for guiding future development and ensuring that government projects and initiatives are sustainable for decades to come.  

One critical mandate for OPD is to create the CNMI Comprehensive Sustainable Development Plan (CSDP), which is the CNMI's guiding document for sustainable planning and implementation. The 2021-2030 CNMI CSDP can be found here: https://opd.gov.mp/assets/2021-2030_cnmi_csdp.pdf  

Along with creating the CSDP, OPD is also mandated to: 

- Improve planning in the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands (CNMI) to increase the effectiveness of government and private actions as well as coordination among different agencies and levels of government to guide growth of the CNMI, working with the Planning and Development Advisory Council (PDAC) and other partners;  

- Serve as a clearinghouse for all information related to development, planning, and resource use in CNMI and to identify objectives, policies, and priorities for the CNMI;  

- Provide a basis for determining priorities and allocating resources; and  

- Establish a system for plan formulation and program coordination to provide for an integration of all major CNMI and individual island activities.  

To support CSDP implementation and the promotion of sustainability outcomes, OPD is closely involved with several of the CNMI’s major federally funded natural and built environment investment projects focusing on coral and wetland restoration, solid waste management, cultural preservation, tourism, and broadband planning and deployment. 

OPD maintains strong working relationships with the federal government agencies that are funding these investments, such as the U.S. Economic Development Administration, U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, and the U.S. Federal Emergency Management Agency, among others.

Dispor de um Plano Diretor detalhado e de um Instituto especializado é o que faz de Curitiba uma cidade reconhecida pela excelência em planejamento urbano. Aqui no IPPUC este legado é motivo de orgulho e de imensa responsabilidade, pois ser um farol requer olhos atentos para captar os primeiros sinais do que ainda nem virou tendência.

E para além de identificar os novos rumos do planejamento urbano, precisamos ter a capacidade de oferecer caminhos em tempo hábil para que as pessoas vivam a cidade da melhor maneira possível.

Name: Xi Bassile
Description:
We are a Mozambican social startup aiming to provide the design, construction and maintenance of nature-based solutions for urban infrastructure, with a focus on an innovative sustainable drainage system. Bioswales are a nature-based solution that uses vegetation and soil to not only drain but also to absorb and filtrate stormwater. Based on precedent studies from the University of Cape Town and the University of Brasilia, we developed a new bioswale typology that repurposes waste as constructive elements to increase water absorption and temporary storage capacity, tackling stormwater and waste management simultaneously.

Mission
We aim to tackle urban and environmental problems in a sustainable way and with a systemic approach, contributing to safer, healthier, more inclusive and resilient cities (SDG11), ensuring water's inclusive and sustainable management (ODS6), promoting climate change mitigation and adaptation (SDG13) and supporting biodiversity  (SDG15).

Values
We perceive the world and its challenges through the ecocentric and social ecology lenses, regarding humanity as being a part of nature (not something apart or superior to it) and understanding that the current social and environmental crises require rethinking human systems and interactions. Our actions are guided by the principles of integrity, equality, social justice, respect and innovation.

Vision
Our goal is to become a key agent in innovating practices and policies regarding urban infrastructure in Mozambique, contributing to a scenario where water management is sustainable and enables multiple benefits to people, places and nature.

Name: One World Shared Future
Description:
One World Shared Future Institute (OWSFI) is dedicated to helping frontline families and communities change to a more favorable path through repairing family relationships and building community relationships.  Our programs are grounded in community knowledge, addressing the impacts of the changing climate on health, economy, and developing community-engaged solutions.    

In order to build community cohesiveness which increases community health, safety, climate resilience and sustainability, OWSF fosters inclusiveness, courage, respect, trust, sharing of experiences and collaboration to spark new insights, empathy, innovation, and solutions. 

Inclusiveness is extremely important in handling environmental disasters, decreasing crime, incarceration and the ripple affects created by these incidents.  

We invite all community members to participate in building a thriving community.  
Be a part of the solution!  None of us is as smart as all of us.

Name: Miljøløftet
Description:
Folketallet i bergensområdet vil øke i årene fremover. Om biltrafikken øker tilsvarende, blir det lengre køer på veiene, høyere klimautslipp og mer utrygge forhold for fotgjengere og syklister. 

Derfor har vi Miljøløftet.

Miljøløftet er samarbeidet mellom stat, fylke og fem kommuner om nullvekstmålet i bergensområdet.

Gjennom å gjøre det enklere og tryggere å gå, sykle og reise kollektivt skal vi unngå at personbiltrafikken vokser – selv om folketallet gjør det. 

Slik skaper vi triveligere og grønnere byrom for alle. 

Bybanen er det største prosjektet som blir finansiert gjennom Miljøløftet. I tillegg kommer drift av kollektiv, nye gang- og sykkelveier og trafikksikkerhetstiltak i hele bergensområdet.

The development process requires various permits to be acquired; each specific to the location and type of development proposed. With so many entities involved, and tasks required; it became evident that that there were far more efficient means to arrive at the same goal

Precision Geospatial Solutions has vast knowledge and experience in multiple disciplines; we aim to take the Lead on each project. From initial stages of development feasibility, survey, stormwater testing, septic planning/testing & design
 - We will assign a project manager that to each project that will be the lead for completing every task necessary to gain permit approval.

We have built strong relationships with the Department of Environmental Protection, The Chester County Health Department and many of the municipalities in Southeastern Pennsylvania. 

Offering all the necessary services required as well as taking the responsibility of all coordination between the regulatory agencies - Our goal is to provide a new approach to Sustainable Land Development; one which will lead to less headaches & miscommunication, and to more efficient & sustainable practices.

Our mission is to empower communities and promote understanding, respect, and tolerance among all people, regardless of their background or beliefs.

At SBCOP, we believe that peace is possible through education, dialogue, and collaboration. We work to provide educational opportunities and promote social and economic development in the region, while also addressing issues of conflict and violence.

Our initiatives include programs to promote education and health, vocational training and skill development, and community building and outreach. We also provide resources and support to individuals and groups who are working towards a more peaceful and just society in the region.

Through our work, we hope to create a culture of peace and understanding in Sindh and Balochistan, where all people can live and thrive in harmony. Join us in our mission to build a brighter future for our communities and for generations to come.

In recent decades, the city’s livability and competitiveness have deteriorated. Institutional strengthening and investments aiming to enhance livability, competitiveness and sustainability have emerged as priorities for Karachi. To address these constraints by selectively tackling critical bottlenecks and to enhance the quality of life in Karachi the Government of Sindh has introduced a five-year project named as Competitive and Livable City of Karachi CLICK, focusing on the improving the urban management, service delivery, and the business environment in Karachi.

Name: ConnecToledo
Description:
Led by a network of corporate and civic leaders from the community, ConnecToledo is a 501(c)3 organization committed to the redevelopment of downtown Toledo. This is accomplished by connecting public and private investment to facilitate the implementation of the Downtown Toledo Master Plan and other community priorities.

In 2017, ConnecToledo evolved from the 22nd Century Committee, which sought to align downtown revitalization efforts through a new master plan. As the master plan was completed, the 22nd Century Committee was reconstituted as the Downtown Toledo Development Corporation with the public-facing name of ConnecToledo.

Partnering with the Downtown Toledo Improvement District through a contract for services, ConnecToledo maintains programs for marketing/communications, business advocacy, residential attraction, business attraction including pre-development activity, and an ambassador program focused on hospitality, cleaning and safety.

Our Partner Organization

ConnecToledo has a partner organization focused on delivering exceptional services for those who shop, play, work, dine and live in downtown. The Downtown Toledo Improvement District helps identify opportunities, solve problems, and directly support the day-to-day work of improving downtown neighborhoods.

Description:
City Advisors is a contract planning firm that exclusively serves public agencies. We believe that all cities deserve quality technical support, regardless of the agency’s means. Founded by a public sector planner with years of experience managing consultants at various firms, City Advisors was established to provide agencies with an alternative means to build resource capacity and help improve service levels.

City Advisors prioritizes community impact over profits. Specializing in flexible and focused contracts, we strive to work with clients to tailor a scope and budget that fits their specific needs. The company’s business model relies on a lean organizational structure with limited overhead so that cost savings may be passed onto client cities. City Advisors currently provides on-call contract planning support for cities throughout Southern California.

City Advisors prides itself on operating honestly, with integrity, and with the highest ethical standards. Exclusively serving public agency clients allows City Advisors to focus on representing the City's best interests. Cities can rely on us to follow through on commitments, produce high-quality work, be proactive communicators, and avoid unexpected costs throughout the entire contract term.

Services Provided: Zoning Code Amendments, Ordinance Development, Entitlement Case Processing, Development Review, Program Implementation, and Special Planning Project Management

Contact Information:
info@city-advisors.com

Name: Marsh Collective
Description: We are a collective enterprise of people dedicated to making a generational difference by adding value to people and places. Name: Job Booster Burkina Faso
Description:
Les programmes Job Booster Burkina Faso sont des initiatives sociales qui apportent un appui à la création d'emplois pour les jeunes en partant des besoins du marché de l'emploi mais aussi à appuyer les jeunes entrepreneurs dans l'otique de consolider leurs entreprises afin qu'elles soient pourvoyeuses d'emplois.
Les programmes Job Booster Burkina Faso visent à permettre aux jeunes du Burkina Faso non seulement d’avoir des emplois dignes mais de favoriser un écosystème propice à la création d'emplois. L’employabilité des jeunes passe par des formations professionnelles de qualité et de courte durée. L’insertion professionnelle de tous les jeunes formés est au cœur de nos actions à travers les partenariats avec les entreprises et associations faîtières.

Name: Linkedin Local Ekiti
Description: A community of LinkedIn Users within Ekiti State, Nigeria dedicated to helping every community member to grow and to enjoy the physical networking event.

Name: PilotInnCities (agile piloting)
Description: PilotInnCities (Pilot-based Innovation Ecosystems for Smart Cities) is an innovative project led by the Ministry of Industry and Trade of the Czech Republic, participated in by an 11-member consortium from six countries of the Danube Region. The goal of the project is simple: to support the introduction of innovative Smart City solutions into the daily life of the region's cities and, to initiate widespread, systemic changes towards this direction. The project relies on the Finnish-inspired method of agile piloting, in which stakeholders across the innovation ecosystem participate in small innovative experiments based on the principle of living labs (where new innovations can be tested in the real-world). The PilotInnCities initiative received a grant of EUR 1.98 million from the Interreg Danube program to be used from the beginning of 2024 to mid-2026. However, this is not where our journey ends, as the PilotInnCities project is just the beginning of our broader initiative to support competitiveness, well-being and strong communities.

Name: Cahors Sud
Description:
Élément déterminant de la stratégie de développement économique du territoire, le parc d’activités de Cahors Sud est en position d’interface de trois grandes régions : Occitanie, Nouvelle Aquitaine et Auvergne-Rhône Alpes, toutes transfontalières et à moins d’une heure de la métropole toulousaine. Le parc offre de ce fait à ses entreprises des conditions très favorables à leur développement et à leur compétitivité. Il fait en outre partie du réseau labelisé OZE (Occitanie Zones économiques) de la Région Occitanie.
Cahors Sud est un parc d’activités mixte, installé sur le territoire de quatre communes : Cieurac, Fontanes, Lhospitalet et Le Montat. S’y sont installées des activités industrielles, agroalimentaires, de logistique, de transport et de services. Des espaces dédiés sont également consacrés à l’artisanat. Le parc affiche une croissance forte ces dernières années avec plus de 500 emplois créés en 10 ans.

Name: Territorios Futuros
Description:
Territorios Futuros hace posible la colaboración entre gobiernos locales, sociedad civil y financiadores para abordar retos complejos (agua, residuos, seguridad, energía) en resultados sistémicos y medibles.

 Entendemos retos sistémicos, actores involucrados y puntos de apalancamiento.
 Diseñamos estructuras de gobernanza conjunta multi-nivel y multi-sector.  
 Co-creamos visiones de largo plazo y portafolios de cambio.
 Movilizamos capital público-privado para llevar las soluciones al territorio.

¿Trabajas en desarrollo territorial o impacto sistémico? 

Síguenos para casos piloto, herramientas y oportunidades de colaboración.

Escríbenos para conocer tu reto sistémico y contarte como podemos ayudarte.

Name: Emerging New Urbanists
Description: We are a group of emerging professionals who share common passions for placemaking, affordable housing, compact mixed-use development, climate change, environmental justice, and meaningful walkable design. We actively connect with one other across the country via virtual platforms and in-person gatherings in order to share our passions and ideas for the future. Go to our Members page to learn more.

Name: InclusiveCity_eu
Description:
Welcome to InclusiveCity – Reshaping our cities for All! 

- How can we make cities more inclusive, accessible, and resilient?
- How to improve public spaces without gentrifying, commercialising and touristifying neighbourhoods? 
- How can disadvantaged communities benefit from 15-minute cities?  

These are the questions we raise and answer during the 3 years of InclusiveCity project in the frame of DUT Partnership, which reimagines the 15-minute city concept through the lens of social inclusion, diversity, and the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Our mission
We help to create public spaces that are truly for everyone—multi-generational, gender-inclusive, and socially equitable—while addressing economic, social, and environmental challenges.

What We Do?
- In five partner cities across Europe, we create inclusive public spaces that address the diverse needs of local communities.
- We develop critical placemaking methods, tools and fundamental principles for participatory urban development.
- We provide an integrated approach that balances social, economic, and environmental impact in urban transformation. 

Where Theory Meets Practice
To test and refine our approaches, InclusiveCity has launched five pilot projects (Urban Living Labs) in collaboration with local stakeholders, target groups, and communities. Our Living Labs are located in:

 Budapest |  Oslo |  Rome |  Rotterdam |  Vienna

Each city tackles unique, local challenges tied to the SDGs, offering rich learning opportunities. Through these experiences, we translate on-site findings into universal resources for urban development Europe-wide.

Who we are?
ASD Bastogi, BME, Breda University, Eutropian, Fragment, KÉK - Contemporary Architecture Centre, Natural State, Nonna Roma, NTNU, Nuove Ri-Generazioni Lazio, Placemaking Europe, RÉV8, SINTEF, Social DesignStudio Vienna, Superwien.urbanism

Name: Populate
Description:
Populate is a place management specialist with a focus on maximising the long-term social and economic value of mixed-use developments for occupiers, communities and investors.  

We ensure that creating and maintaining a quality experience is embedded into the design of developments at an early stage. Working alongside the development team, we deliver place management that encompasses tech, innovation, social impact, sustainability, retail, F&B and activation.

Populate is 100% owned by Socius and its Directors, supporting our investors to maximise the potential and value from buildings and spaces; always with people in mind.

We advise on place management for mixed-use projects delivered by Socius, and partner with other investors and asset owners across the UK.

Name: Swan Planning Consultancy Inc.
Description:
Swan Planning is a woman-owned community planning company, established in 2025 by Heather Swan, MCIP, RPP, PEng, PMP.  Heather is a settler of Irish, English and German descent, with 25 years’ of experience working from coast to coast to coast across the country we now know as Canada. We work with organizations and governments in meeting their community and organizational goals in a respectful way.  We work in partnership with our clients to support capacity building. Our goal is to provide our clients with the tools they need to pursue their projects independently. We also collaborate with other consultants to deliver complex projects in partnership.

Diversity is a strength for innovating and creating productive and inclusive solutions.   We work with clients to co-create customized approaches to address challenges and leverage opportunities in an effective and unique way.  We ground our approaches in learnings from the past with a focus on building a future that is inclusive, healthy, sustainable, and thriving.  We identify opportunities for improvements and value creation within existing systems while supporting changes that address systemic barriers. Our approach embraces interconnectedness, wholistic methods, and valuing multiple knowledge systems.   

Swan Planning believes it is critically important to document commitments to reconciliation and has adopted the following to guide our work:

Vision – Informed and responsible decision-making in service of both present and future generations, grounded in meaningful relationships and amplification of Indigenous voices.

Mission – To advance reconciliation in planning while breaking down systemic barriers and maximizing opportunities for Indigenous communities, organizations and peoples.   

Core Values – Respect, Relationship, Reciprocity, Responsibility, Reconciliation

Giving Back – 5% of annual profits will be donated to First Nation-focused not-for-profits or charities

See our RAP on our website!

Name: Ruang Waktu Knowledge Hub

Name: ZF Devco BV
Description:

We are committed to delivering a world-class ferry terminal that sets the highest standards for safety, efficiency, and environmental responsibility. 

Our goal is to be a catalyst for positive change, empowering local communities, promoting responsible tourism, and contributing to the long-term prosperity and resilience of Zanzibar.

Name: Urban Commons
Description:
urban commons tap into the unused potentials of collective investments in urban spaces – investments that improve cities and at the same time generate a high return on investment. 

Today, this is not possible. We are changing that. 
urban commons facilitate and finance urban environments. Transforming for instance the suburban road into a green, secure, energy-producing shared space. We are a one-stop-shop that offers to design, build and operate the road – but most importantly, we want to develop solutions, shared and owned by local citizens. 

We build our solution on in-depth knowledge and experience within urban transformation, sustainability and investment models that creates social and environmentally sustainable cities. 

Do you want to know more?

Name: It's tomorrow
Description:
Med raske endringer i holdninger, teknologi og forretningsmodeller er morgendagens mobilitetsløsninger helt annerledes enn dagens. Det gir bedre liv for folk, bedre lønnsomhet for eiendomsutviklere og helt nye aktører i mobilitetsmarkedet. Potensialet for forbedring er stort, men det er krevende å holde seg orientert om mulighetene.

Norge er kommet langt i å endre mobiliteten. Elektrifisering av biler og sykler, satsing på sykkelveier og kapasitetstunge kollektivtilbud, er viktige forutsetninger for grønn mobilitet. Fleksibel bestillingstransport, digitalisering av informasjon og billettsalg og økende grad av deling av kjøretøy skaper det integrerte mobilitetssystemet. 

Det meste vi planlegger i dag, vil stå ferdig i en verden der det integrerte, grønne mobilitetssystemet er en realitet. Byggene, veiene og kollektivløsningene vil vare i tiår. Allikevel planlegger vi med blikket festet i bakspeilet, i beste fall med dagens løsninger i tankene. 

It’s tomorrow hjelper deg å utvikle løsningene som utnytter potensialet andre holdninger og ny teknologi gir. Vi spiller på lag med dem som vil forme morgendagen. Har du et prosjekt som trenger morgendagens mobilitetsløsninger, så ta kontakt.

Name: Smart City Münster
Description:
Die Stabsstelle Smart City Münster ist angesiedelt im Dezernat für Planung, Bau und Wirtschaft der Stadt Münster. Wir verstehen uns als Schnittstelle zwischen Verwaltung, Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft und Zivilgesellschaft, wenn es um Themen und Projekte der Smart City geht.

Gemeinsam mit Partnern aus allen Bereichen der Stadtgesellschaft geht es darum, neue beispielhafte Antworten auf die sich verändernden Herausforderungen für Leben, Wohnen und Arbeiten in Münster zu geben.

Unsere Mission: Durch digitale Technologie positiven Wandel ermöglichen - entlang der Bedürfnisse der Menschen unserer Stadt.

Im Sinne einer zukunftssicheren, intelligenten und nachhaltigen Stadtentwicklung entwickeln, erproben und setzen wir gemeinsam mit Akteur*innen aus der Stadtverwaltung, des Stadtkonzerns, der Allianz Smart City Münster und mit Beteiligung der Bürger*innen innovative Projekte um, die das Leben für alle Münsteraner*innen erleichtern und Münster als zukunftsfähigen Wirtschaftsstandort stärken sollen.

Name: New Partners Community Solar
Description:
New Partners Community Solar is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, dedicated to clean energy and environmental justice. We installed: 

       -- The first Community Solar project in Washington, DC 
       -- The first Low-Income Community Solar project in Washington, DC 
       -- The first Solar+Green Roof on a Downtown Washington, DC office building
       -- The first Solar+Battery Resiliency Hub for vulnerable District residents

We have offset over 450 tons of greenhouse gases and provided 1 million kWh of clean energy to the District. All of our solar energy credits are distributed to low-income households in affordable housing in Washington, DC, benefitting over 150 households. 

Our continued projects look to partner committed companies, building owners, affordable housing managers, government entities, fellow nonprofits, and utilities in order to protect vulnerable citizens, mitigate carbon emissions, and benefit the community as a whole.

Please visit www.npsolar.org to learn more and to make a charitable donation.

Name: L'Agence des Sentiers
Description:
L’Agence des Sentiers invite à descendre de la voiture et à sortir de l’autoroute – à cheminer juste en dessous, le long de la rivière qu’on avait oubliée.

L’Agence des Sentiers invite à préparer la descente énergétique des villes de demain – et à infléchir la pratique de l’urbanisme. Ne surestimant pas les vertus de la planification, elle invite à découvrir et valoriser par la marche les dynamiques d’auto-organisation des territoires.

Dans une période de recomposition des rapports entre ville et campagne, de renouvellement de l’art de faire des villes, la découverte collective de nos territoires de vie est une nécessité.

Sans itinéraires de randonnée, les habitants d’une ville ne peuvent pas arpenter leurs territoires urbains, qui n’ont pas été prévus pour le piéton.

Fondée en 2014, l’Agence produit des sentiers, mais aussi des livres et des expositions. Depuis 2020, elle développe une activité de formation et de prospective territoriale. Elle anime enfin le réseau international des Sentiers métropolitains.

Name: Fondazione Riusiamo l'Italia
Description: La Fondazione, che non ha fini di lucro, si propone di promuovere finalità di ordine culturale, quale la promozione della cultura e dell’approccio alla rigenerazione urbana ed al riuso di spazi dismessi, ai fini di creare nuova occupabilità in particolare giovanile, privilegiando interventi nelle periferie e nelle aree interne del Paese.

Varmt välkommen!

Name: City Scape Planners
Description:
As the proud founder of City Scape Planners, I lead a passionate team dedicated to revolutionizing urban planning and architecture. At City Scape Planners, we take pride in our expertise in traffic management, city development, infrastructure planning, and urban design, ensuring a harmonious blend of aesthetics and functionality.
