As part of our commitment to social responsibility, we actively participate in AMRUT projects, smart city initiatives, and Swachh Bharat Mission projects. Our dedication to research and development further strengthens our innovative approach to urban challenges.

Additionally, our architectural consultancy and construction services, along with real estate development, exemplify our holistic approach to transforming urban landscapes.

If you're seeking consultancy for urban planning or architecture projects, feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn. Let's collaborate and shape a better future for our cities and communities together. #UrbanPlanning #Architecture #Sustainability #SmartCities #GIS #Consultancy #RealEstateDevelopment

Name: ARKAT
Description:
At ARKAT, we prioritize people by envisioning sustainable environments, guided by a context-centric and data driven approach. 

We specialize in crafting sustainable and resilient urban landscapes. We use evidence-based methods to design spaces that are both economically viable and tailored to meet people’s needs, all while enhancing the human experience.

This is tackled through our comprehensive services which include, expert urban planning advisory, advanced urban design solutions, and significant contributions to impactful research and publications.

Name: Young Professionals of the Valley
Description: Young Professionals of the Valley is a community development organization focused on promoting volunteerism and professional growth for young professionals (21+ years old) in the Shenango and Mahoning Valleys. Will you make a difference?

Name: Urban Insights Data Lab
Description:
Why Urban Insights Data Lab?

Cities are developing at great speed, often resulting in fast and less appropriate solutions. One of the reasons is a lack of understanding of how the many users and citizens of the city act and use the urban space.

Access to shared data is essential for stakeholders across sectors to create vibrant, attractive, healthy and sustainable cities, evaluate actions and adjust direction. However, the existing data landscape is difficult to navigate. As a result, municipalities, developers, architects, tourism organisations, retailers, and other stakeholders do not make sufficient use of the existing public and private sector data sources available.

Urban Insights Data Lab will be the platform where both public and private stakeholders can get easy access to relevant data sources and together create data-driven solutions for sustainable urban development.

The target groups are:
* Municipalities in Denmark
* Actors in the urban space (culture, tourism, retail, transport, etc.)
* Organisations working in urban development (developers, architects, mobility, energy, etc.)

Urban Insights Data Lab's new data model is being developed and tested in the neighborhood of Ørestad in Copenhagen, as the district is similar in size to a major provincial city and houses many of the features that characterise a city. However, the data models that are being developed will be applicable throughout Denmark and internationally.

Urban Insights Data Lab is supported by Realdania and run by a consortium of organisations consisting of Ørestad Innovation City Copenhagen (ØICC),
Smart City Insights (project leader), IT University, Patrade and VOLCANO.
In addition, we have an international and a national monitoring group, which receives regular information about the project and provides input for the development of the model and the data collaboration.

Name: LlactaLAB - Ciudades Sustentables
Description:
LlactaLAB – Ciudades Sustentables es un Grupo de Investigación de la Universidad de Cuenca, parte del Departamento Interdisciplinario de Espacio y Población.
Nuestra misión es construir conocimiento científico que aporte a la búsqueda de soluciones a los grandes desafíos de las ciudades en el siglo XXI: el crecimiento urbano, el cambio climático, el agotamiento de recursos y la energía, la inequidad urbana, el manejo de información, y la salud y el bienestar de la población.

Nuestra investigación combina la reflexión teórica con la innovación metodológica. Mantenemos un proceso de reflexión y debate sobre las realidades locales y su relación con las ideas globales acerca de la sustentabilidad, la naturaleza, la ciencia, la tecnología y la sociedad. Permanentemente ponemos a prueba nuevos métodos de levantamiento y análisis de información y los contrastamos y complementamos con enfoques clásicos de análisis cuantitativo y cualitativo. Hemos desarrollado una experticia particular en el análisis espacial de los fenómenos urbanos utilizando técnicas y herramientas de análisis geográfico y ponemos especial énfasis en la participación activa de los ciudadanos en los procesos de investigación sobre la ciudad.

Entendemos la ciudad como un sistema complejo de interacciones entre las personas y el entorno que habitan, con patrones y propiedades emergentes que son fuertemente influenciados por la forma, la estructura y la distribución espacial. Abordamos su estudio desde un enfoque multidisciplinar, a través de profundizar el estudio de diversos componentes urbanos como el espacio construido, la forma urbana, la vida urbana, los sistemas urbanos y, de manera lateral, la ecología urbana, el patrimonio y la gobernanza.

Name: Frankham Projects
Description:
Frankham Projects provide expert advice across the entire planning process, from planning appraisals, planning applications, settling of reserved matters and discharging planning conditions through economic studies and negotiation of Section 106 agreements.

Together, our planning experts can advise and guide you through the various, and often complex, aspects of the planning process. 

Our advice is based on an intimate understanding of current planning legislation and policy, combined with a comprehensive development and multi-disciplinary building design and engineering consultancy that ensures a complete service is available for our clients from the start of any project.

Name: Te Matarau a Māui
Description:

Name: Swiftbuild.ai

With SwiftGov, our government-focused platform, agencies can reduce bottlenecks in their permitting systems, automate legal compliance checks, and create seamless communication between public and private sectors. Live the SEVENTH way!!!

At SEVENTH Worldwide, we are committed to excellence in everything we do. From top-tier living and hospitality to cutting-edge research, we strive for the highest quality across all aspects of our projects.

Name: TerritorIA
Description:
Empresa Boliviana especialista promoviendo a las Ciudades y Sociedades Data-Driven a partir de la educación, gestión urbana, Ciencia de Datos y digitalización. 

Lideres en implementación, consultoría y capacitación de Metodología BIM a gobiernos, empresas y estudios profesionales.

Somos una agencia de consultoría, asesoría y educación sobre Ciudades Inteligentes para el sector privado, público y del tercer sector, así como para particulares, emprendedores e inversores. Nuestro propósito es desarrollar un contenido innovador y de valor basado en las tendencias globales y cómo la tecnología permite ciudades más habitables, sostenibles y humanas.

Apoyamos la solución de problemas urbanos mediante la implementación de entornos ambientales más inteligentes que mejoren la calidad de vida de sus habitantes. Principales áreas de impacto: gobernanza, sostenibilidad y medio ambiente, energía verde, economía circular, movilidad, Big Data, industria 4.0, planificación urbana, ciudadanía, desarrollo y compromiso, entre otras.

Nuestros servicios: 
CONSULTORÍA Y ASESORÍA: desarrollo de ciudades inteligentes y sostenibles.  
MENTORÍA: elaboración de proyectos personalizados para promover el impacto positivo 
CONFERENCIAS: ponencias magistrales, expositor y/o moderador en eventos, congresos y simposios locales e internacionales.  
ANÁLISIS Y ESTUDIOS: realización de investigaciones, estudios y análisis cualitativos/cuantitativos de tendencias clave en industrias, sus impactos y recomendaciones estratégicas.

Name: Israel Planners Association
Description:
The Israel Planners Association has been in existence for more than 45 years, representing those engaged in regional, urban and environmental planning   in Israel and has over 400 members. It is recognized by the Ministry of Interior as the organization that represents the community of planners. The association recommends representatives to planning institutions, the national planning council, and to regional, local and ad-hoc committees. 

Members of the organization include urban and regional planners, geographers, architects, economists, lawyers, sociologists, public policy experts, statisticians, academics, and others. The purpose of the association is to professionally represent planners in Israel, to work towards the promotion and recognition of the profession, and to contribute to the dissemination of professional knowledge in the field.

Ongoing activities of the association include study and discussion groups, an annual professional conference (400-550 participants) and professional site surveys for members. Members receive current information about various topics via the association's online network. Among others, the association receives and distributes information about other organizations with which it collaborates, including the Architects Association, the Heschel Center for Environmental Learning and Leadership, the Israeli Geographical Association, and the International Society of City and Regional Planners (ISOCARP), of which the Israel Planners Association is a regular member.

Name: HUCK Play | Commercial Playground Design, Supply & Install
Description:
We are proud to be one of the top commercial playground equipment suppliers of innovative, inclusive outdoor play equipment. This includes easy swings, swing beds and Rolli trampolines for wheelchair users. 

The new colourful range for 2022 provides endless climbing and swinging fun without over-exerting users. Our inclusive commercial playground equipment is made to incredibly high standards, and our steel posts come with a 15-year guarantee against erosion.

Huck's world-renowned rope and netting is integrated into much of our commercial outdoor play equipment. One of the best examples of where this is used is in our rope adventure courses. Hammocks, rope ladders and wobble swings all make use of our strong and durable rope too. We also have a great selection of rope net pyramids, scramble nets and climbing ropes.

Our outdoor playground equipment range also includes a selection of birds nest trees. At the core of the birds nest tree series is the original HUCK Bird’s Nest. This is a round close-meshed basket with a base shaped to form a nest and a steel ring wound round with rope. It's the perfect addition to any outdoor playground and provides a climbing element to complement ground-based play like trampolines and swings.

One of our recent projects saw us working with Bridport Town Council. The project saw us installing an inclusive play area in West Bay, Bridport. You can take a 360° tour of the playground in our latest blog post. Our highly experienced team of playground experts are here to help to choose the right children's outdoor play equipment. Please do contact them on 01308 425100 with any questions or queries.

Name: Pan African Women Political Leaders Movement (PAWLEM)
Description: The Pan-African Women Political Leaders Movement (PAWLEM) is a transformative initiative with a niche to increase the representation and influence of women, particularly young women and women with disabilities, gender expansive and non binary people in political leadership across Africa. Despite progress in gender equality, systemic barriers continue to limit women’s participation in governance. PAWLEM strategically focuses on aspiring women leaders and women who have demonstrated leadership in business, public service, and civil society, equipping them with the skills, mentorship, and support needed to transition into political roles. Through capacity building, advocacy, protection mechanisms, and network strengthening, we create pathways for women to engage meaningfully in decision-making. With focal point partners in each region of Africa, PAWLEM fosters an inclusive movement that empowers women to lead, influence, and transform governance systems for a more equitable and representative continent.

Name: Culatra2030
Description:
[PT] A iniciativa ‘Culatra 2030 – Comunidade Energética Sustentável’ é um projeto piloto de transição energética na ilha da Culatra no Algarve, Portugal, abrangendo múltiplos aspetos da transição verde. Implementa as ambições da Estratégia de Especialização Inteligente (S3) no Algarve, utilizando um Diagnóstico Participativo Comunitário para criar um laboratório real para a transição verde, centrando-se nas necessidades específicas da ilha e capitalizando os seus ativos. A chave do seu sucesso é a participação ativa de toda a comunidade da ilha. O Diagnóstico Participativo Comunitário inicial foi baseado em um processo participativo totalmente inclusivo, que reuniu entidades públicas, academia, empresas e comunidades. Após a fase inicial, foi implementado um novo sistema de governança para a exploração participativa dos caminhos de transição, apoiado por diferentes oportunidades de financiamento que são continuamente exploradas.

[EN] The ‘Culatra 2030 - Sustainable Energy Community’ initiative is a demonstration project on the island of Culatra in Algarve, Portugal, covering multiple aspects of green transition. It implements the ambitions of the Smart Specialisation Strategy (S3) in Algarve, using a novel Entrepreneurial Discovery Process (EDP) to create a real-life laboratory for green transition, focusing on the specific needs of the island and capitalising on its assets. The key to its success is the active participation of the island’s whole community through a continuous EDP process. The initial Community Participatory Diagnosis was based on a fully inclusive participatory process, which brought together public entities, academia, companies and communities. Following the initial stage, a new governance system for participatory exploration of transition pathways was put in place, supported by different funding opportunities that are continuously explored.

The Chattanooga Design Studio builds upon the rich legacy of the community’s former studio that operated from 1980 until 2005. While there is no formal connection between the two iterations, they are linked by consistent funding partners, shared personnel, and philosophical alignment.

Trois piliers structurent notre activité. : habitat, développement territorial et cohésion sociale. 

Nous menons des études (diagnostic, stratégie, évaluation), des démarches de concertation et des missions d’assistance à maitrise d’ouvrage dans ces 3 grands domaines, en nous attachant à conjuguer développement, égalité des territoires et solidarités. Name: Population and Place Research Lab

More specifically, we are interested in how demographic shifts like the aging or shrinking of the population change communities and how communities can respond or guide that change.

Name: InclusiveSpaces
Description: InclusiveSpaces project specializes in the inclusive design and evaluation of urban spaces, focusing on accessibility and social cohesion for people with disabilities and older adults. The EU-funded project aims to develop innovative solutions that embrace universal design principles and climate-friendly practices. The key tools include travel demand data and accessibility evaluation, comfort-based accessibility mapping, routing for visually and mobility-impaired individuals, digitised accessibility audits for buildings and public spaces, and a Universal Design Manual for the Built Environment. Additionally, the project would provide advanced assistive technologies such as shared electric wheelchairs, beach accessibility devices, upright tricycles, and other indoor and outdoor assistive tools. Six European cities will be the testbeds, with findings shaping actionable policies for a more inclusive, climate-friendly future.

We believe respectful and relevant communication throughout the development life cycle is critical to delivering positive outcomes. Our pioneering service is built around this core belief, allowing us to seamlessly engage with stakeholders and professional teams across all our background disciplines including pre/post-occupancy evaluation, strategic engagement, development management, heritage, masterplanning and space/place design.

Better in, Better Out(comes).

Name: Master EADL (économie de l'aménagement et du développement local)

Name: Tertium
Description:
Tertium is bureau voor strategische stedelijke vraagstukken. Wij helpen overheden, bedrijven en kennisinstellingen bij het aangaan van nieuwe interacties met bewoners of het brede publiek. Wij specialiseren ons daarbij in participatietrajecten rondom duurzame energie, ruimtelijke ordening of nieuwe vormen van democratie.

Samen met universiteiten, hogescholen en andere kennisinstellingen ontwikkelt Tertium nieuwe methodes op het gebied van participatie. Daarbij maken wij gebruik van workshops, publieke debatten, co-creatie, online attitude-testen, omgevingsconvenanten en documentaires. 
Meer weten? Kijk op onze website.

Meld je aan voor onze opleiding tot participatiestrateeg: https://www.tertium.nl/portfolio/opleiding-participatiestrateeg-strategisch-participatieadviseur/

Name: Van Stiphout Projectontwikkeling
Description: Gebr. van Stiphout Projectontwikkeling is ontstaan vanuit Bouwbedrijf van Stiphout. Met Van Stiphout Projectontwikkeling focussen we ons op gebiedsontwikkelingen en binnenstedelijke herontwikkelingen. In de afgelopen decennia hebben we vele toonaangevende projecten mogen ontwikkelen die een meerwaarde bieden voor gebruikers, bewoners en omgeving. Daarbij hebben aandacht voor duurzaamheid, bouwkwaliteit en architectonische expressie.

Name: Mukamba Urban Consultancy
Description:
In the business of developing 500+ hectare developments in Zimbabwe and Southern Africa. Mixed use developments with a 9-year old child in mind, which transforms the way we live and work. 

Mukamba Urban Developers designs cities, arranges the Rent-To-Buy model for purchasers and works with national and local stakeholders to build cities on the edge of cities. 

Mukamba Urban Developers looks forward to communities and estates where there are opportunities for anyone to access housing, where people can walk to work, school and the shops, a place of safety and a place that encourages old and young alike to live life together.

The 4 areas Mukamba offers: 
* A knowledge base on Urban Development in Africa that designs cities and communities for the next generation
* A large and growing group of local and international stakeholders passionate about Africa, and Urban Development in Southern Africa
* Skills in engineering, planning, project management, consulting, drawing, building, construction, playgrounds and park development, oh and hanging out with kids... 

Free 30 mins consultations available - lets connect on your project, and lets see how we can help us all impact Africa. The more we do together the further we will go.  
Inbox us for consultation fees, for larger projects. We are a little team so we might not be able to do everything, but we will certainly try connect you with people who can help!

Anyway looking forward to working with you… Lynne

Name: Te Pūtahi Centre for Architecture & City Making
Description:
We are an independent non-profit organisation that catalyses greater involvement in city making through a diverse and inclusive programme of engagement. We exist to open people’s eyes, minds and hearts to the city. Our purpose is to help all people to create a city that amplifies their sense of joy, meaning and belonging. Our vision is to see people and the city thrive together because we believe that great cities are places where everyone can participate and all life can flourish.

Our city making programme offers a wide range of ways for people to discover, connect with and contribute to Ōtautahi Christchurch.

Christchurch Conversations is a programme of free events that invites thought-leaders to inspire and challenge us on our city’s future.

These events seek to encourage civic awareness and to engage communities and professional groups to consider different approaches to city making. Our current programme, Towards 2030, explores how the city can achieve its climate change goals. 

Open Christchurch celebrates Christchurch’s most exceptional architecture by opening over 50 buildings to the public for free over the course of one weekend.

It offers people the opportunity to connect with their city by discovering new spaces or getting up close to the buildings they love. They can delve deeper through the range of activities, talks and tours that also run as part of the programme.

Name: Capital Area Regional Planning Commission
Description:
The Capital Area Regional Planning Commission (CARPC) is one of nine regional planning commissions (RPCs) in Wisconsin established to address issues that go beyond municipal boundaries. As an independent unit of government, CARPC develops and promotes regional plans, provides objective information, and supports local planning efforts. CARPC’s planning region includes the cities, towns, and villages in Dane County.  

OUR MISSION  
To strengthen the region by engaging communities through planning, collaboration, and assistance.  

OUR VISION  
A region where communities create exceptional quality of life for all by working together to solve regional challenges

Name: Ofi Chito
Description: We offer a turnkey preconstruction solution for developers and corporate real estate teams including land use planning, site development, permitting, entitlements, project management, project representation, and Registered Accessibility Specialist consulting and coordination.

Name: City-Management Luzern
Description:
Das City-Management Luzern kümmert sich um die Innenstadt als attraktiven Lebensraum.

Beim City-Management Luzern geht es um die Attraktivitätssteigerung und Belebung der Luzerner Innenstadt. Es fördert die Kommunikation, Koordination sowie Kooperation und bündelt Aktivitäten mit einem ganzheitlichen, anspruchsgruppenorientierten Ansatz.

Das City-Management konsolidiert, professionalisiert und bewältigt bestehende Aufgaben und operiert als Kompetenzzentrum und gemeinsame Schnittstelle zu den verschiedenen Anspruchsgruppen im gemeinsamen Lebensraum. Dazu gehören Bevölkerung, Besuchende, Gewerbetreibende, Verwaltung, Hotellerie und Gastronomie, Immobilienbesitzende, Kultur und Politik. Im Fokus der Tätigkeiten steht nebst der sozialräumlichen Entwicklung der Innenstadt, der Aufenthaltsqualität und der Frequenz im Zentrum der Stadt auch ein effektives und effizientes Leerstandsmanagement.

Name: Palye
Description:
PALYE has been providing services in various areas of transportation for over 22 years, primarily in Transportation and Traffic Engineering, SUMP (Sustainable Urban Mobility Plan), Public Transportation Planning, and Optimization, delivering projects that modernize urban mobility.

Our 22 years of experience and knowledge are integrated with technology to produce dynamic, intelligent, and contemporary solutions for cities.

PALYE is dedicated to solving the critical issues of traffic and public transportation in cities in accordance with Transportation Engineering standards. With a network of significant institutions and companies as references, PALYE executes sustainable, economical, comfortable, and safe transportation projects with a team of experienced engineers, urban planning experts, economists, and analysts.

Name: NMTC Coalition
Description: The New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC) Coalition is a national membership organization founded in 1998 to advocate on behalf of the NMTC program. The Coalition, which includes some 150 members, is managed by Rapoza Associates, a public interest lobbying, policy analysis and government relations firm located in Washington, DC that specializes in providing comprehensive legislative and support services to community development organizations, associations and public agencies.

Name: Wayne County Development Alliance, Inc.
Description: Wayne County Development Alliance, Inc. is a cooperative public/private, non-profit organization providing the lead in economic development initiatives for the advancement of Wayne County and its citizens through the creation of meaningful jobs and purposeful capital investments.  The Development Alliance has six main program initiatives: Product Development; Business Recruitment & Marketing; Business Retention & Expansion; Education & Workforce Development; Seymour Johnson Air Force Base; and Investor Relations.

Name: Jarrett Walker + Associates
Description:
Jarrett Walker + Associates was founded in 2011 by Jarrett Walker, the author of Human Transit, who has been a consulting expert in public transit planning and policy since 1993. Today, JWA is a leader in transit network planning, policy development, stakeholder involvement, and expert advice. The firm is based in Portland, Oregon with an office in Arlington, Virginia, but we work worldwide, with experience in Europe, Australia, New Zealand, and Russia as well as across the US and Canada. 

JWA’s mission is to foster clear conversations about transit, leading to confident decisions. JWA specializes in helping communities understand transit choices and their consequences. A full JWA-led planning process integrates technical transit planning with many types of engagement and builds ideas in conversation rather than in the solitary work of experts. Many of the core values of the firm are laid out in the introduction to Jarrett’s book Human Transit, which can be found at http://humantransit.org/book.

In the 2010s, a time of declining ridership in the US, JWA has been involved in more ridership-increasing network redesigns than any other firm. These include city redesigns in Houston, San Jose and Silicon Valley, Columbus, Sacramento, Richmond (Virginia) and Anchorage.

Built on the principles of Innovation, Diversity, Experimentation and Activation, our role is to support a diverse range of activities that seed an innovation culture and attract smaller scale activity ahead of major investments in the area.

More information coming soon - including a public EOI process for partners and projects to get involved.

Name: D4RUNOFF
Description:
Polluted water runoffs are one of the greatest threats to public health and biodiversity. 

Consisting of 13 partners across Europe, the #D4RUNOFFproject will investigate these events and their impact on urban water quality. The project will develop novel detection methods and sensors to improve monitoring of water management systems. It will also design a multi-criteria methodology and an AI-based platform to support decision-making for water utilities, urban planners and policy-makers in the design of cost-effective mitigation solutions.

The partners involved in this project are:
• VandCenter Syd 
• Odense Kommune 
• Aqualia
• Hidrotec Tratamiento de Aguas, S.L. 
• ITG Instituto Tecnológico de Galicia
• INL - International Iberian Nanotechnology Laboratory
• GEUS - Geological Survey of Denmark and Greenland
• Københavns Universitet - University of Copenhagen
• Universidad de Cantabria
• Three o'clock
• Ingegnerie Toscane Srl
• Mitiga Solutions
• K Link S.r.l.

Name: Deuxième acte
Description:

Sa mission est d’accompagner les acteurs publics (collectivités territoriales, établissements publics, SEM et l’ensemble des acteurs de la ville) et les acteurs privés (entreprises, enseignes et foncières commerciales en particulier) dans la définition d’une vision à moyen long terme de ces sites, et la mise en œuvre d’une démarche opérationnelle de transformation multipartite qui ne passe pas obligatoirement par la maîtrise foncière.

Pour adhérer : https://www.helloasso.com/associations/deuxieme-acte/adhesions/bulletin-d-adhesion-deuxieme-acte-2025-2026

Name: Build Urban
Description:

We are able to offer our technical expertise and guidance to provide new and fresh perspectives to planning and development-related matters. We are committed to an active form of city building to support thoughtful urban, residential, commercial, and institutional land use that will serve Waterloo Region and Ontario as we continue to grow.

Find us on social media channels.

Instagram   @buildurban.wr

Description:
Cultivate Collective is a non-profit community hub on the southwest side of Chicago rooted in justice, resilience, and joy. 

Our innovative, award-winning model unites education, wellness, sustainability, and economic vitality to support holistic human development and drive meaningful, multi-generational impact. 

From career trainings to facility rentals, Cultivate's 6-acre site offers resources to support every season of life—because our environment impacts everything.

Description: Because play sparks connection, wellbeing and fun.

Name: Manayunk Development Corporation
Description: The Manayunk Development Corporation (MDC) is a non-profit community development corporation formed to encourage economic development that benefits the entire community. Incorporated in 1985 and first staffed in 1988, MDC was originally known as the New Manayunk Corporation. The New Manayunk Corporation took responsibility for parking, the Canal and capital projects within the district. A separate entity, the Business Association of Manayunk (BAM), worked to promote the district by creating a number of festivals including the Main Street Stroll, the Manayunk Arts Festival, and the Indian Summer Festival. In 1992, BAM and the New Manayunk Corporation were merged to form MDC. Under MDC, the functions of the original two groups have continued and grown.

Name: OneWest Corporation
Description: OneWest Corporation is intently focused on restoring the visual legacy of the West End and revitalizing the community’s landscape in a way that honors the area’s history. As a community-first and community-focused nonprofit organization, we are working with the community through intentional engagement and outreach to build a better Louisville.

Name: Ambachtsezoom
Description:

Dit park is goed ontsloten, ligt direct aan de A16 en bij de A15. Ambachtsezoom biedt ondernemers volop kansen voor duurzame initiatieven. 

Er is ruim 15 hectare grond te koop, de kavels variëren in grootte van 1.000 tot 15.000 m2.

Its primary mission is to: identify downtown and adjacent neighborhood building and transformational capital intensive projects, galvanize public opinion and support, leverage public/private investments and formulate and implement funding strategies including securing private sector funding in support of request for primary public sector funding.

Description: Sustainability Centre Norway is an association that assists the public and private sectors in achieving the UN Sustainable Development Goals, in accordance with the UN 2030 Agenda, with a particular focus on opportunities for sustainable economic development related to sustainable urban and community development.

Name: Public Map Platform/ Llwyfan Map Cyhoeddus
Description:
We’re empowering communities to shape decisions by creating and using evidence rooted in local needs, now and for the future.

* Supporting the implementation of the Well-being of Future Generations Act
* Ensuring children and young people’s voices are heard
* Developing children and young people’s digital skills
* Improving environmental and community-focused data
* There is community agency and involvement in the planning system
* Support local authorities in their digital transformation, driving efficiencies, speeding up planning, and supporting good growth

Public Map Platform is being led by Cambridge, Cardiff, Wrexham, and Bangor Universities and is part of the Future Observatory - the Design Museum's national research programme for the green transition and is being funded by the Arts and Humanities Research Council.

Name: Downtown ROCs
Description:
Downtown ROCs is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization that creates economic and artistic opportunities through projects that add beauty and energy to downtown Rochester.

Our mission is to revitalize downtown Rochester through transformative beautification and placemaking projects that replace blight with beauty. We partner with residents, artists, businesses, and civic leaders to unlock the potential of urban spaces, spark economic opportunities, and foster vibrant, connected neighborhoods.

We enhance the quality of life in the urban core of Rochester through the development of strategic partnerships that help eliminate blight, create beautiful spaces, and empower residents and businesses to build stronger neighborhoods. We conceive, collaborate on, and commission projects that beautify and energize downtown Rochester.

To see the impact we're making, visit us at www.downtownrocs.org/our-impact

Name: Strategic Solutions LLC
Description:
Since 2009, Strategic Solutions, LLC has provided professional consulting services to public- and private-sector clients.
Strategic Solutions, LLC listens to clients to learn about their project needs and desired outcomes; engages clients in the process of developing new strategies; and advises clients on how to best implement those strategies. Helping clients “connect the dots”, Strategic Solutions, LLC facilitates open and effective communication among groups, departments, and individuals within an organization or stakeholders of a community to capitalize on existing resources and knowledge-base.

Name: Cercle des Ingénieurs Planificateurs et Économistes du Sénégal (CIPES)
Description:
Le CIPES est un cadre de réflexion, d’échange et de partage orienté vers la planification du développement économique et social du Sénégal.

Il regroupe des experts en planification économique et budgétaire, des experts en suivi-évaluation de projets/programme, des statisticiens et des acteurs de développement.

Name: Critical Mass Nairobi
Description: We are transforming our cities into liveable, safe and accessible cities by getting people on bicycles.

Name: BuurtBoost
Description: BuurtBoost is een gebiedsontwikkelaar die zich volledig richt op bestaande buurten met zowel fysieke als sociale uitdagingen. We brengen structuur, inzicht en versnelling in complexe opgaven. Dat doen we met een helder stappenplan en slimme boosters – digitale en procesmatige tools – die zorgen voor efficiënte communicatie, betrokkenheid van bewoners en haalbare plannen.

Name: Tech COnnect
Description:
Welcome to CO:next. The serendipity of {tech} networking.
Even the smallest networking event can set off an entirely new journey for an individual, a city, or even the world. We firmly embrace the potential of purposeful connections and the profound impact they can have, akin to the butterfly effect. 
In a world where people thrive on connections, and where connections are the currency of the future, why not fortify your future today?

Name: Neues Altstadtquartier Aachen Büchel
Description:
Beim neuen Altstadtquartier Büchel geht es um die Entwicklung der Innenstadt in der Gemengelage von Weltkulturerbe Aachener Dom, Denkmalschutz in angrenzenden Gebäuden und im Boden, Thermalwasser, Prostitution, leerstehenden Kaufhäusern (ehemaliges HORTEN) und anderen Großstrukturen wie dem Bushof. Wir haben das Parkhaus am Büchel abreißen lassen dort eine Fläche für die Zwischennutzung (ZwischenZeit am Büchel kurz: zzab) hergerichtet und leiten alle nötigen Schritte ein, damit dort ein lebendiges neues Quartier mit einer öffentlichen Grünfläche in der Mitte und neuen Gebäuden drumherum entsteht.

Die Facts: nach mehrfachen gescheiterten Versuchen privater Investoren nahm die Stadt 2019 das Ruder selbst in die Hand, kaufte Flächen auf und rief die Stadtgesellschaft auf, eigene Konzepte und Ideen einzubringen (Sondierungsverfahren “Stadt machen am Büchel”). Nach der politischen Entscheidung zum Schwerpunkt „WIESE“ am Büchel im Jahr 2021 steht nun ein städtebauliches Konzept, das in der Mitte eine Grün- und Freifläche vorsieht, die am Rand von neuen Gebäuden gefasst wird. Alle bebaubaren Grundstücke im Eigentum der SEGA werden über sog. Konzeptverfahren vergeben. Das Verfahren für den größten Baustein die Leitnutzung WISSEN ist abgeschlossen. Hier wird die Fraunhofer Gesellschaft das Zentrum für Energie- und Klimatechnologie errichten. Bei der Ausschreibung für das Baufeld REDHOUSE+ ist die zweite Phase gestartet und das Verfahren für das Baufeld AUSBLICK wird im Januar 2026 ausgeschrieben.

Zum neuen Freiraum: Ein Wettbewerb für den Freiraum ist im Juni 2023 entschieden worden. Die Planungen sind durch den Wettbewerbssieger vertieft worden, die nötigen Beschlüsse und Abstimmungen sind erfolgt und im Frühjahr 2026 kann der Umbau beginnen. 

Weitere Infos auf buechel-aachen.de, die Aktionen der ZwischenZeit am Büchel unter zzab.de

Name: Alsenhof
Description:
Der Alsenhof liegt nördlich von Hamburg in Lägerdorf.

Als Kreativzentrum bieten wir Freiräume zum leben, lernen und arbeiten. 

Wir wollen ein Ort sein an dem Fähigkeiten wieder erlernt werden können, die wir in der heutigen Zeit unbedingt benötigen: 

· Eigenverantwortlichkeit
· Flexibilität
· Empathie
· Selbstbewusstsein
· Kreativität
· Agieren unter Unsicherheit

Unser Ziel ist es, Menschen verschiedener Generationen und Fachrichtungen zusammenzubringen, um uns auf die kommenden gesellschaftlichen Herausforderungen vorzubereiten. 

Unsere Mission ist es, durch verschiedene Formate eine Experimentierwiese zu schaffen und uns mit Themen wie Ernährung, Mobilität, Nachhaltigkeit sowie neuen Arbeits- und Lebensformen zu beschäftigen.

Wir bieten Raum zur Entfaltung und der Begegnung. Wir tragen so zur wirtschaftlichen und gesellschaftlichen Entwicklung des ländlichen Raums bei. 

Hier ist eine Übersicht der gesamten Fläche vom Alsenhof:
1. Wohnhaus
2. Eventhalle (inkl. unserem Kreativ-Café) (Hier soll auch ein Bereich zum Coworking gefunden werden)
3. Schleppdachfläche
4. Selbsthilfe-Werkstatt für Autos und Bullis
5. Frei- & Grünfläche
6. Campingfläche (4 Parkbuchten/Stellplätze und eine Zeltwiese)

Diese 6 Bereiche wurden seit 2019 aufgebaut. Um diese weiter zu entwickeln, benötigen wir dich als tatkräftige Unterstützung in der Organisation und Koordination.

Nur gemeinsam sind wir stark und können größeres bewegen. Auf den Sozialen Medien findest du uns unter #wirvomalsenhof. Das Wir-Gefühl und die Zugehörigkeit und Gemeinschaft ist ein wichtiger Bestandteil unserer Werte.

Name: Longevi-City
Description:
LongeviCity: The World's First City Focused on Longevity and Wellness;

LongeviCity, a groundbreaking megaproject, the first of its kind in the world dedicated to advancing longevity and wellness, has officially launched in the UAE, marking a significant milestone in urban development and healthcare innovation. As a pioneer in reshaping urban landscapes with an unwavering focus on health, wellness, and longevity, Longevi-City emerges as a beacon of progress.

Positioned as the world's premier city dedicated to longevity and wellness, Longevi-City embodies a bold vision for the future, with these principles serving as fundamental pillars of urban living. It aspires to become a global epicentre for advancing health and well-being, setting a new benchmark for cities worldwide.

At the core of Longevi-City's vision lies a commitment to holistic wellness, spanning physical, mental, emotional, spiritual, social, and environmental dimensions. From cutting-edge healthcare facilities leveraging the latest medical breakthroughs to innovative lifestyle programs integrating technology for longevity, Longevi-City offers residents a comprehensive ecosystem designed to foster a healthier and happier life.

Name: Maher Hassan Group
Description: مجموعة ماهر حسن للتنمية العمرانية تعد من كبريات الشركات الرائدة في مجال التطوير العقاري في مصر ، حيث أن لها باع طويل في هذا المجال وخبرة واسعة، وتتمتع بسجل حافل بإنجازاتها علي مدار 20 عاماً، قامت خلالها بتطوير أكثر من  مجمع تجاري ومجمعات سكنية وممشي سياحي آلاف الكيلو مترات من التعمير والبناء وبيع أكثر من 10 ألاف وحدة عقارية. وتقوم المجموعة بتطور مجتمعات عمرانية متكاملة الخدمات تستهدف الطبقات من المتوسطة إلي فوق المتوسطة، وتتنوع وحداتها من حيث الطراز والمساحة كي تتوافق مع مستويات الدخول المختلفة وتلبي احتياجات ومتطلبات العملاء المتنوعة وأسلوب الحياة الذي ينشدونه. وتعمل المجموعة حالياً على أكثر من مشروع تجاري وطبي وإداري    وجميعها أراضي في أماكن مميزة وتتركز في مدينة حدائق أكتوبر وتشغل مواقع متميزة وفي المدينة تشهد معدل تنموي مرتفع . وتميزت الـمجموعة برؤيتها الغير مسبوقة، حيث كان لها الريادة فى تقديم مفهوم المولات التجارية الخدمية لإهل المدينة  مثل مول الحسن, مول الفتح, مول كليوباترا و المولات الجارى العمل عليها مثل مول كليفر و مول مارسيليا بحدائق اكتوبر و مول دار مصر بمدينة بدر، كما كان لها السبق في إنشاء أول مول تجاري بمدينة حدائق اكتوبر والعمل على مجمعات سكينة متكاملة يٌطورها القطاع الخاص لتصبح نموذج للسكن العصرى الـمتميز – 'مدينة حدائق اكتوبر ' بالجيزة ، ذلك بالإضافة إلى مشاريعها الجارى العمل عليها  كأول مبنى طبي بحدائق أكتوبر المزمع إقامته على مساحة اكثر من 3 آلاف مترر بحدائق أكتوبر ، وكذلك عدة مشاريع 'بالتجمع الخامس  ومدينة بدر و أكتوبر الجديدة والشيخ زايد كل هذه المشروعات التنموية قد ساهمت فى تغيير خريطة العمران فى مصر وكانت بمثابة علامات فارقة فى مجال التطوير العقارى. كما إرتقت الـمجموعة بسوق الاستثمار السياحى، حيث إنفردت بتقديم اول ممشي سياحي بحدائق اكتوبر بمعايير عالـمية. ومن منطلق حب مصر نعمل جاهدين في خدمة مصر وأهلها.

Description:
At Playground City, we help use collective intelligence to build smart, sustainable, and inclusive cities of the future. 

With a user-friendly approach, Playground makes community engagement and citizen participation seamless. It incorporates 3D, AI, and natural language processing (NLP) to make our neighborhoods more responsive to your communities' needs and desires and merges countless city data points to predict desired futures.

With Playground Platform, city builders can create engaging virtual spaces for collecting ideas and feedback on policies, sustainability initiatives, and architectural projects.

Name: UDI Okanagan
Description:
The Urban Development Institute (UDI) is a national non-profit association of the development industry and its related professions and is non-partisan in its activities. With over 1,000 corporate members, between its Pacific, Victoria, Okanagan and Fraser Valley Chapters, UDI represents thousands of individuals involved in all facets of land development and planning, including, to mention a few: developers, property managers, financial lenders, lawyers, engineers, planners, architects, appraisers, real estate professionals, local governments and government agencies. Since 1972, UDI has been dedicated to fostering effective communication between the industry, government, and the public and aims to improve both housing and job opportunities for all British Columbians. UDI also serves as the public voice of the real estate development industry, communicating with the media on a number of issues and concentrates its activities in three primary areas: government relations, professional development and education, and research.

The industry is diverse. The hundreds of corporate members that form our association represent a wealth of expertise in all aspects of development. Our members’ activities contribute many billions of dollars and hundreds of thousands of jobs annually to the provincial economy.

UDI strives to be the preeminent professional association for the real estate development industry in British Columbia. UDI’s mandate is to promote wise and efficient urban growth, to exercise good planning and progressive development practices, to create affordable housing and high quality commercial and industrial developments, create job-generating opportunities and to provide for the needs of British Columbians today and in the future.

As a “Partner in Community Building”, UDI is committed to working with communities and governments to create and achieve the vision of balanced, well-planned and sustainable communities.

Name: Glocal Platform for Urban Finance - GPUF
Description:
As an outcome of the upcoming 5th Urban Economy Forum, on October 3 & 4 2023, focusing on sustainable urban finance, it was proposed to create the Glocal Platform for Urban Finance by Aragon and the Urban Economy Forum. A platform that connects existing global, regional, and national financial mechanisms (global) and brings them to the level where they can have the high benefits and opportunities (local). This global/local (glocal) platform connects the dots of local responses that address local and global problems with these financial mechanisms. This platform creates the conditions to have access to the necessary financial mechanisms. Cities need an urban finance platform that operates glocally. 

The Glocal Platform for Urban Finance supports cities in accessing and navigating these financial mechanisms, advocating the strong role that cities play and bringing key stakeholders together. The Glocal Platform provides technical advisory services to localize global and national agendas with proper funding, testing, and adopting innovative solutions on urban finance. 

The Glocal Platform facilitates and leads dialogue on how cities can provide adequate solutions to their own problems, but also to global challenges. For this purpose, it creates the necessary networks and mechanisms to catalyze knowledge and share practices, lobby for the needs and understanding of cities with national governments and international organizations.

Mukamba Urban Developers looks forward to communities and estates where there are opportunities for anyone to access housing, where people can walk to work, school and the shops, a place of safety and a place that encourages old and young alike to live life together.

The 4 areas Mukamba offers:

* A large and growing group of local and international stakeholders passionate about Africa, and Urban Development in Southern Africa
* Skills in engineering, planning, project management, consulting, drawing, building, construction, playgrounds and park development, oh and hanging out with kids... 

Free 30 mins consultations available - lets connect on your project, and lets see how we can help us all impact Africa. The more we do together the further we will go.  
Inbox us for consultation fees, for larger projects. We are a little team so we might not be able to do everything, but we will certainly try connect you with people who can help!

Anyway looking forward to working with you… Lynne

What is next generation conservation?
* Practical and Grounded Advice

Led by Dr James Lesh, Heritage Workshop utilises his expertise in conservation and history project delivery. 

Visit our website to learn more about Heritage Workshop.

Name: When!When!
Description:
We're a tech startup that test the future through systems change.

Even though the climate agenda has been an active topic within international politics since the 80ies, we still don’t see the necessary societal changes needed. While we simultaneously have all the solutions and technologies to restore a better natural environment, we’re not organising ourselves or using our knowledge to prevent temperatures from increasing even more. Why is that? 
We believe that at the core of our planetary problems lies vulnerable human ponderings about why we live, what life is meant to be and how that is deeply intertwined with our economy. By daring to open up dialogues about economy and emotions, about fear and trust, but also about hope and how we profoundly need each other, we believe we could unlock new possibilities for our shared future.
Dialogues alone are not going to be enough and it is time to be brave to test and try new ideas. When!When! is a brave group of designers and innovators that aren’t afraid of creating system demonstrators that might not work, that might be complete failures or that might turn out to be something for the bin. However, somewhere within all of those tests we might find beautiful projects that are powerful and can change our lives in fundamental ways. There’s no time and we’re not afraid of trying.

Name: GOCCIA - EU Project
Description:
G.O.C.C.I.A (Green Opportunities to Clean-up Contaminants through an Interspecies Alliance) is an urban regeneration project aimed at recovering the former Goccia industrial site, located in the North-Ovest of Milan.

Through a remediation process using Nature-Based Solutions and the innovative quintuple helix governance model, the urban forest that spontaneously grew in the abandoned area over thirty years will be returned to the city.

The broader ambition is to co-design and validate a multi-species regenerative model for the remediation of contaminated urban sites, increase biodiversity, and promote social innovation, with the goal of making the model replicable at different scales and in various locations.

The project is funded through the EUI - European Urban Initiative programme (https://www.urban-initiative.eu/).

Name: Near North Development Corporation
Description:
Created in 1977, Near North Development Corporation (NNDC) is a partnership among businesses along the Meridian Corridor, Methodist Hospital of Indiana (now Indiana University Health), The Children's Museum of Indianapolis, the Meridian Highland, Highland Vicinity, and Crown Hill neighborhoods just north of the hospital. Near North Development Corporation was established with the goal of stimulating economic development and stability in the area, removing blight and deterioration, and enhancing the quality of life for area residents and employees. Near North's programs have ranged from enforcement of commercial zoning ordinances and development of an industrial park to housing construction and beautification activities. Geographically, NNDC serves the area bound by 38th Street (North), 10th Street (South), Meridian Street (East), and I-65 (West). NNDC is governed by a Board of Directors.

Near North Development Corporation (NNDC) exists to generate economic and social vitality in the community through public-private partnerships that deliver positive residential and commercial development.

Name: Hundipea
Description:
A neighbourhood shaped by people, nature, and learning by doing

For a century, this 41-hectare coastal district – just a few kilometres from Tallinn’s centre – was an industrial zone, closed off to the public. Now, step by step, it’s opening up, unlocking three kilometres of coastline and inviting people back to the seaside.

Over the next decades, Hundipea will gradually grow into a lively, adaptable, and welcoming neighbourhood, making life more enjoyable for people while giving nature the space it needs.

Name: Civicplan
Description:
Civicplan helps people shape communities through award-winning community planning, public engagement and strategies. We work with civic leaders including municipalities, institutions, community organizations, citizens and the private sector.

Community Planning: Civicplan designs and leads innovative participatory planning projects that involve the community in the strategic and management processes of urban planning. This approach provides our clients with more holistic outcomes by understanding community priorities early on and developing concept and district plans that are strongly supported and lower risk.

Public Engagement: Civicplan’s award winning public engagement is grounded in a strategic approach that begins with helping our clients understand the type of engagement that will work best for them and exactly who they need to engage. We reach out to a broader diversity of people via various means of engagement resulting in clear directions for our clients.

Strategies: Civicplan develops effective strategic plans and feasibility studies. Our approach begins with a strong foundation of research to better understand context, followed by engaging with stakeholders and communities to identify strengths and challenges, resulting in the design of clear and actionable plans for our clients.

PlanLocal is Civicplan’s award-winning spatial engagement service. PlanLocal offers a variety of tools to employ in effective data-driven participatory planning and engagement campaigns.

Name: ReCreation
Description:
Our Olympian led team have a 10-year proven track record of developing over 75 cost effective leisure facilities for local authorities and leisure operators across the UK.

Using the latest innovative technology and designs, we deliver bespoke public leisure buildings for a fraction of the traditional cost, making it more accessible for communities across the country to have their own recreational space.

We offer a full turnkey solution from initial concept design through to an Olympian-led launch & media event. We offer a complete, dedicated design and delivery team that works with each client on a case by case basis to provide an optimum cost effective leisure solution. 

Our guarantee? A ReCreation Centre that your community will love.

Name: Nordic City Network
Description:
Nordic City Network is a networking organisation connecting professional urban planners and designers, dedicated to sharing the latest knowledge to develop sustainable cities in the Nordics.

Our network connects Nordic city representatives with business, academia and civil society to explore sustainable urban planning and development. By sharing, exploring and learning we boost urban planning in our Nordic Cities to become sustainable and to reach Agenda 2030.

Name: CoAction Lund
Description:
CoAction Lund – för ett klimatneutralt Lund 2030!
Aktörer runt om i Lund har ställt sig bakom kommunens klimatmål. Över 25 aktörer deltar i projektet: större arbetsgivare, fastighetsägare, myndigheter, energileverantörer, universitetet och lösningsaktörer utöver kommunen.

 Tillsammans fokuserar vi på energi och mobilitet, eftersom transporterna står för majoriteten av utsläppen i Lund och ett robust energisystem är en absolut nödvändighet för att klimatneutralitet ska kunna uppnås. 

Vi är en av Vinnova & Viable Cities två ”systemdemonstratorer” inom klimatneutrala städer som ska visa vägen och inspirerar andra städer i Sverige och världen.

Name: Cox's Bazar Development Authority (CoxDA), Ministry of Housing and Public Works
Description:
The Cox's Bazar Development Authority (CoxDA) is a government agency in Bangladesh responsible for the development of Cox's Bazar, a popular tourist destination in the Bay of Bengal. 

Established in 2016, CoxDA's mission is to oversee the growth of the city and ensure it reaches its full potential as a major tourist hub.  

The jurisdiction area of CoxDA is about 690 square kilometers, covering marine drive, four municipalities (Cox's Bazar, Chakoria, Teknaf, Moheshkhali), urban growth centers of other Upazilas (Pekua, Kutubdia, Eidagaon, Ramu, Ukhiya) and Saint Martin island. 

Cox's Bazar is renowned for its stunning beach, which stretches for 120 kilometers along the Bay of Bengal. This beach is considered the longest unbroken, sandy beach in the world and is a major draw for tourists. In addition to the beach, Cox's Bazar also offers a variety of other attractions, including seafood restaurants, souvenir shops, and historical sites. 

The goal of CoxDA's efforts is to make Cox's Bazar a world-class tourist destination. By improving the city's infrastructure and amenities, CoxDA hopes to attract more visitors and boost the local economy.

Name: Upstate Greenways & Trails Alliance
Description:
UGATA’s mission is to rapidly expand and improve the greenways and trails network of Upstate South Carolina through an alliance of partners and by using public-private partnerships.
 
Our vision is for Upstate South Carolina to have the most expansive network of multi-use trails and greenways in the United States.

Name: Crescendo Planning + Design
Description:
Community-Oriented Urban Design, with a Focus on Implementation

Crescendo Planning & Design was founded with a desire to help small communities more clearly articulate their visions and better position themselves for realizing those visions.  Leveraging over 15 years of experience working with both developers and municipalities, Crescendo is focused on collaborating with clients to build toward implementation with intention.  Crescendo strives to demonstrate progress in the short-term as a strategic step toward long-term aspirations.

Name: Second Letter
Description:
Second Letter has been established by Karen Cooksley to promote and advise on the ‘s’ of ESG. It is already appointed by CWC, a registered charity which has an innovative and exclusive partnership with the NHS to deliver state-of-the-art GP premises co-located with the charity’s preventative health facilities in new London developments. Second Letter will help developers to add significant value to their projects, creating better places with more attractive and useful amenities which promote social benefits for residents and the communities in which they sit. 
 
Karen Cooksley, an experienced lawyer in the planning sector, is currently a Partner at W Legal Limited. Having earned both her LLB and Masters of Laws in Environmental and Planning Law at King’s College London, Karen has held the position of Head of Planning at a number of different law firms (Winckworth Sherwood, Fieldfisher, Bevan Brittan, Pinsent Masons, Freshfields) over the past 30 years. She is NED of registered housing provider AWOL and an investor in several housing and wellbeing projects and the Conduit Club and its sustainable investment company.

Name: APBP - Missouri-Kansas Chapter
Description: APBP is a community of practitioners working to create more walkable, bikeable places. We foster peer knowledge sharing, advance technical expertise, and support the professional development of our members who work in government, consulting firms, and in non-profit organizations in the fields of transportation planning and engineering, urban design and planning, public health and active living.

Name: Development Authority of Appling County
Description: The Development Authority of Appling County is the key driver of industrial recruitment, focused on fostering economic growth and community development. Through strategic initiatives, marketing, and collaboration, the DAAC attracts businesses to Appling County, positioning it as an appealing destination for companies seeking a strategic location and a skilled workforce. Committed to community engagement, the Authority plays a vital role in ensuring sustainable growth and prosperity for the county, shaping it into a thriving hub for businesses and residents.

Name: Rappahannock Development Group
Description: Founded and headquartered in Fredericksburg, Virginia, RDG is a privately held investment company who specializes in residential and commercial real estate development.

Name: Park(ing) Day
Description: Park(ing) day is a global, public, participatory project launched by Rebar in 2005. It is a day where people across the world temporarily repurpose street parking spaces and convert them to tiny parks and social places to advocate for safer, greener and more equitable streets.

Name: Natural Places
Description:
Founded by Kunle Barker and Katie Mills, Natural Places brings decades of expertise in placemaking, sustainable development, and community-driven developments. With 20+ years of industry experience, Kunle has shaped some of the most innovative projects, while Katie’s transformative engagement strategies don’t just connect people—they build lasting communities. 

We don’t just add nature—we make it fundamental. Nature isn’t an afterthought; it’s the key to creating places that are more valuable, resilient, and desirable. A thriving community isn’t just built—it’s nurtured.

The challenge isn’t proving nature’s worth; it’s making it integral to how we design and develop towns and cities. Natural Places helps clients embed nature into everyday life, creating places that are vibrant, sustainable, and built to last.

Name: Studio Ruimte
Description:
STUDIO RUIMTE | www.studioruimte.nl

Studio Ruimte maakt publieke plannen menselijk. Wij zorgen ervoor dat bewoners worden betrokken bij de ontwikkeling van hun leefomgeving. Dat doen we met creatieve interventies en procesontwerp die ruimte maken voor echte invloed, verbinding en eigenaarschap.

Zo overbruggen we de kloof tussen systeem en mens, versnellen we besluitvorming en zorgen we dat plannen niet alleen kloppen op papier – maar ook in de praktijk worden beleefd.

Neem gerust contact met ons op. Wij maken graag ruimte voor een gesprek!

Joël Paalvast - joel@studioruimte.nl 
Alexander Haan - alexander@studioruimte.nl

Name: The Alliance for Better Childcare Development
Description: We bring together childcare development professionals to create community to collaborate and innovate, so that we can create great childcare outcomes and services to support each other in collective and individual growth.

Name: WohnenPlus² - Bürger-Genossenschaften
Description: Das Vorhaben ist als Reallabor angelegt und wird von der Hochschule Neubrandenburg zusammen mit den beiden Praxispartnern aus der Elbe Valley-Region WendLandWohnen eG aus Lüchow und der Freiwilligen Agentur Altmark e.V. aus Stendal durchgeführt. Ziel des Vorhabens ist es, zu untersuchen, wie gemeinschaftliches Wohnen plus quartiersbezogene (örtliche) Daseinsvorsorge im ländlichen Raum eigenverantwortlich, engagementgetragen und gemeinwirtschaftlich organisiert und angeboten werden können und welche Möglichkeiten und Grenzen unterschiedliche Formen von Genossenschaften oder anderen Institutionen des Gemeinwesens bieten. Das Projekt ist Teil des WIR!-Bündnis Elbe Valley mit einer Projektlaufzeit vom 01.07.2025 bis 30.06.2028 und wird vom Bundesministerium für Forschung, Technologie und Raumfahrt gefördert.

Name: MHCP COLAB
Description:
MHCP COLAB is a boutique city planning firm that was formed in 2009.

We focus on making cities better by promoting land use and alternative transportation, walkable streets and engaged communities for public and private clients. These approaches add exponential value to cities.

We are a true Co-lab of talented professionals with extensive local, regional, and national experience in each of our specialties. We effectively balance our client’s needs with community desires with our urban and city planning services while fostering outreach and public relations as tools to generate community and support.

The practice focuses on three core services. These are the firm’s primary areas of expertise and what we’re really good at. They include:

+ Land Use + Transportation Policy: How zoning and transportation policies shape our communities. 

+ Public Engagement + Public Relations: Generating project support for successful outcomes.  

+ Master Planning + Zoning
Developing neighborhood and district visions and codes that enforce them.

Name: Kansas Community Empowerment
Description:
Mission: To promote an enhanced quality of life for citizens of Kansas communities through education, leadership development, and recognition.

Vision: Vibrant Communities with a Positive Future.

The Kansas Community Empowerment Program supports volunteer-led efforts to revitalize, inspire, strengthen, and elevate communities across Kansas. Backed by the Kansas Department of Commerce, we provide tools, training, and funding to help local leaders turn great ideas into lasting impact.

Whether your goals involve downtown beautification, civic engagement, or leadership development, we are here to help your community move from intention to action—and from action to transformation.

We want to bring people together, foster local pride, and encourage active participation in the places they call home. We do this to help create happier, healthier, and more thriving communities across Kansas.

Founded in 1970 by Governor Robert Docking, the Kansas Community Empowerment Program began as a partnership between K-State Research and Extension, the Kansas Department of Commerce, and Kansas PRIDE, Inc. This grassroots initiative is built on the values of self-reliance, volunteerism, and a shared commitment to improving the "quality of place" in communities throughout the state.

Every Kansas community is unique, yet they all share a common bond: a proud heritage rooted in resilience and local pride.

Community Guidelines: We kindly ask that you be respectful when engaging on our page. We reserve the right to remove any content that is harmful, offensive, or inappropriate.

Name: Friendship Heights Alliance
Description:
We’re a new place-centered nonprofit focused on the transformation of Friendship Heights through placemaking, neighborhood promotion, and economic development. 

Friendship Heights is a bustling, mixed-use neighborhood with a dynamic mix of office, retail, and residential. A convenient crossroads for residents, visitors, and workers alike, the neighborhood has been known for decades as a premier regional shopping destination with a myriad of transit options and high-value office space. We’re in the process of transitioning to a neighborhood-focused retail mix with a more dynamic, walkable, and people-centered built environment.

Using feedback from the community, we have initiated a range 
of events and programs to demonstrate what is possible when multiple stakeholders collaborate: including four pop-up art shows, four community makers markets, on-street seating and landscaping installations, a temporary bookstore, and more to come. Discover what Friendship Heights has to offer!

Name: Urban Insights Center
Description:
We provide resources to move closer to the cities of the future

Urban Insights Center is an organization that aims to support systemic changes within city ecosystems by facilitating resources for public or non-public entities that can contribute to bettering the quality of urban life and cities’ residents. 

Our approach is based on experimental models and innovative processes, which allow for identifying, testing, and scaling solutions adapted to particular situations and needs. That is why we rely on collaboration with the beneficiaries of the projects we are involved in.

Urban Insights Center acts as a partner for beneficiaries from the public sector and civil society in projects funded from institutional sources to which we apply, but also for private entities that want to contribute to changing the urban landscape through their own projects. Our role is to provide guidance and learning resources, to facilitate access to resources of various types, and to create a space for interaction between various actors.

Name: www.abcprojectsrd.com
Description:
En ABC PROJECTS ofrecemos soluciones expertas en proyectos de infraestructuras, como Modelado de Información de infraestructuras (BIM), urbanismo sostenible, o ingeniería civil, diseñadas para enfrentar los desafíos del mundo moderno y mejorar la eficacia de tus proyectos.
Nuestra Oferta Incluye:
•	Gestión de Proyectos BIM: Optimiza tus proyectos de infraestructuras con nuestra experta gestión BIM, asegurando precisión y eficiencia desde la concepción hasta la ejecución.
•	Planificación Urbana y Diseño de Infraestructuras: Transformamos entornos con diseños innovadores y sostenibles, preparando ciudades para el futuro.
•	Análisis Estructural Avanzado: Eleva la seguridad y durabilidad de tus obras urbanas con nuestros análisis detallados y recomendaciones proactivas.
•	consultoría y Soporte: Potencia el desarrollo profesional de tu equipo con nuestros programas de consultoría en tecnologías de vanguardia y mejores prácticas de la industria.
•	Consultoría en Ordenamiento Territorial: Brindamos asesoría experta para la elaboración de planes de ordenamiento territorial, ayudando a crear comunidades más organizadas, funcionales y sostenibles. Nuestro enfoque integra análisis detallado del uso del suelo, estudios de impacto ambiental y desarrollo de políticas públicas para promover un crecimiento equilibrado y responsable.
Por Qué Elegirnos
Nuestro enfoque se centra en la innovación, la calidad y la satisfacción del cliente. Nos comprometemos a proporcionar soluciones que no solo responden a tus necesidades actuales, sino que también anticipan los retos futuros. Aprovecha nuestra experiencia para llevar tus proyectos al siguiente nivel y asegurar que sean un éxito duradero.
Contacta con Nosotros Hoy
Explora cómo nuestras soluciones especializadas pueden impulsar tu próximo proyecto. Conecta con nosotros para más información y asesoría personalizada

Name: Landsteward Consulting, PLLC
Description:
We are Site Planners, Landscape Architects and Civil Consultants specializing in the Development of land for the purpose of Residential, Commercial and Industrial projects. 
Our team looks for the Highest and Best use for the site and helps navigate the municipal process to acquire all of the Planning and Zoning permits necessary for the initial approval and or through final construction.
We also specialize in High End residential Landscape Design as well as Park Planning, Streetscapes and Recreational spaces such as Schools and Community Playgrounds.

Name: The Positive Lab
Description:
The Positive Lab is an urban futures agency that changes how we work on cities aimed at fostering a more just, caring and sustainable future. 

We moeten meer doen en sneller. Daarom is onze missie om steden en samenlevingen mens- en klimaatpositief te maken. Er gebeurt veel, maar nog lang niet genoeg. En we moeten allemaal mee doen om onze wereld beter te maken, want duurzaamheid is van iedereen. 

Daarom richtten wij The Positive Lab op. We onderzoeken en ondernemen. We willen de manier waarop we aan steden werken veranderen. Samen met partijen die net als wij met gretigheid kansen willen aangrijpen om dit te doen. Ook bewoners doen mee; zij moeten niet alleen profijt hebben, maar ook aangespoord worden zelf de dingen anders te doen.   
We willen impact maken door anders naar waarde te kijken, naar de creatie daarvan en naar hoe het wordt gedeeld in de samenleving. Dat grijpt in in de kern van hoe we gewend zijn aan de gebouwde omgeving te werken. Van proces tot businesscases, van samenwerkingen tot financiering. Wij stellen vragen, zoeken nieuwe antwoorden en ontwerpen oplossingen. 

En omdat steden, landschappen en gebouwen jaren vooruit moeten worden gepland, hebben we geen tijd te verliezen.

Name: Elevate Planning & Project Management
Description: Elevate Planning & Project Management is a dynamic and forward-thinking team that specializes in urban planning and project management for residential, mixed-use and non-residential development.  Our partners, Craig Hunter, David MacLeod and Benjamin Larson excel in providing comprehensive services, including land use planning analysis, appearing before Council and Committees, appeals, zoning by-law interpretation, stakeholder involvement, and project management.  We are committed to finding creative solutions to complex problems and assisting our clients in navigating the development approval process.  Our passion lies in commitment and desire to see a project vision become a reality.

Name: ZoiQ
Description:
ABOUT PLAN IQ 

At PlanIQ, we believe town planning should be fast, predictable, and intelligent — not slow, confusing, and full of red tape.

We help developers, investors, and landowners turn uncertainty into certainty by getting their development approvals 3x faster, with fewer revisions and less stress.

Our team combines former council planners, development strategists, and urban designers who’ve been on both sides of the approval process.
That means we know exactly what councils look for — and how to get your DA approved the first time.

Where traditional planning firms hand you a checklist, we hand you a strategy.
Where others submit and wait, we plan, predict, and deliver.

Our process is built on data, insight, and speed — because time is your most expensive resource.

OUR MISSION

To make the planning process so simple, fast, and reliable that you’ll never fear council delays again. We don’t just prepare reports — we engineer outcomes.

WHAT MAKES PLAN IQ DIFFERENT 

We lodge your DA in as little as 72 hours, using a pre-approval intelligence framework that predicts objections before they happen.

You get a Smart Planning Strategy — a step-by-step roadmap showing how to unlock approval and development potential.

Our approval guarantee means if we don’t deliver, you don’t pay. Simple, fair, and transparent.

THE VISION 

We’re redefining town planning in Queensland and New South Wales — replacing slow, outdated consultancy with intelligent, high-performance planning systems that move at developer speed.

Because the future of planning isn’t about paperwork — it’s about precision, prediction, and performance.

Name: The Heritage Walk
Description: Established in 2018, The Heritage Walk is the first life style mall in Siem Reap, Cambodia. Our unique architectural design bridged between our ancient culture and the colonial period, flourished right in the heart of the city.

Name: sbca
Description:
For more than twenty years, sbca has been developing sustainable ideas and creative concepts for a sustainable and good coexistence and has been accompanying the shaping of our built environment. Together with actors from urban development, architecture, culture, research and education, social and design work, we change mental and real spaces in cities and regions. 

We set impulses, design scenarios, advise municipalities and institutions, create discourse platforms, moderate negotiation processes and give space to ideas - in expert discourses, communication strategies, participation processes, interventions, exhibitions, face-to-face and online events, public dialogues, video reports, publications and in digital space. 

We think holistically, work agilely, and develop custom-fit solutions - even for unconventional topics and tasks. 

When implementing projects and concepts, we work together with partners from a broad transdisciplinary network and bring actors, expertise and perspectives into exchange in new constellations - on a political, cultural, creative, social, economic, ecological and media level.

Name: Southeast Iowa Regional Planning Commission
Description: Southeast Iowa Regional Planning Commission (SEIRPC) is one of 17 Councils of Governments in Iowa, serving Des Moines, Henry, Lee, and Louisa counties. SEIRPC operates public programs and provides consultative services to its region. Public programs include: Regional public transportation SEIBUS, Revolving Loan Funds for business startup and expansion, Housing Trust Fund for affordable housing investment, and Regional Transportation Planning. Consultative services include traditional planning for local governments, grant writing and administration, mapping, research, project management, and economic development support. SEIRPC also develops affordable, single-family infill housing through its affiliated non-profit Southeast Iowa Housing, Inc.

Name: Viaplan -תכנון חברה סביבה
Description:
חברת Viaplan מתכננים ויועצים חברתיים פועלת בתחום התכנון החברתי והטמעת שיקולים חברתיים בתכנון ובהתחדשות עירונית קרוב לשני עשורים.
מובילה מגוון שירותים בתחום תכנון חברתי וליווי מתחמי תכנון עבור רשויות מקומיות, מנהלות להתחדשות עירונית, משרדי ממשלה, גופים ציבוריים וגופים פרטיים.
