Name: Henstedt-Ulzburg Marketing e.V.
Description: Henstedt-Ulzburg Marketing e.V. ist eine zentrale Initiative zur Förderung und Weiterentwicklung der Wirtschafts-, Lebens- und Geschäftskultur in der Gemeinde Henstedt-Ulzburg. Gegründet im Jahr 2004 mit dem Ziel, das Image der Gemeinde und der Region zu stärken, spielt der Verein eine wesentliche Rolle bei der Unterstützung lokaler Unternehmen und der Initiierung gemeinschaftlicher Projekte. So engagiert sich der Verein in der Organisation von Veranstaltungen und setzt Marketingkampagnen um, die darauf abzielen, Henstedt-Ulzburg als attraktiven Standort für Einwohner und Wirtschaft zu platzieren. Hierzu gehören unter anderem lokale Messen, Festivals und besondere Aktionen wie z.B. die AZUBI-Messe, HU-Verkauft, die Kunst und Kulturwoche Henstedt-Ulzburg und andere, die das kulturelle und wirtschaftliche Leben der Gemeinde bereichern. Dabei arbeitet der Verein eng mit der Gemeindeverwaltung Henstedt-Ulzburg zusammen, was durch die ständige Vorstandsmitgliedschaft des/der Bürgermeisters/Bürgermeisterin dokumentiert wird. Insgesamt ist der Verein Henstedt-Ulzburg Marketing e.V. ein bedeutender Akteur im Bereich der Regionalentwicklung und trägt maßgeblich zur positiven wirtschaftlichen und sozialen Entwicklung der Gemeinde bei.

Name: RODUER
Description:
RODUER is een familiebedrijf die passie heeft in de uitvoering van elk facet van haar onderneming. De kerncompetentie van RODUER is het creëren van een vraag waar de omgeving behoefte aan heeft door een creatieve blik op objecten en de omgeving. Nieuw leven blazen in “vergeten” gebouwen is wat RODUER inspireert en motiveert.

RODUER heeft een ervaren team met uitgebreide geschiedenis in het ontwikkelen van objecten door heel Nederland. RODUER luistert naar verschillende stakeholders, is duidelijk, effectief en zorgt ervoor dat iedereen op 1 lijn is en blijft. Met ervaring in een breed scala van vastgoedobjecten heeft RODUER praktische vastgoedkennis die niet gemakkelijk kan worden verworven, niet wordt begrepen door uitbesteding en onmogelijk te vervangen is.

Name: Clean Lake Union
Description:
Clean Lake Union is a non-profit committed to safeguarding Seattle's beloved water ecosystems.

Our story began in 2012 when our founding board member, Mark Grey, noticed an oil slick on the waters of Lake Union, tracing its origin to a polluted catch basin–leading to the inception of Clean Lake Union, LLC.

Our pioneering solution? Engineered bioretention swales that naturally purify stormwater runoff before it reaches our lakes and rivers. Working hand-in-hand with commercial landowners, developers, and local government, we focus on transforming catch basins and outfalls around Lake Union and Lake Washington, including adjoining canals and bridges.

Since achieving our 501(c)3 status as Clean Washington Waters in 2018, we've garnered support from notable organizations like The Nature Conservancy, Salmon-Safe, and Boeing. Together, we strive to foster sustainable water solutions and educate the public on maintaining our water's purity.

As of 2023, our community projects are thriving–cleaning 2 million gallons of polluted runoff in Fremont and Wallingford–and more on the horizon.

Join us in our ongoing mission to foster cleaner waters and vibrant ecosystems.

Name: Springfield 2051
Description: Springfield 2051 is a community building process that will result in a new roadmap for Springfield and Clark County. The 15-month project is being spearheaded by a coalition of citizens and supported by the state and local government, philanthropic entities, business community and nonprofit organizations. Springfield 2051 is guided by the expert team of Future iQ and is rooted in their people-focused, data-driven, future-oriented methodology.

Name: Transistor
Description:
I TRANSISTOR sono hub locali pensati per accelerare la transizione ecologica giusta ed equa sulle città, che sia inclusiva di tutte e tutti, e per riportare il potere nelle mani delle comunità.

Gruppi di cittadini, associazioni e imprese elaborano un piano d’azione – per potenziare progetti esistenti, crearne di nuovi e portare avanti azioni necessarie a raggiungere risultati comuni, usando tutta la loro creatività.

Da questo nasce il progetto Transistor, che vede la creazione di acceleratori di transizione in tutte le più importanti città italiane. Questi hub locali formano una rete nazionale facilitata da Rinascimento Green.
Location: Firenze, Milano, Roma, Venezia, Verona, Gela, Siracusa, Viterbo

Name: [ LABSTRATEGY ]
Description: O Laboratório de Estratégias busca a promoção do desenvolvimento de conhecimento a partir da interpretação das infra-estruturas locais de uma cidade ou de uma zona portuária, através da elaboração de cenários urbanos que permitem a requalificação dos espaços degradados. Busca investigar as configurações destes territórios globais, diagnosticando e projetando novas experiências urbanas que surgem dos cenários estimulados pelas redes ou sistemas estratégicos. Estas apontam possibilidades da construção de uma relação entre as cidades atuais, seu centro com o porto e com seu balneário, estes, caracterizados pelos aspectos turísticos conectados a partir da implantação de infraestruturas capazes de estruturar o espaço urbano, possibilitando a reinvenção de territórios complexos.

Name: Compass Rose Planning Services Ltd
Description: Compass Rose Planning Services provides cost effective professional services to local governments to support staff and assist your planning department get work done.  Our experience will expedite application processing time, reduce the burden on workloads, and is cost effective. We provide an objective perspective that reflects our experience in Alberta, British Columbia, and Washington State.

Name: Subjective Editions
Description: Subjective atlases are bottom-up cartographic publications mapping a country, region or city by the inhabitants themselves

Name: Poughkeepsie Business Improvement District
Description:
Downtown Poughkeepsie Business Improvement District (BID) is dedicated to revitalizing the city’s core by supporting local businesses, enhancing public spaces, and fostering a welcoming environment for all. 

We collaborate with property owners, entrepreneurs, and community partners to strengthen economic vitality, attract investment, and create engaging experiences that highlight the unique character of Poughkeepsie. From beautification projects and safety initiatives to cultural programming and small business support, our work ensures downtown remains vibrant, resilient, and full of opportunity. 

Guided by a shared vision, we champion growth that benefits residents, workers, and visitors alike, building pride in our city and shaping a thriving future for the heart of the Hudson Valley.

Name: Duved Framtid
Description:
How a rural village is turned into a tool for societal innovation and democratic development. 

The process of developing Duved, a small village in the North-West of Sweden, is based on the insight that in today’s society it is no longer cities that has the potential of being the innovation engine for societal development, as back in the industrial era. On the contrary, today it is the village – with its tradition of sharing and cooperation – that has the possibility to generate solutions to address the challenges that the world so badly needs. This is a need on both a local and a global scale – and addresses a new possibility: the fusion between a return to handicraft through digital efficiency as well as that of an updated democratic model. With the current world situation it is apparent that the world needs to update democracy and strengthen local production. The process in Duved is based on developing all segments at the same time – to generate cross-effects between different segments. This can be done because it is a rather small village, currently with around 1.000 inhabitants.

Name: Quanti LLC
Description:
Since 2022, Quanti LLC has been at the forefront of digital infrastructure development. Based in Illinois, we specialize in creating strategic partnerships between municipalities and the world's leading hyperscalers.

Our mission is simple: unlock transformative opportunities that generate sustainable revenue for communities while enabling the continued growth of essential digital infrastructure.

We bridge municipalities and hyperscalers to unlock transformative data center opportunities, generating high-yield revenue and sustainable growth for communities.

Name: Eterna Earth
Description:
Eterna is reimagining civilization on a massive scale, transforming previously degraded land in Costa Rica into integrated thriving villages. 

Our model of regenerative development merges conservation, reforestation, agriculture, community, hospitality, events and education.

Name: No.Mo. District
Description: No.Mo. District è l’iniziativa di riqualificazione urbana del quartiere Bufalotta Porta di Roma. Un’area della città con una significativa tradizione storica e paesaggistica, che sarà valorizzata da interventi progettuali innovativi, mirati al completamento di un ampio parco urbano, servizi pubblici e interventi privati. Luoghi pensati per favorire l’incontro tra le persone e realizzare un nuovo polo sostenibile, integrato nel tessuto urbano e naturale circostante.

Name: Armada Gastroproyectos
Description:
En Armada Gastroproyectos, diseñamos y desarrollamos experiencias gastronómicas de gran formato, creando espacios únicos que combinan diversidad culinaria, innovación y socialización. Nuestra especialidad es transformar conceptos gastronómicos en destinos memorables, donde la comida se convierte en una experiencia sensorial que impacta y conecta con las emociones de los visitantes.

Nuestra visión va más allá de la gastronomía: diseñamos entornos vibrantes y funcionales, integrando arquitectura, diseño y estrategia comercial para ofrecer espacios innovadores y altamente rentables en el sector gastronómico y de entretenimiento.

 Nuestros proyectos incluyen:
 Mercados Gastronómicos – Espacios dinámicos que reúnen una oferta gastronómica variada en un solo lugar.
 Food Halls & Food Courts – Experiencias culinarias optimizadas para el consumidor moderno.
 Restaurantes de Gran Aforo – Diseño y estructuración de conceptos gastronómicos de alto impacto.
 Distritos Gastronómicos & Corredores de Restauración – Integración de múltiples experiencias culinarias en entornos estratégicos.
 Conceptualización Gastronómica – Creación y desarrollo de marcas gastronómicas con identidad y diferenciación.
 Eatertainment – Experiencias gastronómicas fusionadas con entretenimiento para una experiencia WOW.

 Nuestro enfoque:
Desde la estructuración y conceptualización hasta la operación y gestión comercial, en Armada Gastroproyectos trabajamos para crear espacios gastronómicos que generan impacto, rentabilidad y experiencias inolvidables.

Name: Good Neighbours Movement
Description:
The Good Neighbours Movement is an independent advisory initiative committed to creating stronger, healthier, and more sustainable communities across Australia.

We bring together decades of experience in community consultation, placemaking, property strategy, experience design, and impact measurement — helping governments, developers, and organisations plan and deliver communities that are built to last.

We exist to reimagine how neighbourhoods are shaped — helping governments, developers, and organisations plan and deliver communities that are stronger, healthier, and built to last.

By putting people and evidence at the centre, we work to ensure every neighbourhood is a place where connection, access, and wellbeing are the norm — not the exception.

Name: Urban Leaders Club
Description:
Jsme klub urbanistických odborníků a nadšenců v jednom, kteří usilují o posunutí českého stavebnictví a života ve městech progresivním směrem.

Naším cílem je formulovat a propagovat témata, která souvisejí s progresivním stavebnictvím, s architekturou, urbanismem, revitalizací měst a jejich částí, ekonomikou, sociologií, památkovou péčí i životním prostředím.

Zakládajícími členy ULC jsou jsou Jiří Nouza, prezident Svazu podnikatelů ve stavebnictví, Jiří Řezák a David Wittassek, zakladatelé Qarta Architektura.

Chcete i vy být součástí leaderů českého urbanismu? Napište nám

Name: Smart City Citizens
Description: SmartCityCitizen.com isn't just a website; it's a rallying point for those who believe in the power of collective action to transform urban spaces. Join us in our journey to build cities that are smarter, greener, and more inclusive. Together, we can shape India's urban future.

Name: Jung Stadtkonzepte Stadtplaner und Ingenieure Partnerschaftsgesellschaft
Description: Büro für bedingt planbare Prozesse in Quartier, Stadt und Region.

Name: HL Consulting
Description:
HL Consulting, with over 80 years of right-of-way experience, offers expertise to public and private entities. Created to honor the fiduciary duty between entities with Eminent Domain authority and property owners, HL Consulting ensures infrastructure projects comply with Federal and State Eminent Domain requirements, facilitating smooth, timely completion.

Our firm brings leadership, transportation and real estate knowledge, project management skills, public administration expertise, workforce development, and budget management to both small and large, complex transportation, water conveyance, and private projects.

The team at HL Consulting shares a passion for direct and honest collaboration with state agencies, public entities, public figures, and private owners. We understand project management and the right-of-way process, and are proficient in using the essential tools and philosophies for today’s public and private projects. 
WOSB DBE California, Texas, Tennessee, Maryland, Virginia and Georgia (pending)

Name: Open Play Foundation NPC
Description:
The Open Play Foundation NPC enables the children of Stellenbosch to discover their potential by revitalising public spaces into safe and accessible recreational platforms where the transformative power of sport, culture, and education can be harnessed through community partnerships. 

Remgro Limited, in collaboration with Stellenbosch Football Club, founded the Open Play Foundation in January 2023 with the conviction that safe and accessible recreational spaces designed and activated by communities for communities will enable the children of Stellenbosch to discover their full potential. Our town has an abundance of world-class sports and recreational facilities, but these are mostly inaccessible to the communities in and around Stellenbosch. Here, children have to make do with undermaintained public spaces and infrastructure that aren’t fit for purpose and that don’t support optimal engagement and childhood development.

Our partnership-based investments in infrastructure and social-development programmes are aimed at establishing platforms where community organisations, businesses, schools, and individuals can collaborate to improve social cohesion, create opportunities for spontaneous and organised play, and introduce initiatives addressing community-specific needs. Ultimately, whole communities benefit from investments that are geared towards developing active and actively-engaged children who have access to the recreational, cultural and educational resources and support every child deserves.

Name: Bexhill Neighbourhood Board
Description: As a partnership group, we have diverse experience and interests but one thing always in common - we love Bexhill! We are committed to overseeing decision making on the £20 million Government Pride in Place funding for Bexhill on Sea over the next 10 years. Our approach is based in consensus building, partnership and impactful community and business engagement.

Name: IP4Life
Description:
IP4Life - Intelligent Projects for Life.

We bring new sites to life with benefits for local communities and residents, with respect for nature and a vision of maximum sustainability. We build places that have soul and that are in line with the ESG philosophy. We will bring your location to life too!

Name: CAMIDE
Description:
Le CAMIDE est une Organisation Non Gouvernementale (ONG) de service, orientée sur l’appui aux organisations féminines, aux initiatives individuelles ou collectives des émigrés, aux organisations de jeunes et aux collectivités locales. Il soutient l’idée que la construction d’économies locales structurées, solides, dynamiques et durables, contribuant à la formation d’une économie régionale et nationale forte, peut être fortement et positivement favorisée par les femmes, les jeunes, les émigrés et les collectivités locales (communes). 
Missions pour atteindre son Objectif :
Pour réaliser sa vision et accomplir sa mission, le CAMIDE, offre son appui technique en termes de (structuration, renforcement de capacité, Planification d’affaires, mise en œuvre et suivi des activités). 
Les missions de CAMIDE sont les suivantes :
•	Appuyer la promotion d’organisations de base féminines à travers un mode d’organisation autogérée appropriée, autour d’activités économiques, en vue d’assurer et améliorer les conditions d’épanouissement et d’autonomisation de la femme.
•	Appuyer l’orientation des producteurs et les émigrés, à travers leurs initiatives individuelles ou dans le cadre d’organisations, vers l’initiative de projets économiques rentables et durables
•	Œuvrer à ce que ces initiatives s’intègrent harmonieusement à leur environnement afin qu’elles contribuent à l’amélioration de l’économie locale.
Domaines d’intervention / compétences.
	La vie associative, le rôle des responsables de groupes et associations, le renforcement de capacités, l’animation et suivi des activités 
	Agriculture et élevage : Les bonnes pratiques dans les techniques agricoles et l’aviculture
	Hydraulique villageoise : l’utilisation des pompes manuelles et solaires par les producteurs
	Micro finance : La gestion de l’épargne et le crédit, éducation financière.

Name: FPZA Surfcoast Chapter
Description: The FPZA Surfcoast Chapter serves Volusia and Flagler counties, fostering collaboration among planning and zoning professionals, civic bodies, and the community. Dedicated to promoting sound planning practices, the chapter provides education, resources, and networking opportunities. Through research, events, and advocacy, FPZA Surfcoast supports sustainable development, responsible land use, and informed decision-making for a better-built environment in Florida.

Name: Nya Remonthagen
Description:
Vad är Nya Remonthagen?

Nya Remonthagen är ett nytt stadsområde som kombinerar kunskaper och erfarenheter från vårt kulturarv med modern standard, precis vid stadens östra entré. 

Ambitionen är att utveckla en levande miljö med bostäder, verksamheter, odling och offentliga rum som samverkar för en hållbar stadsutveckling. Universitet, näringsliv, civilsamhälle och myndighet ska mötas och påverka varandra. 

Stadsbyggnadskonst, landskapsgestaltning och arkitektur ska skapa lämpliga ramar för en stadsdel som kretsar runt ett vackert parkrum, attraktiv för såväl besökare som för boende i området. 

Stadsdelen ska minimera det ekologiska avtrycket och bidra till en ökad biologisk mångfald. Tekniska lösningar ska kretsloppsanpassas.

Framtidsvisionen: 
En viktig del i arbetet har varit att foga in den nya stadsdelen i den befintliga strukturen på ett vackert och praktiskt sätt, dvs att söka en helhet för projektet och det omgivande området.

Name: Memphis and Shelby County Office of Sustainability and Resilience
Description: The Office of Sustainability and Resilience is the regional advocate and resource on topics such as energy efficiency, waste reduction, recycling, sustainable economic development, food systems, and green building practices. As the “green” liaisons for both city and county mayors, our office coordinates various regional initiatives related to sustainability.

Name: HakranaTarbut
Description:
We screen local art in public spaces, as simple as it sounds - there's much more behind it. 
Come check us out and grow together!

Name: Laboratorio de Ideas Sostenibles
Description: Desde LIS ofrecemos servicios para la innovación, el conocimiento y la inteligencia territorial aplicada con el fin de brindar soluciones que fomenten un desarrollo ciudadano, ambiental, social y económico sostenible y que construyan entornos vivibles, viables, y valorables.

Name: GEOINFRA
Description: Infrastructure

Name: Ukraine-American Investment & Development Fund
Description:
UAID creates partnerships with Ukraine asset owners, private investors (mainly US-based), and governmental and NGO entities to rebuild, reposition and enhance Ukrainian commercial real estate and social assets, with the objectives of optimizing long-term economic performance and enhancing the quality of life in the communities where we invest.  

We strive to implement ESG principles in making impactful investments with patient capital, which we believe will be amply rewarded over a 7-10 year horizon with resolution of russia's invasion, Ukraine's membership in NATO, and its probable accession to the EU.

Name: Kontoret Gatan
Description:
Kontoret Gatan arbetar med att skapa koncept för framtidens gator. Det innebär att vi undersöker potentialen i olika typer av trafikmiljöer. Målet är att hjälpa kommuner och städer blicka framåt och testa idéer för hur gator på ett bättre sätt kan tillgodose behov. Det kan vara ett sätt att inspirera till nya lösningar, kickstarta projekt eller ett som ett sätt skapa samtal kring gaturummets utformning.

kontoretgatan.se

Name: Muiembe Youth Focus(MUYOFO)
Description: Issues arise in life. Muiembe Youth Focus is community based organization that promotes youth cooperation. Youth work together to address issues in the neighborhood. To help us come up with a solution, we typically start by reflecting on and analyzing the problems. But problems must first be identified before discussing solutions. Examples of community issues include teenage pregnancy, climate change, access to clean water, child abuse and neglect, crime, domestic violence, drug use, pollution, poor resource management, inadequate funding for schools and services, ethnic conflict, health disparities, HIV/AIDS, hunger, insufficient emergency services, inequality, jobs, a lack of affordable housing, poverty, transportation, violence, racism, and police brutality. Analyzing societal issues aids in our understanding of the resources required. All we need, as Muiembe youth focus, is to elevate our youth from the poverty line through socio-economic. We urge well-wishers and partners to join us and bring about change in Kenya and the entire African continent.

Name: Ulster Strong
Description: Ulster Strong works to build a better community for all by advancing sustainable growth and broad economic opportunity throughout Ulster County.

Name: ALP Institut für Wohnen und Stadtentwicklung GmbH
Description: Im Jahr 2017 haben Felix Arnold, Stefan Lehnert und Dr. Johannes Promann das ALP Institut für Wohnen und Stadtentwicklung GmbH gegründet. Unser interdisziplinäres Team entwickelt belastbare Zukunftsstrategien, fundierte Studien, tragfähige Konzepte und zuverlässige Gutachten für öffentliche und private Entscheidungsträger. Wir verfügen über tiefgreifende Kenntnisse aller gängigen wissenschaftlichen Theorien und Modelle aus dem Bereich Wohnungsmarkt und Stadtentwicklung und insbesondere ihrer Anwendung in der Praxis. Aufgrund unserer langjährigen Berufs- und Beratungserfahrung in der Stadt- und Wohnungsmarktforschung liegt unser Fokus in ihrer Anwendung der Praxis. Der Anspruch von ALP ist eine engagierte und kompetente Beratungsleistung - immer unabhängig, individuell zugeschnitten und praxisorientiert.

Name: steg NRW GmbH
Description:
Wie wollen wir zukünftig leben, wohnen, lernen und arbeiten? Diese Frage bewegt uns ebenso wie unsere Auftraggeber und die Menschen, mit denen wir zusammenarbeiten. Gemeinsam entwickeln wir Antworten und setzen sie in die Realität um.

Als Stadt- und Raumplaner, Geographen und Kaufleute arbeiten wir an individuellen Lösungen. Mithilfe unserer Erfahrung und der vielfältigen fachlichen Expertise verbessern wir die Lebensqualität in der Stadt, indem wir Zusammenleben zukunftsorientiert gestalten. 

Seit 2005 ist die steg NRW am Standort Dortmund tätig. Unser Unternehmen ging als Projektbüro in der Dortmunder Nordstadt aus der steg Hamburg hervor. Im Jahr 2008 folgte die Standortniederlassung. Seit Januar 2010 hat die steg Stadterneuerungs- und Stadtentwicklungsgesellschaft NRW mbH ihren festen Sitz in der Dortmunder Innenstadt. Heute arbeiten wir als Planungsbüro für Kommunen, Wohnungsunternehmen und weitere private Kunden in ganz Nordrhein-Westfalen.

Name: Alfeco Foundation
Description: Our projects promote development in various sectors of South African society: Education, Food Security, Women and Youth, Alfeco Aid, and Conservation and Environment.

Name: GMD Foundation Gh
Description:
Imagine a world where every child grows up knowing their potential, women in rural communities have the tools to create lasting change, and young people see their dreams as both valid and achievable.

That is the world we believe in.

And that is what Growth Mindset Development Foundation (GMD Foundation) stands for.

Founded on 23rd August 2023, GMD Foundation is a Christ-centered non-governmental organization led by Mrs. Nana Yaa Amankwah and Engr. Michael Amankwah. Our passion is to nurture children, youth, and women in deprived communities through holistic personality development.

We exist to bridge the gap between a fixed mindset and a growth mindset, empowering people to rise above limiting beliefs and embrace their uniqueness.

Our main focus areas include:
1. Self-awareness campaigns
2. Community support and donations
3. Education-based projects

Through these efforts, we aim to ignite a desire for growth, spark transformation, and propel sustainable development.

Because when a mindset changes, a whole community can change too.

Want to join us bring our vision to life? You can support us in many ways:
1. Volunteering
2. Donation
3. Or simply following us here on LinkedIn

Together, we can create the change we believe in, and we are always ready to receive new members and partners who share our vision.

Name: Technological Cities Development
Description:
TCD es una incubadora y desarrolladora de ecosistemas de innovación. 

Ofrecemos servicios como gestión de proyectos bajo nuevos modelos urbanos que unen la innovación y la tecnología con el objetivo de romper paradigmas y generar nuevas oportunidades.

Name: Masr Houras
Description: Masr Horus is a socially driven company that creates innovative solutions to make our lives more sustainable and our communities more inclusive. Our work focuses on two main areas: advancing environmental sustainability and enhancing accessibility. Each project reflects our belief that true innovation creates value - generating economic success while advancing social progress. We are dedicated to tailoring each solution to meet the specific needs of our clients.

Name: URBHE
Description:
URBHE es una asesoría jurídica y consultoría estratégica especializada en vivienda, desarrollo urbano y transición ecológica.

Transformamos la complejidad urbana en oportunidades de desarrollo sostenible. Ofrecemos un servicio integral que combina una sólida experiencia jurídica con un enfoque técnico especializado en urbanismo y medio ambiente. Nuestra capacidad para adaptarnos a las particularidades de cada proyecto, junto con la colaboración de expertos en áreas clave como la sostenibilidad y la eficiencia energética, garantiza resultados personalizados y de alto impacto, independientemente del tamaño del municipio o la complejidad del proyecto.

Name: Spatialist Kft.
Description:
Our team consists of seven persistent and creative urbanists, among whom there are geographers, town planners, architects, and economists, but our motivation is the same: getting to know each other and sharing knowledge. Due to our curiosity, we like challenges and believe that every settlement can be made successful with unique and unique plans. We believe that there is no such thing as an unsolvable problem, only unusual answers should be sought.
We, the Spatialist team, believe that successful urban development is the key to increasing the quality of life.

Name: American Planning Student Association (APSA) at Cal Poly Pomona
Description:
This Cal Poly Pomona student club offers students the chance to network, build skills, and gain exposure to the profession of Urban Planning. 

APSA activities include:

Professional Development Series - seminars presented to URP students by practicing professionals from the field of Urban Planning. 

Networking opportunities - students and professionals have the chance to socialize and network at mixer events held at local venues. 

Connections to APA Events - APSA keeps you up-to-date and connected to National, State, and local APA chapter events. 

Annual APSA Awards Banquet - awards are presented to outstanding URP students and faculty. This unique awards ceremony allows students to choose their favorite faculty, and for faculty to honor exceptional students.

Name: WISTA.Plan GmbH
Description:
Im Auftrag des Landes Berlin koordinieren wir seit rund 20 Jahren umfangreiche Entwicklungsprojekte innerhalb des Stadtgebiets– und inzwischen auch darüber hinaus. Politik- und ressortübergreifend unterstützen wir die maßgeblichen Entwicklungsziele des Landes Berlin für städtebauliche Entwicklungsbereiche und die Entwicklung von Arealen sowie Gewerbeflächen. Damit schaffen wir die städtebaulichen und infrastrukturellen Voraussetzungen für die Ansiedlung und die Tätigkeit von Unternehmen und folglich für ein zukünftiges wirtschaftliches Wachstum. Unsere Aufgaben reichen von der Grundstücksarrondierung über die Profilbildung, Bauleitplanung sowie die Erschließung und Beräumung, 
Hochbaumaßnahmen für soziale Infrastruktur, Gestaltung von Freianlagen und Ausgleichs- und Ersatzflächen bis zur Grundstücksvermarktung mit städtebaulichem und wirtschaftsförderndem Anspruch. Dank der interdisziplinären Kompetenzen in unserem Team — zum Beispiel planerisch, bautechnisch, rechtlich, finanziell, vertrieblich — können wir ein breites Spektrum von projektbezogenen Anforderungen erfüllen. 
Unsere Mitarbeitenden bringen nicht nur fachliche Fähigkeiten ein, sondern teilen auch eine gemeinsame Begeisterung für die Schaffung von lebenswerten Räumen. Mit der Ausweitung und Entwicklung unserer Aufgaben konnten wir im Laufe der Jahre unsere Expertise kontinuierlich 
erweitern und innerhalb des Stadtgebiets Berlins Projekte nachweislich zum Erfolg führen. Dieses Profil wollen wir auch in Zukunft weiter schärfen und ausbauen.

Name: Gerencia Urbana
Description: Asesoría para cada cliente que desea desarrollar un proyecto constructivo de vivienda, comercio o condominal. De manera que tenga un acompañamiento en el proceso de desarrollo por un profesional de confianza y el equipo de diseño y construcción subcontratados.

Name: Stata GmbH Taunusstein
Description: Die StaTa GmbH ist die Schnittstelle zwischen Wirtschaft, Stadt und Menschen in Taunusstein. Als engagierte Stadtentwicklungsgesellschaft bieten wir Unternehmen jeder Größe die Grundlage für nachhaltiges Wachstum – mit Raum, Beratung, Netzwerk und Know-how. Wir schaffen die best möglichen Bedingungen, damit Ideen und Innovationen hier Realität werden.

Name: URBANIA Consultoría y Desarrollo Inmobiliario
Description:
Somos una empresa con más de 20 años de experiencia ofreciendo una variada gama de servicios relacionados con la conceptualización, planeación y   ejecución de proyectos inmobiliarios, en los sectores residencial, comercial, turístico, industrial y corporativo.
A lo largo de nuestra trayectoria hemos fortalecido nuestras ventajas competitivas con base a una forma de trabajo en que se equilibra pericia.  capacidad de escuchar al cliente, y la incorporación oportuna de nuestros aliados estratégicos a fin de ayudar a nuestros clientes a identificar las tendencias actuales del mercado y así convertir cada proyecto en una oportunidad real de desarrollo inmobiliario con crecimiento y plusvalía  en el tiempo.

Name: SUCH Developments Pty Ltd
Description:
We are passionate about the future development of low-impact urban communities. We are more than just a talk fest - We want results! http://www.suchdevelopments.com/about.html


Objectives

To find appropriate sites on east cost Australia. D&C low impact urban community developments During the life of the developments maintain Net Zero Energy Building certification. 

• A place where people want to live that is safe, clean and walkable to all amenities. Create urban spaces that are of human scale

• A place that reduces the urban sprawl of our cities. That will consolidate and increase urban density without all the downsides of high-density living.

• A place that allows easier access to all other urban hubs by public transport.

• A place that has strong community connections, that enables people to take ownership and pride in their urban environment and city as a whole.

• Integrated energy systems through to microgrids. That will include PV, battery, ground source heat pumps

Other desirable features of a proposed development would be:

• Access to places of business and employment

• A total recycling system so that no waste goes to landfill.

• An urban farm for the supply of food that is grown and sold locally

• Access to affordable housing in our cities

• The development of new opportunities for business and employment . Examples would be on-site service and management of energy systems, water capture and recycling, heating and cooling systems, recycling of all material that leave the site, community hub and a place that creates opportunities for education .

Outcomes

Create developments that are resilient and integrated with surrounding community and demonstrates an alternative to current development that can set a standard for the future.

To create a resilient communities in business, professionally and community

Name: PilotInnCities Romania
Description: PilotInnCities (Pilot-based Innovation Ecosystems for Smart Cities) is a strategic project led by the Ministry of Industry and Trade of the Czech Republic, in which an 11-member consortium from six countries of the Danube Region participates. The aim of the project is simple: to support the introduction of innovative Smart City solutions into the practical life of cities and municipalities and, in particular, to initiate across-the-board, systemic changes in this direction. The project relies on the method of agile piloting, which supports small innovation experiments on the principle of living laboratories taking place in teamwork of actors across the innovation ecosystem. The consortium has received a grant of EUR 1.98 million for the period from 1 January 2024 to 30 June 2026 from the Interreg Danube programme.

Name: Three Strands Land Group, LLC
Description:

Name: Climate-4-CAST
Description:
Climate-4-CAST addresses challenges hindering Baltic Sea Region cities on their path to climate neutrality. Recognising barriers such as uncertainties, lack of tools, data, knowledge, political backing, and budget limitations, the project provides local public authorities with a climate budgeting tool to visualise and analyse various action scenarios for meeting climate goals. The tool aids in better planning public budgets with climate neutrality measures and monitoring the results of their implementation.

The overarching goal of Climate-4-CAST is to advance climate action efforts and achieve climate neutrality across cities in the Baltic Sea Region (BSR) and beyond. Anticipated outputs include the development of an open-source Decision-Support Tool (tool code package) and a comprehensive guide on the tool's integration into local climate and fiscal governance (operationalisation guidelines).

Climate-4-CAST contributes to implementation of the EU Strategy for the Baltic Sea Region.

Name: ZZZ - ZwischenZeitZentrale Bremen
Description:
Die ZwischenZeitZentrale Bremen (ZZZ) ist eine städtisch beauftragte Agentur, die sich auf Zwischennutzungen spezialisiert hat – also darauf, leerstehende Gebäude und Brachflächen zwischenzeitig sinnvoll zu nutzen. 
Sie vermittelt Nutzer:innen mit Ideen an freie Räume und begleitet die Umsetzung von Zwischennutzungen. 
Sie berät Eigentümer:innen von leerstehenden Immobilien bzw. Flächen. 
Ziel ist, dass aus leerem Raum sozial-kultureller und wirtschaftlicher Nutzen entsteht – z. B. für Kreativschaffende, Initiativen, Start-ups, Vereine, Gruppen, Einzelpersonen. 
Die Nutzung ist befristet und oft zu günstigen Konditionen, damit neue Konzepte leichter ausprobiert werden können. 
Warum das Ganze?
Weil Leerstand und brachliegende Flächen in Städten Kosten verursachen, Potenzial verschenken und Stadtteile schwächen können. Die ZZZ transformiert solche Räume temporär und schafft „Zwischenzeiten“, die die Stadtentwicklung bereichern.

La nostra missione è trasformare un luogo in difficoltà in modelli di eccellenza sostenibile, rispettando l’ambiente e le generazioni future.

Name: PeriNEXT
Description:
PeriNEXT - Development of Knowledge and Vocational Skills for Transition to Sustainable Peri-urban Areas with Integrated Climate Solutions

PeriNEXT is a forward-thinking project dedicated to transforming peri urban areas into climate-resilient, sustainable and smart zones. 

As rapid urban expansion challenges the balance between cities and rural landscapes, PeriNEXT fosters interdisciplinary collaboration, innovative solutions and green urban planning to create sustainable peri-urban environments. 

The project aligns with the European Green Deal, Regional Agenda 2030, and Smart Cities and Villages Mission, contributing to a low-carbon, climate-neutral future. With a focus on Vocational Education and Training PeriNEXT aims to equip urban planners, environmental engineers, energy specialists, mobility experts and social professionals with the skills and knowledge needed to integrate renewable energy, sustainable mobility, and smart urban policies into peri-urban planning. 

The project will engage 150 professionals through dynamic activities, including participatory workshops, knowledge-sharing sessions and interactive toolkits.

Key outputs of the project include:
Discover Today Brainstorm Workshop – A collaborative platform to analyze real-world challenges and generate climate-smart solutions.

Climate Neutral Awareness Kit – A digital toolkit featuring best practices, case studies and innovative models for sustainable PUAs.

Design Our Tomorrow International Ideathon – A cross-border innovation challenge to develop scalable solutions for peri-urban sustainability.

By fostering interdisciplinary partnerships, digital learning and policy integration, PeriNEXT empowers VET professionals to lead the transition towards green, inclusive and resilient peri-urban areas. 

Together, we shape a smarter, more sustainable future!

Name: Smart City Mühlhausen
Description:
Unter dem Motto „Gemeinschaft stärken – Freiheit gewinnen“ wurde die Stadt Mühlhausen im Juli 2021 erfolgreich in die dritte Staffel des Förderprogramms „Modellprojekte Smart Cities“ des Bundesministeriums für Wohnen, Stadtentwicklung und Bauwesen (BMWSB) aufgenommen.

Damit ist Mühlhausen neben Gera und Jena eine der drei Smart City Modellstädte des Freistaats Thüringen.

Als eine von 28 Städten konnte sich Mühlhausen unter 94 Bewerbern mit dem entwickelten Smart City Konzept in Staffel drei durchsetzen. In zwei Phasen wird die Stadt nun in Höhe von 65 % der förderfähigen Kosten von insgesamt 9,63 Mio. Euro durch das BMWSB und die KfW unterstützt.

Derzeit werden insgesamt 73 Modellprojekte Smart Cities mit insgesamt 820 Millionen Euro durch die Bundesregierung gefördert.

Die geförderten Projekte sollen aufzeigen, wie die Qualitäten der europäischen Stadt in das Zeitalter der Digitalisierung übertragen werden können. Dafür werden durch die Kommunen eigene lokale Strategien für die digitale Transformation entwickelt, die die Potentiale der Digitalisierung im Hinblick auf die Bedarfe der Menschen und der Wirtschaft vor Ort nutzen.

Ziel der Bundesregierung ist es, die fortschreitende Digitalisierung so zu gestalten, dass Kommunen auf die künftigen Herausforderungen besser reagieren können und widerstandsfähiger gegenüberstehen.
In die Stadtentwicklung werden neue Technologien integriert, die zur Steigerung des Gemeinwohls dauerhaft genutzt werden. Die Erkenntnisse aus diesem Lernprozess werden in die Breite getragen und letztlich allen Kommunen Nutzen bringen.

Smart City, Englisch für „intelligente Stadt“, sind gesamtheitliche Entwicklungskonzepte, um Städte effizienter, innovativer, nachhaltiger und sozial inklusiver zu gestalten.  Eine Smart City verbessert systematisch die Lebensqualität in der Stadt, unterstützt die Wirtschaft, erhöht die Sicherheit, setzt auf Nachhaltigkeit und Umweltschutz und entwickelt die vorhandene Infrastruktur stetig weiter.

Name: Penang Nature-based Climate Adaptation Programme
Description:
PNBCAP is a five-year programme (2022-2027) funded by the Adaptation Fund with UN-Habitat as the programme management, in partnership with the Ministry of Natural Resources and Environmental Sustainability (NRES), implemented by City Council of Penang Island (MBPP), Penang State Department of Irrigation and Drainage (JPS), and Think City.  

The main goal of the programme is to enhance urban resilience and reduce human and ecosystem health vulnerability to climate change impacts and extreme weather events by implementing nature-based solutions (NbS) to reduce surface temperatures and storm water runoff, as well as to increase social resilience and build institutional capacity.

George Town and Bayan Lepas, the two sub-districts or mukims in Penang have been selected based on a combination of their likely climate change impacts, land use and community vulnerabilities.  The programme is designed to be demonstrative of the NbS concept with a strong knowledge codification component so that it can be scaled in Malaysia and elsewhere in the region. 

The programme is structured around the following components:
Component 1: Adaptation to the urban heat island effect through urban greening 
Component 2: Built projects for stormwater and flood management 
Component 3: Comprehensive vulnerability/baseline assessment and action plans in targeted communities 
Component 4: Strengthening social resilience programme 
Component 5: Institutional capacity and knowledge transfer platform

Name: NORDEN
Description:
Velkommen til Norden. 

Følg med i udviklingen af Aalborgs sidste aktive industriområde ved Limfjorden, der på sigt skal omdannes til en helstøbt bydel med plads til både fri natur og pulserende byliv. 

Den gamle cementfabrik Norden, det tidligere Mølholmparken, er et af de sidste aktive industriområder ved fjorden i Stor Aalborg, der trods sin meget attraktive placering endnu ikke er planlagt til byomdannelse.

Området anvendes i dag til tung industri og er derfor lukket for offentligheden. Gennem årene har der ellers været flere forslag til, hvorledes Norden kan udvikles til nye formål og blive en større del af byen, men miljømæssige udfordringer i forhold til Renseanlæg Vest har tidligere sat disse planer i bero.

Efter en række omfattende forbedringer har Miljøstyrelsen som tilsynsmyndighed for renseanlægget nu meddelt, at der ikke længere er nogen væsentlig påvirkning af omgivelserne. Hvilket åbner op for helt nye muligheder på det 22 hektar store område. Dermed kan planlægningen af et nyt byområde påbegyndes - således området kan ændres fra lukket industriområde til en åben bydel.

Nasce per rispondere al bisogno di cambiare il volto della nostra città e renderla a misura di uno sviluppo sostenibile e partecipato secondo orizzonti a lungo termine costruiti  insieme ai cittadini. 

La consapevolezza del potenziale urbano di Trapani muove il nostro spirito di cambiamento contro lo spazio abbandonato, inutilizzato, utilizzato male o poco. 

Il nostro obiettivo è quello di proporre prospettive per una città più abitabile – dalle periferie al centro storico – che sappia coccolare chi ci vive e accolga modelli di sviluppo integrato sotto l'aspetto economico, sociale, di comunità.
Aspiriamo a modellare un piano di sviluppo sostenibile per Trapani, che argini il frenetico ed indiscriminato ricorso al consumo di suolo edificabile, che sia ispirato al rispetto di alti standard di qualità ambientale, che tenga conto della tradizione storica e culturale, che preveda un etico utilizzo delle risorse tecnologiche, economiche, e prima ancora umane.

Officina Urbana Trapani vuole mettere a sistema con cittadini, istituzioni e partner europei le esigenze, le riflessioni, gli sforzi di chi vuole lasciare ai propri figli una città al passo col Mondo.

Name: BD+P
Description:
BD+P is an office for resilient and sustainable urban futures. We believe that regeneration is possible when design, nature, and communities work together. We develop strategic visions for territories, cities, and places, design green-blue corridors and eco-parks, implement targeted urban interventions, and build capacities. From large-scale frameworks to detailed executive projects, our approach blends creativity, innovation, and sensitivity to each specific place.

Our work spans five core areas:

Integrated Strategic Planning: Crafting territorial visions that combine in-depth analysis, speculative design, and dialogue with multiple stakeholders, producing flexible, guiding plans adaptable to diverse scenarios.

Green-Blue Corridors: Designing and supporting ecological infrastructures that connect ecosystems, enhance urban quality, and strengthen resilience to extreme events.

Regenerative Eco-Parks: Creating eco-parks for productive, touristic, or recreational use, designed to maximize ecosystem services while minimizing impact.

Urban Acupuncture: Activating broader urban transformation through small-scale, low-cost, high-impact interventions in key areas of the city.

Training & Capacity Building: Transforming territories also requires transforming culture. We develop training programs that foster technical skills, environmental awareness, and critical thinking among stakeholders involved in planning and design processes.

BD+P collaborates internationally and combines strategic vision, ecological intelligence, and community engagement to make places more resilient, vibrant, and regenerative.

Name: Lenox Development Group
Description:
Lenox Development Group began in 2008 with the vision of generating real estate development opportunities that will drive business growth and give new life to unused areas. Our journey started during the financial and housing crisis of the Great Recession. However, despite the challenges of that period, we were profitable through our innovative approach to the high-end salon market. 

 Prior to forming Lenox Development Group, our foundering partners played a key role in the SouthEnd and NoDa projects in Charlotte. Since the start of the company, we have always been focused on creating unique mixed-use and high-end development projects. We continue to specialize in all facets of commercial real estate development. We invest, develop, and manage a variety of properties. We do our best work by taking unwanted and forgotten spaces and making them into places people desire to be. 

 Where others see underdeveloped land, we see a blank canvas and the chance to build something special. When historic buildings are neglected, we know there is an opportunity to pay tribute to the past and design something new for the future.

Description:
The Nigeria Impact Investment Summit (NIIS) is the country’s flagship platform dedicated to advancing sustainable development through private capital, strategic partnerships, and social innovation. Our mission is to catalyze impact-driven investments that deliver measurable social and environmental outcomes alongside financial returns.

Since inception, NIIS has brought together policy leaders, investors, development institutions, foundations, and entrepreneurs to co-create a thriving ecosystem for inclusive economic growth in Nigeria and across Africa. By facilitating knowledge exchange, deal flow, and ecosystem alignment, NIIS empowers stakeholders to unlock new opportunities in impact finance, ESG integration, and sustainable enterprise.

Join us as we shape the future of investment with purpose.

Name: Placemaking Türkiye
Description:
Public spaces are the heart of our cities—the stage for our collective life, memory, and culture. In an era of rapid urbanization, the connection between people and the places they inhabit is more critical than ever. Placemaking Turkey was founded to bridge this gap.

Who We Are We are a research and practice-based platform dedicated to exploring and promoting participatory, community-led approaches to the shaping of the built environment in Turkey. Our work investigates how emerging digital tools and creative methodologies can transform urban design from a top-down process into a collaborative dialogue.

What We Do We explore the intersection of technology and community by investigating how to evolve participatory GIS data into immersive 3D/4D visualizations, community-driven Digital Twins, and Augmented Reality (AR) applications. Our goal is to transform complex data into accessible tools for civic engagement and shared decision-making.

Our Philosophy Our approach is grounded in a firm commitment to spatial justice. We believe that a truly successful public space must be inclusive and equitable, honoring the lived, sensory, and emotional experience of all its users. We don't just ask what a space should look like; we ask how it should feel, who it serves, and whose stories it tells.

Name: Open Urbanism Foundation

The foundation's programs are aimed at everyone, whatever the country; civil society, experts, political authorities, public and private organizations. These copyleft programs guarantee the 4 freedoms of free software; digital approaches, devices and tools can be copied, studied, modified and redistributed with the copyright in a modified form, provided the original license is maintained.

Description:
NinNova est un collectif d'innovateurs urbains dédié à redéfinir la relation entre les villes, la nature et la technologie. Nous cherchons à créer des solutions durables et avant-gardistes qui intègrent l'écologie et l'innovation dans le tissu de la vie urbaine moderne, favorisant des environnements où les communautés prospèrent et où la nature s'épanouit aux côtés du progrès humain via un développement immobilier unique.
__________________________________________________________________________

NinNova is a collective of urban innovators dedicated to redefining the relationship between cities, nature, and technology. We seek to create sustainable, forward-thinking solutions that integrate ecology and innovation into the fabric of modern urban life, fostering environments where communities thrive and nature flourishes alongside human progress through unique real estate development.

Name: SPL Cote d'Azur Aménagement - Métropole Nice Cote d'Azur
TROY Enterprises, LLC
Description: Conscious, sustainable impact - that is the mission of TROY Enterprises. By connecting people to places and product in markets that are traditionally underserved, TROY Enterprises operates in development that creates pathways to employment, housing, healthcare and the overall improvement of peoples’ lives. Over two decades of real estate and development experience have built connections across local and regional communities. These ties allow TROY Enterprises to convene people, place and product in a meaningful way. By bringing the community into the development process, TROY Enterprises is able to be an agent of change focused on maximizing impact, and profit. Going beyond the bricks and sticks of traditional development, and ensuring neighborhoods have access to entrepreneurial relationships, newfound careers, housing and healthcare is the goal. The route there is paved by listening to the real concerns of communities and through versatile, empowering and authentic action.

Name: Hunter Boorn
Description:
Hunter Boorn was founded with a vision to drive lasting, positive social impact through culturally sensitive, collaborative solutions. We are passionate about partnering with Indigenous-led firms and community organisations to ensure our projects authentically reflect the diverse values of marginalised communities. Challenging the status quo isn’t just a phrase for us — it’s a commitment to pursuing inclusive, meaningful change.

With expertise spanning development management, project management, construction, social investment, and cultural values mapping, we lead a dedicated team focused on transforming visionary ideas into fully funded, community-driven projects. Our portfolio includes cultural centres, education facilities, social and affordable housing, and celebration spaces such as art galleries.

At the heart of our work is a pro-bono, collaborative approach, enabling us to create sustainable, culturally informed solutions that support communities both during and long after project completion. We are committed to making a lasting difference, ensuring that every individual, regardless of background, has the opportunity to thrive.

Name: RJWA, Inc.
Description: From our offices near Disney World in Osceola County, Florida, Rj Whidden and Associates, Inc. has practiced the discipline of Land Planning and its wide array of associated consulting services since 1983.

Name: Stephenson Development LLC
Description: Stephenson Development LLC is a Baltimore-based services firm helping mission-driven organizations plan and deliver capital projects with lasting public value. We provide construction management, community development, and related advisory support—serving as a trusted partner from early planning through construction.

Name: Creative Factory Middlesbrough Ltd
Description: Creative Factory Middlesbrough is a transformative charity dedicated to supporting the growth of creative industries, digital innovation, and cultural regeneration in the Tees Valley. Through the capital purchase of a range of buildings (commercial and residential in the Tees Valley, initially in Middlesbrough), we aim to provide a sustainable and collaborative environment for artists, innovators, and entrepreneurs, while delivering strategic property solutions and fostering a creative ecosystem. This is a unique development to support the growth and sustainability of the creative sector.

Desarrollamos propuestas tanto para el sector público como para desarrolladores interesados en integrar sus proyectos a las ciudades.
 
Abarcando todos los procesos de diagnóstico, conceptualización, diseño y planificación.

Name: Centre de Formation et d'Action Contre la Faim
Description: CFAF is a Foundation based out of Kinshasa started by two American-Congolese co-founders with a grand vision to create a new model of agriculture in the DRC. Our model is based on systematic and sustainable empowerment of local women in urban areas through providing locally-informed training while offering concrete market entry opportunities to create a resolve for the country's greatest problems faced in the agriculture industry. Our studied approach is a combination of years of experience in the agriculture sector, diplomacy and private consulting both in the DRC and internationally. The Foundation is actively working with partner organizations to realize its first series of projects as part of its five-year strategy.

Name: The Place Collective
Description:
The Place Collective by Ennovate Lab.

This is for those who see what’s missing—and stay to mend it.

Name: Watersystem Spain
Description:
Watersystem – Leader in Design and Construction of Children's Water Playgrounds.

Watersystem is a leader in design, construction, management of water parks, water playgrounds for childrens. With over 15 years of experience and the completion of more than 600 aquatic installations, we provide safe, durable, and easy-to-maintain solutions tailored to the needs of hotels, water parks, vacation resorts, and urban parks in your city.

We offer more than 42 water attractions, allowing for the creation of unique children's water playgrounds, combining safety, innovation, and ergonomic design. All our elements are made from corrosion-resistant, lightweight, and safe materials, making installation easy without the need for complex foundations.

We handle the entire process, from concept and design to execution as the main contractor. Our priority is to ensure safe fun and sustainability in every project, providing high-quality equipment that meets European standards.
We transform spaces into unforgettable water experiences.

Name: mein Baum dein Baum
Description: “mein Baum dein Baum”, ein junger Basler Verein, bestehend aus vier Fachleuten – zwei Landschaftsarchitektinnen, einer Architektin und einem Gärtner – erkennt den Vorgarten als neutrales Terrain an, auf dem man dem Bedarf und dem Wunsch nach mehr Baumpflanzungen nachkommen und gleichzeitig die derzeitigen Hindernisse umgehen kann.  Neben den direkten ökologischen Vorteilen von Bäumen legt mBdB grossen Wert auf Öffentlichkeitsarbeit, die Zusammenarbeit mit Nachbarschaftsvereinen, Schulen, lokalen Klimagruppen und die Teilnahme an Umweltveranstaltungen.

Name: Upab
Description: Upab är ett samhällsnyttigt parkeringsbolag som möjliggör en bättre vardag och en växande stad. Vi gör det lätt att parkera och röra sig i Umeå, engagerar oss i sociala frågor samt återinvesterar, samverkar och samarbetar i initiativ som främjar Umeås tillväxt och utveckling.

Name: RurAlliance
Description:
Les élus des collectivités locales rurales sont des acteurs majeurs du #développement de nos #territoires, et se confrontent à de nombreux défis,  transition écologique, respect de la biodiversité, préservation et #rénovation du patrimoine, #attractivité,   développement économique,   mobilités et la tâche est immense....
Dans le meme temps, l’attractivité de ces territoires, certes heureuse, oblige à repenser l’organisation de ces espaces, par des lieux de #convivialité et du #vivreensemble, afin de réunir des publics divers, nés sur place, ou venus d'ailleurs, ou encore re-venus vivre "au pays" !

L'association RurAlliance s’est ainsi fondée avec 3 objectifs :
- accompagner les élus dont la tâche est immense : identifier les projets d’avenir à impact positif,   apporter l'information sur les ressources publiques et privées, faciliter la mise en œuvre des actions
-  faire participer l’ensemble de la société civile à la bonne réalisation des actions et projets menés
- organiser les synergies entre acteurs des territoires en France et en Europe, pour faire vivre une communauté de soutien et d’entraide dans laquelle puiser de bonnes pratiques

Description:

Name: ZONAL PTY LTD
Description:
Attention: landowners, property developers and Local Councils

If you’ve landed here, chances are you’re facing one of these four frustrations — and you're not alone:

"I want to develop my property, but I don't know what is allowed."

"I'm confused and overwhelmed by the DA Approval process."

"I've wasted time and money on plans that never got approved."

"Our council’s planning department is under-resourced and can’t keep up with assessments."

As Town Planners who have also done development and worked with numerous councils in QLD and NSW, we understand your pain - because we’ve lived it.

Imagine a world where your Development Application sails through council. Your site turns from a single lot into two (2) or more lots. Or from vacant land into a profitable duplex/townhouse project, and so on. You sleep easy, because everything was taken care of - legally, efficiently, and profitably. That is why we exist. 

Zonal is a specialist in town planning solutions that help landowners, property developers and Councils like you fast-track approvals, avoid costly delays, and maximise land potential.

We also provide statutory and strategic planning support for councils, ensuring compliance while keeping DA assessments and Planning Proposal reviews moving efficiently.

Name: DemosPro Strategies
Description:
DemosPro Strategies is a public management consulting firm dedicated to helping local governments streamline planning, zoning, and economic development processes to better serve residents, small businesses, and the development community. Founded on the belief that effective governance begins with equitable, transparent systems, DemosPro partners with agencies to modernize regulatory procedures, improve user experience, and implement people-centered policies.

With more than a decade of experience in urban planning, public-sector project management, and intergovernmental collaboration, DemosPro delivers practical, scalable solutions that enhance efficiency and strengthen community trust. The firm bridges policy, process, and people—modernizing outdated systems and removing unnecessary barriers so governments can focus on outcomes that matter.

Core Focus Areas

Planning & Zoning Modernization – streamlining permits, rezonings, and development approvals; updating bulk standards and codes; incorporating equity-driven land use policies.

Small Business & Residential Regulation UX/UI – simplifying licensing, inspections, and registration processes; developing digital tools and plain-language guides.

Economic Development Strategy – designing inclusive programs, conducting neighborhood market analyses, and aligning redevelopment with affordability and diversity goals.

Public-Sector Project Management – providing interim or fractional project management capacity; building accountability systems; supporting manuals, procedures, and staff training.

Community Engagement & Communications – facilitating workshops, town halls, and civic education; creating accessible and inclusive public materials.

At its core, DemosPro Strategies is committed to strengthening trust between governments and the people they serve by aligning systems with equity, efficiency, and accessibility.

Name: Interdisciplinary Implementations LLC — Integrating Machine Learning with Evidence-Based Practice
Description:
About Interdisciplinary Implementations LLC

Interdisciplinary Implementations LLC develops and applies evidence-based frameworks that unite decision makers, scholars, practitioners, and residents to create measurable, time-limited community outcomes.

As members of the largest generational cohort in the U.S.—those over age 60—we understand the power of experience, data, and collaboration. Our work assembles a Critical Mass of senior-level experts and emerging leaders representing at least ten disciplines. Together, we co-design solutions that drive economic growth, small business development, and community transformation.

Our approach integrates three complementary frameworks:

1 Interdisciplinary Implementation Theory of Change – combining research, practice, and resident participation to generate actionable, scalable outcomes.

2 Neighborhood Level Indicators Model for Change (501c3) – ensuring residents are not only studied but fully engaged as co-researchers in defining success.

3 Narrowcasting as an Epistemology – an evidence-based communication method rooted in counter-storytelling (Tyson, 2003), giving voice to communities historically excluded from dominant narratives.

Our mission is to give voice to the voiceless—to convert observation into participation and participation into knowledge. Through our 041 Electronic Publishing and 038 Video Broadcast Services (under the mark Narrowcast Television), we translate verified research into accessible, interdisciplinary content that informs, empowers, and measures impact.

At Interdisciplinary Implementations LLC, we believe knowledge is not only discovered but co-created. By aligning generational insight, academic rigor, and community data, we build systems that work—because they are designed by, with, and for the people they serve.
Location: P. O. Box 913 East St. Louis, IL

At Urban Dialogue, we're on a mission to bridge the communication gap in urban planning, mobility, and sustainability. Our platform is dedicated to showcasing best practices, spotlighting innovators, and turning research into compelling stories that inspire action.

Name: CareReach Connect NPC
Description:
CareReach Connect is a nonprofit company designed to bridge the gap between underserved communities and essential health, social, and developmental services. Rooted in advocacy, accessibility, and innovation, the organization delivers outreach programs that focus on community wellness, youth empowerment, psychosocial support, and digital health education.

Through mobile clinics, awareness campaigns, mentorship sessions, and employment linkages, CareReach Connect brings help closer to the people—meeting them where they are, both physically and emotionally. Its mission is simple: to connect individuals to the care, opportunities, and knowledge they need to live healthier, more empowered lives.

Whether responding to chronic illness challenges, supporting mental health, or creating platforms for community dialogue, CareReach Connect exists to build stronger, more resilient communities through people-centered solutions.

Name: Radentscheid Bonn
Description:
Als unabhängige Initiative arbeiten wir parteipolitisch unabhängig und ehrenamtlich gemeinsam mit einem breiten Bündnis an Unterstützer:innen für die Mobilitätswende in Bonn. 
2020 sammelten wir in vier Monaten 28.000 Unterschriften von Unterstützer:innen unserer Forderungen. Damit ist der Radentscheid das bisher erfolgreichste Bürgerbegehren in Bonn. Am 2. November 2020 übergaben wir die Unterschriften der gerade neu gewählten Bonner Oberbürgermeisterin, Katja Dörner. Nach der Prüfung der rechtlichen Zulässigkeit wurde das Bürgerbegehren am 4. Februar 2021 vom Rat der Stadt Bonn mit einer breiten Mehrheit von CDU, Grünen, SPD, Linken und Volt beschlossen. Seitdem begleiten wir aktiv und kritisch die Umsetzung des Beschlusses.

Name: IMPACTA FUND
Description:
Impacta es una organización líder dedicada a la sostenibilidad y la cooperación internacional. Nuestra visión es crear un ecosistema donde la innovación y la colaboración generen un cambio positivo y duradero. Nos especializamos en establecer alianzas estratégicas con diversas instituciones a nivel nacional e internacional, promoviendo la co-creación y el valor compartido.

En Impacta, abordamos desafíos complejos como la bioeconomía, la transición energética y la gestión de residuos. Impulsamos proyectos de alto impacto, como el Proyecto Mandala y el Programa LiFoLiCis, que buscan promover el desarrollo sostenible y empoderar a las comunidades locales.

Nos distinguimos por nuestro enfoque holístico en la resolución de problemas, integrando el bienestar comunitario en todas nuestras acciones. Creemos firmemente en el poder transformador de las ideas y la colaboración como pilares fundamentales del cambio.

Trabajamos incansablemente para construir un futuro más justo, equitativo y sostenible para las generaciones presentes y futuras, destacándonos como un referente global en la promoción del desarrollo sostenible. Impacta es sinónimo de innovación, colaboración y compromiso con un mundo mejor.

Name: Praktiserende Landinspektørers Forening
Description:
Praktiserende Landinspektørers Forening repræsenterer de privatpraktiserende landinspektører i Danmark.

Vi arbejder for et stærkt fag, en moderne branche og en bæredygtig udvikling af samfundet.

Landinspektørerne løser mange forskellige typer opgaver inden for byggeri, planlægning og ejendomsudvikling. I Danmark har den privatpraktiserende landinspektør eneret til at udføre matrikulært arbejde. Det betyder, at det kun er landinspektører med beskikkelse fra boligministeren, der kan foretage udstykninger og andre ændringer i ejendomsforhold, der skal registreres i matriklen, fastlægge skel og opdele ejendomme i ejerlejligheder og lignende. Ud over de matrikulære opgaver arbejder landinspektører også med en bred vifte af opgaver, som ikke kræver beskikkelse. Alle medlemmer af Praktiserende Landinspektørers Forening er desuden ansvarsforsikrede og forpligtet til at overholde foreningens etiske regler.

Du kan læse mere om Praktiserende Landinspektørers Forening på vores hjemmeside.

Name: PAAHE RETO Community Development
Description:
∎ About: 
Paahe Reto (pronounced Pah-ah-heh Reh-toh) is a nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering underserved communities through sustainable development initiatives and capacity building. Our vision is a future where every individual has access to clean water, quality education, and equitable economic opportunity.

∎ Our Mission:
To uplift marginalised communities by delivering essential resources like clean water, hygiene facilities, and educational materials.
Fostering local leadership through vocational training, financial literacy, and entrepreneurial mentorship.
Building resilient infrastructure via community-led partnerships and eco-friendly practices.

∎ What We Do:
Water & Sanitation: Drill wells, install biosand filters, and teach local hygiene practices.
Education & Skills: Provide school supplies, scholarships, literacy programs, and technical workshops.
Economic Empowerment: Support micro-enterprises, women-led cooperatives, and rural small business training.
Community Engagement: Facilitate workshops on health, nutrition, and environmental stewardship.

∎ PAAHE COMMUNITY PARTNER:
By partnering with Paahe community, you can do the following:
 Donate to support water and education programs
 Volunteer in project involvement
 Collaborate as a corporate partner for sponsorships, grants, or in‑kind support

 Contact Us:

∎ Website: www.paarereto.org.tz

∎ Follow us:
- LinkedIn: Updates, success stories, and opportunities to get involved.

Ние сме движеща сила за положителна промяна, посветена на изграждането на силно гражданско общество и устойчиво развитие. Работим за социално включване, екологично съзнание и съхраняване на културното ни наследство.

 Организираме социални и екологични инициативи, за да изградим едно по-зелено и сплотено бъдеще.

Name: Türi Kogukonnaselts
Description:
About our community - The key to success is people with passion. The group of people started working with and in this house, we were hoping that the local community would benefit from it, but it went further – with this house we created a new community, all united by our own stories with other old houses, experience we had gathered, and wanted to gather. With all the passion we have, and compassion towards that old house, this community of DIY'ers, hobby-renovators, professional furniture renovators, crafters, volunteers – we came together to work as a community. Together we spread the message of a sustainable and eco-friendly approach that is well-suited with the small town mentality of having the community looking after their heritage. Welcome to Türi.

Name: Owensboro Growth
Description:
Introducing Owensboro Growth: Advocates for Economic Development and Revitalization

Owensboro Growth is a dynamic public service group dedicated to driving economic development and revitalization initiatives in Owensboro, Kentucky. Located on the picturesque banks of the Ohio River in northwest Kentucky, Owensboro is proud to be recognized as an All-America City. Our community is fueled by a collective commitment to achieving greatness, fostering new business creation, and embracing cutting-edge technologies.

At Owensboro Growth, we believe in harnessing the region's wealth of skilled individuals who possess a genuine passion for their work. Our diverse talent pool, known for its precision and dedication to quality, is the driving force behind the remarkable success we've witnessed in research, technology, and various industries. We firmly believe that a thriving economy goes hand in hand with a high quality of life, and we strive to create an environment where both can flourish.

Owensboro is uniquely positioned within the Green River Area Development District, encompassing Daviess, Hancock, and McLean Counties. This strategic location grants us unparalleled access to prime riverfront and industrial properties within the state. Our partnerships with neighboring communities on both sides of the Ohio River further amplify our region's strengths and enable us to capitalize on mutual opportunities.

Drawing from our rich history, Owensboro has embraced its roots in coal mining, agriculture, and distilling. As part of the Western Coal Fields region, our county has a deep connection to its heritage, marked by agricultural production including corn, soybeans, and tobacco. The distillation of spirits, notably Kentucky bourbon, thrived in Daviess County during the 19th century, with 18 distilleries dotting the landscape. Today, our community has evolved into a diverse hub encompassing food, metal and biotechnology manufacturing, and distribution.

Name: InTerreArt
Description:
Réaliser et disséminer la Vision de Nicole Fournier (Nicole McDonald-Fournier) que L'ART, COMMUNAUTÉS et ENVIRONNEMENT sont  un tout interrelié.  Dans ce contexte, l'ART se veut outil de changement, engagé socialement; il est indissociable de la VIE. InTerreArt cherche à exprimer le lien indéfectible qui unit l'art avec le phénomène naturel de la vie et à favoriser leurs interactions. Cette vision interdisciplinaire privilégie le croisement entre disciplines artistiques, scientifiques, d’autres approches non-disciplinaires (connaissances ancestrales sur l'écologie, savoirs traditionnels, épistémè non-occidentales). Dans ce contexte, le terme COMMUNAUTÉS désigne des groupes d'invidus qui partagent un contexte et des intérêts communs mais il appelle tout autant les notions de diversité ethnoculturelle, la richesse de ces patrimoines et les échanges entre cultures. Ainsi, InTerreArt sollicitera la participation des membres des communautés, les échanges interculturels, pour mettre à profit leur créativité et leurs voix uniques. ENVIRONNEMENT réfère à notre lien avec la Nature, sa biodiversité, les cycles de la vie, la créativité dans le 3RV, la santé et l'alimentation.


Mandat

InTerreArt est une organisme de création, production et de diffusion d’arts non-disciplinaire, interdisciplinaire et multidisciplinaire. Ceux-ci prennent la forme de processus qui explorent la relation de l'activité artistique avec la nature et la gestion écologique des espaces.  Pour y parvenir, InTerreArt mise sur le processus dans les échanges interculturels et intergénérationnels, autant qu’ils font des actions concrètes et la promotion d’une agriculture biologique et écologiques, à petite échelle et l’intégration et la valorisation de la flore et de faune indigène et naturalisée. Cette agriculture est basée dans des principes d’agroécologie et la biodiversité des cultures, retrouvées dans la permaculture et les forêts nourricières.

Name: ReLeaf Miji Hub
Description:
ReLeaf Miji Hub (RMH) was born from a simple but urgent belief: cities can grow without losing their connection to nature, and communities must lead that transformation. As urban areas expand and climate risks intensify, we see urban forestry not as a luxury or beautification effort, but as essential infrastructure for healthy, resilient, and inclusive cities.

We work to transform underutilized and degraded urban spaces into living ecosystems. Through urban forestry, biophilic design, and place-based green infrastructure, we integrate trees and nature into streets, schools, public spaces, and neighborhoods. Our work links greening with skills development and green livelihoods, ensuring that urban nature delivers real social, environmental, and economic value.

What sets RMH apart is how we work. We do not arrive with pre-packaged solutions. We partner with communities to co-design, plant, and steward green spaces that respond to local needs, culture, and climate realities. We prioritize native and climate-resilient species, blend local knowledge with innovation, and use applied research and citizen science to guide decisions. By connecting grassroots action with policy advocacy, we help turn community-led solutions into lasting systems change.

The impact of our work is visible and human. Our urban forestry efforts help cool overheated neighborhoods, improve air quality, reduce flood risks, and restore biodiversity, especially in areas that have long been underserved. At the same time, our capacity-building and eco-entrepreneurship programs create dignified livelihoods, strengthen local economies, and build long-term community ownership of green spaces.

At our core, RMH is about people. We are guided by inclusion, transparency, collaboration, and accountability, and driven by communities who believe that greener cities are fairer, healthier, and more hopeful.

Together, we can ReLeaf every mtaa and build cities where people and nature thrive side by side.

Name: The Rural Planner
Description:
The Rural Planner provides specialist planning advice with a focus on sustainable agriculture andpositive environmental outcomes.  
 
Founder Linda Martin-Chew has more than 15 years professional experience as a planner in local government and has a deep understanding of the requirements of Councils in Melbourne’s peri-urban and rural regions. She is also an advocate for more regulatory and policy support for peri-urban farmers and artisan producers. 
 
The Rural Planner assists with planning permits for: 
 
•	Agribusiness —rural industries, function centres and farm cafes. 
•	Agritourism — host farms, camping and wineries/cellar doors. 
•	Pig and poultry farms (which have their own planning frameworks in Victoria). 
•	Residential permits (dwellings to support agricultural uses on small rural lots, generally less than forty hectares). 
 
The practice can also provide assistance for land title consolidation and boundary realignments to support improved agriculture outcomes and/or succession planning. 
 
Linda is also available for workshops and consultancies, and advice on policy reform and food systems planning.

Name: Rekarancang
Description:

Founded in 1977 by Nik Ahmad Fakhrul Razy and Lim Tee Seong, Rekarancang began as a small practice helping towns and regions imagine their future. Over nearly five decades it has grown into one of Malaysia’s most trusted planning consultancies, shaping cities, neighbourhoods and new places to live, work and thrive.

What sets us apart is not just technical skill but a way of thinking. We combine rigorous analysis with curiosity and creativity. We look at cities like systems, but we also look at them like stories. The result is planning that is clear, workable and deeply human.

From urban regeneration to regional frameworks and rural development, we work with governments, developers and communities to create strategies that endure.
