Name: Y-Plan Project
Description:
Y-PLAN (Youth for Participatory and Localized Action in Neighborhoods)
Erasmus+ project no: 2025-1-CY01-KA220-YOU-000360453 | Sep 2025 – Aug 2027

Y-PLAN is an Erasmus+ initiative that empowers youth to actively shape their neighborhoods and cities in Cyprus, Greece, Serbia, and Belgium. The project gives young people the skills, knowledge, and tools to identify local challenges, co-design solutions for public spaces, and engage meaningfully with local authorities and communities.

Through training programs, hands-on co-creation workshops, youth camps, and small-scale urban interventions, Y-PLAN transforms participants into active agents of urban change, fostering greener, fairer, and more vibrant neighborhoods for all.

The project is implemented in partnership with SocialTech Lab (Cyprus), OPU (Cyprus), Urbana (Greece), Young Ambassadors (Serbia), and Toestand (Belgium).

Get Involved:
Whether you are a young changemaker, urban professional, or community stakeholder, join us in reimagining and building the cities of tomorrow.

Name: UNO Habitação
Description:
A UNO Habitação nasceu para enfrentar um dos maiores desafios urbanos do século XXI: tornar as cidades mais justas, inclusivas e habitáveis para todos. Atuamos com foco em habitação de interesse social, recuperação ambiental e requalificação de áreas urbanas, aliando inovação, responsabilidade técnica e compromisso com o bem comum.

Em parceria com o poder público, comunidades locais e o setor privado, buscamos transformar territórios em oportunidades — de vida, de moradia, de trabalho. Acreditamos que uma cidade só é verdadeiramente moderna quando respeita sua diversidade e garante dignidade a quem nela vive.

Nosso trabalho começa com escuta, avança com engenharia e se realiza com impacto social.

Name: Planting Solidarity | Placemaking Collective
Description:
Planting Solidarity is a Swiss-based collective that promotes & celebrates culture through collective knowledge exchange, events & fundraising.

We are a young and enthusiastic team of researchers, architects, students, activists, and future policymakers interested in engaging in the discourse of food and land solidarity through placemaking initiatives.

Name: NGO LOGISTICS CENTER FOR COMMUNITIES DEVELOPMENT
Description:
The Logistics Center for Community Development , founded in 2023, has been driving the strategic development and recovery of Ukrainian hromadas.
We foster the resilience of hromadas while equipping them with advanced digital solutions, cutting-edge engineering technologies, and expert guidance. This dual approach strengthens their capacity to plan strategically, manage resources effectively, and deliver projects of any scale.
Our mission is to enable hromadas to create a resilient future by driving recovery forward and accelerating sustainable development through innovation and partnerships.
At the core of our work is CLS Ukraine, an interactive platform that supports the entire project cycle from planning and design to financing and implementation. Through CLS, hromadas can build digital twins, develop strategies with resident input, tap into a library of 200+ projects adapted for grant applications, and leverage an integrated AI assistant for advanced analytics and monitoring.
CLS Ukraine has evolved into a digital ecosystem connecting hromadas, donors, and investors, creating a transparent reliable environment for planning and delivering joint initiatives. 
We welcome partnerships with organizations and businesses to advance projects and social initiatives that foster Ukraine’s recovery and sustainable development.

Name: Nexus Urban Design
Description:
Nexus Urban Design is a multidisciplinary firm specializing in urban planning, GIS spatial analysis, and architectural development. We focus on creating smart, sustainable, and innovative city environments by integrating data-driven insights with creative, future-focused design solutions.

Our expertise spans master planning, land use analysis, infrastructure mapping, and visualization for growth-ready development. By utilizing advanced ArcGIS tools, digital mapping workflows, and cutting-edge spatial analysis, we deliver clarity, insight, and decision-support for complex urban challenges.

We work with government agencies, private developers, and public organizations to build resilient communities, optimize planning strategies, and drive smart urban transformation. Our collaborative approach bridges design, technology, and planning to convert ideas into actionable outcomes that shape better cities.

Nexus Urban Design is committed to sustainability, innovation, and intelligent city solutions that empower smarter growth and future-ready environments.

Name: Oyo State New Towns and Cities Development Authority (OYNTCDA)
Description: OYNTCDA is committed to building well-planned, resilient, and thriving communities that empower both residents and businesses across Oyo State. Through strategic development and inclusive planning, we aim to support the long-term growth and aspirations of the people we serve.

Name: Agenda Urbana y Rural 2030 Provincia de Granada
Description:
La #AgendaUrbana es una hoja de ruta que va a enmarcar las acciones a llevar a cabo hasta el año 2030 para orientar las políticas urbanas sostenibles de pueblos y ciudades con objetivos sociales, ambientales y económicos.

La provincia de Granada se incorpora a este proceso de planificación estratégica de ciudades y municipios ofreciendo a las entidades locales su colaboración en el diseño y desarrollo de una estrategia basada en la participación ciudadana, así como en los principios y objetivos de la Agenda Urbana Española.

Nuestro objetivo es lograr:
La mejora de la calidad de vida de las personas.
La gestión eficiente de los servicios.
La sostenibilidad económica y ambiental.
El uso innovador de los recursos.
La innovación en las políticas públicas locales, para mejorar su eficacia y eficiencia.

Name: Seoul Nooks
Description:
Seoul Nooks is an international intentional coliving and coworking community in the heart of Seoul, South Korea.

Since 2019, we’ve welcomed digital nomads, remote professionals, creatives, and locals who come together to share life, work, and culture in an atmosphere that feels like family.
 Our Mission
We exist to create a space where diversity is not just celebrated but practiced. At Seoul Nooks, everyday living becomes a chance to learn across cultures, co-create solutions, and experience belonging that lasts beyond borders. We believe that differences and even conflicts are not obstacles, but opportunities for growth, deeper understanding, and connection.

 Events & Culture
Community life at Seoul Nooks blends regular rituals with the unique contributions of our members. We host Microcosmos (storytelling night), townhall meetings, Nonviolent Communication (NVC) practice sessions, and our signature Pizz-Harmony, where homemade pizza is paired with Korean makgeoli.

Beyond these anchors, life here is member-driven and ever-changing — from weekly yoga and movie nights to spontaneous dinners, creative workshops, and cultural exchanges. We celebrate milestones like our Christmas party and often venture out together on local trips, whether visiting members’ hometowns or traveling as a group, such as our recent journey to Tongyeong to both help with a renovation and explore the region.

 Our Values
Deep connections across cultures
Co-creation and shared responsibility
Growth through diversity and even conflict
Family-like care and support
Bridging locals and nomads

 Whether you are a traveler seeking a home, a local curious about global exchange, or a partner passionate about the future of living and working, you are welcome to be part of our journey.

Name: Compassionate Capital
Description:
Tokenized Real Estate for Social Good - PropTech -

Our goal is to help women and minority communities flourish. By using blockchain technology, we can transform the exclusive financial systems of the past into an inclusive one that provides wealth creation to all income levels through fractional ownership of Real Estate. 

We are disrupters, believers, and innovators who believe in building the future we want to see.

Investing for Social Change

Compassionate Capital is owned and managed by women and minorities.

Compassionate Capital investments meet and exceed traditional RE financial performance, while also providing exponential social and environmental gains through medical real estate development.

Compassionate Capital principals operate a not-for-profit, that invests in social enterprises positioned to change root system failures in human thriving.

Compassionate Capital is committed to leveraging investment capital by delivering positive triple bottom line returns for people, planet, and profit.

Name: CCP-Andes
Description:
En CCP-Andes, nos dedicamos a la investigación en infraestructura y al desarrollo rural, enfocándonos en la promoción de mapas interactivos de comunidades andinas y en la formulación de propuestas de planificación urbana para un futuro sostenible.
Nuestra iniciativa comenzó en Chile, con un estudio urbano de comunidades rurales en la región del Maule, y actualmente estamos implementando esas estrategias en las comunidades peruanas de la región de Huancavelica.
Trabajamos en estrecha colaboración con las autoridades locales y las comunidades para fomentar alianzas que fortalezcan el desarrollo integral de estas áreas.
A través de nuestras acciones, buscamos contribuir al bienestar y progreso de las comunidades rurales, promoviendo la sostenibilidad y la innovación en cada proyecto que emprendemos.

Name: Byer Planning
Description:
Byer Planning is an urban and regional planning firm dedicated to improving quality of life in communities through increased access to destinations for people of all ages, abilities, and walks of life.

Byer Planning is both a NYS certified DBE and WBE.

Name: Global Shapers Kozhikode
Description:
Born out of the World Economic Forum, the Global Shapers Community is a network of inspiring young people under the age of 30 working together to address local, regional, and global challenges. With more than 14,000 members, the Global Shapers Community spans 456 city-based hubs in 150 countries.

With the largest youth population in history, there is an unprecedented opportunity for young people to take an active role in shaping the future. This generation has inherited enormous global challenges, but has the ability to confront the status quo and offer youth-led solutions for change.

In each city, teams of Shapers self-organize to create projects that address the needs of their community. Projects are wide-ranging – from responding to disasters and combating poverty, to fighting climate change and building inclusive communities. Shapers are diverse in expertise, education, income, heritage and identity, but are united by their desire to bring about change.

We believe in a world where young people are central to solution building, policy-making and lasting change.

Name: International Development Support & Consulting - IDSC
Description: International Development Support & Consulting (IDSC) is a registered development consultancy (number 24851) established in 2007 by a dynamic team with extensive experience in development as a response to a growing demand for creative solutions to diverse community challenges.

Name: claussen-seggelke stadtplaner
Description:
Unser Büro hat sich seit seiner Gründung im Jahr 1995 als Leistungsfähiger, kompetenter und zuverlässiger Partner für die Bearbeitung komplexer städtebaulicher Aufgaben etabliert. Unsere Arbeitsweise zeichnen Professionalität in der Methodik, Zuverlässigkeit im Prozess und Qualität im Ergebnis aus.

Unser Team besteht aus Fachplanern unterschiedlicher Spezialgebiete, das bei der Ausarbeitung der Lösungsvorschläge ein breites Spektrum fachlicher Erfahrung zur Verfügung hat. Dadurch können wir, unter Berücksichtigung der jeweiligen Anforderungen an eine Aufgabe, zu einem optimalen Ergebnis beitragen. Je nach Projekt geschieht dies eigenverantwortlich oder im Kompetenzverbund als eingespieltes arbeitsteiliges Büroteam. Unser Ziel ist, zum Planungsgeschehen fundiertes Know-how beizutragen und durch frühzeitige Einbindung in die Abstimmungsprozesse bereits im Vorfeld planerischer Entscheidungen an Entwicklungsszenarien mitzuwirken.

Name: Public Street
Description:
Public Street is a platform for experimentation with place and space. A civic lab aimed at subverting the street and built forms through collaborative place-making, guerrilla interventions, talks, workshops, walks, publication and reading groups.

Public Street was established out of frustration at the limited state of the discussion surrounding 'place' - both in terms of who is involved and the method of exploration. We aim to interrogate and play with the concept of space, and better understand when and how it turns into place and who is involved in this process.  Public Street is a civic lab in which to explore, provoke and experiment with new ideas and urban  issues.  We aim to be critical but constructive, and highly collaborative in our approach. If you would like to be involved or have an idea for a project, please get in touch.

Name: Smart City Laboratory
Description: Director: Prof. Mostafa Behzadfar

Name: Shura Consulting and Engagement
Description: Shura Consulting and Engagement provides an equity-centred and decolonial approach to facilitation and community engagement. Our aim is to help people make better decisions and resolve conflicts in ways that value the wisdom hidden below the waterline.

Name: STUDIO BISTRO
Description:
Jsme čtyři kolegové: architekt, kunsthistorička, urbanistka, stavební inženýr. A zároveň jsme přátelé. Užíváme si čas ve veřejném prostoru. Nabíjí nás energií, když se lidé ve veřejném prostoru mají dobře - když se jen tak procházejí, čtou si knížku, hrají si s míčem nebo leží v trávě. A vytvářejí vztahy.



Každý z nás má jiný typ vzdělání, rozmanité jsou i  naše zkušenosti. Žili jsme v různých městech a zemích, pracovali jsme na široké škále projektů různého měřítka a typu. To nám dává možnost pracovat a přemýšlet komplexně. Nasloucháme lidem, kteří se městem zabývají z jiných úhlů - ať už z pohledu kultury, biologie, sociologie či ekonomie, anebo třeba krajiny a vodohospodářství. Věříme, že multioborová spolupráce přináší nejlepší výsledky.



Rádi vaříme. A věříme, že jídlo spojuje! Jsme STUDIO BISTRO, protože bistro je příjemný a vřelý prostor, kde se všichni mohou cítit vítáni (a mohou se tam dobře najíst). A takový prostor také chceme časem založit!

Name: Landa Gardens Conservancy
Description:
Landa Gardens Conservancy was established in 2004 as a 501(c)3 non-profit organzation with a mission to beautify and maintain the grounds at Landa Library, a branch of the San Antonio Public Library. 

Landa Gardens is a treasured, neighborhood gem that offers enjoyment for all ages, with over 7,000 plants; playground structures; walking paths; lush and native landscaping; mature tree varieties and the cherished Valero Pavilion, a sculptured canopy created by renowned local artist, Carlos Cortés.

Name: Confidence Adjei Community Development Project
Description: Community Development and Entrepreneurship with Rural Empowerment

Name: Forest City Projects CIC
Description: We work with you to deliver projects in towns and cities that inspire. Leading community to nature through creative, collaborative placemaking

Name: Unity Developer Ali
Description: A Unity developer is a professional skilled in using the Unity game engine to create interactive and immersive experiences across various platforms, including video games, simulations, virtual reality, augmented reality, and more. Unity is a versatile and widely-used development tool that empowers developers to build 2D and 3D applications with ease.

Name: Jasper County Economic Development Organization
Description: The Jasper County Economic Development Organization. Inc. (JCEDO) is the countywide economic development entity for Jasper County, Indiana. A public-private partnership incorporated in 1986 as a 501(3) C. JCEDO assists in both private and public facilitation of all things agricultural, business, commercial/industrial, financial, industrial, recreational, residential, tourism, and trade interests with initiatives focused on growth and prosperity for Jasper County, Indiana.

Name: Løkka Gårdeier
Description:
Foreningen er gårdeiernes felles administrasjon og plattform for samarbeid om prosjekter og tiltak som ivaretar og utvikler Grünerløkka i tråd med foreningens formål. Tiltak og prosjekter skal gjennomføres i tråd med foreningens sosiale satsningsområder: 
• Inkluderende og mangfoldig (IM)
• Lokal lojalitet og stolthet (LS)
• Trivsel og trygghet (TT)
• Fruktbare økonomiske samarbeid (ØS)
• Ivareta identiteten definert av gatekunst (GI)

Name: EPEC - Escritório de Projetos da UESC
Description: O EPEC/UESC - Escritório de Projetos da Universidade  Estadual de Santa Cruz, com mais de 25 anos de história. Nele, as ideias vão além do mundo acadêmico e são concretizadas por meio de parcerias nacionais e internacionais com projetos de impacto socioeconômico e de caráter sustentável em comunidades não somente do Sul da Bahia, mas também do Brasil.

Name: plantipolis
Description:
We are dedicated to maximize green biodiverse spaces in the city.
These unique seasonally changing areas create opportunities for people to interact, connect to nature and benefit from its calming effect.
Our designs are unique. We tailor them so that they best serve citizens, and at the same time, we create habitats for endangered swiss species.
We base our designs on academic research and collected data about environmental conditions in your area.
We design, build and monitor green spaces. We inform you about the impact of the change in the yearly report. 

Benefit from nature and change your surrounding!

Name: Companhia de Desenvolvimento de Águas Lindas - CODEAL
Description: A Companhia de Desenvolvimento de Águas Lindas de Goiás – CODEAL é uma sociedade de economia mista, vinculada ao município de Águas Lindas de Goiás, responsável por promover o desenvolvimento urbano, econômico e social por meio de projetos estruturantes. Entre suas iniciativas estão o Polo Industrial do Sol Nascente, o Boulevard Águas Lindas e o Aeroporto de Cargas. Nosso objetivo é transformar a cidade em um polo de oportunidades, gerando empregos, atraindo investimentos e melhorando a qualidade de vida da população.

Name: Nawalah
Description:
Nawalah is a pioneering platform dedicated to addressing food waste and hunger by connecting surplus food and groceries from restaurants, hotels, bakeries, and stores with consumers seeking economical options. Our mission is to reduce food waste, provide affordable food solutions, and foster a culture of sharing and sustainability.

By partnering with local businesses, we offer discounted food and grocery items to our users, ensuring that good food doesn’t go to waste. Additionally, Nawalah supports community welfare by facilitating donations of surplus food to those in need, helping to combat hunger and food insecurity in our communities.

Join us in our journey to create a sustainable future where every meal counts. Save money, reduce waste, and support your community with Nawalah.

Name: Formiga.me
Description: O Formiga-me é um laboratório aberto colaborativo de ideias para melhorar a cidade. Usamos a comunicação e a educação para inspirar as pessoas a transformar o espaço urbano com pequenas ações.

Name: RBM Desarrolladora
Description:
En el año 1991 RBM Constructora comienza sus actividades vinculadas al desarrollo de negocios inmobiliarios tanto en la construcción como en el gerenciamiento de proyectos, determinando como mercado prioritario la provincia de Misiones.

Nos especializamos en la construcción integral de obras, por medio del sistema tradicional o de construcción al costo.
Brindamos servicios de gerenciamiento en proyectos y construcciones, y administración de activos físicos

Name: AMEAHCON
Description:
AMEAHCON arbetar med stöd och ledning av infrastrukturprojekt, samhällsbyggnad och industri tillsammans med offentliga och privata uppdragsgivare.

Vi specialiserar oss på projekt- och byggledning och har omfattande kompetens inom områden som projektingenjörskap, markförhandling, controller och byggadministration.

Name: The Republic of Design, Inc.
Description:
The Republic of Design, Inc. is a design firm specializing in mobility, urban design, policy, and planning. Drawing from over 10 years of local and international expertise, The Republic of Design offers out-of-the-box creativity to provide comprehensive and innovative consulting solutions, along with the basics of sociology, anthropology, and common sense, to help shape vibrant, livable places on the human scale.

The Republic of Design inspires and advises cities and organizations on the integral role that bicycle urbanism and cycling policy plays in the transformation of life in urban centers. We design for PEOPLE. When your design is human-centric, you embrace the link between how something looks and how it works with an inseparable intimacy. We design to add value to the human experience.

Name: Association of Rohingya Generation
Description:
Association of Rohingya Generation (ARG) is a dynamic, Rohingya refugee-led nonprofit organization committed to empowering the Rohingya community through education, leadership development, and advocacy. Founded on the principles of unity, resilience, and human rights, ARG strives to build a brighter future for the Rohingya people by promoting opportunities for youth empowerment, community engagement, and global awareness.


Our mission is to raise a generation of leaders who can drive positive change, challenge systemic inequalities, and advocate for the rights and dignity of the Rohingya community. Through collaborative initiatives, skill-building programs, and targeted advocacy, we aim to create sustainable solutions that address the unique challenges faced by Rohingya individuals and families.


At ARG, we believe in the power of community and the potential of every individual to contribute to a more equitable and inclusive world. Together, we are shaping a future where the voices of the Rohingya are heard, valued, and empowered.


Join us on our journey to create meaningful change and inspire a new generation of hope and resilience.

Name: Kristen Hall City Design
Description: Planning for a bright future with communities, cities, and city-builders.

Name: studio prostor*
Description:
Studio Prostor je kolektiv, ki ga združuje želja in veselje po oblikovanju in urejanju prostora na različnih ravneh.
 
Verjamemo v ključno vlogo kvalitetnega in premišljenega prostora kot vzvoda za širše spremembe kot tudi bogatenja izkušnje posameznika. Naslavljamo ključne problematike, povezane z arhitekturo in urbanizmom na nivoju posameznika kot tudi družbe in skušamo vzpostaviti ravnovesje med obojim.
 
S svojimi pestrimi izkušnjami s področja arhitekture in urbanizma želimo končnim uporabnikom ponuditi kvalitetne rešitve, ki izboljšajo doživljanje in uporabnost prostorov.

Name: Citycentric
Description:
Citycentric is the independent practice of Claus Rabe, a culmination of two decades of applied urban economics work across scale and context. Citycentric exists for a single purpose: to give decision-makers clearer, evidence-led insight into how precincts, cities and regions function, and the tools to effect change over time.

Analysis is grounded in the real behaviour of households, firms, and public sector institutions, and the markets through which they interact. By harnessing and triangulating administrative, remote sensing, and third-party data, Claus builds bespoke but tractable models that illuminate causal mechanisms, spatial dynamics and the trade-offs that shape long-term outcomes in land, housing, transport and labour markets.

By integrating spatial and economic processes, Citycentric supports planning, investment and policy decisions with analysis that is rigorous, transparent and directly tied to the practical choices facing public and private actors.

Name: Downtown Wyandotte
Description:
Wyandotte encompasses small town elegance while offering big city entertainment options. Beautiful historic houses and buildings, a variety of brick and mortar retail stores, delicious eateries, fine dining, nostalgic experiences, and memory making events.



Home to world class recreation opportunities including two waterfront parks, a 9-hole waterfront golf course, two kayak launches, an accessible fishing pier, an ice rink, and host to nationally acclaimed rowing regattas. Wyandotte's social district coupled with its arts and culture scene is unparalleled in Southeast Michigan.

Name: City Development Institute of Zaporizhzhia
Description:
The City Development Institute of Zaporizhzhia (CDIZ) is a municipal organization in Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine, established in 2015. Its core functions encompass international cooperation, humanitarian aid, resource mobilization, project coordination, research, promotion, expert support, and initiatives for shelters and heating points. CDIZ collaborates with over 130 partners at regional, national, and international levels.

Since March 2022, CDIZ has prioritized humanitarian cooperation to provide aid to IDPs and the local population during wartime. It coordinates partner contacts, facilitates visits, maintains databases on city needs, prepares assistance requests, offers logistical support for humanitarian cargoes, and organizes reporting. Most aid is directed to healthcare facilities, social services, and IDP settlements. Additionally, CDIZ seeks resource assistance to strengthen utilities and services.

Name: BEMORE.ORG
Description: Be More (Bemore.org.za) is a South African organization empowering individuals to reach their full potential. Starting in a new position or being promoted can be challenging we building the foundational approach to make you succeed.

Name: Main Street Chillicothe
Description: The mission of Main Street Chillicothe is to enhance the vitality of the downtown by preservation of its architectural, commercial, and cultural heritage; encouraging education and community awareness of resources available to property and business owners; stimulating economic development through its design, economic vitality, and organization committees; and promoting Chillicothe as an attractive city in which to shop, dine, work, live, and be entertained.

Name: Calgary Metropolitan Region Board
Description:
Established in 2018, the CMRB is a not-for-profit government corporation made up of elected officials from the Calgary Metropolitan Region’s 8 member municipalities. 

As defined in the Calgary Metropolitan Region Board Regulation (Alberta Regulation 190/2017), our mandate is to support the long-term sustainability of the Calgary Metropolitan Region by:

- Ensuring environmentally responsible land-use planning, growth management and efficient use of land
- Developing policies regarding the coordination of regional infrastructure investment and service delivery
- Promoting the economic wellbeing and competitiveness of the Calgary Metropolitan Region
- Developing policies outlining how the Board shall engage the public in consultation

Name: We Are Boscombe
Description:
We Are Boscombe is a place-led regeneration and storytelling agency, using creativity, culture and community to reshape how people see Boscombe.

Funded by Visa and Dorset Local Enterprise Partnership (LEP), we began as a hyperlocal campaign built from the ground up to shine a light on Boscombe’s untold stories, connect communities and support the people and businesses that make this town unique. Today, we operate as an agency delivering place-based projects, high street activations and digital campaigns that drive pride, visibility and inclusive regeneration.

We work in partnership with local councils, Business Improvement Districts (BIDs), creatives and community organisations to co-design initiatives that bring energy, identity and opportunity back to the places that need it most.

From transforming empty shops to producing bold digital storytelling, our work sits at the intersection of public sector strategy, civic pride and cultural regeneration.

Community first
Culture driven
Regeneration focused

We are rewriting the narrative.
Together, We Are Boscombe

Name: Ministry of Buildings, Utilities, Infrastructure, Labour and Transportation
Description:
Overview of Ministry:
The Ministry of Communications, Works, Labour & Energy is a vibrant Ministry whose strategic objective is to provide technical expertise in Infrastructure Services, Labour Force, Sea and Air access, Energy Services, ICTs, Equipment & Mechanical Services, and transportation. It’s main aim is to contribute to economic growth and development and also to contribute to the national outcomes of Montserrat in the following ways:

 A vibrant and diverse economy that supports sustainable private sectoral economic activity and generates employment;
~Improve energy security;
~Physical infrastructure and transportation facilities in place to support development (Infrastructure investment that are economic enablers, which are interlinked with and are vital for the success of many of the proposed investments in the visitor economy, enterprise culture, and key sectors of growth in Montserrat.)

Vision:
To be an organization providing excellent services to Montserrat, epitomizing a model to the region whilst working within a harmonious environment.

Mission:
The Ministry of Communication, Works, Labour & Energy (MCWLE) is mandated to promote the goals and objectives of Government of Montserrat; by ensuring the enhancement of the quality of life for its residents through delivery of safe, reliable, cost effective and sustainable projects, programmes and quality services in the Communications, Labour, Infrastructure and Energy Sectors.

Name: South East Region Economic Development Company
Description:
SEREDEC is a response to the challenges of sustainable development in South Eastern Nigeria.
We seek to create a positive business environment that encourages dynamic infrastructural development and sustainable economic growth. By using innovative and market-based approach, we are able to harness the knowledge and expertise of the private sector; the resources and experience of the public sector; passion and network of civil societies to address key issues in South-East development.

SEREDEC is about building something that will last. It is about the freedom to set our own terms.
It is about the place we call home. We draw our strength from vibrant cities and towns, a bold history, vast economic potentials, and amazing people with brilliant minds.
Together we are building something amazing that we can pass on to the next generation.
Together we are managing our resources, optimizing our potentials, and investing in our future.
SEREDEC is a private sector initiative with NO PARTISAN agenda.

Our vision is to make the South-East region of Nigeria the first choice destination for business investment in Africa.

Our Mission is to drive sustainable economic development and innovation in the South-East region of Nigeria by developing the required environment, resources, knowledge and capacity in partnership with all stakeholders to create a socially-stable and economically viable home for all.

Name: CEMS Ventures
Description:
CEMS Ventures Sdn. Bhd. is a joint venture company between Reliant Resources and the Sabah Oil and Gas Development Corporation (SOGDC), a State-owned GLC. Established with a clear mission to address one of Sabah’s most pressing workforce challenges, CEMS Ventures focuses on the centralization and modernization of labour quarters management systems.

Our initiative aims to streamline the housing and welfare management of foreign workers, ensuring better oversight, compliance, and efficiency. By centralizing labour quarters, we seek to reduce uncontrolled influxes of foreign workers, improve living standards, enhance safety, and strengthen regulatory control all while supporting Sabah’s sustainable industrial and economic growth.

Currently, CEMS Ventures is spearheading the development of a Central Labour Quarter (CLQ) inside the Sipitang Oil and Gas Industrial Park (SOGIP). This initiative is designed to provide a structured, well-managed, and compliant housing solution for industrial workers, ensuring both employers and government agencies benefit from greater efficiency, safety, and regulatory oversight.

Name: URBEX SUPPLY
Description:
URBEX SUPPLY est une entreprise innovante et dynamique spécialisée dans les aménagements urbains et la fourniture de produits de voirie de qualité. Nous avons une grande expérience dans ce domaine et nous nous efforçons de fournir des produits et des services qui répondent aux besoins de nos clients.
Notre équipe est composée de professionnels expérimentés dans le domaine des aménagements urbains et de la voirie. Nous avons une grande connaissance des normes et des tendances actuelles dans ces domaines, et nous nous efforçons de toujours être à la pointe de l'innovation.
Nous proposons une large gamme de produits de voirie, tels que des grilles d'assainissement, des avaloirs, des tampons de regards, des grilles de caniveaux ainsi que tout ce qui se rapporte aux chambres de tirage télécom. Tous nos produits sont fabriqués avec des matériaux de qualité supérieure et répondent aux normes les plus élevées en matière de qualité et de durabilité.
En outre, nous offrons également des services de consultation et de mise en place pour aider nos clients à choisir les produits les plus adaptés à leurs besoins et à les installer de manière professionnelle.
Chez URBEX, nous croyons que les aménagements urbains de qualité sont essentiels pour créer des espaces publics sûrs et agréables. Nous sommes fiers de contribuer à cette mission en fournissant des produits de voirie de qualité supérieure et en offrant des services de qualité à nos clients.

Name: The ReSpace Alliance
Description:
The ReSpace Alliance is an innovative network bringing together socially-minded councils, businesses, charities, community groups and individuals - united by a desire to build a better world.

It is designed to help reduce inequality and empower communities by re-connecting empty spaces, surplus resources and local expertise.

This commons-owned, resource-sharing project, creates and enables platforms of communal learning, enterprise and social action.

We accept that only by working toward common goals can we tackle global warming and achieve the transition towards a healthier, fairer and more sustainable society.

Name: HWPLP
Description:
HWPLP (Health, Wealth, Prosperity, Love, Peace) is a movement-driven investment firm committed to building generational wealth through healing, collective economics, real estate, and venture capital to build sustainable generational prosperity

We operate through a Dual-Structure Model, with a public-facing LLC and a private SEB (Spiritual-Economic Body)/PMA (Private Ministerial Association), bridging public opportunity with private sovereignty. This allows wealth to circulate internationally, ethically, and energetically in alignment with Natural Law. 

We empower individuals to heal financially, build wealth strategically, and cultivate thriving, prosperous communities rooted in love and peace. 


Our mission is to merge economic growth and community development  with holistic well-being, ensuring that wealth is not just created, but sustained with purpose and intention.

Name: DIVER[C]ITY
Description: DIVER[C]ITY is a platform for urban transformation and an umbrella brand concept for various ArtLabs. The ArtLabs are the core of the brand and connect real labs with art & design, science & technology. The goal of DIVER[C]ITY is to create awareness for urban spaces, to design non-commercial spaces with different objects and to make knowledge visible and accessible in different ways. The brand actively promotes the active co-creation of urban and living spaces by citizens and especially promotes sustainable and urban living.

Name: Ellsworth Group
Description:
Ellsworth’s team has over 60 years of combined experience in construction, development and real estate sales with a focus on client satisfaction. Our innovative style is built on the belief that proactivity in development and construction management can deliver projects on time and on budget while achieving top quality results.

Our executive team’s track record comes from a foundation of industry relationships with consultants and trades – fundamental to success in the real estate, development and construction management sectors.

Name: Municipal Company for Leisure and Culture kfar-saba
Description: פיתוח, קידום ויזמות של פעילות העשרה בעיר כפר סבא לרווחת התושבים והתושבות בתחומים המפורטים: פיתוח, ארגון, קידום ויזום פסטיבלים, אירועי תרבות ומופעי בידור, או מוסיקה | פיתוח, ארגון, קידום ויזום תכניות העשרה, חוגים ופעילויות לילדים, בני נוער ומבוגרים | הפעלת הקונסרבטוריון למוסיקה ומחול | ניהול צהרונים וקייטנות | הפעלת מעונות יום לגילאי 0-3 | פיתוח מודל "עיר לומדת" וקמפוס כפר סבא.

Name: THE LIVESEY EXCHANGE
Description:
Livesey Exchange is a community-led hub based on Old Kent Road, supporting local enterprise, creativity, and collaboration.
We provide flexible spaces for makers, artists, and residents to work, connect, and grow.
Our active site, Lex2, hosts events, workshops, and co-working activities.
Our upcoming development will feature kitchens and offices for hire and a rooftop bar terrace.
We empower local voices and foster inclusive, community-driven change.

Name: Port of Tomorrow
Description: Creating Certainty from Concept to Grand Opening | Commercial Developer | Streamlining the development process between land owners, cruise lines and commercial and marine contractors.

Name: LandAfrique Group
Description:
LandAfrique Group is committed to shaping Africa’s urban and industrial future through smart development, sustainable infrastructure, and people-centered communities.

As a group of complementary businesses, we design, build, manage, and protect residential estates, industrial parks, and mixed-use developments. Ensuring long-term value for residents, businesses, and investors.

From critical infrastructure development and housing delivery to facility management and security services, LandAfrique Group provides integrated solutions that enable thriving communities and productive economies.

Name: Conduit Community Capital
Description:
On a mission to build Atlantic City into a financial services as a force for good hub attracting Generation XYZ&B to 48 blocks of opportunity on the Atlantic Ocean offering cultural diversity, affordable coastal living, global cuisine, art and music. 

Enable Atlantic City to become a global financial services hub & community with an emphasis on creating wealth technology (WealthTech) and financial technology (FinTech) employment opportunities while solving for the need to diversify AC's economy with knowledge workers living, working, playing & giving with all 48 Blocks. Leverage AC’s diverse population & cultures, affordability, and opportunity zone on the ocean to serve as a destination for the next generation of financial services professionals.

#beAConduit #iamAConduit #NeoWealthAC #ImpactAC #48BFinServ

Name: Urkiola Landa Garapena
Projektstyrningsbyrån
Description: Projektstyrningsbyrån är ett konsultbolag inom samhällsutveckling med fokus på projektstyrning. Vi erbjuder kompetent personal med erfarenheter från projektets alla skeden. Vi hjälper ditt företag med uppdragsledning, projekteringsledning och projektledning.

Name: ANIME -Projecto de Animação e Formação
Description:
Visão: Ser referência na inovação social, na qualidade dos serviços prestados e na relevância social da sua atuação.

Valores: de solidariedade e de equidade como um processo formativo de homens e mulheres livres e participativos, fomentando atitudes e comportamentos não discriminatórios, da interculturalidade como expoente da relação entre povos e culturas, respeitando as diversidades, de defesa e preservação da Natureza, como atitude de vida geradora de futuros sustentados e diversos.

Sintonia Social: Desenvolver o conhecimento através de boas práticas comunitárias; Fortalecer o trabalho colaborativo em parceria, potencializando os recursos associativos da comunidade local;

Consultoria Social: Estudos e diagnósticos,  capacitação e gestão de projetos, intervenção organizacional. 
Facilitação não formal: Produção de recursos pedagógicos. Formação à medida. Criação de e-books. Job shadowing. 
Animação:  Intervenção Sociocultural. Práticas Artísticas Comunitárias.

Voluntariado: Acolhimento. Coordenação e gestão. Formação e capacitação.

Projetos: Desenvolvimento local. Ambiente e Cidadania Ativa

Name: Simple Housing Housing
Description:
Simple Housing Enterprise (SHE) is dedicated to building viable communities. We develop housing units that meet community needs with thoughtful design and durable construction. We recognize the urgent need for sustainable housing that is accessible to individuals and families across all income levels—whether through adaptive reuse, traditional single-family homes, micro homes, or multifamily developments. SHE believes quality housing cultivates vibrant communities and empowers individuals to reach their fullest potential.

SHE is a dynamic development firm focused on creating viable communities through strategic partnerships. We collaborate with housing agencies, land banks, municipalities, and private entities to address critical housing needs. By leveraging funding sources and development expertise, SHE delivers innovative, sustainable housing solutions that strengthen communities. 

We provide strategic land acquisition services to identify parcels suitable for smaller footprints within the urban core. Our team is skilled in procurement solicitation, ensuring a competitive and transparent selection of qualified partners. Through concept design collaboration, we help bring forward housing models that are energy-efficient, cost-effective, and aligned with evolving household needs.
SHE also delivers robust project management, overseeing timelines, budgets, and stakeholder coordination from pre-development to final delivery. Our services include establishing realistic project timelines and executing community engagement strategies that generate buy-in and support. Finally, our team ensures diligent reporting and documentation to meet regulatory and investor requirements.

Wir legen Wert auf Konzepte, die aus der örtlichen Situation individuell entwickelt werden. Unsere Entwürfe entstehen im ständigen Dialog mit unseren Auftraggeberinnen und Auftraggebern. Das Kostenbewusstsein ist  uns dabei ebenso wichtig wie die Nachhaltigkeit und die gestalterische Qualität.

Dabei kooperieren wir regelmäßig mit Fachbüros aus den Bereichen Landschaftsplanung, Verkehrsplanung, Immissionsschutz und weiteren Fachrichtungen. Mit der frühzeitigen Zusammenarbeit in Projektteams vermeiden  wir Reibungsverluste und schaffen die Basis für den gemeinsamen Erfolg.

Our multidisciplinary team of Urban Planners, Architects, and Social Scientists collaborates with a wide range of local and regional stakeholders in the Hindu Kush Himalayan (HKH) Region. Together, we work to create forward-thinking, sustainable solutions that address the region’s unique challenges, with a focus on resilience, growth, and environmental preservation.

At TUL, we are committed to fostering informed urban development and community resilience in one of the world’s most ecologically sensitive and rapidly changing landscapes.

 Il Rotary non è solo volontariato: è crescita, visione e connessioni che contano.

Conformément à la loi n° 2013-10 du 28 Décembre 2013 portant code général des collectivités locale qui consacre le transfert de compétence aux communes, celles-ci ont compétence pour la gestion des ordures. Au sein de chaque commune, il existe une commission donc la composition et le fonctionnement peuvent varier et qui en a sa charge l'environnement l’assainissement et le cadre de vie.

Les activités à l'environnement sont sous la tutelle des municipalités dans le cadre des compétences transférées aux collectivités territoriales. Toute fois, elles sont libres contractuellement de s'engager avec d'autres entités compétentes et pertinentes dans les domaines d'interventions des communes.

Name: Centre for Urban Research and Development
Description:

With the legacy of 38 years of experience in governance, smart cities, water management, and capacity building, Dr. Sampat envisioned CURD as a platform to bridge knowledge with action.

At CURD, we engage in applied research, policy advisory, and capacity-building initiatives to create livable, inclusive, and resilient cities. Our work spans urban planning, governance reforms, infrastructure, housing, mobility, climate resilience, and water security.

What We Do:
Conduct research studies (funded and unfunded) on urban issues

Collaborate with government authorities, academia, civil society & communities

Offer evidence-based solutions for urban transformation

Support policy dialogues and knowledge exchange platforms

Our Collaborators:
CURD is supported by a multi-disciplinary team of professionals and socially committed citizens, offering a rich blend of technical, economic, environmental, and socio-cultural expertise.

Name: La Jolla Community Planning Group
Description:
New Planning Group Emerges to Transform Community Engagement.

[LA JOLLA, CA, February, 2024]: 


Today heralds a shift in the way community planning groups across San Diego, including La Jolla, can help shape the future. Building on past planning group efforts, a coalition of individuals - spanning seasoned community stalwarts, homeowners, renters, business owners, non-profit leaders to youth advocates - unveils the inception of the new La Jolla Community Planning Group (LJCPG). With enthusiasm and determination, LJCPG, as one of two La Jolla applicants to the City of San Diego, stands poised to officially be the recognized community planning group of La Jolla. LJCPG will be a guiding force in charting La Jolla’s destiny and plans to play an integral role in striving to have one voice for La Jolla.

Name: Swag Upcycle
Description:
ABOUT US
Swag Upcycle is a non-profit organization on a mission to revolutionize the lifecycle of corporate swag. We understand the environmental impact of unused or discarded promotional items, and we've set out to make a positive change. Through our innovative upcycling process, we breathe new life into swag gear, giving it purpose and ensuring it contributes to improving lives and a sustainable future.

MISSION
Our mission is multifaceted – to reduce corporate waste and environmental footprint, support social initiatives, and make a direct impact on individuals facing challenges. We aim to create a circular economy for swag items, transforming them into meaningful resources that benefit individuals and communities in need.

Description:
At the intersection of urban planning, big data, and carbon accounting, Woodsong Associates provides solutions to the multiple crises we face, with a focus on the interplay between human habitat, the built environment, and the GHG emissions reductions we must achieve to avoid the worst impacts of climate change.
We deploy advanced spatial analysis and solutions, using a sophisticated, pro forma-based approach to urban development analysis to inform urban, regional, and natural system planning for effective climate response to deliver the just transition we need.

Name: Parity Inc. Dayton Ohio
Description:
Our mission is to serve and advocate for social and economic equity within the African American community which is fundamental to our purpose. We will achieve our mission through the impact and improvement we achieve through community collaborations. Parity Inc. has been at the forefront of the fight for diversity and equity in the Greater Dayton Area for over three decades. During that time, our community faced many challenges, some threatening our existence. As an organization, we focus on Education, Health, Economic/Community Development, and Public Policy. We have worked towards rebuilding the local educational system and addressing the loss of industry and jobs in the Miami Valley. We strive to address those issues at the policy level and work collectively at the grassroots level with our youth and emerging leaders to help build long-lasting and impactful change. Parity Inc. has championed the need to develop our students to be their best through our Youth Development for Success Program (YDSP), which stresses academic excellence as a primary component. YDSP serves students in grades 3-7 to increase the high school graduation rate. 
The Black Leadership Development Program (BLDP) encourages continued professional and leadership growth for emerging African American leaders. Candidates receive sponsorship from their employers or are self-sponsored to engage in this eleven-month program that will provide networking opportunities with previous BLDP Alumni and fellow leaders in the community. The culmination of this program is a graduation attended by the sponsoring employers, Parity Inc. Board of Directors members, and guests of the current BLDP class. Upon completing this program, graduates have become architects who turn challenges into innovative advancements in their communities and workplaces.
The Top Ten African American Male Luncheon allows us to recognize the many outstanding contributions made by African American males in our community and more importantly

Name: Vélo Loisir Provence Etudes
Description:
Vélo Loisir Provence Etudes : développer les mobilités cyclables et encourager le tourisme à vélo . 

Sous l’impulsion de professionnels du tourisme, Vélo Loisir Provence est créée en 1996 pour développer et valoriser une offre d’itinéraires cyclables en région Sud Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur.

Depuis 25 ans, avec l’aide des collectivités locales, nous coordonnons la création d’aménagements et de  services adaptés aux cyclistes.

Nous contribuons notamment à l’amélioration constante,  l’animation et la promotion d’itinéraires emblématiques  tels que Le Luberon à vélo, Le Verdon à Vélo, ViaRhôna et La Méditerranée à vélo.

Parallèlement à nos actions de structuration et valorisation des projets cyclables, nous nous intéressons plus largement aux différentes pratiques du vélo. C’est pourquoi, Vélo Loisir Provence se positionne en interlocuteur de premier plan pour accompagner les collectivités et bureaux d’études qui agissent pour remettre le vélo au cœur des mobilités. Nous éclairons les décideurs publics et privés dans le développement de leurs politiques cyclables. À l’échelle des territoires ruraux et périurbains, nous dressons un état des lieux des bonnes pratiques, engageons les concertations et émettons des recommandations opérationnelles.

Au-delà des pratiques touristiques, le vélo s’affiche comme un mode de déplacement durable. Organisme de conseil et d’ingénierie, Vélo Loisir Provence donne aux territoires les connaissances et les moyens de bâtir un écosystème favorable à la pratique quotidienne du vélo. En apportant notre appui technique aux collectivités et aux bureaux d’études spécialisés, nous participons au développement des mobilités cyclables. Par nos actions d’animation et coordination, nous fournissons un socle incitatif sur lequel les parties prenantes peuvent bâtir leur politique cyclable.

Name: Incremental Planning & Environment
Description:
Incremental Planning & Environment provides project-based and on-call planning and data collection consulting services to cities, counties, and private land owners. Our work for both review agencies and developers allows us to understand the needs of each while providing objective solutions within our areas of expertise. Easy-to-read, concise reports and presentation graphics are used to communicate complex ideas to project team members, review agency staff, elected officials, and the general public. We are also available to supplement your short-term staffing needs or to provide technical review and editing of your project deliverables.

Assignments have included multi-use site development traffic impact studies; traffic signal warrant analyses; identification of drive-thru service impacts on peak parking supply and demand; identification of light rail transit station public/private shared parking demand; determination of corridor crash type frequencies and crash rates; and collection of intersection turning movement counts, pedestrian crossing counts, queue length observations, and existing conditions photo-documentation.

Name: Ashland Living
Description:
Ashland is the first master-planned community in Angleton, TX, a short commute to downtown Houston. Here, modern living meets small-town charm. Discover the future of connected living when you find your dream home at Ashland.

Nestled in the heart of Brazoria County, Ashland will feature more than 1,000 thoughtfully designed homes, scenic pocket parks, and nature trails open to the public, providing residents ample opportunities to enjoy Angleton’s natural beauty. With top-notch amenities and a family-friendly atmosphere, Ashland offers the perfect blend of convenience and tranquility.

Ashland is proud to partner with a select group of renowned homebuilders known for their quality craftsmanship and innovative designs. Each builder offers a range of home styles and floor plans, allowing you to find the perfect fit for your family’s needs. With an emphasis on modern features and energy efficiency, the homes in Ashland are designed to provide lasting value and comfort. Discover a variety of options that cater to both contemporary and traditional tastes, all within Angleton’s premier master-planned community, including homes from Ashton Woods, Castle Rock Communities, Lennar, K. Hovnanian Homes, Saratoga Homes, and Starlight Homes. 

Additionally, Ashland offers an exceptional range of amenities designed to enrich your lifestyle and provide endless opportunities for relaxation and recreation. Whether you want to stay active, unwind by the water, or enjoy quality time with family, Ashland’s thoughtfully planned amenities cater to all ages and interests. Residents can enjoy access to an amenity center, a junior Olympic lap pool, a resort-style pool, a lazy river, a playground, open activity spaces, and scenic pocket parks, creating a vibrant and connected community atmosphere.

Stay tuned for construction updates and more information about this incredible up-and-coming community.

Name: CommunityCatalysts
Description:
Our aspiration is to contribute to a paradigm shift in local community and (bio)regional development. More specifically, we seek to collect, test, improve and share practices that root co-creative action for system transformation in the unique place-based potential of landscape, settlements, culture, people and other living beings. Our focus is on the roles and practices of Community Catalysts spearheading this new paradigm. We intend to stimulate the creation of local and trans-local Communities of Practice of Community Catalysts. Ultimately, we have the ambition to co-shape what it means to be(come) a Community Catalyst. Through our multi-partner projects we develop learning materials and pathways as well as complementary tools and support for generating livelihoods as Community Catalysts.
Co-creation is our fundamental way of working together. It means activating collective intelligence in a way that honours, connects and combines the experiences, the knowledge and the perspectives of all contributors. It also means rendering and sharing the results in an accessible, structured way.

The resources like the set of practices assembled in the toolkit and in the curriculum are meant to be improved and complemented over time by additional input coming from other projects, places and practitioners. If you decide to get involved yourself, we are happy to welcome you as a co-creator! Feel free to connect or sign up.

Description:
Games of Towns (GT) – Town Planning Via Games

GT intends to transform town planning through games, data-driven simulations, and multi-criteria decision-making.

GT aims to create an inclusive approach to town planning that prevents tokenism, ensuring meaningful collaboration from a wider range of individuals. GT allows more people to have their "play" in shaping urban development.

GT is seeking opportunities for collaboration, funding, and pilot testing. Across both professional and academic spheres, GT is committed to advancing this initiative and exploring its role in shaping the future of town planning.

 Whether you are a planner, policymaker, researcher, game designer, player, or simply passionate about this attitude, your insights and collaboration are welcome!

Name: Waku Islands
Description:
“Waku Islands” es un proyecto turístico-inmobiliario, que redefine la utopía de convivir en una isla, innovando con la edificación del “Hotel Bitcoin Hills”; el primer hotel temático de experiencia vacacional futurista donde marcas, huéspedes y comunidad interactúan con atracciones y smart rooms conectadas al mundo real y el metaverso de la isla.

Nuestra propuesta impulsa un modelo de desarrollo sostenible, ambiental, económico y social que utiliza tecnología Blockchain, NFT y Web3 para transformar los usos tradicionales de la industria vacacional y hotelera en oportunidades de Marketing e Inversión, convirtiendo la isla en un destino inteligente que hará que todos viajen, comercien y obtengan beneﬁcios a través de múltiples actividades vinculadas al universo digital.

----

"Waku Islands" is a tourism-real estate project that redefines the utopia of living on an island, innovating with the building of the "Bitcoin Hills Hotel"; the first themed hotel with a futuristic vacation experience where brands, guests and community interact with attractions and smart rooms connected to the real world and the metaverse of the island.

Our proposal drives a sustainable, environmental, economic and social development model that uses Blockchain, NFT and Web3 technology to transform the traditional uses of the vacation and hotel industry into Marketing and Investment opportunities, turning the island into a smart destination that will make everyone travel, trade and obtain beneﬁts through multiple activities linked to the digital universe.

Name: Conscious Vancouver
Description:
The Centre for Conscious Design (CCD) is a global network of designers, researchers, and thought leaders dedicated to creating environments that support human well-being. Through interdisciplinary collaboration, CCD explores how the built environment shapes our communities, health, and daily lives.

Each year, the Conscious Cities Festival brings together experts and local communities to examine the intersection of design, technology, and society. The 2025 theme, "Regrounding," focuses on reconnecting with place and time in an era of rapid digitalization.

 This is Vancouver’s first-ever CCD chapter event! Join us as we launch this exciting initiative and explore how conscious design can shape our city’s future.

 Event Details: March 25th | 6:00–7:30 PM
 Find tickets to our free event in the Linktree below!

Name: URBAN DEAL
Description:
VISION
Depaving Project proposes a model of society founded on the principles of social, environmental and economic justice, within a sustainable and accessible urban context. Depaving Project imagines the construction of a sustainable city through the creation of green areas, within which biodiversity and humans can coexist, amidst clean air, clean water, robust urban forests, thriving local agriculture and healthy communities.

MISSION
The Depaving Project hopes to involve a wide network of collaborators at various levels to restore social spaces to the community within cities. Pursuing the objective of restoring psycho-physical well-being to Depaving Project deals with connecting a network of partner companies, financiers, volunteers and specialists, in order to depave concrete and asphalt areas within the highly urbanized context of our cities, in order to restore green areas, spaces for sociality and an opportunity for people to exchange.

We utilize the power of distributed innovation, with an open and positive-sum mindset that aligns the benefits of individuals to the benefits of humanity.

Name: MEDVIRKNINGSHUBEN
Description:
MEDVIRKNINGSHUBEN driver prosessledelse, fasiliterer medvirkningsprosesser og evalueringsarbeid på vegne av eller i samarbeid med kunden. 
Gjennom arbeidet gjennomfører vi tilpassede medvirkningsprosesser der vi bruker et variert sett av metoder. Dette innebærer å mobilisere og rekruttere deltakere, arrangere møter og workshops eller gjennomføre undersøkelser med formål om å fremlegge resultatene til kunden. Det konkrete innholdet i selve medvirkningsprosessen vil variere etter oppdraget og prosjektets omfang, tidshorisont, målsetning og berørte grupper. Hvert enkelt opplegg vil skreddersys etter det aktuelle prosjektet. 
Underveis dokumenteres prosessen nøye. I ettertid samler vi resultater, analyserer dem og presenterer funnene i rapport for kunden. Disse rapportene gir prosjektansvarlige og beslutningstakere et rikere beslutningsgrunnlag fordi vårt arbeid sikrer at berørte grupper blir hørt.

Name: Molo'61
Description:
Focusing on the area of ‘Italia 61’ zone in Turin, Molo61 wants to create a multi-functional and sustainable place for teenagers and young people to use to study, work or just spend time together. The project suggested co-working and co-design interventions made from sustainable materials and involving members of the community in the design process.
 
Molo '61 is the first winning project of the Hackathon "NEB4Cities goes circular - designing regenerative, circular, and irresistible cities!" held in Turin.
Subsequently, he also won one of the 10,000 euro prizes in this year's EIT Community New European Bauhaus Hackathons, elected as having potential to further the aims of the New European Bauhaus to create a beautiful, sustainable and inclusive Europe.

Nuestros desarrollos promueven sinergias entre empresas y ofrecen espacios flexibles que acompañan la evolución del mercado, integrando productividad, conectividad y diseño. Name: Sen Sos Hábitat
Description:
Somos un despacho de arquitectura y urbanismo social fundado por mujeres mexicanas comprometidas y ocupadas por contribuir a comunidades más dignas, justas y equitativas, ciudades más vivas, disfrutables, accesibles y habitables para todos.

Nuestros proyectos buscan promover justicia socio espacial por medio de una metodología de participación ciudadana con enfoque de género que genera una puesta en valor y favorece la apropiación del espacio público a través del empoderamiento ciudadano y una serie de acciones concretas con urbanismo táctico dentro de comunidades urbanas, rurbanas y/o rurales para fomentar la regeneración de tejidos sociales. 

La co-creación y  re-creación de los espacios públicos, busca provocar una chispa generadora de cambios y transformaciones que afronten las crisis sociales, económicas, ambientales y sanitarias que vivimos, reafirmamos que la construcción del hábitat es colectiva.

Name: UrbanAxis
Description:
UrbanAxis is a locally led organization specializing in urban planning, design, and policy development. Our multi-disciplinary team of experts collaborates with governments, private entities, and humanitarian organizations to deliver creative, high-quality solutions that address diverse cultural and market needs. With a robust structure and extensive expertise, we excel in providing high-quality fieldwork, precise analysis, and advanced reporting tools.

At UrbanAxis, we prioritize our clients' objectives by crafting tailored strategies and allocating resources efficiently. We leverage a network of international experts to provide bespoke studies and methodologies, ensuring measurable, sustainable outcomes for every project.

We offer a comprehensive range of services, customizable to project needs:  

- Urban Planning & Design: Developing sustainable and innovative solutions for functional and vibrant communities.  
- Master Planning Support: Strategic guidance for long-term urban development.  
- Stakeholder Engagement: Mapping and outreach to include diverse voices in decision-making.  
- Research & Analysis: Crafting methodologies, conducting surveys, and facilitating focus group discussions.  
- Communications & Branding: Creating engaging content and distinctive branding to amplify project goals.  
- Field Support: Providing hands-on expertise for seamless project implementation.  

UrbanAxis combines creativity, cultural insight, and technical precision to navigate the region's challenges and deliver impactful results for its clients.

Name: CMB Planning Consultants
Description: CMB Planning Consultants works with developers, landowners, and public agencies navigating complex land-use, entitlement, and permitting processes. Our ideal clients are those who recognize that regulatory approvals carry real financial risk and value strategic guidance to achieve clear, timely, and defensible outcomes. We partner with clients seeking certainty, efficiency, and informed decision-making from site evaluation through final approval.

Name: Somerville Food Coalition (SFC)
Description:
The mission of the Somerville Food Coalition (SFC) is to connect individuals and organizations across Somerville, Massachusetts to share information, identify solutions, and advocate for resources that support access to affordable, culturally inclusive food for all. Our vision is a visibly resilient, values-driven food system that respects, involves, and serves all community members. Our work is guided by our Somerville Food System Assessment and Food Action Plan. 

We encourage all Somerville community members and organizations to join us! If you have any questions or would like to join a meeting, please email somervillefood@gmail.com.

Name: Action Communautaire de Développement (ACD)
Description:
Notre devoir : être proche des communautés !

Chez Association Action Communautaire de Développement du Centre Nord - ACD/CN, nous sommes fiers de contribuer au développement communautaire de la région du Centre-Nord au Burkina Faso.
Nous accompagnons les populations locales dans leurs projets de santé, d’éducation, de changement social , d’assainissement et de gouvernance.
Nous travaillons en partenariat avec les acteurs publics, privés et associatifs pour renforcer les capacités des communautés et favoriser leur autonomisation.
Nous sommes convaincus que le développement durable passe par la participation active et la responsabilisation des citoyens.
C’est pourquoi nous sommes proches des communautés, à l’écoute de leurs besoins, de leurs aspirations et de leurs réalités.
Nous vous remercions de votre soutien et de votre confiance. Ensemble, nous pouvons faire la différence !

Name: cepa consulting
Description:
In Spanish, the word "cepa" refers to the underground part of a plant where the roots connect to the trunk or stem. It is the hidden nexus that stabilizes and nourishes what is visible above. We chose our name because it is the perfect analogy for what we strive to achieve in our work. We connect the tangled root network of stakeholders, ideas, and resources into a strong cepa so your project and community can grow and flourish. 

We are a multi-disciplinary firm with experience in diverse areas related to mobility, community health, and capacity building. Whether we are planning for those who move on foot, on wheels, or on wings, our goal is to create safe, well-utilized community assets with a focus on positive ecological and social impacts. You can count on us to build relationships and solutions that are "de buena cepa" - that is to say, high quality and authentic. Get in touch to find out more about how we can move your project forward.

Name: SEASIDE Community Development Corporation
Description: SEASIDE Community Development Corporation (SCDC) is the commercial landlord and development entity for Seaside, Florida, the Birthplace of New Urbanism, responsible for the stewardship and management of the downtown commercial area. SCDC oversees maintenance of the town center, supports and produces community events, and partners closely with merchants and stakeholders to ensure cohesive operations and guest experience. Guided by the Davis family’s founding vision, SCDC is committed to preserving and advancing the principles of New Urbanism in a manner that honors Seaside’s original intent while supporting its continued vitality.

Name: Riverview Northeast, Inc.
Description:
A District of Columbia-based 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, Riverview Northeast Inc. (RVNE) was incorporated in November 2020 to protect and promote the residential, economic, environmental, cultural, and commercial interests of the River Terrace neighborhood and adjacent communities.  
 
For generations, the River Terrace neighborhood has been a bastion of civic engagement within and beyond Northeast Washington, DC and the District of Columbia at large. As such, RVNE is committed to championing the past, present and future of River Terrace, operating in collaboration toward catalyzed development, community revitalization, and new investment to ensure that emerging opportunities are activated, accessible and affordable to all.
 
Our Mission
The mission of Riverview Northeast is to serve as strategic engagement partners and vested stakeholders toward civic growth and economic development within, surrounding and adjacent to the River Terrace community.
 
Our Vision
The River Terrace we imagine will be a vibrant hub of community influence, infrastructure, inclusion, and engagement.  For DC neighborhoods impacted by systemic exclusion from economic, commercial and residential wealth-building opportunities, the River Terrace we imagine will show what a community can be when intentionally invested in as an actionable, equitable, measurable core principle, by design and at the center of everything. The River Terrace we imagine will challenge inequitable practices and hold elected officials accountable to increase resources, improve amenities, and advance inclusive policies. The River Terrace we imagine will support community organizing and resident empowerment, investing financial, human and knowledge capital to broker partnerships with financing and other municipal-support entities toward sustainable development, capacity building, and growth. Ultimately, the River Terrace we imagine is a diverse destination for community members old and new.

Name: Meta Mind Global Corporation
Description:
MMGC was established in the middle of technology evolution. We have been developing as a knowledge-based service provider, evolving simultaneously with the rapid advancement of technology. 

In the past 30 years, MMGC has built up a sizable body of work, gained significant expertise in important Private and Government Public Services fields like Smart City, Telecommunication, Water & Sanitation, Environment & Energy, GIS & Remote Sensing, Agriculture in Urban and Rural Development.

Going back to more than two decades ago when the whole entire world was terrified of the Y2K bug, a computer system's inability to distinguish dates correctly had the potential to bring down worldwide infrastructures for industries ranging from banking to air travel. We then realized the growing impact and the deep involvement of technology in modern life. Technology has helped us to conquer modern civilization where we all stand today. Technology constantly evolves and becomes more advanced.

MMGC's IP utilizes the Meta Data, by leveraging next generation innovative technologies with the main focus in protecting and rejuvenating the environment, to create innovative real-world solutions that help governments and enterprises overcome challenges and make paradigm shifts towards a more sustainable future. 

MMGC’s Global Programs provides financial and technical assistance through cost-share agreements with The U.S. Government Entities and Development Banks to provide Grants in emerging markets. Under these Grant Agreements, U.S. companies can create jobs through the export of goods and services for priority infrastructure projects for sustainable development projects.

While executing these projects, MMGC determines the design specifications with technology options and scopes U.S. innovation and Strategies to build a partner/supplier eco-system that can foster mutual growth provisioning for socio-economic development which can enhance quality of living in host or target countries.

Character Development is a placemaking and development firm dedicated to creating enduring, walkable communities. We bring together visionary planners, builders, and designers to craft neighborhoods where people and nature thrive.

Our flagship project, Armistead in Franklin, Tennessee, is Middle Tennessee’s first true agrihood — a community where agriculture, design, and sustainability meet.

With decades of experience shaping destination environments, Character Development is committed to conservation through density, the power of placemaking, and the creation of places that matter.

Name: UTOPIZE
Description:
UTOPIZE is a European initiative transforming public spaces into vibrant, sustainable, and inclusive places that reflect the identity and history of each community.

We work with citizens to reimagine their neighbourhoods - from city centres to rural areas - making them more resilient, welcoming, and culturally relevant. By tackling the pressing social, environmental, and urban challenges facing Europe today, UTOPIZE helps strengthen social bonds and local pride.

At the core of the project are our UTOPIA Labs: local hubs where residents co-create solutions using digital tools like Extended Reality (XR) and Geographic Information Systems (GIS). These tools help turn ideas into action, supporting real-time urban planning and shared decision-making.

UTOPIZE starts with pilot projects in Portugal, Italy, and Sweden, and will grow to include six more countries through a Twinning Program that helps adapt and scale successful approaches across Europe.

Name: GEOGRAM Urbanisme & Environnement

Name: Angerri Consultors
Description:
En Angerri Consultors somos expertos en planificacion estratégica y análisis de viabilidad económica y legislación comercial, además de estar especializados en economias urbanas, desarrollo territorial, transformación digital y asessoria política y de comunicación.

Socio - Director
Jaume Angerri i Auberni se formó como economista en la UAB (1983) y complementó su formación con los másters en Instituciones Europeas (Ministerio As. Ext., 1985) y en Gestión Pública (ESADE, 1992 y IESE 1994). Con experiencia profesional en la formación profesional y universitaria, fue Director General de Comercio de la Generalitat de Catalunya y presidente del antiguo COPCA (actual ACCIÓ) de 1990 a 2003. El año 2004 funda Angerri Consultors SL, una consultoría para el crecimiento empresarial, el asesoramiento estratégico, el desarrollo territorial y urbano, el apoyo a proyectos públicos y privados y la consultoría política.

Socio - Apoderado
Arnau Angerri i Garrofé se formó en derecho y negocios en la UPF. Es un profesional con más de 12 años de experiencia construyendo relaciones comerciales con empresas, instituciones, entidades y administraciones públicas. Está especializado en la búsqueda y análisis de nuevas oportunidades de negocio relacionadas con el sector IT, la transformación digital de los negocios tradicionales y el desarrollo de modelos de negocio “as a Service” y proyectos de Big Data, IA & IoT para la Industria y Agricultura 4.0.

Socio - Project Manager
Adrià Angerri i Garrofé se formó en Publicidad y Relaciones Públicas en la URL, Marketing Digital en la UOC y en Planificación Urbana y Sostenibilidad en la UPC. Es un profesional con más de 8 años de experiencia en la elaboración de planes estratégicos, análisis e interpretación de estadísticas y analítica web, SEO y SEM; y de la gestión de proyectos de planificación tanto de políticas públicas urbanas, como de políticas relacionadas con la promoción económica de ciudades, infraestructuras públicas y zonas comerciales.

Name: Global Street Atlas
Description:
Global Street Atlas is a growing database that documents and showcases the diversity of streetscapes around the globe, providing real-world examples of how this public urban asset is allocated and used across different cities and contexts.

Our mission is to map and decipher, at a granular level, the existing patterns of public urban land use allocation around the world. By documenting how different urban environments use their street space today, we can empower cities and urban professionals to make better-informed decisions for the streets of tomorrow.

Name: Департамент житлово-комунального господарства ХМР
Re:VITA
Description:
Re:VITA is a grassroots collective that challenges the dominant narrative in Chinatown, building bridges across community groups and creating reasons for folks to keep coming back into the neighbourhood.

Re:VITA was started by a group of volunteers who became friends by regularly attending monthly Chinatown cleanups. During lunch after the cleanups, they always brainstormed other activities and initiatives to bring into Chinatown. In summer 2023, they started to take action, running a plant swap, a comedy night, and a back alley block party which we all now know as Chinatown After Dark.

Name: AXISE.NG
Description:
“شريكك الأول للنجاح”

في “إكسزز”، نؤمن بأن التطوير الشخصي وبناء المشاريع الناجحة هو جوهر التميز. نحن هنا لنكون شريكك الاستراتيجي، سواء كنت تسعى إلى تطوير مهاراتك أو إطلاق مشروعك الخاص في أي مجال.

نقدم مجموعة متكاملة من الندوات والدورات التعليمية المصممة لفتح آفاق جديدة أمامك، وتزويدك بفرص عمل قيّمة. بالإضافة إلى ذلك، نوفر حلولًا مبتكرة وخدمات استراتيجية لدعم بناء وتطوير المشاريع بطريقة فعّالة ومميزة.

التعلم والتطوير هو شراكة استراتيجية نحو النجاح، ولهذا نركز على تقديم تجارب تعليمية متكاملة تلبي احتياجات مختلف الفئات.

في “إكسزز”، نعمل معك لتحقيق أقصى إمكانياتك بأسلوب مبتكر وفعّال. سواء كنت مهتمًا بمجالات مثل الهندسة، التطوير، التسويق، أو غيرها، نحن هنا لتقديم الدعم الذي تحتاجه. حلولنا تتميز بالابتكار، ونسعى دائمًا لتحقيق أعلى مستويات الجودة والتميز في كل خطوة تخطوها معنا.

مع “إكسزز”، نضمن لك تحقيق اهدافك بكفاءة و ابتكار.”

Name: Planning Approval Group
Description:
