Our comprehensive approval service eliminates the stress and uncertainty from the planning process.  By implementing our proven strategies, we ensure your project get approved on schedule and within budget, while minimising the risk and keeping your development on track

Name: Udo Wenzl | Kommunalberatung
Description:
Kooperative Entwicklungsprozesse bieten den Gemeinden die Chance, sich zukünftigen, sozialen, funktionalen und baulichen Herausforderungen zu stellen und die Gemeinde insgesamt weiterzuentwickeln. Vielen Kommunen sind integrierte Entwicklungskonzepte ein zentrales Anliegen, da sie einerseits Voraussetzung für bestimmte Förderanträge sind und andererseits helfen können, Entscheidungen im Gemeinderat vorzubereiten und eine hohe Akzeptanz in der Bevölkerung zu erreichen.

Die Bevölkerung sollte daher von Anfang an in diesen Entwicklungsprozess mit einbezogen und daran beteiligt werden und dies über alle Generationen hinweg, vom Kind bis zum*r Senior*in.

Name: IDTS Consulting
Description:
IDTS Consulting (Infrastructure Development and Technology Services) is a professional services firm specializing in airport and transportation infrastructure. We provide comprehensive support in airport planning and design, capital program and project management, owner’s representation, and technical training to public and private sector clients.
Our team brings extensive experience across civil and military environments, serving general aviation facilities, commercial service airports, and large international hubs. IDTS supports projects throughout the full development lifecycle, including master planning and alternatives analysis, design coordination, stakeholder and regulatory engagement, procurement support, construction phasing, and delivery oversight.
IDTS Consulting is committed to delivering solutions that are operationally sound, regulatory-compliant, and aligned with client objectives for safety, schedule, budget, and long-term asset performance. We integrate subject-matter expertise with proven industry practices to help clients execute complex capital improvement programs with confidence and clarity.
We welcome opportunities to support organizations seeking a reliable partner for strategic planning, disciplined project delivery, and sustained infrastructure value.

Services
Airport Planning and Design (General Aviation to Large International Hubs)
Civil and Military Facilities Development
Capital Improvement Program (CIP) Management
Project Management and Coordination
Owner’s Representation
Stakeholder Outreach and Engagement
Strategic Advisory Services
Construction Phasing and Operational Continuity Support
Technical Training (CADD, GIS, Simulation)
Information Technology
Automation, and Data Analytics
Third Party Coordination

Name: REplejs
Description:
REplejs?! 

Všechna místa mají svůj příběh. Některá opuštěně dřímají, ale skrývají obrovský potenciál. REPLEJS hledá nové využití pro staré prostory – od dolů přes průmyslové areály až po ty zemědělské. Naším cílem je dát těmto místům nový význam. 
Prostřednictvím jasného plánu, strategie a financování dokážeme z nevyužívaných lokalit vytvořit moderní centra dění a atraktivní body zájmu.

Platforma funguje na třech fázích: 

 Fáze 1. Místo
První fáze poté, co jsme nalezli vhodné místo k oživení zahrnuje dokonalé poznání a zmapování místa a jeho vazeb. Provedeme obhlídky a analýzy stávajícího stavu po stránkách technických, stavebních, technologických a urbanistických, ale i z hlediska ekonomických, sociálních a kulturních vazeb. Definujeme si cíle a kroky k jejich naplnění.

 Fáze 2. Restart
Druhá fáze zahrnuje hlavně plánování, testování a pomalý rozjezd. Je potřeba místem pořádně zatřást vhodným typem akcí a kroků tak, abychom jej dostali na mapu zájmu a přitáhli k němu pozornost. Místo testujeme a upravujeme pro možné budoucí potřeby, zatraktivňujeme pro budoucí partnery.

 Fáze 3. Replejs
V třetí fázi již život v místě tepe. Nastartovali jsme motor a ten běží. Místo má plán na budoucí roky a partnery, kteří jej respektují, naplňují jeho potenciál a posouvají jej spolu se svými vlastními vizemi.

Ambiente geológico formado por rochas ígneas alcalinas, minerais raros e águas sulfurosas em um planalto envolvente que abriga uma história geológica importante para a história da evolução do continente sul-americano. Vinícius Arcanjo Monteiro é autor da dissertação de mestrado que realizou o inventário de reconhecimento do patrimônio geológico de Poços de Caldas. Que colocou o Projeto de Poços de Caldas na campanhas de mapeamentos de projetos e aspirantes a Geoparques do Brasil - Relatório da Sociedade Brasileira de Geologia (SBG - Sessão de Geociências e Geoparques).

Name: Mudun
Description:
Mudun مدن

Mudun is an initiative that advocates for better urban planning in Amman. We share visual, real-life examples of problem sites in the city. This includes narrow, poorly paved sidewalks with misplaced elements like poles, trees, and often cars that make it difficult to walk. We also share visual examples of ways to benefit from underused space, like planting trees, as well as visual representations of how a given street would be if there were bicycle lanes. We will also exhibit how narrowing streets could ensure smoother, safer traffic flow. Additionally, Mudun conducts population surveys to collect data regarding residents’ opinions on the current state of Amman’s urban design. By raising awareness, we hope to generate citizen interest and gain support from individuals in positions of power—eventually making a tangible change in the current state of Amman’s urban design.

Name: LOCI Fiscal Impact Model
Description:
LOCI is a local government's most powerful tool when it comes to sound economic development.  Business and civic leaders need accurate information to know how their actions will affect their community.  LOCI gives local governments the ability to build unlimited models using their very own, specific community data in their fiscal impact studies.

LOCI is a sophisticated on-line tool that enables local analysts to quickly determine how any project will impact their local government.

Every community requires the best possible data to make informed decisions that will have major impact upon local business and citizens.  LOCI presents leaders and decision makers with the data they need to negotiate incentives from a strong, informed position.  Users can quickly modify their models to see how changes affect their local government.

Give your economic development team the power to build an unlimited number of models using real data specific to your community.  Used by local governments nationwide, LOCI is simply the very best impact analysis software ever developed.

Name: daaeminitiative
Description:
مبادرة داعم الشبابية، تنمويه تأسست في عام  2013م شبابية - تنموية - إبداعية  تمتلك كادر شبابي/ات متميز، تهدف الى المساهمة الفاعلة في تحقيق التنمية المجتمعية، وفي تقديم مختلف الدعم للشباب/ات بما يخدم تطلعاتهم، وتساهم في الرفع من القدرات والمهارات لديهم، وتسعى دوما للنجاح والتميز.
شعارنا :دعم متنوع لـ نجاح مستمر .  تمكين الشباب والمرأة من الوصول الى العديد من الفرص والبرامج التي تساهم بالتنمية المستدامة والفعالية التي  تحد من الإقصاء والعنف والتميز  
تعمل المبادرة على تحقيق رويتها ورسالتها عن طريق الأهداف التالية:
1-	تمكين الشباب اقتصاديا من خلال دعم وتطوير بيئة الابتكار، والاهتمام بالمشاريع التي تساهم في تقديم الحلول المجتمعية والتي تعمل رياديا ومجتمعيا في خدمة الفرد والمجتمع.
2-	تقديم الفرص والمنح الشبابية وقصص النجاح الملهمة إيماناً بأهمية غرس ثقافة الإيجابية والاستفادة من الخبرات والتجارب والأفكار المتميزة بما يعود بالفائدة لها ولمجتمعاتها.
3-	العمل على تفعيل دور الشباب وبناء القدرات والمهارات ليصبحـوا فاعلين في تنمية مجتمعاتهم.
4-	تأهيل الوسط الإعلامي والثقافي، وإقامة البرامج الشبابية التي تهدف الى الرفع من مستوى الوعى وتعزيز قيم السلام والتعايش وتثقيف المجتمع.
5-	نسعى للوصول الى انشاء شبكة شبابية ومنصات متعددة تهتم بتوفير الدعم الازم والمناسب اقتصاديا ومجتمعيا ولما يمكن الشباب من تحقيق اهداف التنمية المستدامة ورؤية الأمم المتحدة لـ 2030م.

مجالات العمل :
الإبداع الإبتكار 
التمكين الاقتصادي وريادة الاعمال
المشاريع التنموية 
حل النزاعات
الفرص والمنح 
قصص النجاح
التعليم والتدريب 
بناء القدرات والمهارت
الإنتاج المرئي والمسموع
التثقيف ورفع الوعي
التشبيك والتطوير

Face à l’urgence écologique et à la complexité croissante des défis territoriaux, France Climat est née d’un constat clair : il est devenu nécessaire de dépasser les discours, de ne plus se contenter de reformuler les enjeux ou d’additionner les intentions.

L’ambition de France Climat : favoriser le passage à l’action, renforcer la coopération entre acteurs publics et privés, et outiller concrètement les collectivités dans la conduite des transitions.

En partenariat avec les principales associations nationales d’élus, France Climat anime Planification-ecologique.fr, une plateforme d’intermédiation conçue pour répondre aux besoins opérationnels des territoires et connecter collectivités et entreprises autour de projets concrets.

France Climat se positionne comme un tiers de confiance neutre, au service de l’action publique locale et de l’innovation territoriale.

Name: ZoningTechLLC
Description:
Zoning reports are an integral part of the commercial and residential real estate transaction process. At ZoningTech LLC, we understand the importance of providing our clients with a detailed, accurate and timely zoning report, which is why we are considered the nation’s leading due diligence company. Our clients include Attorneys, Investment Firms, REITs, Title Companies, Property Owners, Mortgage Companies, Banks and Developers.

Our Leadership Team has over 45 years of combined experience in Land Use, Planning, Zoning, Document Research and Data Procurement. Our partners have extensive experience in quasi-judicial & legislative public hearings; arbitration proceedings; Bert J. Harris filings with concurrent civil litigation land use actions; and technical writing documents supporting writ of certiorari proceedings. With our extensive land planning and zoning experience, we also have a niche that our competitors do not, we specialize in zoning reports that include undeveloped land sites and property currently under construction.

In today’s business world, many believe that speed is more important than quality. This is in turn frustrating and time consuming to clients that need to return wrong or incomplete reports to the due diligence company and then wait for their revisions. This is not only a waste of time, but in many cases, a waste of money and could delay the closing process.

Name: CMPLX
Description:
CMPLX is an idea. It’s a creative, a project, a space, and an inspiration that caters a full lifestyle – from work to work out, eating to entertainment, retail to restoration. 

It takes art, culture, and conversation into its fold through inviting architecture and breathing green oases. It invites, cocoons, and converses to give birth to new things. 

The project is rooted in our belief that creativity, more than necessity, is the mother of invention, innovation, and progress. As a carefully designed space of seven vanguard warehouses, it reflects the outside without giving much of itself away. That’s why it can exist as a sanctuary where artists, poets, musicians, writers, and thinkers can come and tap inwards to create, develop and motivate. 

CMPLX can be what you need it to be. Its innovative and inclusive design and architecture can amplify cultural enterprises, exhibitions, dialogues, and more. So whether you’re celebrating the past, curating the present, or inventing a future, CMPLX can help birth ideas, map visions, and build communities. 

Coming 2023

Warum KunstOmmerz?
 Maximale Reichweite:
Direkt an hochfrequentierten Standorten wie der Apostelnstraße in Köln erreichen unsere Projekte täglich Tausende von Passanten, darunter Touristen und Theaterbesucher.

Wir passen Inhalte individuell an und wechseln flexibel zwischen Kunst und Werbung. Änderungen sind schnell und unkompliziert möglich.

 Alles aus einer Hand:
Von der Konzeption bis zum technischen Support – wir kümmern uns um alles, damit Ihre Immobilie zum Highlight wird.

Machen Sie Leerstand zum Magneten

Imperial Pointe residents will have the convenience of being within walking distance to all the services and medical care they need as they move through different stages of their life, and they won’t have to leave the neighborhood they call home to access it. 

The principles of new urbanism have been artfully blended with the most advanced technological conveniences to create an experience for visitors and residents that can’t be found anywhere else in the region, possibly the entire state.

Name: StadtLabor Urban Office Europe
Description:
Bei uns kommen Menschen unterschiedlicher Hintergründe zusammen, nicht nur um Projekte voranzutreiben, sondern um miteinander zu teilen, zu lernen und zu wachsen.

Im Rahmen unserer Projekte werden neben Non-Profit Initiativen auch Not-for-Profit Unternehmen für eine nachhaltige und soziale Zukunft gefördert.
Wir freuen uns über einen Besuch auf unserer Webseite.

Die Unterschiedlichkeit und Aufgeschlossenheit jedes Einzelnen in unserer Gruppe sind unser größter Schatz. Sie fördern eine Atmosphäre der Lernbereitschaft und ermöglichen es uns, neue Perspektiven zu entdecken und über den Tellerrand hinauszuschauen.

Unser StadtLabor ist ein offener Raum, der nicht bloß eine Echokammer unserer eigenen Gedanken ist. Es ist ein Raum, der neuen Ideen gegenüber aufgeschlossen ist. Wir lernen ständig voneinander und entwickeln gemeinsam Ideen, die unsere Gemeinschaft und das urbane Wirkungsfeld unserer Stadt bereichern.

Die Vielfalt unserer Projekte spiegelt die Breite unseres Engagements wider. Diese sind dabei Ausdruck des Lernprozesses, der Gruppendynamik und der gemeinsamen Entwicklung, die unser StadtLabor ausmacht. Die Teilhabe an diesem Prozess steht jedem offen, der sich dafür öffnen möchte.

In unserem Umfeld Heidelberg, Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar und Europa wollen wir eine nachhaltige Stadtentwicklung erlebbar machen. Für eine umfassende Strategie wird die Stadtgesellschaft, Wissenschaft, Wirtschaft und auch Verwaltung mit einbezogen.

Name: Campomon
Description:
About Us

At Campomon, our mission is to simplify and enrich the university experience by building a single, trusted digital ecosystem for student life. We believe that students deserve a centralized platform that connects them with their community and provides easy access to the resources they need to thrive.

What We Do

Campomon is an all-in-one web application exclusively for verified university students. Our platform integrates the essential services that are currently scattered across dozens of different websites, social media groups, and apps.

Our core features include:

Exclusive Deals: A curated hub of discounts and offers from local and national brands, helping students save money on everyday essentials.
Student Marketplace: A secure and trusted peer-to-peer marketplace for buying, selling, and renting goods within the campus community.
Community Recommendations: A peer-reviewed guide to the best local spots, from study cafes to budget-friendly restaurants, all recommended by fellow students.
Group Travel & Events: A unique portal that empowers students to propose, organize, and join group trips and discover local events, making adventure and social planning seamless.
Community Forum: A dedicated space for students to ask questions, share advice, and engage in meaningful discussions about campus life.
Why We're Different

Unlike fragmented solutions like generic deal sites or unmoderated social media groups, Campomon provides a secure, verified, and integrated environment. By building our communities on a campus-by-campus basis, we ensure that the content is always relevant, local, and trusted.

Get in Touch

For Students: Ready to unlock a better student life? Join your campus community today by visiting us at http://campomon.com/
For Businesses: If you're looking to connect with the valuable student demographic, partner with us to feature your brand directly to our verified audience. Contact us at support@campomon.com.

Name: UGANDA LAND OWNERS ASSOCIATION
Description:
The Uganda Land Owners Association aims at attracting investment through proactive contribution in policy formulation for rapid agri-business, industrial and infrastructural development in the country.

The organization advocates and mediates conflict resolutions between land owners and tenants with a purpose of embracing effective land utilization for economic inclusion.
The organization identifies and recommends land developers and off takers
We are a registered, non-state, and not-for-profit development organization established to render social justice to land owners and tenants in Uganda for sustainable development with a countrywide membership of land owners in Uganda. We were founded in 2007 and registered by the Government of Uganda in 2010 as a company limited by guarantee. We are blessed with all the necessary governing bodies and systems and are currently steered by Mr. James Galabuzi Mukasa as our Executive Chairman.

We have voluntarily trained and supported over 20,000 Land Owners and tenants in Uganda
ULOA has been evidently carrying out work in many Districts in Uganda. We have voluntarily trained and supported over 20,000 Land Owners and tenants (including women) to embrace a peaceful co-existence on land  for economic inclusion 

Mission
To ensure through discussions, studies, research, advocacy, and collaboration with stakeholders that fair laws, policies and good land-use practices are put in place and sustained for all land owners and tenants in Uganda.
Over All Mandate
To guard, guide, represent, educate and dispense all land matters in Uganda affecting land owners and tenants for sustainable development.

Vision
A Uganda united in diversity through fair and amicable land laws and policies that enable land owners and tenants to utilize their land securely and in perpetuity.

Annual Objective
To inspire and enhance effective land use in Uganda for socio-economic transformation.

Our technical areas include democracy, human rights, and governance; refugee response and resettlement; community engagement; and cross-sectoral system strengthening in natural resource management, water and sanitation, health systems, and other sectors.

Contact us to discuss how Insights & Solutions Consulting can support you and your team to co-design and implement excellent programs that deliver positive, sustainable results.

Name: USC Price Department of Urban Planning and Spatial Analysis
Description:
Overview

USC Price’s Master of Urban Planning (MUP) program prepares students to shape the future of cities—creating healthy, equitable, and sustainable communities worldwide. The program blends rigorous academic study with real-world engagement, using Los Angeles as a living laboratory for hands-on learning and innovation.

Students build a strong foundation in planning theory, data analysis, urban design, and policy, while specializing in one of our diverse concentrations:

Arts and Culture
Economic Development
Design of the Built Environment
Planning for Climate Change & Sustainability

Through studios, internships, and client-based projects, students learn to integrate research, collaboration, and creativity to address the most pressing challenges facing cities today.

At USC Price, MUP students are passionate about improving the quality of life and see every obstacle as an opportunity to create change for the common good. They come from around the world to engage with Los Angeles’s diverse communities, tackling issues such as affordability, mobility, and resilience alongside leading faculty, practitioners, and alumni who are actively shaping urban policy and practice.

Graduates of the MUP program emerge as leaders in urban planning and policy, equipped to work across public, private, and nonprofit sectors in designing inclusive, thriving, and sustainable cities and regions.

Name: The Active Village Project
Description:

To plan, design and deliver 'Physically Literate' places and networks which build peoples competence, confidence, motivation and participation to lead Active Lives.

With recreation and exercise elevated to one of the only reasons to leave the home during the Coronavirus pandemic, it rings true that creating local Active Villages which bring communities together in outdoor places is critical. 

Shifting the way we and our community think about, value and have confidence in using our local open space and active places can be significantly improved through Physical Literate Design.

Name: CRUISE DEVELOPMENT INITIATIVES SOUTH AFRICA
Description:
A Cruise Development Initiatives South Africa vision is a holistic and inclusive space that serves as the heart of a community. It is a place where people of all ages, backgrounds, and abilities can come together, connect, and build a strong sense of belonging.

In this vision, the CDISA is seen as a hub of activity, providing a wide range of programs and services to meet the diverse needs and interests of its residents. It offers spaces for socializing, learning, and recreation, fostering a sense of community and promoting overall well-being.

The CDISA is envisioned as a place where individuals can engage in various activities such as sports, arts and culture, education and skill-building, wellness and health programs, and community events. It provides opportunities for personal growth, social interaction, and community development.

The vision for a CDISA also emphasizes inclusivity, ensuring that it is accessible to all members of the community, regardless of their socioeconomic status, ethnicity, gender, or ability. It is a place where diversity is celebrated, and everyone feels welcomed and valued.

Furthermore, the CDISA vision sees it as a catalyst for positive change in the community. It is a space that encourages active citizenship, collaboration, and civic engagement. It serves as a platform for community members to come together, discuss important issues, and work towards common goals, such as addressing social inequalities, promoting sustainability, and creating a safer and more vibrant community.

Overall, the CDISA vision embodies a place that not only meets the immediate needs of its residents but also fosters a sense of belonging, social connection, and empowerment. It is a space where individuals can thrive, and the community as a whole can grow and prosper.

Name: MSI Global Campus
Description:
Today, countless disadvantaged individuals grapple with deeply rooted challenges in education, employment, and sustainability—barriers that perpetuate cycles of poverty and hinder progress. Our Global Legacy Initiative was created to disrupt these cycles by creating innovative pathways that empower individuals to rise above their socio-economic disruptions and build enduring life legacies.

From these very challenges emerge an unparalleled opportunity for transformation. MSI Global Campus, a visionary 501(c)(3) organization, is on a mission to revitalize rural and underserved communities, transforming them into thriving hubs of entrepreneurial innovation and sustainable growth. Since our launch in November 2023, we’ve forged powerful partnerships with organizations that share our passion for creating sustainable futures through education, employment, and holistic support services.

Our purpose is clear: to train and equip individuals to overcome generational challenges and prepare them for a future of empowerment and self-reliance. Through innovative entrepreneurship programs, workforce readiness training, and youth career development initiatives, we provide pathways for individuals to rewrite their stories and build lasting legacies.

Working hand-in-hand with our partners, we’ve designed some of the most comprehensive and groundbreaking programs for underserved populations. Our offerings span critical areas, including justice-involved and justice-impacted individuals, violence intervention, veteran reintegration, foster care youth support, and other community development initiatives. Every program is meticulously tailored to meet the unique needs of the communities we serve and includes behavior and mental health counseling, peer counseling, skills and life training, and employment or entrepreneurship.

Name: Health, Access + Planning (HAP) Lab
Description:
We are the Health, Access + Planning (HAP) Lab in the School of Urban and Regional Planning at Toronto Metropolitan University.

Led by Dr. Samantha Biglieri, RPP, MCIP, the Health, Access + Planning (HAP) Lab conducts critical, community-based, and applied research at the intersections of planning and health. Specifically, we center our work on the wellbeing of marginalized populations, and are interested in working with communities to build just, inclusive cities. We do research on neighbourhoods, housing, transportation, built form, public space, accessibility, care, governance, policy and more. We also have a focus on the experiences of older adults and people living with dementia in their communities.

Check out our website for our Publications, Blog Posts and recent Projects to see what we are up to! The Projects page also includes current opportunities to participate in research.

You can learn more about our incredible past and present team members, and if you are interested in collaborating with us, or working with the Lab, please get in touch.

Name: Orange Coast River Park
Description:
Orange Coast River Park is a concept for coordinating the stakeholders at the mouth of the Santa Ana River for an improved open space thru cooperation.
The idea began with the Friends of Harbors Beaches and Parks(FHBP) then a committee took on the mission and then from the committee grew a non-profit called Orange Coast River Park, Inc is a 501 (c) (3) non-profit, but coordination among the stakeholders become too difficult since non-profits, cities, Orange COunty and agencies have limited resourecs and compete for money and volunteers.
There remains a need for a group of people to continue the mission to coordinate educational, recreational, and conservation efforts among stakeholders in the area that we consider to be within the boundaries of the Orange Coast River Park. By coordinating efforts across boundaries andstakeholders we can seek greater efficiency, eliminate waste, and attract greater funding from government, Non-governmental organizations (NGO’s), and private sources.

Coordinating with stakeholders, agencies, landowners, and the public to help more than 1,000 acres of Open Space at the mouth of the Santa Ana River  is needed to develop a mutually agreed master plan that meets the diverse needs of our urban populations while also allowing for conservation and preservation of valuable habitats.

One day a group with rally around three major goals:

Restore historic ecological staircase
Extend a seamless passageway to the coast from inland
Create access for residents and visitors to an oasis of tranquility

Success will most likely require these Basic Principles:

Property owners retain their ownership and authority
Agencies act in partnership to manage the park
Stakeholders work together for the benefit of the overall park

Name: MOTOEKIPA
Description:
MotoEkipa to największa społeczność motocyklowa w Polsce – zrzeszamy pasjonatów dwóch kółek, łącząc ich przez wydarzenia, wspólne wyprawy, wyścigi, wiedzę i dobrą zabawę.

Tworzymy unikalny ekosystem dla motocyklistów:
 Liga Wyścigowa MotoEkipa Cup – ogólnopolski cykl amatorskich zawodów torowych. Emocje, rywalizacja, bezpieczeństwo i progres na najwyższym poziomie.
 MotoEkipa Travel – organizujemy wyprawy motocyklowe w Polsce i za granicą (m.in. Alpy, Bałkany, Maroko). Profesjonalna logistyka, przewodnicy, niezapomniane trasy.
 MotoEkipa Burger House – rozwijamy sieć barów w klimacie motocyklowym. Jedzenie, klimat i motocykle – wszystko w jednym miejscu.
 MotoEkipa Store – bluzy, koszulki i akcesoria tworzone z myślą o motocyklistach. Sprawdź nasz merch i dołącz do stylu MotoEkipy.
 Discord MotoEkipy – aktywna społeczność 1000+ riderów. Wymiana doświadczeń, pomoc, spoty, wspólne jazdy, rabaty, strefa premium.
 Szkolenia torowe i techniczne – rozwijamy umiejętności jeźdźców w bezpiecznych warunkach. Współpracujemy z najlepszymi instruktorami w kraju.

Działamy z pasją i konsekwencją – budując markę, która nie tylko reprezentuje motocyklistów, ale ich łączy i daje realną wartość. Naszym celem jest profesjonalizacja amatorskiej sceny motocyklowej, tworzenie społeczności, rozwój oferty komercyjnej i zbudowanie ogólnopolskiej platformy usług motocyklowych.

MotoEkipa to więcej niż jazda – to styl życia.
Jesteśmy tam, gdzie dzieje się najwięcej. I dopiero się rozkręcamy.

 Zapraszamy do współpracy partnerów, sponsorów, organizatorów i producentów nie tylko z branży moto.

Name: World Forum of Favelas
Description: The World Forum of Favelas is an innovative initiative that will take place in November 2024, in Rio de Janeiro, bringing together community leaders, favela residents, and representatives from over 40 countries. Organized by the Central Única das Favelas (CUFA), in partnership with UNESCO and the G20 Social, the event aims to connect experiences and foster a global exchange between favelas, marginalized communities, and peripheries around the world. The Forum will create a platform to strengthen international dialogue and highlight the central role of favelas as spaces of social innovation, resilience, and transformation. It is a unique opportunity to promote partnerships, collaborative solutions, and amplify the global voice of favelas.

Name: büro spatzig
Description: Das büro spatzig setzt sich mit (im)materiellen Zwischenräumen und ihren Geschichten im urbanen Kontext auseinander. Wir stellen Fragen zu bestehenden, zukünftigen oder imaginativen Nutzungen, Nutzungskonflikten, Zugänglichkeiten & Gestaltungsmöglichkeiten. In einem interdisziplinären Ansatz verbinden wir Perspektiven aus den Urban Studies, der Szenografie, der Kunstgeschichte, aber auch den Politikwissenschaften, Gender Studies und der Soziologie. Unsere Praxis bewegt sich zwischen konzeptuellen, performativen und installativen Projekten, wobei wir uns in partizipativen und kooperativen Ansätzen üben. Unser Ziel ist dabei nicht das Finden endgültiger Antworten, sondern die Stärkung einer prozessorientierten Planungs- und Gestaltungspraxis von Räumen.

Name: Caritas Fiji
Description:
Caritas Fiji is exclusively a humanitarian and socio-developmental organisation, and has a totally non-profit character. Caritas is founded as a socio pastoral instrument and not as a political entity. It shall be apolitical. It shall be inclusive by embracing all religions, creed, gender, and ethnicity.

It provides a beacon of hope for women, men and children in times of hardship and contributes to the development of social justice at all times. Caritas Fiji’s mandate includes integral development, emergency relief, advocacy, peace building, respect for human rights and support for proper stewardship of the planet’s environment and resources. Caritas Fiji fights poverty, exclusion, intolerance and discrimination. More importantly, it empowers people to participate fully in all matters affecting their lives, and it advocates on their behalf at national and international forums. Caritas Fiji promotes partnership: local autonomy is paramount in ensuring effective teamwork for the good of all.

By pooling expertise and resources, Caritas Fiji is able to identify issues at the grassroots, analyse them at national and international levels, and then take action locally. We support locally run small community development projects among poor communities. These projects address the root causes of poverty and lift the standard of living for people who are often desperately poor.

Il GAL NUOVO FIOR D'OLIVI, come gli altri GAL, elaborano il piano di azione locale (PAL) e gestiscono i contributi finanziari erogati dal FEASR (Fondo Europeo Agricolo per lo Sviluppo Rurale). Per realizzare il PAL, il GAL dispone di fondi nell’ambito del programma d’iniziativa comunitaria LEADER.
L’area interessata dalla SSL del Nuovo Fior d’Olivi ricade nei territori amministrativi di 7 comuni: Binetto, Bitonto, Giovinazzo, Grumo Appula, Modugno, Palo del Colle, Terlizzi.

Name: ZIEMIA
Description: ZIEMIA is an interdisciplinary studio. Working on a wide variety of scales, from urban to architectural, we always analize broadly in each context we create. Name: Plattform Energiestadt Burgdorf
Description:
Sparsamer und effizienter Umgang mit Energie ist schon längst das Gebot, jetzt mehr denn je. Davon sind die Stadt Burgdorf und die Localnet AG überzeugt. Seit 2010 setzt sich die von der Localnet AG und der Baudirektion Burgdorf ins Leben gerufene Plattform Energiestadt aktiv für die Information und Sensibilisierung der Bevölkerung zum Thema Energieeffizienz ein. Konkrete Aktionen unterstützen dabei die Bevölkerung Burgdorfs, selbst zu handeln und einen bewussten Umgang mit den Ressourcen zu pflegen.

Die Angebote der Plattform Energiestadt sind vielseitig und greifen zahlreiche Themen rund um Energieeffizienz, erneuerbare Energien und Energieverbrauch auf. Von Fachveranstaltungen für Unternehmer über die Förderung effizienter Haushaltsgeräte und die Sensibilisierung auf eine nachhaltige Mobilität. Für jede und jeden ist etwas dabei.

Name: Altstadt für Alle!
Description:
Der gemeinnützige Verein Altstadt für Alle! e.V. will dazu beitragen, dass Hamburg sein Potenzial ausschöpft, zum Vorbild einer grundlegenden Stadterneuerung in Richtung Multifunktionalität, Nachhaltigkeit, Klimaresilienz, Gemeinwohlorientierung, soziale Gerechtigkeit und Lebensqualität zu werden.

Dafür steht eine „koproduktive Stadtentwicklung“ mit Mut und Energie, die alle Akteure aus Zivilgesellschaft, guten Unruhestiftern und etablierter Stadtgesellschaft.

Grundlage der Arbeit ist die Erkenntnis, dass die bisherigen Instrumente der Stadtentwicklung nicht ausreichen, um die erforderliche „sozial-ökologische Transformation“ unserer Städte zu erreichen. Dieser neue Konsens von Politik und Wissenschaft, formuliert u.a. in den Neuen Leipzig-Charta von 2020 (unterschrieben von allen 27 EU-Mitgliedern), muss endlich auch praktisch werden.

STRONG är ett konsultbolag inom infrastruktur, bygg och anläggning. Vi erbjuder företag och organisationer teknik-/produktionsbaserade konsult-och rekryteringstjänster. Vi är specialiserade inom byggledning, produktionsledning, produktionsstöd, teknik, kvalitet, miljö och arbetsmiljö (KMA).
 
Varför just STRONG
 
För att vi har ett sunt värdegrundstänk, eftersträvar professionalism, uppskattar och belönar den enskildes engagemang, värnar om våra konsulters utveckling och välmående samt våra kunder intressen. I praktiken så betyder det att om du har ambition, engagerar dig och gör ett bra jobb så finns det stora utvecklingsmöjligheter för rätt person-/er att utvecklas inom företaget. Vi är en platt organisation med högt i tak!
 
Låter det intressant? Skicka oss ditt CV eller kontakta oss för mer information på info@strongconsulting.se, så hör vi av oss inom kort!

Name: Leafline Trails Coalition
Description:
Connecting Trails, Connecting Communities.

The Leafline Trails Coalition is working to create an interconnected network of shared use trails across the Central Puget Sound region to improve health, community, quality of life, mobility, and access for all.

Imagine riding your bike from downtown Tacoma to Mount Rainier, from Seattle to the North Cascades, or all the way across the Kitsap Peninsula. The Leafline Trails Coalition is focused on knitting together central Puget Sound by trail in King, Kitsap, Pierce, and Snohomish counties.

Our Vision is an interconnected, intuitive, well-traveled, and treasured trails network spanning the Central Puget Sound region, providing equitable access, health benefits and recreational opportunities for all.

Name: Citoyens Solidaires pour un Développement Local, CiSoDeL
Surf Canyon
Description:
Rank Dynamics develops Dynamic Ranking, a real-time contextual search technology that automatically disambiguates intent by observing real-time user behavior in order to immediately re-order search results. The technology assists users in finding relevant information that might otherwise have remained buried as deep as page 100 of the search results. Its browser extensions, which operate on Google, Bing and Yahoo!, have been download 12+ million times and have processed 6+ billion queries. 

Here is their pitch:

"Rather than leaving users to manually filter through static sets of links, this innovative application uses real-time behavior signals to calculate 'instantaneous relevancies' within a result set in order to dynamically and immediately pull forward the most pertinent results while pushing back those less germane."

Name: Master Urban Planners
Description:
Master Urban Planners was established in 1998. The company, with its headquarters in Lahore, has branches in London, Islamabad, Sydney, and Jhelum. We embarked on our journey by winning a design competition for a new housing project in Tehsil Khanpur, District Rahim Yar Khan. Although the project couldn't proceed due to funding constraints, it served as an inspiration to establish Master Urban Planners. Our primary focus lies in providing exemplary Design and Cost Consultancy services. Our team blends their design expertise with a steadfast commitment to delivering high-quality outcomes within the client's financial and time limitations, while also considering environmental factors. Each project is treated as a unique opportunity to showcase our design ingenuity, turning challenges into opportunities and transforming ideas into reality. We steer clear of frivolous aesthetic trends, opting instead for innovative design solutions, often drawing inspiration from successful approaches of the past. Through our designs, we aspire to create places, spaces, and environments that enhance the quality of life for end users, adding exceptional value to their overall well-being.

Over the years, our company has amassed extensive experience and currently offers a comprehensive range of services. These services can be provided in-house or through collaborations with international firms affiliated with Master Urban Planners. Our services encompass Architectural Design, Interior Design, Structural Design, MEP Design, Master Planning, Urban Design, Cost Consultancy, Quantity Surveying, Claims Assessment, Value Engineering, Tender & Contract Documentation, Project Management, Project Supervision, Infrastructure Design, Environmental Impact Assessment, Topographical Survey, and Disaster Management.

Name: Sampurasih
Description:
Project Lead - Aksi Angkatan PWK '23: Sampurasih

As part of our community service initiative in PWK ‘23, we successfully organized a program aimed at optimizing waste management systems in Kelurahan Pajajaran. The focus of our project was to enhance waste separation and promote the economic benefits of waste through partnerships with local waste banks.

Key activities included:
- Organizing workshops on organic and inorganic waste management.
- Educating residents of RT 03 and RT 04 on waste sorting.
- Encouraging active participation in sustainable practices that turn waste into economic opportunities, through the slogan “Bank Sampah Mendukung, Pilah Sampah Jadi Untung!”

This project not only raised environmental awareness but also empowered the local community by improving waste management practices, contributing towards a cleaner and greener environment.

Name: BNUVO
Description:
Centered around the core philosophy of "Urban/Rural Evolution," a foundational platform has been developed to support the implementation of novel infrastructure and urban/rural systems, integrated with the digital twin concept. This platform merges traditional design and construction methods with cutting-edge generative technologies, including large language models and genetic algorithms, to create a digital ecosystem that spans the entire lifecycle of infrastructure.
The platform is designed to optimize the efficiency and value-driven operation of new infrastructure and health metrics. It starts with the planning and construction of foundational projects, integrating infrastructure and construction technologies with data-driven strategies. By interlinking and consolidating various architectural modules, the platform manages the complete lifecycle of a building—from initiation, design, and construction to operation, maintenance, updates, and asset management.

Name: Urban Spark, LLC
Description:
Urban Spark collaborates with nonprofits, governments, and institutions to illuminate solutions for cities and communities to become better places for human and planetary thriving. At the core of this work is:
 - Strengthening the care economy, the work that is required to support the well-being and development of people, and
 - Integrating our urban environment with the natural environment.

The goal is to increase access to opportunities, basic services, and the fundamentals for living safely while reducing stress through creating reliable and redundant systems and resilient environments. With an eye towards mitigating and adapting to climate change, Urban Spark works to:
 - strengthen the public realm, including public space, public transport, and public institutions, 
 - invest in social infrastructure and participatory processes, and
 - integrate nature-based solutions and ecosystem approaches in our urban systems.

Urban Spark strives to give people and institutions the knowledge and tools they need to make decisions, implement projects, and ultimately achieve the transformation we all know this world needs. We can achieve this if we understand that within us is the knowledge and experience, the spark, that can illuminate the path forward. This spark is fueled by joy, creativity, humor, and community, and this is what undergirds our work.

Name: Our Solid Roots Association
Description:
EMPOWERING WOMEN TO CONQUER SUBSTANCE USE AND BRING A BRIGHTER FUTURE FOR THEMSELVES, CHILDREN, FAMILY, AND COMMUNITY
SUPPORTING HEALTHY COMMUNITIES WITH INNOVATION AND COLLABORATION.

A woman is our key entry point of contact for families and communities that we work with.

From here, we reach out to the woman’s significant others who may also be struggling and needing support. However, these significant others, are also seen as key collaborators in supporting the client.

The mandate of Our Solid Roots Association is to develop healthier communities and help women who are struggling with substance use to reach their goals of staying sober.

Our Mission:

We exist to provide long term support to female & LGBQ+2 substance use survivors, between ages 16 and 45 and their loved ones, post treatment to reduce the rate of relapse. 

Currently, Our Solid Roots Association (OSRA), is working to understand the challenges that expose these individuals to substance use, and the barriers and supports that exist within different marginalized ethnic communities, by engaging in discussions and stories from theses community members.

At North Augusta Forward, our mission is to inspire, lead, and implement a united vision that provides the best possible quality of life for the community of North Augusta, SC.

Aderendo al Circuito Virtus sarà subito possibile entrare in contatto con nuovi acquirenti, che andranno ad aggiungersi a quelli che già si hanno, permettendo un’ottimizzazione delle vendite rispetto alla disponibilità di beni e servizi. Dall’altro lato, ogni iscritto del circuito avrà la possibilità di trovare nuovi fornitori e partner per l’acquisto di beni e servizi per la propria attività, aumentando di conseguenza la possibilità di risparmio.

All’interno del Circuito gli scambi saranno effettuati in Virtus, una moneta virtuale, che non si sostituisce e non si converte con l’Euro, ma permette scambi esclusivamente all’interno del Circuito stesso

Name: Uitgesort Creative
Description:
Uitgesort Creative is a non-profit organisation dedicated to transforming lives in Tafelsig, Cape Town, through community entrepreneurship. We believe in the potential of every individual to contribute meaningfully to society. Our mission is to unlock that potential by providing opportunities, support, and resources.

Our Vision: To create a thriving community where every person has the dignity of meaningful work, the joy of creativity, and the support of a strong, interconnected network.
Our Mission:
Create Safe Spaces
Provide Training and Mentorship
Foster Collaboration
Promote Local Products and Services
Support Families

Why We Do It: In Tafelsig, unemployment and substance abuse have created a cycle of despair. Many are forced to beg, and some turn to drugs in desperation. At Uitgesort Creative, we see the untapped potential in our community. By providing the right support and opportunities, we can help our people rise above these challenges, restore their dignity, and create sustainable livelihoods.

Our Approach: Community entrepreneurship is our strategy to break the cycle of poverty and addiction. By harnessing the collective strength of our people, we aim to create businesses that serve the community and provide meaningful employment. We envision a Tafelsig where the same hands that are forced to beg can create beautiful crafts, the same minds numbed by substances can an innovate, and the same hearts that have lost hope can inspire.

Join Us: We invite you to join us in experiment. Whether you are a potential partner, donor, volunteer, or simply someone who believes in the power of community, your support can make a difference. Together, we can turn Tafelsig into a example of community-driven success. And the same hearts that have lost hope, can inspire.
Location: Cape Town, Western Cape, Western Cape

Name: CommunityFactor
Description:
CommunityFactor: Waar jongeren de toekomst vormgeven.

Bij CommunityFactor zetten we ons in voor een toekomst waarin iedereen een plek heeft. Wij geloven dat deze visie alleen bereikt kan worden door de energie, creativiteit en passie van jongeren te mobiliseren. Onze missie is om krachtige jongerencommunities te creëren die actief bijdragen aan een inclusieve en rechtvaardige samenleving.

Wat Wij Bieden:

Jongerencommunities: Wij faciliteren het opbouwen van hechte communities waar jongeren écht zichzelf zijn en hun ideeën en visies kunnen delen. Deze communities dienen als een broedplaats voor initiatieven die de complexe maatschappelijke uitdagingen aanpakken.

Talentontwikkeling: Ons aanbod omvat workshops en trainingen die jongeren niet alleen voorzien van de nodige vaardigheden om uitdagingen aan te gaan, maar ook hun zelfvertrouwen vergroten om als changemakers op te treden.

Partnerschappen met Overheden: We bouwen bruggen tussen jongeren en beleidsmakers om samen te werken aan een toekomst waarin iedereen een stem heeft. Onze adviesdiensten helpen overheidsinstanties om jongeren effectief te betrekken bij het vormen van gemeenschapsgerichte oplossingen.

Impact en Inclusie: Ons doel is om tastbare veranderingen te realiseren die de levens van individuen en gemeenschappen verbeteren. We meten succes niet alleen in projecten en programma's, maar in de groei van onze jongeren en de positieve verschuivingen binnen de gemeenschap.

CommunityFactor staat voor een wereld waarin de jeugd de leiding neemt in het creëren van een toekomst waarin iedereen welkom is. Doe mee en help ons deze visie werkelijkheid te maken.

Jarak started back in 2018. Our aim was, and still is, to connect people together.  Who knows, maybe your new best friend is your neighbor, living right next to your doorstep!

Here at Jarak, we provide a safe platform, online and offline, where people connect, share experiences, exchange knowledge, and collaborate together.

We have collaborated with talented creatives from our community on several eco-friendly products, all locally made. Additionally, we have organized numerous workshops and events to learn from and share special moments together.

So far, we’ve listened to more than 600 people, who we now call ‘Neighbors’,  share their stories with us on our social media platform  @jarakonline. They shared about their life, work, cooking, dancing, drawing, plants, education, and much much more beneficial subjects.

Let’s bring back the sense of community to our neighborhood, one collaboration at a time!

Name: AppealShield
Description:
AppealShield helps UK planning officers write stronger refusal reports and reduce the risk of losing on appeal.

Our tool analyses the wording of draft refusal reasons and compares it with thousands of past appeal decisions. Within seconds, AppealShield identifies the five most relevant past cases – showing how inspectors reasoned, which policies were critical, and what contributed to decisions being allowed or dismissed.

Whether you’re preparing a report for a householder application, a complex major scheme, or a sensitive infill site, AppealShield helps you:

— Spot weaknesses in your draft reasons for refusal
— Understand how inspectors have interpreted similar cases
— Refine your wording for clarity, evidence, and policy strength
— Reduce the likelihood of appeals being lodged
— Increase your chances of a dismissal if they are

 Backed by real inspector decisions
AppealShield draws on over 75,000 Planning Inspectorate appeal decisions and uses advanced AI to summarise patterns, policies, and outcomes.

 Built for local authorities
Designed for planning professionals, AppealShield is currently in early trials with council planning teams across England.

Interested in taking part?
 Register at appealshield.com or message us here on LinkedIn.

Through mapping and controlling the complex networks of transport and utilities, landscape and public realm, commercial and residential uses, zero-carbon and zero waste opportunities, we solve problems and unlock commercial value through practical tools, innovative techniques and future thinking.

Name: AR2 Homes
Description:
At AR2 Homes, we believe in the power of community and its centrality to inclusive growth. As a dedicated minority-owned firm, we're at the forefront of transforming communities, promoting affordability, and driving urban renewal without displacement and gentrification.

Join us in our mission to create a Chicago where inclusivity meets innovation, where history meets opportunity, and where every family has a place to call home.

Name: CAV URBANISMO
Description:
Nuestro taller de diseño arquitectónico se  dedica al DISEÑO Y CONSTRUCCIÓN DE OBRAS DE URBANISMO (parques, andenes, canchas, juegos infantiles, vías, arborización, redes de acueducto, alcantarillado, pluviales, eléctricas, entre otras), nos encargamos de proyectos desde la etapa de diseño, incluyendo tramite y aprobación ante entidades territoriales en etapas de construcción y entrega final de obras.

CAV URBANISMO S.A.S, es una empresa constituida en julio de 2017 con el objetivo de realizar diseño y construcción de obras civiles en Colombia. Desde el inicio contamos con profesionales con más de 6 años de experiencia en diseño y construcción tanto de espacio público como de proyectos arquitectónicos. Es uno de nuestros principales objetivos mantener nuestra firma a la vanguardia de los procesos y nuevas propuestas que se desarrollan en los campos de urbanismo, diseño y construcción, para ello estamos permanentemente actualizados en los lineamientos de las entidades públicas, observando referentes externos y los profesionales adelantan estudios de posgrado en áreas afines a nuestro campo de trabajo.

Name: Rocca di Cerere Geopark
Description:
Rocca di Cerere Geopark è una società mista pubblico-privata che svolge la funzione di Gruppo di Azione Locale (GAL) per 17 comuni (16 della provincia di Enna e uno della provincia di Caltanissetta).

Avendo funzione di Gruppo di Azione Locale (GAL), operiamo come agenzia di sviluppo per il territorio dell’entroterra siciliano, rafforzando, anche finanziariamente, la capacità delle comunità locali di elaborare e attuare progetti.

Inoltre, siamo l'autorità responsabile del Rocca di Cerere UNESCO Global Geopark, riconosciuto dall'UNESCO dal 2001, che si estende nell'area centrale della Sicilia, sui Monti Erei, nei territori dei comuni di: Enna, Aidone, Assoro, Calascibetta, Nissoria, Leonforte, Piazza Armerina, Valguarnera e Villarosa.

Name: Greater Kampala Metropolitan Area Urban Development Program
Description:
The Greater Kampala Metropolitan Area Urban Development Program (GKMA-UDP) is a government of Uganda (GoU) program implemented through Office of the President - Ministry of Kampala Capital City and Metropolitan Affairs (MoKCC&MA).  GKMA-UDP is supported by the World Bank and French Development Agency

The main objective of the GKMA-UDP is to improve institutional capacity for coordination, management and operational excellence in order to increase access to enhanced infrastructure and services in the Greater Kampala Metropolitan area.

Name: BALLISLONDON
Description:
BALLISLONDON is a grassroots community organisation dedicated to using basketball as a powerful tool for youth development, social change, and community empowerment across London. 
Founded by CEO Ayesha Hanid in the heart of South London, we provide inclusive, safe, and inspiring spaces where young people—especially those from underrepresented and disadvantaged backgrounds—can develop not only their basketball skills, but life skills that will support them on and off the court.

Through open runs, training sessions, workshops, tournaments, and mentoring, BALLISLONDON builds confidence, leadership, teamwork, and resilience. We stand at the intersection of sport, culture, and purpose—bridging gaps between local youth, schools, parents, and decision-makers in the city.

Our Mission:
To empower young people through basketball by creating accessible opportunities for growth, education, and community impact.

What We Do:

1. Community Basketball Sessions
	•	Free or low-cost sessions for ages 11–25 across London
	•	Skill development, fitness, teamwork, and fun
	•	Female-focused sessions to increase access for girls

2. Tournaments & Events
	•	Local showcases and 5v5/3x3 competitions
	•	Collaborations with brands, venues, and influencers
	•	Use of sport to celebrate youth voices and culture

3. Mentoring & Life Skills
	•	Support with CV writing, interviews, job applications
	•	Mental health check-ins and positive male/female role models
	•	Financial literacy, discipline, and real-world readiness

4. School & Community Partnerships
	•	Delivering PE sessions, assemblies, and after-school clubs
	•	Working with schools and councils to identify at-risk youth
	•	Connecting families with wider support services

5. Pathways & Progression
	•	Signposting to clubs, scholarships, coaching courses, and training
	•	Platforming talent with exposure opportunities and media content
	•	Encouraging entrepreneurship and creative industry links.

Name: Pulse Urban Alliance
Description: Team of city experts for sustainable cities, creative industries and community development. Research-based and human-centric urban design

Name: Urban Prime Consults
Description:
Urban Prime Consults (UPC) is a firm of Development Consultants with a wide range of experience in Urban and Regional Planning, Geographical Information Systems (GIS) Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA), Architecture, and Project Planning and Development. The Company is duly Registered as a Consultancy Firm with the Town Planners Registration Council (PFN 600)  and The Association of Town Planning Consultants of Nigeria (240).

The firm draws over 10 years of professional experience from its partners and associates having delivered high-profile projects financed by the World Bank, United States Trade and Development Agency (USTDA), the Federal of Nigeria, Lagos State Government, Corporate organisations, and Individuals, with footprints across the six Geo-Political Zones of Nigeria. 

Consequently, our staff are well-traveled and familiar with operating efficiently and effectively in different climates and cultures. We interact with other professionals in project teams very proactively and creatively.

Name: Women4Mangrove
Description:
Mission — “Empower. Restore. Inspire.”
We empower women to become conservation leaders, regenerating ecosystems through sustainable livelihoods that honor tradition and nature.

Vision — “A Regenerative Future for Cu Lao Dung”
A thriving coastal community where economic well-being, biodiversity, and cultural heritage coexist — powered by women-led innovation.

Name: Carnegie Community Development Corporation
Description: The Carnegie Community Development Corporation (CCDC) is a nonprofit committed to supporting the businesses in Carnegie. The CCDC plans community events, assists with marketing, and provides funding opportunities to Carnegie businesses.

Name: EPSUS
Description: EPSUS è il marchio commerciale che connota l’esperienza della MUSA Srl, società di ingegneria attiva in servizi tecnici professionali legati al governo del territorio, nel campo del project management e della progettazione edilizia. La società si avvale, da anni, anche degli apporti di soggetti impegnati su aspetti specialistici nell’ambito, soprattutto, dei processi di trasformazione urbana.

Name: Forward-Progress, LLC
Description:
Forward Progress, LLC was founded to research and advance multimodal transportation best practices with public and private entities. Our expertise aligns with emerging trends in transportation and land use, focusing on providing transportation services for users of all abilities in a safe and equitable manner. We offer consulting services spanning a wide range of topics, including progressive curbside management, complete streets planning and design, speed management, Vision Zero safety initiatives, and asset management / GIS. When delivering these services, our team applies facilitation and community engagement expertise to understand the subject community’s culture and unique transportation demands.

Forward Progress staff works closely with the Institute of Transportation Engineers (ITE) and collaborates with the National Association of Transportation Officials (NACTO). The firm’s Founder recently completed a three-year term as ITE’s Complete Streets Council Chair, overseeing the development of several guidance documents and training efforts.

Name: 40acres DAO
Description: 40acres DAO is a Decentralized Autonomous Organization built to onboard creatives, students, and entrepreneurs from underserved communities into Web-3 through engagement, education, and empowerment.

Name: Strathnairn Development Company
Description:
Our mission is to invest in the community of Strathnairn in order to empower the current and next generation while respecting our heritage. We do that, by seeking community values, creating action plans and seeking necessary resources to invest in the future and provide long term, sustainable benefits for the community. 

We are a community organisation owned and managed by the local community through membership.

Our aim is to reduce dependency on grant support by generating income through enterprise and ownership of assets. All trading surpluses are principally reinvested in the organisation or the community.

We are investing in the future and aim to achieve sustainable regeneration of this community and we are addressing a range of economic, social, environmental and cultural issues within Strathnairn.

Name: URBAN MAPIFY
Description:
At Urban Mapify, we are dedicated to reshaping urban landscapes through innovative GIS mapping, insightful urban planning, and visionary architectural design. Our firm brings together a diverse team of experienced urban planners, architects, and civil engineers to provide holistic solutions that address the complex needs of modern cities and developments. 
Our expertise in Geographic Information Systems (GIS) provides precise spatial data analysis that drives smarter urban planning, infrastructure optimization, and land-use decisions. By leveraging cutting-edge mapping technologies, we enable developers, governments, and businesses to make informed, data-driven choices.
With the addition of architectural services, our architects work seamlessly with planners and engineers to design spaces that are functional, innovative, and sustainable. From urban residential projects to large-scale infrastructure, we deliver designs that blend creativity with efficiency, supported by our civil engineering expertise.
At Urban Mapify, we combine GIS technology, architectural vision, and engineering precision to offer a comprehensive approach to urban development.

Name: Friends of Limehouse
Description: Friends of Limehouse is a local non-profit organization focused on improving the environment and air quality in Tower Hamlets, East London. Air pollution in Limehouse is one of the worst in London and is over twice the legal limit due to the fumes from the Rotherhithe Tunnel and Limehouse Link Tunnels and the lack of green space. This affects the health and well-being of the residents, particularly children and the elderly, with a larger than national average number of asthma and other allergic and cardiovascular diseases. We are gathering data to persuade the Tower Hamlets Council to take a strategic approach to tackling environmental issues.

Name: Green Development Fund
Description: The Green Development Fund (GDF) is dedicated to environmental resilience through strategic planning. Central to its mission is the advancement of positive social impact, equity, and economic inclusion across diverse populations and geographies. GDF envisions a future where sustainable development drives measurable benefits for the environment, society and the economy, facilitating long-term support for all stakeholders.

Name: DUCCI PLAYGROUND
Description:
La DUCCIPLAYGROUND
ha una solida esperienza nel settore di giochi per parchi e pavimentazioni antitrauma.

La nostra esperienza in parchi giochi e pavimentazione antitrauma , trova il suo valore aggiunto nelle nostre squadre che propongono soluzioni funzionali, confortevoli e durature nel tempo.

Le Certificazioni ISO 9001 e ISO 14001 attestano il nostro costante impegno nei confronti del cliente e il rispetto di alti standard di qualità, mentre l'attestazione SOA, ci permette di partecipare alle gare per l'esecuzione di appalti pubblici di Arredo Urbano.

Utilizziamo solo materiali certificati e poniamo grande attenzione sulla fase di progettazione per assicurare un risultato concreto, funzionale, sicuro e duraturo nel tempo; al contempo ci preoccupiamo che tutte le nostre realizzazioni siano svolte nel rispetto dell'ambiente

Description:
Dearte' Constructive Solutions LLC 

A One-Stop, Home & Building Construction or Maintenance & Repair Services Contractor, to help you in any situation that you may have questions to for a; Safe, Industry Standard and Presentable, Code-Compliant Construction Solution. 

No task is too large or too small... Whether it's a minor repair, a moderate remodel for your space, a complete renovation, or if you're embarking on a new construction project and need guidance, we've got you covered. 

About Our Company...

SERVING YOUR COMMUNITY FOR OVER 15 YEARS!

We recognize that your home or business is a significant investment.  Dearte' Constructive Solutions LLC 
 A Technical Services Provider for all needs!

We are also dedicated to giving back to the community by contributing labor and materials to Habitat for Humanity's Yakima County projects.

 Dearte' Constructive Solutions LLC

Name: Nagar65
Description: Nagar65 is a blog about cities and how we (choose to) move in them. It's all about understanding and appreciating recipes for urban mobility that can unlock joy for more people. If you're interested in cities, mobility or the general idea of living the good life then you may be interested in my explorations of how those 3 things are interrelated for most of us.

Name: Kandy Planning Lab
Description:
Kandy Planning Lab is a non-profit organization committed to transforming Kandy’s built environment while enhancing its unique heritage and character. We intend to create an inclusive platform for all interested parties to actively participate in shaping the city's future through transparent, evidence-based, and participatory, urban planning. 
Our vision and mission as follows;

Vision: Shaping and preserving Kandy’s built and natural environment

Mission: 

1. Act as an independent, open participatory, and continuous urban planning initiative for Kandy, which informs, advocates, and consult relevant authorities. 

2. Build trust within the community by providing transparent, accountable, and evidence-based urban planning solutions.

3. Create a platform and opportunities for the public to actively participate in urban planning in Kandy and in Sri Lanka

4. Act as a social infrastructure based on urban and regional planning, open to all.

Name: East Phillips Neighborhood Institute
Description: East Phillips Neighborhood Institute (EPNI) stewards a community-led effort to convert the historically contested Roof Depot warehouse in Minneapolis into an indoor urban farm and climate resiliency hub.

Name: joinTransition
Description: joinTransition supports communities in their transformation to more inclusive, regenerative systems. We curate co-creation among diverse local actors, ensure close alignment with local policy makers, and invite citizens to be part of the change. We develop and test these methods and make them available to others via trainings and collaboration.

Name: Gearth
Description: Gearth permite ver, analizar y comprender la realidad de manera diferente para transformarla a través de la solución de problemas

Name: Zack Urban Solutions, Inc.
Description:
Zack Urban Solutions uses a pragmatic approach to create cities that are beloved yet functional, exciting yet convenient, and prosperous yet equitable. We can help you create a vision that is bold and innovative and which can actually be implemented. Zack Urban Solutions has over two decades of experience in local government and public policy. We know what it takes to create plans that won’t look beautiful and then just sit on a shelf; we create programs that are actionable and that work. 

Dan Zack, the founder, president, and principal planner of Zack Urban Solutions, has worked in local government for 23 years and dealt with a wide range of projects in that time. He has worked on transportation plans, housing plans, citywide general plans, historic preservation plans, downtown revitalization plans, streetscape designs, and parking management plans. He has written hundreds of pages of adopted zoning codes and has rezoned well over 100,000 parcels of land. He has processed and overseen the planning entitlements of numerous development projects of every type, including thousands of units of housing. Finally, he knows how to work with the community, get their feedback, and rally them around a vision.

ZUS operates on the guiding principle that well-designed cities can improve our lives in dramatic ways. Good city planning can make it easy to drive shorter distances or make some trips on foot or by bike, reducing local air pollution and and traffic injuries; it can make cities more economically robust; it can enable a stronger sense of community; and it can enable cities to grow while consuming less farmland and wildlife habitat.

Whether they are developing a single building or planning for the future of an entire neighborhood, ZUS will help our clients create vibrant, sustainable, and equitable communities.

Name: Cestral inc.
Description: Cestral conçoit et fabrique des abris préfabriqués destinés aux parcs et aux aménagements publics. Une variété de modèles d'abris est proposée. Ils se distinguent tous par leur qualité, leur résistance aux vieillissements et leur esthétique. En plus d'offrir un lieu de rassemblement à l'abri du soleil et des intempéries, un abri Cestral deviendra immédiatement l'élément central de votre aménagement,

Name: Quien Es Tu Vecindario
Description:
The mission of Quien Es Tu Vecinario is to provide arts, news, and civic engagement to under-served communities of color in Los Angeles, including elders, immigrants, youth, LGBTQUIA+ people, and more.

From 2018 – 2019, our team led two “Back to School Party” events for communities in Central L.A., providing free school supplies to at least 100 attendees during each party, as well as connecting them to journalists, artists, and non-profit service providers.

Our organization became a certified nonprofit in 2020, and from 2020 – 2021, played a major role in the storytelling series known as Making Our Neighborhood: Redlining, Gentrification and Housing in East Hollywood, which won an Award of Merit from the American Planning Association chapter in Los Angeles.

This summer 2023, we were awarded a Creative Recovery L.A. Grant by the L.A. County Department of Arts and Culture, which distributed American Rescue Plan funds to just 668 applicants in L.A. County. Please check back soon to learn about our new board officers and representatives.

Because “it’s the PEOPLE who make up the places we live in.”

Name: Shreveport Metropolitan Planning Commission
Description:
The Shreveport-Caddo Metropolitan Planning Commission is a planning organization established in 1954 by the Louisiana State Legislature to help ensure that all development of property is built in such a manner that is in the best interests of its citizens.

Functions include the processing of  zoning, subdivision platting, site plan, variance and other development  related  applications, along with zoning enforcement, long range  planning, and the issuing of various permits including certificates of occupancy and sign permits.  Policies, programs and regulations include:

The Metropolitan Planning Commission is required to adopt a general plan (Master Plan) for the physical development of Shreveport and Caddo Parish.

The Planning Commission operates in an advisory role and makes recommendations to the Shreveport City Council and Caddo Parish Commission on zoning change requests.

MPC employs an Executive Director to direct the MPC staff and carry out the work program of the Planning Commission.

Name: Shyroke community
Description:
Shyroke community is located in the Zaporizhzhia region in southeast Ukraine.

The population of our community is more than 
30 000 people who live in 35 villages.

Nowadays, the community mainly works in agriculture and the food and processing industry.

Name: Legacy Investment Trust NPC
Description:
Founded in 2019, Legacy Investment Trust NPC (Non-Profit Company) was established with the sole objective of transforming disadvantaged communities of the past into thriving metropolises of the future through a myriad of Humanitarian Large Infrastructure Developments designed around each of the community's own Community Empowerment Strategy (CES). The company has since then also established itself as Infrastructure Projects Investment Partner for other entities and organizations seeking funding to complete their large infrastructure projects.

We are guided by the African principles of Ubuntu, Humanity; and our projects are designed in line with and to address some (if not all), of the 17 Goals for Sustainable Development (SDGs) as identified by the United Nations. 

WE ARE LEADERS in the dynamic discipline of shaping a community for the future.  Our Community Empowerment Strategies are designed to reshape the next chapter of urban existence. Through brilliant project and strategy design, we can galvanize an entire community to think, interact, and succeed for work, for play and for life. 

WE ENABLE disadvantaged communities to increase control over their own lives. A Community Empowerment Strategy (CES) treats the community as one living entity and is concerned with all connected parts: Jobs, Income, Education and Training, Child Care, Health, Housing, and so forth - parts that need to function together and in harmony if a community is to be healthy and an area has high livability standards

WE SOURCE funding at no cost to the community, beneficiaries, sponsors, partners and/or other stakeholders 

Our vision is aligned with our founding country South Africa's post COVID-19 Economic Reconstruction and Recovery Plan (RRP 2050), the African Union's Agenda 2063, and other partner and sponsor programs designed to equally transform disadvantaged communities worldwide.

WE SERVE our communities with altruistic intentions - LEVERAGING THE POWER TO CREATE A BETTER WORLD.

Name: The Dominion Homeowners Association
Description: The Dominion is a master-planned community comprised of over 1,600 acres.  Enjoy the beauty of the neighborhood and special amenities, including 24/7 guard gated community with controlled access, 24/7 off-duty SAPD officers onsite, community social events that serve to celebrate and bring our residents together, abundant green belts, and man-made lakes.

Name: The Urban REnitiative
Description:
We focus on urban design initiatives that better our city and town centers. The “RE” in the combined term “REnitiative” represent initiatives that call for action for the REthinking, REdesigning and RE-engineering of our city and town centers, with a focus on reducing car traffic and improving pedestrian safety and mobility in the United States.

Widening roads only increases car traffic (more space for cars = more cars), and thus, is not a logical solution to eliminate congestion and improve mobility. Not to mention the danger that huge pickup trucks and SUVs impose on pedestrians and motorists in smaller vehicles. Reducing our dependency on automobiles overall is the only way to improve these aforementioned massively increasing problems in our society. 

We take a European-styled approach towards making our streets safer, as we cherish the road safety successes of cities like Amsterdam, Paris, and Barcelona.
But, we also think outside the box. With our efforts, we WILL make strides towards a better future when it comes to urban mobility and pedestrian safety. Will you join us in this endeavour?

Name: NikolasNeubert.com
Description: Nikolas Neubert ist Urban Advisor, Speaker und Tech-Enthusiast. Er begleitet Stadtgestalter rund um das Thema Digitalisierung & Nachhaltigkeit. Büros und Gemeinden unterstützt er dabei digitale Trends richtig einzuordnen, die passenden Instrumente wie Kompetenzen aufzubauen und schafft als Urban Designer neue Planungserlebnisse.

Name: PlanningAlerts
Description: Planning Alerts is a free Australian service which searches as many planning authority websites as it can find and emails you details of applications near you. The aim of this is to enable shared scrutiny of what is being built (and knocked down) in peoples' communities.

Name: COOPERX30
Description:
Uma nova proposta cooperativista que une ideias e transforma sonhos em realidade.
Unindo pessoas a grandes projetos!

Name: بودكاست شراكة
Description:
"شراكة" هو بودكاست يهدف إلى تبادل المعرفة والخبرة من العوالم المهنية والتجارية وريادة الأعمال مع الشباب. سيكون البودكاست متاحًا للجمهور للاستماع إليه عبر الإنترنت، وخاصة على موقع يوتيوب. فكرة البودكاست مستوحاة من عدم وجود مثل هذه الموارد للشباب الذين هم على وشك البدء أو بدأوا حياتهم المهنية للتو. نحن نؤمن أنه من خلال استضافة ضيوف من خلفيات وصناعات مختلفة وفي مناصب مختلفة، يمكننا إضافة قيمة إلى حياة الكثيرين. سنطلق البودكاست كسلسلة من الحلقات تتحدث كل منها عن موضوع مختلف ضمن مجال تخصصنا ومع ضيف مختلف.
نحن نؤمن بأن العديد من الشباب في مجتمعنا، أثناء انتقالهم من متابعة التعليم إلى العالم الحقيقي، يفتقرون إلى موارد موثوقة يمكنهم من خلالها التعرف على الوضع الحالي للصناعة المحددة التي يهتمون بها ويتابعون حياتهم المهنية أو يطلقون مشاريعهم الخاصة. عمل. من خلال توفير المعرفة المدعومة بالخبرة الحقيقية من الأشخاص الذين نجحوا في مجالاتهم، نعتقد أنه يمكننا المساهمة في تعزيز تعليم العديد من الشباب وتزويدهم بالرؤى والحيل النقدية للعالم المهني الحديث. سواء كانوا عمالًا يعملون في صناعة معينة واكتسبوا الكثير من الخبرة فيها، أو أصحاب الأعمال الذين أطلقوا أعمالهم الخاصة وتغلبوا على التحديات لتحقيق النجاح، فإن مهمتنا هي بناء جسر لنقل معارفهم وخبراتهم و قم بتوصيل هؤلاء الأشخاص بالآخرين الذين بدأوا للتو ويمكنهم الاستفادة منهم كثيرًا.

 Sharaka is a podcast that aims to share knowledge and experience from the professional, business, and entrepreneurial worlds with the youth. The podcast will be available to the public to listen to on the internet, mainly on YouTube. The podcast idea was inspired by the lack of such resources for young people who are pursuing their careers. By hosting guests from different backgrounds and industries and in different positions, we believe we can add value to the lives of many. We will launch the podcast as a series of episodes each talking about a different topic within our niche and with a different guest.

Name: JDT International
Description:
Founded by Jeffrey Tubbs, JDT International Inc. (JDT), is a firm specializing in the consultation of Public / Private Partnerships in Urban Planning and Real Estate Development. Community empowerment is at the core of our enterprises and serves as a catalyst for the development of over 100 units of housing and $30 million in public space improvements in the Philadelphia region.
Equitable development and community empowerment have been at the core of this enterprise for almost 2 decades. Since its inception, JDT has donated 50% of its time to the City of Philadelphia through varying social impact initiatives and placemaking efforts.

Name: Be the Blessing Foundation
Description: Be The Blessing Foundation (BTB) actively provides resources and programs to underrepresented communities, creating opportunities for growth and effectively diminishing the impacts of disparities.

Name: Pellere Foundation
Description: Regional community redevelopment organization focused on equitable, impactful benefit.

Name: Delegación Provincial de Ordenamiento Territorial y Urbanismo Villa Clara
Description:
El Instituto Nacional de Ordenamiento Territorial y Urbanismo (INOTU) es la entidad nacional subordinada al Consejo de Ministros que dirige la aplicación de la política del Estado y el Gobierno en materia de ordenamiento territorial, urbanismo, los aspectos del diseño y la arquitectura relacionados con este último, así como el catastro. INOTU cuenta con 15 delegaciones provinciales, una oficina rectora en la ZEDM (Zona Especial de Desarrollo Mariel) y cuatro oficinas en zonas con regulaciones especiales.
La Delegación Provincial de Ordenamiento Territorial y Urbanismo de Villa Clara es la encargada de ejecutar las acciones del Instituto Nacional en la provinca.
